title: Bernstein polynomial-based transcription method for solving optimal trajectory generation problems
title_zh: 用于解决最优轨迹生成问题的基于 Bernstein 多项式的转录方法
comment: 16 pages, 17 figures, extended works of a conference paper published in IROS 2019
comments: 16 pages, 17 figures, extended works of a conference paper published in IROS 2019
abstract: This paper presents a method and an open-source implementation, Bernstein/Bézier Optimal Trajectories (BeBOT), for the generation of trajectories for autonomous system operations. The proposed method is based on infinite dimensional optimal control formulations of trajectory generation problems. By approximating the trajectories using Bernstein polynomials, these problems can be transcribed as nonlinear programming problems, which can then be solved using off-the-shelf solvers. Bernstein polynomials possess favorable geometric properties that enable the trajectory planner to efficiently evaluate and enforce constraints along the vehicles' trajectories, including maximum speed and angular rates, minimum distance between trajectories and between the vehicles and obstacles. By virtue of these properties, feasibility and safety constraints typically imposed in autonomous vehicle operations can be enforced and guaranteed independently on the order of the polynomials. Thus, the trajectory generation algorithm can efficiently generate feasible and collision-free trajectories, and can be deployed for real-time safety critical applications in complex environments and for multiple vehicle missions.
summary: This paper presents a method and an open-source implementation, Bernstein/Bézier Optimal Trajectories (BeBOT), for the generation of trajectories for autonomous system operations. The proposed method is based on infinite dimensional optimal control formulations of trajectory generation problems. By approximating the trajectories using Bernstein polynomials, these problems can be transcribed as nonlinear programming problems, which can then be solved using off-the-shelf solvers. Bernstein polynomials possess favorable geometric properties that enable the trajectory planner to efficiently evaluate and enforce constraints along the vehicles' trajectories, including maximum speed and angular rates, minimum distance between trajectories and between the vehicles and obstacles. By virtue of these properties, feasibility and safety constraints typically imposed in autonomous vehicle operations can be enforced and guaranteed independently on the order of the polynomials. Thus, the trajectory generation algorithm can efficiently generate feasible and collision-free trajectories, and can be deployed for real-time safety critical applications in complex environments and for multiple vehicle missions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种方法和开源实现 Bernstein/Bézier 最优轨迹 (BeBOT)，用于生成自主系统操作的轨迹。所提出的方法基于轨迹生成问题的无限维最优控制公式。通过使用伯恩斯坦多项式近似轨迹，这些问题可以转化为非线性规划问题，然后可以使用现成的求解器来求解。伯恩斯坦多项式具有良好的几何特性，使轨迹规划器能够有效地评估和强制沿车辆轨迹施加约束，包括最大速度和角速率、轨迹之间以及车辆与障碍物之间的最小距离。凭借这些特性，自动驾驶车辆操作中通常施加的可行性和安全性约束可以独立于多项式的阶数来强制执行和保证。因此，轨迹生成算法可以有效地生成可行且无碰撞的轨迹，并且可以部署用于复杂环境中的实时安全关键应用和多个车辆任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Bernstein多项式的轨迹生成方法BeBOT，将无限维最优控制问题转化为非线性规划问题，用于自主系统的最优轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹生成方法在处理复杂约束（如速度、避障）和实时性要求方面存在不足，需开发一种能高效保证安全性和可行性的轨迹规划算法。
AI.method: 通过Bernstein多项式逼近轨迹，将无限维最优控制问题转录为非线性规划问题，并利用其几何特性直接约束轨迹的物理参数和避障条件。
AI.result: 算法可高效生成满足速度、角速度及避障约束的可行轨迹，适用于复杂环境下的实时安全关键应用和多车辆协同任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过Bernstein多项式的特性实现了约束独立于多项式阶数的保证，为自主系统提供了高效、安全的轨迹生成解决方案。

search_text: Bernstein polynomial-based transcription method for solving optimal trajectory generation problems 用于解决最优轨迹生成问题的基于 Bernstein 多项式的转录方法 This paper presents a method and an open-source implementation, Bernstein/Bézier Optimal Trajectories (BeBOT), for the generation of trajectories for autonomous system operations. The proposed method is based on infinite dimensional optimal control formulations of trajectory generation problems. By approximating the trajectories using Bernstein polynomials, these problems can be transcribed as nonlinear programming problems, which can then be solved using off-the-shelf solvers. Bernstein polynomials possess favorable geometric properties that enable the trajectory planner to efficiently evaluate and enforce constraints along the vehicles' trajectories, including maximum speed and angular rates, minimum distance between trajectories and between the vehicles and obstacles. By virtue of these properties, feasibility and safety constraints typically imposed in autonomous vehicle operations can be enforced and guaranteed independently on the order of the polynomials. Thus, the trajectory generation algorithm can efficiently generate feasible and collision-free trajectories, and can be deployed for real-time safety critical applications in complex environments and for multiple vehicle missions. 本文提出了一种方法和开源实现 Bernstein/Bézier 最优轨迹 (BeBOT)，用于生成自主系统操作的轨迹。所提出的方法基于轨迹生成问题的无限维最优控制公式。通过使用伯恩斯坦多项式近似轨迹，这些问题可以转化为非线性规划问题，然后可以使用现成的求解器来求解。伯恩斯坦多项式具有良好的几何特性，使轨迹规划器能够有效地评估和强制沿车辆轨迹施加约束，包括最大速度和角速率、轨迹之间以及车辆与障碍物之间的最小距离。凭借这些特性，自动驾驶车辆操作中通常施加的可行性和安全性约束可以独立于多项式的阶数来强制执行和保证。因此，轨迹生成算法可以有效地生成可行且无碰撞的轨迹，并且可以部署用于复杂环境中的实时安全关键应用和多个车辆任务。 本文提出一种基于Bernstein多项式的轨迹生成方法BeBOT，将无限维最优控制问题转化为非线性规划问题，用于自主系统的最优轨迹生成。 Calvin Kielas-Jensen,Venanzio Cichella cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Wasserstein K-Means for Clustering Tomographic Projections
title_zh: 用于聚类层析投影的 Wasserstein K-Means
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 1 table
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures, 1 table
abstract: Motivated by the 2D class averaging problem in single-particle cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM), we present a k-means algorithm based on a rotationally-invariant Wasserstein metric for images. Unlike existing methods that are based on Euclidean ($L_2$) distances, we prove that the Wasserstein metric better accommodates for the out-of-plane angular differences between different particle views. We demonstrate on a synthetic dataset that our method gives superior results compared to an $L_2$ baseline. Furthermore, there is little computational overhead, thanks to the use of a fast linear-time approximation to the Wasserstein-1 metric, also known as the Earthmover's distance.
summary: Motivated by the 2D class averaging problem in single-particle cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM), we present a k-means algorithm based on a rotationally-invariant Wasserstein metric for images. Unlike existing methods that are based on Euclidean ($L_2$) distances, we prove that the Wasserstein metric better accommodates for the out-of-plane angular differences between different particle views. We demonstrate on a synthetic dataset that our method gives superior results compared to an $L_2$ baseline. Furthermore, there is little computational overhead, thanks to the use of a fast linear-time approximation to the Wasserstein-1 metric, also known as the Earthmover's distance.
abstract_zh: 受单粒子冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 中的 2D 类平均问题的启发，我们提出了一种基于图像旋转不变 Wasserstein 度量的 k 均值算法。与基于欧几里德 ($L_2$) 距离的现有方法不同，我们证明 Wasserstein 度量可以更好地适应不同粒子视图之间的面外角度差异。我们在合成数据集上证明，与 $L_2$ 基线相比，我们的方法提供了更好的结果。此外，由于使用了 Wasserstein-1 度量（也称为推土机距离）的快速线性时间近似，因此计算开销很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于旋转不变Wasserstein度量的K均值算法，用于解决断层扫描投影的聚类问题，特别是在冷冻电镜的2D类别平均任务中。
AI.motivation: 传统基于欧几里得距离的方法无法有效处理冷冻电镜中不同粒子视角的平面外角度差异，需寻找更适应角度差异的聚类度量。
AI.method: 设计基于Wasserstein-1度量（Earthmover's distance）的K均值算法，通过快速线性时间近似方法降低计算复杂度，并确保旋转不变性。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上验证了方法优于L2基线，且计算开销显著降低，证明了Wasserstein度量在处理角度差异时的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Wasserstein K-Means算法能更准确捕捉角度差异，且保持高效计算，为冷冻电镜等领域的投影聚类提供了新方法。

title: L-RED: Efficient Post-Training Detection of Imperceptible Backdoor Attacks without Access to the Training Set
title_zh: L-RED：在不访问训练集的情况下对难以察觉的后门攻击进行有效的训练后检测
comment: mber:accepted by ICASSP 2021
comments: mber:accepted by ICASSP 2021
abstract: Backdoor attacks (BAs) are an emerging form of adversarial attack typically against deep neural network image classifiers. The attacker aims to have the classifier learn to classify to a target class when test images from one or more source classes contain a backdoor pattern, while maintaining high accuracy on all clean test images. Reverse-Engineering-based Defenses (REDs) against BAs do not require access to the training set but only to an independent clean dataset. Unfortunately, most existing REDs rely on an unrealistic assumption that all classes except the target class are source classes of the attack. REDs that do not rely on this assumption often require a large set of clean images and heavy computation. In this paper, we propose a Lagrangian-based RED (L-RED) that does not require knowledge of the number of source classes (or whether an attack is present). Our defense requires very few clean images to effectively detect BAs and is computationally efficient. Notably, we detect 56 out of 60 BAs using only two clean images per class in our experiments on CIFAR-10.
summary: Backdoor attacks (BAs) are an emerging form of adversarial attack typically against deep neural network image classifiers. The attacker aims to have the classifier learn to classify to a target class when test images from one or more source classes contain a backdoor pattern, while maintaining high accuracy on all clean test images. Reverse-Engineering-based Defenses (REDs) against BAs do not require access to the training set but only to an independent clean dataset. Unfortunately, most existing REDs rely on an unrealistic assumption that all classes except the target class are source classes of the attack. REDs that do not rely on this assumption often require a large set of clean images and heavy computation. In this paper, we propose a Lagrangian-based RED (L-RED) that does not require knowledge of the number of source classes (or whether an attack is present). Our defense requires very few clean images to effectively detect BAs and is computationally efficient. Notably, we detect 56 out of 60 BAs using only two clean images per class in our experiments on CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 后门攻击（BA）是一种新兴形式的对抗性攻击，通常针对深度神经网络图像分类器。攻击者的目标是，当来自一个或多个源类的测试图像包含后门模式时，让分类器学会分类到目标类，同时保持所有干净测试图像的高精度。针对 BA 的基于逆向工程的防御 (RED) 不需要访问训练集，而只需要访问独立的干净数据集。不幸的是，大多数现有的 RED 都依赖于一个不切实际的假设，即除目标类之外的所有类都是攻击的源类。不依赖此假设的 RED 通常需要大量干净图像和大量计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于拉格朗日的 RED (L-RED)，它不需要知道源类的数量（或是否存在攻击）。我们的防御需要很少的干净图像来有效检测 BA，并且计算效率高。值得注意的是，在 CIFAR-10 的实验中，我们每类仅使用两张干净图像来检测 60 个 BA 中的 56 个。

AI.tldr: 本文提出L-RED方法，在无需访问训练集的情况下高效检测深度神经网络中的不可感知后门攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有反后门防御方法依赖于不现实的假设（所有非目标类均为源类），且需要大量干净样本和高计算成本。
AI.method: 基于拉格朗日松弛的L-RED方法，无需预知源类数量或攻击存在性，仅需少量干净样本即可检测后门。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，使用每类仅2个干净样本即可检测出60个后门攻击中的56个。
AI.conclusion: L-RED通过减少对源类数量的依赖和降低计算需求，显著提升了后门检测的效率与实用性。

method: 基于拉格朗日松弛的L-RED方法，无需预知源类数量或攻击存在性，仅需少量干净样本即可检测后门。
result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，使用每类仅2个干净样本即可检测出60个后门攻击中的56个。
conclusion: L-RED通过减少对源类数量的依赖和降低计算需求，显著提升了后门检测的效率与实用性。
search_text: L-RED: Efficient Post-Training Detection of Imperceptible Backdoor Attacks without Access to the Training Set L-RED：在不访问训练集的情况下对难以察觉的后门攻击进行有效的训练后检测 Backdoor attacks (BAs) are an emerging form of adversarial attack typically against deep neural network image classifiers. The attacker aims to have the classifier learn to classify to a target class when test images from one or more source classes contain a backdoor pattern, while maintaining high accuracy on all clean test images. Reverse-Engineering-based Defenses (REDs) against BAs do not require access to the training set but only to an independent clean dataset. Unfortunately, most existing REDs rely on an unrealistic assumption that all classes except the target class are source classes of the attack. REDs that do not rely on this assumption often require a large set of clean images and heavy computation. In this paper, we propose a Lagrangian-based RED (L-RED) that does not require knowledge of the number of source classes (or whether an attack is present). Our defense requires very few clean images to effectively detect BAs and is computationally efficient. Notably, we detect 56 out of 60 BAs using only two clean images per class in our experiments on CIFAR-10. 后门攻击（BA）是一种新兴形式的对抗性攻击，通常针对深度神经网络图像分类器。攻击者的目标是，当来自一个或多个源类的测试图像包含后门模式时，让分类器学会分类到目标类，同时保持所有干净测试图像的高精度。针对 BA 的基于逆向工程的防御 (RED) 不需要访问训练集，而只需要访问独立的干净数据集。不幸的是，大多数现有的 RED 都依赖于一个不切实际的假设，即除目标类之外的所有类都是攻击的源类。不依赖此假设的 RED 通常需要大量干净图像和大量计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于拉格朗日的 RED (L-RED)，它不需要知道源类的数量（或是否存在攻击）。我们的防御需要很少的干净图像来有效检测 BA，并且计算效率高。值得注意的是，在 CIFAR-10 的实验中，我们每类仅使用两张干净图像来检测 60 个 BA 中的 56 个。 本文提出L-RED方法，在无需访问训练集的情况下高效检测深度神经网络中的不可感知后门攻击。 Zhen Xiang,David J. Miller,George Kesidis cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Power pooling: An adaptive pooling function for weakly labelled sound event detection
title_zh: 功率池：用于弱标记声音事件检测的自适应池函数
abstract: Access to large corpora with strongly labelled sound events is expensive and difficult in engineering applications. Much research turns to address the problem of how to detect both the types and the timestamps of sound events with weak labels that only specify the types. This task can be treated as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem, and the key to it is the design of a pooling function. In this paper, we propose an adaptive power pooling function which can automatically adapt to various sound sources. On two public datasets, the proposed power pooling function outperforms the state-of-the-art linear softmax pooling on both coarsegrained and fine-grained metrics. Notably, it improves the event-based F1 score (which evaluates the detection of event onsets and offsets) by 11.4% and 10.2% relative on the two datasets. While this paper focuses on sound event detection applications, the proposed method can be applied to MIL tasks in other domains.
summary: Access to large corpora with strongly labelled sound events is expensive and difficult in engineering applications. Much research turns to address the problem of how to detect both the types and the timestamps of sound events with weak labels that only specify the types. This task can be treated as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem, and the key to it is the design of a pooling function. In this paper, we propose an adaptive power pooling function which can automatically adapt to various sound sources. On two public datasets, the proposed power pooling function outperforms the state-of-the-art linear softmax pooling on both coarsegrained and fine-grained metrics. Notably, it improves the event-based F1 score (which evaluates the detection of event onsets and offsets) by 11.4% and 10.2% relative on the two datasets. While this paper focuses on sound event detection applications, the proposed method can be applied to MIL tasks in other domains.
abstract_zh: 在工程应用中，访问具有强标记声音事件的大型语料库是昂贵且困难的。许多研究转向解决如何使用仅指定类型的弱标签来检测声音事件的类型和时间戳的问题。该任务可以视为多实例学习（MIL）问题，其关键是池化函数的设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应功率池功能，可以自动适应各种声源。在两个公共数据集上，所提出的功率池函数在粗粒度和细粒度指标上都优于最先进的线性 Softmax 池。值得注意的是，它相对于两个数据集，将基于事件的 F1 分数（评估事件开始和偏移的检测）提高了 11.4% 和 10.2%。虽然本文重点关注声音事件检测应用，但所提出的方法也可以应用于其他领域的 MIL 任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应power pooling函数，用于解决弱标签声学事件检测中的多实例学习问题。
AI.motivation: 强标签声学事件数据集获取成本高，现有方法在弱标签场景下难以准确检测事件时序信息。
AI.method: 设计自适应power pooling函数，通过自动适配不同声源特性改进多实例学习中的池化操作。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，事件F1分数相对提升11.4%和10.2%，优于线性softmax池化方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效提升弱标签声学事件检测性能，并适用于其他多实例学习任务。

authors_text: Charley Gros,Andreanne Lemay,Olivier Vincent,Lucas Rouhier,Anthime Bucquet,Joseph Paul Cohen,Julien Cohen-Adad
title: ivadomed: A Medical Imaging Deep Learning Toolbox
title_zh: ivadomed：医学影像深度学习工具箱
abstract: ivadomed is an open-source Python package for designing, end-to-end training, and evaluating deep learning models applied to medical imaging data. The package includes APIs, command-line tools, documentation, and tutorials. ivadomed also includes pre-trained models such as spinal tumor segmentation and vertebral labeling. Original features of ivadomed include a data loader that can parse image metadata (e.g., acquisition parameters, image contrast, resolution) and subject metadata (e.g., pathology, age, sex) for custom data splitting or extra information during training and evaluation. Any dataset following the Brain Imaging Data Structure (BIDS) convention will be compatible with ivadomed without the need to manually organize the data, which is typically a tedious task. Beyond the traditional deep learning methods, ivadomed features cutting-edge architectures, such as FiLM and HeMis, as well as various uncertainty estimation methods (aleatoric and epistemic), and losses adapted to imbalanced classes and non-binary predictions. Each step is conveniently configurable via a single file. At the same time, the code is highly modular to allow addition/modification of an architecture or pre/post-processing steps. Example applications of ivadomed include MRI object detection, segmentation, and labeling of anatomical and pathological structures. Overall, ivadomed enables easy and quick exploration of the latest advances in deep learning for medical imaging applications. ivadomed's main project page is available at https://ivadomed.org.
summary: ivadomed is an open-source Python package for designing, end-to-end training, and evaluating deep learning models applied to medical imaging data. The package includes APIs, command-line tools, documentation, and tutorials. ivadomed also includes pre-trained models such as spinal tumor segmentation and vertebral labeling. Original features of ivadomed include a data loader that can parse image metadata (e.g., acquisition parameters, image contrast, resolution) and subject metadata (e.g., pathology, age, sex) for custom data splitting or extra information during training and evaluation. Any dataset following the Brain Imaging Data Structure (BIDS) convention will be compatible with ivadomed without the need to manually organize the data, which is typically a tedious task. Beyond the traditional deep learning methods, ivadomed features cutting-edge architectures, such as FiLM and HeMis, as well as various uncertainty estimation methods (aleatoric and epistemic), and losses adapted to imbalanced classes and non-binary predictions. Each step is conveniently configurable via a single file. At the same time, the code is highly modular to allow addition/modification of an architecture or pre/post-processing steps. Example applications of ivadomed include MRI object detection, segmentation, and labeling of anatomical and pathological structures. Overall, ivadomed enables easy and quick exploration of the latest advances in deep learning for medical imaging applications. ivadomed's main project page is available at https://ivadomed.org.
abstract_zh: ivadomed 是一个开源 Python 包，用于设计、端到端训练和评估应用于医学成像数据的深度学习模型。该软件包包括 API、命令行工具、文档和教程。 ivadomed 还包括预训练模型，例如脊柱肿瘤分割和椎骨标记。 ivadomed 的原始功能包括一个数据加载器，可以解析图像元数据（例如采集参数、图像对比度、分辨率）和受试者元数据（例如病理、年龄、性别），以便在训练和评估期间进行自定义数据分割或额外信息。任何遵循脑成像数据结构 (BIDS) 约定的数据集都将与 ivadomed 兼容，而无需手动组织数据，这通常是一项繁琐的任务。除了传统的深度学习方法之外，ivadomed 还具有尖端的架构，例如 FiLM 和 HeMis，以及各种不确定性估计方法（任意和认知），以及适应不平衡类别和非二元预测的损失。每个步骤都可以通过单个文件方便地配置。同时，代码是高度模块化的，允许添加/修改架构或预处理/后处理步骤。 ivadomed 的示例应用包括 MRI 对象检测、分割以及解剖和病理结构的标记。总体而言，ivadomed 可以轻松快速地探索医学成像应用深度学习的最新进展。 ivadomed 的主要项目页面位于 https://ivadomed.org。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ivadomed的开源Python工具包，用于设计、端到端训练和评估医学影像的深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 传统医学影像分析流程繁琐，需手动处理数据格式和元信息，且缺乏对先进深度学习架构及不确定性估计方法的集成支持。
AI.method: 通过支持BIDS标准的数据加载器自动解析影像与受试者元数据，集成预训练模型、先进架构（如FiLM/HeMis）、不确定性估计方法及类别不平衡损失函数，并采用模块化设计实现灵活扩展。
AI.result: 提供了MRI物体检测、分割及病理结构标记等应用示例，验证了工具在医学影像分析任务中的有效性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: ivadomed通过开源、模块化和标准化设计，显著降低了医学影像深度学习研究的门槛，加速了前沿技术在医疗场景中的落地应用。

authors_text: Yuqian Fu,Li Zhang,Junke Wang,Yanwei Fu,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Depth Guided Adaptive Meta-Fusion Network for Few-shot Video Recognition
title_zh: 用于少镜头视频识别的深度引导自适应元融合网络
comment: accepted by ACM Multimedia 2020
comments: accepted by ACM Multimedia 2020
abstract: Humans can easily recognize actions with only a few examples given, while the existing video recognition models still heavily rely on the large-scale labeled data inputs. This observation has motivated an increasing interest in few-shot video action recognition, which aims at learning new actions with only very few labeled samples. In this paper, we propose a depth guided Adaptive Meta-Fusion Network for few-shot video recognition which is termed as AMeFu-Net. Concretely, we tackle the few-shot recognition problem from three aspects: firstly, we alleviate this extremely data-scarce problem by introducing depth information as a carrier of the scene, which will bring extra visual information to our model; secondly, we fuse the representation of original RGB clips with multiple non-strictly corresponding depth clips sampled by our temporal asynchronization augmentation mechanism, which synthesizes new instances at feature-level; thirdly, a novel Depth Guided Adaptive Instance Normalization (DGAdaIN) fusion module is proposed to fuse the two-stream modalities efficiently. Additionally, to better mimic the few-shot recognition process, our model is trained in the meta-learning way. Extensive experiments on several action recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our model.
summary: Humans can easily recognize actions with only a few examples given, while the existing video recognition models still heavily rely on the large-scale labeled data inputs. This observation has motivated an increasing interest in few-shot video action recognition, which aims at learning new actions with only very few labeled samples. In this paper, we propose a depth guided Adaptive Meta-Fusion Network for few-shot video recognition which is termed as AMeFu-Net. Concretely, we tackle the few-shot recognition problem from three aspects: firstly, we alleviate this extremely data-scarce problem by introducing depth information as a carrier of the scene, which will bring extra visual information to our model; secondly, we fuse the representation of original RGB clips with multiple non-strictly corresponding depth clips sampled by our temporal asynchronization augmentation mechanism, which synthesizes new instances at feature-level; thirdly, a novel Depth Guided Adaptive Instance Normalization (DGAdaIN) fusion module is proposed to fuse the two-stream modalities efficiently. Additionally, to better mimic the few-shot recognition process, our model is trained in the meta-learning way. Extensive experiments on several action recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 人类只需给出几个例子就可以轻松识别动作，而现有的视频识别模型仍然严重依赖大规模的标记数据输入。这一观察结果激发了人们对少镜头视频动作识别的兴趣，该识别旨在仅用很少的标记样本来学习新动作。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于少镜头视频识别的深度引导自适应元融合网络，称为 AMeFu-Net。具体来说，我们从三个方面解决少镜头识别问题：首先，我们通过引入深度信息作为场景的载体来缓解这种数据极度稀缺的问题，这将为我们的模型带来额外的视觉信息；其次，我们将原始 RGB 片段的表示与通过时间异步增强机制采样的多个非严格对应的深度片段融合，从而在特征级别合成新实例；第三，提出了一种新颖的深度引导自适应实例归一化（DGAdaIN）融合模块来有效地融合双流模态。此外，为了更好地模仿少样本识别过程，我们的模型以元学习的方式进行训练。对多个动作识别基准的广泛实验证明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度引导的自适应元融合网络（AMeFu-Net），用于解决小样本视频动作识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频识别模型依赖大量标注数据，而人类仅需少量示例即可识别动作。小样本学习旨在通过极少标注样本学习新动作，但面临数据稀缺挑战。
AI.method: 通过引入深度信息增强场景表征，结合时序异步增强机制融合RGB与深度剪辑，并设计深度引导的自适应实例归一化（DGAdaIN）模块实现多模态高效融合，采用元学习框架训练模型。
AI.result: 在多个动作识别基准测试中验证了该方法的有效性，显著提升了小样本场景下的视频识别性能。
AI.conclusion: AMeFu-Net通过深度信息引导与多模态融合策略，有效解决了小样本视频识别中的数据稀缺问题，为相关研究提供了新思路。

title: Stronger, Faster and More Explainable: A Graph Convolutional Baseline for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 更强、更快、更可解释：基于骨架的动作识别的图卷积基线
comment: Accepted by ACM MultiMedia 2020, 9 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
comments: Accepted by ACM MultiMedia 2020, 9 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
abstract: One essential problem in skeleton-based action recognition is how to extract discriminative features over all skeleton joints. However, the complexity of the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) models of this task tends to be exceedingly sophisticated and over-parameterized, where the low efficiency in model training and inference has obstructed the development in the field, especially for large-scale action datasets. In this work, we propose an efficient but strong baseline based on Graph Convolutional Network (GCN), where three main improvements are aggregated, i.e., early fused Multiple Input Branches (MIB), Residual GCN (ResGCN) with bottleneck structure and Part-wise Attention (PartAtt) block. Firstly, an MIB is designed to enrich informative skeleton features and remain compact representations at an early fusion stage. Then, inspired by the success of the ResNet architecture in Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), a ResGCN module is introduced in GCN to alleviate computational costs and reduce learning difficulties in model training while maintain the model accuracy. Finally, a PartAtt block is proposed to discover the most essential body parts over a whole action sequence and obtain more explainable representations for different skeleton action sequences. Extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, i.e., NTU RGB+D 60 and 120, validate that the proposed baseline slightly outperforms other SOTA models and meanwhile requires much fewer parameters during training and inference procedures, e.g., at most 34 times less than DGNN, which is one of the best SOTA methods.
summary: One essential problem in skeleton-based action recognition is how to extract discriminative features over all skeleton joints. However, the complexity of the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) models of this task tends to be exceedingly sophisticated and over-parameterized, where the low efficiency in model training and inference has obstructed the development in the field, especially for large-scale action datasets. In this work, we propose an efficient but strong baseline based on Graph Convolutional Network (GCN), where three main improvements are aggregated, i.e., early fused Multiple Input Branches (MIB), Residual GCN (ResGCN) with bottleneck structure and Part-wise Attention (PartAtt) block. Firstly, an MIB is designed to enrich informative skeleton features and remain compact representations at an early fusion stage. Then, inspired by the success of the ResNet architecture in Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), a ResGCN module is introduced in GCN to alleviate computational costs and reduce learning difficulties in model training while maintain the model accuracy. Finally, a PartAtt block is proposed to discover the most essential body parts over a whole action sequence and obtain more explainable representations for different skeleton action sequences. Extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, i.e., NTU RGB+D 60 and 120, validate that the proposed baseline slightly outperforms other SOTA models and meanwhile requires much fewer parameters during training and inference procedures, e.g., at most 34 times less than DGNN, which is one of the best SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 基于骨骼的动作识别的一个基本问题是如何提取所有骨骼关节的判别特征。然而，该任务的最先进（SOTA）模型的复杂性往往过于复杂和过度参数化，模型训练和推理的低效率阻碍了该领域的发展，特别是对于大规模动作数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于图卷积网络（GCN）的高效但强大的基线，其中聚合了三个主要改进，即早期融合的多输入分支（MIB）、具有瓶颈结构的残差GCN（ResGCN）和部分明智的注意（PartAtt）块。首先，MIB 旨在丰富信息骨架特征并在早期融合阶段保持紧凑的表示。然后，受到卷积神经网络（CNN）中ResNet架构成功的启发，在GCN中引入了ResGCN模块，以在保持模型精度的同时减轻计算成本并降低模型训练中的学习难度。最后，提出了 PartAtt 块来发现整个动作序列中最重要的身体部位，并为不同的骨架动作序列获得更可解释的表示。对两个大型数据集（即 NTU RGB+D 60 和 120）的大量实验验证了所提出的基线略优于其他 SOTA 模型，同时在训练和推理过程中需要的参数少得多，例如最多比 DGNN 少 34 倍，DGNN 是最好的 SOTA 方法之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络的高效骨架动作识别基线模型，通过改进特征提取和模型结构提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有骨架动作识别模型过于复杂且参数过多，导致训练和推理效率低下，阻碍了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 设计早融合多输入分支（MIB）、引入残差图卷积模块（ResGCN）及部分注意力机制（PartAtt），以提升特征表达效率与可解释性。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D 60和120数据集上，该模型参数量仅为DGNN的1/34，同时略微优于其他最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的高效基线模型在保持精度的同时显著降低计算成本，为大规模动作数据集提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Danqing Shi,Xinyue Xu,Fuling Sun,Yang Shi,Nan Cao
title: Calliope: Automatic Visual Data Story Generation from a Spreadsheet
title_zh: Calliope：从电子表格自动生成可视数据故事
abstract: Visual data stories shown in the form of narrative visualizations such as a poster or a data video, are frequently used in data-oriented storytelling to facilitate the understanding and memorization of the story content. Although useful, technique barriers, such as data analysis, visualization, and scripting, make the generation of a visual data story difficult. Existing authoring tools rely on users' skills and experiences, which are usually inefficient and still difficult. In this paper, we introduce a novel visual data story generating system, Calliope, which creates visual data stories from an input spreadsheet through an automatic process and facilities the easy revision of the generated story based on an online story editor. Particularly, Calliope incorporates a new logic-oriented Monte Carlo tree search algorithm that explores the data space given by the input spreadsheet to progressively generate story pieces (i.e., data facts) and organize them in a logical order. The importance of data facts is measured based on information theory, and each data fact is visualized in a chart and captioned by an automatically generated description. We evaluate the proposed technique through three example stories, two controlled experiments, and a series of interviews with 10 domain experts. Our evaluation shows that Calliope is beneficial to efficient visual data story generation.
summary: Visual data stories shown in the form of narrative visualizations such as a poster or a data video, are frequently used in data-oriented storytelling to facilitate the understanding and memorization of the story content. Although useful, technique barriers, such as data analysis, visualization, and scripting, make the generation of a visual data story difficult. Existing authoring tools rely on users' skills and experiences, which are usually inefficient and still difficult. In this paper, we introduce a novel visual data story generating system, Calliope, which creates visual data stories from an input spreadsheet through an automatic process and facilities the easy revision of the generated story based on an online story editor. Particularly, Calliope incorporates a new logic-oriented Monte Carlo tree search algorithm that explores the data space given by the input spreadsheet to progressively generate story pieces (i.e., data facts) and organize them in a logical order. The importance of data facts is measured based on information theory, and each data fact is visualized in a chart and captioned by an automatically generated description. We evaluate the proposed technique through three example stories, two controlled experiments, and a series of interviews with 10 domain experts. Our evaluation shows that Calliope is beneficial to efficient visual data story generation.
abstract_zh: 以海报或数据视频等叙事可视化形式展示的视觉数据故事经常用于面向数据的故事讲述，以促进对故事内容的理解和记忆。虽然有用，但技术障碍（例如数据分析、可视化和脚本编写）使得可视化数据故事的生成变得困难。现有的创作工具依赖于用户的技能和经验，通常效率低下且仍然困难。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的视觉数据故事生成系统 Calliope，它通过自动过程从输入电子表格创建视觉数据故事，并基于在线故事编辑器轻松修改生成的故事。特别是，Calliope 结合了一种新的面向逻辑的蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，该算法探索输入电子表格给出的数据空间，以逐步生成故事片段（即数据事实）并按逻辑顺序组织它们。数据事实的重要性是根据信息论来衡量的，每个数据事实都在图表中可视化，并由自动生成的描述作为标题。我们通过三个示例故事、两个对照实验以及对 10 位领域专家的一系列采访来评估所提出的技术。我们的评估表明 Calliope 有利于高效的视觉数据故事生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Calliope的系统，能够从输入的电子表格自动生成可视化数据故事，并支持在线编辑器进行修改。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化数据故事生成工具依赖用户技能和经验，效率低下且复杂，需通过自动化方法降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 结合逻辑导向的蒙特卡洛树搜索算法探索数据空间，基于信息论衡量数据重要性，并通过在线故事编辑器支持生成后修改。
AI.result: 通过三个示例故事、两个对照实验及10位领域专家的访谈验证，证明Calliope能有效提升可视化数据故事生成效率。
AI.conclusion: Calliope系统通过自动化流程和智能算法，显著简化了从电子表格生成可视化数据故事的过程，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Calliope: Automatic Visual Data Story Generation from a Spreadsheet Calliope：从电子表格自动生成可视数据故事 Visual data stories shown in the form of narrative visualizations such as a poster or a data video, are frequently used in data-oriented storytelling to facilitate the understanding and memorization of the story content. Although useful, technique barriers, such as data analysis, visualization, and scripting, make the generation of a visual data story difficult. Existing authoring tools rely on users' skills and experiences, which are usually inefficient and still difficult. In this paper, we introduce a novel visual data story generating system, Calliope, which creates visual data stories from an input spreadsheet through an automatic process and facilities the easy revision of the generated story based on an online story editor. Particularly, Calliope incorporates a new logic-oriented Monte Carlo tree search algorithm that explores the data space given by the input spreadsheet to progressively generate story pieces (i.e., data facts) and organize them in a logical order. The importance of data facts is measured based on information theory, and each data fact is visualized in a chart and captioned by an automatically generated description. We evaluate the proposed technique through three example stories, two controlled experiments, and a series of interviews with 10 domain experts. Our evaluation shows that Calliope is beneficial to efficient visual data story generation. 以海报或数据视频等叙事可视化形式展示的视觉数据故事经常用于面向数据的故事讲述，以促进对故事内容的理解和记忆。虽然有用，但技术障碍（例如数据分析、可视化和脚本编写）使得可视化数据故事的生成变得困难。现有的创作工具依赖于用户的技能和经验，通常效率低下且仍然困难。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的视觉数据故事生成系统 Calliope，它通过自动过程从输入电子表格创建视觉数据故事，并基于在线故事编辑器轻松修改生成的故事。特别是，Calliope 结合了一种新的面向逻辑的蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，该算法探索输入电子表格给出的数据空间，以逐步生成故事片段（即数据事实）并按逻辑顺序组织它们。数据事实的重要性是根据信息论来衡量的，每个数据事实都在图表中可视化，并由自动生成的描述作为标题。我们通过三个示例故事、两个对照实验以及对 10 位领域专家的一系列采访来评估所提出的技术。我们的评估表明 Calliope 有利于高效的视觉数据故事生成。 本文提出了一种名为Calliope的系统，能够从输入的电子表格自动生成可视化数据故事，并支持在线编辑器进行修改。 Danqing Shi,Xinyue Xu,Fuling Sun,Yang Shi,Nan Cao cs.HC

authors_text: Kin Wai Cheuk,Yin-Jyun Luo,Emmanouil Benetos,Dorien Herremans
title: The Effect of Spectrogram Reconstruction on Automatic Music Transcription: An Alternative Approach to Improve Transcription Accuracy
title_zh: 谱图重建对自动音乐转录的影响：提高转录准确性的另一种方法
comment: Accepted in ICPR
comments: Accepted in ICPR
abstract: Most of the state-of-the-art automatic music transcription (AMT) models break down the main transcription task into sub-tasks such as onset prediction and offset prediction and train them with onset and offset labels. These predictions are then concatenated together and used as the input to train another model with the pitch labels to obtain the final transcription. We attempt to use only the pitch labels (together with spectrogram reconstruction loss) and explore how far this model can go without introducing supervised sub-tasks. In this paper, we do not aim at achieving state-of-the-art transcription accuracy, instead, we explore the effect that spectrogram reconstruction has on our AMT model. Our proposed model consists of two U-nets: the first U-net transcribes the spectrogram into a posteriorgram, and a second U-net transforms the posteriorgram back into a spectrogram. A reconstruction loss is applied between the original spectrogram and the reconstructed spectrogram to constrain the second U-net to focus only on reconstruction. We train our model on three different datasets: MAPS, MAESTRO, and MusicNet. Our experiments show that adding the reconstruction loss can generally improve the note-level transcription accuracy when compared to the same model without the reconstruction part. Moreover, it can also boost the frame-level precision to be higher than the state-of-the-art models. The feature maps learned by our U-net contain gridlike structures (not present in the baseline model) which implies that with the presence of the reconstruction loss, the model is probably trying to count along both the time and frequency axis, resulting in a higher note-level transcription accuracy.

These predictions are then concatenated together and used as the input to train another model with the pitch labels to obtain the final transcription. We attempt to use only the pitch labels (together with spectrogram reconstruction loss) and explore how far this model can go without introducing supervised sub-tasks. In this paper, we do not aim at achieving state-of-the-art transcription accuracy, instead, we explore the effect that spectrogram reconstruction has on our AMT model. Our proposed model consists of two U-nets: the first U-net transcribes the spectrogram into a posteriorgram, and a second U-net transforms the posteriorgram back into a spectrogram. A reconstruction loss is applied between the original spectrogram and the reconstructed spectrogram to constrain the second U-net to focus only on reconstruction. We train our model on three different datasets: MAPS, MAESTRO, and MusicNet. Our experiments show that adding the reconstruction loss can generally improve the note-level transcription accuracy when compared to the same model without the reconstruction part. Moreover, it can also boost the frame-level precision to be higher than the state-of-the-art models. The feature maps learned by our U-net contain gridlike structures (not present in the baseline model) which implies that with the presence of the reconstruction loss, the model is probably trying to count along both the time and frequency axis, resulting in a higher note-level transcription accuracy.
abstract_zh: 大多数最先进的自动音乐转录（AMT）模型将主要转录任务分解为子任务，例如开始预测和偏移预测，并使用开始和偏移标签来训练它们。然后将这些预测连接在一起并用作输入来训练带有音调标签的另一个模型以获得最终的转录。我们尝试仅使用音调标签（连同频谱图重建损失）并探索该模型在不引入监督子任务的情况下可以走多远。在本文中，我们的目标并不在于实现最先进的转录准确性，而是探讨谱图重建对 AMT 模型的影响。我们提出的模型由两个 U 网组成：第一个 U 网将频谱图转录为后验图，第二个 U 网将后验图转换回频谱图。在原始频谱图和重建频谱图之间应用重建损失，以约束第二个 U 网仅专注于重建。我们在三个不同的数据集上训练我们的模型：MAPS、MAESTRO 和 MusicNet。我们的实验表明，与没有重建部分的相同模型相比，添加重建损失通常可以提高音符级转录精度。此外，它还可以将帧级精度提升到比最先进模型更高。我们的 U-net 学习到的特征图包含网格结构（基线模型中不存在），这意味着在存在重建损失的情况下，模型可能会尝试沿时间轴和频率轴进行计数，从而获得更高的音符级转录精度。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在无需使用传统子任务（如起始和终止预测）的情况下，通过引入频谱图重建损失来提升自动音乐转录（AMT）模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AMT模型依赖多个监督子任务，流程复杂。作者旨在探索仅使用音高标签和频谱图重建损失能否简化流程并提升转录准确性。
AI.method: 提出双U-Net结构：第一U-Net将频谱图转为后验图，第二U-Net将后验图重建为频谱图。通过原始与重建频谱图的重建损失约束模型，避免子任务监督。
AI.result: 实验表明，加入重建损失后，模型在音符级转录准确率和帧级精度均优于无重建损失的版本，且特征图呈现网格结构，暗示模型在时间与频率轴上进行计数。
AI.conclusion: 频谱图重建损失能引导模型关注时间与频率维度的关联，从而提升转录性能，为AMT提供了一种无需传统子任务的替代方法。

authors_text: Sayyed Jaffar Ali Raza,Apan Dastider,Mingjie Lin
title: Survivable Hyper-Redundant Robotic Arm with Bayesian Policy Morphing
title_zh: 具有贝叶斯策略变形的可生存超冗余机械臂
comment: ef:2020 IEEE 16th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
comments: ef:2020 IEEE 16th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
abstract: In this paper we present a Bayesian reinforcement learning framework that allows robotic manipulators to adaptively recover from random mechanical failures autonomously, hence being survivable. To this end, we formulate the framework of Bayesian Policy Morphing (BPM) that enables a robot agent to self-modify its learned policy after the diminution of its maneuvering dimensionality. We build upon existing actor-critic framework, and extend it to perform policy gradient updates as posterior learning, taking past policy updates as prior distributions. We show that policy search, in the direction biased by prior experience, significantly improves learning efficiency in terms of sampling requirements. We demonstrate our results on an 8-DOF robotic arm with our algorithm of BPM, while intentionally disabling random joints with different damage types like unresponsive joints, constant offset errors and angular imprecision. Our results have shown that, even with physical damages, the robotic arm can still successfully maintain its functionality to accurately locate and grasp a given target object.
summary: In this paper we present a Bayesian reinforcement learning framework that allows robotic manipulators to adaptively recover from random mechanical failures autonomously, hence being survivable. To this end, we formulate the framework of Bayesian Policy Morphing (BPM) that enables a robot agent to self-modify its learned policy after the diminution of its maneuvering dimensionality. We build upon existing actor-critic framework, and extend it to perform policy gradient updates as posterior learning, taking past policy updates as prior distributions. We show that policy search, in the direction biased by prior experience, significantly improves learning efficiency in terms of sampling requirements. We demonstrate our results on an 8-DOF robotic arm with our algorithm of BPM, while intentionally disabling random joints with different damage types like unresponsive joints, constant offset errors and angular imprecision. Our results have shown that, even with physical damages, the robotic arm can still successfully maintain its functionality to accurately locate and grasp a given target object.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个贝叶斯强化学习框架，该框架允许机器人操纵器自主地从随机机械故障中自适应恢复，从而具有生存能力。为此，我们制定了贝叶斯策略变形（BPM）框架，使机器人代理能够在其机动维数减少后自我修改其学习策略。我们建立在现有的行动者批评家框架的基础上，并将其扩展为执行策略梯度更新作为后验学习，将过去的策略更新作为先验分布。我们表明，在先验经验偏差的方向上的策略搜索在采样要求方面显着提高了学习效率。我们使用 BPM 算法在 8 自由度机械臂上展示了我们的结果，同时有意禁用具有不同损伤类型（例如无响应关节、恒定偏移误差和角度不精确）的随机关节。我们的结果表明，即使有物理损坏，机械臂仍然可以成功地保持其功能，以准确定位和抓取给定的目标物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯强化学习的框架，使机械臂能够在随机机械故障后自主适应性恢复，保持功能。
AI.motivation: 现有机械臂在遭遇机械故障时缺乏自主恢复能力，需设计一种能适应维度降低并维持任务执行的策略。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯策略变形（BPM）框架，扩展actor-critic方法，利用先验分布引导策略梯度更新，实现受损后自适应策略调整。
AI.result: 在8自由度机械臂实验中，即使随机关节失效（如失灵、偏移误差），机械臂仍能准确定位并抓取目标物体。
AI.conclusion: BPM方法通过贝叶斯先验引导显著提升学习效率，为高冗余机械臂在物理损伤下的生存能力提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Survivable Hyper-Redundant Robotic Arm with Bayesian Policy Morphing 具有贝叶斯策略变形的可生存超冗余机械臂 In this paper we present a Bayesian reinforcement learning framework that allows robotic manipulators to adaptively recover from random mechanical failures autonomously, hence being survivable. To this end, we formulate the framework of Bayesian Policy Morphing (BPM) that enables a robot agent to self-modify its learned policy after the diminution of its maneuvering dimensionality. We build upon existing actor-critic framework, and extend it to perform policy gradient updates as posterior learning, taking past policy updates as prior distributions. We show that policy search, in the direction biased by prior experience, significantly improves learning efficiency in terms of sampling requirements. We demonstrate our results on an 8-DOF robotic arm with our algorithm of BPM, while intentionally disabling random joints with different damage types like unresponsive joints, constant offset errors and angular imprecision. Our results have shown that, even with physical damages, the robotic arm can still successfully maintain its functionality to accurately locate and grasp a given target object. 在本文中，我们提出了一个贝叶斯强化学习框架，该框架允许机器人操纵器自主地从随机机械故障中自适应恢复，从而具有生存能力。为此，我们制定了贝叶斯策略变形（BPM）框架，使机器人代理能够在其机动维数减少后自我修改其学习策略。我们建立在现有的行动者批评家框架的基础上，并将其扩展为执行策略梯度更新作为后验学习，将过去的策略更新作为先验分布。我们表明，在先验经验偏差的方向上的策略搜索在采样要求方面显着提高了学习效率。我们使用 BPM 算法在 8 自由度机械臂上展示了我们的结果，同时有意禁用具有不同损伤类型（例如无响应关节、恒定偏移误差和角度不精确）的随机关节。我们的结果表明，即使有物理损坏，机械臂仍然可以成功地保持其功能，以准确定位和抓取给定的目标物体。 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯强化学习的框架，使机械臂能够在随机机械故障后自主适应性恢复，保持功能。 Sayyed Jaffar Ali Raza,Apan Dastider,Mingjie Lin cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Advantages of Bilinear Koopman Realizations for the Modeling and Control of Systems with Unknown Dynamics
title_zh: 双线性库普曼实现在未知动力学系统建模和控制中的优势
abstract: Nonlinear dynamical systems can be made easier to control by lifting them into the space of observable functions, where their evolution is described by the linear Koopman operator. This paper describes how the Koopman operator can be used to generate approximate linear, bilinear, and nonlinear model realizations from data, and argues in favor of bilinear realizations for characterizing systems with unknown dynamics. Necessary and sufficient conditions for a dynamical system to have a valid linear or bilinear realization over a given set of observable functions are presented and used to show that every control-affine system admits an infinite-dimensional bilinear realization, but does not necessarily admit a linear one. Therefore, approximate bilinear realizations constructed from generic sets of basis functions tend to improve as the number of basis functions increases, whereas approximate linear realizations may not. To demonstrate the advantages of bilinear Koopman realizations for control, a linear, bilinear, and nonlinear Koopman model realization of a simulated robot arm are constructed from data. In a trajectory following task, the bilinear realization exceeds the prediction accuracy of the linear realization and the computational efficiency of the nonlinear realization when incorporated into a model predictive control framework.
summary: Nonlinear dynamical systems can be made easier to control by lifting them into the space of observable functions, where their evolution is described by the linear Koopman operator. This paper describes how the Koopman operator can be used to generate approximate linear, bilinear, and nonlinear model realizations from data, and argues in favor of bilinear realizations for characterizing systems with unknown dynamics. Necessary and sufficient conditions for a dynamical system to have a valid linear or bilinear realization over a given set of observable functions are presented and used to show that every control-affine system admits an infinite-dimensional bilinear realization, but does not necessarily admit a linear one. Therefore, approximate bilinear realizations constructed from generic sets of basis functions tend to improve as the number of basis functions increases, whereas approximate linear realizations may not. To demonstrate the advantages of bilinear Koopman realizations for control, a linear, bilinear, and nonlinear Koopman model realization of a simulated robot arm are constructed from data. In a trajectory following task, the bilinear realization exceeds the prediction accuracy of the linear realization and the computational efficiency of the nonlinear realization when incorporated into a model predictive control framework.
abstract_zh: 通过将非线性动力系统提升到可观测函数的空间，可以使非线性动力系统更容易控制，其中它们的演化由线性库普曼算子描述。本文描述了如何使用库普曼算子从数据生成近似线性、双线性和非线性模型实现，并主张使用双线性实现来表征具有未知动态的系统。给出了动力系统在给定的一组可观察函数上具有有效线性或双线性实现的必要和充分条件，并用于表明每个控制仿射系统都允许无限维双线性实现，但不一定允许线性实现。因此，随着基函数数量的增加，由通用基函数集构造的近似双线性实现往往会得到改进，而近似线性实现则可能不会。为了证明双线性库普曼实现在控制方面的优势，根据数据构建了模拟机器人手臂的线性、双线性和非线性库普曼模型实现。在轨迹跟踪任务中，当合并到模型预测控制框架中时，双线性实现超过了线性实现的预测精度和非线性实现的计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用双线性Koopman实现对未知动态系统的建模与控制，证明其优于线性和非线性模型。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理未知动态的非线性系统，而Koopman算子可将系统线性化，但需确定线性、双线性或非线性实现的适用性。
AI.method: 基于Koopman算子理论，推导系统具有有效线性或双线性实现的充要条件，并通过数据构建机器人臂的线性、双线性和非线性模型进行对比。
AI.result: 在轨迹跟踪任务中，双线性实现的预测精度优于线性模型，计算效率优于非线性模型。
AI.conclusion: 双线性Koopman实现能有效表征未知动态系统，在控制精度与计算效率间取得平衡。

title: Small-Footprint Keyword Spotting with Multi-Scale Temporal Convolution
title_zh: 使用多尺度时间卷积进行小规模关键词识别
comment: Accepted in INTERSPEECH 2020
comments: Accepted in INTERSPEECH 2020
abstract: Keyword Spotting (KWS) plays a vital role in human-computer interaction for smart on-device terminals and service robots. It remains challenging to achieve the trade-off between small footprint and high accuracy for KWS task. In this paper, we explore the application of multi-scale temporal modeling to the small-footprint keyword spotting task. We propose a multi-branch temporal convolution module (MTConv), a CNN block consisting of multiple temporal convolution filters with different kernel sizes, which enriches temporal feature space. Besides, taking advantage of temporal and depthwise convolution, a temporal efficient neural network (TENet) is designed for KWS system. Based on the purposed model, we replace standard temporal convolution layers with MTConvs that can be trained for better performance. While at the inference stage, the MTConv can be equivalently converted to the base convolution architecture, so that no extra parameters and computational costs are added compared to the base model. The results on Google Speech Command Dataset show that one of our models trained with MTConv performs the accuracy of 96.8% with only 100K parameters.
summary: Keyword Spotting (KWS) plays a vital role in human-computer interaction for smart on-device terminals and service robots. It remains challenging to achieve the trade-off between small footprint and high accuracy for KWS task. In this paper, we explore the application of multi-scale temporal modeling to the small-footprint keyword spotting task. We propose a multi-branch temporal convolution module (MTConv), a CNN block consisting of multiple temporal convolution filters with different kernel sizes, which enriches temporal feature space. Besides, taking advantage of temporal and depthwise convolution, a temporal efficient neural network (TENet) is designed for KWS system. Based on the purposed model, we replace standard temporal convolution layers with MTConvs that can be trained for better performance. While at the inference stage, the MTConv can be equivalently converted to the base convolution architecture, so that no extra parameters and computational costs are added compared to the base model. The results on Google Speech Command Dataset show that one of our models trained with MTConv performs the accuracy of 96.8% with only 100K parameters.
abstract_zh: 关键词识别（KWS）在智能终端和服务机器人的人机交互中发挥着至关重要的作用。在 KWS 任务中实现小足迹和高精度之间的权衡仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们探索了多尺度时间建模在小足迹关键词识别任务中的应用。我们提出了一种多分支时间卷积模块（MTConv），一个由多个具有不同内核大小的时间卷积滤波器组成的 CNN 块，丰富了时间特征空间。此外，利用时间和深度卷积的优势，为KWS系统设计了时间高效神经网络（TENet）。基于目标模型，我们用可训练以获得更好性能的 MTConv 替换标准时间卷积层。而在推理阶段，MTConv可以等效地转换为基础卷积架构，因此与基础模型相比，不会增加额外的参数和计算成本。 Google 语音命令数据集上的结果表明，我们使用 MTConv 训练的模型之一仅使用 100K 参数即可实现 96.8% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度时序卷积的小型化关键词检测方法，旨在提升设备端关键词识别的准确率与模型效率。
AI.motivation: 在智能终端和机器人中，关键词检测（KWS）需在模型小型化与高准确率之间取得平衡，传统方法难以兼顾二者。
AI.method: 设计多分支时序卷积模块（MTConv）和时序高效神经网络（TENet），通过多尺度卷积核提取时序特征，并在推理阶段将MTConv转换为基线结构以避免额外开销。
AI.result: 在Google语音指令数据集上，所提模型以仅100K参数达到96.8%的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度时序建模有效提升了小型化KWS系统的性能，为设备端部署提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度时序建模有效提升了小型化KWS系统的性能，为设备端部署提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度时序卷积的小型化关键词检测方法，旨在提升设备端关键词识别的准确率与模型效率。
motivation: 在智能终端和机器人中，关键词检测（KWS）需在模型小型化与高准确率之间取得平衡，传统方法难以兼顾二者。
method: 设计多分支时序卷积模块（MTConv）和时序高效神经网络（TENet），通过多尺度卷积核提取时序特征，并在推理阶段将MTConv转换为基线结构以避免额外开销。

search_text: Small-Footprint Keyword Spotting with Multi-Scale Temporal Convolution 使用多尺度时间卷积进行小规模关键词识别 Keyword Spotting (KWS) plays a vital role in human-computer interaction for smart on-device terminals and service robots. It remains challenging to achieve the trade-off between small footprint and high accuracy for KWS task. In this paper, we explore the application of multi-scale temporal modeling to the small-footprint keyword spotting task. We propose a multi-branch temporal convolution module (MTConv), a CNN block consisting of multiple temporal convolution filters with different kernel sizes, which enriches temporal feature space. Besides, taking advantage of temporal and depthwise convolution, a temporal efficient neural network (TENet) is designed for KWS system. Based on the purposed model, we replace standard temporal convolution layers with MTConvs that can be trained for better performance. While at the inference stage, the MTConv can be equivalently converted to the base convolution architecture, so that no extra parameters and computational costs are added compared to the base model. The results on Google Speech Command Dataset show that one of our models trained with MTConv performs the accuracy of 96.8% with only 100K parameters. 关键词识别（KWS）在智能终端和服务机器人的人机交互中发挥着至关重要的作用。在 KWS 任务中实现小足迹和高精度之间的权衡仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们探索了多尺度时间建模在小足迹关键词识别任务中的应用。我们提出了一种多分支时间卷积模块（MTConv），一个由多个具有不同内核大小的时间卷积滤波器组成的 CNN 块，丰富了时间特征空间。此外，利用时间和深度卷积的优势，为KWS系统设计了时间高效神经网络（TENet）。基于目标模型，我们用可训练以获得更好性能的 MTConv 替换标准时间卷积层。而在推理阶段，MTConv可以等效地转换为基础卷积架构，因此与基础模型相比，不会增加额外的参数和计算成本。 Google 语音命令数据集上的结果表明，我们使用 MTConv 训练的模型之一仅使用 100K 参数即可实现 96.8% 的准确率。 本文提出一种基于多尺度时序卷积的小型化关键词检测方法，旨在提升设备端关键词识别的准确率与模型效率。 Ximin Li,Xiaodong Wei,Xiaowei Qin eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

title: Improving Dialog Systems for Negotiation with Personality Modeling
title_zh: 通过个性建模改进谈判对话系统
comment: ACL 2021. 12 pages, 3 figures
comments: ACL 2021. 12 pages, 3 figures
abstract: In this paper, we explore the ability to model and infer personality types of opponents, predict their responses, and use this information to adapt a dialog agent's high-level strategy in negotiation tasks. Inspired by the idea of incorporating a theory of mind (ToM) into machines, we introduce a probabilistic formulation to encapsulate the opponent's personality type during both learning and inference. We test our approach on the CraigslistBargain dataset and show that our method using ToM inference achieves a 20% higher dialog agreement rate compared to baselines on a mixed population of opponents. We also find that our model displays diverse negotiation behavior with different types of opponents.
summary: In this paper, we explore the ability to model and infer personality types of opponents, predict their responses, and use this information to adapt a dialog agent's high-level strategy in negotiation tasks. Inspired by the idea of incorporating a theory of mind (ToM) into machines, we introduce a probabilistic formulation to encapsulate the opponent's personality type during both learning and inference. We test our approach on the CraigslistBargain dataset and show that our method using ToM inference achieves a 20% higher dialog agreement rate compared to baselines on a mixed population of opponents. We also find that our model displays diverse negotiation behavior with different types of opponents.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索了建模和推断对手的性格类型、预测他们的反应并使用这些信息来调整对话代理在谈判任务中的高级策略的能力。受到将心理理论 (ToM) 融入机器的想法的启发，我们引入了一种概率公式来封装对手在学习和推理过程中的性格类型。我们在 CraigslistBargain 数据集上测试了我们的方法，结果表明，与混合对手群体的基线相比，我们使用 ToM 推理的方法实现了 20% 高的对话一致率。我们还发现我们的模型表现出与不同类型对手的不同谈判行为。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过建模对手人格类型来提升对话系统在谈判任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 受心智理论（ToM）启发，旨在使对话代理能理解对手人格特征，从而动态调整谈判策略。
AI.method: 引入概率模型封装对手人格类型，在学习与推理阶段结合ToM进行人格推断与策略适应。
AI.result: 在CraigslistBargain数据集上，对话协议率较基线提升20%，且模型展现多样化谈判行为。
AI.conclusion: 人格建模有效提升谈判成功率，未来可进一步优化模型以增强对复杂人格的适应性。

title: Region-specific Dictionary Learning-based Low-dose Thoracic CT Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于特定区域词典学习的低剂量胸部CT重建
abstract: This paper presents a dictionary learning-based method with region-specific image patches to maximize the utility of the powerful sparse data processing technique for CT image reconstruction. Considering heterogeneous distributions of image features and noise in CT, region-specific customization of dictionaries is utilized in iterative reconstruction. Thoracic CT images are partitioned into several regions according to their structural and noise characteristics. Dictionaries specific to each region are then learned from the segmented thoracic CT images and applied to subsequent image reconstruction of the region. Parameters for dictionary learning and sparse representation are determined according to the structural and noise properties of each region. The proposed method results in better performance than the conventional reconstruction based on a single dictionary in recovering structures and suppressing noise in both simulation and human CT imaging. Quantitatively, the simulation study shows maximum improvement of image quality for the whole thorax can achieve 4.88% and 11.1% in terms of the Structure-SIMilarity (SSIM) and Root-Mean-Square Error (RMSE) indices, respectively. For human imaging data, it is found that the structures in the lungs and heart can be better recovered, while simultaneously decreasing noise around the vertebra effectively. The proposed strategy takes into account inherent regional differences inside of the reconstructed object and leads to improved images. The method can be readily extended to CT imaging of other anatomical regions and other applications.
summary: This paper presents a dictionary learning-based method with region-specific image patches to maximize the utility of the powerful sparse data processing technique for CT image reconstruction. Considering heterogeneous distributions of image features and noise in CT, region-specific customization of dictionaries is utilized in iterative reconstruction. Thoracic CT images are partitioned into several regions according to their structural and noise characteristics. Dictionaries specific to each region are then learned from the segmented thoracic CT images and applied to subsequent image reconstruction of the region. Parameters for dictionary learning and sparse representation are determined according to the structural and noise properties of each region. The proposed method results in better performance than the conventional reconstruction based on a single dictionary in recovering structures and suppressing noise in both simulation and human CT imaging. Quantitatively, the simulation study shows maximum improvement of image quality for the whole thorax can achieve 4.88% and 11.1% in terms of the Structure-SIMilarity (SSIM) and Root-Mean-Square Error (RMSE) indices, respectively. For human imaging data, it is found that the structures in the lungs and heart can be better recovered, while simultaneously decreasing noise around the vertebra effectively. The proposed strategy takes into account inherent regional differences inside of the reconstructed object and leads to improved images. The method can be readily extended to CT imaging of other anatomical regions and other applications.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于字典学习的方法，具有特定区域的图像块，以最大限度地利用强大的稀疏数据处理技术进行 CT 图像重建。考虑到CT中图像特征和噪声的异质分布，在迭代重建中利用了字典的区域特定定制。胸部 CT 图像根据其结构和噪声特征分为几个区域。然后从分割的胸部 CT 图像中学习每个区域特有的字典，并将其应用于该区域的后续图像重建。根据每个区域的结构和噪声特性确定字典学习和稀疏表示的参数。所提出的方法在模拟和人体CT成像中恢复结构和抑制噪声方面比基于单个字典的传统重建具有更好的性能。定量地，模拟研究表明，在结构相似度（SSIM）和均方根误差（RMSE）指数方面，整个胸部图像质量的最大改善分别可以达到4.88%和11.1%。对于人体成像数据，发现可以更好地恢复肺部和心脏的结构，同时有效降低椎骨周围的噪音。所提出的策略考虑了重建对象内部固有的区域差异，并改善了图像。该方法可以很容易地扩展到其他解剖区域的 CT 成像和其他应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域特定字典学习的低剂量胸部CT重建方法，通过利用不同区域的图像特征和噪声分布差异提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统单一字典方法难以适应CT图像中结构和噪声的异质性分布，导致重建效果受限，需通过区域定制化字典优化稀疏表示以提升结构恢复和噪声抑制能力。
AI.method: 将胸部CT图像按结构和噪声特性划分为多个区域，分别学习各区域的字典，并根据区域特性调整字典学习和稀疏表示参数，应用于迭代重建过程。
AI.result: 仿真数据显示整体胸腔SSIM提升4.88%、RMSE降低11.1%；人体数据表明肺部和心脏结构恢复更优，椎体噪声显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过考虑重建对象的区域差异性，有效提升了低剂量CT图像质量，且可扩展至其他解剖区域和应用领域。

title: Object Permanence Through Audio-Visual Representations
title_zh: 通过视听表征实现物体的持久性
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE Access
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE Access
abstract: As robots perform manipulation tasks and interact with objects, it is probable that they accidentally drop objects (e.g., due to an inadequate grasp of an unfamiliar object) that subsequently bounce out of their visual fields. To enable robots to recover from such errors, we draw upon the concept of object permanence-objects remain in existence even when they are not being sensed (e.g., seen) directly. In particular, we developed a multimodal neural network model-using a partial, observed bounce trajectory and the audio resulting from drop impact as its inputs-to predict the full bounce trajectory and the end location of a dropped object. We empirically show that: 1) our multimodal method predicted end locations close in proximity (i.e., within the visual field of the robot's wrist camera) to the actual locations and 2) the robot was able to retrieve dropped objects by applying minimal vision-based pick-up adjustments. Additionally, we show that our method outperformed five comparison baselines in retrieving dropped objects. Our results contribute to enabling object permanence for robots and error recovery from object drops.
summary: As robots perform manipulation tasks and interact with objects, it is probable that they accidentally drop objects (e.g., due to an inadequate grasp of an unfamiliar object) that subsequently bounce out of their visual fields. To enable robots to recover from such errors, we draw upon the concept of object permanence-objects remain in existence even when they are not being sensed (e.g., seen) directly. In particular, we developed a multimodal neural network model-using a partial, observed bounce trajectory and the audio resulting from drop impact as its inputs-to predict the full bounce trajectory and the end location of a dropped object. We empirically show that: 1) our multimodal method predicted end locations close in proximity (i.e., within the visual field of the robot's wrist camera) to the actual locations and 2) the robot was able to retrieve dropped objects by applying minimal vision-based pick-up adjustments. Additionally, we show that our method outperformed five comparison baselines in retrieving dropped objects. Our results contribute to enabling object permanence for robots and error recovery from object drops.
abstract_zh: 当机器人执行操作任务并与物体交互时，它们很可能会意外掉落物体（例如，由于对不熟悉的物体把握不充分），这些物体随后会从它们的视野中反弹出来。为了使机器人能够从此类错误中恢复，我们利用了对象持久性的概念——即使对象没有被直接感知（例如，看到），它们仍然存在。特别是，我们开发了一个多模态神经网络模型 - 使用部分观察到的弹跳轨迹和掉落撞击产生的音频作为输入 - 来预测完整的弹跳轨迹和掉落物体的最终位置。我们凭经验表明：1）我们的多模态方法预测的最终位置非常接近实际位置（即在机器人手腕相机的视野内），2）机器人能够通过应用最小的基于视觉的拾取调整来取回掉落的物体。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法在检索掉落的物体方面优于五个比较基线。我们的结果有助于实现机器人的物体持久性以及物体掉落时的错误恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态神经网络模型，通过音频和视觉信息预测机器人掉落物体的完整弹跳轨迹及最终位置，以实现物体恒存性与错误恢复。
AI.motivation: 机器人执行操作任务时可能因抓取失败导致物体掉落并超出视觉范围，需借助物体恒存性概念（物体即使未被直接感知仍存在）实现错误恢复。
AI.method: 开发多模态神经网络，输入部分观察到的弹跳轨迹及掉落冲击音频，输出完整轨迹预测和物体最终位置。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 预测位置与实际位置在机械臂视觉范围内接近；2) 机器人可通过最小视觉调整成功拾取物体；3) 方法优于五个基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合视听信息实现机器人物体恒存性，有效提升掉落物体的恢复能力，为机器人错误恢复提供新思路。

search_text: Object Permanence Through Audio-Visual Representations 通过视听表征实现物体的持久性 As robots perform manipulation tasks and interact with objects, it is probable that they accidentally drop objects (e.g., due to an inadequate grasp of an unfamiliar object) that subsequently bounce out of their visual fields. To enable robots to recover from such errors, we draw upon the concept of object permanence-objects remain in existence even when they are not being sensed (e.g., seen) directly. In particular, we developed a multimodal neural network model-using a partial, observed bounce trajectory and the audio resulting from drop impact as its inputs-to predict the full bounce trajectory and the end location of a dropped object. We empirically show that: 1) our multimodal method predicted end locations close in proximity (i.e., within the visual field of the robot's wrist camera) to the actual locations and 2) the robot was able to retrieve dropped objects by applying minimal vision-based pick-up adjustments. Additionally, we show that our method outperformed five comparison baselines in retrieving dropped objects. Our results contribute to enabling object permanence for robots and error recovery from object drops. 当机器人执行操作任务并与物体交互时，它们很可能会意外掉落物体（例如，由于对不熟悉的物体把握不充分），这些物体随后会从它们的视野中反弹出来。为了使机器人能够从此类错误中恢复，我们利用了对象持久性的概念——即使对象没有被直接感知（例如，看到），它们仍然存在。特别是，我们开发了一个多模态神经网络模型 - 使用部分观察到的弹跳轨迹和掉落撞击产生的音频作为输入 - 来预测完整的弹跳轨迹和掉落物体的最终位置。我们凭经验表明：1）我们的多模态方法预测的最终位置非常接近实际位置（即在机器人手腕相机的视野内），2）机器人能够通过应用最小的基于视觉的拾取调整来取回掉落的物体。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法在检索掉落的物体方面优于五个比较基线。我们的结果有助于实现机器人的物体持久性以及物体掉落时的错误恢复。 本文提出一种多模态神经网络模型，通过音频和视觉信息预测机器人掉落物体的完整弹跳轨迹及最终位置，以实现物体恒存性与错误恢复。 Fanjun Bu,Chien-Ming Huang cs.RO

title: Enhancing Keyphrase Extraction from Microblogs using Human Reading Time
title_zh: 利用人类阅读时间增强微博中的关键词提取
comment: ef:Journal of the Association for Information Science and Technology,2021
comments: ef:Journal of the Association for Information Science and Technology,2021
abstract: The premise of manual keyphrase annotation is to read the corresponding content of an annotated object. Intuitively, when we read, more important words will occupy a longer reading time. Hence, by leveraging human reading time, we can find the salient words in the corresponding content. However, previous studies on keyphrase extraction ignore human reading features. In this article, we aim to leverage human reading time to extract keyphrases from microblog posts. There are two main tasks in this study. One is to determine how to measure the time spent by a human on reading a word. We use eye fixation durations extracted from an open source eye-tracking corpus (OSEC). Moreover, we propose strategies to make eye fixation duration more effective on keyphrase extraction. The other task is to determine how to integrate human reading time into keyphrase extraction models. We propose two novel neural network models. The first is a model in which the human reading time is used as the ground truth of the attention mechanism. In the second model, we use human reading time as the external feature. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our proposed models yield better performance than the baseline models on two microblog datasets.
summary: The premise of manual keyphrase annotation is to read the corresponding content of an annotated object. Intuitively, when we read, more important words will occupy a longer reading time. Hence, by leveraging human reading time, we can find the salient words in the corresponding content. However, previous studies on keyphrase extraction ignore human reading features. In this article, we aim to leverage human reading time to extract keyphrases from microblog posts. There are two main tasks in this study. One is to determine how to measure the time spent by a human on reading a word. We use eye fixation durations extracted from an open source eye-tracking corpus (OSEC). Moreover, we propose strategies to make eye fixation duration more effective on keyphrase extraction. The other task is to determine how to integrate human reading time into keyphrase extraction models. We propose two novel neural network models. The first is a model in which the human reading time is used as the ground truth of the attention mechanism. In the second model, we use human reading time as the external feature. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our proposed models yield better performance than the baseline models on two microblog datasets.
abstract_zh: 手动关键短语标注的前提是读取被标注对象对应的内容。直观上，我们在阅读时，越重要的单词会占用越长的阅读时间。因此，通过利用人类阅读时间，我们可以找到相应内容中的显着单词。然而，先前关于关键词提取的研究忽略了人类阅读特征。在本文中，我们的目标是利用人类阅读时间从微博帖子中提取关键短语。本研究有两个主要任务。一是确定如何衡量人类阅读一个单词所花费的时间。我们使用从开源眼动追踪语料库 (OSEC) 中提取的注视持续时间。此外，我们提出了使眼睛注视持续时间在关键短​​语提取方面更有效的策略。另一项任务是确定如何将人类阅读时间整合到关键短语提取模型中。我们提出了两种新颖的神经网络模型。第一个模型将人类阅读时间用作注意力机制的基本事实。在第二个模型中，我们使用人类阅读时间作为外部特征。定量和定性实验表明，我们提出的模型在两个微博数据集上比基线模型具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用人类阅读时间来提升从微博中提取关键词短语的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统关键词短语提取方法忽略了人类阅读特征，而重要词汇通常会占用更长的阅读时间，因此引入人类阅读时间可提高提取效果。
AI.method: 使用开源眼动追踪语料库（OSEC）中的眼动停留时间数据，提出两种神经网络模型：一种将阅读时间作为注意力机制的 ground truth，另一种将阅读时间作为外部特征进行整合。
AI.result: 在两个微博数据集上，所提模型在定量和定性实验中均优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用人类阅读时间特征，提出的模型显著提升了微博关键词短语提取的性能。

title: Proximal Policy Gradient: PPO with Policy Gradient
title_zh: 近端策略梯度：具有策略梯度的 PPO
comment: 7 pages
comments: 7 pages
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new algorithm PPG (Proximal Policy Gradient), which is close to both VPG (vanilla policy gradient) and PPO (proximal policy optimization). The PPG objective is a partial variation of the VPG objective and the gradient of the PPG objective is exactly same as the gradient of the VPG objective. To increase the number of policy update iterations, we introduce the advantage-policy plane and design a new clipping strategy. We perform experiments in OpenAI Gym and Bullet robotics environments for ten random seeds. The performance of PPG is comparable to PPO, and the entropy decays slower than PPG. Thus we show that performance similar to PPO can be obtained by using the gradient formula from the original policy gradient theorem.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new algorithm PPG (Proximal Policy Gradient), which is close to both VPG (vanilla policy gradient) and PPO (proximal policy optimization). The PPG objective is a partial variation of the VPG objective and the gradient of the PPG objective is exactly same as the gradient of the VPG objective. To increase the number of policy update iterations, we introduce the advantage-policy plane and design a new clipping strategy. We perform experiments in OpenAI Gym and Bullet robotics environments for ten random seeds. The performance of PPG is comparable to PPO, and the entropy decays slower than PPG. Thus we show that performance similar to PPO can be obtained by using the gradient formula from the original policy gradient theorem.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新算法PPG（近端策略梯度），它接近VPG（普通策略梯度）和PPO（近端策略优化）。 PPG目标是VPG目标的部分变体，并且PPG目标的梯度与VPG目标的梯度完全相同。为了增加策略更新迭代的次数，我们引入了优势策略平面并设计了一种新的裁剪策略。我们在 OpenAI Gym 和 Bullet 机器人环境中对十个随机种子进行实验。 PPG的性能与PPO相当，并且熵衰减比PPG慢。因此，我们表明，使用原始策略梯度定理中的梯度公式可以获得类似于 PPO 的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合VPG和PPO的PPG算法，通过改进策略更新机制提升强化学习性能
AI.motivation: 为提升策略更新效率和稳定性，结合VPG与PPO优势，设计新型算法以优化强化学习性能
AI.method: 基于VPG目标函数设计PPG目标，引入优势-策略平面并采用新型裁剪策略，以增加更新次数并保持稳定性
AI.result: 在多个环境中PPG表现与PPO相近，且策略熵衰减速度更慢，验证了方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 证明通过原始策略梯度定理的梯度公式可实现与PPO相近的性能，为算法设计提供新思路

conclusion: 证明通过原始策略梯度定理的梯度公式可实现与PPO相近的性能，为算法设计提供新思路
search_text: Proximal Policy Gradient: PPO with Policy Gradient 近端策略梯度：具有策略梯度的 PPO In this paper, we propose a new algorithm PPG (Proximal Policy Gradient), which is close to both VPG (vanilla policy gradient) and PPO (proximal policy optimization). The PPG objective is a partial variation of the VPG objective and the gradient of the PPG objective is exactly same as the gradient of the VPG objective. To increase the number of policy update iterations, we introduce the advantage-policy plane and design a new clipping strategy. We perform experiments in OpenAI Gym and Bullet robotics environments for ten random seeds. The performance of PPG is comparable to PPO, and the entropy decays slower than PPG. Thus we show that performance similar to PPO can be obtained by using the gradient formula from the original policy gradient theorem. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新算法PPG（近端策略梯度），它接近VPG（普通策略梯度）和PPO（近端策略优化）。 PPG目标是VPG目标的部分变体，并且PPG目标的梯度与VPG目标的梯度完全相同。为了增加策略更新迭代的次数，我们引入了优势策略平面并设计了一种新的裁剪策略。我们在 OpenAI Gym 和 Bullet 机器人环境中对十个随机种子进行实验。 PPG的性能与PPO相当，并且熵衰减比PPG慢。因此，我们表明，使用原始策略梯度定理中的梯度公式可以获得类似于 PPO 的性能。 提出一种结合VPG和PPO的PPG算法，通过改进策略更新机制提升强化学习性能 Ju-Seung Byun,Byungmoon Kim,Huamin Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Smooth activations and reproducibility in deep networks
title_zh: 深层网络中的平滑激活和再现性
abstract: Deep networks are gradually penetrating almost every domain in our lives due to their amazing success. However, with substantive performance accuracy improvements comes the price of \emph{irreproducibility}. Two identical models, trained on the exact same training dataset may exhibit large differences in predictions on individual examples even when average accuracy is similar, especially when trained on highly distributed parallel systems. The popular Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) activation has been key to recent success of deep networks. We demonstrate, however, that ReLU is also a catalyzer to irreproducibility in deep networks. We show that not only can activations smoother than ReLU provide better accuracy, but they can also provide better accuracy-reproducibility tradeoffs. We propose a new family of activations; Smooth ReLU (\emph{SmeLU}), designed to give such better tradeoffs, while also keeping the mathematical expression simple, and thus implementation cheap. SmeLU is monotonic, mimics ReLU, while providing continuous gradients, yielding better reproducibility. We generalize SmeLU to give even more flexibility and then demonstrate that SmeLU and its generalized form are special cases of a more general methodology of REctified Smooth Continuous Unit (RESCU) activations. Empirical results demonstrate the superior accuracy-reproducibility tradeoffs with smooth activations, SmeLU in particular.
summary: Deep networks are gradually penetrating almost every domain in our lives due to their amazing success. However, with substantive performance accuracy improvements comes the price of \emph{irreproducibility}. Two identical models, trained on the exact same training dataset may exhibit large differences in predictions on individual examples even when average accuracy is similar, especially when trained on highly distributed parallel systems. The popular Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) activation has been key to recent success of deep networks. We demonstrate, however, that ReLU is also a catalyzer to irreproducibility in deep networks. We show that not only can activations smoother than ReLU provide better accuracy, but they can also provide better accuracy-reproducibility tradeoffs. We propose a new family of activations; Smooth ReLU (\emph{SmeLU}), designed to give such better tradeoffs, while also keeping the mathematical expression simple, and thus implementation cheap. SmeLU is monotonic, mimics ReLU, while providing continuous gradients, yielding better reproducibility. We generalize SmeLU to give even more flexibility and then demonstrate that SmeLU and its generalized form are special cases of a more general methodology of REctified Smooth Continuous Unit (RESCU) activations. Empirical results demonstrate the superior accuracy-reproducibility tradeoffs with smooth activations, SmeLU in particular.
abstract_zh: 由于其惊人的成功，深度网络正在逐渐渗透到我们生活中的几乎每个领域。然而，随着性能精度的实质性提高，也带来了\emph{不可再现性}的代价。即使平均准确度相似，在完全相同的训练数据集上训练的两个相同模型也可能在个别示例的预测中表现出巨大差异，特别是在高度分布式并行系统上训练时。流行的整流线性单元（ReLU）激活是深度网络最近成功的关键。然而，我们证明 ReLU 也是深度网络中不可重复性的催化剂。我们证明，比 ReLU 更平滑的激活不仅可以提供更好的准确性，而且还可以提供更好的准确性与再现性权衡。我们提出了一个新的激活系列； Smooth ReLU (\emph{SmeLU})，旨在提供更好的权衡，同时保持数学表达式简单，从而实现成本低廉。 SmeLU 是单调的，模仿 ReLU，同时提供连续梯度，产生更好的再现性。我们概括 SmeLU 以提供更大的灵活性，然后证明 SmeLU 及其广义形式是更通用的 REctified Smooth Continuous Unit (RESCU) 激活方法的特例。经验结果证明了平滑激活（尤其是 SmeLU）具有卓越的准确性-可重复性权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的平滑激活函数SmeLU，以解决深度网络中因ReLU激活导致的不可再现性问题，并提升模型的准确率与可重复性平衡。
AI.motivation: 深度网络虽性能优异，但使用ReLU激活时在分布式训练中易出现预测结果不可重复的问题，且ReLU本身限制了模型的优化潜力。
AI.method: 设计SmeLU激活函数，通过连续梯度实现平滑性，保持ReLU单调特性的同时提升可重复性，并将其推广为RESCU通用框架进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，SmeLU在保持较高准确率的同时显著改善了模型预测的可重复性，且其泛化形式RESCU进一步扩展了激活函数的设计空间。
AI.conclusion: 平滑激活函数能有效缓解深度网络的不可重复性问题，SmeLU及RESCU框架为兼顾模型性能与稳定性的设计提供了新方向。

authors_text: François Grondin,Jean-Samuel Lauzon,Simon Michaud,Mirco Ravanelli,François Michaud
title: BIRD: Big Impulse Response Dataset
title_zh: BIRD：大脉冲响应数据集
abstract: This paper introduces BIRD, the Big Impulse Response Dataset. This open dataset consists of 100,000 multichannel room impulse responses (RIRs) generated from simulations using the Image Method, making it the largest multichannel open dataset currently available. These RIRs can be used toperform efficient online data augmentation for scenarios that involve two microphones and multiple sound sources. The paper also introduces use cases to illustrate how BIRD can perform data augmentation with existing speech corpora.
summary: This paper introduces BIRD, the Big Impulse Response Dataset. This open dataset consists of 100,000 multichannel room impulse responses (RIRs) generated from simulations using the Image Method, making it the largest multichannel open dataset currently available. These RIRs can be used toperform efficient online data augmentation for scenarios that involve two microphones and multiple sound sources. The paper also introduces use cases to illustrate how BIRD can perform data augmentation with existing speech corpora.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BIRD，即大脉冲响应数据集。该开放数据集由使用图像方法进行模拟生成的 100,000 个多通道房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 组成，使其成为当前可用的最大的多通道开放数据集。这些 RIR 可用于在涉及两个麦克风和多个声源的场景中执行高效的在线数据增强。本文还介绍了用例来说明 BIRD 如何使用现有语音语料库执行数据增强。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BIRD数据集，一个包含10万个通过镜像法生成的多通道房间脉冲响应（RIRs）的开放数据集，用于两麦克风多声源场景的在线数据增强。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的多通道RIR数据集规模有限，难以满足复杂声学场景下高效在线数据增强的需求。
AI.method: 基于镜像法进行声学环境模拟，生成包含不同房间参数和声源位置的多通道RIRs，并构建大规模数据集。
AI.result: 创建了当前最大的多通道开放RIR数据集，验证了其在语音语料数据增强中的有效性，提供了典型应用案例。
AI.conclusion: BIRD数据集为多麦克风语音处理研究提供了重要资源，推动了在线数据增强技术在复杂声学场景中的应用发展。

title: On the Sample Complexity of Privately Learning Unbounded High-Dimensional Gaussians
title_zh: 论自学无界高维高斯的样本复杂度
abstract: We provide sample complexity upper bounds for agnostically learning multivariate Gaussians under the constraint of approximate differential privacy. These are the first finite sample upper bounds for general Gaussians which do not impose restrictions on the parameters of the distribution. Our bounds are near-optimal in the case when the covariance is known to be the identity, and conjectured to be near-optimal in the general case. From a technical standpoint, we provide analytic tools for arguing the existence of global "locally small" covers from local covers of the space. These are exploited using modifications of recent techniques for differentially private hypothesis selection. Our techniques may prove useful for privately learning other distribution classes which do not possess a finite cover.
summary: We provide sample complexity upper bounds for agnostically learning multivariate Gaussians under the constraint of approximate differential privacy. These are the first finite sample upper bounds for general Gaussians which do not impose restrictions on the parameters of the distribution. Our bounds are near-optimal in the case when the covariance is known to be the identity, and conjectured to be near-optimal in the general case. From a technical standpoint, we provide analytic tools for arguing the existence of global "locally small" covers from local covers of the space. These are exploited using modifications of recent techniques for differentially private hypothesis selection. Our techniques may prove useful for privately learning other distribution classes which do not possess a finite cover.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了在近似差分隐私约束下不可知地学习多元高斯的样本复杂度上限。这些是一般高斯分布的第一个有限样本上限，它不对分布的参数施加限制。在已知协方差为恒等式的情况下，我们的界限接近最优，并且在一般情况下推测为接近最优。从技术角度来看，我们提供了分析工具来论证空间的局部覆盖是否存在全局“局部小”覆盖。这些是通过对最新技术的修改来利用的，以进行差异化的私人假设选择。我们的技术可能对于私下学习其他不具有有限覆盖范围的分布类很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在差分隐私约束下，无界高维高斯分布的样本复杂度上界问题，提出适用于一般高斯分布的有限样本上界。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私学习方法对高斯分布参数存在限制，缺乏适用于任意参数的通用样本复杂度分析，需突破参数约束以实现更广泛的应用。
AI.method: 通过构建局部覆盖到全局覆盖的分析工具，结合差分隐私假设选择技术改进，推导出适用于一般高斯分布的样本复杂度上界。
AI.result: 获得近似最优的样本复杂度上界（协方差为单位矩阵时），并猜想在一般情况下也近似最优，所提方法可能扩展到其他无有限覆盖的分布类。
AI.conclusion: 首次为无参数限制的高斯分布提供有限样本隐私学习界，方法创新性地解决了全局覆盖构造问题，为隐私学习其他分布类提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究在差分隐私约束下，无界高维高斯分布的样本复杂度上界问题，提出适用于一般高斯分布的有限样本上界。
ai_content.motivation: 现有隐私学习方法对高斯分布参数存在限制，缺乏适用于任意参数的通用样本复杂度分析，需突破参数约束以实现更广泛的应用。
ai_content.method: 通过构建局部覆盖到全局覆盖的分析工具，结合差分隐私假设选择技术改进，推导出适用于一般高斯分布的样本复杂度上界。
ai_content.result: 获得近似最优的样本复杂度上界（协方差为单位矩阵时），并猜想在一般情况下也近似最优，所提方法可能扩展到其他无有限覆盖的分布类。
ai_content.conclusion: 首次为无参数限制的高斯分布提供有限样本隐私学习界，方法创新性地解决了全局覆盖构造问题，为隐私学习其他分布类提供新思路。
