title: Anomaly Detection on X-Rays Using Self-Supervised Aggregation Learning
title_zh: 使用自监督聚合学习对 X 射线进行异常检测
abstract: Deep anomaly detection models using a supervised mode of learning usually work under a closed set assumption and suffer from overfitting to previously seen rare anomalies at training, which hinders their applicability in a real scenario. In addition, obtaining annotations for X-rays is very time consuming and requires extensive training of radiologists. Hence, training anomaly detection in a fully unsupervised or self-supervised fashion would be advantageous, allowing a significant reduction of time spent on the report by radiologists. In this paper, we present SALAD, an end-to-end deep self-supervised methodology for anomaly detection on X-Ray images. The proposed method is based on an optimization strategy in which a deep neural network is encouraged to represent prototypical local patterns of the normal data in the embedding space. During training, we record the prototypical patterns of normal training samples via a memory bank. Our anomaly score is then derived by measuring similarity to a weighted combination of normal prototypical patterns within a memory bank without using any anomalous patterns. We present extensive experiments on the challenging NIH Chest X-rays and MURA dataset, which indicate that our algorithm improves state-of-the-art methods by a wide margin.
summary: Deep anomaly detection models using a supervised mode of learning usually work under a closed set assumption and suffer from overfitting to previously seen rare anomalies at training, which hinders their applicability in a real scenario. In addition, obtaining annotations for X-rays is very time consuming and requires extensive training of radiologists. Hence, training anomaly detection in a fully unsupervised or self-supervised fashion would be advantageous, allowing a significant reduction of time spent on the report by radiologists. In this paper, we present SALAD, an end-to-end deep self-supervised methodology for anomaly detection on X-Ray images. The proposed method is based on an optimization strategy in which a deep neural network is encouraged to represent prototypical local patterns of the normal data in the embedding space. During training, we record the prototypical patterns of normal training samples via a memory bank. Our anomaly score is then derived by measuring similarity to a weighted combination of normal prototypical patterns within a memory bank without using any anomalous patterns. We present extensive experiments on the challenging NIH Chest X-rays and MURA dataset, which indicate that our algorithm improves state-of-the-art methods by a wide margin.
abstract_zh: 使用监督学习模式的深度异常检测模型通常在封闭集假设下工作，并且在训练时会过度拟合之前看到的罕见异常，这阻碍了它们在实际场景中的适用性。此外，获得 X 射线注释非常耗时，并且需要对放射科医生进行广泛的培训。因此，以完全无监督或自我监督的方式训练异常检测将是有利的，可以显着减少放射科医生花在报告上的时间。在本文中，我们提出了 SALAD，一种用于 X 射线图像异常检测的端到端深度自监督方法。所提出的方法基于优化策略，其中鼓励深度神经网络来表示嵌入空间中正常数据的原型局部模式。在训练过程中，我们通过记忆库记录正常训练样本的原型模式。然后，我们的异常分数是通过测量与记忆库中正常原型模式的加权组合的相似性而得出的，而不使用任何异常模式。我们对具有挑战性的 NIH 胸部 X 射线和 MURA 数据集进行了广泛的实验，这表明我们的算法大幅改进了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督聚合学习的X光异常检测方法SALAD，无需标注数据即可检测X光图像中的异常。
AI.motivation: 传统监督模型依赖标注数据且易过拟合，而X光标注耗时且需专业放射科医生培训，需开发无需标注的自监督方法以提高实际应用性。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习构建深度神经网络，利用记忆库存储正常样本的原型模式，通过计算待测样本与记忆库中正常模式的相似度生成异常分数。
AI.result: 在NIH Chest X-rays和MURA数据集上，SALAD显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SALAD为X光异常检测提供了无需标注的自监督解决方案，在实际场景中具有广泛应用前景。

In this paper, we present SALAD, an end-to-end deep self-supervised methodology for anomaly detection on X-Ray images. The proposed method is based on an optimization strategy in which a deep neural network is encouraged to represent prototypical local patterns of the normal data in the embedding space. During training, we record the prototypical patterns of normal training samples via a memory bank. Our anomaly score is then derived by measuring similarity to a weighted combination of normal prototypical patterns within a memory bank without using any anomalous patterns. We present extensive experiments on the challenging NIH Chest X-rays and MURA dataset, which indicate that our algorithm improves state-of-the-art methods by a wide margin. 使用监督学习模式的深度异常检测模型通常在封闭集假设下工作，并且在训练时会过度拟合之前看到的罕见异常，这阻碍了它们在实际场景中的适用性。此外，获得 X 射线注释非常耗时，并且需要对放射科医生进行广泛的培训。因此，以完全无监督或自我监督的方式训练异常检测将是有利的，可以显着减少放射科医生花在报告上的时间。在本文中，我们提出了 SALAD，一种用于 X 射线图像异常检测的端到端深度自监督方法。所提出的方法基于优化策略，其中鼓励深度神经网络来表示嵌入空间中正常数据的原型局部模式。在训练过程中，我们通过记忆库记录正常训练样本的原型模式。然后，我们的异常分数是通过测量与记忆库中正常原型模式的加权组合的相似性而得出的，而不使用任何异常模式。我们对具有挑战性的 NIH 胸部 X 射线和 MURA 数据集进行了广泛的实验，这表明我们的算法大幅改进了最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于自监督聚合学习的X光异常检测方法SALAD，无需标注数据即可检测X光图像中的异常。 Behzad Bozorgtabar,Dwarikanath Mahapatra,Guillaume Vray,Jean-Philippe Thiran eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Evaluating the Cost of Atomic Operations on Modern Architectures
title_zh: 评估现代架构上原子操作的成本
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 24th International Conference on Parallel Architectures and Compilation (PACT'15), 2015
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 24th International Conference on Parallel Architectures and Compilation (PACT'15), 2015
abstract: Atomic operations (atomics) such as Compare-and-Swap (CAS) or Fetch-and-Add (FAA) are ubiquitous in parallel programming. Yet, performance tradeoffs between these operations and various characteristics of such systems, such as the structure of caches, are unclear and have not been thoroughly analyzed. In this paper we establish an evaluation methodology, develop a performance model, and present a set of detailed benchmarks for latency and bandwidth of different atomics. We consider various state-of-the-art x86 architectures: Intel Haswell, Xeon Phi, Ivy Bridge, and AMD Bulldozer. The results unveil surprising performance relationships between the considered atomics and architectural properties such as the coherence state of the accessed cache lines. One key finding is that all the tested atomics have comparable latency and bandwidth even if they are characterized by different consensus numbers. Another insight is that the hardware implementation of atomics prevents any instruction-level parallelism even if there are no dependencies between the issued operations. Finally, we discuss solutions to the discovered performance issues in the analyzed architectures. Our analysis enables simpler and more effective parallel programming and accelerates data processing on various architectures deployed in both off-the-shelf machines and large compute systems.

Yet, performance tradeoffs between these operations and various characteristics of such systems, such as the structure of caches, are unclear and have not been thoroughly analyzed. In this paper we establish an evaluation methodology, develop a performance model, and present a set of detailed benchmarks for latency and bandwidth of different atomics. We consider various state-of-the-art x86 architectures: Intel Haswell, Xeon Phi, Ivy Bridge, and AMD Bulldozer. The results unveil surprising performance relationships between the considered atomics and architectural properties such as the coherence state of the accessed cache lines. One key finding is that all the tested atomics have comparable latency and bandwidth even if they are characterized by different consensus numbers. Another insight is that the hardware implementation of atomics prevents any instruction-level parallelism even if there are no dependencies between the issued operations. Finally, we discuss solutions to the discovered performance issues in the analyzed architectures. Our analysis enables simpler and more effective parallel programming and accelerates data processing on various architectures deployed in both off-the-shelf machines and large compute systems.
abstract_zh: 比较和交换 (CAS) 或获取和添加 (FAA) 等原子操作（原子）在并行编程中无处不在。然而，这些操作与此类系统的各种特征（例如缓存结构）之间的性能权衡尚不清楚，也尚未得到彻底分析。在本文中，我们建立了一种评估方法，开发了一个性能模型，并提出了一组针对不同原子的延迟和带宽的详细基准。我们考虑各种最先进的 x86 架构：Intel Haswell、Xeon Phi、Ivy Bridge 和 AMD Bulldozer。结果揭示了所考虑的原子和架构属性（例如所访问的缓存行的一致性状态）之间令人惊讶的性能关系。一项重要发现是，所有测试的原子都具有相当的延迟和带宽，即使它们具有不同的共识数。另一个见解是，即使发出的操作之间不存在依赖关系，原子的硬件实现也会阻止任何指令级并行性。最后，我们讨论了所分析的架构中发现的性能问题的解决方案。我们的分析可以实现更简单、更有效的并行编程，并加速部署在现成机器和大型计算系统中的各种架构上的数据处理。

AI.tldr: 评估现代架构中原子操作的代价，分析其性能特性及与硬件架构的关系。
AI.motivation: 原子操作在并行编程中广泛存在，但其性能与缓存结构等硬件特性之间的关系尚未明确，需系统分析以指导高效编程。
AI.method: 建立评估方法与性能模型，设计基准测试，对比Intel和AMD多代x86架构下不同原子操作的延迟和带宽。
AI.result: 发现不同共识数的原子操作性能相近，硬件实现阻断指令级并行，缓存一致性状态显著影响性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果可优化并行程序设计，提升多架构下的数据处理效率，为硬件设计提供改进方向。

title: Can I Trust My Fairness Metric? Assessing Fairness with Unlabeled Data and Bayesian Inference
title_zh: 我可以相信我的公平指标吗？使用未标记数据和贝叶斯推理评估公平性
comment: 27 pages
comments: 27 pages
abstract: We investigate the problem of reliably assessing group fairness when labeled examples are few but unlabeled examples are plentiful. We propose a general Bayesian framework that can augment labeled data with unlabeled data to produce more accurate and lower-variance estimates compared to methods based on labeled data alone. Our approach estimates calibrated scores for unlabeled examples in each group using a hierarchical latent variable model conditioned on labeled examples. This in turn allows for inference of posterior distributions with associated notions of uncertainty for a variety of group fairness metrics. We demonstrate that our approach leads to significant and consistent reductions in estimation error across multiple well-known fairness datasets, sensitive attributes, and predictive models. The results show the benefits of using both unlabeled data and Bayesian inference in terms of assessing whether a prediction model is fair or not.
summary: We investigate the problem of reliably assessing group fairness when labeled examples are few but unlabeled examples are plentiful. We propose a general Bayesian framework that can augment labeled data with unlabeled data to produce more accurate and lower-variance estimates compared to methods based on labeled data alone. Our approach estimates calibrated scores for unlabeled examples in each group using a hierarchical latent variable model conditioned on labeled examples. This in turn allows for inference of posterior distributions with associated notions of uncertainty for a variety of group fairness metrics. We demonstrate that our approach leads to significant and consistent reductions in estimation error across multiple well-known fairness datasets, sensitive attributes, and predictive models. The results show the benefits of using both unlabeled data and Bayesian inference in terms of assessing whether a prediction model is fair or not.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了当标记示例很少但未标记示例大量时可靠评估群体公平性的问题。我们提出了一个通用的贝叶斯框架，与仅基于标记数据的方法相比，它可以使用未标记数据来增强标记数据，从而产生更准确和更低方差的估计。我们的方法使用以标记示例为条件的分层潜变量模型来估计每组中未标记示例的校准分数。这反过来又允许推断后验分布以及各种群体公平性指标的相关不确定性概念。我们证明，我们的方法可以显着且一致地减少多个众所周知的公平性数据集、敏感属性和预测模型的估计误差。结果显示了使用未标记数据和贝叶斯推理在评估预测模型是否公平方面的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯推断的框架，利用大量未标记数据提升公平性评估的准确性。
AI.motivation: 在公平性评估中，标记数据稀缺而未标记数据丰富，传统方法依赖标记数据导致估计误差大且方差高。
AI.method: 构建分层潜在变量模型，利用标记数据校准未标记样本的群体得分，通过贝叶斯推断获得公平性指标的后验分布及不确定性度量。
AI.result: 在多个公平性数据集和预测模型上，该方法显著降低估计误差，提升公平性评估的稳定性与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 结合未标记数据与贝叶斯推断可有效改进公平性评估，为数据稀缺场景下的模型公平性验证提供新思路。

title: The Anatomical Edutainer
title_zh: 解剖教育者
abstract: Physical visualizations (i.e., data representations by means of physical objects) have been used for many centuries in medical and anatomical education. Recently, 3D printing techniques started also to emerge. Still, other medical physicalizations that rely on affordable and easy-to-find materials are limited, while smart strategies that take advantage of the optical properties of our physical world have not been thoroughly investigated. We propose the Anatomical Edutainer, a workflow to guide the easy, accessible, and affordable generation of physicalizations for tangible, interactive anatomical edutainment. The Anatomical Edutainer supports 2D printable and 3D foldable physicalizations that change their visual properties (i.e., hues of the visible spectrum) under colored lenses or colored lights, to reveal distinct anatomical structures through user interaction.
summary: Physical visualizations (i.e., data representations by means of physical objects) have been used for many centuries in medical and anatomical education. Recently, 3D printing techniques started also to emerge. Still, other medical physicalizations that rely on affordable and easy-to-find materials are limited, while smart strategies that take advantage of the optical properties of our physical world have not been thoroughly investigated. We propose the Anatomical Edutainer, a workflow to guide the easy, accessible, and affordable generation of physicalizations for tangible, interactive anatomical edutainment. The Anatomical Edutainer supports 2D printable and 3D foldable physicalizations that change their visual properties (i.e., hues of the visible spectrum) under colored lenses or colored lights, to reveal distinct anatomical structures through user interaction.
abstract_zh: 物理可视化（即通过物理对象进行数据表示）已在医学和解剖学教育中使用了多个世纪。最近，3D打印技术也开始出现。尽管如此，依赖于负担得起且易于找到的材料的其他医学物理化仍然有限，而利用我们物理世界的光学特性的智能策略尚未得到彻底研究。我们提出了 Anatomical Edutainer，这是一种工作流程，用于指导简单、易于访问且经济实惠的物理化生成，以实现有形的交互式解剖寓教于乐。 Anatomical Edutainer 支持 2D 可打印和 3D 可折叠物理化，可在彩色镜片或彩色灯光下改变其视觉属性（即可见光谱的色调），从而通过用户交互揭示不同的解剖结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Anatomical Edutainer的工作流程，用于生成低成本、易制作的物理化教学工具，通过光学特性实现互动式解剖学教育。
AI.motivation: 传统解剖学教学工具成本高且制作复杂，而基于经济材料的物理化方案及光学交互策略尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计支持2D打印和3D折叠的物理化模型，利用彩色滤光片或灯光改变物体颜色，通过用户交互揭示不同解剖结构。
AI.result: 成功生成了多种可交互的解剖模型，验证了该方法在提升教学互动性和可及性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Anatomical Edutainer为解剖学教育提供了经济、易用的物理化方案，未来可进一步优化材料与光学效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Anatomical Edutainer的工作流程，用于生成低成本、易制作的物理化教学工具，通过光学特性实现互动式解剖学教育。

search_text: The Anatomical Edutainer 解剖教育者 Physical visualizations (i.e., data representations by means of physical objects) have been used for many centuries in medical and anatomical education. Recently, 3D printing techniques started also to emerge. Still, other medical physicalizations that rely on affordable and easy-to-find materials are limited, while smart strategies that take advantage of the optical properties of our physical world have not been thoroughly investigated. We propose the Anatomical Edutainer, a workflow to guide the easy, accessible, and affordable generation of physicalizations for tangible, interactive anatomical edutainment. The Anatomical Edutainer supports 2D printable and 3D foldable physicalizations that change their visual properties (i.e., hues of the visible spectrum) under colored lenses or colored lights, to reveal distinct anatomical structures through user interaction. 物理可视化（即通过物理对象进行数据表示）已在医学和解剖学教育中使用了多个世纪。最近，3D打印技术也开始出现。尽管如此，依赖于负担得起且易于找到的材料的其他医学物理化仍然有限，而利用我们物理世界的光学特性的智能策略尚未得到彻底研究。我们提出了 Anatomical Edutainer，这是一种工作流程，用于指导简单、易于访问且经济实惠的物理化生成，以实现有形的交互式解剖寓教于乐。 Anatomical Edutainer 支持 2D 可打印和 3D 可折叠物理化，可在彩色镜片或彩色灯光下改变其视觉属性（即可见光谱的色调），从而通过用户交互揭示不同的解剖结构。 本文提出了一种名为Anatomical Edutainer的工作流程，用于生成低成本、易制作的物理化教学工具，通过光学特性实现互动式解剖学教育。 Marwin Schindler,Hsiang-Yun Wu,Renata Georgia Raidou cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.GR

authors_text: Siwei Zhang,Zhiwu Huang,Danda Pani Paudel,Luc Van Gool
title: Facial Emotion Recognition with Noisy Multi-task Annotations
title_zh: 具有嘈杂多任务注释的面部情绪识别
comment: Accepted by 2021 WACV, camera-ready version with appendix
comments: Accepted by 2021 WACV, camera-ready version with appendix
abstract: Human emotions can be inferred from facial expressions. However, the annotations of facial expressions are often highly noisy in common emotion coding models, including categorical and dimensional ones. To reduce human labelling effort on multi-task labels, we introduce a new problem of facial emotion recognition with noisy multi-task annotations. For this new problem, we suggest a formulation from the point of joint distribution match view, which aims at learning more reliable correlations among raw facial images and multi-task labels, resulting in the reduction of noise influence. In our formulation, we exploit a new method to enable the emotion prediction and the joint distribution learning in a unified adversarial learning game. Evaluation throughout extensive experiments studies the real setups of the suggested new problem, as well as the clear superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art competing methods on either the synthetic noisy labeled CIFAR-10 or practical noisy multi-task labeled RAF and AffectNet. The code is available at https://github.com/sanweiliti/noisyFER.
summary: Human emotions can be inferred from facial expressions. However, the annotations of facial expressions are often highly noisy in common emotion coding models, including categorical and dimensional ones. To reduce human labelling effort on multi-task labels, we introduce a new problem of facial emotion recognition with noisy multi-task annotations. For this new problem, we suggest a formulation from the point of joint distribution match view, which aims at learning more reliable correlations among raw facial images and multi-task labels, resulting in the reduction of noise influence. In our formulation, we exploit a new method to enable the emotion prediction and the joint distribution learning in a unified adversarial learning game. Evaluation throughout extensive experiments studies the real setups of the suggested new problem, as well as the clear superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art competing methods on either the synthetic noisy labeled CIFAR-10 or practical noisy multi-task labeled RAF and AffectNet. The code is available at https://github.com/sanweiliti/noisyFER.
abstract_zh: 人类的情绪可以从面部表情推断出来。然而，在常见的情感编码模型（包括卡尔类别和维度模型）中，面部表情的注释通常具有很高的噪声。为了减少多任务标签上的人工标记工作，我们引入了带有噪声多任务注释的面部情感识别的新问题。对于这个新问题，我们从联合分布匹配的角度提出了一种表述，旨在学习原始面部图像和多任务标签之间更可靠的相关性，从而减少噪声影响。在我们的公式中，我们利用一种新方法在统一的对抗性学习游戏中实现情感预测和联合分布学习。通过大量实验进行的评估研究了所提出的新问题的真实设置，以及所提出的方法相对于标记为 CIFAR-10 的合成噪声或标记为 RAF 和 AffectNet 的实际噪声多任务上最先进的竞争方法的明显优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/sanweiliti/noisyFER 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在存在噪声多任务标注的情况下进行面部情绪识别的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪编码模型中的面部表情标注存在高度噪声，且多任务标注需要大量人工标注工作，亟需减少标注负担并提升识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 从联合分布匹配视角出发，通过统一的对抗学习框架联合优化情绪预测与分布学习，降低噪声影响。
AI.result: 在合成噪声数据集CIFAR-10及真实噪声标注数据集RAF和AffectNet上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了多任务噪声标注对情绪识别的干扰，为弱监督情绪分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sanjai Narain,Emily Mak,Dana Chee,Todd Huster,Jeremy Cohen,Kishore Pochiraju,Brendan Englot,Niraj K. Jha,Karthik Narayan
title: Robot Design With Neural Networks, MILP Solvers and Active Learning
title_zh: 使用神经网络、MILP 求解器和主动学习进行机器人设计
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures
comments: 22 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Central to the design of many robot systems and their controllers is solving a constrained blackbox optimization problem. This paper presents CNMA, a new method of solving this problem that is conservative in the number of potentially expensive blackbox function evaluations; allows specifying complex, even recursive constraints directly rather than as hard-to-design penalty or barrier functions; and is resilient to the non-termination of function evaluations. CNMA leverages the ability of neural networks to approximate any continuous function, their transformation into equivalent mixed integer linear programs (MILPs) and their optimization subject to constraints with industrial strength MILP solvers. A new learning-from-failure step guides the learning to be relevant to solving the constrained optimization problem. Thus, the amount of learning is orders of magnitude smaller than that needed to learn functions over their entire domains. CNMA is illustrated with the design of several robotic systems: wave-energy propelled boat, lunar lander, hexapod, cartpole, acrobot and parallel parking. These range from 6 real-valued dimensions to 36. We show that CNMA surpasses the Nelder-Mead, Gaussian and Random Search optimization methods against the metric of number of function evaluations.
summary: Central to the design of many robot systems and their controllers is solving a constrained blackbox optimization problem. This paper presents CNMA, a new method of solving this problem that is conservative in the number of potentially expensive blackbox function evaluations; allows specifying complex, even recursive constraints directly rather than as hard-to-design penalty or barrier functions; and is resilient to the non-termination of function evaluations. CNMA leverages the ability of neural networks to approximate any continuous function, their transformation into equivalent mixed integer linear programs (MILPs) and their optimization subject to constraints with industrial strength MILP solvers. A new learning-from-failure step guides the learning to be relevant to solving the constrained optimization problem. Thus, the amount of learning is orders of magnitude smaller than that needed to learn functions over their entire domains. CNMA is illustrated with the design of several robotic systems: wave-energy propelled boat, lunar lander, hexapod, cartpole, acrobot and parallel parking. These range from 6 real-valued dimensions to 36. We show that CNMA surpasses the Nelder-Mead, Gaussian and Random Search optimization methods against the metric of number of function evaluations.
abstract_zh: 许多机器人系统及其控制器的设计核心是解决约束黑盒优化问题。本文提出了 CNMA，这是一种解决该问题的新方法，该方法在潜在昂贵的黑盒函数评估数量上是保守的；允许直接指定复杂的甚至递归的约束，而不是作为难以设计的惩罚或障碍函数；并且对功能评估的不终止具有弹性。 CNMA 利用神经网络逼近任何连续函数的能力，将其转换为等效的混合整数线性程序 (MILP)，并在工业强度 MILP 求解器的约束下进行优化。新的从失败中学习的步骤引导学习与解决约束优化问题相关。因此，学习量比学习整个领域的函数所需的学习量小几个数量级。 CNMA通过几个机器人系统的设计进行了说明：波能推进船、月球着陆器、六足机器人、推车、杂技机器人和平行停车。这些范围从 6 个实值维度到 36 个。我们表明，在函数评估数量指标方面，CNMA 超越了 Nelder-Mead、高斯和随机搜索优化方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络、MILP求解器和主动学习的机器人设计优化方法CNMA，用于解决约束黑箱优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法在处理复杂约束时需大量函数评估，且难以应对非终止问题，而现有方法难以直接表达递归约束。
AI.method: 利用神经网络逼近连续函数并转化为MILP，通过工业级求解器优化；引入从失败中学习的主动学习步骤，减少全局学习需求。
AI.result: 在6至36维的多个机器人系统设计中，CNMA在函数评估次数指标上优于Nelder-Mead、高斯和随机搜索方法。
AI.conclusion: CNMA通过约束感知的主动学习和MILP转化，实现了更高效的机器人设计优化，尤其适合处理复杂约束问题。

title: New Properties of the Data Distillation Method When Working With Tabular Data
title_zh: 使用表格数据时数据蒸馏方法的新属性
comment: 12 pages
comments: 12 pages
abstract: Data distillation is the problem of reducing the volume oftraining data while keeping only the necessary information. With thispaper, we deeper explore the new data distillation algorithm, previouslydesigned for image data. Our experiments with tabular data show thatthe model trained on distilled samples can outperform the model trainedon the original dataset. One of the problems of the considered algorithmis that produced data has poor generalization on models with differenthyperparameters. We show that using multiple architectures during distillation can help overcome this problem.
summary: Data distillation is the problem of reducing the volume oftraining data while keeping only the necessary information. With thispaper, we deeper explore the new data distillation algorithm, previouslydesigned for image data. Our experiments with tabular data show thatthe model trained on distilled samples can outperform the model trainedon the original dataset. One of the problems of the considered algorithmis that produced data has poor generalization on models with differenthyperparameters. We show that using multiple architectures during distillation can help overcome this problem.
abstract_zh: 数据蒸馏是减少训练数据量同时仅保留必要信息的问题。通过本文，我们更深入地探索了先前为图像数据设计的新数据蒸馏算法。我们对表格数据的实验表明，在蒸馏样本上训练的模型可以优于在原始数据集上训练的模型。所考虑算法的问题之一是生成的数据对具有不同超参数的模型的泛化性较差。我们证明，在蒸馏过程中使用多种架构可以帮助克服这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了数据蒸馏方法在表格数据中的新特性，并提出通过多架构蒸馏解决模型泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据蒸馏算法在图像数据有效，但应用于表格数据时泛化能力不足，需改进以适应不同模型架构。
AI.method: 通过在蒸馏过程中采用多种模型架构，提高数据对不同超参数模型的适应性。
AI.result: 实验表明，蒸馏数据训练的模型性能优于原始数据集，但需多架构蒸馏以提升泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多架构数据蒸馏能有效提升模型泛化能力，为表格数据蒸馏提供新思路。

authors_text: Anurag Koul,Varun V. Kumar,Alan Fern,Somdeb Majumdar
title: Dream and Search to Control: Latent Space Planning for Continuous Control
title_zh: 梦想与搜索控制：持续控制的潜在空间规划
comment: Preprint
comments: Preprint
abstract: Learning and planning with latent space dynamics has been shown to be useful for sample efficiency in model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) for discrete and continuous control tasks. In particular, recent work, for discrete action spaces, demonstrated the effectiveness of latent-space planning via Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) for bootstrapping MBRL during learning and at test time. However, the potential gains from latent-space tree search have not yet been demonstrated for environments with continuous action spaces. In this work, we propose and explore an MBRL approach for continuous action spaces based on tree-based planning over learned latent dynamics. We show that it is possible to demonstrate the types of bootstrapping benefits as previously shown for discrete spaces. In particular, the approach achieves improved sample efficiency and performance on a majority of challenging continuous-control benchmarks compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: Learning and planning with latent space dynamics has been shown to be useful for sample efficiency in model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) for discrete and continuous control tasks. In particular, recent work, for discrete action spaces, demonstrated the effectiveness of latent-space planning via Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) for bootstrapping MBRL during learning and at test time. However, the potential gains from latent-space tree search have not yet been demonstrated for environments with continuous action spaces. In this work, we propose and explore an MBRL approach for continuous action spaces based on tree-based planning over learned latent dynamics. We show that it is possible to demonstrate the types of bootstrapping benefits as previously shown for discrete spaces. In particular, the approach achieves improved sample efficiency and performance on a majority of challenging continuous-control benchmarks compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，利用潜在空间动力学进行学习和规划对于离散和连续控制任务的基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）中的样本效率非常有用。特别是，最近针对离散动作空间的工作证明了通过蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）进行潜在空间规划的有效性，以在学习和测试时引导 MBRL。然而，对于具有连续动作空间的环境，潜在空间树搜索的潜在收益尚未得到证实。在这项工作中，我们提出并探索了一种基于学习的潜在动态的基于树的规划的连续动作空间的 MBRL 方法。我们证明，可以展示之前针对离散空间所示的引导优势类型。特别是，与最先进的方法相比，该方法在大多数具有挑战性的连续控制基准上提高了样本效率和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在空间动态的树状规划方法，用于连续控制任务的基于模型的强化学习（MBRL），以提高样本效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管潜在空间规划在离散动作空间中已被证明有效，但其在连续动作空间中的潜力尚未被验证，而连续控制任务在样本效率上面临更大挑战。
AI.method: 通过学习潜在动态模型并结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）进行树状规划，提出针对连续动作空间的MBRL框架，利用潜在空间进行高效决策规划。
AI.result: 该方法在多个具有挑战性的连续控制基准测试中表现出优于现有最先进方法的样本效率和性能。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间树搜索可有效扩展至连续控制领域，为MBRL在复杂连续任务中的应用提供了新方向。

authors_text: Andrew Singletary,Karl Klingebiel,Joseph Bourne,Andrew Browning,Phil Tokumaru,Aaron Ames
title: Comparative Analysis of Control Barrier Functions and Artificial Potential Fields for Obstacle Avoidance
title_zh: 控制屏障功能与人工势场避障对比分析
comment: 8 pages, submitted to RA-L
comments: 8 pages, submitted to RA-L
abstract: Artificial potential fields (APFs) and their variants have been a staple for collision avoidance of mobile robots and manipulators for almost 40 years. Its model-independent nature, ease of implementation, and real-time performance have played a large role in its continued success over the years. Control barrier functions (CBFs), on the other hand, are a more recent development, commonly used to guarantee safety for nonlinear systems in real-time in the form of a filter on a nominal controller. In this paper, we address the connections between APFs and CBFs. At a theoretic level, we prove that APFs are a special case of CBFs: given a APF one obtains a CBFs, while the converse is not true. Additionally, we prove that CBFs obtained from APFs have additional beneficial properties and can be applied to nonlinear systems. Practically, we compare the performance of APFs and CBFs in the context of obstacle avoidance on simple illustrative examples and for a quadrotor, both in simulation and on hardware using onboard sensing. These comparisons demonstrate that CBFs outperform APFs.
summary: Artificial potential fields (APFs) and their variants have been a staple for collision avoidance of mobile robots and manipulators for almost 40 years. Its model-independent nature, ease of implementation, and real-time performance have played a large role in its continued success over the years. Control barrier functions (CBFs), on the other hand, are a more recent development, commonly used to guarantee safety for nonlinear systems in real-time in the form of a filter on a nominal controller. In this paper, we address the connections between APFs and CBFs. At a theoretic level, we prove that APFs are a special case of CBFs: given a APF one obtains a CBFs, while the converse is not true. Additionally, we prove that CBFs obtained from APFs have additional beneficial properties and can be applied to nonlinear systems. Practically, we compare the performance of APFs and CBFs in the context of obstacle avoidance on simple illustrative examples and for a quadrotor, both in simulation and on hardware using onboard sensing. These comparisons demonstrate that CBFs outperform APFs.
abstract_zh: 近 40 年来，人工势场 (APF) 及其变体一直是移动机器人和机械臂避免碰撞的主要手段。其模型独立性、易于实施和实时性能对其多年来的持续成功发挥了重要作用。另一方面，控制屏障函数 (CBF) 是最近的发展，通常用于以标称控制器上的滤波器的形式实时保证非线性系统的安全。在本文中，我们讨论了 APF 和 CBF 之间的联系。在理论层面上，我们证明 APF 是 CBF 的一种特殊情况：给定 APF 就可以获得 CBF，反之则不然。此外，我们证明从 APF 获得的 CBF 具有额外的有益特性，并且可以应用于非线性系统。实际上，我们在简单的说明性示例和四旋翼飞行器的避障背景下比较了 APF 和 CBF 的性能，无论是在仿真中还是在使用机载传感的硬件上。这些比较表明 CBF 的性能优于 APF。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了控制屏障函数（CBFs）和人工势场（APFs）在避障方面的性能。
AI.motivation: 人工势场（APFs）因其模型无关性、易于实现和实时性能而被广泛用于避障，但控制屏障函数（CBFs）作为较新的方法，能够保证非线性系统的安全性，因此有必要比较两者。
AI.method: 从理论层面证明APFs是CBFs的一种特殊情况，并通过简单示例和四旋翼飞行器的仿真与硬件实验比较两者的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在避障任务中，CBFs的性能优于APFs。
AI.conclusion: CBFs在理论和实践中均优于APFs，适合用于非线性系统的实时避障任务。

title: Parametrized topological complexity of collision-free motion planning in the plane
title_zh: 平面内无碰撞运动规划的参数化拓扑复杂度
comment: revision includes an appendix on fibrations of certain mapping spaces
comments: revision includes an appendix on fibrations of certain mapping spaces
abstract: Parametrized motion planning algorithms have high degrees of universality and flexibility, as they are designed to work under a variety of external conditions, which are viewed as parameters and form part of the input of the underlying motion planning problem. In this paper, we analyze the parameterized motion planning problem for the motion of many distinct points in the plane, moving without collision and avoiding multiple distinct obstacles with a priori unknown positions. This complements our prior work [arXiv:2009.06023], where parameterized motion planning algorithms were introduced, and the obstacle-avoiding collision-free motion planning problem in three-dimensional space was fully investigated. The planar case requires different algebraic and topological tools than its spatial analog.
summary: Parametrized motion planning algorithms have high degrees of universality and flexibility, as they are designed to work under a variety of external conditions, which are viewed as parameters and form part of the input of the underlying motion planning problem. In this paper, we analyze the parameterized motion planning problem for the motion of many distinct points in the plane, moving without collision and avoiding multiple distinct obstacles with a priori unknown positions. This complements our prior work [arXiv:2009.06023], where parameterized motion planning algorithms were introduced, and the obstacle-avoiding collision-free motion planning problem in three-dimensional space was fully investigated. The planar case requires different algebraic and topological tools than its spatial analog.
abstract_zh: 参数化运动规划算法具有高度的通用性和灵活性，因为它们被设计为在各种外部条件下工作，这些外部条件被视为参数并构成底层运动规划问题的输入的一部分。在本文中，我们分析了平面上许多不同点的运动的参数化运动规划问题，无碰撞地移动并避开先验未知位置的多个不同障碍物。这补充了我们之前的工作[arXiv:2009.06023]，其中引入了参数化运动规划算法，并且充分研究了三维空间中的避障无碰撞运动规划问题。平面情况需要与其空间模拟不同的代数和拓扑工具。

AI.tldr: 分析平面中多点无碰撞运动规划的参数化问题，考虑未知障碍物的位置。
AI.motivation: 补充三维空间研究，解决平面中不同代数拓扑工具的应用挑战。
AI.method: 利用代数和拓扑工具分析参数化算法，处理未知障碍物的动态规划问题。
AI.result: 确定平面参数化运动规划的拓扑复杂度，提出适用于未知障碍物的算法框架。
AI.conclusion: 平面与三维空间需不同工具，为未来参数化规划研究奠定理论基础。

authors_text: Kuno Kim,Akshat Jindal,Yang Song,Jiaming Song,Yanan Sui,Stefano Ermon
title: Imitation with Neural Density Models
title_zh: 使用神经密度模型进行模拟
abstract: We propose a new framework for Imitation Learning (IL) via density estimation of the expert's occupancy measure followed by Maximum Occupancy Entropy Reinforcement Learning (RL) using the density as a reward. Our approach maximizes a non-adversarial model-free RL objective that provably lower bounds reverse Kullback-Leibler divergence between occupancy measures of the expert and imitator. We present a practical IL algorithm, Neural Density Imitation (NDI), which obtains state-of-the-art demonstration efficiency on benchmark control tasks.
summary: We propose a new framework for Imitation Learning (IL) via density estimation of the expert's occupancy measure followed by Maximum Occupancy Entropy Reinforcement Learning (RL) using the density as a reward. Our approach maximizes a non-adversarial model-free RL objective that provably lower bounds reverse Kullback-Leibler divergence between occupancy measures of the expert and imitator. We present a practical IL algorithm, Neural Density Imitation (NDI), which obtains state-of-the-art demonstration efficiency on benchmark control tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的模仿学习（IL）框架，通过专家占用度量的密度估计，然后使用密度作为奖励进行最大占用熵强化学习（RL）。我们的方法最大化了非对抗性无模型 RL 目标，该目标可证明下限逆转了专家和模仿者的占用度量之间的 Kullback-Leibler 分歧。我们提出了一种实用的 IL 算法——神经密度模拟 (NDI)，它在基准控制任务上获得了最先进的演示效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经密度模型的模仿学习框架，通过密度估计专家策略的占用度量并结合最大熵强化学习实现高效模仿。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习方法常依赖大量示范数据或对抗训练，存在效率低下和稳定性差的问题，需探索更高效的密度估计与强化学习结合方式。
AI.method: 通过密度模型估计专家策略的占用度量，将其作为奖励函数输入最大占用熵强化学习框架，构建非对抗性模型自由优化目标，理论保证KL散度下界。
AI.result: 提出的Neural Density Imitation算法在基准控制任务中达到最先进水平，显著提升示范效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过密度估计与最大熵RL的结合，在理论保证下实现了高效稳定的模仿学习，为少样本模仿学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Congyu Wu,Amanda N. Barczyk,R. Cameron Craddock,Gabriella M. Harari,Edison Thomaz,Jason D. Shumake,Christopher G. Beevers,Samuel D. Gosling,David M. Schnyer
title: Improving Prediction of Real-Time Loneliness and Companionship Type Using Geosocial Features of Personal Smartphone Data
title_zh: 利用个人智能手机数据的地理社会特征改进实时孤独和陪伴类型的预测
abstract: Loneliness is a widely affecting mental health symptom and can be mediated by and co-vary with patterns of social exposure. Using momentary survey and smartphone sensing data collected from 129 Android-using college student participants over three weeks, we (1) investigate and uncover the relations between momentary loneliness experience and companionship type and (2) propose and validate novel geosocial features of smartphone-based Bluetooth and GPS data for predicting loneliness and companionship type in real time. We base our features on intuitions characterizing the quantity and spatiotemporal predictability of an individual's Bluetooth encounters and GPS location clusters to capture personal significance of social exposure scenarios conditional on their temporal distribution and geographic patterns. We examine our features' statistical correlation with momentary loneliness through regression analyses and evaluate their predictive power using a sliding window prediction procedure. Our features achieved significant performance improvement compared to baseline for predicting both momentary loneliness and companionship type, with the effect stronger for the loneliness prediction task. As such we recommend incorporation and further evaluation of our geosocial features proposed in this study in future mental health sensing and context-aware computing applications.
summary: Loneliness is a widely affecting mental health symptom and can be mediated by and co-vary with patterns of social exposure. Using momentary survey and smartphone sensing data collected from 129 Android-using college student participants over three weeks, we (1) investigate and uncover the relations between momentary loneliness experience and companionship type and (2) propose and validate novel geosocial features of smartphone-based Bluetooth and GPS data for predicting loneliness and companionship type in real time. We base our features on intuitions characterizing the quantity and spatiotemporal predictability of an individual's Bluetooth encounters and GPS location clusters to capture personal significance of social exposure scenarios conditional on their temporal distribution and geographic patterns. We examine our features' statistical correlation with momentary loneliness through regression analyses and evaluate their predictive power using a sliding window prediction procedure. Our features achieved significant performance improvement compared to baseline for predicting both momentary loneliness and companionship type, with the effect stronger for the loneliness prediction task. As such we recommend incorporation and further evaluation of our geosocial features proposed in this study in future mental health sensing and context-aware computing applications.
abstract_zh: 孤独是一种广泛影响心理健康的症状，可以通过社会暴露模式来调节并与之共同变化。利用三周内从 129 名使用 Android 的大学生参与者收集的瞬时调查和智能手机传感数据，我们 (1) 调查并揭示了瞬时孤独体验与陪伴类型之间的关系，(2) 提出并验证了基于智能手机的蓝牙和 GPS 数据的新颖的地理社会特征，用于实时预测孤独和陪伴类型。我们的特征基于表征个人蓝牙遭遇和 GPS 位置集群的数量和时空可预测性的直觉，以捕获社交暴露场景的个人重要性（取决于其时间分布和地理模式）。我们通过回归分析检查我们的特征与瞬时孤独感的统计相关性，并使用滑动窗口预测程序评估其预测能力。与预测短暂孤独和陪伴类型的基线相比，我们的特征取得了显着的性能改进，并且对于孤独预测任务的效果更强。因此，我们建议在未来的心理健康传感和情境感知计算应用中纳入并进一步评估本研究中提出的地理社会特征。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析智能手机的蓝牙和GPS数据，提出新的地理社交特征以实时预测孤独感和陪伴类型。
AI.motivation: 孤独感是影响心理健康的重要因素，传统方法难以实时捕捉其动态变化，需利用智能手机数据挖掘社交暴露模式以改进预测。
AI.method: 收集129名大学生三周内的手机传感器数据与实时调查数据，提取蓝牙连接频率、GPS位置聚类等地理社交特征，通过回归分析与滑动窗口预测验证特征有效性。
AI.result: 新特征在孤独感预测任务中较基线模型提升显著，对陪伴类型的预测也有改善，且孤独感预测效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 建议将本研究提出的地理社交特征纳入未来心理健康监测及情境感知计算系统，以提升实时预测能力。

We examine our features' statistical correlation with momentary loneliness through regression analyses and evaluate their predictive power using a sliding window prediction procedure. Our features achieved significant performance improvement compared to baseline for predicting both momentary loneliness and companionship type, with the effect stronger for the loneliness prediction task. As such we recommend incorporation and further evaluation of our geosocial features proposed in this study in future mental health sensing and context-aware computing applications. 孤独是一种广泛影响心理健康的症状，可以通过社会暴露模式来调节并与之共同变化。利用三周内从 129 名使用 Android 的大学生参与者收集的瞬时调查和智能手机传感数据，我们 (1) 调查并揭示了瞬时孤独体验与陪伴类型之间的关系，(2) 提出并验证了基于智能手机的蓝牙和 GPS 数据的新颖的地理社会特征，用于实时预测孤独和陪伴类型。我们的特征基于表征个人蓝牙遭遇和 GPS 位置集群的数量和时空可预测性的直觉，以捕获社交暴露场景的个人重要性（取决于其时间分布和地理模式）。我们通过回归分析检查我们的特征与瞬时孤独感的统计相关性，并使用滑动窗口预测程序评估其预测能力。与预测短暂孤独和陪伴类型的基线相比，我们的特征取得了显着的性能改进，并且对于孤独预测任务的效果更强。因此，我们建议在未来的心理健康传感和情境感知计算应用中纳入并进一步评估本研究中提出的地理社会特征。 本研究通过分析智能手机的蓝牙和GPS数据，提出新的地理社交特征以实时预测孤独感和陪伴类型。 Congyu Wu,Amanda N. Barczyk,R. Cameron Craddock,Gabriella M. Harari,Edison Thomaz,Jason D. Shumake,Christopher G. Beevers,Samuel D. Gosling,David M. Schnyer cs.HC

title: Adversarial Training for Code Retrieval with Question-Description Relevance Regularization
title_zh: 使用问题描述相关性正则化进行代码检索的对抗性训练
comment: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP 2020. 11 pages, 2 figures
comments: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP 2020. 11 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Code retrieval is a key task aiming to match natural and programming languages. In this work, we propose adversarial learning for code retrieval, that is regularized by question-description relevance. First, we adapt a simple adversarial learning technique to generate difficult code snippets given the input question, which can help the learning of code retrieval that faces bi-modal and data-scarce challenges. Second, we propose to leverage question-description relevance to regularize adversarial learning, such that a generated code snippet should contribute more to the code retrieval training loss, only if its paired natural language description is predicted to be less relevant to the user given question. Experiments on large-scale code retrieval datasets of two programming languages show that our adversarial learning method is able to improve the performance of state-of-the-art models. Moreover, using an additional duplicate question prediction model to regularize adversarial learning further improves the performance, and this is more effective than using the duplicated questions in strong multi-task learning baselines
summary: Code retrieval is a key task aiming to match natural and programming languages. In this work, we propose adversarial learning for code retrieval, that is regularized by question-description relevance. First, we adapt a simple adversarial learning technique to generate difficult code snippets given the input question, which can help the learning of code retrieval that faces bi-modal and data-scarce challenges. Second, we propose to leverage question-description relevance to regularize adversarial learning, such that a generated code snippet should contribute more to the code retrieval training loss, only if its paired natural language description is predicted to be less relevant to the user given question. Experiments on large-scale code retrieval datasets of two programming languages show that our adversarial learning method is able to improve the performance of state-of-the-art models. Moreover, using an additional duplicate question prediction model to regularize adversarial learning further improves the performance, and this is more effective than using the duplicated questions in strong multi-task learning baselines
abstract_zh: 代码检索是匹配自然语言和编程语言的一项关键任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了用于代码检索的对抗性学习，它通过问题描述相关性进行规范化。首先，我们采用简单的对抗性学习技术来根据输入问题生成困难的代码片段，这可以帮助学习面临双模态和数据稀缺挑战的代码检索。其次，我们建议利用问题描述相关性来规范对抗性学习，这样，只有当预测其配对的自然语言描述与用户给定的问题不太相关时，生成的代码片段才应该对代码检索训练损失做出更大的贡献。对两种编程语言的大规模代码检索数据集的实验表明，我们的对抗性学习方法能够提高最先进模型的性能。此外，使用额外的重复问题预测模型来规范对抗性学习进一步提高了性能，这比在强大的多任务学习基线中使用重复问题更有效

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗训练和问题-描述相关性正则化的代码检索方法，以解决双模态数据稀缺带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 代码检索面临自然语言与编程语言匹配困难、数据稀缺等问题，传统方法难以生成有效训练样本。
AI.method: 通过对抗学习生成困难代码片段，并引入问题-描述相关性正则化，使生成代码对训练损失的贡献与描述相关性成反比，结合重复问题预测模型进一步优化。
AI.result: 在两种编程语言的大规模数据集上，该方法显著优于现有模型，且结合重复问题预测模型的性能提升超过多任务学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练结合相关性正则化能有效提升代码检索性能，引入重复问题预测模型可进一步增强效果。

title: A Differentiable Newton Euler Algorithm for Multi-body Model Learning
title_zh: 一种用于多体模型学习的可微牛顿欧拉算法
comment: ICML 2020 Workshop on Inductive Biases, Invariances and Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
comments: ICML 2020 Workshop on Inductive Biases, Invariances and Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: In this work, we examine a spectrum of hybrid model for the domain of multi-body robot dynamics. We motivate a computation graph architecture that embodies the Newton Euler equations, emphasizing the utility of the Lie Algebra form in translating the dynamical geometry into an efficient computational structure for learning. We describe the used virtual parameters that enable unconstrained physical plausible dynamics and the used actuator models. In the experiments, we define a family of 26 grey-box models and evaluate them for system identification of the simulated and physical Furuta Pendulum and Cartpole. The comparison shows that the kinematic parameters, required by previous white-box system identification methods, can be accurately inferred from data. Furthermore, we highlight that models with guaranteed bounded energy of the uncontrolled system generate non-divergent trajectories, while more general models have no such guarantee, so their performance strongly depends on the data distribution. Therefore, the main contributions of this work is the introduction of a white-box model that jointly learns dynamic and kinematics parameters and can be combined with black-box components. We then provide extensive empirical evaluation on challenging systems and different datasets that elucidates the comparative performance of our grey-box architecture with comparable white- and black-box models.
summary: In this work, we examine a spectrum of hybrid model for the domain of multi-body robot dynamics. We motivate a computation graph architecture that embodies the Newton Euler equations, emphasizing the utility of the Lie Algebra form in translating the dynamical geometry into an efficient computational structure for learning. We describe the used virtual parameters that enable unconstrained physical plausible dynamics and the used actuator models. In the experiments, we define a family of 26 grey-box models and evaluate them for system identification of the simulated and physical Furuta Pendulum and Cartpole. The comparison shows that the kinematic parameters, required by previous white-box system identification methods, can be accurately inferred from data. Furthermore, we highlight that models with guaranteed bounded energy of the uncontrolled system generate non-divergent trajectories, while more general models have no such guarantee, so their performance strongly depends on the data distribution. Therefore, the main contributions of this work is the introduction of a white-box model that jointly learns dynamic and kinematics parameters and can be combined with black-box components. We then provide extensive empirical evaluation on challenging systems and different datasets that elucidates the comparative performance of our grey-box architecture with comparable white- and black-box models.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了多体机器人动力学领域的一系列混合模型。我们激发了一种体现牛顿欧拉方程的计算图架构，强调李代数形式在将动态几何转化为有效的学习计算结构方面的效用。我们描述了所使用的虚拟参数，这些虚拟参数能够实现不受约束的物理合理动力学以及所使用的执行器模型。在实验中，我们定义了一系列 26 个灰盒模型，并对它们进行评估，以用于模拟和物理 Furuta Pendulum 和 Cartpole 的系统识别。对比表明，以往白盒系统识别方法所需的运动学参数可以从数据中准确推断。此外，我们强调，具有保证不受控系统有界能量的模型会生成非发散轨迹，而更一般的模型没有这样的保证，因此它们的性能很大程度上取决于数据分布。因此，这项工作的主要贡献是引入了一种白盒模型，该模型联合学习动态和运动学参数，并且可以与黑盒组件结合。然后，我们对具有挑战性的系统和不同的数据集进行了广泛的实证评估，阐明了我们的灰盒架构与可比较的白盒和黑盒模型的比较性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可微分的牛顿-欧拉算法，用于多体系统模型的学习。
AI.motivation: 传统的白盒系统识别方法需要预先知道运动学参数，而本文旨在通过数据自动学习这些参数，并结合黑盒组件提高模型的灵活性和准确性。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种计算图架构，该架构基于牛顿-欧拉方程和李代数形式，用于高效地将动力学几何转化为计算结构，并使用虚拟参数和执行器模型实现无约束的物理合理动力学。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能够准确从数据中推断出运动学参数，并且保证了无控制系统的能量有界性，从而生成非发散轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种结合白盒和黑盒组件的灰盒模型，能够在复杂系统中表现出色，并通过广泛的实验验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Mo Yu,Xiaoxiao Guo,Yufei Feng,Xiaodan Zhu,Michael Greenspan,Murray Campbell
title: Deriving Commonsense Inference Tasks from Interactive Fictions
title_zh: 从互动小说中导出常识推理任务
abstract: Commonsense reasoning simulates the human ability to make presumptions about our physical world, and it is an indispensable cornerstone in building general AI systems. We propose a new commonsense reasoning dataset based on human's interactive fiction game playings as human players demonstrate plentiful and diverse commonsense reasoning. The new dataset mitigates several limitations of the prior art. Experiments show that our task is solvable to human experts with sufficient commonsense knowledge but poses challenges to existing machine reading models, with a big performance gap of more than 30%.
summary: Commonsense reasoning simulates the human ability to make presumptions about our physical world, and it is an indispensable cornerstone in building general AI systems. We propose a new commonsense reasoning dataset based on human's interactive fiction game playings as human players demonstrate plentiful and diverse commonsense reasoning. The new dataset mitigates several limitations of the prior art. Experiments show that our task is solvable to human experts with sufficient commonsense knowledge but poses challenges to existing machine reading models, with a big performance gap of more than 30%.
abstract_zh: 常识推理模拟了人类对物理世界做出假设的能力，是构建通用人工智能系统不可或缺的基石。我们提出了一个基于人类互动小说游戏的新常识推理数据集，因为人类玩家展示了丰富多样的常识推理。新的数据集减轻了现有技术的一些限制。实验表明，我们的任务对于具有足够常识知识的人类专家来说是可以解决的，但对现有的机器阅读模型提出了挑战，性能差距超过 30%。

AI.tldr: 从互动小说中生成常识推理任务
AI.motivation: 常识推理是构建通用AI系统的基础，但现有数据集存在局限性，需更丰富多样的常识推理任务
AI.method: 基于人类在互动小说游戏中的玩法，收集人类玩家展示的多样常识推理，构建新数据集

search_text: Deriving Commonsense Inference Tasks from Interactive Fictions 从互动小说中导出常识推理任务 Commonsense reasoning simulates the human ability to make presumptions about our physical world, and it is an indispensable cornerstone in building general AI systems. We propose a new commonsense reasoning dataset based on human's interactive fiction game playings as human players demonstrate plentiful and diverse commonsense reasoning. The new dataset mitigates several limitations of the prior art. Experiments show that our task is solvable to human experts with sufficient commonsense knowledge but poses challenges to existing machine reading models, with a big performance gap of more than 30%. 常识推理模拟了人类对物理世界做出假设的能力，是构建通用人工智能系统不可或缺的基石。我们提出了一个基于人类互动小说游戏的新常识推理数据集，因为人类玩家展示了丰富多样的常识推理。新的数据集减轻了现有技术的一些限制。实验表明，我们的任务对于具有足够常识知识的人类专家来说是可以解决的，但对现有的机器阅读模型提出了挑战，性能差距超过 30%。 从互动小说中生成常识推理任务 Mo Yu,Xiaoxiao Guo,Yufei Feng,Xiaodan Zhu,Michael Greenspan,Murray Campbell cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Wenhao Yu,Lingfei Wu,Yu Deng,Qingkai Zeng,Ruchi Mahindru,Sinem Guven,Meng Jiang
title: Technical Question Answering across Tasks and Domains
title_zh: 跨任务和领域的技术问题解答
comment: NAACL 2021
comments: NAACL 2021
abstract: Building automatic technical support system is an important yet challenge task. Conceptually, to answer a user question on a technical forum, a human expert has to first retrieve relevant documents, and then read them carefully to identify the answer snippet. Despite huge success the researchers have achieved in coping with general domain question answering (QA), much less attentions have been paid for investigating technical QA. Specifically, existing methods suffer from several unique challenges (i) the question and answer rarely overlaps substantially and (ii) very limited data size. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of deep transfer learning to effectively address technical QA across tasks and domains. To this end, we present an adjustable joint learning approach for document retrieval and reading comprehension tasks. Our experiments on the TechQA demonstrates superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Building automatic technical support system is an important yet challenge task. Conceptually, to answer a user question on a technical forum, a human expert has to first retrieve relevant documents, and then read them carefully to identify the answer snippet. Despite huge success the researchers have achieved in coping with general domain question answering (QA), much less attentions have been paid for investigating technical QA. Specifically, existing methods suffer from several unique challenges (i) the question and answer rarely overlaps substantially and (ii) very limited data size. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of deep transfer learning to effectively address technical QA across tasks and domains. To this end, we present an adjustable joint learning approach for document retrieval and reading comprehension tasks. Our experiments on the TechQA demonstrates superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 建立自动化技术支持系统是一项重要而又具有挑战性的任务。从概念上讲，要回答技术论坛上的用户问题，人类专家必须首先检索相关文档，然后仔细阅读它们以识别答案片段。尽管研究人员在处理一般领域问答 (QA) 方面取得了巨大成功，但对研究技术 QA 的关注却少之又少。具体来说，现有方法面临几个独特的挑战（i）问题和答案很少有实质性重叠，以及（ii）数据大小非常有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度迁移学习框架，以有效解决跨任务和领域的技术质量保证问题。为此，我们提出了一种用于文档检索和阅读理解任务的可调整联合学习方法。与最先进的方法相比，我们在 TechQA 上的实验证明了其卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨任务和跨领域的技术问答框架，解决技术问答中问题答案重叠度低和数据量有限的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有技术问答方法难以应对问题与答案重叠度低及数据量不足的挑战，需开发更有效的跨任务跨领域解决方案。
AI.method: 采用深度迁移学习框架，结合可调节的联合学习方法，同步优化文档检索与阅读理解任务。
AI.result: 在TechQA数据集上实验表明，该方法性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了技术问答的跨任务与跨领域难题，为自动技术支援系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Ming Zhou,Jun Luo,Julian Villella,Yaodong Yang,David Rusu,Jiayu Miao,Weinan Zhang,Montgomery Alban,Iman Fadakar,Zheng Chen,Aurora Chongxi Huang,Ying Wen,Kimia Hassanzadeh,Daniel Graves,Dong Chen,Zhengbang Zhu,Nhat Nguyen,Mohamed Elsayed,Kun Shao,Sanjeevan Ahilan,Baokuan Zhang,Jiannan Wu,Zhengang Fu,Kasra Rezaee,Peyman Yadmellat, et al. title: SMARTS: Scalable Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Training School for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SMARTS：可扩展的多智能体强化学习自动驾驶培训学校
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures. Paper accepted to CoRL 2020
comments: 20 pages, 11 figures. Paper accepted to CoRL 2020
abstract: Multi-agent interaction is a fundamental aspect of autonomous driving in the real world. Despite more than a decade of research and development, the problem of how to competently interact with diverse road users in diverse scenarios remains largely unsolved. Learning methods have much to offer towards solving this problem. But they require a realistic multi-agent simulator that generates diverse and competent driving interactions. To meet this need, we develop a dedicated simulation platform called SMARTS (Scalable Multi-Agent RL Training School). SMARTS supports the training, accumulation, and use of diverse behavior models of road users. These are in turn used to create increasingly more realistic and diverse interactions that enable deeper and broader research on multi-agent interaction. In this paper, we describe the design goals of SMARTS, explain its basic architecture and its key features, and illustrate its use through concrete multi-agent experiments on interactive scenarios. We open-source the SMARTS platform and the associated benchmark tasks and evaluation metrics to encourage and empower research on multi-agent learning for autonomous driving. Our code is available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/SMARTS.
summary: Multi-agent interaction is a fundamental aspect of autonomous driving in the real world. Despite more than a decade of research and development, the problem of how to competently interact with diverse road users in diverse scenarios remains largely unsolved. Learning methods have much to offer towards solving this problem. But they require a realistic multi-agent simulator that generates diverse and competent driving interactions. To meet this need, we develop a dedicated simulation platform called SMARTS (Scalable Multi-Agent RL Training School). SMARTS supports the training, accumulation, and use of diverse behavior models of road users. These are in turn used to create increasingly more realistic and diverse interactions that enable deeper and broader research on multi-agent interaction. In this paper, we describe the design goals of SMARTS, explain its basic architecture and its key features, and illustrate its use through concrete multi-agent experiments on interactive scenarios. We open-source the SMARTS platform and the associated benchmark tasks and evaluation metrics to encourage and empower research on multi-agent learning for autonomous driving. Our code is available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/SMARTS.
abstract_zh: 多智能体交互是现实世界中自动驾驶的一个基本方面。尽管经过十多年的研究和开发，如何在不同场景下与不同道路使用者进行有效交互的问题在很大程度上仍未得到解决。学习方法对于解决这个问题有很大帮助。但他们需要一个真实的多智能体模拟器来生成多样化且有效的驾驶交互。为了满足这一需求，我们开发了一个名为 SMARTS（可扩展多智能体 RL 培训学校）的专用仿真平台。 SMARTS支持道路使用者多样化行为模型的训练、积累和使用。这些反过来又被用来创建越来越现实和多样化的交互，从而能够对多智能体交互进行更深入和更广泛的研究。在本文中，我们描述了 SMARTS 的设计目标，解释了它的基本架构和关键特性，并通过交互场景的具体多智能体实验说明了它的使用。我们开源 SMARTS 平台以及相关的基准任务和评估指标，以鼓励和增强自动驾驶多智能体学习的研究。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/huawei-noah/SMARTS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMARTS仿真平台，用于解决自动驾驶中多智能体交互的现实模拟问题，支持多样化的道路用户行为模型训练与交互研究。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶研究缺乏能够生成真实多样交互场景的多智能体仿真环境，难以满足复杂道路场景下多智能体协同学习的需求。
AI.method: 开发SMARTS平台，集成多智能体强化学习框架，支持道路用户行为模型的训练、积累与交互生成，提供基准任务与评估指标。
AI.result: 开源SMARTS平台及基准任务，通过具体多智能体实验验证其有效性，推动自动驾驶领域多智能体学习研究。
AI.conclusion: SMARTS为自动驾驶中的多智能体交互研究提供了可扩展的仿真工具，有助于深化复杂场景下的协同决策算法开发。

title: GAMesh: Guided and Augmented Meshing for Deep Point Networks
title_zh: GAMesh：深点网络的引导和增强网格划分
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2020
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2020
abstract: We present a new meshing algorithm called guided and augmented meshing, GAMesh, which uses a mesh prior to generate a surface for the output points of a point network. By projecting the output points onto this prior and simplifying the resulting mesh, GAMesh ensures a surface with the same topology as the mesh prior but whose geometric fidelity is controlled by the point network. This makes GAMesh independent of both the density and distribution of the output points, a common artifact in traditional surface reconstruction algorithms. We show that such a separation of geometry from topology can have several advantages especially in single-view shape prediction, fair evaluation of point networks and reconstructing surfaces for networks which output sparse point clouds. We further show that by training point networks with GAMesh, we can directly optimize the vertex positions to generate adaptive meshes with arbitrary topologies.
summary: We present a new meshing algorithm called guided and augmented meshing, GAMesh, which uses a mesh prior to generate a surface for the output points of a point network. By projecting the output points onto this prior and simplifying the resulting mesh, GAMesh ensures a surface with the same topology as the mesh prior but whose geometric fidelity is controlled by the point network. This makes GAMesh independent of both the density and distribution of the output points, a common artifact in traditional surface reconstruction algorithms. We show that such a separation of geometry from topology can have several advantages especially in single-view shape prediction, fair evaluation of point networks and reconstructing surfaces for networks which output sparse point clouds. We further show that by training point networks with GAMesh, we can directly optimize the vertex positions to generate adaptive meshes with arbitrary topologies.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为引导和增强网格划分 GAMesh 的新网格划分算法，该算法在为点网络的输出点生成表面之前使用网格。通过将输出点投影到该先验上并简化生成的网格，GAMesh 确保表面与先验网格具有相同的拓扑，但其几何保真度由点网络控制。这使得 GAMesh 独立于输出点的密度和分布，这是传统表面重建算法中的常见工件。我们表明，这种几何与拓扑的分离可以具有多种优势，特别是在单视图形状预测、点网络的公平评估以及输出稀疏点云的网络的重建表面方面。我们进一步表明，通过使用 GAMesh 训练点网络，我们可以直接优化顶点位置以生成具有任意拓扑的自适应网格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GAMesh的新算法，通过使用网格先验生成点网络输出的表面，实现几何与拓扑的分离。
AI.motivation: 传统表面重建算法受输出点密度和分布影响较大，且难以控制几何保真度。需要一种独立于点分布的拓扑控制方法。
AI.method: 将点网络输出投影到网格先验上，通过简化生成的网格实现拓扑继承，同时由点网络控制几何精度，并通过训练优化顶点位置生成自适应网格。
AI.result: 在单视角形状预测、点网络公平评估及稀疏点云重建中表现优异，可生成任意拓扑的自适应网格。
AI.conclusion: GAMesh通过几何与拓扑解耦有效提升了点网络的表面重建能力，为多场景应用提供了灵活的网格生成方案。

title: Learning by Competition of Self-Interested Reinforcement Learning Agents
title_zh: 通过自利强化学习代理的竞争来学习
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures; to be published in Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures; to be published in Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: An artificial neural network can be trained by uniformly broadcasting a reward signal to units that implement a REINFORCE learning rule. Though this presents a biologically plausible alternative to backpropagation in training a network, the high variance associated with it renders it impractical to train deep networks. The high variance arises from the inefficient structural credit assignment since a single reward signal is used to evaluate the collective action of all units. To facilitate structural credit assignment, we propose replacing the reward signal to hidden units with the change in the $L^2$ norm of the unit's outgoing weight. As such, each hidden unit in the network is trying to maximize the norm of its outgoing weight instead of the global reward, and thus we call this learning method Weight Maximization. We prove that Weight Maximization is approximately following the gradient of rewards in expectation. In contrast to backpropagation, Weight Maximization can be used to train both continuous-valued and discrete-valued units. Moreover, Weight Maximization solves several major issues of backpropagation relating to biological plausibility. Our experiments show that a network trained with Weight Maximization can learn significantly faster than REINFORCE and slightly slower than backpropagation. Weight Maximization illustrates an example of cooperative behavior automatically arising from a population of self-interested agents in a competitive game without any central coordination.
summary: An artificial neural network can be trained by uniformly broadcasting a reward signal to units that implement a REINFORCE learning rule. Though this presents a biologically plausible alternative to backpropagation in training a network, the high variance associated with it renders it impractical to train deep networks. The high variance arises from the inefficient structural credit assignment since a single reward signal is used to evaluate the collective action of all units. To facilitate structural credit assignment, we propose replacing the reward signal to hidden units with the change in the $L^2$ norm of the unit's outgoing weight. As such, each hidden unit in the network is trying to maximize the norm of its outgoing weight instead of the global reward, and thus we call this learning method Weight Maximization. We prove that Weight Maximization is approximately following the gradient of rewards in expectation. In contrast to backpropagation, Weight Maximization can be used to train both continuous-valued and discrete-valued units. Moreover, Weight Maximization solves several major issues of backpropagation relating to biological plausibility. Our experiments show that a network trained with Weight Maximization can learn significantly faster than REINFORCE and slightly slower than backpropagation. Weight Maximization illustrates an example of cooperative behavior automatically arising from a population of self-interested agents in a competitive game without any central coordination.
abstract_zh: 可以通过向实施强化学习规则的单元统一广播奖励信号来训练人工神经网络。尽管这在生物学上为网络训练中的反向传播提供了一种可行的替代方案，但与之相关的高方差使得训练深度网络变得不切实际。高方差源于低效的结构性信用分配，因为使用单一奖励信号来评估所有单位的集体行动。为了促进结构性信用分配，我们建议用单元输出权重 $L^2$ 范数的变化来替换隐藏单元的奖励信号。因此，网络中的每个隐藏单元都试图最大化其输出权重的范数，而不是全局奖励，因此我们将这种学习方法称为权重最大化。我们证明权重最大化大致遵循期望奖励的梯度。与反向传播相反，权重最大化可用于训练连续值和离散值单元。此外，权重最大化解决了与生物学合理性相关的反向传播的几个主要问题。我们的实验表明，使用权重最大化训练的网络可以比 REINFORCE 更快地学习，并且比反向传播稍微慢一些。权重最大化说明了在没有任何中央协调的竞争性游戏中一群自利代理自动产生合作行为的例子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Weight Maximization的新型学习方法，通过竞争机制解决传统强化学习中奖励信号高方差问题，实现深度网络训练。
AI.motivation: 传统REINFORCE方法因使用单一奖励信号导致高方差，难以训练深度网络；反向传播虽有效但缺乏生物合理性，需探索更符合生物机制的学习方法。
AI.method: 用隐藏单元权重L2范数变化替代全局奖励信号，使各单元自主最大化自身权重范数，通过竞争机制实现结构信用分配。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法训练速度显著快于REINFORCE，略慢于反向传播，且能自动产生无中央协调的协作行为。
AI.conclusion: Weight Maximization为生物合理性训练提供了新思路，有效解决奖励信号方差问题，并展示了自利智能体竞争中的协作涌现特性。

title: Investigating and Simplifying Masking-based Saliency Methods for Model Interpretability
title_zh: 研究和简化基于掩蔽的显着性方法以实现模型可解释性
abstract: Saliency maps that identify the most informative regions of an image for a classifier are valuable for model interpretability. A common approach to creating saliency maps involves generating input masks that mask out portions of an image to maximally deteriorate classification performance, or mask in an image to preserve classification performance. Many variants of this approach have been proposed in the literature, such as counterfactual generation and optimizing over a Gumbel-Softmax distribution. Using a general formulation of masking-based saliency methods, we conduct an extensive evaluation study of a number of recently proposed variants to understand which elements of these methods meaningfully improve performance. Surprisingly, we find that a well-tuned, relatively simple formulation of a masking-based saliency model outperforms many more complex approaches. We find that the most important ingredients for high quality saliency map generation are (1) using both masked-in and masked-out objectives and (2) training the classifier alongside the masking model. Strikingly, we show that a masking model can be trained with as few as 10 examples per class and still generate saliency maps with only a 0.7-point increase in localization error.
summary: Saliency maps that identify the most informative regions of an image for a classifier are valuable for model interpretability. A common approach to creating saliency maps involves generating input masks that mask out portions of an image to maximally deteriorate classification performance, or mask in an image to preserve classification performance. Many variants of this approach have been proposed in the literature, such as counterfactual generation and optimizing over a Gumbel-Softmax distribution. Using a general formulation of masking-based saliency methods, we conduct an extensive evaluation study of a number of recently proposed variants to understand which elements of these methods meaningfully improve performance. Surprisingly, we find that a well-tuned, relatively simple formulation of a masking-based saliency model outperforms many more complex approaches. We find that the most important ingredients for high quality saliency map generation are (1) using both masked-in and masked-out objectives and (2) training the classifier alongside the masking model. Strikingly, we show that a masking model can be trained with as few as 10 examples per class and still generate saliency maps with only a 0.7-point increase in localization error.
abstract_zh: 为分类器识别图像中信息最丰富的区域的显着图对于模型的可解释性非常有价值。创建显着性图的常见方法涉及生成输入掩模，该输入掩模遮盖图像的某些部分以最大程度地降低分类性能，或者遮盖图像以保持分类性能。文献中已经提出了这种方法的许多变体，例如反事实生成和针对 Gumbel-Softmax 分布的优化。使用基于掩蔽的显着性方法的一般公式，我们对最近提出的许多变体进行了广泛的评估研究，以了解这些方法的哪些元素可以有意义地提高性能。令人惊讶的是，我们发现基于掩蔽的显着性模型的经过精心调整且相对简单的公式优于许多更复杂的方法。我们发现，生成高质量显着性图的最重要因素是（1）同时使用掩蔽目标和掩蔽目标，以及（2）与掩蔽模型一起训练分类器。引人注目的是，我们表明，每个类只需使用 10 个示例即可训练掩蔽模型，并且仍然生成显着性图，定位误差仅增加 0.7 点。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估和简化基于掩码的显著性方法，以提高模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于掩码的显著性方法复杂且效果差异大，需明确哪些设计要素真正提升性能。
AI.method: 通过统一框架评估多种变体，对比使用掩码输入/输出目标及联合训练分类器与掩码模型的效果。
AI.result: 简单调优的掩码模型在10样本/类下生成显著性图，定位误差仅增加0.7，优于复杂方法。
AI.conclusion: 显著性生成关键在于同时优化掩码输入/输出目标，并联合训练模型，复杂性并非必要。

search_text: Investigating and Simplifying Masking-based Saliency Methods for Model Interpretability 研究和简化基于掩蔽的显着性方法以实现模型可解释性 Saliency maps that identify the most informative regions of an image for a classifier are valuable for model interpretability. A common approach to creating saliency maps involves generating input masks that mask out portions of an image to maximally deteriorate classification performance, or mask in an image to preserve classification performance. Many variants of this approach have been proposed in the literature, such as counterfactual generation and optimizing over a Gumbel-Softmax distribution. Using a general formulation of masking-based saliency methods, we conduct an extensive evaluation study of a number of recently proposed variants to understand which elements of these methods meaningfully improve performance. Surprisingly, we find that a well-tuned, relatively simple formulation of a masking-based saliency model outperforms many more complex approaches. We find that the most important ingredients for high quality saliency map generation are (1) using both masked-in and masked-out objectives and (2) training the classifier alongside the masking model. Strikingly, we show that a masking model can be trained with as few as 10 examples per class and still generate saliency maps with only a 0.7-point increase in localization error. 为分类器识别图像中信息最丰富的区域的显着图对于模型的可解释性非常有价值。创建显着性图的常见方法涉及生成输入掩模，该输入掩模遮盖图像的某些部分以最大程度地降低分类性能，或者遮盖图像以保持分类性能。文献中已经提出了这种方法的许多变体，例如反事实生成和针对 Gumbel-Softmax 分布的优化。使用基于掩蔽的显着性方法的一般公式，我们对最近提出的许多变体进行了广泛的评估研究，以了解这些方法的哪些元素可以有意义地提高性能。令人惊讶的是，我们发现基于掩蔽的显着性模型的经过精心调整且相对简单的公式优于许多更复杂的方法。我们发现，生成高质量显着性图的最重要因素是（1）同时使用掩蔽目标和掩蔽目标，以及（2）与掩蔽模型一起训练分类器。引人注目的是，我们表明，每个类只需使用 10 个示例即可训练掩蔽模型，并且仍然生成显着性图，定位误差仅增加 0.7 点。 本文旨在评估和简化基于掩码的显著性方法，以提高模型可解释性。 Jason Phang,Jungkyu Park,Krzysztof J. Geras cs.CV

title: A Convenient Generalization of Schlick's Bias and Gain Functions
title_zh: Schlick 偏置和增益函数的便捷推广
abstract: We present a generalization of Schlick's bias and gain functions -- simple parametric curve-shaped functions for inputs in [0, 1]. Our single function includes both bias and gain as special cases, and is able to describe other smooth and monotonic curves with variable degrees of asymmetry.
summary: We present a generalization of Schlick's bias and gain functions -- simple parametric curve-shaped functions for inputs in [0, 1]. Our single function includes both bias and gain as special cases, and is able to describe other smooth and monotonic curves with variable degrees of asymmetry.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Schlick 偏置和增益函数的概括——[0, 1] 中输入的简单参数曲线形函数。我们的单一函数包括作为特殊情况的偏差和增益，并且能够描述具有不同程度的不对称性的其他平滑且单调的曲线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将Schlick的偏置和增益函数统一为单一参数化函数的方法，能够描述具有不同不对称度的平滑单调曲线。
AI.motivation: Schlick的偏置和增益函数分别用于调整输入范围的不对称性，但缺乏统一框架。作者希望设计一个灵活的通用函数以同时涵盖两者并适应更多场景。
AI.method: 通过数学推导构建参数化函数，使其在特定参数下退化为原有偏置/增益函数，并通过调整参数控制曲线不对称性。
AI.result: 成功开发出包含原有功能的通用函数，验证了其在多种不对称程度下的平滑单调性，且参数调节直观有效。
AI.conclusion: 该函数为需要动态调整输入映射的领域（如计算机图形学）提供了更简洁灵活的数学工具。

authors_text: Yuliang Zou,Zizhao Zhang,Han Zhang,Chun-Liang Li,Xiao Bian,Jia-Bin Huang,Tomas Pfister
title: PseudoSeg: Designing Pseudo Labels for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: PseudoSeg：为语义分割设计伪标签
comment: ICLR 2021. Project page: https://yuliang.vision/pseudo_seg/ Code: https://github.com/googleinterns/wss
comments: ICLR 2021. Project page: https://yuliang.vision/pseudo_seg/ Code: https://github.com/googleinterns/wss
abstract: Recent advances in semi-supervised learning (SSL) demonstrate that a combination of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling can effectively improve image classification accuracy in the low-data regime. Compared to classification, semantic segmentation tasks require much more intensive labeling costs. Thus, these tasks greatly benefit from data-efficient training methods. However, structured outputs in segmentation render particular difficulties (e.g., designing pseudo-labeling and augmentation) to apply existing SSL strategies. To address this problem, we present a simple and novel re-design of pseudo-labeling to generate well-calibrated structured pseudo labels for training with unlabeled or weakly-labeled data. Our proposed pseudo-labeling strategy is network structure agnostic to apply in a one-stage consistency training framework. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed pseudo-labeling strategy in both low-data and high-data regimes. Extensive experiments have validated that pseudo labels generated from wisely fusing diverse sources and strong data augmentation are crucial to consistency training for segmentation. The source code is available at https://github.com/googleinterns/wss.
summary: Recent advances in semi-supervised learning (SSL) demonstrate that a combination of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling can effectively improve image classification accuracy in the low-data regime. Compared to classification, semantic segmentation tasks require much more intensive labeling costs. Thus, these tasks greatly benefit from data-efficient training methods. However, structured outputs in segmentation render particular difficulties (e.g., designing pseudo-labeling and augmentation) to apply existing SSL strategies. To address this problem, we present a simple and novel re-design of pseudo-labeling to generate well-calibrated structured pseudo labels for training with unlabeled or weakly-labeled data. Our proposed pseudo-labeling strategy is network structure agnostic to apply in a one-stage consistency training framework. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed pseudo-labeling strategy in both low-data and high-data regimes. Extensive experiments have validated that pseudo labels generated from wisely fusing diverse sources and strong data augmentation are crucial to consistency training for segmentation. The source code is available at https://github.com/googleinterns/wss.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）的最新进展表明，一致性正则化和伪标记的结合可以有效提高低数据条件下的图像分类精度。与分类相比，语义分割任务需要更加密集的标记成本。因此，这些任务极大地受益于数据高效的训练方法。然而，分割中的结构化输出给应用现有的 SSL 策略带来了特殊的困难（例如，设计伪标签和增强）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而新颖的伪标记重新设计，以生成经过良好校准的结构化伪标签，用于使用未标记或弱标记数据进行训练。我们提出的伪标记策略与网络结构无关，适用于单阶段一致性训练框架。我们证明了所提出的伪标记策略在低数据和高数据状态下的有效性。大量的实验已经验证，明智地融合不同来源和强大的数据增强生成的伪标签对于分割的一致性训练至关重要。源代码可在 https://github.com/googleinterns/wss 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PseudoSeg的新方法，旨在为语义分割任务设计高质量的伪标签，以提升半监督学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 语义分割任务需要高昂的标注成本，而现有半监督学习策略难以直接应用于结构化输出的分割任务，亟需更高效的数据利用方法。
AI.method: 通过重新设计伪标签生成策略，融合多源信息与强数据增强，提出与网络结构无关的单阶段一致性训练框架，生成校准良好的结构化伪标签。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在低数据和高数据场景下均显著提升分割任务性能，验证了伪标签生成策略对一致性训练的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的伪标签生成方法能够有效提升语义分割的半监督学习效果，为低标注成本场景提供可行解决方案。

title: Self-supervised Co-training for Video Representation Learning
title_zh: 视频表示学习的自监督协同训练
comment: NeurIPS2020
comments: NeurIPS2020
abstract: The objective of this paper is visual-only self-supervised video representation learning. We make the following contributions: (i) we investigate the benefit of adding semantic-class positives to instance-based Info Noise Contrastive Estimation (InfoNCE) training, showing that this form of supervised contrastive learning leads to a clear improvement in performance; (ii) we propose a novel self-supervised co-training scheme to improve the popular infoNCE loss, exploiting the complementary information from different views, RGB streams and optical flow, of the same data source by using one view to obtain positive class samples for the other; (iii) we thoroughly evaluate the quality of the learnt representation on two different downstream tasks: action recognition and video retrieval. In both cases, the proposed approach demonstrates state-of-the-art or comparable performance with other self-supervised approaches, whilst being significantly more efficient to train, i.e. requiring far less training data to achieve similar performance.
summary: The objective of this paper is visual-only self-supervised video representation learning. We make the following contributions: (i) we investigate the benefit of adding semantic-class positives to instance-based Info Noise Contrastive Estimation (InfoNCE) training, showing that this form of supervised contrastive learning leads to a clear improvement in performance; (ii) we propose a novel self-supervised co-training scheme to improve the popular infoNCE loss, exploiting the complementary information from different views, RGB streams and optical flow, of the same data source by using one view to obtain positive class samples for the other; (iii) we thoroughly evaluate the quality of the learnt representation on two different downstream tasks: action recognition and video retrieval. In both cases, the proposed approach demonstrates state-of-the-art or comparable performance with other self-supervised approaches, whilst being significantly more efficient to train, i.e. requiring far less training data to achieve similar performance.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是仅视觉的自监督视频表示学习。我们做出以下贡献：（i）我们研究了在基于实例的信息噪声对比估计（InfoNCE）训练中添加语义类正值的好处，表明这种形式的监督对比学习可以明显提高性能； (ii) 我们提出了一种新颖的自监督协同训练方案来改善流行的 infoNCE 损失，利用同一数据源的不同视图、RGB 流和光流的互补信息，通过使用一个视图来获取另一个视图的正类样本； （iii）我们彻底评估了两个不同下游任务的学习表征的质量：动作识别和视频检索。在这两种情况下，所提出的方法都展示了最先进的或与其他自监督方法相当的性能，同时训练效率显着提高，即需要更少的训练数据来实现类似的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督协同训练的视频表征学习方法，通过结合语义信息和多视角数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统InfoNCE损失在视频表征学习中存在语义信息利用不足的问题，且未能有效融合RGB和光流等多视角互补信息。
AI.method: 提出两种改进：1) 在InfoNCE中引入语义类别正样本进行监督对比学习；2) 设计协同训练框架，利用RGB流和光流视图的互补性，通过一个视图生成另一个视图的正样本。
AI.result: 在动作识别和视频检索任务中达到SOTA性能，且训练效率更高，所需数据量显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 协同训练框架有效融合多模态信息与语义先验，为视频表征学习提供了更高效且性能优越的自监督方案。
