search_text: Self-supervised Co-training for Video Representation Learning 视频表示学习的自监督协同训练 The objective of this paper is visual-only self-supervised video representation learning. We make the following contributions: (i) we investigate the benefit of adding semantic-class positives to instance-based Info Noise Contrastive Estimation (InfoNCE) training, showing that this form of supervised contrastive learning leads to a clear improvement in performance; (ii) we propose a novel self-supervised co-training scheme to improve the popular infoNCE loss, exploiting the complementary information from different views, RGB streams and optical flow, of the same data source by using one view to obtain positive class samples for the other; (iii) we thoroughly evaluate the quality of the learnt representation on two different downstream tasks: action recognition and video retrieval. In both cases, the proposed approach demonstrates state-of-the-art or comparable performance with other self-supervised approaches, whilst being significantly more efficient to train, i.e. requiring far less training data to achieve similar performance. 本文的目标是仅视觉的自监督视频表示学习。我们做出以下贡献：（i）我们研究了在基于实例的信息噪声对比估计（InfoNCE）训练中添加语义类正值的好处，表明这种形式的监督对比学习可以明显提高性能； (ii) 我们提出了一种新颖的自监督协同训练方案来改善流行的 infoNCE 损失，利用同一数据源的不同视图、RGB 流和光流的互补信息，通过使用一个视图来获取另一个视图的正类样本； （iii）我们彻底评估了两个不同下游任务的学习表征的质量：动作识别和视频检索。在这两种情况下，所提出的方法都展示了最先进的或与其他自监督方法相当的性能，同时训练效率显着提高，即需要更少的训练数据来实现类似的性能。 本文提出了一种基于自监督协同训练的视频表征学习方法，通过结合语义信息和多视角数据提升模型性能。 Tengda Han,Weidi Xie,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

title: Constrained-Order Prophet Inequalities
title_zh: 约束阶先知不等式
comment: To appear in ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA) 2021, 19 pages
comments: To appear in ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA) 2021, 19 pages
abstract: Free order prophet inequalities bound the ratio between the expected value obtained by two parties each selecting a value from a set of independent random variables: a "prophet" who knows the value of each variable and may select the maximum one, and a "gambler" who is free to choose the order in which to observe the values but must select one of them immediately after observing it, without knowing what values will be sampled for the unobserved variables. It is known that the gambler can always ensure an expected payoff at least $0.669\dots$ times as great as that of the prophet. In fact, there exists a threshold stopping rule which guarantees a gambler-to-prophet ratio of at least $1-\frac1e=0.632\dots$. In contrast, if the gambler must observe the values in a predetermined order, the tight bound for the gambler-to-prophet ratio is $1/2$. In this work we investigate a model that interpolates between these two extremes. We assume there is a predefined set of permutations, and the gambler is free to choose the order of observation to be any one of these predefined permutations. Surprisingly, we show that even when only two orderings are allowed---namely, the forward and reverse orderings---the gambler-to-prophet ratio improves to $\varphi^{-1}=0.618\dots$, the inverse of the golden ratio. As the number of allowed permutations grows beyond 2, a striking "double plateau" phenomenon emerges: after increasing from $0.5$ to $\varphi^{-1}$, the gambler-to-prophet ratio achievable by threshold stopping rules does not exceed $\varphi^{-1}+o(1)$ until the number of allowed permutations grows to $O(\log n)$. The ratio reaches $1-\frac1e-\varepsilon$ for a suitably chosen set of $O(\text{poly}(\varepsilon^{-1})\cdot\log n)$ permutations and does not exceed $1-\frac1e$ even when the full set of $n!$ permutations is allowed.
summary: Free order prophet inequalities bound the ratio between the expected value obtained by two parties each selecting a value from a set of independent random variables: a "prophet" who knows the value of each variable and may select the maximum one, and a "gambler" who is free to choose the order in which to observe the values but must select one of them immediately after observing it, without knowing what values will be sampled for the unobserved variables. It is known that the gambler can always ensure an expected payoff at least $0.669\dots$ times as great as that of the prophet. In fact, there exists a threshold stopping rule which guarantees a gambler-to-prophet ratio of at least $1-\frac1e=0.632\dots$. In contrast, if the gambler must observe the values in a predetermined order, the tight bound for the gambler-to-prophet ratio is $1/2$. In this work we investigate a model that interpolates between these two extremes. We assume there is a predefined set of permutations, and the gambler is free to choose the order of observation to be any one of these predefined permutations. Surprisingly, we show that even when only two orderings are allowed---namely, the forward and reverse orderings---the gambler-to-prophet ratio improves to $\varphi^{-1}=0.618\dots$, the inverse of the golden ratio. As the number of allowed permutations grows beyond 2, a striking "double plateau" phenomenon emerges: after increasing from $0.5$ to $\varphi^{-1}$, the gambler-to-prophet ratio achievable by threshold stopping rules does not exceed $\varphi^{-1}+o(1)$ until the number of allowed permutations grows to $O(\log n)$. The ratio reaches $1-\frac1e-\varepsilon$ for a suitably chosen set of $O(\text{poly}(\varepsilon^{-1})\cdot\log n)$ permutations and does not exceed $1-\frac1e$ even when the full set of $n!$ permutations is allowed.
abstract_zh: 自由顺序先知不等式限制了两方各自从一组独立随机变量中选择一个值所获得的期望值之间的比率：一个“先知”知道每个变量的值并可以选择最大的一个，而一个“赌徒”可以自由选择观察值的顺序，但必须在观察后立即选择其中一个，而不知道将为未观察到的变量采样什么值。众所周知，赌徒总能确保预期收益至少是预言家的 $0.669\dots$ 倍。事实上，存在一个阈值停止规则，保证赌徒与先知的比率至少为 $1-\frac1e=0.632\dots$。相反，如果赌徒必须按预定顺序观察值，则赌徒与预言家比率的严格界限为 $1/2$。在这项工作中，我们研究了一个在这两个极端之间进行插值的模型。我们假设有一组预定义的排列，并且赌徒可以自由选择观察顺序为这些预定义的排列中的任何一个。令人惊讶的是，我们表明，即使只允许两种排序（即正向排序和反向排序），赌徒与预言家的比率也会提高到 $\varphi^{-1}=0.618\dots$，即黄金比例的倒数。当允许的排列数量超过 2 时，就会出现惊人的“双平台”现象：从 $0.5$ 增加到 $\varphi^{-1}$ 后，阈值停止规则可实现的赌徒与先知的比率不会超过 $\varphi^{-1}+o(1)$，直到允许的排列数量增长到 $O(\log n)$。对于适当选择的一组 $O(\text{poly}(\varepsilon^{-1})\cdot\log n)$ 排列，该比率达到 $1-\frac1e-\varepsilon$，并且即使允许完整的 $n!$ 排列集，也不会超过 $1-\frac1e$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在预定义排列约束下赌徒与先知的收益比，介于自由顺序和固定顺序两种极端情况之间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，自由顺序下赌徒收益比为0.669，固定顺序下为0.5。本文旨在探索当赌徒可选择有限预定义排列时，收益比如何变化。
AI.method: 通过阈值停止规则分析，结合数学推导与实例验证，研究允许排列数量对收益比的影响，并发现双平台现象。
AI.result: 允许两个顺序时比值提升至黄金分割率倒数（0.618）；排列数增至O(log n)后比值停滞至0.632，即使允许全部n!排列也无法超越此上限。
AI.conclusion: 有限排列约束下赌徒收益比介于0.5与0.632之间，存在双平台效应，表明增加排列数的收益存在边际递减。

title: SPA: Stochastic Probability Adjustment for System Balance of Unsupervised SNNs
title_zh: SPA：无监督 SNN 系统平衡的随机概率调整
comment: Published at the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
comments: Published at the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) receive widespread attention because of their low-power hardware characteristic and brain-like signal response mechanism, but currently, the performance of SNNs is still behind Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). We build an information theory-inspired system called Stochastic Probability Adjustment (SPA) system to reduce this gap. The SPA maps the synapses and neurons of SNNs into a probability space where a neuron and all connected pre-synapses are represented by a cluster. The movement of synaptic transmitter between different clusters is modeled as a Brownian-like stochastic process in which the transmitter distribution is adaptive at different firing phases. We experimented with a wide range of existing unsupervised SNN architectures and achieved consistent performance improvements. The improvements in classification accuracy have reached 1.99% and 6.29% on the MNIST and EMNIST datasets respectively.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) receive widespread attention because of their low-power hardware characteristic and brain-like signal response mechanism, but currently, the performance of SNNs is still behind Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). We build an information theory-inspired system called Stochastic Probability Adjustment (SPA) system to reduce this gap. The SPA maps the synapses and neurons of SNNs into a probability space where a neuron and all connected pre-synapses are represented by a cluster. The movement of synaptic transmitter between different clusters is modeled as a Brownian-like stochastic process in which the transmitter distribution is adaptive at different firing phases. We experimented with a wide range of existing unsupervised SNN architectures and achieved consistent performance improvements. The improvements in classification accuracy have reached 1.99% and 6.29% on the MNIST and EMNIST datasets respectively.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）因其低功耗的硬件特性和类脑信号响应机制而受到广泛关注，但目前SNN的性能仍落后于人工神经网络（ANN）。我们构建了一个受信息论启发的系统，称为随机概率调整（SPA）系统，以缩小这一差距。 SPA 将 SNN 的突触和神经元映射到概率空间，其中神经元和所有连接的前突触由簇表示。突触递质在不同簇之间的运动被建模为类布朗随机过程，其中递质分布在不同的放电阶段是自适应的。我们对各种现有的无监督 SNN 架构进行了实验，并取得了一致的性能改进。在 MNIST 和 EMNIST 数据集上分类准确率的提升分别达到 1.99% 和 6.29%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPA（随机概率调整）的系统，旨在通过概率空间建模提升无监督脉冲神经网络（SNNs）的性能，缩小其与人工神经网络（ANNs）之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNNs）因其低功耗和类脑信号响应机制受到关注，但其性能仍落后于人工神经网络（ANNs），亟需有效方法提升其表现。
AI.method: SPA将SNNs的突触和神经元映射到概率空间，以簇的形式表示神经元及其连接的突触，并通过布朗运动类随机过程建模突触传递物质在不同簇间的动态分布，适应不同放电阶段。
AI.result: 在MNIST和EMNIST数据集上，SPA分别实现了1.99%和6.29%的分类准确率提升，并在多种无监督SNN架构中表现出一致的性能改进。
AI.conclusion: SPA通过概率空间建模和动态调整机制有效提升了无监督SNNs的性能，为缩小SNNs与ANNs的性能差距提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPA（随机概率调整）的系统，旨在通过概率空间建模提升无监督脉冲神经网络（SNNs）的性能，缩小其与人工神经网络（ANNs）之间的差距。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNNs）因其低功耗和类脑信号响应机制受到关注，但其性能仍落后于人工神经网络（ANNs），亟需有效方法提升其表现。
ai_content.method: SPA将SNNs的突触和神经元映射到概率空间，以簇的形式表示神经元及其连接的突触，并通过布朗运动类随机过程建模突触传递物质在不同簇间的动态分布，适应不同放电阶段。
ai_content.result: 在MNIST和EMNIST数据集上，SPA分别实现了1.99%和6.29%的分类准确率提升，并在多种无监督SNN架构中表现出一致的性能改进。
ai_content.conclusion: SPA通过概率空间建模和动态调整机制有效提升了无监督SNNs的性能，为缩小SNNs与ANNs的性能差距提供了新思路。

search_text: SPA: Stochastic Probability Adjustment for System Balance of Unsupervised SNNs SPA：无监督 SNN 系统平衡的随机概率调整 Spiking neural networks (SNNs) receive widespread attention because of their low-power hardware characteristic and brain-like signal response mechanism, but currently, the performance of SNNs is still behind Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). We build an information theory-inspired system called Stochastic Probability Adjustment (SPA) system to reduce this gap. The SPA maps the synapses and neurons of SNNs into a probability space where a neuron and all connected pre-synapses are represented by a cluster. The movement of synaptic transmitter between different clusters is modeled as a Brownian-like stochastic process in which the transmitter distribution is adaptive at different firing phases. We experimented with a wide range of existing unsupervised SNN architectures and achieved consistent performance improvements. The improvements in classification accuracy have reached 1.99% and 6.29% on the MNIST and EMNIST datasets respectively. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）因其低功耗的硬件特性和类脑信号响应机制而受到广泛关注，但目前SNN的性能仍落后于人工神经网络（ANN）。我们构建了一个受信息论启发的系统，称为随机概率调整（SPA）系统，以缩小这一差距。 SPA 将 SNN 的突触和神经元映射到概率空间，其中神经元和所有连接的前突触由簇表示。突触递质在不同簇之间的运动被建模为类布朗随机过程，其中递质分布在不同的放电阶段是自适应的。我们对各种现有的无监督 SNN 架构进行了实验，并取得了一致的性能改进。在 MNIST 和 EMNIST 数据集上分类准确率的提升分别达到 1.99% 和 6.29%。 本文提出了一种名为SPA（随机概率调整）的系统，旨在通过概率空间建模提升无监督脉冲神经网络（SNNs）的性能，缩小其与人工神经网络（ANNs）之间的差距。 Xingyu Yang,Mingyuan Meng,Shanlin Xiao,Zhiyi Yu cs.NE,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Seyed Majid Azimi,Maximilian Kraus,Reza Bahmanyar,Peter Reinartz
title: Multiple Pedestrians and Vehicles Tracking in Aerial Imagery: A Comprehensive Study
title_zh: 航空图像中的多个行人和车辆跟踪：一项综合研究
abstract: In this paper, we address various challenges in multi-pedestrian and vehicle tracking in high-resolution aerial imagery by intensive evaluation of a number of traditional and Deep Learning based Single- and Multi-Object Tracking methods. We also describe our proposed Deep Learning based Multi-Object Tracking method AerialMPTNet that fuses appearance, temporal, and graphical information using a Siamese Neural Network, a Long Short-Term Memory, and a Graph Convolutional Neural Network module for a more accurate and stable tracking. Moreover, we investigate the influence of the Squeeze-and-Excitation layers and Online Hard Example Mining on the performance of AerialMPTNet. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first in using these two for a regression-based Multi-Object Tracking. Additionally, we studied and compared the L1 and Huber loss functions. In our experiments, we extensively evaluate AerialMPTNet on three aerial Multi-Object Tracking datasets, namely AerialMPT and KIT AIS pedestrian and vehicle datasets. Qualitative and quantitative results show that AerialMPTNet outperforms all previous methods for the pedestrian datasets and achieves competitive results for the vehicle dataset. In addition, Long Short-Term Memory and Graph Convolutional Neural Network modules enhance the tracking performance. Moreover, using Squeeze-and-Excitation and Online Hard Example Mining significantly helps for some cases while degrades the results for other cases. In addition, according to the results, L1 yields better results with respect to Huber loss for most of the scenarios. The presented results provide a deep insight into challenges and opportunities of the aerial Multi-Object Tracking domain, paving the way for future research.
summary: In this paper, we address various challenges in multi-pedestrian and vehicle tracking in high-resolution aerial imagery by intensive evaluation of a number of traditional and Deep Learning based Single- and Multi-Object Tracking methods. We also describe our proposed Deep Learning based Multi-Object Tracking method AerialMPTNet that fuses appearance, temporal, and graphical information using a Siamese Neural Network, a Long Short-Term Memory, and a Graph Convolutional Neural Network module for a more accurate and stable tracking. Moreover, we investigate the influence of the Squeeze-and-Excitation layers and Online Hard Example Mining on the performance of AerialMPTNet. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first in using these two for a regression-based Multi-Object Tracking. Additionally, we studied and compared the L1 and Huber loss functions. In our experiments, we extensively evaluate AerialMPTNet on three aerial Multi-Object Tracking datasets, namely AerialMPT and KIT AIS pedestrian and vehicle datasets. Qualitative and quantitative results show that AerialMPTNet outperforms all previous methods for the pedestrian datasets and achieves competitive results for the vehicle dataset. In addition, Long Short-Term Memory and Graph Convolutional Neural Network modules enhance the tracking performance. Moreover, using Squeeze-and-Excitation and Online Hard Example Mining significantly helps for some cases while degrades the results for other cases. In addition, according to the results, L1 yields better results with respect to Huber loss for most of the scenarios. The presented results provide a deep insight into challenges and opportunities of the aerial Multi-Object Tracking domain, paving the way for future research.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过对许多传统和基于深度学习的单目标和多目标跟踪方法进行深入评估，解决了高分辨率航空图像中多行人和车辆跟踪的各种挑战。我们还描述了我们提出的基于深度学习的多目标跟踪方法 AerialMPTNet，该方法使用连体神经网络、长短期记忆和图卷积神经网络模块融合外观、时间和图形信息，以实现更准确和稳定的跟踪。此外，我们还研究了挤压和激励层和在线硬示例挖掘对 AerialMPTNet 性能的影响。据我们所知，我们是第一个将这两者用于基于回归的多对象跟踪的人。此外，我们研究并比较了 L1 和 Huber 损失函数。在我们的实验中，我们在三个航空多目标跟踪数据集（即 AerialMPT 和 KIT AIS 行人和车辆数据集）上广泛评估了 AerialMPTNet。定性和定量结果表明，AerialMPTNet 在行人数据集上优于之前的所有方法，并在车辆数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，长短期记忆和图卷积神经网络模块增强了跟踪性能。此外，使用挤压和激励和在线硬示例挖掘对某些情况有显着帮助，但会降低其他情况的结果。此外，根据结果，在大多数情况下，L1 在 Huber 损失方面产生了更好的结果。所提出的结果深入了解了空中多目标跟踪领域的挑战和机遇，为未来的研究铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的多目标跟踪方法AerialMPTNet，用于高分辨率航拍图像中的行人和车辆跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法在航拍图像中面临目标密集、尺度变化大、遮挡频繁等挑战，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合Siamese网络、LSTM和图卷积网络，结合Squeeze-and-Excitation模块与在线难例挖掘技术，比较L1与Huber损失函数效果。
AI.result: AerialMPTNet在行人数据集上优于所有现有方法，在车辆数据集上表现竞争；LSTM和GCN模块提升性能，但SE模块和OHEM在特定场景下存在效果波动。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了航拍多目标跟踪的关键挑战，为后续研究提供了方法论支持与改进方向。

authors_text: Vatsal Patel,Sarth Kanani,Tapan Pathak,Pankesh Patel,Muhammad Intizar Ali,John Breslin
title: A Demonstration of Smart Doorbell Design Using Federated Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用联合深度学习的智能门铃设计演示
abstract: Smart doorbells have been playing an important role in protecting our modern homes. Existing approaches of sending video streams to a centralized server (or Cloud) for video analytics have been facing many challenges such as latency, bandwidth cost and more importantly users' privacy concerns. To address these challenges, this paper showcases the ability of an intelligent smart doorbell based on Federated Deep Learning, which can deploy and manage video analytics applications such as a smart doorbell across Edge and Cloud resources. This platform can scale, work with multiple devices, seamlessly manage online orchestration of the application components. The proposed framework is implemented using state-of-the-art technology. We implement the Federated Server using the Flask framework, containerized using Nginx and Gunicorn, which is deployed on AWS EC2 and AWS Serverless architecture.
summary: Smart doorbells have been playing an important role in protecting our modern homes. Existing approaches of sending video streams to a centralized server (or Cloud) for video analytics have been facing many challenges such as latency, bandwidth cost and more importantly users' privacy concerns. To address these challenges, this paper showcases the ability of an intelligent smart doorbell based on Federated Deep Learning, which can deploy and manage video analytics applications such as a smart doorbell across Edge and Cloud resources. This platform can scale, work with multiple devices, seamlessly manage online orchestration of the application components. The proposed framework is implemented using state-of-the-art technology. We implement the Federated Server using the Flask framework, containerized using Nginx and Gunicorn, which is deployed on AWS EC2 and AWS Serverless architecture.
abstract_zh: 智能门铃在保护我们现代家居方面发挥着重要作用。将视频流发送到集中式服务器（或云）进行视频分析的现有方法面临着许多挑战，例如延迟、带宽成本，更重要的是用户的隐私问题。为了应对这些挑战，本文展示了基于联合深度学习的智能门铃的能力，它可以跨边缘和云资源部署和管理视频分析应用程序，例如智能门铃。该平台可以扩展、与多个设备配合使用、无缝管理应用程序组件的在线编排。所提出的框架是使用最先进的技术来实现的。我们使用 Flask 框架实现联邦服务器，使用 Nginx 和 Gunicorn 进行容器化，部署在 AWS EC2 和 AWS Serverless 架构上。

AI.tldr: 本文演示了基于联邦深度学习的智能门铃设计，旨在解决传统视频分析方法中的隐私、延迟和带宽问题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能门铃将视频流发送至云端进行分析，存在隐私泄露、网络延迟高和带宽成本大的问题。
AI.method: 采用联邦深度学习框架，结合边缘计算与云计算资源，使用Flask、Nginx、Gunicorn等技术部署在AWS EC2和无服务器架构上。
AI.result: 实现了支持多设备、可扩展的智能门铃平台，能够有效管理视频分析应用的在线编排。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过联邦学习技术成功平衡了隐私保护与计算效率，为智能安防设备提供了可行的解决方案。

tldr: 本文演示了基于联邦深度学习的智能门铃设计，旨在解决传统视频分析方法中的隐私、延迟和带宽问题。
motivation: 现有智能门铃将视频流发送至云端进行分析，存在隐私泄露、网络延迟高和带宽成本大的问题。
method: 采用联邦深度学习框架，结合边缘计算与云计算资源，使用Flask、Nginx、Gunicorn等技术部署在AWS EC2和无服务器架构上。
result: 实现了支持多设备、可扩展的智能门铃平台，能够有效管理视频分析应用的在线编排。
conclusion: 该框架通过联邦学习技术成功平衡了隐私保护与计算效率，为智能安防设备提供了可行的解决方案。
search_text: A Demonstration of Smart Doorbell Design Using Federated Deep Learning 使用联合深度学习的智能门铃设计演示 Smart doorbells have been playing an important role in protecting our modern homes. Existing approaches of sending video streams to a centralized server (or Cloud) for video analytics have been facing many challenges such as latency, bandwidth cost and more importantly users' privacy concerns. To address these challenges, this paper showcases the ability of an intelligent smart doorbell based on Federated Deep Learning, which can deploy and manage video analytics applications such as a smart doorbell across Edge and Cloud resources. This platform can scale, work with multiple devices, seamlessly manage online orchestration of the application components. The proposed framework is implemented using state-of-the-art technology. We implement the Federated Server using the Flask framework, containerized using Nginx and Gunicorn, which is deployed on AWS EC2 and AWS Serverless architecture. 智能门铃在保护我们现代家居方面发挥着重要作用。将视频流发送到集中式服务器（或云）进行视频分析的现有方法面临着许多挑战，例如延迟、带宽成本，更重要的是用户的隐私问题。为了应对这些挑战，本文展示了基于联合深度学习的智能门铃的能力，它可以跨边缘和云资源部署和管理视频分析应用程序，例如智能门铃。该平台可以扩展、与多个设备配合使用、无缝管理应用程序组件的在线编排。所提出的框架是使用最先进的技术来实现的。我们使用 Flask 框架实现联邦服务器，使用 Nginx 和 Gunicorn 进行容器化，部署在 AWS EC2 和 AWS Serverless 架构上。 本文演示了基于联邦深度学习的智能门铃设计，旨在解决传统视频分析方法中的隐私、延迟和带宽问题。 Vatsal Patel,Sarth Kanani,Tapan Pathak,Pankesh Patel,Muhammad Intizar Ali,John Breslin cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ehsan Nowroozi,Ali Dehghantanha,Reza M. Parizi,Kim-Kwang Raymond Choo
title: A Survey of Machine Learning Techniques in Adversarial Image Forensics
title_zh: 对抗性图像取证中机器学习技术的调查
comment: 37 pages, 24 figures, Accepted to the Journal Computer and Security (Elsevier)
comments: 37 pages, 24 figures, Accepted to the Journal Computer and Security (Elsevier)
abstract: Image forensic plays a crucial role in both criminal investigations (e.g., dissemination of fake images to spread racial hate or false narratives about specific ethnicity groups) and civil litigation (e.g., defamation). Increasingly, machine learning approaches are also utilized in image forensics. However, there are also a number of limitations and vulnerabilities associated with machine learning-based approaches, for example how to detect adversarial (image) examples, with real-world consequences (e.g., inadmissible evidence, or wrongful conviction). Therefore, with a focus on image forensics, this paper surveys techniques that can be used to enhance the robustness of machine learning-based binary manipulation detectors in various adversarial scenarios.
summary: Image forensic plays a crucial role in both criminal investigations (e.g., dissemination of fake images to spread racial hate or false narratives about specific ethnicity groups) and civil litigation (e.g., defamation). Increasingly, machine learning approaches are also utilized in image forensics. However, there are also a number of limitations and vulnerabilities associated with machine learning-based approaches, for example how to detect adversarial (image) examples, with real-world consequences (e.g., inadmissible evidence, or wrongful conviction). Therefore, with a focus on image forensics, this paper surveys techniques that can be used to enhance the robustness of machine learning-based binary manipulation detectors in various adversarial scenarios.
abstract_zh: 图像取证在刑事调查（例如，传播虚假图像以散布种族仇恨或有关特定族裔群体的虚假叙述）和民事诉讼（例如诽谤）中发挥着至关重要的作用。机器学习方法也越来越多地应用于图像取证。然而，基于机器学习的方法也存在许多局限性和漏洞，例如如何检测对抗性（图像）示例以及现实世界的后果（例如，不可接受的证据或错误定罪）。因此，本文以图像取证为重点，调查了可用于增强基于机器学习的二进制操纵检测器在各种对抗场景中的鲁棒性的技术。

AI.tldr: 综述对抗图像取证中的机器学习技术，以提高检测器的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 应对虚假图像传播带来的法律和安全挑战，解决机器学习检测方法在对抗场景下的局限性
AI.method: 通过综述现有机器学习技术，分析和评估增强检测器鲁棒性的方法
AI.result: 总结了当前技术的局限性，并提出了提升鲁棒性的潜在方向
AI.conclusion: 强调需要持续研究以解决对抗样本等挑战，提升图像取证的可靠性

title: Detecting Hands and Recognizing Physical Contact in the Wild
title_zh: 在野外检测手并识别身体接触
comment: NeurIPS 2020
comments: NeurIPS 2020
abstract: We investigate a new problem of detecting hands and recognizing their physical contact state in unconstrained conditions. This is a challenging inference task given the need to reason beyond the local appearance of hands. The lack of training annotations indicating which object or parts of an object the hand is in contact with further complicates the task. We propose a novel convolutional network based on Mask-RCNN that can jointly learn to localize hands and predict their physical contact to address this problem. The network uses outputs from another object detector to obtain locations of objects present in the scene. It uses these outputs and hand locations to recognize the hand's contact state using two attention mechanisms. The first attention mechanism is based on the hand and a region's affinity, enclosing the hand and the object, and densely pools features from this region to the hand region. The second attention module adaptively selects salient features from this plausible region of contact. To develop and evaluate our method's performance, we introduce a large-scale dataset called ContactHands, containing unconstrained images annotated with hand locations and contact states. The proposed network, including the parameters of attention modules, is end-to-end trainable. This network achieves approximately 7\% relative improvement over a baseline network that was built on the vanilla Mask-RCNN architecture and trained for recognizing hand contact states.
summary: We investigate a new problem of detecting hands and recognizing their physical contact state in unconstrained conditions. This is a challenging inference task given the need to reason beyond the local appearance of hands. The lack of training annotations indicating which object or parts of an object the hand is in contact with further complicates the task. We propose a novel convolutional network based on Mask-RCNN that can jointly learn to localize hands and predict their physical contact to address this problem. The network uses outputs from another object detector to obtain locations of objects present in the scene. It uses these outputs and hand locations to recognize the hand's contact state using two attention mechanisms. The first attention mechanism is based on the hand and a region's affinity, enclosing the hand and the object, and densely pools features from this region to the hand region. The second attention module adaptively selects salient features from this plausible region of contact. To develop and evaluate our method's performance, we introduce a large-scale dataset called ContactHands, containing unconstrained images annotated with hand locations and contact states. The proposed network, including the parameters of attention modules, is end-to-end trainable. This network achieves approximately 7\% relative improvement over a baseline network that was built on the vanilla Mask-RCNN architecture and trained for recognizing hand contact states.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个新问题，即在不受约束的条件下检测手并识别其物理接触状态。鉴于需要超越手的局部外观进行推理，这是一项具有挑战性的推理任务。缺乏指示手正在接触哪个物体或物体的部分的训练注释使任务进一步复杂化。我们提出了一种基于 Mask-RCNN 的新型卷积网络，它可以共同学习定位手并预测它们的物理接触来解决这个问题。该网络使用另一个对象检测器的输出来获取场景中存在的对象的位置。它使用这些输出和手部位置，通过两种注意机制来识别手部的接触状态。第一个注意力机制基于手和区域的亲和力，包围手和物体，并将特征从该区域密集地汇集到手区域。第二个注意模块自适应地从这个看似合理的接触区域中选择显着特征。为了开发和评估我们方法的性能，我们引入了一个名为 ContactHands 的大型数据集，其中包含带有手部位置和接触状态注释的无约束图像。所提出的网络，包括注意力模块的参数，是端到端可训练的。与基于普通 Mask-RCNN 架构构建并经过训练以识别手部接触状态的基线网络相比，该网络实现了约 7% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在非受限条件下检测手部并识别其物理接触状态的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在复杂场景中准确检测手部并识别其接触状态，且缺乏标注手部接触物体部分的训练数据。
AI.method: 基于Mask-RCNN设计联合网络，结合物体检测器输出，通过双注意力机制（区域亲和力特征融合与自适应显著特征选择）实现手部定位与接触状态预测。
AI.result: 在自建ContactHands数据集上相较基线模型提升约7%的相对性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了复杂场景下手部接触识别难题，所构建的数据集为后续研究提供支持。

title: Multi-Stage Fusion for One-Click Segmentation
title_zh: 多级融合一键分割
comment: A preprint of the accepted paper at GCPR 2020
comments: A preprint of the accepted paper at GCPR 2020
abstract: Segmenting objects of interest in an image is an essential building block of applications such as photo-editing and image analysis. Under interactive settings, one should achieve good segmentations while minimizing user input. Current deep learning-based interactive segmentation approaches use early fusion and incorporate user cues at the image input layer. Since segmentation CNNs have many layers, early fusion may weaken the influence of user interactions on the final prediction results. As such, we propose a new multi-stage guidance framework for interactive segmentation. By incorporating user cues at different stages of the network, we allow user interactions to impact the final segmentation output in a more direct way. Our proposed framework has a negligible increase in parameter count compared to early-fusion frameworks. We perform extensive experimentation on the standard interactive instance segmentation and one-click segmentation benchmarks and report state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Segmenting objects of interest in an image is an essential building block of applications such as photo-editing and image analysis. Under interactive settings, one should achieve good segmentations while minimizing user input. Current deep learning-based interactive segmentation approaches use early fusion and incorporate user cues at the image input layer. Since segmentation CNNs have many layers, early fusion may weaken the influence of user interactions on the final prediction results. As such, we propose a new multi-stage guidance framework for interactive segmentation. By incorporating user cues at different stages of the network, we allow user interactions to impact the final segmentation output in a more direct way. Our proposed framework has a negligible increase in parameter count compared to early-fusion frameworks. We perform extensive experimentation on the standard interactive instance segmentation and one-click segmentation benchmarks and report state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 分割图像中感兴趣的对象是照片编辑和图像分析等应用程序的重要组成部分。在交互设置下，应该在最小化用户输入的同时实现良好的分段。当前基于深度学习的交互式分割方法使用早期融合并在图像输入层合并用户提示。由于分割 CNN 有很多层，早期融合可能会削弱用户交互对最终预测结果的影响。因此，我们提出了一种新的交互式分割多阶段指导框架。通过在网络的不同阶段合并用户线索，我们允许用户交互以更直接的方式影响最终的分割输出。与早期融合框架相比，我们提出的框架的参数数量增加可以忽略不计。我们对标准交互式实例分割和一键分割基准进行了广泛的实验，并报告了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多阶段融合框架，以在最小用户输入下实现高质量的图像分割
AI.motivation: 现有方法在输入层融合用户提示，导致用户交互对最终结果影响有限，需更直接的引导机制
AI.method: 在分割网络的不同阶段引入用户提示，增强交互影响，参数增加可忽略
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中达到最先进的分割性能，参数增加极少
AI.conclusion: 多阶段融合有效提升交互式分割效果，兼顾精度与效率

search_text: Multi-Stage Fusion for One-Click Segmentation 多级融合一键分割 Segmenting objects of interest in an image is an essential building block of applications such as photo-editing and image analysis. Under interactive settings, one should achieve good segmentations while minimizing user input. Current deep learning-based interactive segmentation approaches use early fusion and incorporate user cues at the image input layer. Since segmentation CNNs have many layers, early fusion may weaken the influence of user interactions on the final prediction results. As such, we propose a new multi-stage guidance framework for interactive segmentation. By incorporating user cues at different stages of the network, we allow user interactions to impact the final segmentation output in a more direct way. Our proposed framework has a negligible increase in parameter count compared to early-fusion frameworks. We perform extensive experimentation on the standard interactive instance segmentation and one-click segmentation benchmarks and report state-of-the-art performance. 分割图像中感兴趣的对象是照片编辑和图像分析等应用程序的重要组成部分。在交互设置下，应该在最小化用户输入的同时实现良好的分段。当前基于深度学习的交互式分割方法使用早期融合并在图像输入层合并用户提示。由于分割 CNN 有很多层，早期融合可能会削弱用户交互对最终预测结果的影响。因此，我们提出了一种新的交互式分割多阶段指导框架。通过在网络的不同阶段合并用户线索，我们允许用户交互以更直接的方式影响最终的分割输出。与早期融合框架相比，我们提出的框架的参数数量增加可以忽略不计。我们对标准交互式实例分割和一键分割基准进行了广泛的实验，并报告了最先进的性能。 提出一种多阶段融合框架，以在最小用户输入下实现高质量的图像分割 Soumajit Majumder,Ansh Khurana,Abhinav Rai,Angela Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Francesco Croce,Maksym Andriushchenko,Vikash Sehwag,Edoardo Debenedetti,Nicolas Flammarion,Mung Chiang,Prateek Mittal,Matthias Hein
title: RobustBench: a standardized adversarial robustness benchmark
title_zh: RobustBench：标准化对抗鲁棒性基准
comment: The camera-ready version accepted at the NeurIPS'21 Datasets and Benchmarks Track: 120+ evaluations, 80+ models, 7 leaderboards (Linf, L2, common corruptions; CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet), significantly expanded analysis part (calibration, fairness, privacy leakage, smoothness, transferability)
comments: The camera-ready version accepted at the NeurIPS'21 Datasets and Benchmarks Track: 120+ evaluations, 80+ models, 7 leaderboards (Linf, L2, common corruptions; CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet), significantly expanded analysis part (calibration, fairness, privacy leakage, smoothness, transferability)
abstract: As a research community, we are still lacking a systematic understanding of the progress on adversarial robustness which often makes it hard to identify the most promising ideas in training robust models. A key challenge in benchmarking robustness is that its evaluation is often error-prone leading to robustness overestimation. Our goal is to establish a standardized benchmark of adversarial robustness, which as accurately as possible reflects the robustness of the considered models within a reasonable computational budget. To this end, we start by considering the image classification task and introduce restrictions (possibly loosened in the future) on the allowed models. We evaluate adversarial robustness with AutoAttack, an ensemble of white- and black-box attacks, which was recently shown in a large-scale study to improve almost all robustness evaluations compared to the original publications. To prevent overadaptation of new defenses to AutoAttack, we welcome external evaluations based on adaptive attacks, especially where AutoAttack flags a potential overestimation of robustness. Our leaderboard, hosted at https://robustbench.github.io/, contains evaluations of 120+ models and aims at reflecting the current state of the art in image classification on a set of well-defined tasks in $\ell_\infty$- and $\ell_2$-threat models and on common corruptions, with possible extensions in the future. Additionally, we open-source the library https://github.com/RobustBench/robustbench that provides unified access to 80+ robust models to facilitate their downstream applications. Finally, based on the collected models, we analyze the impact of robustness on the performance on distribution shifts, calibration, out-of-distribution detection, fairness, privacy leakage, smoothness, and transferability.
summary: As a research community, we are still lacking a systematic understanding of the progress on adversarial robustness which often makes it hard to identify the most promising ideas in training robust models. A key challenge in benchmarking robustness is that its evaluation is often error-prone leading to robustness overestimation. Our goal is to establish a standardized benchmark of adversarial robustness, which as accurately as possible reflects the robustness of the considered models within a reasonable computational budget. To this end, we start by considering the image classification task and introduce restrictions (possibly loosened in the future) on the allowed models. We evaluate adversarial robustness with AutoAttack, an ensemble of white- and black-box attacks, which was recently shown in a large-scale study to improve almost all robustness evaluations compared to the original publications. To prevent overadaptation of new defenses to AutoAttack, we welcome external evaluations based on adaptive attacks, especially where AutoAttack flags a potential overestimation of robustness. Our leaderboard, hosted at https://robustbench.github.io/, contains evaluations of 120+ models and aims at reflecting the current state of the art in image classification on a set of well-defined tasks in $\ell_\infty$- and $\ell_2$-threat models and on common corruptions, with possible extensions in the future. Additionally, we open-source the library https://github.com/RobustBench/robustbench that provides unified access to 80+ robust models to facilitate their downstream applications. Finally, based on the collected models, we analyze the impact of robustness on the performance on distribution shifts, calibration, out-of-distribution detection, fairness, privacy leakage, smoothness, and transferability.
abstract_zh: 作为一个研究界，我们仍然缺乏对对抗稳健性进展的系统了解，这往往使得很难确定训练稳健模型中最有前途的想法。稳健性基准测试的一个关键挑战是其评估往往容易出错，导致稳健性高估。我们的目标是建立对抗性鲁棒性的标准化基准，它尽可能准确地反映所考虑模型在合理的计算预算内的鲁棒性。为此，我们首先考虑图像分类任务，并对允许的模型引入限制（将来可能会放宽）。我们使用 AutoAttack 来评估对抗性鲁棒性，AutoAttack 是白盒和黑盒攻击的集合，最近的一项大规模研究表明，与原始出版物相比，它可以改善几乎所有的鲁棒性评估。为了防止新防御措施过度适应 AutoAttack，我们欢迎基于自适应攻击的外部评估，特别是在 AutoAttack 标记出潜在的鲁棒性高估的情况下。我们的排行榜托管在 https://robustbench.github.io/ 上，包含对 120 多个模型的评估，旨在反映图像分类的最新技术水平，包括 $\ell_\infty$- 和 $\ell_2$-威胁模型中的一组明确定义的任务以及常见的损坏，并在未来可能进行扩展。此外，我们还开源了该库 https://github.com/RobustBench/robustbench，该库提供对 80 多个稳健模型的统一访问，以促进其下游应用程序。最后，基于收集的模型，我们分析了鲁棒性对分布偏移、校准、分布外检测、公平性、隐私泄露、平滑性和可转移性等性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobustBench，一个标准化的对抗鲁棒性基准，用于评估图像分类模型在不同威胁模型下的鲁棒性，并提供开源工具库和排行榜。
AI.motivation: 当前研究社区缺乏对对抗鲁棒性进展的系统性理解，且鲁棒性评估常因误差导致高估。需建立标准化基准以准确反映模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用AutoAttack（白盒与黑盒攻击集成）进行评估，限制模型范围并引入排行榜；开源80+鲁棒模型库，分析鲁棒性对分布偏移、校准等的影响。
AI.result: 评估了120+模型，在ℓ∞和ℓ2威胁模型及常见干扰下建立排行榜，开源工具库支持下游应用，并揭示鲁棒性与模型性能其他方面的关联。
AI.conclusion: RobustBench为对抗鲁棒性研究提供标准化基准，促进可靠评估与改进，同时揭示鲁棒性与模型泛化、公平性等属性的复杂关系。

title: Pattern Formation by Robots with Inaccurate Movements
title_zh: 机器人运动不准确形成的图案
abstract: \textsc{Arbitrary Pattern Formation} is a fundamental problem in autonomous mobile robot systems. The problem asks to design a distributed algorithm that moves a team of autonomous, anonymous and identical mobile robots to form any arbitrary pattern $F$ given as input. In this paper, we study the problem for robots whose movements can be inaccurate. Our movement model assumes errors in both direction and extent of the intended movement. Forming the given pattern exactly is not possible in this setting. So we require that the robots must form a configuration which is close to the given pattern $F$. We call this the \textsc{Approximate Arbitrary Pattern Formation} problem. We show that with no agreement in coordinate system, the problem is unsolvable, even by fully synchronous robots, if the initial configuration 1) has rotational symmetry and there is no robot at the center of rotation or 2) has reflectional symmetry and there is no robot on the reflection axis. From all other initial configurations, we solve the problem by 1) oblivious, silent and semi-synchronous robots and 2) oblivious, asynchronous robots that can communicate using externally visible lights.
summary: \textsc{Arbitrary Pattern Formation} is a fundamental problem in autonomous mobile robot systems. The problem asks to design a distributed algorithm that moves a team of autonomous, anonymous and identical mobile robots to form any arbitrary pattern $F$ given as input. In this paper, we study the problem for robots whose movements can be inaccurate. Our movement model assumes errors in both direction and extent of the intended movement. Forming the given pattern exactly is not possible in this setting. So we require that the robots must form a configuration which is close to the given pattern $F$. We call this the \textsc{Approximate Arbitrary Pattern Formation} problem. We show that with no agreement in coordinate system, the problem is unsolvable, even by fully synchronous robots, if the initial configuration 1) has rotational symmetry and there is no robot at the center of rotation or 2) has reflectional symmetry and there is no robot on the reflection axis. From all other initial configurations, we solve the problem by 1) oblivious, silent and semi-synchronous robots and 2) oblivious, asynchronous robots that can communicate using externally visible lights.
abstract_zh: \textsc{任意模式形成}是自主移动机器人系统中的一个基本问题。该问题要求设计一种分布式算法，移动一组自主、匿名且相同的移动机器人，以形成作为输入给出的任意模式 $F$。在本文中，我们研究了运动不准确的机器人问题。我们的运动模型假设预期运动的方向和范围都有误差。在此设置中不可能精确地形成给定的图案。所以我们要求机器人必须形成接近给定模式$F$的配置。我们称之为 \textsc{近似任意模式形成} 问题。我们表明，如果坐标系不一致，即使是完全同步的机器人，如果初始配置 1) 具有旋转对称性并且旋转中心没有机器人，或者 2) 具有反射对称性并且反射轴上没有机器人，则该问题是无法解决的。从所有其他初始配置中，我们通过 1) 不经意的、静音的半同步机器人和 2) 不经意的、可以使用外部可见光进行通信的异步机器人来解决问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在机器人移动存在方向和距离误差的情况下，如何实现任意模式的近似形成问题。
AI.motivation: 自主移动机器人系统中，由于实际移动误差的存在，精确形成任意模式可能不可行，需设计容错算法。
AI.method: 通过分析初始配置的对称性条件，结合不同同步模型（半同步、异步）及通信机制（可见灯光），提出近似模式形成算法。
AI.result: 当初始配置具有旋转或反射对称性且缺乏对称中心/轴时，问题不可解；其他情况下，通过指定机器人模型可实现近似模式形成。
AI.conclusion: 在移动误差不可避免的场景下，近似模式形成需依赖初始配置的非对称性及特定同步通信机制。

conclusion: 在移动误差不可避免的场景下，近似模式形成需依赖初始配置的非对称性及特定同步通信机制。
search_text: Pattern Formation by Robots with Inaccurate Movements 机器人运动不准确形成的图案 \textsc{Arbitrary Pattern Formation} is a fundamental problem in autonomous mobile robot systems. The problem asks to design a distributed algorithm that moves a team of autonomous, anonymous and identical mobile robots to form any arbitrary pattern $F$ given as input. In this paper, we study the problem for robots whose movements can be inaccurate. Our movement model assumes errors in both direction and extent of the intended movement. Forming the given pattern exactly is not possible in this setting. So we require that the robots must form a configuration which is close to the given pattern $F$. We call this the \textsc{Approximate Arbitrary Pattern Formation} problem. We show that with no agreement in coordinate system, the problem is unsolvable, even by fully synchronous robots, if the initial configuration 1) has rotational symmetry and there is no robot at the center of rotation or 2) has reflectional symmetry and there is no robot on the reflection axis. From all other initial configurations, we solve the problem by 1) oblivious, silent and semi-synchronous robots and 2) oblivious, asynchronous robots that can communicate using externally visible lights. \textsc{任意模式形成}是自主移动机器人系统中的一个基本问题。该问题要求设计一种分布式算法，移动一组自主、匿名且相同的移动机器人，以形成作为输入给出的任意模式 $F$。在本文中，我们研究了运动不准确的机器人问题。我们的运动模型假设预期运动的方向和范围都有误差。在此设置中不可能精确地形成给定的图案。所以我们要求机器人必须形成接近给定模式$F$的配置。我们称之为 \textsc{近似任意模式形成} 问题。我们表明，如果坐标系不一致，即使是完全同步的机器人，如果初始配置 1) 具有旋转对称性并且旋转中心没有机器人，或者 2) 具有反射对称性并且反射轴上没有机器人，则该问题是无法解决的。从所有其他初始配置中，我们通过 1) 不经意的、静音的半同步机器人和 2) 不经意的、可以使用外部可见光进行通信的异步机器人来解决问题。 本文研究了在机器人移动存在方向和距离误差的情况下，如何实现任意模式的近似形成问题。 Kaustav Bose,Archak Das,Buddhadeb Sau cs.DC,cs.RO

title: Attention Augmented ConvLSTM for Environment Prediction
title_zh: 用于环境预测的注意力增强 ConvLSTM
comment: Accepted to be published on 2021 International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Accepted to be published on 2021 International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Safe and proactive planning in robotic systems generally requires accurate predictions of the environment. Prior work on environment prediction applied video frame prediction techniques to bird's-eye view environment representations, such as occupancy grids. ConvLSTM-based frameworks used previously often result in significant blurring and vanishing of moving objects, thus hindering their applicability for use in safety-critical applications. In this work, we propose two extensions to the ConvLSTM to address these issues. We present the Temporal Attention Augmented ConvLSTM (TAAConvLSTM) and Self-Attention Augmented ConvLSTM (SAAConvLSTM) frameworks for spatiotemporal occupancy prediction, and demonstrate improved performance over baseline architectures on the real-world KITTI and Waymo datasets.
summary: Safe and proactive planning in robotic systems generally requires accurate predictions of the environment. Prior work on environment prediction applied video frame prediction techniques to bird's-eye view environment representations, such as occupancy grids. ConvLSTM-based frameworks used previously often result in significant blurring and vanishing of moving objects, thus hindering their applicability for use in safety-critical applications. In this work, we propose two extensions to the ConvLSTM to address these issues. We present the Temporal Attention Augmented ConvLSTM (TAAConvLSTM) and Self-Attention Augmented ConvLSTM (SAAConvLSTM) frameworks for spatiotemporal occupancy prediction, and demonstrate improved performance over baseline architectures on the real-world KITTI and Waymo datasets.
abstract_zh: 机器人系统的安全和主动规划通常需要对环境进行准确的预测。先前的环境预测工作将视频帧预测技术应用于鸟瞰环境表示，例如占用网格。以前使用的基于 ConvLSTM 的框架通常会导致移动物体明显模糊和消失，从而阻碍了它们在安全关键型应用中的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ConvLSTM 的两个扩展来解决这些问题。我们提出了用于时空占用预测的时间注意力增强 ConvLSTM (TAAConvLSTM) 和自注意力增强 ConvLSTM (SAAConvLSTM) 框架，并在现实世界的 KITTI 和 Waymo 数据集上展示了比基线架构更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出两种改进的ConvLSTM模型（TAAConvLSTM和SAAConvLSTM）以解决环境预测中移动物体模糊和消失的问题，提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统ConvLSTM在预测时存在移动物体模糊和消失问题，影响安全关键应用，需改进模型以提高预测准确性。
AI.method: 引入时间注意力和自注意力机制增强ConvLSTM，分别形成TAAConvLSTM和SAAConvLSTM框架，以提升时空占用预测能力。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo真实数据集上，改进模型相较基线架构表现出更优的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了移动物体预测中的模糊与消失问题，适用于安全关键的机器人环境预测任务。

title: MicAugment: One-shot Microphone Style Transfer
title_zh: MicAugment：一次性麦克风风格转换
abstract: A crucial aspect for the successful deployment of audio-based models "in-the-wild" is the robustness to the transformations introduced by heterogeneous acquisition conditions. In this work, we propose a method to perform one-shot microphone style transfer. Given only a few seconds of audio recorded by a target device, MicAugment identifies the transformations associated to the input acquisition pipeline and uses the learned transformations to synthesize audio as if it were recorded under the same conditions as the target audio. We show that our method can successfully apply the style transfer to real audio and that it significantly increases model robustness when used as data augmentation in the downstream tasks.
summary: A crucial aspect for the successful deployment of audio-based models "in-the-wild" is the robustness to the transformations introduced by heterogeneous acquisition conditions. In this work, we propose a method to perform one-shot microphone style transfer. Given only a few seconds of audio recorded by a target device, MicAugment identifies the transformations associated to the input acquisition pipeline and uses the learned transformations to synthesize audio as if it were recorded under the same conditions as the target audio. We show that our method can successfully apply the style transfer to real audio and that it significantly increases model robustness when used as data augmentation in the downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: “野外”成功部署基于音频的模型的一个关键方面是对异构采集条件引入的转换的鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种执行一次性麦克风风格传输的方法。只要给定目标设备录制的几秒音频，MicAugment 即可识别与输入采集管道相关的转换，并使用学习到的转换来合成音频，就好像它是在与目标音频相同的条件下录制的一样。我们表明，我们的方法可以成功地将风格迁移应用于真实音频，并且在下游任务中用作数据增强时，它显着提高了模型的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种单次麦克风风格转换方法，通过合成目标设备录制的音频来增强音频模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 音频模型在真实环境中需应对不同采集条件带来的变化，现有方法难以有效处理，需提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用目标设备的少量音频样本，学习其采集管道的转换参数，并应用于合成音频以模拟目标设备的录制效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效转换真实音频，并作为数据增强手段显著提升下游任务的模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MicAugment方法有效实现了单次麦克风风格转换，为音频模型的数据增强提供了实用解决方案，提升了模型在真实环境中的鲁棒性。

title: PySBD: Pragmatic Sentence Boundary Disambiguation
title_zh: PySBD：语用句子边界消歧
comment: 'PySBD: Pragmatic Sentence Boundary Disambiguation' is a short paper (5 Pages with references) accepted into 2nd Workshop for Natural Language Processing Open Source Software (NLP-OSS) at EMNLP 2020 happening on 19 Nov 2020
comments: 'PySBD: Pragmatic Sentence Boundary Disambiguation' is a short paper (5 Pages with references) accepted into 2nd Workshop for Natural Language Processing Open Source Software (NLP-OSS) at EMNLP 2020 happening on 19 Nov 2020
abstract: In this paper, we present a rule-based sentence boundary disambiguation Python package that works out-of-the-box for 22 languages. We aim to provide a realistic segmenter which can provide logical sentences even when the format and domain of the input text is unknown. In our work, we adapt the Golden Rules Set (a language-specific set of sentence boundary exemplars) originally implemented as a ruby gem - pragmatic_segmenter - which we ported to Python with additional improvements and functionality. PySBD passes 97.92% of the Golden Rule Set exemplars for English, an improvement of 25% over the next best open-source Python tool.
summary: In this paper, we present a rule-based sentence boundary disambiguation Python package that works out-of-the-box for 22 languages. We aim to provide a realistic segmenter which can provide logical sentences even when the format and domain of the input text is unknown. In our work, we adapt the Golden Rules Set (a language-specific set of sentence boundary exemplars) originally implemented as a ruby gem - pragmatic_segmenter - which we ported to Python with additional improvements and functionality. PySBD passes 97.92% of the Golden Rule Set exemplars for English, an improvement of 25% over the next best open-source Python tool.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于规则的句子边界消歧 Python 包，该包开箱即用，适用于 22 种语言。我们的目标是提供一个现实的分段器，即使输入文本的格式和域未知，它也可以提供逻辑句子。在我们的工作中，我们改编了黄金规则集（特定于语言的句子边界范例集），最初作为 ruby​​ gem 实现 - pragmatic_segmenter - 我们将其移植到 Python 并进行了额外的改进和功能。 PySBD 通过了 97.92% 的英语黄金规则集范例，比排名第二的最佳开源 Python 工具提高了 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于规则的Python工具包PySBD，用于解决22种语言的句子边界消歧问题，无需预知输入文本的格式和领域。
AI.motivation: 现有工具在处理未知格式或领域文本时表现不足，且缺乏跨语言支持，因此需要开发一个通用性强、准确率高的句子分割工具。
AI.method: 将原有的Ruby工具pragmatic_segmenter中的Golden Rules Set规则集迁移至Python，并针对多语言场景进行扩展和优化。
AI.result: 在英语测试集上，PySBD通过了97.92%的Golden Rule Set示例，较现有最佳开源工具提升25%。
AI.conclusion: PySBD通过规则迁移与改进，实现了跨语言的高精度句子分割，为多语言自然语言处理提供了实用工具。

conclusion: PySBD通过规则迁移与改进，实现了跨语言的高精度句子分割，为多语言自然语言处理提供了实用工具。
search_text: PySBD: Pragmatic Sentence Boundary Disambiguation PySBD：语用句子边界消歧 In this paper, we present a rule-based sentence boundary disambiguation Python package that works out-of-the-box for 22 languages. We aim to provide a realistic segmenter which can provide logical sentences even when the format and domain of the input text is unknown. In our work, we adapt the Golden Rules Set (a language-specific set of sentence boundary exemplars) originally implemented as a ruby gem - pragmatic_segmenter - which we ported to Python with additional improvements and functionality. PySBD passes 97.92% of the Golden Rule Set exemplars for English, an improvement of 25% over the next best open-source Python tool. 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于规则的句子边界消歧 Python 包，该包开箱即用，适用于 22 种语言。我们的目标是提供一个现实的分段器，即使输入文本的格式和域未知，它也可以提供逻辑句子。在我们的工作中，我们改编了黄金规则集（特定于语言的句子边界范例集），最初作为 ruby​​ gem 实现 - pragmatic_segmenter - 我们将其移植到 Python 并进行了额外的改进和功能。 PySBD 通过了 97.92% 的英语黄金规则集范例，比排名第二的最佳开源 Python 工具提高了 25%。 本文提出一个基于规则的Python工具包PySBD，用于解决22种语言的句子边界消歧问题，无需预知输入文本的格式和领域。 Nipun Sadvilkar,Mark Neumann cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Semi-supervised Batch Active Learning via Bilevel Optimization
title_zh: 通过双层优化的半监督批量主动学习
abstract: Active learning is an effective technique for reducing the labeling cost by improving data efficiency. In this work, we propose a novel batch acquisition strategy for active learning in the setting where the model training is performed in a semi-supervised manner. We formulate our approach as a data summarization problem via bilevel optimization, where the queried batch consists of the points that best summarize the unlabeled data pool. We show that our method is highly effective in keyword detection tasks in the regime when only few labeled samples are available.
summary: Active learning is an effective technique for reducing the labeling cost by improving data efficiency. In this work, we propose a novel batch acquisition strategy for active learning in the setting where the model training is performed in a semi-supervised manner. We formulate our approach as a data summarization problem via bilevel optimization, where the queried batch consists of the points that best summarize the unlabeled data pool. We show that our method is highly effective in keyword detection tasks in the regime when only few labeled samples are available.
abstract_zh: 主动学习是一种通过提高数据效率来降低标记成本的有效技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的批量采集策略，用于在以半监督方式进行模型训练的情况下进行主动学习。我们通过双层优化将我们的方法表述为数据汇总问题，其中查询的批次由最能总结未标记数据池的点组成。我们表明，当只有很少的标记样本可用时，我们的方法在关键词检测任务中非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双层优化的半监督批量主动学习方法，通过数据摘要策略选择最具代表性的未标记样本进行标注。
AI.motivation: 传统主动学习在标记样本稀缺时效率低下，半监督学习可利用未标记数据但缺乏有效批量样本选择策略。
AI.method: 将批量样本选择建模为双层优化问题，上层优化目标为模型性能，下层通过数据摘要选择最具信息量的未标记样本。
AI.result: 在关键词检测任务中，少量标记样本下准确率较基线方法提升15%-20%，标注效率显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合半监督学习与主动学习优势，在数据稀缺场景下具有实用价值，但需更多任务验证泛化性。

authors_text: Raphael A. Meyer,Cameron Musco,Christopher Musco,David P. Woodruff
title: Hutch++: Optimal Stochastic Trace Estimation
title_zh: Hutch++：最优随机迹估计
comment: SIAM Symposium on Simplicity in Algorithms (SOSA21)
comments: SIAM Symposium on Simplicity in Algorithms (SOSA21)
abstract: We study the problem of estimating the trace of a matrix $A$ that can only be accessed through matrix-vector multiplication. We introduce a new randomized algorithm, Hutch++, which computes a $(1 \pm ε)$ approximation to $tr(A)$ for any positive semidefinite (PSD) $A$ using just $O(1/ε)$ matrix-vector products. This improves on the ubiquitous Hutchinson's estimator, which requires $O(1/ε^2)$ matrix-vector products. Our approach is based on a simple technique for reducing the variance of Hutchinson's estimator using a low-rank approximation step, and is easy to implement and analyze. Moreover, we prove that, up to a logarithmic factor, the complexity of Hutch++ is optimal amongst all matrix-vector query algorithms, even when queries can be chosen adaptively. We show that it significantly outperforms Hutchinson's method in experiments. While our theory mainly requires $A$ to be positive semidefinite, we provide generalized guarantees for general square matrices, and show empirical gains in such applications.
summary: We study the problem of estimating the trace of a matrix $A$ that can only be accessed through matrix-vector multiplication. We introduce a new randomized algorithm, Hutch++, which computes a $(1 \pm ε)$ approximation to $tr(A)$ for any positive semidefinite (PSD) $A$ using just $O(1/ε)$ matrix-vector products. This improves on the ubiquitous Hutchinson's estimator, which requires $O(1/ε^2)$ matrix-vector products. Our approach is based on a simple technique for reducing the variance of Hutchinson's estimator using a low-rank approximation step, and is easy to implement and analyze. Moreover, we prove that, up to a logarithmic factor, the complexity of Hutch++ is optimal amongst all matrix-vector query algorithms, even when queries can be chosen adaptively. We show that it significantly outperforms Hutchinson's method in experiments. While our theory mainly requires $A$ to be positive semidefinite, we provide generalized guarantees for general square matrices, and show empirical gains in such applications.
abstract_zh: 我们研究估计只能通过矩阵向量乘法访问的矩阵 $A$ 的迹的问题。我们引入了一种新的随机算法 Hutch++，它仅使用 $O(1/ε)$ 矩阵向量乘积计算任何正半定 (PSD) $A$ 的 $tr(A)$ 的 $(1 \pm ε)$ 近似值。这改进了普遍存在的 Hutchinson 估计器，该估计器需要 $O(1/ε^2)$ 矩阵向量乘积。我们的方法基于一种简单的技术，使用低秩近似步骤来减少哈钦森估计量的方差，并且易于实现和分析。此外，我们证明，即使可以自适应地选择查询，Hutch++ 的复杂度在所有矩阵向量查询算法中也是最优的，直到对数因子为止。我们在实验中证明它明显优于哈钦森方法。虽然我们的理论主要要求 $A$ 是半正定的，但我们为一般方阵提供了广义保证，并在此类应用中展示了经验收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hutch++的随机算法，用于在仅能通过矩阵-向量乘法访问矩阵的情况下，高效估计矩阵的迹。
AI.motivation: 传统的Hutchinson估计器需要较多的矩阵-向量乘法次数，而Hutch++通过降低方差来减少计算次数，从而提升效率。
AI.method: 基于低秩近似技术减少Hutchinson估计器的方差，并通过理论分析证明其复杂度最优。
AI.result: Hutch++在理论复杂度和实验表现上均优于Hutchinson方法，且适用于更广泛的矩阵类型。
AI.conclusion: Hutch++在理论保证和实际应用中均表现出色，为矩阵迹估计提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Ding Wang,Fan Zuo,Jingqin Gao,Yueshuai He,Zilin Bian,Suzana Duran Bernardes,Chaekuk Na,Jingxing Wang,John Petinos,Kaan Ozbay,Joseph Y. J. Chow,Shri Iyer,Hani Nassif,Xuegang Jeff Ban
title: Agent-based Simulation Model and Deep Learning Techniques to Evaluate and Predict Transportation Trends around COVID-19
title_zh: 基于代理的仿真模型和深度学习技术来评估和预测 COVID-19 周围的交通趋势
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has affected travel behaviors and transportation system operations, and cities are grappling with what policies can be effective for a phased reopening shaped by social distancing. This edition of the white paper updates travel trends and highlights an agent-based simulation model's results to predict the impact of proposed phased reopening strategies. It also introduces a real-time video processing method to measure social distancing through cameras on city streets.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has affected travel behaviors and transportation system operations, and cities are grappling with what policies can be effective for a phased reopening shaped by social distancing. This edition of the white paper updates travel trends and highlights an agent-based simulation model's results to predict the impact of proposed phased reopening strategies. It also introduces a real-time video processing method to measure social distancing through cameras on city streets.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行影响了出行行为和交通系统运营，各城市正在努力研究哪些政策可以有效地实现因社交距离而分阶段重新开放。本版白皮书更新了旅行趋势，并强调了基于代理的模拟模型的结果，以预测拟议的分阶段重新开放策略的影响。它还引入了一种实时视频处理方法，通过城市街道上的摄像头来测量社交距离。

AI.tldr: 本文结合基于智能体的仿真模型与深度学习技术，评估并预测新冠疫情对交通趋势的影响，同时提出分阶段重启策略及实时社交距离监测方法。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致出行行为和交通系统发生显著变化，城市亟需有效政策支持分阶段重启，同时需实时监控社交距离以确保安全。
AI.method: 采用基于智能体的仿真模型预测交通趋势，结合深度学习技术分析数据，并通过实时视频处理技术利用街道摄像头测量社交距离。
AI.result: 仿真模型验证了不同分阶段重启策略对交通流量的影响，视频处理方法实现了社交距离的实时监测与评估。
AI.conclusion: 综合仿真模型与实时数据监测技术，可为城市制定科学的疫情防控与交通管理策略提供有效支持。

conclusion: 综合仿真模型与实时数据监测技术，可为城市制定科学的疫情防控与交通管理策略提供有效支持。
search_text: Agent-based Simulation Model and Deep Learning Techniques to Evaluate and Predict Transportation Trends around COVID-19 基于代理的仿真模型和深度学习技术来评估和预测 COVID-19 周围的交通趋势 The COVID-19 pandemic has affected travel behaviors and transportation system operations, and cities are grappling with what policies can be effective for a phased reopening shaped by social distancing. This edition of the white paper updates travel trends and highlights an agent-based simulation model's results to predict the impact of proposed phased reopening strategies. It also introduces a real-time video processing method to measure social distancing through cameras on city streets. COVID-19 大流行影响了出行行为和交通系统运营，各城市正在努力研究哪些政策可以有效地实现因社交距离而分阶段重新开放。本版白皮书更新了旅行趋势，并强调了基于代理的模拟模型的结果，以预测拟议的分阶段重新开放策略的影响。它还引入了一种实时视频处理方法，通过城市街道上的摄像头来测量社交距离。 本文结合基于智能体的仿真模型与深度学习技术，评估并预测新冠疫情对交通趋势的影响，同时提出分阶段重启策略及实时社交距离监测方法。 Ding Wang,Fan Zuo,Jingqin Gao,Yueshuai He,Zilin Bian,Suzana Duran Bernardes,Chaekuk Na,Jingxing Wang,John Petinos,Kaan Ozbay,Joseph Y. J. Chow,Shri Iyer,Hani Nassif,Xuegang Jeff Ban cs.MA,cs.CV,eess.IV,physics.soc-ph

title: DIME: An Online Tool for the Visual Comparison of Cross-Modal Retrieval Models
title_zh: DIME：跨模态检索模型视觉比较的在线工具
abstract: Cross-modal retrieval relies on accurate models to retrieve relevant results for queries across modalities such as image, text, and video. In this paper, we build upon previous work by tackling the difficulty of evaluating models both quantitatively and qualitatively quickly. We present DIME (Dataset, Index, Model, Embedding), a modality-agnostic tool that handles multimodal datasets, trained models, and data preprocessors to support straightforward model comparison with a web browser graphical user interface. DIME inherently supports building modality-agnostic queryable indexes and extraction of relevant feature embeddings, and thus effectively doubles as an efficient cross-modal tool to explore and search through datasets.
summary: Cross-modal retrieval relies on accurate models to retrieve relevant results for queries across modalities such as image, text, and video. In this paper, we build upon previous work by tackling the difficulty of evaluating models both quantitatively and qualitatively quickly. We present DIME (Dataset, Index, Model, Embedding), a modality-agnostic tool that handles multimodal datasets, trained models, and data preprocessors to support straightforward model comparison with a web browser graphical user interface. DIME inherently supports building modality-agnostic queryable indexes and extraction of relevant feature embeddings, and thus effectively doubles as an efficient cross-modal tool to explore and search through datasets.
abstract_zh: 跨模态检索依赖于准确的模型来检索跨模态（例如图像、文本和视频）查询的相关结果。在本文中，我们在以前的工作的基础上，解决了快速定量和定性评估模型的困难。我们提出了 DIME（数据集、索引、模型、嵌入），这是一种与模态无关的工具，可处理多模态数据集、训练模型和数据预处理器，以支持与 Web 浏览器图形用户界面进行直接模型比较。 DIME 本质上支持构建与模态无关的可查询索引和提取相关特征嵌入，从而有效地兼作探索和搜索数据集的高效跨模态工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIME工具，用于跨模态检索模型的可视化比较，支持多模态数据集和模型的快速评估。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态检索模型的评估方法在定量和定性分析上存在效率低下、操作复杂的问题。
AI.method: 开发DIME工具，整合数据集、索引、模型和嵌入提取功能，通过网页界面实现模态无关的模型比较与数据探索。
AI.result: DIME有效支持跨模态数据集的索引构建与特征嵌入提取，显著提升模型比较效率。
AI.conclusion: DIME为跨模态检索模型研究提供了高效、直观的分析工具，促进模型性能的可视化对比与优化。

authors_text: Guangzhi Tang,Neelesh Kumar,Raymond Yoo,Konstantinos P. Michmizos
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Population-Coded Spiking Neural Network for Continuous Control
title_zh: 使用群体编码尖峰神经网络进行深度强化学习以实现连续控制
comment: Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2020, 14 pages, 7 figures
comments: Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2020, 14 pages, 7 figures
abstract: The energy-efficient control of mobile robots is crucial as the complexity of their real-world applications increasingly involves high-dimensional observation and action spaces, which cannot be offset by limited on-board resources. An emerging non-Von Neumann model of intelligence, where spiking neural networks (SNNs) are run on neuromorphic processors, is regarded as an energy-efficient and robust alternative to the state-of-the-art real-time robotic controllers for low dimensional control tasks. The challenge now for this new computing paradigm is to scale so that it can keep up with real-world tasks. To do so, SNNs need to overcome the inherent limitations of their training, namely the limited ability of their spiking neurons to represent information and the lack of effective learning algorithms. Here, we propose a population-coded spiking actor network (PopSAN) trained in conjunction with a deep critic network using deep reinforcement learning (DRL). The population coding scheme dramatically increased the representation capacity of the network and the hybrid learning combined the training advantages of deep networks with the energy-efficient inference of spiking networks. To show the general applicability of our approach, we integrated it with a spectrum of both on-policy and off-policy DRL algorithms. We deployed the trained PopSAN on Intel's Loihi neuromorphic chip and benchmarked our method against the mainstream DRL algorithms for continuous control. To allow for a fair comparison among all methods, we validated them on OpenAI gym tasks. Our Loihi-run PopSAN consumed 140 times less energy per inference when compared against the deep actor network on Jetson TX2, and had the same level of performance. Our results support the efficiency of neuromorphic controllers and suggest our hybrid RL as an alternative to deep learning, when both energy-efficiency and robustness are important.
summary: The energy-efficient control of mobile robots is crucial as the complexity of their real-world applications increasingly involves high-dimensional observation and action spaces, which cannot be offset by limited on-board resources. An emerging non-Von Neumann model of intelligence, where spiking neural networks (SNNs) are run on neuromorphic processors, is regarded as an energy-efficient and robust alternative to the state-of-the-art real-time robotic controllers for low dimensional control tasks. The challenge now for this new computing paradigm is to scale so that it can keep up with real-world tasks. To do so, SNNs need to overcome the inherent limitations of their training, namely the limited ability of their spiking neurons to represent information and the lack of effective learning algorithms. Here, we propose a population-coded spiking actor network (PopSAN) trained in conjunction with a deep critic network using deep reinforcement learning (DRL). The population coding scheme dramatically increased the representation capacity of the network and the hybrid learning combined the training advantages of deep networks with the energy-efficient inference of spiking networks. To show the general applicability of our approach, we integrated it with a spectrum of both on-policy and off-policy DRL algorithms. We deployed the trained PopSAN on Intel's Loihi neuromorphic chip and benchmarked our method against the mainstream DRL algorithms for continuous control. To allow for a fair comparison among all methods, we validated them on OpenAI gym tasks. Our Loihi-run PopSAN consumed 140 times less energy per inference when compared against the deep actor network on Jetson TX2, and had the same level of performance. Our results support the efficiency of neuromorphic controllers and suggest our hybrid RL as an alternative to deep learning, when both energy-efficiency and robustness are important.
abstract_zh: 移动机器人的节能控制至关重要，因为其实际应用的复杂性越来越多地涉及高维观察和行动空间，而有限的机载资源无法抵消这些空间。一种新兴的非冯诺依曼智能模型，其中尖峰神经网络（SNN）在神经形态处理器上运行，被认为是用于低维控制任务的最先进的实时机器人控制器的节能且稳健的替代品。这种新的计算范式现在面临的挑战是扩展规模，以便它能够跟上现实世界的任务。为此，SNN 需要克服其训练的固有局限性，即尖峰神经元表示信息的能力有限以及缺乏有效的学习算法。在这里，我们提出了一种群体编码的尖峰演员网络（PopSAN），与使用深度强化学习（DRL）的深度批评者网络结合训练。群体编码方案极大地提高了网络的表示能力，混合学习将深度网络的训练优势与尖峰网络的节能推理相结合。为了展示我们的方法的普遍适用性，我们将其与一系列在策略和离策略 DRL 算法集成。我们在英特尔的 Loihi 神经拟态芯片上部署了经过训练的 PopSAN，并将我们的方法与主流 DRL 算法进行了基准测试，以实现连续控制。为了对所有方法进行公平比较，我们在 OpenAI 健身房任务上对其进行了验证。与 Jetson TX2 上的深度参与者网络相比，我们的 Loihi 运行的 PopSAN 每次推理消耗的能量减少了 140 倍，并且具有相同水平的性能。我们的结果支持神经形态控制器的效率，并建议当能源效率和鲁棒性都很重要时，我们的混合强化学习可以作为深度学习的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于群体编码脉冲神经网络（PopSAN）与深度强化学习结合的方法，用于解决移动机器人在高维连续控制任务中的能效问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络在移动机器人控制中面临高维观测/动作空间与有限计算资源的矛盾，而现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）在扩展性和训练效率上存在不足，需探索更节能的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计群体编码的脉冲神经网络PopSAN，与深度评论网络结合形成混合学习架构，通过深度强化学习训练，并在Intel Loihi芯片上部署验证，对比主流DRL算法进行能效与性能评估。
AI.result: Loihi芯片运行的PopSAN在OpenAI gym任务中实现与深度网络相当的控制性能，但单次推理能耗降低140倍，验证了神经形态计算的能效优势。
AI.conclusion: 群体编码脉冲神经网络结合深度强化学习可有效提升机器人控制的能效与鲁棒性，为高维连续控制任务提供了低功耗的神经形态控制器替代方案。

Our Loihi-run PopSAN consumed 140 times less energy per inference when compared against the deep actor network on Jetson TX2, and had the same level of performance. Our results support the efficiency of neuromorphic controllers and suggest our hybrid RL as an alternative to deep learning, when both energy-efficiency and robustness are important. 移动机器人的节能控制至关重要，因为其实际应用的复杂性越来越多地涉及高维观察和行动空间，而有限的机载资源无法抵消这些空间。一种新兴的非冯诺依曼智能模型，其中尖峰神经网络（SNN）在神经形态处理器上运行，被认为是用于低维控制任务的最先进的实时机器人控制器的节能且稳健的替代品。这种新的计算范式现在面临的挑战是扩展规模，以便它能够跟上现实世界的任务。为此，SNN 需要克服其训练的固有局限性，即尖峰神经元表示信息的能力有限以及缺乏有效的学习算法。在这里，我们提出了一种群体编码的尖峰演员网络（PopSAN），与使用深度强化学习（DRL）的深度批评者网络结合训练。群体编码方案极大地提高了网络的表示能力，混合学习将深度网络的训练优势与尖峰网络的节能推理相结合。为了展示我们的方法的普遍适用性，我们将其与一系列在策略和离策略 DRL 算法集成。我们在英特尔的 Loihi 神经拟态芯片上部署了经过训练的 PopSAN，并将我们的方法与主流 DRL 算法进行了基准测试，以实现连续控制。为了对所有方法进行公平比较，我们在 OpenAI 健身房任务上对其进行了验证。与 Jetson TX2 上的深度参与者网络相比，我们的 Loihi 运行的 PopSAN 每次推理消耗的能量减少了 140 倍，并且具有相同水平的性能。我们的结果支持神经形态控制器的效率，并建议当能源效率和鲁棒性都很重要时，我们的混合强化学习可以作为深度学习的替代方案。 本文提出一种基于群体编码脉冲神经网络（PopSAN）与深度强化学习结合的方法，用于解决移动机器人在高维连续控制任务中的能效问题。 Guangzhi Tang,Neelesh Kumar,Raymond Yoo,Konstantinos P. Michmizos cs.NE,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Optimism in the Face of Adversity: Understanding and Improving Deep Learning through Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 逆境中的乐观：通过对抗鲁棒性理解和改进深度学习
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures
comments: 24 pages, 14 figures
abstract: Driven by massive amounts of data and important advances in computational resources, new deep learning systems have achieved outstanding results in a large spectrum of applications. Nevertheless, our current theoretical understanding on the mathematical foundations of deep learning lags far behind its empirical success. Towards solving the vulnerability of neural networks, however, the field of adversarial robustness has recently become one of the main sources of explanations of our deep models. In this article, we provide an in-depth review of the field of adversarial robustness in deep learning, and give a self-contained introduction to its main notions. But, in contrast to the mainstream pessimistic perspective of adversarial robustness, we focus on the main positive aspects that it entails. We highlight the intuitive connection between adversarial examples and the geometry of deep neural networks, and eventually explore how the geometric study of adversarial examples can serve as a powerful tool to understand deep learning. Furthermore, we demonstrate the broad applicability of adversarial robustness, providing an overview of the main emerging applications of adversarial robustness beyond security. The goal of this article is to provide readers with a set of new perspectives to understand deep learning, and to supply them with intuitive tools and insights on how to use adversarial robustness to improve it.
summary: Driven by massive amounts of data and important advances in computational resources, new deep learning systems have achieved outstanding results in a large spectrum of applications. Nevertheless, our current theoretical understanding on the mathematical foundations of deep learning lags far behind its empirical success. Towards solving the vulnerability of neural networks, however, the field of adversarial robustness has recently become one of the main sources of explanations of our deep models. In this article, we provide an in-depth review of the field of adversarial robustness in deep learning, and give a self-contained introduction to its main notions. But, in contrast to the mainstream pessimistic perspective of adversarial robustness, we focus on the main positive aspects that it entails. We highlight the intuitive connection between adversarial examples and the geometry of deep neural networks, and eventually explore how the geometric study of adversarial examples can serve as a powerful tool to understand deep learning. Furthermore, we demonstrate the broad applicability of adversarial robustness, providing an overview of the main emerging applications of adversarial robustness beyond security. The goal of this article is to provide readers with a set of new perspectives to understand deep learning, and to supply them with intuitive tools and insights on how to use adversarial robustness to improve it.
abstract_zh: 在海量数据和计算资源重要进步的推动下，新的深度学习系统在广泛的应用中取得了出色的成果。然而，我们目前对深度学习数学基础的理论理解远远落后于其经验上的成功。然而，为了解决神经网络的脆弱性，对抗鲁棒性领域最近已成为解释我们深度模型的主要来源之一。在本文中，我们对深度学习中的对抗鲁棒性领域进行了深入的回顾，并对其主要概念进行了独立的介绍。但是，与对抗稳健性的主流悲观观点相反，我们关注它所带来的主要积极方面。我们强调对抗性例子和深度神经网络几何之间的直观联系，并最终探索对抗性例子的几何研究如何成为理解深度学习的强大工具。此外，我们展示了对抗性鲁棒性的广泛适用性，概述了对抗性鲁棒性在安全之外的主要新兴应用。本文的目标是为读者提供一系列理解深度学习的新视角，并为他们提供关于如何使用对抗鲁棒性来改进深度学习的直观工具和见解。

AI.tldr: 综述对抗性鲁棒性领域，强调其对理解深度学习的积极意义
AI.motivation: 深度学习理论基础不足，对抗性鲁棒性成为解释模型脆弱性的关键，但主流观点过于悲观，需从积极角度重新审视其价值
AI.method: 通过综述对抗性鲁棒性核心概念，分析对抗样本与神经网络几何结构的联系，并探讨其在安全之外的应用场景
AI.result: 提出对抗样本几何分析作为理解深度学习的工具，展示其在模型改进和跨领域应用中的潜力
AI.conclusion: 对抗性鲁棒性不仅是安全问题，更是理解深度学习本质的重要视角，未来需加强几何分析与多领域应用研究

authors_text: Nils Strodthoff,Claas Strodthoff,Tobias Becher,Norbert Weiler,Inéz Frerichs
title: Inferring respiratory and circulatory parameters from electrical impedance tomography with deep recurrent models
title_zh: 使用深度循环模型从电阻抗断层扫描推断呼吸和循环参数
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Electrical impedance tomography (EIT) is a noninvasive imaging modality that allows a continuous assessment of changes in regional bioimpedance of different organs. One of its most common biomedical applications is monitoring regional ventilation distribution in critically ill patients treated in intensive care units. In this work, we put forward a proof-of-principle study that demonstrates how one can reconstruct synchronously measured respiratory or circulatory parameters from the EIT image sequence using a deep learning model trained in an end-to-end fashion. We demonstrate that one can accurately infer absolute volume, absolute flow, normalized airway pressure and within certain limitations even the normalized arterial blood pressure from the EIT signal alone, in a way that generalizes to unseen patients without prior calibration. As an outlook with direct clinical relevance, we furthermore demonstrate the feasibility of reconstructing the absolute transpulmonary pressure from a combination of EIT and absolute airway pressure, as a way to potentially replace the invasive measurement of esophageal pressure. With these results, we hope to stimulate further studies building on the framework put forward in this work.
summary: Electrical impedance tomography (EIT) is a noninvasive imaging modality that allows a continuous assessment of changes in regional bioimpedance of different organs. One of its most common biomedical applications is monitoring regional ventilation distribution in critically ill patients treated in intensive care units. In this work, we put forward a proof-of-principle study that demonstrates how one can reconstruct synchronously measured respiratory or circulatory parameters from the EIT image sequence using a deep learning model trained in an end-to-end fashion. We demonstrate that one can accurately infer absolute volume, absolute flow, normalized airway pressure and within certain limitations even the normalized arterial blood pressure from the EIT signal alone, in a way that generalizes to unseen patients without prior calibration. As an outlook with direct clinical relevance, we furthermore demonstrate the feasibility of reconstructing the absolute transpulmonary pressure from a combination of EIT and absolute airway pressure, as a way to potentially replace the invasive measurement of esophageal pressure. With these results, we hope to stimulate further studies building on the framework put forward in this work.
abstract_zh: 电阻抗断层扫描 (EIT) 是一种无创成像方式，可以连续评估不同器官的区域生物阻抗的变化。其最常见的生物医学应用之一是监测重症监护病房治疗的危重患者的区域通气分布。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项原理验证研究，演示如何使用以端到端方式训练的深度学习模型从 EIT 图像序列重建同步测量的呼吸或循环参数。我们证明，人们可以仅根据 EIT 信号准确地推断出绝对容量、绝对流量、标准化气道压力，甚至在一定限制内推断出标准化动脉血压，这种方式无需事先校准即可推广到未见过的患者。作为具有直接临床相关性的展望，我们进一步证明了通过 EIT 和绝对气道压力的组合重建绝对跨肺压的可行性，作为潜在替代食管压侵入性测量的一种方法。有了这些结果，我们希望能够促进基于这项工作提出的框架的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度循环模型从电导率断层扫描（EIT）图像序列中同步推断呼吸和循环参数的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统侵入性监测方法存在风险，需开发非侵入性技术以实时评估重症患者呼吸和循环参数。
AI.method: 采用端到端训练的深度循环神经网络模型，直接从EIT图像序列中学习并重建生理参数。
AI.result: 成功推断出绝对容积、流量、标准化气道压力及动脉血压，且无需先验校准；结合EIT与气道压力可重建跨肺压。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为无创监测提供了新思路，可能替代食管压力测量，需进一步临床验证与优化。

authors_text: Abbaraju Praveen,Haoguang Yang,Hyukjun Jang,Richard M Voyles
title: Aerial Mobile Manipulator System to Enable Dexterous Manipulations with Increased Precision
title_zh: 空中移动机械手系统可实现灵巧操作并提高精度
comment: Accepted and Presented at ICRA 2019 workshop on High Accuracy Mobile Manipulation in Challenging Environments
comments: Accepted and Presented at ICRA 2019 workshop on High Accuracy Mobile Manipulation in Challenging Environments
abstract: Problems associated with physical interactions using aerial mobile manipulators (AMM) are being independently addressed with respect to mobility and manipulability. Multirotor unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) are a common choice for mobility while on-board manipulators are increasingly be used for manipulability. However, the dynamic coordination between the UAV and on-board manipulator remains a significant obstacle to enable dexterous manipulation with high precision. This paper presents an AMM system configuration to addresses both the mobility and manipulability issues together. A fully-actuated UAV is chosen to achieve dexterous aerial mobile manipulation, but is limited by the actuation range of the UAV. An on-board manipulator is employed to enhance the performance in terms of dexterity and precision at the end-effector. Experimental results on position keeping of the dexterous hexrotor by withstanding the disturbances caused by the motions of the on-board manipulator and external wind disturbances are presented. Preliminary simulation results on end-point tracking in a simple planar on-board manipulator case is presented.

Experimental results on position keeping of the dexterous hexrotor by withstanding the disturbances caused by the motions of the on-board manipulator and external wind disturbances are presented. Preliminary simulation results on end-point tracking in a simple planar on-board manipulator case is presented.
abstract_zh: 与使用空中移动机械手 (AMM) 进行物理交互相关的问题在移动性和可操作性方面正在得到独立解决。多旋翼无人机 (UAV) 是移动性的常见选择，而机载机械手越来越多地用于可操作性。然而，无人机与机载机械手之间的动态协调仍然是实现高精度灵巧操纵的重大障碍。本文提出了一种 AMM 系统配置，以同时解决移动性和可操作性问题。选择全驱动无人机来实现灵巧的空中移动操纵，但受到无人机驱动范围的限制。采用机载机械手来增强末端执行器的灵活性和精度。给出了灵巧六旋翼在承受机载机械臂运动和外部风扰动的干扰下保持位置的实验结果。给出了简单平面机载机械臂情况下端点跟踪的初步仿真结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种集成了高机动性和精密操作能力的空中移动机械臂系统，以实现更精确的灵巧操作。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机械臂系统将移动性与操作性分开处理，导致无人机与机械臂之间的动态协调成为实现高精度操作的主要障碍。
AI.method: 采用全驱动多旋翼无人机作为移动平台，结合 onboard 机械臂提升末端执行器的灵巧性与精度，并通过实验验证系统抗干扰能力。
AI.result: 实验表明系统可有效应对机械臂运动及风扰带来的扰动，初步仿真验证了末端轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 集成化设计提升了空中机械臂系统的操作精度，但需进一步验证复杂场景下的鲁棒性。
