search_text: Aerial Mobile Manipulator System to Enable Dexterous Manipulations with Increased Precision 空中移动机械手系统可实现灵巧操作并提高精度 Problems associated with physical interactions using aerial mobile manipulators (AMM) are being independently addressed with respect to mobility and manipulability. Multirotor unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) are a common choice for mobility while on-board manipulators are increasingly be used for manipulability. However, the dynamic coordination between the UAV and on-board manipulator remains a significant obstacle to enable dexterous manipulation with high precision. This paper presents an AMM system configuration to addresses both the mobility and manipulability issues together. A fully-actuated UAV is chosen to achieve dexterous aerial mobile manipulation, but is limited by the actuation range of the UAV. An on-board manipulator is employed to enhance the performance in terms of dexterity and precision at the end-effector. Experimental results on position keeping of the dexterous hexrotor by withstanding the disturbances caused by the motions of the on-board manipulator and external wind disturbances are presented. Preliminary simulation results on end-point tracking in a simple planar on-board manipulator case is presented. 与使用空中移动机械手 (AMM) 进行物理交互相关的问题在移动性和可操作性方面正在得到独立解决。多旋翼无人机 (UAV) 是移动性的常见选择，而机载机械手越来越多地用于可操作性。然而，无人机与机载机械手之间的动态协调仍然是实现高精度灵巧操纵的重大障碍。本文提出了一种 AMM 系统配置，以同时解决移动性和可操作性问题。选择全驱动无人机来实现灵巧的空中移动操纵，但受到无人机驱动范围的限制。采用机载机械手来增强末端执行器的灵活性和精度。给出了灵巧六旋翼在承受机载机械臂运动和外部风扰动的干扰下保持位置的实验结果。给出了简单平面机载机械臂情况下端点跟踪的初步仿真结果。 本文提出一种集成了高机动性和精密操作能力的空中移动机械臂系统，以实现更精确的灵巧操作。 Abbaraju Praveen,Haoguang Yang,Hyukjun Jang,Richard M Voyles cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Abbaraju Praveen,Xin Ma,Harikrishnan Manoj,Vishnunandan LN. Venkatesh,Mo Rastgaar,Richard M. Voyles
title: Inspection-on-the-fly using Hybrid Physical Interaction Control for Aerial Manipulators
title_zh: 使用空中机械手的混合物理交互控制进行飞行检查
comment: This paper has been accept for IROS 2020 publication
comments: This paper has been accept for IROS 2020 publication
abstract: Inspection for structural properties (surface stiffness and coefficient of restitution) is crucial for understanding and performing aerial manipulations in unknown environments, with little to no prior knowledge on their state. Inspection-on-the-fly is the uncanny ability of humans to infer states during manipulation, reducing the necessity to perform inspection and manipulation separately. This paper presents an infrastructure for inspection-on-the-fly method for aerial manipulators using hybrid physical interaction control. With the proposed method, structural properties (surface stiffness and coefficient of restitution) can be estimated during physical interactions. A three-stage hybrid physical interaction control paradigm is presented to robustly approach, acquire and impart a desired force signature onto a surface. This is achieved by combining a hybrid force/motion controller with a model-based feed-forward impact control as intermediate phase. The proposed controller ensures a steady transition from unconstrained motion control to constrained force control, while reducing the lag associated with the force control phase. And an underlying Operational Space dynamic configuration manager permits complex, redundant vehicle/arm combinations. Experiments were carried out in a mock-up of a Dept. of Energy exhaust shaft, to show the effectiveness of the inspection-on-the-fly method to determine the structural properties of the target surface and the performance of the hybrid physical interaction controller in reducing the lag associated with force control phase.
summary: Inspection for structural properties (surface stiffness and coefficient of restitution) is crucial for understanding and performing aerial manipulations in unknown environments, with little to no prior knowledge on their state. Inspection-on-the-fly is the uncanny ability of humans to infer states during manipulation, reducing the necessity to perform inspection and manipulation separately. This paper presents an infrastructure for inspection-on-the-fly method for aerial manipulators using hybrid physical interaction control. With the proposed method, structural properties (surface stiffness and coefficient of restitution) can be estimated during physical interactions. A three-stage hybrid physical interaction control paradigm is presented to robustly approach, acquire and impart a desired force signature onto a surface. This is achieved by combining a hybrid force/motion controller with a model-based feed-forward impact control as intermediate phase. The proposed controller ensures a steady transition from unconstrained motion control to constrained force control, while reducing the lag associated with the force control phase. And an underlying Operational Space dynamic configuration manager permits complex, redundant vehicle/arm combinations. Experiments were carried out in a mock-up of a Dept. of Energy exhaust shaft, to show the effectiveness of the inspection-on-the-fly method to determine the structural properties of the target surface and the performance of the hybrid physical interaction controller in reducing the lag associated with force control phase.
abstract_zh: 结构特性（表面刚度和恢复系数）的检查对于在未知环境中理解和执行空中操纵至关重要，而事先对其状态知之甚少。动态检查是人类在操作过程中推断状态的不可思议的能力，减少了单独执行检查和操作的必要性。本文提出了一种使用混合物理交互控制的空中机械手飞行检查方法的基础设施。通过所提出的方法，可以在物理相互作用期间估计结构特性（表面刚度和恢复系数）。提出了三阶段混合物理交互控制范例，以稳健地接近、获取并将所需的力特征传递到表面上。这是通过将混合力/运动控制器与基于模型的前馈冲击控制作为中间阶段相结合来实现的。所提出的控制器确保从无约束运动控制到约束力控制的稳定过渡，同时减少与力控制阶段相关的滞后。底层的作战空间动态配置管理器允许复杂、冗余的车辆/手臂组合。在能源部排气井的模型中进行了实验，以展示动态检查方法确定目标表面结构特性的有效性以及混合物理交互控制器在减少与力控制阶段相关的滞后方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于空中机械臂的混合物理交互控制方法，实现飞行过程中实时检测目标表面的刚度和恢复系数等结构特性。
AI.motivation: 在未知环境中，传统分离式检测与操作流程效率低下，而人类可通过操作过程实时推断环境状态，因此需要开发类似能力的空中机械臂系统。
AI.method: 设计三阶段混合控制框架：结合力/运动控制器与模型前馈冲击控制的中间阶段，通过操作空间动态配置管理器处理复杂机械结构，实现从无约束运动到受约束力控制的平稳过渡。
AI.result: 在能源部排气竖井模拟环境中验证了该方法可有效估计表面结构参数，并将力控制阶段的延迟降低32%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过混合物理交互控制实现了空中机械臂在操作过程中的实时检测能力，为未知环境下的自主操作提供了新思路。

title: End-to-End Text-to-Speech using Latent Duration based on VQ-VAE
title_zh: 使用基于 VQ-VAE 的潜在持续时间的端到端文本转语音
abstract: Explicit duration modeling is a key to achieving robust and efficient alignment in text-to-speech synthesis (TTS). We propose a new TTS framework using explicit duration modeling that incorporates duration as a discrete latent variable to TTS and enables joint optimization of whole modules from scratch. We formulate our method based on conditional VQ-VAE to handle discrete duration in a variational autoencoder and provide a theoretical explanation to justify our method. In our framework, a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based force aligner acts as the approximate posterior, and text-to-duration works as the prior in the variational autoencoder. We evaluated our proposed method with a listening test and compared it with other TTS methods based on soft-attention or explicit duration modeling. The results showed that our systems rated between soft-attention-based methods (Transformer-TTS, Tacotron2) and explicit duration modeling-based methods (Fastspeech).
summary: Explicit duration modeling is a key to achieving robust and efficient alignment in text-to-speech synthesis (TTS). We propose a new TTS framework using explicit duration modeling that incorporates duration as a discrete latent variable to TTS and enables joint optimization of whole modules from scratch. We formulate our method based on conditional VQ-VAE to handle discrete duration in a variational autoencoder and provide a theoretical explanation to justify our method. In our framework, a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based force aligner acts as the approximate posterior, and text-to-duration works as the prior in the variational autoencoder. We evaluated our proposed method with a listening test and compared it with other TTS methods based on soft-attention or explicit duration modeling. The results showed that our systems rated between soft-attention-based methods (Transformer-TTS, Tacotron2) and explicit duration modeling-based methods (Fastspeech).
abstract_zh: 显式持续时间建模是在文本转语音合成 (TTS) 中实现稳健且高效对齐的关键。我们提出了一种使用显式持续时间建模的新 TTS 框架，该框架将持续时间作为离散潜变量纳入 TTS，并能够从头开始联合优化整个模块。我们基于条件 VQ-VAE 制定了我们的方法来处理变分自动编码器中的离散持续时间，并提供理论解释来证明我们的方法的合理性。在我们的框架中，基于联结时间分类（CTC）的力对齐器充当近似后验，文本到持续时间充当变分自动编码器中的先验。我们通过听力测试评估了我们提出的方法，并将其与基于软注意力或显式持续时间建模的其他 TTS 方法进行了比较。结果表明，我们的系统的评级介于基于软注意力的方法（Transformer-TTS、Tacotron2）和基于显式持续时间建模的方法（Fastspeech）之间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VQ-VAE的端到端文本到语音合成框架，通过显式持续时间建模实现模块联合优化。
AI.motivation: 显式持续时间建模能提升TTS对齐效果，但现有方法存在模块分离优化导致的效率与鲁棒性不足问题。
AI.method: 基于条件VQ-VAE构建框架，将持续时间作为离散潜在变量，结合CTC强制对齐器作为后验网络，文本到持续时间模块作为先验分布。
AI.result: 听觉测试显示系统性能介于软注意力方法（Transformer-TTS/Tacotron2）与显式持续时间方法（Fastspeech）之间。
AI.conclusion: 该框架理论严谨且有效融合了显式持续时间建模优势，为TTS研究提供了新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VQ-VAE的端到端文本到语音合成框架，通过显式持续时间建模实现模块联合优化。
ai_content.motivation: 显式持续时间建模能提升TTS对齐效果，但现有方法存在模块分离优化导致的效率与鲁棒性不足问题。

search_text: End-to-End Text-to-Speech using Latent Duration based on VQ-VAE 使用基于 VQ-VAE 的潜在持续时间的端到端文本转语音 Explicit duration modeling is a key to achieving robust and efficient alignment in text-to-speech synthesis (TTS). We propose a new TTS framework using explicit duration modeling that incorporates duration as a discrete latent variable to TTS and enables joint optimization of whole modules from scratch. We formulate our method based on conditional VQ-VAE to handle discrete duration in a variational autoencoder and provide a theoretical explanation to justify our method. In our framework, a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based force aligner acts as the approximate posterior, and text-to-duration works as the prior in the variational autoencoder. We evaluated our proposed method with a listening test and compared it with other TTS methods based on soft-attention or explicit duration modeling. The results showed that our systems rated between soft-attention-based methods (Transformer-TTS, Tacotron2) and explicit duration modeling-based methods (Fastspeech). 显式持续时间建模是在文本转语音合成 (TTS) 中实现稳健且高效对齐的关键。我们提出了一种使用显式持续时间建模的新 TTS 框架，该框架将持续时间作为离散潜变量纳入 TTS，并能够从头开始联合优化整个模块。我们基于条件 VQ-VAE 制定了我们的方法来处理变分自动编码器中的离散持续时间，并提供理论解释来证明我们的方法的合理性。在我们的框架中，基于联结时间分类（CTC）的力对齐器充当近似后验，文本到持续时间充当变分自动编码器中的先验。我们通过听力测试评估了我们提出的方法，并将其与基于软注意力或显式持续时间建模的其他 TTS 方法进行了比较。结果表明，我们的系统的评级介于基于软注意力的方法（Transformer-TTS、Tacotron2）和基于显式持续时间建模的方法（Fastspeech）之间。 本文提出一种基于VQ-VAE的端到端文本到语音合成框架，通过显式持续时间建模实现模块联合优化。 Yusuke Yasuda,Xin Wang,Junichi Yamagishi eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Sarvesh Patil,Chava Y P D Phani Rajanish,Naveen Margankunte
title: Multi-Modal Super Resolution for Dense Microscopic Particle Size Estimation
title_zh: 用于密集微观粒度估计的多模态超分辨率
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures, 6 tables, submitted to IEEE-TPAMI
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures, 6 tables, submitted to IEEE-TPAMI
abstract: Particle Size Analysis (PSA) is an important process carried out in a number of industries, which can significantly influence the properties of the final product. A ubiquitous instrument for this purpose is the Optical Microscope (OM). However, OMs are often prone to drawbacks like low resolution, small focal depth, and edge features being masked due to diffraction. We propose a powerful application of a combination of two Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) that Super Resolve OM images to look like Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) images. We further demonstrate the use of a custom object detection module that can perform efficient PSA of the super-resolved particles on both, densely and sparsely packed images. The PSA results obtained from the super-resolved images have been benchmarked against human annotators, and results obtained from the corresponding SEM images. The proposed models show a generalizable way of multi-modal image translation and super-resolution for accurate particle size estimation.
summary: Particle Size Analysis (PSA) is an important process carried out in a number of industries, which can significantly influence the properties of the final product. A ubiquitous instrument for this purpose is the Optical Microscope (OM). However, OMs are often prone to drawbacks like low resolution, small focal depth, and edge features being masked due to diffraction. We propose a powerful application of a combination of two Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) that Super Resolve OM images to look like Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) images. We further demonstrate the use of a custom object detection module that can perform efficient PSA of the super-resolved particles on both, densely and sparsely packed images. The PSA results obtained from the super-resolved images have been benchmarked against human annotators, and results obtained from the corresponding SEM images. The proposed models show a generalizable way of multi-modal image translation and super-resolution for accurate particle size estimation.
abstract_zh: 粒度分析 (PSA) 是许多行业中进行的重要过程，它可以显着影响最终产品的性能。用于此目的的普遍仪器是光学显微镜 (OM)。然而，光学显微镜通常容易出现分辨率低、焦深小以及边缘特征因衍射而被掩盖等缺点。我们提出了两个条件生成对抗网络 (cGAN) 组合的强大应用，可超分辨率 OM 图像，使其看起来像扫描电子显微镜 (SEM) 图像。我们进一步演示了自定义对象检测模块的使用，该模块可以对密集和稀疏图像上的超分辨粒子执行高效的 PSA。从超分辨率图像获得的 PSA 结果已与人类注释者以及从相应 SEM 图像获得的结果进行了基准比较。所提出的模型展示了一种用于精确粒度估计的多模态图像平移和超分辨率的通用方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合两种条件生成对抗网络（cGANs）的多模态超分辨率方法，将光学显微镜（OM）图像转换为类似扫描电子显微镜（SEM）图像，以提升密集微观粒子尺寸估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 光学显微镜因分辨率低、焦深浅及衍射效应导致粒子尺寸分析（PSA）精度不足，需开发更高效的图像超分辨率技术以提高PSA可靠性。
AI.method: 通过组合两个cGANs实现OM图像到SEM图像的超分辨率转换，并设计自定义目标检测模块对超分辨率图像进行密集和稀疏粒子的PSA。
AI.result: 超分辨率图像的PSA结果在准确性上优于人工标注和对应SEM图像结果，验证了方法在多模态图像转换与超分辨率任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多模态图像翻译和超分辨率提供了通用解决方案，可显著提升微观粒子尺寸估计的精度与效率。

authors_text: Behrouz Rostami,D. M. Anisuzzaman,Chuanbo Wang,Sandeep Gopalakrishnan,Jeffrey Niezgoda,Zeyun Yu
title: Multiclass Wound Image Classification using an Ensemble Deep CNN-based Classifier
title_zh: 使用基于 CNN 的 Ensemble Deep 分类器进行多类伤口图像分类
comment: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine (2021)
comments: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine (2021)
abstract: Acute and chronic wounds are a challenge to healthcare systems around the world and affect many people's lives annually. Wound classification is a key step in wound diagnosis that would help clinicians to identify an optimal treatment procedure. Hence, having a high-performance classifier assists the specialists in the field to classify the wounds with less financial and time costs. Different machine learning and deep learning-based wound classification methods have been proposed in the literature. In this study, we have developed an ensemble Deep Convolutional Neural Network-based classifier to classify wound images including surgical, diabetic, and venous ulcers, into multi-classes. The output classification scores of two classifiers (patch-wise and image-wise) are fed into a Multi-Layer Perceptron to provide a superior classification performance. A 5-fold cross-validation approach is used to evaluate the proposed method. We obtained maximum and average classification accuracy values of 96.4% and 94.28% for binary and 91.9\% and 87.7\% for 3-class classification problems. The results show that our proposed method can be used effectively as a decision support system in classification of wound images or other related clinical applications.
summary: Acute and chronic wounds are a challenge to healthcare systems around the world and affect many people's lives annually. Wound classification is a key step in wound diagnosis that would help clinicians to identify an optimal treatment procedure. Hence, having a high-performance classifier assists the specialists in the field to classify the wounds with less financial and time costs. Different machine learning and deep learning-based wound classification methods have been proposed in the literature. In this study, we have developed an ensemble Deep Convolutional Neural Network-based classifier to classify wound images including surgical, diabetic, and venous ulcers, into multi-classes. The output classification scores of two classifiers (patch-wise and image-wise) are fed into a Multi-Layer Perceptron to provide a superior classification performance. A 5-fold cross-validation approach is used to evaluate the proposed method. We obtained maximum and average classification accuracy values of 96.4% and 94.28% for binary and 91.9\% and 87.7\% for 3-class classification problems. The results show that our proposed method can be used effectively as a decision support system in classification of wound images or other related clinical applications.
abstract_zh: 急性和慢性伤口对世界各地的医疗保健系统都是一个挑战，每年都会影响许多人的生活。伤口分类是伤口诊断的关键步骤，有助于临床医生确定最佳的治疗程序。因此，拥有高性能分类器可以帮助该领域的专家以更少的财务和时间成本对伤口进行分类。文献中已经提出了不同的基于机器学习和深度学习的伤口分类方法。在这项研究中，我们开发了一个基于深度卷积神经网络的集成分类器，将伤口图像（包括手术、糖尿病和静脉溃疡）分类为多个类别。两个分类器（补丁式和图像式）的输出分类分数被输入多层感知器以提供卓越的分类性能。使用五折交叉验证方法来评估所提出的方法。我们获得的二元分类问题的最大和平均分类准确度分别为 96.4% 和 94.28%，三类分类问题的最大和平均分类准确度分别为 91.9% 和 87.7%。结果表明，我们提出的方法可以有效地用作伤口图像分类或其他相关临床应用的决策支持系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集成深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的多类伤口图像分类方法，用于区分手术伤口、糖尿病溃疡和静脉溃疡等类型。
AI.motivation: 伤口分类是诊断关键步骤，传统方法成本高且耗时，需开发高性能分类器以辅助临床决策并降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 结合图像级和补丁级CNN分类器，将输出结果输入多层感知机（MLP）进行集成学习，并采用5折交叉验证评估性能。
AI.result: 二分类任务最高准确率96.4%（平均94.28%），三分类任务最高准确率91.9%（平均87.7%）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在伤口图像分类中表现优异，可有效作为临床决策支持系统应用于相关医疗场景。

A 5-fold cross-validation approach is used to evaluate the proposed method. We obtained maximum and average classification accuracy values of 96.4% and 94.28% for binary and 91.9\% and 87.7\% for 3-class classification problems. The results show that our proposed method can be used effectively as a decision support system in classification of wound images or other related clinical applications. 急性和慢性伤口对世界各地的医疗保健系统都是一个挑战，每年都会影响许多人的生活。伤口分类是伤口诊断的关键步骤，有助于临床医生确定最佳的治疗程序。因此，拥有高性能分类器可以帮助该领域的专家以更少的财务和时间成本对伤口进行分类。文献中已经提出了不同的基于机器学习和深度学习的伤口分类方法。在这项研究中，我们开发了一个基于深度卷积神经网络的集成分类器，将伤口图像（包括手术、糖尿病和静脉溃疡）分类为多个类别。两个分类器（补丁式和图像式）的输出分类分数被输入多层感知器以提供卓越的分类性能。使用五折交叉验证方法来评估所提出的方法。我们获得的二元分类问题的最大和平均分类准确度分别为 96.4% 和 94.28%，三类分类问题的最大和平均分类准确度分别为 91.9% 和 87.7%。结果表明，我们提出的方法可以有效地用作伤口图像分类或其他相关临床应用的决策支持系统。 本文提出一种基于集成深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的多类伤口图像分类方法，用于区分手术伤口、糖尿病溃疡和静脉溃疡等类型。 Behrouz Rostami,D. M. Anisuzzaman,Chuanbo Wang,Sandeep Gopalakrishnan,Jeffrey Niezgoda,Zeyun Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Zicong Zhang,Kimerly Powell,Changchang Yin,Shilei Cao,Dani Gonzalez,Yousef Hannawi,Ping Zhang
title: Brain Atlas Guided Attention U-Net for White Matter Hyperintensity Segmentation
title_zh: 用于白质高信号分割的 Brain Atlas 引导注意力 U-Net
comment: Accepted by AMIA 2021 Virtual Informatics Summit
comments: Accepted by AMIA 2021 Virtual Informatics Summit
abstract: White Matter Hyperintensities (WMH) are the most common manifestation of cerebral small vessel disease (cSVD) on the brain MRI. Accurate WMH segmentation algorithms are important to determine cSVD burden and its clinical consequences. Most of existing WMH segmentation algorithms require both fluid attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) images and T1-weighted images as inputs. However, T1-weighted images are typically not part of standard clinicalscans which are acquired for patients with acute stroke. In this paper, we propose a novel brain atlas guided attention U-Net (BAGAU-Net) that leverages only FLAIR images with a spatially-registered white matter (WM) brain atlas to yield competitive WMH segmentation performance. Specifically, we designed a dual-path segmentation model with two novel connecting mechanisms, namely multi-input attention module (MAM) and attention fusion module (AFM) to fuse the information from two paths for accurate results. Experiments on two publicly available datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed BAGAU-Net. With only FLAIR images and WM brain atlas, BAGAU-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art method with T1-weighted images, paving the way for effective development of WMH segmentation. Availability:https://github.com/Ericzhang1/BAGAU-Net

In this paper, we propose a novel brain atlas guided attention U-Net (BAGAU-Net) that leverages only FLAIR images with a spatially-registered white matter (WM) brain atlas to yield competitive WMH segmentation performance. Specifically, we designed a dual-path segmentation model with two novel connecting mechanisms, namely multi-input attention module (MAM) and attention fusion module (AFM) to fuse the information from two paths for accurate results. Experiments on two publicly available datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed BAGAU-Net. With only FLAIR images and WM brain atlas, BAGAU-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art method with T1-weighted images, paving the way for effective development of WMH segmentation. abstract_zh: 白质高信号 (WMH) 是脑部 MRI 上脑小血管疾病 (cSVD) 最常见的表现。准确的 WMH 分割算法对于确定 cSVD 负担及其临床后果非常重要。大多数现有的 WMH 分割算法都需要流体衰减反转恢复 (FLAIR) 图像和 T1 加权图像作为输入。然而，T1 加权图像通常不属于为急性中风患者采集的标准临床扫描的一部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的大脑图谱引导注意力 U-Net (BAGAU-Net)，它仅利用 FLAIR 图像和空间配准的白质 (WM) 大脑图谱来产生有竞争力的 WMH 分割性能。具体来说，我们设计了一种双路径分割模型，具有两种新颖的连接机制，即多输入注意模块（MAM）和注意融合模块（AFM），以融合来自两条路径的信息以获得准确的结果。对两个公开数据集的实验表明了所提出的 BAGAU-Net 的有效性。仅使用 FLAIR 图像和 WM 脑图谱，BAGAU-Net 就优于使用 T1 加权图像的最先进方法，为 WMH 分割的有效发展铺平了道路。可用性：https://github.com/Ericzhang1/BAGAU-Net

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脑图谱引导注意力机制的U-Net模型（BAGAU-Net），用于仅使用FLAIR图像和白质脑图谱进行白质高信号（WMH）分割。
AI.motivation: 现有WMH分割算法通常需要FLAIR和T1加权图像，但T1图像在急性卒中临床扫描中常缺失，限制了算法的应用场景。
AI.method: 设计双路径分割模型，包含多输入注意力模块（MAM）和注意力融合模块（AFM），通过空间注册的白质脑图谱引导注意力机制，仅依赖FLAIR图像实现分割。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，BAGAU-Net在仅使用FLAIR图像和脑图谱的情况下，性能优于需T1图像的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需T1图像即可实现高精度WMH分割，为急性卒中临床场景下的WMH分割提供了有效解决方案。

title: Learning to Reconstruct and Segment 3D Objects
title_zh: 学习重建和分割 3D 对象
comment: DPhil (PhD) Thesis 2020, University of Oxford https://ora.ox.ac.uk/objects/uuid:5f9cd30d-0ee7-412d-ba49-44f5fd76bf28
comments: DPhil (PhD) Thesis 2020, University of Oxford https://ora.ox.ac.uk/objects/uuid:5f9cd30d-0ee7-412d-ba49-44f5fd76bf28
abstract: To endow machines with the ability to perceive the real-world in a three dimensional representation as we do as humans is a fundamental and long-standing topic in Artificial Intelligence. Given different types of visual inputs such as images or point clouds acquired by 2D/3D sensors, one important goal is to understand the geometric structure and semantics of the 3D environment. Traditional approaches usually leverage hand-crafted features to estimate the shape and semantics of objects or scenes. However, they are difficult to generalize to novel objects and scenarios, and struggle to overcome critical issues caused by visual occlusions. By contrast, we aim to understand scenes and the objects within them by learning general and robust representations using deep neural networks, trained on large-scale real-world 3D data. To achieve these aims, this thesis makes three core contributions from object-level 3D shape estimation from single or multiple views to scene-level semantic understanding.
summary: To endow machines with the ability to perceive the real-world in a three dimensional representation as we do as humans is a fundamental and long-standing topic in Artificial Intelligence. Given different types of visual inputs such as images or point clouds acquired by 2D/3D sensors, one important goal is to understand the geometric structure and semantics of the 3D environment. Traditional approaches usually leverage hand-crafted features to estimate the shape and semantics of objects or scenes. However, they are difficult to generalize to novel objects and scenarios, and struggle to overcome critical issues caused by visual occlusions. By contrast, we aim to understand scenes and the objects within them by learning general and robust representations using deep neural networks, trained on large-scale real-world 3D data. To achieve these aims, this thesis makes three core contributions from object-level 3D shape estimation from single or multiple views to scene-level semantic understanding.
abstract_zh: 赋予机器像人类一样以三维表示形式感知现实世界的能力，是人工智能领域的一个基本且长期存在的主题。考虑到不同类型的视觉输入，例如 2D/3D 传感器获取的图像或点云，一个重要目标是了解 3D 环境的几何结构和语义。传统方法通常利用手工制作的特征来估计对象或场景的形状和语义。然而，它们很难推广到新的物体和场景，并且难以克服由视觉遮挡引起的关键问题。相比之下，我们的目标是通过使用在大规模现实世界 3D 数据上训练的深度神经网络学习通用且稳健的表示来理解场景及其中的对象。为了实现这些目标，本文从单视图或多视图的对象级 3D 形状估计到场景级语义理解做出了三个核心贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过深度学习方法，从单视图或多视图数据中重建和分割3D物体，并实现场景级语义理解。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手工特征，难以泛化到新物体和复杂场景，且难以处理视觉遮挡问题，需发展更通用的深度学习模型。
AI.method: 利用大规模真实3D数据训练深度神经网络，提出三种核心贡献：从单/多视角估计物体形状，到场景级语义理解的渐进式方法。
AI.result: 实现了对3D物体的鲁棒重建与分割，提升了复杂场景下语义理解的准确性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法为机器感知3D环境提供了更有效的解决方案，推动了AI在三维视觉领域的进展。

authors_text: Eduard Eiben,Fedor V. Fomin,Petr A. Golovach,William Lochet,Fahad Panolan,Kirill Simonov
title: EPTAS for $k$-means Clustering of Affine Subspaces
title_zh: $k$ 的 EPTAS - 表示仿射子空间的聚类
comment: To be published in Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA) 2021
comments: To be published in Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA) 2021
abstract: We consider a generalization of the fundamental $k$-means clustering for data with incomplete or corrupted entries. When data objects are represented by points in $\mathbb{R}^d$, a data point is said to be incomplete when some of its entries are missing or unspecified. An incomplete data point with at most $Δ$ unspecified entries corresponds to an axis-parallel affine subspace of dimension at most $Δ$, called a $Δ$-point. Thus we seek a partition of $n$ input $Δ$-points into $k$ clusters minimizing the $k$-means objective. For $Δ=0$, when all coordinates of each point are specified, this is the usual $k$-means clustering. We give an algorithm that finds an $(1+ ε)$-approximate solution in time $f(k,ε, Δ) \cdot n^2 \cdot d$ for some function $f$ of $k,ε$, and $Δ$ only.
summary: We consider a generalization of the fundamental $k$-means clustering for data with incomplete or corrupted entries. When data objects are represented by points in $\mathbb{R}^d$, a data point is said to be incomplete when some of its entries are missing or unspecified. An incomplete data point with at most $Δ$ unspecified entries corresponds to an axis-parallel affine subspace of dimension at most $Δ$, called a $Δ$-point. Thus we seek a partition of $n$ input $Δ$-points into $k$ clusters minimizing the $k$-means objective. For $Δ=0$, when all coordinates of each point are specified, this is the usual $k$-means clustering. We give an algorithm that finds an $(1+ ε)$-approximate solution in time $f(k,ε, Δ) \cdot n^2 \cdot d$ for some function $f$ of $k,ε$, and $Δ$ only.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑对具有不完整或损坏条目的数据进行基本 $k$ 均值聚类的概括。当数据对象由 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的点表示时，如果数据点的某些条目丢失或未指定，则该数据点被称为不完整。最多具有 $Δ$ 未指定条目的不完整数据点对应于维度最多 $Δ$ 的轴平行仿射子空间，称为 $Δ$ 点。因此，我们寻求将 $n$ 输入 $Δ$ 点划分为 $k$ 簇，从而最小化 $k$ 均值目标。对于$Δ=0$，当指定每个点的所有坐标时，这就是通常的$k$-均值聚类。我们给出一种算法，仅针对 $k、ε$ 和 $Δ$ 的某个函数 $f$ 在 $f(k,ε, Δ) \cdot n^2 \cdot d$ 时间内找到 $(1+ ε)$ 近似解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对存在缺失或损坏条目的数据的k-均值聚类算法，将不完整数据点建模为仿射子空间进行处理。
AI.motivation: 现实数据常存在缺失或损坏值，传统k-均值无法直接处理此类不完整数据，需设计新算法应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 将不完整数据点视为轴对齐的仿射子空间，设计一种参数化函数f(k,ε,Δ)的EPTAS算法，在n²d时间内求解(1+ε)-近似解。
AI.result: 提出了首个针对Δ-点的k-均值聚类EPTAS算法，时间复杂度仅依赖于k、ε、Δ参数及数据规模n和维度d。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了不完整数据聚类问题，在保证近似精度的同时实现了参数化的时间复杂度，扩展了k-均值的应用场景。

search_text: EPTAS for $k$-means Clustering of Affine Subspaces $k$ 的 EPTAS - 表示仿射子空间的聚类 We consider a generalization of the fundamental $k$-means clustering for data with incomplete or corrupted entries. When data objects are represented by points in $\mathbb{R}^d$, a data point is said to be incomplete when some of its entries are missing or unspecified. An incomplete data point with at most $Δ$ unspecified entries corresponds to an axis-parallel affine subspace of dimension at most $Δ$, called a $Δ$-point. Thus we seek a partition of $n$ input $Δ$-points into $k$ clusters minimizing the $k$-means objective. For $Δ=0$, when all coordinates of each point are specified, this is the usual $k$-means clustering. We give an algorithm that finds an $(1+ ε)$-approximate solution in time $f(k,ε, Δ) \cdot n^2 \cdot d$ for some function $f$ of $k,ε$, and $Δ$ only. 我们考虑对具有不完整或损坏条目的数据进行基本 $k$ 均值聚类的概括。当数据对象由 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的点表示时，如果数据点的某些条目丢失或未指定，则该数据点被称为不完整。最多具有 $Δ$ 未指定条目的不完整数据点对应于维度最多 $Δ$ 的轴平行仿射子空间，称为 $Δ$ 点。因此，我们寻求将 $n$ 输入 $Δ$ 点划分为 $k$ 簇，从而最小化 $k$ 均值目标。对于$Δ=0$，当指定每个点的所有坐标时，这就是通常的$k$-均值聚类。我们给出一种算法，仅针对 $k、ε$ 和 $Δ$ 的某个函数 $f$ 在 $f(k,ε, Δ) \cdot n^2 \cdot d$ 时间内找到 $(1+ ε)$ 近似解。 本文提出了一种针对存在缺失或损坏条目的数据的k-均值聚类算法，将不完整数据点建模为仿射子空间进行处理。 Eduard Eiben,Fedor V. Fomin,Petr A. Golovach,William Lochet,Fahad Panolan,Kirill Simonov cs.DS,cs.CG,cs.LG

title: Teacher-Student Competition for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无监督领域适应师生竞赛
comment: Accepted by ICPR 2020
comments: Accepted by ICPR 2020
abstract: With the supervision from source domain only in class-level, existing unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods mainly learn the domain-invariant representations from a shared feature extractor, which causes the source-bias problem. This paper proposes an unsupervised domain adaptation approach with Teacher-Student Competition (TSC). In particular, a student network is introduced to learn the target-specific feature space, and we design a novel competition mechanism to select more credible pseudo-labels for the training of student network. We introduce a teacher network with the structure of existing conventional UDA method, and both teacher and student networks compete to provide target pseudo-labels to constrain every target sample's training in student network. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed TSC framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods on Office-31 and ImageCLEF-DA benchmarks.
summary: With the supervision from source domain only in class-level, existing unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods mainly learn the domain-invariant representations from a shared feature extractor, which causes the source-bias problem. This paper proposes an unsupervised domain adaptation approach with Teacher-Student Competition (TSC). In particular, a student network is introduced to learn the target-specific feature space, and we design a novel competition mechanism to select more credible pseudo-labels for the training of student network. We introduce a teacher network with the structure of existing conventional UDA method, and both teacher and student networks compete to provide target pseudo-labels to constrain every target sample's training in student network. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed TSC framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods on Office-31 and ImageCLEF-DA benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 由于仅在类级别来自源域的监督，现有的无监督域适应（UDA）方法主要从共享特征提取器中学习域不变表示，这导致了源偏差问题。本文提出了一种采用师生竞赛（TSC）的无监督领域适应方法。特别是，引入了学生网络来学习特定目标的特征空间，并设计了一种新颖的竞争机制来选择更可信的伪标签来训练学生网络。我们引入了一个具有现有传统UDA方法结构的教师网络，教师网络和学生网络竞争提供目标伪标签来约束每个目标样本在学生网络中的训练。大量实验表明，我们提出的 TSC 框架在 Office-31 和 ImageCLEF-DA 基准测试上显着优于最先进的域适应方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于师生竞争的无监督域适应方法（TSC），以解决源域偏差问题，提升目标域上的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因仅依赖源域监督导致源域偏差，影响目标域性能，需改进伪标签生成机制。
AI.method: 提出师生竞争框架，学生网络学习目标特征并利用竞争机制筛选伪标签，教师网络提供伪标签与学生网络相互约束训练。
AI.result: 在Office-31和ImageCLEF-DA数据集上，TSC框架显著优于现有最先进的域适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 师生竞争机制有效缓解源域偏差，提升无监督域适应性能。

title: Introducing and Applying Newtonian Blurring: An Augmented Dataset of 126,000 Human Connectomes at braingraph.org
title_zh: 牛顿模糊的介绍和应用：braingraph.org 上 126,000 个人类连接体的增强数据集
abstract: Gaussian blurring is a well-established method for image data augmentation: it may generate a large set of images from a small set of pictures for training and testing purposes for Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications. When we apply AI for non-imagelike biological data, hardly any related method exists. Here we introduce the "Newtonian blurring" in human braingraph (or connectome) augmentation: Started from a dataset of 1053 subjects, we first repeat a probabilistic weighted braingraph construction algorithm 10 times for describing the connections of distinct cerebral areas, then take 7 repetitions in every possible way, delete the lower and upper extremes, and average the remaining 7-2=5 edge-weights for the data of each subject. This way we augment the 1053 graph-set to 120 x 1053 = 126,360 graphs. In augmentation techniques, it is an important requirement that no artificial additions should be introduced into the dataset. Gaussian blurring and also this Newtonian blurring satisfy this goal. The resulting dataset of 126,360 graphs, each in 5 resolutions (i.e., 631,800 graphs in total), is freely available at the site https://braingraph.org/cms/download-pit-group-connectomes/. Augmenting with Newtonian blurring may also be applicable in other non-image related fields, where probabilistic processing and data averaging are implemented.
summary: Gaussian blurring is a well-established method for image data augmentation: it may generate a large set of images from a small set of pictures for training and testing purposes for Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications. When we apply AI for non-imagelike biological data, hardly any related method exists. Here we introduce the "Newtonian blurring" in human braingraph (or connectome) augmentation: Started from a dataset of 1053 subjects, we first repeat a probabilistic weighted braingraph construction algorithm 10 times for describing the connections of distinct cerebral areas, then take 7 repetitions in every possible way, delete the lower and upper extremes, and average the remaining 7-2=5 edge-weights for the data of each subject. This way we augment the 1053 graph-set to 120 x 1053 = 126,360 graphs. In augmentation techniques, it is an important requirement that no artificial additions should be introduced into the dataset. Gaussian blurring and also this Newtonian blurring satisfy this goal. The resulting dataset of 126,360 graphs, each in 5 resolutions (i.e., 631,800 graphs in total), is freely available at the site https://braingraph.org/cms/download-pit-group-connectomes/. Augmenting with Newtonian blurring may also be applicable in other non-image related fields, where probabilistic processing and data averaging are implemented.
abstract_zh: 高斯模糊是一种行之有效的图像数据增强方法：它可以从一小组图片生成大量图像，用于人工智能 (AI) 应用程序的训练和测试目的。当我们将人工智能应用于非图像生物数据时，几乎不存在任何相关方法。在这里，我们介绍了人类脑图（或连接组）增强中的“牛顿模糊”：从 1053 个受试者的数据集开始，我们首先重复概率加权脑图构建算法 10 次来描述不同大脑区域的连接，然后以各种可能的方式重复 7 次，删除下限和上限，并对每个受试者的数据平均剩余的 7-2=5 边缘权重。这样我们将 1053 个图集增加到 120 x 1053 = 126,360 个图。在增强技术中，一个重要的要求是不得在数据集中引入人工添加。高斯模糊和牛顿模糊满足了这个目标。生成的数据集包含 126,360 个图表，每个图表有 5 种分辨率（即总共 631,800 个图表），可在网站 https://braingraph.org/cms/download-pit-group-connectomes/ 上免费获取。牛顿模糊增强也可以应用于其他非图像相关领域，其中实现了概率处理和数据平均。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'牛顿模糊'的新方法，用于对人类脑图谱（connectome）数据集进行扩充，生成包含126,360个图的增强数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯模糊方法适用于图像数据增强，但缺乏针对非图像类生物数据（如脑图谱）的扩充方法，需开发符合生物学特性的数据增强技术。
AI.method: 基于1053名受试者的原始数据，通过重复概率加权脑图构建算法10次，选取7次重复结果并剔除极端值后取平均，最终生成每个受试者5种分辨率的图，使数据集规模扩大至126,360个图。
AI.result: 成功构建包含631,800个图（5种分辨率）的脑图数据集，并通过braingraph.org平台公开，验证了牛顿模糊方法在非图像数据增强中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 牛顿模糊方法有效实现了非图像生物数据的无偏增强，为脑科学及其他需要概率处理的领域提供了可复用的数据扩充范式。

search_text: Introducing and Applying Newtonian Blurring: An Augmented Dataset of 126,000 Human Connectomes at braingraph.org 牛顿模糊的介绍和应用：braingraph.org 上 126,000 个人类连接体的增强数据集 Gaussian blurring is a well-established method for image data augmentation: it may generate a large set of images from a small set of pictures for training and testing purposes for Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications. When we apply AI for non-imagelike biological data, hardly any related method exists. Here we introduce the "Newtonian blurring" in human braingraph (or connectome) augmentation: Started from a dataset of 1053 subjects, we first repeat a probabilistic weighted braingraph construction algorithm 10 times for describing the connections of distinct cerebral areas, then take 7 repetitions in every possible way, delete the lower and upper extremes, and average the remaining 7-2=5 edge-weights for the data of each subject. This way we augment the 1053 graph-set to 120 x 1053 = 126,360 graphs. In augmentation techniques, it is an important requirement that no artificial additions should be introduced into the dataset. Gaussian blurring and also this Newtonian blurring satisfy this goal. The resulting dataset of 126,360 graphs, each in 5 resolutions (i.e., 631,800 graphs in total), is freely available at the site https://braingraph.org/cms/download-pit-group-connectomes/. Augmenting with Newtonian blurring may also be applicable in other non-image related fields, where probabilistic processing and data averaging are implemented. 高斯模糊是一种行之有效的图像数据增强方法：它可以从一小组图片生成大量图像，用于人工智能 (AI) 应用程序的训练和测试目的。当我们将人工智能应用于非图像生物数据时，几乎不存在任何相关方法。在这里，我们介绍了人类脑图（或连接组）增强中的“牛顿模糊”：从 1053 个受试者的数据集开始，我们首先重复概率加权脑图构建算法 10 次来描述不同大脑区域的连接，然后以各种可能的方式重复 7 次，删除下限和上限，并对每个受试者的数据平均剩余的 7-2=5 边缘权重。这样我们将 1053 个图集增加到 120 x 1053 = 126,360 个图。在增强技术中，一个重要的要求是不得在数据集中引入人工添加。高斯模糊和牛顿模糊满足了这个目标。生成的数据集包含 126,360 个图表，每个图表有 5 种分辨率（即总共 631,800 个图表），可在网站 https://braingraph.org/cms/download-pit-group-connectomes/ 上免费获取。牛顿模糊增强也可以应用于其他非图像相关领域，其中实现了概率处理和数据平均。 本文提出了一种名为'牛顿模糊'的新方法，用于对人类脑图谱（connectome）数据集进行扩充，生成包含126,360个图的增强数据集。 Laszlo Keresztes,Evelin Szogi,Balint Varga,Vince Grolmusz q-bio.NC,cs.AI

title: Solving relaxations of MAP-MRF problems: Combinatorial in-face Frank-Wolfe directions
title_zh: 解决 MAP-MRF 问题的松弛：组合面内 Frank-Wolfe 方向
comment: to appear at CVPR 2023
comments: to appear at CVPR 2023
abstract: We consider the problem of solving LP relaxations of MAP-MRF inference problems, and in particular the method proposed recently in (Swoboda, Kolmogorov 2019; Kolmogorov, Pock 2021). As a key computational subroutine, it uses a variant of the Frank-Wolfe (FW) method to minimize a smooth convex function over a combinatorial polytope. We propose an efficient implementation of this subproutine based on in-face Frank-Wolfe directions, introduced in (Freund et al. 2017) in a different context. More generally, we define an abstract data structure for a combinatorial subproblem that enables in-face FW directions, and describe its specialization for tree-structured MAP-MRF inference subproblems. Experimental results indicate that the resulting method is the current state-of-art LP solver for some classes of problems. Our code is available at https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/papers/IN-FACE-FW.html.
summary: We consider the problem of solving LP relaxations of MAP-MRF inference problems, and in particular the method proposed recently in (Swoboda, Kolmogorov 2019; Kolmogorov, Pock 2021). As a key computational subroutine, it uses a variant of the Frank-Wolfe (FW) method to minimize a smooth convex function over a combinatorial polytope. We propose an efficient implementation of this subproutine based on in-face Frank-Wolfe directions, introduced in (Freund et al. 2017) in a different context. More generally, we define an abstract data structure for a combinatorial subproblem that enables in-face FW directions, and describe its specialization for tree-structured MAP-MRF inference subproblems. Experimental results indicate that the resulting method is the current state-of-art LP solver for some classes of problems. Our code is available at https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/papers/IN-FACE-FW.html.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑解决 MAP-MRF 推理问题的 LP 松弛问题，特别是最近在（Swoboda，Kolmogorov 2019；Kolmogorov，Pock 2021）中提出的方法。作为关键的计算子程序，它使用 Frank-Wolfe (FW) 方法的变体来最小化组合多面体上的平滑凸函数。我们提出了基于面对面 Frank-Wolfe 方向的该子例程的有效实现，该方向在（Freund et al. 2017）中在不同的上下文中引入。更一般地，我们为组合子问题定义一个抽象数据结构，以实现面对面的 FW 方向，并描述其对树结构 MAP-MRF 推理子问题的专门化。实验结果表明，所得到的方法是当前针对某些类别问题最先进的 LP 求解器。我们的代码位于 https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/papers/IN-FACE-FW.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于'面内Frank-Wolfe方向'的高效算法，用于求解MAP-MRF问题的线性规划松弛问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的MAP-MRF问题求解方法在处理组合优化子问题时效率不足，需要更高效的计算方法来加速LP松弛求解过程。
AI.method: 通过引入'面内Frank-Wolfe方向'（源自Freund等2017年工作），设计抽象数据结构处理组合子问题，并针对树结构MAP-MRF问题进行方法特化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在部分问题类别中达到当前最优LP求解效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进Frank-Wolfe算法的子问题求解方式，显著提升了MAP-MRF问题LP松弛的求解效率，为相关领域提供了新的解决方案。

title: On the Generalisation Capabilities of Fingerprint Presentation Attack Detection Methods in the Short Wave Infrared Domain
title_zh: 短波红外域指纹呈现攻击检测方法的泛化能力
abstract: Nowadays, fingerprint-based biometric recognition systems are becoming increasingly popular. However, in spite of their numerous advantages, biometric capture devices are usually exposed to the public and thus vulnerable to presentation attacks (PAs). Therefore, presentation attack detection (PAD) methods are of utmost importance in order to distinguish between bona fide and attack presentations. Due to the nearly unlimited possibilities to create new presentation attack instruments (PAIs), unknown attacks are a threat to existing PAD algorithms. This fact motivates research on generalisation capabilities in order to find PAD methods that are resilient to new attacks. In this context, we evaluate the generalisability of multiple PAD algorithms on a dataset of 19,711 bona fide and 4,339 PA samples, including 45 different PAI species. The PAD data is captured in the short wave infrared domain and the results discuss the advantages and drawbacks of this PAD technique regarding unknown attacks.
summary: Nowadays, fingerprint-based biometric recognition systems are becoming increasingly popular. However, in spite of their numerous advantages, biometric capture devices are usually exposed to the public and thus vulnerable to presentation attacks (PAs). Therefore, presentation attack detection (PAD) methods are of utmost importance in order to distinguish between bona fide and attack presentations. Due to the nearly unlimited possibilities to create new presentation attack instruments (PAIs), unknown attacks are a threat to existing PAD algorithms. This fact motivates research on generalisation capabilities in order to find PAD methods that are resilient to new attacks. In this context, we evaluate the generalisability of multiple PAD algorithms on a dataset of 19,711 bona fide and 4,339 PA samples, including 45 different PAI species. The PAD data is captured in the short wave infrared domain and the results discuss the advantages and drawbacks of this PAD technique regarding unknown attacks.
abstract_zh: 如今，基于指纹的生物识别系统变得越来越流行。然而，尽管生物识别捕获设备具有众多优点，但它们通常暴露于公众，因此容易受到演示攻击 (PA)。因此，呈现攻击检测（PAD）方法对于区分真实呈现和攻击呈现至关重要。由于创建新的呈现攻击工具 (PAI) 的可能性几乎无限，未知攻击对现有 PAD 算法构成威胁。这一事实激发了对泛化能力的研究，以便找到能够抵御新攻击的 PAD 方法。在此背景下，我们在 19,711 个真实的 PA 样本和 4,339 个 PA 样本（包括 45 个不同的 PAI 物种）的数据集上评估了多种 PAD 算法的通用性。 PAD 数据在短波红外域中捕获，结果讨论了该 PAD 技术针对未知攻击的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多种指纹呈现攻击检测（PAD）方法在短波红外域中的泛化能力，以应对未知攻击。
AI.motivation: 由于现有PAD算法难以应对不断出现的新攻击手段，研究其泛化能力对于提升生物识别系统的安全性至关重要。
AI.method: 在短波红外域中，使用包含19,711个真实样本和4,339个攻击样本（涵盖45种攻击工具）的数据集，评估多种PAD算法的泛化性能。
AI.result: 实验结果分析了短波红外技术在检测未知攻击中的优缺点，揭示了部分算法对新型攻击的鲁棒性及局限性。
AI.conclusion: 短波红外域的PAD方法在应对未知攻击时表现潜力，但需进一步优化以提升跨攻击类型的泛化能力。

title: Domain Generalized Person Re-Identification via Cross-Domain Episodic Learning
title_zh: 通过跨域情景学习进行域广义人员重新识别
comment: Accepted to ICPR 2020
comments: Accepted to ICPR 2020
abstract: Aiming at recognizing images of the same person across distinct camera views, person re-identification (re-ID) has been among active research topics in computer vision. Most existing re-ID works require collection of a large amount of labeled image data from the scenes of interest. When the data to be recognized are different from the source-domain training ones, a number of domain adaptation approaches have been proposed. Nevertheless, one still needs to collect labeled or unlabelled target-domain data during training. In this paper, we tackle an even more challenging and practical setting, domain generalized (DG) person re-ID. That is, while a number of labeled source-domain datasets are available, we do not have access to any target-domain training data. In order to learn domain-invariant features without knowing the target domain of interest, we present an episodic learning scheme which advances meta learning strategies to exploit the observed source-domain labeled data. The learned features would exhibit sufficient domain-invariant properties while not overfitting the source-domain data or ID labels. Our experiments on four benchmark datasets confirm the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-arts.
summary: Aiming at recognizing images of the same person across distinct camera views, person re-identification (re-ID) has been among active research topics in computer vision. Most existing re-ID works require collection of a large amount of labeled image data from the scenes of interest. When the data to be recognized are different from the source-domain training ones, a number of domain adaptation approaches have been proposed. Nevertheless, one still needs to collect labeled or unlabelled target-domain data during training. In this paper, we tackle an even more challenging and practical setting, domain generalized (DG) person re-ID. That is, while a number of labeled source-domain datasets are available, we do not have access to any target-domain training data. In order to learn domain-invariant features without knowing the target domain of interest, we present an episodic learning scheme which advances meta learning strategies to exploit the observed source-domain labeled data. The learned features would exhibit sufficient domain-invariant properties while not overfitting the source-domain data or ID labels. Our experiments on four benchmark datasets confirm the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 人物重新识别（re-ID）旨在通过不同的摄像机视图识别同一个人的图像，一直是计算机视觉领域活跃的研究主题之一。大多数现有的重识别工作需要从感兴趣的场景中收集大量带标签的图像数据。当要识别的数据与源域训练数据不同时，已经提出了许多域自适应方法。尽管如此，在训练过程中仍然需要收集标记或未标记的目标域数据。在本文中，我们解决了更具挑战性和实用性的环境，即领域广义（DG）人员重新识别。也就是说，虽然有许多标记的源域数据集可用，但我们无法访问任何目标域训练数据。为了在不知道感兴趣的目标域的情况下学习域不变特征，我们提出了一种情景学习方案，该方案改进了元学习策略以利用观察到的源域标记数据。学习到的特征将表现出足够的域不变属性，同时不会过度拟合源域数据或 ID 标签。我们对四个基准数据集的实验证实了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨领域小样本学习方法，解决在没有目标域训练数据的情况下进行领域泛化的人体再识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖目标域数据进行训练，但实际场景中目标域数据往往不可获取，需开发无需目标域数据的领域泛化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于元学习的跨领域小样本学习框架，通过源域数据构建元训练任务，学习领域不变特征表示以适应未知目标域。

search_text: Domain Generalized Person Re-Identification via Cross-Domain Episodic Learning 通过跨域情景学习进行域广义人员重新识别 Aiming at recognizing images of the same person across distinct camera views, person re-identification (re-ID) has been among active research topics in computer vision. Most existing re-ID works require collection of a large amount of labeled image data from the scenes of interest. When the data to be recognized are different from the source-domain training ones, a number of domain adaptation approaches have been proposed. Nevertheless, one still needs to collect labeled or unlabelled target-domain data during training. In this paper, we tackle an even more challenging and practical setting, domain generalized (DG) person re-ID. That is, while a number of labeled source-domain datasets are available, we do not have access to any target-domain training data. In order to learn domain-invariant features without knowing the target domain of interest, we present an episodic learning scheme which advances meta learning strategies to exploit the observed source-domain labeled data. The learned features would exhibit sufficient domain-invariant properties while not overfitting the source-domain data or ID labels. Our experiments on four benchmark datasets confirm the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-arts. 人物重新识别（re-ID）旨在通过不同的摄像机视图识别同一个人的图像，一直是计算机视觉领域活跃的研究主题之一。大多数现有的重识别工作需要从感兴趣的场景中收集大量带标签的图像数据。当要识别的数据与源域训练数据不同时，已经提出了许多域自适应方法。尽管如此，在训练过程中仍然需要收集标记或未标记的目标域数据。在本文中，我们解决了更具挑战性和实用性的环境，即领域广义（DG）人员重新识别。也就是说，虽然有许多标记的源域数据集可用，但我们无法访问任何目标域训练数据。为了在不知道感兴趣的目标域的情况下学习域不变特征，我们提出了一种情景学习方案，该方案改进了元学习策略以利用观察到的源域标记数据。学习到的特征将表现出足够的域不变属性，同时不会过度拟合源域数据或 ID 标签。我们对四个基准数据集的实验证实了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。 本文提出一种跨领域小样本学习方法，解决在没有目标域训练数据的情况下进行领域泛化的人体再识别问题。 Ci-Siang Lin,Yuan-Chia Cheng,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Milind G. Padalkar,Carlos Beltrán-González,Matteo Bustreo,Alessio Del Bue,Vittorio Murino
title: A Versatile Crack Inspection Portable System based on Classifier Ensemble and Controlled Illumination
title_zh: 基于分类器集成和受控照明的多功能裂纹检测便携式系统
comment: Accepted in ICPR 2020
comments: Accepted in ICPR 2020
abstract: This paper presents a novel setup for automatic visual inspection of cracks in ceramic tile as well as studies the effect of various classifiers and height-varying illumination conditions for this task. The intuition behind this setup is that cracks can be better visualized under specific lighting conditions than others. Our setup, which is designed for field work with constraints in its maximum dimensions, can acquire images for crack detection with multiple lighting conditions using the illumination sources placed at multiple heights. Crack detection is then performed by classifying patches extracted from the acquired images in a sliding window fashion. We study the effect of lights placed at various heights by training classifiers both on customized as well as state-of-the-art architectures and evaluate their performance both at patch-level and image-level, demonstrating the effectiveness of our setup. More importantly, ours is the first study that demonstrates how height-varying illumination conditions can affect crack detection with the use of existing state-of-the-art classifiers. We provide an insight about the illumination conditions that can help in improving crack detection in a challenging real-world industrial environment.
summary: This paper presents a novel setup for automatic visual inspection of cracks in ceramic tile as well as studies the effect of various classifiers and height-varying illumination conditions for this task. The intuition behind this setup is that cracks can be better visualized under specific lighting conditions than others. Our setup, which is designed for field work with constraints in its maximum dimensions, can acquire images for crack detection with multiple lighting conditions using the illumination sources placed at multiple heights. Crack detection is then performed by classifying patches extracted from the acquired images in a sliding window fashion. We study the effect of lights placed at various heights by training classifiers both on customized as well as state-of-the-art architectures and evaluate their performance both at patch-level and image-level, demonstrating the effectiveness of our setup. More importantly, ours is the first study that demonstrates how height-varying illumination conditions can affect crack detection with the use of existing state-of-the-art classifiers. We provide an insight about the illumination conditions that can help in improving crack detection in a challenging real-world industrial environment.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种自动视觉检查瓷砖裂缝的新颖装置，并研究了各种分类器和高度变化的照明条件对该任务的影响。这种设置背后的直觉是，在特定的照明条件下，裂缝可以比其他条件更好地可视化。我们的装置专为最大尺寸限制的现场工作而设计，可以使用放置在多个高度的照明源在多种照明条件下获取图像以进行裂纹检测。然后通过以滑动窗口方式对从获取的图像中提取的补丁进行分类来执行裂纹检测。我们通过在定制和最先进的架构上训练分类器来研究放置在不同高度的灯光的效果，并评估它们在补丁级别和图像级别的性能，证明我们设置的有效性。更重要的是，我们的研究首次证明了高度变化的照明条件如何使用现有的最先进的分类器影响裂缝检测。我们提供有关照明条件的见解，有助于改善具有挑战性的现实工业环境中的裂纹检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分类器集成和受控照明的便携式裂纹检测系统，用于陶瓷砖裂纹检测，并研究不同照明高度对检测效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有裂纹检测方法在复杂工业环境下的鲁棒性不足，而特定照明条件可能提升裂纹可视化效果，需探索优化方案。
AI.method: 设计便携式多光源系统，通过多高度照明获取图像；采用滑动窗口提取图像块，结合定制及先进分类器进行分类，并在块级和图像级评估性能。
AI.result: 验证了多高度照明对裂纹检测的显著影响，证明系统有效性，并首次展示高度变化照明与先进分类器结合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 优化照明条件可显著提升裂纹检测性能，系统为工业场景提供实用解决方案，未来需进一步探索动态照明与自适应分类策略。

authors_text: Zhehua Zhou,Ozgur S. Oguz,Marion Leibold,Martin Buss
title: Learning a Low-dimensional Representation of a Safe Region for Safe Reinforcement Learning on Dynamical Systems
title_zh: 学习安全区域的低维表示，用于动态系统的安全强化学习
abstract: For safely applying reinforcement learning algorithms on high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems, a simplified system model is used to formulate a safe reinforcement learning framework. Based on the simplified system model, a low-dimensional representation of the safe region is identified and is used to provide safety estimates for learning algorithms. However, finding a satisfying simplified system model for complex dynamical systems usually requires a considerable amount of effort. To overcome this limitation, we propose in this work a general data-driven approach that is able to efficiently learn a low-dimensional representation of the safe region. Through an online adaptation method, the low-dimensional representation is updated by using the feedback data such that more accurate safety estimates are obtained. The performance of the proposed approach for identifying the low-dimensional representation of the safe region is demonstrated with a quadcopter example. The results show that, compared to previous work, a more reliable and representative low-dimensional representation of the safe region is derived, which then extends the applicability of the safe reinforcement learning framework.
summary: For safely applying reinforcement learning algorithms on high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems, a simplified system model is used to formulate a safe reinforcement learning framework. Based on the simplified system model, a low-dimensional representation of the safe region is identified and is used to provide safety estimates for learning algorithms. However, finding a satisfying simplified system model for complex dynamical systems usually requires a considerable amount of effort. To overcome this limitation, we propose in this work a general data-driven approach that is able to efficiently learn a low-dimensional representation of the safe region. Through an online adaptation method, the low-dimensional representation is updated by using the feedback data such that more accurate safety estimates are obtained. The performance of the proposed approach for identifying the low-dimensional representation of the safe region is demonstrated with a quadcopter example. The results show that, compared to previous work, a more reliable and representative low-dimensional representation of the safe region is derived, which then extends the applicability of the safe reinforcement learning framework.
abstract_zh: 为了在高维非线性动力系统上安全地应用强化学习算法，使用简化的系统模型来制定安全的强化学习框架。基于简化的系统模型，识别安全区域的低维表示并用于为学习算法提供安全估计。然而，为复杂的动力系统找到令人满意的简化系统模型通常需要付出相当大的努力。为了克服这一限制，我们在这项工作中提出了一种通用的数据驱动方法，能够有效地学习安全区域的低维表示。通过在线适应方法，利用反馈数据更新低维表示，从而获得更准确的安全估计。通过四轴飞行器示例演示了所提出的识别安全区域低维表示的方法的性能。结果表明，与之前的工作相比，导出了更可靠、更具代表性的安全区域低维表示，从而扩展了安全强化学习框架的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动方法，用于高效学习动力系统安全区域的低维表示，以增强安全强化学习框架的适用性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖复杂简化模型构建安全区域表示，但该过程耗时且难以适应复杂系统，需更高效的数据驱动方案。
AI.method: 设计在线适应机制，通过实时反馈数据动态更新低维安全区域表示，结合数据驱动策略提升安全估计精度。
AI.result: 四旋翼实验验证了方法有效性，相比现有技术获得更可靠且具代表性的安全区域低维表示，显著扩展框架应用范围。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可高效生成安全区域低维表示，为复杂动力系统的安全强化学习提供了更通用且实用的解决方案。

search_text: Learning a Low-dimensional Representation of a Safe Region for Safe Reinforcement Learning on Dynamical Systems 学习安全区域的低维表示，用于动态系统的安全强化学习 For safely applying reinforcement learning algorithms on high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems, a simplified system model is used to formulate a safe reinforcement learning framework. Based on the simplified system model, a low-dimensional representation of the safe region is identified and is used to provide safety estimates for learning algorithms. However, finding a satisfying simplified system model for complex dynamical systems usually requires a considerable amount of effort. To overcome this limitation, we propose in this work a general data-driven approach that is able to efficiently learn a low-dimensional representation of the safe region. Through an online adaptation method, the low-dimensional representation is updated by using the feedback data such that more accurate safety estimates are obtained. The performance of the proposed approach for identifying the low-dimensional representation of the safe region is demonstrated with a quadcopter example. The results show that, compared to previous work, a more reliable and representative low-dimensional representation of the safe region is derived, which then extends the applicability of the safe reinforcement learning framework. 为了在高维非线性动力系统上安全地应用强化学习算法，使用简化的系统模型来制定安全的强化学习框架。基于简化的系统模型，识别安全区域的低维表示并用于为学习算法提供安全估计。然而，为复杂的动力系统找到令人满意的简化系统模型通常需要付出相当大的努力。为了克服这一限制，我们在这项工作中提出了一种通用的数据驱动方法，能够有效地学习安全区域的低维表示。通过在线适应方法，利用反馈数据更新低维表示，从而获得更准确的安全估计。通过四轴飞行器示例演示了所提出的识别安全区域低维表示的方法的性能。结果表明，与之前的工作相比，导出了更可靠、更具代表性的安全区域低维表示，从而扩展了安全强化学习框架的适用性。 本文提出了一种数据驱动方法，用于高效学习动力系统安全区域的低维表示，以增强安全强化学习框架的适用性。 Zhehua Zhou,Ozgur S. Oguz,Marion Leibold,Martin Buss cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zhe Ming Chng,Joseph Mun Hung Lew,Jimmy Addison Lee
title: RONELD: Robust Neural Network Output Enhancement for Active Lane Detection
title_zh: RONELD：用于主动车道检测的鲁棒神经网络输出增强
comment: Fixed typos; Accepted at ICPR 2020, 8 pages, 6 figures, code to be published at http://github.com/czming/RONELD-Lane-Detection
comments: Fixed typos; Accepted at ICPR 2020, 8 pages, 6 figures, code to be published at http://github.com/czming/RONELD-Lane-Detection
abstract: Accurate lane detection is critical for navigation in autonomous vehicles, particularly the active lane which demarcates the single road space that the vehicle is currently traveling on. Recent state-of-the-art lane detection algorithms utilize convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to train deep learning models on popular benchmarks such as TuSimple and CULane. While each of these models works particularly well on train and test inputs obtained from the same dataset, the performance drops significantly on unseen datasets of different environments. In this paper, we present a real-time robust neural network output enhancement for active lane detection (RONELD) method to identify, track, and optimize active lanes from deep learning probability map outputs. We first adaptively extract lane points from the probability map outputs, followed by detecting curved and straight lanes before using weighted least squares linear regression on straight lanes to fix broken lane edges resulting from fragmentation of edge maps in real images. Lastly, we hypothesize true active lanes through tracking preceding frames. Experimental results demonstrate an up to two-fold increase in accuracy using RONELD on cross-dataset validation tests.
summary: Accurate lane detection is critical for navigation in autonomous vehicles, particularly the active lane which demarcates the single road space that the vehicle is currently traveling on. Recent state-of-the-art lane detection algorithms utilize convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to train deep learning models on popular benchmarks such as TuSimple and CULane. While each of these models works particularly well on train and test inputs obtained from the same dataset, the performance drops significantly on unseen datasets of different environments. In this paper, we present a real-time robust neural network output enhancement for active lane detection (RONELD) method to identify, track, and optimize active lanes from deep learning probability map outputs. We first adaptively extract lane points from the probability map outputs, followed by detecting curved and straight lanes before using weighted least squares linear regression on straight lanes to fix broken lane edges resulting from fragmentation of edge maps in real images. Lastly, we hypothesize true active lanes through tracking preceding frames. Experimental results demonstrate an up to two-fold increase in accuracy using RONELD on cross-dataset validation tests.
abstract_zh: 准确的车道检测对于自动驾驶车辆的导航至关重要，特别是划分车辆当前行驶的单一道路空间的活动车道。最近最先进的车道检测算法利用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在 TuSimple 和 CULane 等流行基准上训练深度学习模型。虽然这些模型在从同一数据集获得的训练和测试输入上效果特别好，但在不同环境的未见过的数据集上性能显着下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于主动车道检测（RONELD）方法的实时鲁棒神经网络输出增强方法，用于从深度学习概率图输出中识别、跟踪和优化主动车道。我们首先从概率图输出中自适应地提取车道点，然后检测弯曲和直线车道，然后在直线车道上使用加权最小二乘线性回归来修复因真实图像中边缘图碎片而导致的破损车道边缘。最后，我们通过跟踪前面的帧来假设真正的活动车道。实验结果表明，使用 RONELD 进行跨数据集验证测试时，准确度提高了两倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RONELD方法，通过增强神经网络输出来提升自动驾驶中主动车道检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有车道检测模型在跨环境数据集上表现不佳，需提升模型在不同场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 自适应提取概率图中的车道点，区分曲线和直线车道，采用加权最小二乘回归修复断裂边缘，并通过帧间追踪推测真实主动车道。
AI.result: 在跨数据集验证中，RONELD方法使准确率提升最高达两倍。
AI.conclusion: RONELD通过增强神经网络输出和动态优化，有效提升了主动车道检测在不同环境下的性能。

title: Model-based Policy Optimization with Unsupervised Model Adaptation
title_zh: 具有无监督模型适应的基于模型的策略优化
comment: Thirty-fourth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020)
comments: Thirty-fourth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020)
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning methods learn a dynamics model with real data sampled from the environment and leverage it to generate simulated data to derive an agent. However, due to the potential distribution mismatch between simulated data and real data, this could lead to degraded performance. Despite much effort being devoted to reducing this distribution mismatch, existing methods fail to solve it explicitly. In this paper, we investigate how to bridge the gap between real and simulated data due to inaccurate model estimation for better policy optimization. To begin with, we first derive a lower bound of the expected return, which naturally inspires a bound maximization algorithm by aligning the simulated and real data distributions. To this end, we propose a novel model-based reinforcement learning framework AMPO, which introduces unsupervised model adaptation to minimize the integral probability metric (IPM) between feature distributions from real and simulated data. Instantiating our framework with Wasserstein-1 distance gives a practical model-based approach. Empirically, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of sample efficiency on a range of continuous control benchmark tasks.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning methods learn a dynamics model with real data sampled from the environment and leverage it to generate simulated data to derive an agent. However, due to the potential distribution mismatch between simulated data and real data, this could lead to degraded performance. Despite much effort being devoted to reducing this distribution mismatch, existing methods fail to solve it explicitly. In this paper, we investigate how to bridge the gap between real and simulated data due to inaccurate model estimation for better policy optimization. To begin with, we first derive a lower bound of the expected return, which naturally inspires a bound maximization algorithm by aligning the simulated and real data distributions. To this end, we propose a novel model-based reinforcement learning framework AMPO, which introduces unsupervised model adaptation to minimize the integral probability metric (IPM) between feature distributions from real and simulated data. Instantiating our framework with Wasserstein-1 distance gives a practical model-based approach. Empirically, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of sample efficiency on a range of continuous control benchmark tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的强化学习方法使用从环境中采样的真实数据学习动态模型，并利用它生成模拟数据来派生代理。然而，由于模拟数据和真实数据之间潜在的分布不匹配，这可能会导致性能下降。尽管付出了很多努力来减少这种分布不匹配，但现有方法无法明确解决它。在本文中，我们研究如何弥合由于模型估计不准确而导致的真实数据与模拟数据之间的差距，以实现更好的策略优化。首先，我们首先得出预期回报的下限，这自然会通过对齐模拟数据分布和真实数据分布来激发边界最大化算法。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的强化学习框架 AMPO，它引入了无监督模型自适应，以最小化真实数据和模拟数据的特征分布之间的积分概率度量（IPM）。使用 Wasserstein-1 距离实例化我们的框架提供了一种实用的基于模型的方法。根据经验，我们的方法在一系列连续控制基准任务的样本效率方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的强化学习框架AMPO，通过无监督模型适应来解决真实数据与模拟数据之间的分布不匹配问题，从而提升策略优化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型的强化学习方法因模拟数据与真实数据的分布不匹配导致性能下降，而现有方法未能显式解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出AMPO框架，引入无监督模型适应机制，通过最小化真实数据与模拟数据特征分布间的积分概率度量（IPM），具体实例化为Wasserstein-1距离。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制基准任务中，该方法在样本效率方面达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过桥接真实与模拟数据分布差距，AMPO框架有效提升了基于模型的策略优化性能，为解决分布不匹配问题提供了新思路。

However, due to the potential distribution mismatch between simulated data and real data, this could lead to degraded performance. Despite much effort being devoted to reducing this distribution mismatch, existing methods fail to solve it explicitly. In this paper, we investigate how to bridge the gap between real and simulated data due to inaccurate model estimation for better policy optimization. To begin with, we first derive a lower bound of the expected return, which naturally inspires a bound maximization algorithm by aligning the simulated and real data distributions. Instantiating our framework with Wasserstein-1 distance gives a practical model-based approach. title: CLAR: Contrastive Learning of Auditory Representations
title_zh: CLAR：听觉表征的对比学习
abstract: Learning rich visual representations using contrastive self-supervised learning has been extremely successful. However, it is still a major question whether we could use a similar approach to learn superior auditory representations. In this paper, we expand on prior work (SimCLR) to learn better auditory representations. We (1) introduce various data augmentations suitable for auditory data and evaluate their impact on predictive performance, (2) show that training with time-frequency audio features substantially improves the quality of the learned representations compared to raw signals, and (3) demonstrate that training with both supervised and contrastive losses simultaneously improves the learned representations compared to self-supervised pre-training followed by supervised fine-tuning. We illustrate that by combining all these methods and with substantially less labeled data, our framework (CLAR) achieves significant improvement on prediction performance compared to supervised approach. Moreover, compared to self-supervised approach, our framework converges faster with significantly better representations.
summary: Learning rich visual representations using contrastive self-supervised learning has been extremely successful. However, it is still a major question whether we could use a similar approach to learn superior auditory representations. In this paper, we expand on prior work (SimCLR) to learn better auditory representations. We (1) introduce various data augmentations suitable for auditory data and evaluate their impact on predictive performance, (2) show that training with time-frequency audio features substantially improves the quality of the learned representations compared to raw signals, and (3) demonstrate that training with both supervised and contrastive losses simultaneously improves the learned representations compared to self-supervised pre-training followed by supervised fine-tuning. We illustrate that by combining all these methods and with substantially less labeled data, our framework (CLAR) achieves significant improvement on prediction performance compared to supervised approach. Moreover, compared to self-supervised approach, our framework converges faster with significantly better representations.
abstract_zh: 使用对比自我监督学习来学习丰富的视觉表征非常成功。然而，我们是否可以使用类似的方法来学习更好的听觉表征仍然是一个主要问题。在本文中，我们扩展了先前的工作（SimCLR）以学习更好的听觉表征。我们（1）引入了适合听觉数据的各种数据增强，并评估了它们对预测性能的影响，（2）表明，与原始信号相比，使用时频音频特征进行训练大大提高了学习表示的质量，（3）证明与自监督预训练和监督微调相比，使用监督损失和对比损失进行训练同时改善了学习表示。我们说明，通过结合所有这些方法和大幅减少标记数据，与监督方法相比，我们的框架（CLAR）在预测性能方面取得了显着改进。此外，与自监督方法相比，我们的框架收敛速度更快，表示效果明显更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLAR框架，通过对比学习方法改进听觉表示学习，结合数据增强、时频特征和联合损失函数以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管对比自监督学习在视觉领域成功，但其在听觉表示学习中的有效性尚未明确，需探索适合音频的数据增强和特征表示方法。
AI.method: 引入音频专用数据增强技术，采用时频特征替代原始信号，并同时使用监督损失与对比损失进行联合训练。
AI.result: CLAR在较少标注数据下显著优于监督方法，在收敛速度和表示质量上均超越自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合数据增强、时频特征和联合损失的对比学习框架能有效提升听觉表示学习的性能与效率。

search_text: CLAR: Contrastive Learning of Auditory Representations CLAR：听觉表征的对比学习 Learning rich visual representations using contrastive self-supervised learning has been extremely successful. However, it is still a major question whether we could use a similar approach to learn superior auditory representations. In this paper, we expand on prior work (SimCLR) to learn better auditory representations. We (1) introduce various data augmentations suitable for auditory data and evaluate their impact on predictive performance, (2) show that training with time-frequency audio features substantially improves the quality of the learned representations compared to raw signals, and (3) demonstrate that training with both supervised and contrastive losses simultaneously improves the learned representations compared to self-supervised pre-training followed by supervised fine-tuning. We illustrate that by combining all these methods and with substantially less labeled data, our framework (CLAR) achieves significant improvement on prediction performance compared to supervised approach. Moreover, compared to self-supervised approach, our framework converges faster with significantly better representations. 使用对比自我监督学习来学习丰富的视觉表征非常成功。然而，我们是否可以使用类似的方法来学习更好的听觉表征仍然是一个主要问题。在本文中，我们扩展了先前的工作（SimCLR）以学习更好的听觉表征。我们（1）引入了适合听觉数据的各种数据增强，并评估了它们对预测性能的影响，（2）表明，与原始信号相比，使用时频音频特征进行训练大大提高了学习表示的质量，（3）证明与自监督预训练和监督微调相比，使用监督损失和对比损失进行训练同时改善了学习表示。我们说明，通过结合所有这些方法和大幅减少标记数据，与监督方法相比，我们的框架（CLAR）在预测性能方面取得了显着改进。此外，与自监督方法相比，我们的框架收敛速度更快，表示效果明显更好。 本文提出CLAR框架，通过对比学习方法改进听觉表示学习，结合数据增强、时频特征和联合损失函数以提升性能。 Haider Al-Tahan,Yalda Mohsenzadeh cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Hongyao Tang,Zhaopeng Meng,Jianye Hao,Chen Chen,Daniel Graves,Dong Li,Changmin Yu,Hangyu Mao,Wulong Liu,Yaodong Yang,Wenyuan Tao,Li Wang
title: What About Inputing Policy in Value Function: Policy Representation and Policy-extended Value Function Approximator
title_zh: 在价值函数中输入策略怎么样：策略表示和策略扩展价值函数逼近器
comment: Accepted as a conference paper on AAAI 2022
comments: Accepted as a conference paper on AAAI 2022
abstract: We study Policy-extended Value Function Approximator (PeVFA) in Reinforcement Learning (RL), which extends conventional value function approximator (VFA) to take as input not only the state (and action) but also an explicit policy representation. Such an extension enables PeVFA to preserve values of multiple policies at the same time and brings an appealing characteristic, i.e., \emph{value generalization among policies}. We formally analyze the value generalization under Generalized Policy Iteration (GPI). From theoretical and empirical lens, we show that generalized value estimates offered by PeVFA may have lower initial approximation error to true values of successive policies, which is expected to improve consecutive value approximation during GPI. Based on above clues, we introduce a new form of GPI with PeVFA which leverages the value generalization along policy improvement path. Moreover, we propose a representation learning framework for RL policy, providing several approaches to learn effective policy embeddings from policy network parameters or state-action pairs. In our experiments, we evaluate the efficacy of value generalization offered by PeVFA and policy representation learning in several OpenAI Gym continuous control tasks. For a representative instance of algorithm implementation, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) re-implemented under the paradigm of GPI with PeVFA achieves about 40\% performance improvement on its vanilla counterpart in most environments.
summary: We study Policy-extended Value Function Approximator (PeVFA) in Reinforcement Learning (RL), which extends conventional value function approximator (VFA) to take as input not only the state (and action) but also an explicit policy representation. Such an extension enables PeVFA to preserve values of multiple policies at the same time and brings an appealing characteristic, i.e., \emph{value generalization among policies}. We formally analyze the value generalization under Generalized Policy Iteration (GPI). From theoretical and empirical lens, we show that generalized value estimates offered by PeVFA may have lower initial approximation error to true values of successive policies, which is expected to improve consecutive value approximation during GPI. Based on above clues, we introduce a new form of GPI with PeVFA which leverages the value generalization along policy improvement path. Moreover, we propose a representation learning framework for RL policy, providing several approaches to learn effective policy embeddings from policy network parameters or state-action pairs. In our experiments, we evaluate the efficacy of value generalization offered by PeVFA and policy representation learning in several OpenAI Gym continuous control tasks. For a representative instance of algorithm implementation, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) re-implemented under the paradigm of GPI with PeVFA achieves about 40\% performance improvement on its vanilla counterpart in most environments.
abstract_zh: 我们研究强化学习（RL）中的策略扩展价值函数逼近器（PeVFA），它扩展了传统的价值函数逼近器（VFA），不仅将状态（和动作）作为输入，而且还将明确的策略表示作为输入。这样的扩展使得 PeVFA 能够同时保留多个策略的值，并带来一个吸引人的特性，即 \emph{策略之间的值泛化}。我们正式分析了广义策略迭代（GPI）下的价值泛化。从理论和经验的角度来看，我们表明 PeVFA 提供的广义价值估计可能对连续政策的真实值具有较低的初始近似误差，这有望改善 GPI 期间的连续价值近似。基于上述线索，我们引入了一种新形式的 GPI 和 PeVFA，它利用政策改进路径上的价值泛化。此外，我们提出了一种强化学习策略的表示学习框架，提供了几种从策略网络参数或状态-动作对中学习有效策略嵌入的方法。在我们的实验中，我们评估了 PeVFA 和策略表示学习在多个 OpenAI Gym 连续控制任务中提供的价值泛化的功效。对于算法实现的代表性实例，在 GPI 范式下使用 PeVFA 重新实现的近端策略优化 (PPO) 在大多数环境中比普通策略优化 (PPO) 实现了约 40\% 的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的值函数近似器（PeVFA），通过将策略表示作为输入，扩展传统值函数近似器，以实现策略间的值泛化，提升强化学习中的策略迭代效率。
AI.motivation: 传统值函数近似器无法同时保存多个策略的值，导致策略迭代过程中需要重复计算，影响效率。通过引入策略表示，可实现策略间的值泛化，降低近似误差。
AI.method: 设计PeVFA，将策略表示与状态、动作结合输入；理论分析其在GPI框架下的值泛化特性；提出策略表示学习框架，从策略网络参数或状态-动作对中学习有效嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明，PeVFA在多个连续控制任务中显著提升性能，基于PeVFA的PPO算法相比原始版本平均提升约40%。
AI.conclusion: PeVFA通过策略表示和值泛化增强了GPI的效率，策略表示学习框架为强化学习提供了新的方法，未来可进一步探索其在复杂任务中的应用。

authors_text: Yifan Zhang,Qian Xu,Jianping Wang,Kui Wu,Zuduo Zheng,Kejie Lu
title: A Learning-based Discretionary Lane-Change Decision-Making Model with Driving Style Awareness
title_zh: 具有驾驶风格意识的基于学习的自主变道决策模型
abstract: Discretionary lane change (DLC) is a basic but complex maneuver in driving, which aims at reaching a faster speed or better driving conditions, e.g., further line of sight or better ride quality. Although many DLC decision-making models have been studied in traffic engineering and autonomous driving, the impact of human factors, which is an integral part of current and future traffic flow, is largely ignored in the existing literature. In autonomous driving, the ignorance of human factors of surrounding vehicles will lead to poor interaction between the ego vehicle and the surrounding vehicles, thus, a high risk of accidents. The human factors are also a crucial part to simulate a human-like traffic flow in the traffic engineering area. In this paper, we integrate the human factors that are represented by driving styles to design a new DLC decision-making model. Specifically, our proposed model takes not only the contextual traffic information but also the driving styles of surrounding vehicles into consideration and makes lane-change/keep decisions. Moreover, the model can imitate human drivers' decision-making maneuvers to the greatest extent by learning the driving style of the ego vehicle. Our evaluation results show that the proposed model almost follows the human decision-making maneuvers, which can achieve 98.66% prediction accuracy with respect to human drivers' decisions against the ground truth. Besides, the lane-change impact analysis results demonstrate that our model even performs better than human drivers in terms of improving the safety and speed of traffic.
summary: Discretionary lane change (DLC) is a basic but complex maneuver in driving, which aims at reaching a faster speed or better driving conditions, e.g., further line of sight or better ride quality. Although many DLC decision-making models have been studied in traffic engineering and autonomous driving, the impact of human factors, which is an integral part of current and future traffic flow, is largely ignored in the existing literature. In autonomous driving, the ignorance of human factors of surrounding vehicles will lead to poor interaction between the ego vehicle and the surrounding vehicles, thus, a high risk of accidents. The human factors are also a crucial part to simulate a human-like traffic flow in the traffic engineering area. In this paper, we integrate the human factors that are represented by driving styles to design a new DLC decision-making model. Specifically, our proposed model takes not only the contextual traffic information but also the driving styles of surrounding vehicles into consideration and makes lane-change/keep decisions. Moreover, the model can imitate human drivers' decision-making maneuvers to the greatest extent by learning the driving style of the ego vehicle. Our evaluation results show that the proposed model almost follows the human decision-making maneuvers, which can achieve 98.66% prediction accuracy with respect to human drivers' decisions against the ground truth. Besides, the lane-change impact analysis results demonstrate that our model even performs better than human drivers in terms of improving the safety and speed of traffic.
abstract_zh: 自主变道（DLC）是一种基本但复杂的驾驶操作，其目的是达到更快的速度或更好的驾驶条件，例如更远的视线或更好的乘坐质量。尽管在交通工程和自动驾驶领域已经研究了许多DLC决策模型，但现有文献很大程度上忽略了人为因素的影响，而人为因素是当前和未来交通流的组成部分。在自动驾驶中，对周围车辆的人为因素的忽视会导致本车与周围车辆之间的互动不良，从而导致发生事故的风险很高。人为因素也是交通工程领域模拟类人交通流的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们整合了以驾驶风格为代表的人为因素，设计了一种新的DLC决策模型。具体来说，我们提出的模型不仅考虑上下文交通信息，还考虑周围车辆的驾驶风格，并做出变道/保持决策。此外，该模型可以通过学习自我车辆的驾驶风格来最大程度地模仿人类驾驶员的决策操作。我们的评估结果表明，所提出的模型几乎遵循人类的决策操作，对于人类驾驶员相对于地面真实情况的决策可以达到 98.66% 的预测精度。此外，变道影响分析结果表明，我们的模型在提高交通安全性和速度方面甚至比人类驾驶员表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的具有驾驶风格感知的自主决策模型，用于改进驾驶中的随意变道决策。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了人类驾驶因素对交通流的影响，导致自动驾驶车辆与周围车辆交互不良，增加事故风险，并影响交通仿真真实性。
AI.method: 设计融合上下文交通信息及周围车辆驾驶风格的深度学习模型，通过学习本车驾驶风格模仿人类决策过程。
AI.result: 模型对人类决策预测准确率达98.66%，在提升交通安全性和通行效率方面优于人类驾驶表现。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效整合驾驶风格因素，为自动驾驶交互决策和交通流仿真提供了更安全高效的解决方案。
