search_text: A Learning-based Discretionary Lane-Change Decision-Making Model with Driving Style Awareness 具有驾驶风格意识的基于学习的自主变道决策模型 Discretionary lane change (DLC) is a basic but complex maneuver in driving, which aims at reaching a faster speed or better driving conditions, e.g., further line of sight or better ride quality. Although many DLC decision-making models have been studied in traffic engineering and autonomous driving, the impact of human factors, which is an integral part of current and future traffic flow, is largely ignored in the existing literature. In autonomous driving, the ignorance of human factors of surrounding vehicles will lead to poor interaction between the ego vehicle and the surrounding vehicles, thus, a high risk of accidents. The human factors are also a crucial part to simulate a human-like traffic flow in the traffic engineering area. In this paper, we integrate the human factors that are represented by driving styles to design a new DLC decision-making model. Specifically, our proposed model takes not only the contextual traffic information but also the driving styles of surrounding vehicles into consideration and makes lane-change/keep decisions. Moreover, the model can imitate human drivers' decision-making maneuvers to the greatest extent by learning the driving style of the ego vehicle. Our evaluation results show that the proposed model almost follows the human decision-making maneuvers, which can achieve 98.66% prediction accuracy with respect to human drivers' decisions against the ground truth. Besides, the lane-change impact analysis results demonstrate that our model even performs better than human drivers in terms of improving the safety and speed of traffic. 自主变道（DLC）是一种基本但复杂的驾驶操作，其目的是达到更快的速度或更好的驾驶条件，例如更远的视线或更好的乘坐质量。尽管在交通工程和自动驾驶领域已经研究了许多DLC决策模型，但现有文献很大程度上忽略了人为因素的影响，而人为因素是当前和未来交通流的组成部分。在自动驾驶中，对周围车辆的人为因素的忽视会导致本车与周围车辆之间的互动不良，从而导致发生事故的风险很高。人为因素也是交通工程领域模拟类人交通流的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们整合了以驾驶风格为代表的人为因素，设计了一种新的DLC决策模型。具体来说，我们提出的模型不仅考虑上下文交通信息，还考虑周围车辆的驾驶风格，并做出变道/保持决策。此外，该模型可以通过学习自我车辆的驾驶风格来最大程度地模仿人类驾驶员的决策操作。我们的评估结果表明，所提出的模型几乎遵循人类的决策操作，对于人类驾驶员相对于地面真实情况的决策可以达到 98.66% 的预测精度。此外，变道影响分析结果表明，我们的模型在提高交通安全性和速度方面甚至比人类驾驶员表现更好。 本文提出一种基于学习的具有驾驶风格感知的自主决策模型，用于改进驾驶中的随意变道决策。 Yifan Zhang,Qian Xu,Jianping Wang,Kui Wu,Zuduo Zheng,Kejie Lu cs.RO

authors_text: Gongjin Lan,Maarten van Hooft,Matteo De Carlo,Jakub M. Tomczak,A. E. Eiben
title: Learning Locomotion Skills in Evolvable Robots
title_zh: 学习可进化机器人的运动技能
comment: 12 pages
comments: 12 pages
abstract: The challenge of robotic reproduction -- making of new robots by recombining two existing ones -- has been recently cracked and physically evolving robot systems have come within reach. Here we address the next big hurdle: producing an adequate brain for a newborn robot. In particular, we address the task of targeted locomotion which is arguably a fundamental skill in any practical implementation. We introduce a controller architecture and a generic learning method to allow a modular robot with an arbitrary shape to learn to walk towards a target and follow this target if it moves. Our approach is validated on three robots, a spider, a gecko, and their offspring, in three real-world scenarios.
summary: The challenge of robotic reproduction -- making of new robots by recombining two existing ones -- has been recently cracked and physically evolving robot systems have come within reach. Here we address the next big hurdle: producing an adequate brain for a newborn robot. In particular, we address the task of targeted locomotion which is arguably a fundamental skill in any practical implementation. We introduce a controller architecture and a generic learning method to allow a modular robot with an arbitrary shape to learn to walk towards a target and follow this target if it moves. Our approach is validated on three robots, a spider, a gecko, and their offspring, in three real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 机器人复制的挑战——通过重新组合两个现有机器人来制造新机器人——最近已经被解决，并且物理进化的机器人系统已经触手可及。在这里，我们解决了下一个大障碍：为新生机器人制造足够的大脑。特别是，我们解决了有针对性的运动任务，这可以说是任何实际实施中的一项基本技能。我们引入了控制器架构和通用学习方法，允许具有任意形状的模块化机器人学习走向目标并在目标移动时跟随该目标。我们的方法在三个现实场景中的三个机器人（蜘蛛、壁虎及其后代）上进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种控制器架构和通用学习方法，使模块化机器人能够学习向目标移动并跟踪移动目标。
AI.motivation: 在解决机器人繁殖问题后，如何为新生机器人赋予基本运动能力成为关键挑战，而目标导向的移动是实用机器人的重要基础技能。
AI.method: 设计模块化控制器架构结合通用强化学习算法，使任意形态的机器人能自主学习定位与追踪能力。
AI.result: 方法在蜘蛛机器人、壁虎机器人及其混合后代三种实体机器人上成功验证，适应不同形态与真实环境场景。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为可进化机器人系统提供了通用的运动控制解决方案，推动了物理演化机器人系统的实用化进程。

authors_text: Hongxu Yang,Caifeng Shan,Alexander F. Kolen,Peter H. N. de With
title: Weakly-supervised Learning For Catheter Segmentation in 3D Frustum Ultrasound
title_zh: 3D 截头体超声中导管分割的弱监督学习
abstract: Accurate and efficient catheter segmentation in 3D ultrasound (US) is essential for cardiac intervention. Currently, the state-of-the-art segmentation algorithms are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which achieved remarkable performances in a standard Cartesian volumetric data. Nevertheless, these approaches suffer the challenges of low efficiency and GPU unfriendly image size. Therefore, such difficulties and expensive hardware requirements become a bottleneck to build accurate and efficient segmentation models for real clinical application. In this paper, we propose a novel Frustum ultrasound based catheter segmentation method. Specifically, Frustum ultrasound is a polar coordinate based image, which includes same information of standard Cartesian image but has much smaller size, which overcomes the bottleneck of efficiency than conventional Cartesian images. Nevertheless, the irregular and deformed Frustum images lead to more efforts for accurate voxel-level annotation. To address this limitation, a weakly supervised learning framework is proposed, which only needs 3D bounding box annotations overlaying the region-of-interest to training the CNNs. Although the bounding box annotation includes noise and inaccurate annotation to mislead to model, it is addressed by the proposed pseudo label generated scheme. The labels of training voxels are generated by incorporating class activation maps with line filtering, which is iteratively updated during the training. Our experimental results show the proposed method achieved the state-of-the-art performance with an efficiency of 0.25 second per volume. More crucially, the Frustum image segmentation provides a much faster and cheaper solution for segmentation in 3D US image, which meet the demands of clinical applications.
summary: Accurate and efficient catheter segmentation in 3D ultrasound (US) is essential for cardiac intervention. Currently, the state-of-the-art segmentation algorithms are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which achieved remarkable performances in a standard Cartesian volumetric data. Nevertheless, these approaches suffer the challenges of low efficiency and GPU unfriendly image size. Therefore, such difficulties and expensive hardware requirements become a bottleneck to build accurate and efficient segmentation models for real clinical application. In this paper, we propose a novel Frustum ultrasound based catheter segmentation method. Specifically, Frustum ultrasound is a polar coordinate based image, which includes same information of standard Cartesian image but has much smaller size, which overcomes the bottleneck of efficiency than conventional Cartesian images. Nevertheless, the irregular and deformed Frustum images lead to more efforts for accurate voxel-level annotation. To address this limitation, a weakly supervised learning framework is proposed, which only needs 3D bounding box annotations overlaying the region-of-interest to training the CNNs. Although the bounding box annotation includes noise and inaccurate annotation to mislead to model, it is addressed by the proposed pseudo label generated scheme. The labels of training voxels are generated by incorporating class activation maps with line filtering, which is iteratively updated during the training. Our experimental results show the proposed method achieved the state-of-the-art performance with an efficiency of 0.25 second per volume. More crucially, the Frustum image segmentation provides a much faster and cheaper solution for segmentation in 3D US image, which meet the demands of clinical applications.
abstract_zh: 3D 超声 (US) 中准确有效的导管分割对于心脏介入治疗至关重要。目前，最先进的分割算法基于卷积神经网络（CNN），它在标准笛卡尔体积数据中取得了显着的性能。然而，这些方法都面临着效率低下和 GPU 不友好的图像大小的挑战。因此，这些困难和昂贵的硬件需求成为为实际临床应用构建准确高效的分割模型的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于截头体超声的导管分割方法。具体来说，截头体超声是一种基于极坐标的图像，其包含与标准笛卡尔图像相同的信息，但尺寸小得多，克服了传统笛卡尔图像的效率瓶颈。然而，不规则和变形的视锥体图像导致需要付出更多努力来进行准确的体素级注释。为了解决这个限制，提出了一种弱监督学习框架，该框架只需要覆盖感兴趣区域的 3D 边界框注释来训练 CNN。尽管边界框注释包含噪声和不准确的注释来误导模型，但所提出的伪标签生成方案解决了这个问题。训练体素的标签是通过将类激活图与线过滤相结合来生成的，并在训练过程中迭代更新。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法达到了最先进的性能，每卷的效率为 0.25 秒。更重要的是，Frustum 图像分割为 3D US 图像分割提供了更快、更便宜的解决方案，满足了临床应用的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弱监督学习的3D锥形超声图像导管分割方法，解决传统方法效率低和硬件要求高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在标准笛卡尔坐标超声图像中分割导管效率低且需昂贵硬件，而锥形图像虽更高效但标注困难，需弱监督框架降低标注成本。
AI.method: 采用锥形坐标图像减少数据量，设计弱监督框架仅需3D边界框标注，通过类激活图与线性滤波生成伪标签并迭代优化模型。
AI.result: 方法在保持最先进性能的同时实现每体积0.25秒的高效分割，提供更快速且经济的临床解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 锥形图像结合弱监督学习有效平衡了分割精度与效率，满足临床实时需求。

search_text: Weakly-supervised Learning For Catheter Segmentation in 3D Frustum Ultrasound 3D 截头体超声中导管分割的弱监督学习 Accurate and efficient catheter segmentation in 3D ultrasound (US) is essential for cardiac intervention. Currently, the state-of-the-art segmentation algorithms are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which achieved remarkable performances in a standard Cartesian volumetric data. Nevertheless, these approaches suffer the challenges of low efficiency and GPU unfriendly image size. Therefore, such difficulties and expensive hardware requirements become a bottleneck to build accurate and efficient segmentation models for real clinical application. In this paper, we propose a novel Frustum ultrasound based catheter segmentation method. Specifically, Frustum ultrasound is a polar coordinate based image, which includes same information of standard Cartesian image but has much smaller size, which overcomes the bottleneck of efficiency than conventional Cartesian images. Nevertheless, the irregular and deformed Frustum images lead to more efforts for accurate voxel-level annotation. To address this limitation, a weakly supervised learning framework is proposed, which only needs 3D bounding box annotations overlaying the region-of-interest to training the CNNs. Although the bounding box annotation includes noise and inaccurate annotation to mislead to model, it is addressed by the proposed pseudo label generated scheme. The labels of training voxels are generated by incorporating class activation maps with line filtering, which is iteratively updated during the training. Our experimental results show the proposed method achieved the state-of-the-art performance with an efficiency of 0.25 second per volume. More crucially, the Frustum image segmentation provides a much faster and cheaper solution for segmentation in 3D US image, which meet the demands of clinical applications. 3D 超声 (US) 中准确有效的导管分割对于心脏介入治疗至关重要。目前，最先进的分割算法基于卷积神经网络（CNN），它在标准笛卡尔体积数据中取得了显着的性能。然而，这些方法都面临着效率低下和 GPU 不友好的图像大小的挑战。因此，这些困难和昂贵的硬件需求成为为实际临床应用构建准确高效的分割模型的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于截头体超声的导管分割方法。具体来说，截头体超声是一种基于极坐标的图像，其包含与标准笛卡尔图像相同的信息，但尺寸小得多，克服了传统笛卡尔图像的效率瓶颈。然而，不规则和变形的视锥体图像导致需要付出更多努力来进行准确的体素级注释。为了解决这个限制，提出了一种弱监督学习框架，该框架只需要覆盖感兴趣区域的 3D 边界框注释来训练 CNN。尽管边界框注释包含噪声和不准确的注释来误导模型，但所提出的伪标签生成方案解决了这个问题。训练体素的标签是通过将类激活图与线过滤相结合来生成的，并在训练过程中迭代更新。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法达到了最先进的性能，每卷的效率为 0.25 秒。更重要的是，Frustum 图像分割为 3D US 图像分割提供了更快、更便宜的解决方案，满足了临床应用的需求。 本文提出一种基于弱监督学习的3D锥形超声图像导管分割方法，解决传统方法效率低和硬件要求高的问题。 Hongxu Yang,Caifeng Shan,Alexander F. Kolen,Peter H. N. de With cs.CV

authors_text: Riqiang Gao,Yucheng Tang,Kaiwen Xu,Michael N. Kammer,Sanja L. Antic,Steve Deppen,Kim L. Sandler,Pierre P. Massion,Yuankai Huo,Bennett A. Landman
title: Deep Multi-path Network Integrating Incomplete Biomarker and Chest CT Data for Evaluating Lung Cancer Risk
title_zh: 深度多路径网络整合不完整的生物标志物和胸部 CT 数据来评估肺癌风险
comment: RFW all-conference best paper finalist, SPIE2021 Medical Imaging
comments: RFW all-conference best paper finalist, SPIE2021 Medical Imaging
abstract: Clinical data elements (CDEs) (e.g., age, smoking history), blood markers and chest computed tomography (CT) structural features have been regarded as effective means for assessing lung cancer risk. These independent variables can provide complementary information and we hypothesize that combining them will improve the prediction accuracy. In practice, not all patients have all these variables available. In this paper, we propose a new network design, termed as multi-path multi-modal missing network (M3Net), to integrate the multi-modal data (i.e., CDEs, biomarker and CT image) considering missing modality with multiple paths neural network. Each path learns discriminative features of one modality, and different modalities are fused in a second stage for an integrated prediction. The network can be trained end-to-end with both medical image features and CDEs/biomarkers, or make a prediction with single modality. We evaluate M3Net with datasets including three sites from the Consortium for Molecular and Cellular Characterization of Screen-Detected Lesions (MCL) project. Our method is cross validated within a cohort of 1291 subjects (383 subjects with complete CDEs/biomarkers and CT images), and externally validated with a cohort of 99 subjects (99 with complete CDEs/biomarkers and CT images). Both cross-validation and external-validation results show that combining multiple modality significantly improves the predicting performance of single modality. The results suggest that integrating subjects with missing either CDEs/biomarker or CT imaging features can contribute to the discriminatory power of our model (p < 0.05, bootstrap two-tailed test). In summary, the proposed M3Net framework provides an effective way to integrate image and non-image data in the context of missing information.
summary: Clinical data elements (CDEs) (e.g., age, smoking history), blood markers and chest computed tomography (CT) structural features have been regarded as effective means for assessing lung cancer risk. These independent variables can provide complementary information and we hypothesize that combining them will improve the prediction accuracy. In practice, not all patients have all these variables available. In this paper, we propose a new network design, termed as multi-path multi-modal missing network (M3Net), to integrate the multi-modal data (i.e., CDEs, biomarker and CT image) considering missing modality with multiple paths neural network. Each path learns discriminative features of one modality, and different modalities are fused in a second stage for an integrated prediction. The network can be trained end-to-end with both medical image features and CDEs/biomarkers, or make a prediction with single modality. We evaluate M3Net with datasets including three sites from the Consortium for Molecular and Cellular Characterization of Screen-Detected Lesions (MCL) project. Our method is cross validated within a cohort of 1291 subjects (383 subjects with complete CDEs/biomarkers and CT images), and externally validated with a cohort of 99 subjects (99 with complete CDEs/biomarkers and CT images). Both cross-validation and external-validation results show that combining multiple modality significantly improves the predicting performance of single modality. The results suggest that integrating subjects with missing either CDEs/biomarker or CT imaging features can contribute to the discriminatory power of our model (p < 0.05, bootstrap two-tailed test). In summary, the proposed M3Net framework provides an effective way to integrate image and non-image data in the context of missing information.
abstract_zh: 临床数据元素（CDE）（例如年龄、吸烟史）、血液标志物和胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）结构特征已被认为是评估肺癌风险的有效手段。这些自变量可以提供补充信息，我们假设将它们结合起来将提高预测准确性。实际上，并非所有患者都具有所有这些变量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的网络设计，称为多路径多模态缺失网络（M3Net），将考虑缺失模态的多模态数据（即 CDE、生物标志物和 CT 图像）与多路径神经网络相集成。每条路径学习一种模态的判别特征，并且在第二阶段融合不同模态以进行综合预测。该网络可以使用医学图像特征和 CDE/生物标记进行端到端训练，或者使用单一模态进行预测。我们使用数据集评估 M3Net，其中包括屏幕检测病变分子和细胞表征联盟 (MCL) 项目的三个站点。我们的方法在 1291 名受试者的队列中进行了交叉验证（383 名受试者具有完整的 CDE/生物标志物和 CT 图像），并在 99 名受试者的队列中进行了外部验证（99 名受试者具有完整的 CDE/生物标志物和 CT 图像）。交叉验证和外部验证结果都表明，组合多种模态可以显着提高单一模态的预测性能。结果表明，整合缺失 CDE/生物标志物或 CT 成像特征的受试者可以提高我们模型的辨别力（p < 0.05，引导双尾检验）。总之，所提出的 M3Net 框架提供了一种在缺失信息的情况下整合图像和非图像数据的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多路径多模态缺失网络（M3Net），用于整合不完整的生物标志物和胸部CT数据，以评估肺癌风险。
AI.motivation: 临床数据、血液标志物和CT影像特征各自具有互补信息，但实际中患者数据常存在缺失，需设计有效方法整合多模态数据以提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 构建多路径神经网络（M3Net），每条路径分别学习单一模态（CDEs、生物标志物、CT图像）的判别特征，第二阶段融合多模态信息进行预测，支持端到端训练或单模态预测。
AI.result: 在1291例交叉验证和99例外部验证中，多模态融合显著提升预测性能（p<0.05），整合缺失数据的样本可增强模型区分能力。
AI.conclusion: M3Net框架有效整合了存在缺失信息的多模态医学数据，为肺癌风险评估提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Shagun Uppal,Sarthak Bhagat,Devamanyu Hazarika,Navonil Majumdar,Soujanya Poria,Roger Zimmermann,Amir Zadeh
title: Multimodal Research in Vision and Language: A Review of Current and Emerging Trends
title_zh: 视觉和语言的多模态研究：当前和新兴趋势回顾
abstract: Deep Learning and its applications have cascaded impactful research and development with a diverse range of modalities present in the real-world data. More recently, this has enhanced research interests in the intersection of the Vision and Language arena with its numerous applications and fast-paced growth. In this paper, we present a detailed overview of the latest trends in research pertaining to visual and language modalities. We look at its applications in their task formulations and how to solve various problems related to semantic perception and content generation. We also address task-specific trends, along with their evaluation strategies and upcoming challenges. Moreover, we shed some light on multi-disciplinary patterns and insights that have emerged in the recent past, directing this field towards more modular and transparent intelligent systems. This survey identifies key trends gravitating recent literature in VisLang research and attempts to unearth directions that the field is heading towards.
summary: Deep Learning and its applications have cascaded impactful research and development with a diverse range of modalities present in the real-world data. More recently, this has enhanced research interests in the intersection of the Vision and Language arena with its numerous applications and fast-paced growth. In this paper, we present a detailed overview of the latest trends in research pertaining to visual and language modalities. We look at its applications in their task formulations and how to solve various problems related to semantic perception and content generation. We also address task-specific trends, along with their evaluation strategies and upcoming challenges. Moreover, we shed some light on multi-disciplinary patterns and insights that have emerged in the recent past, directing this field towards more modular and transparent intelligent systems. This survey identifies key trends gravitating recent literature in VisLang research and attempts to unearth directions that the field is heading towards.
abstract_zh: 深度学习及其应用已经将具有影响力的研究和开发与现实世界数据中存在的多种模式结合起来。最近，由于其众多的应用和快速的增长，增强了人们对视觉和语言领域交叉领域的研究兴趣。在本文中，我们详细概述了与视觉和语言模式相关的研究的最新趋势。我们研究它在任务制定中的应用，以及如何解决与语义感知和内容生成相关的各种问题。我们还讨论特定任务的趋势，及其评估策略和即将到来的挑战。此外，我们还阐明了最近出现的多学科模式和见解，引导该领域走向更加模块化和透明的智能系统。这项调查确定了近期 VisLang 研究文献的主要趋势，并试图发掘该领域的发展方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉与语言多模态研究的最新趋势及挑战，分析了其应用、问题解决方法及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 深度学习推动了多模态数据的研究，视觉与语言的结合在应用和研究中展现出快速增长，需系统梳理当前趋势与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析视觉语言领域的任务形式、解决方法、评估策略及跨学科趋势，总结关键研究方向。
AI.result: 识别出语义感知、内容生成等核心任务趋势，提出模块化、透明化智能系统的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 多模态视觉语言研究正朝着更高效、可解释的方向发展，需关注跨模态对齐与生成等技术突破。

search_text: Multimodal Research in Vision and Language: A Review of Current and Emerging Trends 视觉和语言的多模态研究：当前和新兴趋势回顾 Deep Learning and its applications have cascaded impactful research and development with a diverse range of modalities present in the real-world data. More recently, this has enhanced research interests in the intersection of the Vision and Language arena with its numerous applications and fast-paced growth. In this paper, we present a detailed overview of the latest trends in research pertaining to visual and language modalities. We look at its applications in their task formulations and how to solve various problems related to semantic perception and content generation. We also address task-specific trends, along with their evaluation strategies and upcoming challenges. Moreover, we shed some light on multi-disciplinary patterns and insights that have emerged in the recent past, directing this field towards more modular and transparent intelligent systems. This survey identifies key trends gravitating recent literature in VisLang research and attempts to unearth directions that the field is heading towards. 深度学习及其应用已经将具有影响力的研究和开发与现实世界数据中存在的多种模式结合起来。最近，由于其众多的应用和快速的增长，增强了人们对视觉和语言领域交叉领域的研究兴趣。在本文中，我们详细概述了与视觉和语言模式相关的研究的最新趋势。我们研究它在任务制定中的应用，以及如何解决与语义感知和内容生成相关的各种问题。我们还讨论特定任务的趋势，及其评估策略和即将到来的挑战。此外，我们还阐明了最近出现的多学科模式和见解，引导该领域走向更加模块化和透明的智能系统。这项调查确定了近期 VisLang 研究文献的主要趋势，并试图发掘该领域的发展方向。 本文综述了视觉与语言多模态研究的最新趋势及挑战，分析了其应用、问题解决方法及未来方向。 Shagun Uppal,Sarthak Bhagat,Devamanyu Hazarika,Navonil Majumdar,Soujanya Poria,Roger Zimmermann,Amir Zadeh cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Hao Wang,Jia Zhang,Yingce Xia,Jiang Bian,Chao Zhang,Tie-Yan Liu
title: COSEA: Convolutional Code Search with Layer-wise Attention
title_zh: COSEA：具有分层注意力的卷积代码搜索
abstract: Semantic code search, which aims to retrieve code snippets relevant to a given natural language query, has attracted many research efforts with the purpose of accelerating software development. The huge amount of online publicly available code repositories has prompted the employment of deep learning techniques to build state-of-the-art code search models. Particularly, they leverage deep neural networks to embed codes and queries into a unified semantic vector space and then use the similarity between code's and query's vectors to approximate the semantic correlation between code and the query. However, most existing studies overlook the code's intrinsic structural logic, which indeed contains a wealth of semantic information, and fails to capture intrinsic features of codes. In this paper, we propose a new deep learning architecture, COSEA, which leverages convolutional neural networks with layer-wise attention to capture the valuable code's intrinsic structural logic. To further increase the learning efficiency of COSEA, we propose a variant of contrastive loss for training the code search model, where the ground-truth code should be distinguished from the most similar negative sample. We have implemented a prototype of COSEA. Extensive experiments over existing public datasets of Python and SQL have demonstrated that COSEA can achieve significant improvements over state-of-the-art methods on code search tasks.
summary: Semantic code search, which aims to retrieve code snippets relevant to a given natural language query, has attracted many research efforts with the purpose of accelerating software development. The huge amount of online publicly available code repositories has prompted the employment of deep learning techniques to build state-of-the-art code search models. Particularly, they leverage deep neural networks to embed codes and queries into a unified semantic vector space and then use the similarity between code's and query's vectors to approximate the semantic correlation between code and the query. However, most existing studies overlook the code's intrinsic structural logic, which indeed contains a wealth of semantic information, and fails to capture intrinsic features of codes. In this paper, we propose a new deep learning architecture, COSEA, which leverages convolutional neural networks with layer-wise attention to capture the valuable code's intrinsic structural logic. To further increase the learning efficiency of COSEA, we propose a variant of contrastive loss for training the code search model, where the ground-truth code should be distinguished from the most similar negative sample. We have implemented a prototype of COSEA. Extensive experiments over existing public datasets of Python and SQL have demonstrated that COSEA can achieve significant improvements over state-of-the-art methods on code search tasks.
abstract_zh: 语义代码搜索旨在检索与给定自然语言查询相关的代码片段，吸引了许多旨在加速软件开发的研究工作。大量的在线公开代码存储库促使人们采用深度学习技术来构建最先进的代码搜索模型。特别是，他们利用深度神经网络将代码和查询嵌入到统一的语义向量空间中，然后使用代码和查询向量之间的相似性来近似代码和查询之间的语义相关性。然而，现有的研究大多忽视了代码的内在结构逻辑，而代码的内在结构逻辑确实包含着丰富的语义信息，未能捕捉到代码的内在特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的深度学习架构 COSEA，它利用具有分层注意力的卷积神经网络来捕获有价值的代码的内在结构逻辑。为了进一步提高 COSEA 的学习效率，我们提出了一种对比损失的变体来训练代码搜索模型，其中真实代码应该与最相似的负样本区分开来。我们已经实现了 COSEA 的原型。对现有 Python 和 SQL 公共数据集的广泛实验表明，COSEA 可以在代码搜索任务上实现比最先进方法的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COSEA模型，通过卷积神经网络与层间注意力机制提升代码搜索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有代码搜索方法忽视代码的结构逻辑，导致语义信息捕捉不足。
AI.method: 设计融合卷积网络与层间注意力的COSEA架构，并改进对比损失函数以增强学习效率。
AI.result: 在Python和SQL数据集上，COSEA显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构逻辑建模与改进损失函数有效提升了代码搜索性能。

title: Improving Transformation Invariance in Contrastive Representation Learning
title_zh: 提高对比表示学习中的变换不变性
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021
abstract: We propose methods to strengthen the invariance properties of representations obtained by contrastive learning. While existing approaches implicitly induce a degree of invariance as representations are learned, we look to more directly enforce invariance in the encoding process. To this end, we first introduce a training objective for contrastive learning that uses a novel regularizer to control how the representation changes under transformation. We show that representations trained with this objective perform better on downstream tasks and are more robust to the introduction of nuisance transformations at test time. Second, we propose a change to how test time representations are generated by introducing a feature averaging approach that combines encodings from multiple transformations of the original input, finding that this leads to across the board performance gains. Finally, we introduce the novel Spirograph dataset to explore our ideas in the context of a differentiable generative process with multiple downstream tasks, showing that our techniques for learning invariance are highly beneficial.
summary: We propose methods to strengthen the invariance properties of representations obtained by contrastive learning. While existing approaches implicitly induce a degree of invariance as representations are learned, we look to more directly enforce invariance in the encoding process. To this end, we first introduce a training objective for contrastive learning that uses a novel regularizer to control how the representation changes under transformation. We show that representations trained with this objective perform better on downstream tasks and are more robust to the introduction of nuisance transformations at test time. Second, we propose a change to how test time representations are generated by introducing a feature averaging approach that combines encodings from multiple transformations of the original input, finding that this leads to across the board performance gains. Finally, we introduce the novel Spirograph dataset to explore our ideas in the context of a differentiable generative process with multiple downstream tasks, showing that our techniques for learning invariance are highly beneficial.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了增强通过对比学习获得的表示的不变性的方法。虽然现有方法在学习表示时隐式地引入一定程度的不变性，但我们希望在编码过程中更直接地强制不变性。为此，我们首先引入对比学习的训练目标，它使用新颖的正则化器来控制表示在变换下如何变化。我们表明，以此目标训练的表示在下游任务上表现更好，并且在测试时引入干扰转换时更加稳健。其次，我们建议通过引入一种特征平均方法来改变测试时间表示的生成方式，该方法结合了原始输入的多次转换的编码，发现这会带来全面的性能提升。最后，我们引入了新颖的 Spirograph 数据集，以在具有多个下游任务的可微生成过程的背景下探索我们的想法，这表明我们学习不变性的技术是非常有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进对比学习中的不变性，提升表示学习的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法未能直接强化表示对变换的不变性，导致模型在面对测试时的干扰变换时表现不足。
AI.method: 提出新训练目标结合正则化控制器制表示变化，采用测试时特征平均策略，并构建Spirograph数据集验证方法。
AI.result: 新方法在下游任务中表现更优，对干扰变换更鲁棒，且在多任务场景下性能全面提升。
AI.conclusion: 直接强化不变性的方法能有效提升对比学习的表示质量与实用性。

authors_text: Xu Sun,Zhenfeng Fan,Zihao Zhang,Yingjie Guo,Shihong Xia
title: A Backbone Replaceable Fine-tuning Framework for Stable Face Alignment
title_zh: 一种用于稳定面部对准的主干可更换微调框架
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Heatmap regression based face alignment has achieved prominent performance on static images. However, the stability and accuracy are remarkably discounted when applying the existing methods on dynamic videos. We attribute the degradation to random noise and motion blur, which are common in videos. The temporal information is critical to address this issue yet not fully considered in the existing works. In this paper, we visit the video-oriented face alignment problem in two perspectives: detection accuracy prefers lower error for a single frame, and detection consistency forces better stability between adjacent frames. On this basis, we propose a Jitter loss function that leverages temporal information to suppress inaccurate as well as jittered landmarks. The Jitter loss is involved in a novel framework with a fine-tuning ConvLSTM structure over a backbone replaceable network. We further demonstrate that accurate and stable landmarks are associated with different regions with overlaps in a canonical coordinate, based on which the proposed Jitter loss facilitates the optimization process during training. The proposed framework achieves at least 40% improvement on stability evaluation metrics while enhancing detection accuracy versus state-of-the-art methods. Generally, it can swiftly convert a landmark detector for facial images to a better-performing one for videos without retraining the entire model.
summary: Heatmap regression based face alignment has achieved prominent performance on static images. However, the stability and accuracy are remarkably discounted when applying the existing methods on dynamic videos. We attribute the degradation to random noise and motion blur, which are common in videos. The temporal information is critical to address this issue yet not fully considered in the existing works. In this paper, we visit the video-oriented face alignment problem in two perspectives: detection accuracy prefers lower error for a single frame, and detection consistency forces better stability between adjacent frames. On this basis, we propose a Jitter loss function that leverages temporal information to suppress inaccurate as well as jittered landmarks. The Jitter loss is involved in a novel framework with a fine-tuning ConvLSTM structure over a backbone replaceable network. We further demonstrate that accurate and stable landmarks are associated with different regions with overlaps in a canonical coordinate, based on which the proposed Jitter loss facilitates the optimization process during training. The proposed framework achieves at least 40% improvement on stability evaluation metrics while enhancing detection accuracy versus state-of-the-art methods. Generally, it can swiftly convert a landmark detector for facial images to a better-performing one for videos without retraining the entire model.
abstract_zh: 基于热图回归的人脸对齐在静态图像上取得了显着的性能。然而，将现有方法应用于动态视频时，稳定性和准确性明显打折扣。我们将这种退化归因于随机噪声和运动模糊，这在视频中很常见。时间信息对于解决这个问题至关重要，但在现有的工作中尚未得到充分考虑。在本文中，我们从两个角度研究面向视频的人脸对齐问题：检测精度倾向于单帧的较低误差，而检测一致性则迫使相邻帧之间具有更好的稳定性。在此基础上，我们提出了一种抖动损失函数，它利用时间信息来抑制不准确和抖动的地标。抖动损失涉及一种新颖的框架，该框架在主干可替换网络上具有微调 ConvLSTM 结构。我们进一步证明，准确而稳定的地标与规范坐标中具有重叠的不同区域相关联，基于此，所提出的抖动损失有助于训练期间的优化过程。与最先进的方法相比，所提出的框架在稳定性评估指标上实现了至少 40% 的改进，同时提高了检测精度。一般来说，它可以快速地将面部图像的地标检测器转换为性能更好的视频检测器，而无需重新训练整个模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可替换骨干网络的微调框架，用于提升动态视频中人脸对齐的稳定性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于热图回归的人脸对齐方法在动态视频中因随机噪声和运动模糊导致稳定性与准确性显著下降，且未充分考虑时间信息。
AI.method: 提出Jitter损失函数结合ConvLSTM结构，通过时序信息抑制抖动关键点，并设计可替换骨干网络的微调框架。
AI.result: 在稳定性指标上较现有方法提升至少40%，同时增强检测精度，且无需重新训练即可将图像检测器迁移至视频场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过时序建模与模块化设计有效解决了视频人脸对齐的稳定性问题，具有高效迁移能力。

search_text: A Backbone Replaceable Fine-tuning Framework for Stable Face Alignment 一种用于稳定面部对准的主干可更换微调框架 Heatmap regression based face alignment has achieved prominent performance on static images. However, the stability and accuracy are remarkably discounted when applying the existing methods on dynamic videos. We attribute the degradation to random noise and motion blur, which are common in videos. The temporal information is critical to address this issue yet not fully considered in the existing works. In this paper, we visit the video-oriented face alignment problem in two perspectives: detection accuracy prefers lower error for a single frame, and detection consistency forces better stability between adjacent frames. On this basis, we propose a Jitter loss function that leverages temporal information to suppress inaccurate as well as jittered landmarks. The Jitter loss is involved in a novel framework with a fine-tuning ConvLSTM structure over a backbone replaceable network. We further demonstrate that accurate and stable landmarks are associated with different regions with overlaps in a canonical coordinate, based on which the proposed Jitter loss facilitates the optimization process during training. The proposed framework achieves at least 40% improvement on stability evaluation metrics while enhancing detection accuracy versus state-of-the-art methods. Generally, it can swiftly convert a landmark detector for facial images to a better-performing one for videos without retraining the entire model. 基于热图回归的人脸对齐在静态图像上取得了显着的性能。然而，将现有方法应用于动态视频时，稳定性和准确性明显打折扣。我们将这种退化归因于随机噪声和运动模糊，这在视频中很常见。时间信息对于解决这个问题至关重要，但在现有的工作中尚未得到充分考虑。在本文中，我们从两个角度研究面向视频的人脸对齐问题：检测精度倾向于单帧的较低误差，而检测一致性则迫使相邻帧之间具有更好的稳定性。在此基础上，我们提出了一种抖动损失函数，它利用时间信息来抑制不准确和抖动的地标。抖动损失涉及一种新颖的框架，该框架在主干可替换网络上具有微调 ConvLSTM 结构。我们进一步证明，准确而稳定的地标与规范坐标中具有重叠的不同区域相关联，基于此，所提出的抖动损失有助于训练期间的优化过程。与最先进的方法相比，所提出的框架在稳定性评估指标上实现了至少 40% 的改进，同时提高了检测精度。一般来说，它可以快速地将面部图像的地标检测器转换为性能更好的视频检测器，而无需重新训练整个模型。 本文提出一种可替换骨干网络的微调框架，用于提升动态视频中人脸对齐的稳定性与准确性。 Xu Sun,Zhenfeng Fan,Zihao Zhang,Yingjie Guo,Shihong Xia cs.CV

title: Softer Pruning, Incremental Regularization
title_zh: 更软的剪枝，增量正则化
comment: 7 pages, ICPR2020
comments: 7 pages, ICPR2020
abstract: Network pruning is widely used to compress Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). The Soft Filter Pruning (SFP) method zeroizes the pruned filters during training while updating them in the next training epoch. Thus the trained information of the pruned filters is completely dropped. To utilize the trained pruned filters, we proposed a SofteR Filter Pruning (SRFP) method and its variant, Asymptotic SofteR Filter Pruning (ASRFP), simply decaying the pruned weights with a monotonic decreasing parameter. Our methods perform well across various networks, datasets and pruning rates, also transferable to weight pruning. On ILSVRC-2012, ASRFP prunes 40% of the parameters on ResNet-34 with 1.63% top-1 and 0.68% top-5 accuracy improvement. In theory, SRFP and ASRFP are an incremental regularization of the pruned filters. Besides, We note that SRFP and ASRFP pursue better results while slowing down the speed of convergence.
summary: Network pruning is widely used to compress Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). The Soft Filter Pruning (SFP) method zeroizes the pruned filters during training while updating them in the next training epoch. Thus the trained information of the pruned filters is completely dropped. To utilize the trained pruned filters, we proposed a SofteR Filter Pruning (SRFP) method and its variant, Asymptotic SofteR Filter Pruning (ASRFP), simply decaying the pruned weights with a monotonic decreasing parameter. Our methods perform well across various networks, datasets and pruning rates, also transferable to weight pruning. On ILSVRC-2012, ASRFP prunes 40% of the parameters on ResNet-34 with 1.63% top-1 and 0.68% top-5 accuracy improvement. In theory, SRFP and ASRFP are an incremental regularization of the pruned filters. Besides, We note that SRFP and ASRFP pursue better results while slowing down the speed of convergence.
abstract_zh: 网络剪枝广泛用于压缩深度神经网络（DNN）。软滤波器剪枝（SFP）方法在训练期间将剪枝的滤波器归零，同时在下一个训练时期更新它们。因此，剪枝过滤器的训练信息被完全丢弃。为了利用经过训练的剪枝滤波器，我们提出了一种 SofteR 滤波器剪枝（SRFP）方法及其变体，渐近 SofteR 滤波器剪枝（ASRFP），简单地用单调递减参数来衰减剪枝权重。我们的方法在各种网络、数据集和剪枝率上表现良好，也可转移到权重剪枝。在 ILSVRC-2012 上，ASRFP 修剪了 ResNet-34 上 40% 的参数，top-1 准确率提高了 1.63%，top-5 准确率提高了 0.68%。理论上，SRFP 和 ASRFP 是修剪过滤器的增量正则化。此外，我们注意到SRFP和ASRFP追求更好的结果，同时放慢了收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更温和的滤波器剪枝方法（SRFP及其变体ASRFP），通过递减参数衰减已剪枝权重而非直接丢弃，以提升深度神经网络压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有软滤波器剪枝方法（SFP）在训练时直接清零剪枝滤波器，导致已训练信息完全丢失，而本文旨在利用已剪枝滤波器的训练信息以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出SRFP方法通过单调递减参数逐步衰减剪枝权重，其变体ASRFP进一步优化衰减策略，理论证明其属于剪枝滤波器的增量正则化过程。
AI.result: 在ILSVRC-2012数据集上，ASRFP在ResNet-34上剪枝40%参数时，top-1准确率提升1.63%，top-5提升0.68%，且方法可迁移至权重剪枝。
AI.conclusion: SRFP/ASRFP通过保留剪枝滤波器的训练信息实现更优压缩效果，但收敛速度较传统方法有所下降。

title: Hit Song Prediction Based on Early Adopter Data and Audio Features
title_zh: 基于早期采用者数据和音频特征的热门歌曲预测
comment: ef:The 18th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR)2018 - LBD
comments: ef:The 18th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR)2018 - LBD
abstract: Billions of USD are invested in new artists and songs by the music industry every year. This research provides a new strategy for assessing the hit potential of songs, which can help record companies support their investment decisions. A number of models were developed that use both audio data, and a novel feature based on social media listening behaviour. The results show that models based on early adopter behaviour perform well when predicting top 20 dance hits.
summary: Billions of USD are invested in new artists and songs by the music industry every year. This research provides a new strategy for assessing the hit potential of songs, which can help record companies support their investment decisions. A number of models were developed that use both audio data, and a novel feature based on social media listening behaviour. The results show that models based on early adopter behaviour perform well when predicting top 20 dance hits.
abstract_zh: 音乐产业每年在新艺术家和新歌曲上投资数十亿美元。这项研究提供了一种评估歌曲热门潜力的新策略，可以帮助唱片公司支持他们的投资决策。人们开发了许多模型，这些模型既使用音频数据，又使用基于社交媒体收听行为的新颖功能。结果表明，基于早期采用者行为的模型在预测前 20 首热门舞蹈歌曲时表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用早期采用者行为数据和音频特征来预测歌曲的热门潜力，以辅助音乐产业的投资决策。
AI.motivation: 音乐产业每年投入大量资金于新歌曲和艺术家，亟需有效方法评估歌曲的热门潜力以优化投资决策。
AI.method: 通过构建融合音频特征与社交媒体早期收听行为数据的机器学习模型，分析歌曲的潜在流行度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于早期采用者行为数据的模型在预测前20名舞曲热门歌曲时具有较高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 结合早期采用者行为数据与音频特征的模型能有效预测歌曲热门程度，为音乐产业提供数据驱动的投资决策支持。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 结合早期采用者行为数据与音频特征的模型能有效预测歌曲热门程度，为音乐产业提供数据驱动的投资决策支持。

tldr: 本文旨在利用早期采用者行为数据和音频特征来预测歌曲的热门潜力，以辅助音乐产业的投资决策。
motivation: 音乐产业每年投入大量资金于新歌曲和艺术家，亟需有效方法评估歌曲的热门潜力以优化投资决策。
method: 通过构建融合音频特征与社交媒体早期收听行为数据的机器学习模型，分析歌曲的潜在流行度。
result: 实验结果表明，基于早期采用者行为数据的模型在预测前20名舞曲热门歌曲时具有较高的准确率。
conclusion: 结合早期采用者行为数据与音频特征的模型能有效预测歌曲热门程度，为音乐产业提供数据驱动的投资决策支持。
search_text: Hit Song Prediction Based on Early Adopter Data and Audio Features 基于早期采用者数据和音频特征的热门歌曲预测 Billions of USD are invested in new artists and songs by the music industry every year. This research provides a new strategy for assessing the hit potential of songs, which can help record companies support their investment decisions. A number of models were developed that use both audio data, and a novel feature based on social media listening behaviour. The results show that models based on early adopter behaviour perform well when predicting top 20 dance hits. 音乐产业每年在新艺术家和新歌曲上投资数十亿美元。这项研究提供了一种评估歌曲热门潜力的新策略，可以帮助唱片公司支持他们的投资决策。人们开发了许多模型，这些模型既使用音频数据，又使用基于社交媒体收听行为的新颖功能。结果表明，基于早期采用者行为的模型在预测前 20 首热门舞蹈歌曲时表现良好。 本文旨在利用早期采用者行为数据和音频特征来预测歌曲的热门潜力，以辅助音乐产业的投资决策。 Dorien Herremans,Tom Bergmans cs.SD,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Jingjing Huo,Christian Herold,Yingbo Gao,Leonard Dahlmann,Shahram Khadivi,Hermann Ney
title: Diving Deep into Context-Aware Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 深入研究上下文感知神经机器翻译
comment: Accepted at 5th Conference on Machine Translation (WMT20)
comments: Accepted at 5th Conference on Machine Translation (WMT20)
abstract: Context-aware neural machine translation (NMT) is a promising direction to improve the translation quality by making use of the additional context, e.g., document-level translation, or having meta-information. Although there exist various architectures and analyses, the effectiveness of different context-aware NMT models is not well explored yet. This paper analyzes the performance of document-level NMT models on four diverse domains with a varied amount of parallel document-level bilingual data. We conduct a comprehensive set of experiments to investigate the impact of document-level NMT. We find that there is no single best approach to document-level NMT, but rather that different architectures come out on top on different tasks. Looking at task-specific problems, such as pronoun resolution or headline translation, we find improvements in the context-aware systems, even in cases where the corpus-level metrics like BLEU show no significant improvement. We also show that document-level back-translation significantly helps to compensate for the lack of document-level bi-texts.
summary: Context-aware neural machine translation (NMT) is a promising direction to improve the translation quality by making use of the additional context, e.g., document-level translation, or having meta-information. Although there exist various architectures and analyses, the effectiveness of different context-aware NMT models is not well explored yet. This paper analyzes the performance of document-level NMT models on four diverse domains with a varied amount of parallel document-level bilingual data. We conduct a comprehensive set of experiments to investigate the impact of document-level NMT. We find that there is no single best approach to document-level NMT, but rather that different architectures come out on top on different tasks. Looking at task-specific problems, such as pronoun resolution or headline translation, we find improvements in the context-aware systems, even in cases where the corpus-level metrics like BLEU show no significant improvement. We also show that document-level back-translation significantly helps to compensate for the lack of document-level bi-texts.
abstract_zh: 上下文感知神经机器翻译（NMT）是通过利用附加上下文（例如文档级翻译或元信息）来提高翻译质量的一个有前途的方向。尽管存在各种架构和分析，但不同上下文感知 NMT 模型的有效性尚未得到很好的探索。本文分析了文档级 NMT 模型在四个不同领域以及不同数量的并行文档级双语数据的性能。我们进行了一系列全面的实验来研究文档级 NMT 的影响。我们发现文档级 NMT 并不存在单一的最佳方法，而是不同的架构在不同的任务上表现最好。看看特定于任务的问题，例如代词解析或标题翻译，我们发现上下文感知系统有所改进，即使在像 BLEU 这样的语料库级指标没有显示出显着改进的情况下也是如此。我们还表明，文档级反向翻译显着有助于弥补文档级双文本的缺乏。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了文档级上下文感知神经机器翻译模型在不同领域的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种上下文感知NMT架构，但其有效性尚未被充分验证，尤其在不同任务和数据量下的表现差异需要深入研究。
AI.method: 在四个领域使用不同量级的平行文档数据进行实验，对比多种文档级NMT架构，并测试反向翻译对数据不足的补偿效果。
AI.result: 未发现统一最优模型，不同架构在特定任务（如代词解析、标题翻译）中表现突出，且文档级反向翻译能有效缓解双语数据不足问题。
AI.conclusion: 应根据具体任务选择模型架构，同时结合文档级反向翻译策略以提升翻译质量。

authors_text: Liwei Hu,Yu Xiang,Jun Zhan,Zifang Shi,Wenzheng Wang
title: Aerodynamic Data Predictions Based on Multi-task Learning
title_zh: 基于多任务学习的气动数据预测
abstract: The quality of datasets is one of the key factors that affect the accuracy of aerodynamic data models. For example, in the uniformly sampled Burgers' dataset, the insufficient high-speed data is overwhelmed by massive low-speed data. Predicting high-speed data is more difficult than predicting low-speed data, owing to that the number of high-speed data is limited, i.e. the quality of the Burgers' dataset is not satisfactory. To improve the quality of datasets, traditional methods usually employ the data resampling technology to produce enough data for the insufficient parts in the original datasets before modeling, which increases computational costs. Recently, the mixtures of experts have been used in natural language processing to deal with different parts of sentences, which provides a solution for eliminating the need for data resampling in aerodynamic data modeling. Motivated by this, we propose the multi-task learning (MTL), a datasets quality-adaptive learning scheme, which combines task allocation and aerodynamic characteristics learning together to disperse the pressure of the entire learning task. The task allocation divides a whole learning task into several independent subtasks, while the aerodynamic characteristics learning learns these subtasks simultaneously to achieve better precision. Two experiments with poor quality datasets are conducted to verify the data quality-adaptivity of the MTL to datasets. The results show than the MTL is more accurate than FCNs and GANs in poor quality datasets.
summary: The quality of datasets is one of the key factors that affect the accuracy of aerodynamic data models. For example, in the uniformly sampled Burgers' dataset, the insufficient high-speed data is overwhelmed by massive low-speed data. Predicting high-speed data is more difficult than predicting low-speed data, owing to that the number of high-speed data is limited, i.e. the quality of the Burgers' dataset is not satisfactory. To improve the quality of datasets, traditional methods usually employ the data resampling technology to produce enough data for the insufficient parts in the original datasets before modeling, which increases computational costs. Recently, the mixtures of experts have been used in natural language processing to deal with different parts of sentences, which provides a solution for eliminating the need for data resampling in aerodynamic data modeling. Motivated by this, we propose the multi-task learning (MTL), a datasets quality-adaptive learning scheme, which combines task allocation and aerodynamic characteristics learning together to disperse the pressure of the entire learning task. The task allocation divides a whole learning task into several independent subtasks, while the aerodynamic characteristics learning learns these subtasks simultaneously to achieve better precision. Two experiments with poor quality datasets are conducted to verify the data quality-adaptivity of the MTL to datasets. The results show than the MTL is more accurate than FCNs and GANs in poor quality datasets.
abstract_zh: 数据集的质量是影响气动数据模型准确性的关键因素之一。例如，在均匀采样的 Burgers 数据集中，高速数据的不足被大量低速数据所淹没。预测高速数据比预测低速数据更困难，因为高速数据的数量有限，即Burgers数据集的质量并不令人满意。为了提高数据集的质量，传统方法在建模前通常采用数据重采样技术为原始数据集中不足的部分产生足够的数据，这增加了计算成本。最近，专家的混合已被用于自然语言处理中来处理句子的不同部分，这为消除空气动力学数据建模中的数据重采样的需要提供了解决方案。受此启发，我们提出了多任务学习（MTL），一种数据集质量自适应学习方案，它将任务分配和空气动力特性学习结合在一起，以分散整个学习任务的压力。任务分配将整个学习任务划分为多个独立的子任务，而气动特性学习则同时学习这些子任务以达到更好的精度。进行了两个质量较差的数据集的实验来验证 MTL 对数据集的数据质量适应性。结果表明，在质量较差的数据集中，MTL 比 FCN 和 GAN 更准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多任务学习（MTL）的方案，用于提升低质量气动数据集的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统数据集存在高速数据不足问题，导致预测困难且需耗费大量计算资源进行数据重采样，而混合专家模型为无需重采样的解决方案提供了灵感。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，通过任务分配将整体学习任务拆分为独立子任务，并结合气动特征学习实现并行优化。
AI.result: 在低质量数据集上的实验表明，MTL相比FCNs和GANs具有更高的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: MTL能自适应处理低质量数据集，无需数据重采样即可提升气动数据预测性能。

title: It's the Best Only When It Fits You Most: Finding Related Models for Serving Based on Dynamic Locality Sensitive Hashing
title_zh: 最适合你的才是最好的：基于动态局部敏感哈希寻找相关服务模型
abstract: In recent, deep learning has become the most popular direction in machine learning and artificial intelligence. However, preparation of training data is often a bottleneck in the lifecycle of deploying a deep learning model for production or research. Reusing models for inferencing a dataset can greatly save the human costs required for training data creation. Although there exist a number of model sharing platform such as TensorFlow Hub, PyTorch Hub, DLHub, most of these systems require model uploaders to manually specify the details of each model and model downloaders to screen keyword search results for selecting a model. They are in lack of an automatic model searching tool. This paper proposes an end-to-end process of searching related models for serving based on the similarity of the target dataset and the training datasets of the available models. While there exist many similarity measurements, we study how to efficiently apply these metrics without pair-wise comparison and compare the effectiveness of these metrics. We find that our proposed adaptivity measurement which is based on Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence, is an effective measurement, and its computation can be significantly accelerated by using the technique of locality sensitive hashing.
summary: In recent, deep learning has become the most popular direction in machine learning and artificial intelligence. However, preparation of training data is often a bottleneck in the lifecycle of deploying a deep learning model for production or research. Reusing models for inferencing a dataset can greatly save the human costs required for training data creation. Although there exist a number of model sharing platform such as TensorFlow Hub, PyTorch Hub, DLHub, most of these systems require model uploaders to manually specify the details of each model and model downloaders to screen keyword search results for selecting a model. They are in lack of an automatic model searching tool. This paper proposes an end-to-end process of searching related models for serving based on the similarity of the target dataset and the training datasets of the available models. While there exist many similarity measurements, we study how to efficiently apply these metrics without pair-wise comparison and compare the effectiveness of these metrics. We find that our proposed adaptivity measurement which is based on Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence, is an effective measurement, and its computation can be significantly accelerated by using the technique of locality sensitive hashing.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习成为机器学习和人工智能领域最热门的方向。然而，训练数据的准备通常是部署深度学习模型用于生产或研究的生命周期中的瓶颈。重用模型来推理数据集可以大大节省创建训练数据所需的人力成本。尽管存在许多模型共享平台，例如 TensorFlow Hub、PyTorch Hub、DLHub，但大多数系统都需要模型上传者手动指定每个模型的详细信息，以及模型下载者筛选关键字搜索结果以选择模型。他们缺乏自动模型搜索工具。本文提出了一种基于目标数据集和可用模型的训练数据集的相似性来搜索相关模型以进行服务的端到端过程。虽然存在许多相似性测量，但我们研究如何在不进行成对比较的情况下有效地应用这些指标，并比较这些指标的有效性。我们发现我们提出的基于 Jensen-Shannon (JS) 散度的适应性测量是一种有效的测量，并且通过使用局部敏感哈希技术可以显着加速其计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态局部敏感哈希的自动化模型搜索方法，通过比较目标数据集与现有模型训练数据集的相似性，高效匹配适合服务的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型共享平台依赖人工标注和关键词搜索，缺乏自动化工具，导致模型复用效率低且人力成本高。
AI.method: 设计端到端流程，利用Jensen-Shannon散度计算模型适配度，并结合局部敏感哈希加速相似性计算，避免成对比较。
AI.result: 验证了基于JS散度的自适应度量有效性，且通过LSH技术将计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动化模型搜索提供高效解决方案，可提升模型复用效率并降低人工筛选成本。

search_text: It's the Best Only When It Fits You Most: Finding Related Models for Serving Based on Dynamic Locality Sensitive Hashing 最适合你的才是最好的：基于动态局部敏感哈希寻找相关服务模型 In recent, deep learning has become the most popular direction in machine learning and artificial intelligence. However, preparation of training data is often a bottleneck in the lifecycle of deploying a deep learning model for production or research. Reusing models for inferencing a dataset can greatly save the human costs required for training data creation. Although there exist a number of model sharing platform such as TensorFlow Hub, PyTorch Hub, DLHub, most of these systems require model uploaders to manually specify the details of each model and model downloaders to screen keyword search results for selecting a model. They are in lack of an automatic model searching tool. This paper proposes an end-to-end process of searching related models for serving based on the similarity of the target dataset and the training datasets of the available models. While there exist many similarity measurements, we study how to efficiently apply these metrics without pair-wise comparison and compare the effectiveness of these metrics. We find that our proposed adaptivity measurement which is based on Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence, is an effective measurement, and its computation can be significantly accelerated by using the technique of locality sensitive hashing. 近年来，深度学习成为机器学习和人工智能领域最热门的方向。然而，训练数据的准备通常是部署深度学习模型用于生产或研究的生命周期中的瓶颈。重用模型来推理数据集可以大大节省创建训练数据所需的人力成本。尽管存在许多模型共享平台，例如 TensorFlow Hub、PyTorch Hub、DLHub，但大多数系统都需要模型上传者手动指定每个模型的详细信息，以及模型下载者筛选关键字搜索结果以选择模型。他们缺乏自动模型搜索工具。本文提出了一种基于目标数据集和可用模型的训练数据集的相似性来搜索相关模型以进行服务的端到端过程。虽然存在许多相似性测量，但我们研究如何在不进行成对比较的情况下有效地应用这些指标，并比较这些指标的有效性。我们发现我们提出的基于 Jensen-Shannon (JS) 散度的适应性测量是一种有效的测量，并且通过使用局部敏感哈希技术可以显着加速其计算。 本文提出一种基于动态局部敏感哈希的自动化模型搜索方法，通过比较目标数据集与现有模型训练数据集的相似性，高效匹配适合服务的模型。 Lixi Zhou,Zijie Wang,Amitabh Das,Jia Zou cs.IR,cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Djallel Bouneffouf,Raphaël Féraud,Sohini Upadhyay,Yasaman Khazaeni,Irina Rish
title: Double-Linear Thompson Sampling for Context-Attentive Bandits
title_zh: 针对上下文关注强盗的双线性 Thompson 采样
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1906.09384
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1906.09384
abstract: In this paper, we analyze and extend an online learning framework known as Context-Attentive Bandit, motivated by various practical applications, from medical diagnosis to dialog systems, where due to observation costs only a small subset of a potentially large number of context variables can be observed at each iteration;however, the agent has a freedom to choose which variables to observe. We derive a novel algorithm, called Context-Attentive Thompson Sampling (CATS), which builds upon the Linear Thompson Sampling approach, adapting it to Context-Attentive Bandit setting. We provide a theoretical regret analysis and an extensive empirical evaluation demonstrating advantages of the proposed approach over several baseline methods on a variety of real-life datasets
summary: In this paper, we analyze and extend an online learning framework known as Context-Attentive Bandit, motivated by various practical applications, from medical diagnosis to dialog systems, where due to observation costs only a small subset of a potentially large number of context variables can be observed at each iteration;however, the agent has a freedom to choose which variables to observe. We derive a novel algorithm, called Context-Attentive Thompson Sampling (CATS), which builds upon the Linear Thompson Sampling approach, adapting it to Context-Attentive Bandit setting. We provide a theoretical regret analysis and an extensive empirical evaluation demonstrating advantages of the proposed approach over several baseline methods on a variety of real-life datasets
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们分析和扩展了一个称为“Context-Attentive Bandit”的在线学习框架，该框架受到从医学诊断到对话系统等各种实际应用的推动，其中由于观察成本，每次迭代时只能观察到潜在大量上下文变量的一小部分；然而，代理可以自由选择要观察的变量。我们推导出一种新颖的算法，称为上下文关注汤普森采样（CATS），它建立在线性汤普森采样方法的基础上，使其适应上下文关注强盗设置。我们提供了理论后悔分析和广泛的实证评估，证明了所提出的方法相对于各种现实数据集上的几种基线方法的优势

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CATS的上下文感知老虎机算法，用于在观察成本限制下选择性观察上下文变量以优化决策。
AI.motivation: 在医疗诊断和对话系统等实际应用中，由于观察成本限制，每次只能观察部分上下文变量，但智能体需自主选择观察变量以提升决策效率。
AI.method: 基于线性汤普森采样框架，扩展开发出适应上下文感知老虎机场景的CATS算法，通过理论分析和实证评估验证其有效性。
AI.result: 理论证明了算法的遗憾界，并在多个真实数据集上实验表明CATS优于多种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CATS算法有效解决了高观察成本下的上下文选择问题，在理论和实践中均表现出优势。

title: Chance-Constrained Control with Lexicographic Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 字典深度强化学习的机会约束控制
comment: published version at: https://doi.org/10.1109/LCSYS.2020.2979635 in this version we fixed a typo in (9)
comments: published version at: https://doi.org/10.1109/LCSYS.2020.2979635 in this version we fixed a typo in (9)
abstract: This paper proposes a lexicographic Deep Reinforcement Learning (DeepRL)-based approach to chance-constrained Markov Decision Processes, in which the controller seeks to ensure that the probability of satisfying the constraint is above a given threshold. Standard DeepRL approaches require i) the constraints to be included as additional weighted terms in the cost function, in a multi-objective fashion, and ii) the tuning of the introduced weights during the training phase of the Deep Neural Network (DNN) according to the probability thresholds. The proposed approach, instead, requires to separately train one constraint-free DNN and one DNN associated to each constraint and then, at each time-step, to select which DNN to use depending on the system observed state. The presented solution does not require any hyper-parameter tuning besides the standard DNN ones, even if the probability thresholds changes. A lexicographic version of the well-known DeepRL algorithm DQN is also proposed and validated via simulations.
summary: This paper proposes a lexicographic Deep Reinforcement Learning (DeepRL)-based approach to chance-constrained Markov Decision Processes, in which the controller seeks to ensure that the probability of satisfying the constraint is above a given threshold. Standard DeepRL approaches require i) the constraints to be included as additional weighted terms in the cost function, in a multi-objective fashion, and ii) the tuning of the introduced weights during the training phase of the Deep Neural Network (DNN) according to the probability thresholds. The proposed approach, instead, requires to separately train one constraint-free DNN and one DNN associated to each constraint and then, at each time-step, to select which DNN to use depending on the system observed state. The presented solution does not require any hyper-parameter tuning besides the standard DNN ones, even if the probability thresholds changes. A lexicographic version of the well-known DeepRL algorithm DQN is also proposed and validated via simulations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于词典深度强化学习（DeepRL）的机会约束马尔可夫决策过程方法，其中控制器寻求确保满足约束的概率高于给定阈值。标准 DeepRL 方法要求 i) 以多目标方式将约束作为附加加权项包含在成本函数中，以及 ii) 在深度神经网络 (DNN) 的训练阶段根据概率阈值调整引入的权重。相反，所提出的方法需要分别训练一个无约束 DNN 和一个与每个约束相关的 DNN，然后在每个时间步根据系统观察到的状态选择要使用的 DNN。除了标准 DNN 之外，所提出的解决方案不需要任何超参数调整，即使概率阈值发生变化。还提出了著名 DeepRL 算法 DQN 的字典版本，并通过模拟进行验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于词典深度强化学习（DeepRL）的方法，用于解决机会约束马尔可夫决策过程中的控制问题，确保约束满足的概率超过给定阈值。
AI.motivation: 传统DeepRL方法需将约束作为多目标成本函数的加权项，并在训练过程中调整权重以适应概率阈值，过程复杂且依赖超参数调优。
AI.method: 分别训练一个无约束的深度神经网络（DNN）和每个约束对应的DNN，根据系统状态在每个时间步选择使用哪个DNN，无需额外超参数调优。
AI.result: 提出的词典DQN算法通过仿真验证，能够在概率阈值变化时保持性能，无需调整超参数，简化了约束处理流程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离约束处理与主控制策略，有效解决了机会约束问题，提升了深度强化学习在动态环境中的适应性与实用性。

conclusion: 该方法通过分离约束处理与主控制策略，有效解决了机会约束问题，提升了深度强化学习在动态环境中的适应性与实用性。
search_text: Chance-Constrained Control with Lexicographic Deep Reinforcement Learning 字典深度强化学习的机会约束控制 This paper proposes a lexicographic Deep Reinforcement Learning (DeepRL)-based approach to chance-constrained Markov Decision Processes, in which the controller seeks to ensure that the probability of satisfying the constraint is above a given threshold. Standard DeepRL approaches require i) the constraints to be included as additional weighted terms in the cost function, in a multi-objective fashion, and ii) the tuning of the introduced weights during the training phase of the Deep Neural Network (DNN) according to the probability thresholds. The proposed approach, instead, requires to separately train one constraint-free DNN and one DNN associated to each constraint and then, at each time-step, to select which DNN to use depending on the system observed state. The presented solution does not require any hyper-parameter tuning besides the standard DNN ones, even if the probability thresholds changes. A lexicographic version of the well-known DeepRL algorithm DQN is also proposed and validated via simulations. 本文提出了一种基于词典深度强化学习（DeepRL）的机会约束马尔可夫决策过程方法，其中控制器寻求确保满足约束的概率高于给定阈值。标准 DeepRL 方法要求 i) 以多目标方式将约束作为附加加权项包含在成本函数中，以及 ii) 在深度神经网络 (DNN) 的训练阶段根据概率阈值调整引入的权重。相反，所提出的方法需要分别训练一个无约束 DNN 和一个与每个约束相关的 DNN，然后在每个时间步根据系统观察到的状态选择要使用的 DNN。除了标准 DNN 之外，所提出的解决方案不需要任何超参数调整，即使概率阈值发生变化。还提出了著名 DeepRL 算法 DQN 的字典版本，并通过模拟进行验证。 本文提出了一种基于词典深度强化学习（DeepRL）的方法，用于解决机会约束马尔可夫决策过程中的控制问题，确保约束满足的概率超过给定阈值。 Alessandro Giuseppi,Antonio Pietrabissa cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Bowen Wang,Liangzhi Li,Yuta Nakashima,Ryo Kawasaki,Hajime Nagahara,Yasushi Yagi
title: Noisy-LSTM: Improving Temporal Awareness for Video Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: Noisy-LSTM：提高视频语义分割的时间感知
abstract: Semantic video segmentation is a key challenge for various applications. This paper presents a new model named Noisy-LSTM, which is trainable in an end-to-end manner, with convolutional LSTMs (ConvLSTMs) to leverage the temporal coherency in video frames. We also present a simple yet effective training strategy, which replaces a frame in video sequence with noises. This strategy spoils the temporal coherency in video frames during training and thus makes the temporal links in ConvLSTMs unreliable, which may consequently improve feature extraction from video frames, as well as serve as a regularizer to avoid overfitting, without requiring extra data annotation or computational costs. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model can achieve state-of-the-art performances in both the CityScapes and EndoVis2018 datasets.
summary: Semantic video segmentation is a key challenge for various applications. This paper presents a new model named Noisy-LSTM, which is trainable in an end-to-end manner, with convolutional LSTMs (ConvLSTMs) to leverage the temporal coherency in video frames. We also present a simple yet effective training strategy, which replaces a frame in video sequence with noises. This strategy spoils the temporal coherency in video frames during training and thus makes the temporal links in ConvLSTMs unreliable, which may consequently improve feature extraction from video frames, as well as serve as a regularizer to avoid overfitting, without requiring extra data annotation or computational costs. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model can achieve state-of-the-art performances in both the CityScapes and EndoVis2018 datasets.
abstract_zh: 语义视频分割是各种应用程序的关键挑战。本文提出了一种名为 Noisy-LSTM 的新模型，它可以以端到端的方式进行训练，并使用卷积 LSTM (ConvLSTM) 来利用视频帧中的时间一致性。我们还提出了一种简单而有效的训练策略，用噪声替换视频序列中的帧。这种策略会破坏训练期间视频帧的时间一致性，从而使 ConvLSTM 中的时间链接变得不可靠，从而可以改善视频帧的特征提取，并作为正则器来避免过度拟合，而不需要额外的数据注释或计算成本。实验结果表明，所提出的模型可以在 CityScapes 和 EndoVis2018 数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Noisy-LSTM模型，通过卷积长短期记忆网络（ConvLSTM）和噪声训练策略提升视频语义分割的时序感知能力。
AI.motivation: 视频语义分割需处理帧间时序一致性，传统方法易因过度依赖时序关联导致过拟合，且缺乏有效正则化手段。
AI.method: 设计可端到端训练的Noisy-LSTM模型，利用ConvLSTM捕捉时序特征，并在训练时随机用噪声替换视频帧以破坏时序一致性，强制模型提升对单帧特征的提取能力。
AI.result: 在CityScapes和EndoVis2018数据集上达到当时最优性能，验证了方法在时序感知与过拟合抑制方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 噪声训练策略通过破坏时序关联性，增强了模型对视频帧的特征提取能力，同时作为正则化手段避免过拟合，为视频分割任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Eyal Shnarch,Leshem Choshen,Guy Moshkowich,Noam Slonim,Ranit Aharonov
title: Unsupervised Expressive Rules Provide Explainability and Assist Human Experts Grasping New Domains
title_zh: 无监督表达规则提供可解释性并帮助人类专家掌握新领域
comment: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP
comments: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP
abstract: Approaching new data can be quite deterrent; you do not know how your categories of interest are realized in it, commonly, there is no labeled data at hand, and the performance of domain adaptation methods is unsatisfactory. Aiming to assist domain experts in their first steps into a new task over a new corpus, we present an unsupervised approach to reveal complex rules which cluster the unexplored corpus by its prominent categories (or facets). These rules are human-readable, thus providing an important ingredient which has become in short supply lately - explainability. Each rule provides an explanation for the commonality of all the texts it clusters together. We present an extensive evaluation of the usefulness of these rules in identifying target categories, as well as a user study which assesses their interpretability.
summary: Approaching new data can be quite deterrent; you do not know how your categories of interest are realized in it, commonly, there is no labeled data at hand, and the performance of domain adaptation methods is unsatisfactory. Aiming to assist domain experts in their first steps into a new task over a new corpus, we present an unsupervised approach to reveal complex rules which cluster the unexplored corpus by its prominent categories (or facets). These rules are human-readable, thus providing an important ingredient which has become in short supply lately - explainability. Each rule provides an explanation for the commonality of all the texts it clusters together. We present an extensive evaluation of the usefulness of these rules in identifying target categories, as well as a user study which assesses their interpretability.
abstract_zh: 接近新数据可能具有很大的威慑力；你不知道你感兴趣的类别是如何在其中实现的，通常手头没有标记数据，领域适应方法的性能并不令人满意。为了帮助领域专家在新语料库上迈出新任务的第一步，我们提出了一种无监督的方法来揭示复杂的规则，这些规则将未探索的语料库按其突出的类别（或方面）进行聚类。这些规则是人类可读的，因此提供了最近变得短缺的重要要素——可解释性。每条规则都为其聚集在一起的所有文本的共性提供了解释。我们对这些规则在识别目标类别方面的有用性进行了广泛的评估，并进行了一项评估其可解释性的用户研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，通过发现可解释的规则帮助人类专家快速理解新领域的数据分布。
AI.motivation: 新领域数据通常缺乏标签且领域自适应方法效果不佳，专家需要可解释的规则来理解数据中的潜在分类模式。
AI.method: 基于无监督学习发现可读规则，通过聚类未标注语料库中的显著类别，并为每个聚类生成解释性规则。
AI.result: 评估显示规则能有效识别目标类别，用户研究证实其具有良好的可解释性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过提供可解释的规则，有效弥补了新领域数据理解中的解释性缺失问题，辅助专家快速掌握新任务。

title: Review and Comparison of Commonly Used Activation Functions for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络常用激活函数回顾与比较
abstract: The primary neural networks decision-making units are activation functions. Moreover, they evaluate the output of networks neural node; thus, they are essential for the performance of the whole network. Hence, it is critical to choose the most appropriate activation function in neural networks calculation. Acharya et al. (2018) suggest that numerous recipes have been formulated over the years, though some of them are considered deprecated these days since they are unable to operate properly under some conditions. These functions have a variety of characteristics, which are deemed essential to successfully learning. Their monotonicity, individual derivatives, and finite of their range are some of these characteristics (Bach 2017). This research paper will evaluate the commonly used additive functions, such as swish, ReLU, Sigmoid, and so forth. This will be followed by their properties, own cons and pros, and particular formula application recommendations.
summary: The primary neural networks decision-making units are activation functions. Moreover, they evaluate the output of networks neural node; thus, they are essential for the performance of the whole network. Hence, it is critical to choose the most appropriate activation function in neural networks calculation. Acharya et al. (2018) suggest that numerous recipes have been formulated over the years, though some of them are considered deprecated these days since they are unable to operate properly under some conditions. These functions have a variety of characteristics, which are deemed essential to successfully learning. Their monotonicity, individual derivatives, and finite of their range are some of these characteristics (Bach 2017). This research paper will evaluate the commonly used additive functions, such as swish, ReLU, Sigmoid, and so forth. This will be followed by their properties, own cons and pros, and particular formula application recommendations.
abstract_zh: 主要的神经网络决策单元是激活函数。此外，他们评估网络神经节点的输出；因此，它们对于整个网络的性能至关重要。因此，在神经网络计算中选择最合适的激活函数至关重要。阿查里亚等人。 （2018）表明，多年来已经制定了许多配方，尽管其中一些现在被认为已被弃用，因为它们在某些条件下无法正常运行。这些功能具有多种特征，被认为对于成功学习至关重要。它们的单调性、单独的导数以及有限的范围是其中一些特征（Bach 2017）。本研究论文将评估常用的加性函数，例如 swish、ReLU、Sigmoid 等。接下来是它们的特性、自身的缺点和优点，以及特定的配方应用建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在回顾和比较深度神经网络中常用的激活函数，分析其特性及适用场景。
AI.motivation: 激活函数是神经网络性能的关键因素，选择合适的激活函数对模型效果至关重要，而部分传统函数因局限性已被弃用。
AI.method: 通过分析常见激活函数（如ReLU、Sigmoid、Swish等）的数学特性、导数性质及适用条件，结合文献综述与对比实验进行评估。
AI.result: 总结各激活函数的优缺点，明确其在不同场景下的适用性，并提出具体应用建议。
AI.conclusion: 激活函数的选择需根据任务需求和网络特性进行权衡，现代函数如Swish在某些场景下表现更优。

search_text: Review and Comparison of Commonly Used Activation Functions for Deep Neural Networks 深度神经网络常用激活函数回顾与比较 The primary neural networks decision-making units are activation functions. Moreover, they evaluate the output of networks neural node; thus, they are essential for the performance of the whole network. Hence, it is critical to choose the most appropriate activation function in neural networks calculation. Acharya et al. (2018) suggest that numerous recipes have been formulated over the years, though some of them are considered deprecated these days since they are unable to operate properly under some conditions. These functions have a variety of characteristics, which are deemed essential to successfully learning. Their monotonicity, individual derivatives, and finite of their range are some of these characteristics (Bach 2017). This research paper will evaluate the commonly used additive functions, such as swish, ReLU, Sigmoid, and so forth. This will be followed by their properties, own cons and pros, and particular formula application recommendations. 主要的神经网络决策单元是激活函数。此外，他们评估网络神经节点的输出；因此，它们对于整个网络的性能至关重要。因此，在神经网络计算中选择最合适的激活函数至关重要。阿查里亚等人。 （2018）表明，多年来已经制定了许多配方，尽管其中一些现在被认为已被弃用，因为它们在某些条件下无法正常运行。这些功能具有多种特征，被认为对于成功学习至关重要。它们的单调性、单独的导数以及有限的范围是其中一些特征（Bach 2017）。本研究论文将评估常用的加性函数，例如 swish、ReLU、Sigmoid 等。接下来是它们的特性、自身的缺点和优点，以及特定的配方应用建议。 本文旨在回顾和比较深度神经网络中常用的激活函数，分析其特性及适用场景。 Tomasz Szandała cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Zhanwei Xu,Yukun Cao,Cheng Jin,Guozhu Shao,Xiaoqing Liu,Jie Zhou,Heshui Shi,Jianjiang Feng
title: GASNet: Weakly-supervised Framework for COVID-19 Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: GASNet：COVID-19 病变分割的弱监督框架
comment: 10 pages, 11 figures
comments: 10 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Segmentation of infected areas in chest CT volumes is of great significance for further diagnosis and treatment of COVID-19 patients. Due to the complex shapes and varied appearances of lesions, a large number of voxel-level labeled samples are generally required to train a lesion segmentation network, which is a main bottleneck for developing deep learning based medical image segmentation algorithms. In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised lesion segmentation framework by embedding the Generative Adversarial training process into the Segmentation Network, which is called GASNet. GASNet is optimized to segment the lesion areas of a COVID-19 CT by the segmenter, and to replace the abnormal appearance with a generated normal appearance by the generator, so that the restored CT volumes are indistinguishable from healthy CT volumes by the discriminator. GASNet is supervised by chest CT volumes of many healthy and COVID-19 subjects without voxel-level annotations. Experiments on three public databases show that when using as few as one voxel-level labeled sample, the performance of GASNet is comparable to fully-supervised segmentation algorithms trained on dozens of voxel-level labeled samples.
summary: Segmentation of infected areas in chest CT volumes is of great significance for further diagnosis and treatment of COVID-19 patients. Due to the complex shapes and varied appearances of lesions, a large number of voxel-level labeled samples are generally required to train a lesion segmentation network, which is a main bottleneck for developing deep learning based medical image segmentation algorithms. In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised lesion segmentation framework by embedding the Generative Adversarial training process into the Segmentation Network, which is called GASNet. GASNet is optimized to segment the lesion areas of a COVID-19 CT by the segmenter, and to replace the abnormal appearance with a generated normal appearance by the generator, so that the restored CT volumes are indistinguishable from healthy CT volumes by the discriminator. GASNet is supervised by chest CT volumes of many healthy and COVID-19 subjects without voxel-level annotations. Experiments on three public databases show that when using as few as one voxel-level labeled sample, the performance of GASNet is comparable to fully-supervised segmentation algorithms trained on dozens of voxel-level labeled samples.
abstract_zh: 胸部CT容积中感染区域的分割对于COVID-19患者的进一步诊断和治疗具有重要意义。由于病灶形状复杂、外观多样，通常需要大量体素级标记样本来训练病灶分割网络，这是开发基于深度学习的医学图像分割算法的主要瓶颈。在本文中，我们通过将生成对抗训练过程嵌入到分割网络（称为 GASNet）中，提出了一种弱监督的病变分割框架。 GASNet 经过优化，可通过分割器对 COVID-19 CT 的病变区域进行分割，并通过生成器将异常外观替换为生成的正常外观，从而使鉴别器恢复的 CT 体积与健康 CT 体积无法区分。 GASNet 由许多健康和 COVID-19 受试者的胸部 CT 体积进行监督，没有体素级注释。对三个公共数据库的实验表明，当使用少至一个体素级标记样本时，GASNet 的性能与在数十个体素级标记样本上训练的完全监督分割算法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督框架GASNet，用于分割COVID-19患者的胸部CT影像中的病灶区域。
AI.motivation: 传统病灶分割方法需要大量像素级标注数据，而获取此类标注成本高昂且耗时，限制了深度学习在医学影像分析中的应用。
AI.method: 将生成对抗网络（GAN）嵌入分割网络，通过分割器识别病灶区域并由生成器将其替换为正常组织，使重构CT影像难以被判别器区分于健康CT。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上验证，仅使用单个像素级标注样本时，GASNet性能可媲美使用数十个标注样本的全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: GASNet有效缓解了医学影像分割中标注数据不足的问题，为弱监督学习在医学领域的应用提供了新思路。

title: Fast accuracy estimation of deep learning based multi-class musical source separation
title_zh: 基于深度学习的多类音乐源分离的快速准确度估计
abstract: Music source separation represents the task of extracting all the instruments from a given song. Recent breakthroughs on this challenge have gravitated around a single dataset, MUSDB, only limited to four instrument classes. Larger datasets and more instruments are costly and time-consuming in collecting data and training deep neural networks (DNNs). In this work, we propose a fast method to evaluate the separability of instruments in any dataset without training and tuning a DNN. This separability measure helps to select appropriate samples for the efficient training of neural networks. Based on the oracle principle with an ideal ratio mask, our approach is an excellent proxy to estimate the separation performances of state-of-the-art deep learning approaches such as TasNet or Open-Unmix. Our results contribute to revealing two essential points for audio source separation: 1) the ideal ratio mask, although light and straightforward, provides an accurate measure of the audio separability performance of recent neural nets, and 2) new end-to-end learning methods such as Tasnet, that operate directly on waveforms, are, in fact, internally building a Time-Frequency (TF) representation, so that they encounter the same limitations as the TF based-methods when separating audio pattern overlapping in the TF plane.
summary: Music source separation represents the task of extracting all the instruments from a given song. Recent breakthroughs on this challenge have gravitated around a single dataset, MUSDB, only limited to four instrument classes. Larger datasets and more instruments are costly and time-consuming in collecting data and training deep neural networks (DNNs). In this work, we propose a fast method to evaluate the separability of instruments in any dataset without training and tuning a DNN. This separability measure helps to select appropriate samples for the efficient training of neural networks. Based on the oracle principle with an ideal ratio mask, our approach is an excellent proxy to estimate the separation performances of state-of-the-art deep learning approaches such as TasNet or Open-Unmix. Our results contribute to revealing two essential points for audio source separation: 1) the ideal ratio mask, although light and straightforward, provides an accurate measure of the audio separability performance of recent neural nets, and 2) new end-to-end learning methods such as Tasnet, that operate directly on waveforms, are, in fact, internally building a Time-Frequency (TF) representation, so that they encounter the same limitations as the TF based-methods when separating audio pattern overlapping in the TF plane.
abstract_zh: 音乐源分离代表从给定歌曲中提取所有乐器的任务。最近针对这一挑战的突破主要集中在单一数据集 MUSDB 上，该数据集仅限于四种仪器类别。更大的数据集和更多的仪器在收集数据和训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 方面成本高昂且耗时。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种快速方法来评估任何数据集中仪器的可分离性，而无需训练和调整 DNN。这种可分离性度量有助于选择合适的样本来有效训练神经网络。基于具有理想比率掩模的预言原理，我们的方法是估计最先进的深度学习方法（例如 TasNet 或 Open-Unmix）的分离性能的优秀代理。我们的结果有助于揭示音频源分离的两个要点：1）理想的比率掩模，虽然简单明了，但提供了对最近神经网络的音频可分离性性能的准确测量，2）直接对波形进行操作的新的端到端学习方法（例如 Tasnet）实际上是在内部构建时频（TF）表示，因此在分离 TF 平面中重叠的音频模式时，它们遇到与基于 TF 的方法相同的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练深度神经网络即可快速评估多类音乐源分离中乐器可分离性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集（如MUSDB）仅包含四类乐器，扩展数据集和乐器成本高昂，需寻找高效筛选训练样本的方法。
AI.method: 基于理想比率掩码的oracle原理，通过计算时间-频率域中的分离度量，替代传统深度学习模型的训练评估过程。
AI.result: 验证了理想比率掩码能准确评估最新神经网络的分离性能，并发现端到端方法（如TasNet）本质上依赖时频表示，存在相同局限性。
AI.conclusion: 理想比率掩码是有效的分离性能评估工具，且基于波形的模型在处理时频域重叠音频时仍受传统方法限制。

comments: Accepted for poster presentation at ACCV (Asian Conference on Computer Vision) 2020
abstract: Our main contribution is to show that the behaviour of kernels across multiple layers of a convolutional neural network can be approximated using a logic program. The extracted logic programs yield accuracies that correlate with those of the original model, though with some information loss in particular as approximations of multiple layers are chained together or as lower layers are quantised. We also show that an extracted program can be used as a framework for further understanding the behaviour of CNNs. Specifically, it can be used to identify key kernels worthy of deeper inspection and also identify relationships with other kernels in the form of the logical rules. Finally, we make a preliminary, qualitative assessment of rules we extract from the last convolutional layer and show that kernels identified are symbolic in that they react strongly to sets of similar images that effectively divide output classes into sub-classes with distinct characteristics.
summary: Our main contribution is to show that the behaviour of kernels across multiple layers of a convolutional neural network can be approximated using a logic program. The extracted logic programs yield accuracies that correlate with those of the original model, though with some information loss in particular as approximations of multiple layers are chained together or as lower layers are quantised. We also show that an extracted program can be used as a framework for further understanding the behaviour of CNNs. Specifically, it can be used to identify key kernels worthy of deeper inspection and also identify relationships with other kernels in the form of the logical rules. Finally, we make a preliminary, qualitative assessment of rules we extract from the last convolutional layer and show that kernels identified are symbolic in that they react strongly to sets of similar images that effectively divide output classes into sub-classes with distinct characteristics.
abstract_zh: 我们的主要贡献是表明可以使用逻辑程序来近似卷积神经网络多层的内核行为。提取的逻辑程序产生的精度与原始模型的精度相关，但会丢失一些信息，特别是当多层的近似值链接在一起或较低层被量化时。我们还表明，提取的程序可以用作进一步理解 CNN 行为的框架。具体来说，它可以用来识别值得更深入检查的关键内核，并以逻辑规则的形式识别与其他内核的关系。最后，我们对从最后一个卷积层提取的规则进行初步定性评估，并表明所识别的内核具有象征意义，因为它们对相似图像集产生强烈反应，这些图像有效地将输出类划分为具有不同特征的子类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERIC方法，通过逻辑程序近似卷积神经网络中多层核的行为，以增强CNN的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）的决策过程缺乏可解释性，难以理解其内部逻辑关系，需通过逻辑规则提取提升模型透明度。
AI.method: 通过逻辑程序近似CNN多层核的行为，利用提取的逻辑规则分析核间的关联性，并识别对分类关键的核。
AI.result: 提取的逻辑程序准确率与原模型相关，但存在信息损失；定性评估显示最后卷积层的规则能将输出类划分为具有独特特征的子类。
AI.conclusion: ERIC方法可有效提取CNN的符号化逻辑规则，为模型理解和关键核识别提供框架，但多层链式近似存在局限性。
