authors_text: Nasir Hayat,Munawar Hayat,Shafin Rahman,Salman Khan,Syed Waqas Zamir,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Synthesizing the Unseen for Zero-shot Object Detection
title_zh: 综合看不见的零样本物体检测
comment: Accepted for publication at ACCV 2020
comments: Accepted for publication at ACCV 2020
abstract: The existing zero-shot detection approaches project visual features to the semantic domain for seen objects, hoping to map unseen objects to their corresponding semantics during inference. However, since the unseen objects are never visualized during training, the detection model is skewed towards seen content, thereby labeling unseen as background or a seen class. In this work, we propose to synthesize visual features for unseen classes, so that the model learns both seen and unseen objects in the visual domain. Consequently, the major challenge becomes, how to accurately synthesize unseen objects merely using their class semantics? Towards this ambitious goal, we propose a novel generative model that uses class-semantics to not only generate the features but also to discriminatively separate them. Further, using a unified model, we ensure the synthesized features have high diversity that represents the intra-class differences and variable localization precision in the detected bounding boxes. We test our approach on three object detection benchmarks, PASCAL VOC, MSCOCO, and ILSVRC detection, under both conventional and generalized settings, showing impressive gains over the state-of-the-art methods. Our codes are available at https://github.com/nasir6/zero_shot_detection.
summary: The existing zero-shot detection approaches project visual features to the semantic domain for seen objects, hoping to map unseen objects to their corresponding semantics during inference. However, since the unseen objects are never visualized during training, the detection model is skewed towards seen content, thereby labeling unseen as background or a seen class. In this work, we propose to synthesize visual features for unseen classes, so that the model learns both seen and unseen objects in the visual domain. Consequently, the major challenge becomes, how to accurately synthesize unseen objects merely using their class semantics? Towards this ambitious goal, we propose a novel generative model that uses class-semantics to not only generate the features but also to discriminatively separate them. Further, using a unified model, we ensure the synthesized features have high diversity that represents the intra-class differences and variable localization precision in the detected bounding boxes. We test our approach on three object detection benchmarks, PASCAL VOC, MSCOCO, and ILSVRC detection, under both conventional and generalized settings, showing impressive gains over the state-of-the-art methods. Our codes are available at https://github.com/nasir6/zero_shot_detection.
abstract_zh: 现有的零样本检测方法将视觉特征投影到所见对象的语义域，希望在推理过程中将未见对象映射到其相应的语义。然而，由于在训练过程中从未可视化未见过的对象，因此检测模型偏向于已见的内容，从而将未见的对象标记为背景或已见的类别。在这项工作中，我们建议合成不可见类的视觉特征，以便模型学习视觉领域中可见和不可见的对象。因此，主要的挑战是，如何仅使用类语义来准确地合成看不见的对象？为了实现这一雄心勃勃的目标，我们提出了一种新颖的生成模型，该模型使用类语义不仅可以生成特征，还可以有区别地分离它们。此外，使用统一的模型，我们确保合成的特征具有高度多样性，代表检测到的边界框中的类内差异和可变定位精度。我们在传统和通用设置下，在三个目标检测基准（PASCAL VOC、MSCOCO 和 ILSVRC 检测）上测试了我们的方法，显示出比最先进的方法取得了令人印象深刻的进步。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nasir6/zero_shot_detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成模型，通过合成未见过类别的视觉特征，提升零样本目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本检测方法因训练时未见过目标类别，导致模型在推理时易将未见过对象误判为背景或已见类别。
AI.method: 设计基于语义的生成模型，利用类别语义合成视觉特征，并通过统一模型确保特征多样性及检测框定位精度。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC、MSCOCO和ILSVRC三个基准测试中，常规和广义设置下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义驱动的视觉特征合成，有效解决了零样本检测中未见过类别的识别难题。

title: Comprehensive evaluation of no-reference image quality assessment algorithms on KADID-10k database
title_zh: KADID-10k数据库上无参考图像质量评估算法的综合评价
abstract: The main goal of objective image quality assessment is to devise computational, mathematical models which are able to predict perceptual image quality consistently with subjective evaluations. The evaluation of objective image quality assessment algorithms is based on experiments conducted on publicly available benchmark databases. In this study, our goal is to give a comprehensive evaluation about no-reference image quality assessment algorithms, whose original source codes are available online, using the recently published KADID-10k database which is one of the largest available benchmark databases. Specifically, average PLCC, SROCC, and KROCC are reported which were measured over 100 random train-test splits. Furthermore, the database was divided into a train (appx. 80\% of images) and a test set (appx. 20% of images) with respect to the reference images. So no semantic content overlap was between these two sets. Our evaluation results may be helpful to obtain a clear understanding about the status of state-of-the-art no-reference image quality assessment methods.
summary: The main goal of objective image quality assessment is to devise computational, mathematical models which are able to predict perceptual image quality consistently with subjective evaluations. The evaluation of objective image quality assessment algorithms is based on experiments conducted on publicly available benchmark databases. In this study, our goal is to give a comprehensive evaluation about no-reference image quality assessment algorithms, whose original source codes are available online, using the recently published KADID-10k database which is one of the largest available benchmark databases. Specifically, average PLCC, SROCC, and KROCC are reported which were measured over 100 random train-test splits. Furthermore, the database was divided into a train (appx. 80\% of images) and a test set (appx. 20% of images) with respect to the reference images. So no semantic content overlap was between these two sets. Our evaluation results may be helpful to obtain a clear understanding about the status of state-of-the-art no-reference image quality assessment methods.
abstract_zh: 客观图像质量评估的主要目标是设计能够预测与主观评估一致的感知图像质量的计算数学模型。客观图像质量评估算法的评估基于在公开可用的基准数据库上进行的实验。在本研究中，我们的目标是使用最近发布的 KADID-10k 数据库（最大的可用基准数据库之一）对无参考图像质量评估算法进行综合评估，其原始源代码可在线获取。具体来说，报告了平均 PLCC、SROCC 和 KROCC，这些数据是在 100 多个随机训练测试分组中测量的。此外，相对于参考图像，数据库被分为训练集（约占图像的 80%）和测试集（约占图像的 20%）。因此这两个集合之间没有语义内容重叠。我们的评估结果可能有助于清楚地了解最先进的无参考图像质量评估方法的现状。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在对无参考图像质量评估算法进行全面评估，使用KADID-10k数据库进行实验。
AI.motivation: 客观图像质量评估的目标是开发能够与主观评价一致的计算模型。评估这些算法需要基于公开的基准数据库，而目前缺乏对无参考图像质量评估算法的全面评估。
AI.method: 使用KADID-10k数据库，该数据库是目前最大的基准数据库之一。论文通过100次随机训练-测试划分，计算平均PLCC、SROCC和KROCC指标，并确保训练集和测试集在语义内容上无重叠。
AI.result: 论文报告了无参考图像质量评估算法在KADID-10k数据库上的平均PLCC、SROCC和KROCC指标，提供了对当前最先进的无参考图像质量评估方法的全面评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 该评估结果有助于更清晰地了解当前无参考图像质量评估方法的状态，并为未来的研究提供参考。

ai_content_json.result: 论文报告了无参考图像质量评估算法在KADID-10k数据库上的平均PLCC、SROCC和KROCC指标，提供了对当前最先进的无参考图像质量评估方法的全面评估结果。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该评估结果有助于更清晰地了解当前无参考图像质量评估方法的状态，并为未来的研究提供参考。

tldr: 该论文旨在对无参考图像质量评估算法进行全面评估，使用KADID-10k数据库进行实验。

search_text: Comprehensive evaluation of no-reference image quality assessment algorithms on KADID-10k database KADID-10k数据库上无参考图像质量评估算法的综合评价 The main goal of objective image quality assessment is to devise computational, mathematical models which are able to predict perceptual image quality consistently with subjective evaluations. The evaluation of objective image quality assessment algorithms is based on experiments conducted on publicly available benchmark databases. In this study, our goal is to give a comprehensive evaluation about no-reference image quality assessment algorithms, whose original source codes are available online, using the recently published KADID-10k database which is one of the largest available benchmark databases. Specifically, average PLCC, SROCC, and KROCC are reported which were measured over 100 random train-test splits. Furthermore, the database was divided into a train (appx. 80\% of images) and a test set (appx. 20% of images) with respect to the reference images. So no semantic content overlap was between these two sets. Our evaluation results may be helpful to obtain a clear understanding about the status of state-of-the-art no-reference image quality assessment methods. 客观图像质量评估的主要目标是设计能够预测与主观评估一致的感知图像质量的计算数学模型。客观图像质量评估算法的评估基于在公开可用的基准数据库上进行的实验。在本研究中，我们的目标是使用最近发布的 KADID-10k 数据库（最大的可用基准数据库之一）对无参考图像质量评估算法进行综合评估，其原始源代码可在线获取。具体来说，报告了平均 PLCC、SROCC 和 KROCC，这些数据是在 100 多个随机训练测试分组中测量的。此外，相对于参考图像，数据库被分为训练集（约占图像的 80%）和测试集（约占图像的 20%）。因此这两个集合之间没有语义内容重叠。我们的评估结果可能有助于清楚地了解最先进的无参考图像质量评估方法的现状。 该论文旨在对无参考图像质量评估算法进行全面评估，使用KADID-10k数据库进行实验。 Domonkos Varga eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Image Captioning with Visual Object Representations Grounded in the Textual Modality
title_zh: 基于文本模态的视觉对象表示的图像字幕
abstract: We present our work in progress exploring the possibilities of a shared embedding space between textual and visual modality. Leveraging the textual nature of object detection labels and the hypothetical expressiveness of extracted visual object representations, we propose an approach opposite to the current trend, grounding of the representations in the word embedding space of the captioning system instead of grounding words or sentences in their associated images. Based on the previous work, we apply additional grounding losses to the image captioning training objective aiming to force visual object representations to create more heterogeneous clusters based on their class label and copy a semantic structure of the word embedding space. In addition, we provide an analysis of the learned object vector space projection and its impact on the IC system performance. With only slight change in performance, grounded models reach the stopping criterion during training faster than the unconstrained model, needing about two to three times less training updates. Additionally, an improvement in structural correlation between the word embeddings and both original and projected object vectors suggests that the grounding is actually mutual.
summary: We present our work in progress exploring the possibilities of a shared embedding space between textual and visual modality. Leveraging the textual nature of object detection labels and the hypothetical expressiveness of extracted visual object representations, we propose an approach opposite to the current trend, grounding of the representations in the word embedding space of the captioning system instead of grounding words or sentences in their associated images. Based on the previous work, we apply additional grounding losses to the image captioning training objective aiming to force visual object representations to create more heterogeneous clusters based on their class label and copy a semantic structure of the word embedding space. In addition, we provide an analysis of the learned object vector space projection and its impact on the IC system performance. With only slight change in performance, grounded models reach the stopping criterion during training faster than the unconstrained model, needing about two to three times less training updates. Additionally, an improvement in structural correlation between the word embeddings and both original and projected object vectors suggests that the grounding is actually mutual.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了我们正在进行的工作，探索文本和视觉模态之间共享嵌入空间的可能性。利用对象检测标签的文本性质和提取的视觉对象表示的假设表现力，我们提出了一种与当前趋势相反的方法，将表示扎根于字幕系统的词嵌入空间中，而不是将单词或句子扎根于其相关图像中。基于之前的工作，我们将额外的基础损失应用于图像字幕训练目标，旨在迫使视觉对象表示基于其类标签创建更多异构簇，并复制单词嵌入空间的语义结构。此外，我们还分析了学习到的对象向量空间投影及其对 IC 系统性能的影响。只需性能上的微小变化，接地模型在训练过程中就能比无约束模型更快地达到停止标准，所需的训练更新量大约减少两到三倍。此外，词嵌入与原始和投影对象向量之间结构相关性的改善表明，基础实际上是相互的。

AI.tldr: 本文探索文本与视觉模态的共享嵌入空间，通过将视觉对象表示扎根于字幕系统的词嵌入空间，以改进图像字幕生成。
AI.motivation: 当前趋势是将文本扎根于图像，本文反向操作，尝试通过扎根视觉表示到词嵌入空间，以提升模型效率及语义结构对齐。
AI.method: 在图像字幕训练目标中引入额外扎根损失，强制视觉对象表示按类别标签形成异质聚类，并复制词嵌入空间的语义结构。分析投影后的对象向量空间对系统性能的影响。
AI.result: 扎根模型训练速度提升2-3倍，词嵌入与对象向量的结构相关性增强，表明扎根过程具有互惠性，尽管整体性能提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 视觉与文本表示的扎根是相互的，该方法显著提升训练效率，并增强跨模态语义对齐，为未来多模态学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Juan J. Gómez Rodríguez,José Lamarca,Javier Morlana,Juan D. Tardós,José M. M. Montiel
title: SD-DefSLAM: Semi-Direct Monocular SLAM for Deformable and Intracorporeal Scenes
title_zh: SD-DefSLAM：适用于可变形和体内场景的半直接单目 SLAM
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to RA-L with option to ICRA 2021. Associated video: https://youtu.be/gkcC0IR3X6A
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to RA-L with option to ICRA 2021. Associated video: https://youtu.be/gkcC0IR3X6A
abstract: Conventional SLAM techniques strongly rely on scene rigidity to solve data association, ignoring dynamic parts of the scene. In this work we present Semi-Direct DefSLAM (SD-DefSLAM), a novel monocular deformable SLAM method able to map highly deforming environments, built on top of DefSLAM. To robustly solve data association in challenging deforming scenes, SD-DefSLAM combines direct and indirect methods: an enhanced illumination-invariant Lucas-Kanade tracker for data association, geometric Bundle Adjustment for pose and deformable map estimation, and bag-of-words based on feature descriptors for camera relocation. Dynamic objects are detected and segmented-out using a CNN trained for the specific application domain. We thoroughly evaluate our system in two public datasets. The mandala dataset is a SLAM benchmark with increasingly aggressive deformations. The Hamlyn dataset contains intracorporeal sequences that pose serious real-life challenges beyond deformation like weak texture, specular reflections, surgical tools and occlusions. Our results show that SD-DefSLAM outperforms DefSLAM in point tracking, reconstruction accuracy and scale drift thanks to the improvement in all the data association steps, being the first system able to robustly perform SLAM inside the human body.
summary: Conventional SLAM techniques strongly rely on scene rigidity to solve data association, ignoring dynamic parts of the scene. In this work we present Semi-Direct DefSLAM (SD-DefSLAM), a novel monocular deformable SLAM method able to map highly deforming environments, built on top of DefSLAM. To robustly solve data association in challenging deforming scenes, SD-DefSLAM combines direct and indirect methods: an enhanced illumination-invariant Lucas-Kanade tracker for data association, geometric Bundle Adjustment for pose and deformable map estimation, and bag-of-words based on feature descriptors for camera relocation. Dynamic objects are detected and segmented-out using a CNN trained for the specific application domain. We thoroughly evaluate our system in two public datasets. The mandala dataset is a SLAM benchmark with increasingly aggressive deformations. The Hamlyn dataset contains intracorporeal sequences that pose serious real-life challenges beyond deformation like weak texture, specular reflections, surgical tools and occlusions. Our results show that SD-DefSLAM outperforms DefSLAM in point tracking, reconstruction accuracy and scale drift thanks to the improvement in all the data association steps, being the first system able to robustly perform SLAM inside the human body.
abstract_zh: 传统的SLAM技术强烈依赖场景刚性来解决数据关联，忽略了场景的动态部分。在这项工作中，我们提出了半直接 DefSLAM (SD-DefSLAM)，这是一种基于 DefSLAM 构建的新型单目可变形 SLAM 方法，能够绘制高度变形的环境。为了稳健地解决具有挑战性的变形场景中的数据关联问题，SD-DefSLAM 结合了直接和间接方法：用于数据关联的增强型光照不变 Lucas-Kanade 跟踪器、用于姿态和可变形地图估计的几何束调整，以及用于摄像机重新定位的基于特征描述符的词袋。使用针对特定应用领域训练的 CNN 来检测和分割动态对象。我们在两个公共数据集中彻底评估我们的系统。曼陀罗数据集是 SLAM 基准，变形越来越严重。 Hamlyn 数据集包含的体内序列除了变形之外还带来了严重的现实挑战，例如弱纹理、镜面反射、手术工具和遮挡。我们的结果表明，由于所有数据关联步骤的改进，SD-DefSLAM 在点跟踪、重建精度和尺度漂移方面优于 DefSLAM，成为第一个能够在人体内稳健执行 SLAM 的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SD-DefSLAM，一种用于可变形和体内场景的半直接单目SLAM方法，以解决传统SLAM在动态环境中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM技术依赖场景刚性假设，难以处理动态或可变形场景，尤其在体内等复杂环境中存在弱纹理、镜面反射和遮挡等挑战。
AI.method: 结合直接与间接方法：改进的光照不变Lucas-Kanade光流跟踪器、几何光束法平差优化位姿与可变形地图、基于词袋模型的特征描述子用于相机重定位，并利用CNN检测并分割动态物体。
AI.result: 在Mandala和Hamlyn数据集上验证，SD-DefSLAM在点跟踪精度、重建质量及尺度漂移控制上优于DefSLAM，首次实现体内环境的鲁棒SLAM。
AI.conclusion: SD-DefSLAM通过优化数据关联步骤和动态物体分割，显著提升了可变形及体内场景的SLAM性能，为医疗等应用提供了新解决方案。

The Hamlyn dataset contains intracorporeal sequences that pose serious real-life challenges beyond deformation like weak texture, specular reflections, surgical tools and occlusions. Our results show that SD-DefSLAM outperforms DefSLAM in point tracking, reconstruction accuracy and scale drift thanks to the improvement in all the data association steps, being the first system able to robustly perform SLAM inside the human body. 传统的SLAM技术强烈依赖场景刚性来解决数据关联，忽略了场景的动态部分。在这项工作中，我们提出了半直接 DefSLAM (SD-DefSLAM)，这是一种基于 DefSLAM 构建的新型单目可变形 SLAM 方法，能够绘制高度变形的环境。为了稳健地解决具有挑战性的变形场景中的数据关联问题，SD-DefSLAM 结合了直接和间接方法：用于数据关联的增强型光照不变 Lucas-Kanade 跟踪器、用于姿态和可变形地图估计的几何束调整，以及用于摄像机重新定位的基于特征描述符的词袋。使用针对特定应用领域训练的 CNN 来检测和分割动态对象。我们在两个公共数据集中彻底评估我们的系统。曼陀罗数据集是 SLAM 基准，变形越来越严重。 Hamlyn 数据集包含的体内序列除了变形之外还带来了严重的现实挑战，例如弱纹理、镜面反射、手术工具和遮挡。我们的结果表明，由于所有数据关联步骤的改进，SD-DefSLAM 在点跟踪、重建精度和尺度漂移方面优于 DefSLAM，成为第一个能够在人体内稳健执行 SLAM 的系统。 本文提出SD-DefSLAM，一种用于可变形和体内场景的半直接单目SLAM方法，以解决传统SLAM在动态环境中的局限性。 Juan J. Gómez Rodríguez,José Lamarca,Javier Morlana,Juan D. Tardós,José M. M. Montiel cs.CV

title: Intriguing Invariants of Centers of Ellipse-Inscribed Triangles
title_zh: 椭圆内接三角形中心的有趣不变量
comment: 17 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables, 6 video links
comments: 17 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables, 6 video links
abstract: We describe invariants of centers of ellipse-inscribed triangle families with two vertices fixed to the ellipse boundary and a third one which sweeps it. We prove that: (i) if a triangle center is a fixed affine combination of barycenter and orthocenter, its locus is an ellipse; (ii) and that over the family of said affine combinations, the centers of said loci sweep a line; (iii) over the family of parallel fixed vertices, said loci rigidly translate along a second line. Additionally, we study invariants of the envelope of elliptic loci over combinations of two fixed vertices on the ellipse.
summary: We describe invariants of centers of ellipse-inscribed triangle families with two vertices fixed to the ellipse boundary and a third one which sweeps it. We prove that: (i) if a triangle center is a fixed affine combination of barycenter and orthocenter, its locus is an ellipse; (ii) and that over the family of said affine combinations, the centers of said loci sweep a line; (iii) over the family of parallel fixed vertices, said loci rigidly translate along a second line. Additionally, we study invariants of the envelope of elliptic loci over combinations of two fixed vertices on the ellipse.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了椭圆内切三角形族的中心不变量，其中两个顶点固定在椭圆边界上​​，第三个顶点扫过椭圆边界。我们证明：（i）如果三角形中心是重心和垂心的固定仿射组合，则其轨迹是椭圆； (ii)并且在所述仿射组合的族上，所述基因座的中心扫过一条线； (iii)在平行固定顶点族上，所述轨迹沿第二条线严格平移。此外，我们研究了椭圆上两个固定顶点组合的椭圆轨迹包络的不变量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了椭圆内接三角形中心的不变性质，当两个顶点固定在椭圆边界上，第三个顶点沿椭圆移动时，分析其几何中心轨迹的不变性。
AI.motivation: 探索椭圆内接三角形在动态变化下的几何不变性，揭示三角形中心轨迹的规律，为几何学理论提供新视角。
AI.method: 通过几何分析与代数证明，研究固定两点和移动点构成的三角形中心（如质心与垂心的仿射组合）的轨迹特性，并分析其包络线的不变性。
AI.result: 证明了特定三角形中心轨迹为椭圆，且在仿射组合族中轨迹沿直线平移；同时发现平行固定顶点时轨迹沿另一直线刚性平移，并研究了椭圆轨迹包络的不变性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了椭圆内接三角形中心轨迹的深刻几何不变性，为理解动态几何系统中的对称性与约束条件提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Junwoo Park,Youngwoo Cho,Haneol Lee,Jaegul Choo,Edward Choi
title: Knowledge Graph-based Question Answering with Electronic Health Records
title_zh: 基于知识图谱的电子健康记录问答
comment: Accepted at Machine Learning in Health Care (MLHC) 2021
comments: Accepted at Machine Learning in Health Care (MLHC) 2021
abstract: Question Answering (QA) is a widely-used framework for developing and evaluating an intelligent machine. In this light, QA on Electronic Health Records (EHR), namely EHR QA, can work as a crucial milestone towards developing an intelligent agent in healthcare. EHR data are typically stored in a relational database, which can also be converted to a directed acyclic graph, allowing two approaches for EHR QA: Table-based QA and Knowledge Graph-based QA. We hypothesize that the graph-based approach is more suitable for EHR QA as graphs can represent relations between entities and values more naturally compared to tables, which essentially require JOIN operations. In this paper, we propose a graph-based EHR QA where natural language queries are converted to SPARQL instead of SQL. To validate our hypothesis, we create four EHR QA datasets (graph-based VS table-based, and simplified database schema VS original database schema), based on a table-based dataset MIMICSQL. We test both a simple Seq2Seq model and a state-of-the-art EHR QA model on all datasets where the graph-based datasets facilitated up to 34% higher accuracy than the table-based dataset without any modification to the model architectures. Finally, all datasets are open-sourced to encourage further EHR QA research in both directions.
summary: Question Answering (QA) is a widely-used framework for developing and evaluating an intelligent machine. In this light, QA on Electronic Health Records (EHR), namely EHR QA, can work as a crucial milestone towards developing an intelligent agent in healthcare. EHR data are typically stored in a relational database, which can also be converted to a directed acyclic graph, allowing two approaches for EHR QA: Table-based QA and Knowledge Graph-based QA. We hypothesize that the graph-based approach is more suitable for EHR QA as graphs can represent relations between entities and values more naturally compared to tables, which essentially require JOIN operations. In this paper, we propose a graph-based EHR QA where natural language queries are converted to SPARQL instead of SQL. To validate our hypothesis, we create four EHR QA datasets (graph-based VS table-based, and simplified database schema VS original database schema), based on a table-based dataset MIMICSQL. We test both a simple Seq2Seq model and a state-of-the-art EHR QA model on all datasets where the graph-based datasets facilitated up to 34% higher accuracy than the table-based dataset without any modification to the model architectures. Finally, all datasets are open-sourced to encourage further EHR QA research in both directions.
abstract_zh: 问答（QA）是一种广泛使用的用于开发和评估智能机器的框架。有鉴于此，电子健康记录 (EHR) 的质量保证（即 EHR QA）可以成为开发医疗保健智能代理的重要里程碑。 EHR 数据通常存储在关系数据库中，该数据库也可以转换为有向无环图，从而允许使用两种 EHR QA 方法：基于表的 QA 和基于知识图的 QA。我们假设基于图的方法更适合 EHR QA，因为与表相比，图可以更自然地表示实体和值之间的关系，而表本质上需要 JOIN 操作。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图的 EHR QA，其中自然语言查询被转换为 SPARQL 而不是 SQL。为了验证我们的假设，我们基于基于表的数据集 MIMICSQL 创建了四个 EHR QA 数据集（基于图的 VS 基于表的、简化数据库模式 VS 原始数据库模式）。我们在所有数据集上测试了简单的 Seq2Seq 模型和最先进的 EHR QA 模型，其中基于图的数据集比基于表的数据集的准确性提高了 34%，而无需对模型架构进行任何修改。最后，所有数据集都是开源的，以鼓励进一步进行两个方向的 EHR QA 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于知识图谱的电子健康记录（EHR）问答方法，通过对比表格形式，验证图结构在EHR问答中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 表格形式处理EHR需复杂JOIN操作，而知识图谱能更自然表达实体关系，可能提升问答准确性。
AI.method: 将自然语言查询转换为SPARQL，构建四组对比数据集（图基/表格基、简化/原始模式），并在两种模型上测试。
AI.result: 图基数据集使模型准确率最高提升34%，且无需调整模型架构，所有数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱方法优于表格形式，为EHR问答研究提供新方向及标准化数据集支持。

title: Measuring breathing induced oesophageal motion and its dosimetric impact
title_zh: 测量呼吸引起的食管运动及其剂量影响
comment: The paper got accepted for publication in Physica Medica
comments: The paper got accepted for publication in Physica Medica
abstract: Stereotactic body radiation therapy allows for a precise and accurate dose delivery. Organ motion during treatment bears the risk of undetected high dose healthy tissue exposure. An organ very susceptible to high dose is the oesophagus. Its low contrast on CT and the oblong shape renders motion estimation difficult. We tackle this issue by modern algorithms to measure the oesophageal motion voxel-wise and to estimate motion related dosimetric impact. Oesophageal motion was measured using deformable image registration and 4DCT of 11 internal and 5 public datasets. Current clinical practice of contouring the organ on 3DCT was compared to timely resolved 4DCT contours. The dosimetric impact of the motion was estimated by analysing the trajectory of each voxel in the 4D dose distribution. Finally an organ motion model was built, allowing for easier patient-wise comparisons. Motion analysis showed mean absolute maximal motion amplitudes of 4.55 +/- 1.81 mm left-right, 5.29 +/- 2.67 mm anterior-posterior and 10.78 +/- 5.30 mm superior-inferior. Motion between the cohorts differed significantly. In around 50 % of the cases the dosimetric passing criteria was violated. Contours created on 3DCT did not cover 14 % of the organ for 50 % of the respiratory cycle and the 3D contour is around 38 % smaller than the union of all 4D contours. The motion model revealed that the maximal motion is not limited to the lower part of the organ. Our results showed motion amplitudes higher than most reported values in the literature and that motion is very heterogeneous across patients. Therefore, individual motion information should be considered in contouring and planning.

Motion analysis showed mean absolute maximal motion amplitudes of 4.55 +/- 1.81 mm left-right, 5.29 +/- 2.67 mm anterior-posterior and 10.78 +/- 5.30 mm superior-inferior. Contours created on 3DCT did not cover 14 % of the organ for 50 % of the respiratory cycle and the 3D contour is around 38 % smaller than the union of all 4D contours. The motion model revealed that the maximal motion is not limited to the lower part of the organ. Our results showed motion amplitudes higher than most reported values in the literature and that motion is very heterogeneous across patients. Therefore, individual motion information should be considered in contouring and planning.
abstract_zh: 立体定向身体放射治疗可以实现精确且准确的剂量输送。治疗期间的器官运动存在未被检测到的高剂量健康组织暴露的风险。对高剂量非常敏感的器官是食道。 CT 上的低对比度和椭圆形形状使得运动估计变得困难。我们通过现代算法来解决这个问题，以体素方式测量食道运动并估计与运动相关的剂量影响。使用可变形图像配准和 11 个内部数据集和 5 个公共数据集的 4DCT 测量食管运动。将目前在 3DCT 上绘制器官轮廓的临床实践与及时解析的 4DCT 轮廓进行比较。通过分析 4D 剂量分布中每个体素的轨迹来估计运动的剂量影响。最后建立了器官运动模型，可以更轻松地进行患者之间的比较。运动分析显示平均绝对最大运动幅度为左右 4.55 +/- 1.81 毫米、前后 5.29 +/- 2.67 毫米以及上下 10.78 +/- 5.30 毫米。各组之间的运动差异显着。大约 50% 的案例违反了剂量测定通过标准。在 50% 的呼吸周期中，3DCT 创建的轮廓未覆盖器官的 14%，并且 3D 轮廓比所有 4D 轮廓的并集小约 38%。运动模型显示最大运动并不限于器官的下部。我们的结果显示运动幅度高于文献中大多数报道的值，并且不同患者的运动非常不均匀。因此，在轮廓和规划中应考虑个体运动信息。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在测量呼吸引起的食管运动及其对放射治疗剂量分布的影响，通过4DCT和变形图像配准技术分析运动特征。
AI.motivation: 立体定向体部放疗中，器官运动可能导致健康组织剂量暴露风险，而食管因低对比度和形状复杂性难以准确评估运动，传统3DCT轮廓方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用变形图像配准和4DCT数据（含11个内部及5个公开数据集），对比3DCT与4DCT轮廓，分析4D剂量分布中每个体素的轨迹，并构建运动模型进行患者间比较。
AI.result: 食管运动幅度均值分别为左右4.55mm、前后5.29mm、上下10.78mm，50%病例违反剂量标准，3DCT轮廓覆盖不足14%且体积比4D轮廓小38%，运动模型显示最大运动不限于器官下部。
AI.conclusion: 个体化运动信息应纳入轮廓绘制与治疗计划，以提升放疗精准度并降低健康组织损伤风险。

search_text: Measuring breathing induced oesophageal motion and its dosimetric impact 测量呼吸引起的食管运动及其剂量影响 Stereotactic body radiation therapy allows for a precise and accurate dose delivery. Organ motion during treatment bears the risk of undetected high dose healthy tissue exposure. An organ very susceptible to high dose is the oesophagus. Its low contrast on CT and the oblong shape renders motion estimation difficult. We tackle this issue by modern algorithms to measure the oesophageal motion voxel-wise and to estimate motion related dosimetric impact. Oesophageal motion was measured using deformable image registration and 4DCT of 11 internal and 5 public datasets. Current clinical practice of contouring the organ on 3DCT was compared to timely resolved 4DCT contours. The dosimetric impact of the motion was estimated by analysing the trajectory of each voxel in the 4D dose distribution. Finally an organ motion model was built, allowing for easier patient-wise comparisons. Motion analysis showed mean absolute maximal motion amplitudes of 4.55 +/- 1.81 mm left-right, 5.29 +/- 2.67 mm anterior-posterior and 10.78 +/- 5.30 mm superior-inferior. Motion between the cohorts differed significantly. In around 50 % of the cases the dosimetric passing criteria was violated. Contours created on 3DCT did not cover 14 % of the organ for 50 % of the respiratory cycle and the 3D contour is around 38 % smaller than the union of all 4D contours. The motion model revealed that the maximal motion is not limited to the lower part of the organ. Our results showed motion amplitudes higher than most reported values in the literature and that motion is very heterogeneous across patients. Therefore, individual motion information should be considered in contouring and planning. 立体定向身体放射治疗可以实现精确且准确的剂量输送。治疗期间的器官运动存在未被检测到的高剂量健康组织暴露的风险。对高剂量非常敏感的器官是食道。 CT 上的低对比度和椭圆形形状使得运动估计变得困难。我们通过现代算法来解决这个问题，以体素方式测量食道运动并估计与运动相关的剂量影响。使用可变形图像配准和 11 个内部数据集和 5 个公共数据集的 4DCT 测量食管运动。将目前在 3DCT 上绘制器官轮廓的临床实践与及时解析的 4DCT 轮廓进行比较。通过分析 4D 剂量分布中每个体素的轨迹来估计运动的剂量影响。最后建立了器官运动模型，可以更轻松地进行患者之间的比较。运动分析显示平均绝对最大运动幅度为左右 4.55 +/- 1.81 毫米、前后 5.29 +/- 2.67 毫米以及上下 10.78 +/- 5.30 毫米。各组之间的运动差异显着。大约 50% 的案例违反了剂量测定通过标准。在 50% 的呼吸周期中，3DCT 创建的轮廓未覆盖器官的 14%，并且 3D 轮廓比所有 4D 轮廓的并集小约 38%。运动模型显示最大运动并不限于器官的下部。我们的结果显示运动幅度高于文献中大多数报道的值，并且不同患者的运动非常不均匀。因此，在轮廓和规划中应考虑个体运动信息。 本文旨在测量呼吸引起的食管运动及其对放射治疗剂量分布的影响，通过4DCT和变形图像配准技术分析运动特征。 Tobias Fechter,Sonja Adebahr,Anca-Ligia Grosu,Dimos Baltas physics.med-ph,cs.CV

title: Evaluating the Safety of Deep Reinforcement Learning Models using Semi-Formal Verification
title_zh: 使用半形式验证评估深度强化学习模型的安全性
abstract: Groundbreaking successes have been achieved by Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) in solving practical decision-making problems. Robotics, in particular, can involve high-cost hardware and human interactions. Hence, scrupulous evaluations of trained models are required to avoid unsafe behaviours in the operational environment. However, designing metrics to measure the safety of a neural network is an open problem, since standard evaluation parameters (e.g., total reward) are not informative enough. In this paper, we present a semi-formal verification approach for decision-making tasks, based on interval analysis, that addresses the computational demanding of previous verification frameworks and design metrics to measure the safety of the models. Our method obtains comparable results over standard benchmarks with respect to formal verifiers, while drastically reducing the computation time. Moreover, our approach allows to efficiently evaluate safety properties for decision-making models in practical applications such as mapless navigation for mobile robots and trajectory generation for manipulators.
summary: Groundbreaking successes have been achieved by Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) in solving practical decision-making problems. Robotics, in particular, can involve high-cost hardware and human interactions. Hence, scrupulous evaluations of trained models are required to avoid unsafe behaviours in the operational environment. However, designing metrics to measure the safety of a neural network is an open problem, since standard evaluation parameters (e.g., total reward) are not informative enough. In this paper, we present a semi-formal verification approach for decision-making tasks, based on interval analysis, that addresses the computational demanding of previous verification frameworks and design metrics to measure the safety of the models. Our method obtains comparable results over standard benchmarks with respect to formal verifiers, while drastically reducing the computation time. Moreover, our approach allows to efficiently evaluate safety properties for decision-making models in practical applications such as mapless navigation for mobile robots and trajectory generation for manipulators.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）在解决实际决策问题方面取得了突破性的成功。尤其是机器人技术，可能涉及高成本的硬件和人类交互。因此，需要对经过训练的模型进行严格评估，以避免操作环境中的不安全行为。然而，设计衡量神经网络安全性的指标是一个悬而未决的问题，因为标准评估参数（例如总奖励）信息不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于区间分析的决策任务的半形式验证方法，该方法解决了先前验证框架和设计指标的计算需求，以衡量模型的安全性。我们的方法获得了与正式验证者的标准基准相当的结果，同时大大减少了计算时间。此外，我们的方法可以有效评估实际应用中决策模型的安全属性，例如移动机器人的无地图导航和机械臂的轨迹生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区间分析的半形式验证方法，用于评估深度强化学习模型的安全性，解决传统验证框架计算成本高且缺乏有效安全度量指标的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在机器人等高风险领域应用时，现有评估指标（如总奖励）无法有效衡量模型安全性，可能导致危险行为，亟需可靠的安全验证方法。
AI.method: 采用区间分析技术构建半形式验证框架，设计计算效率更高的安全度量指标，通过减少计算复杂度实现对决策模型安全属性的高效验证。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中验证效果与形式验证器相当，计算时间显著降低，并成功应用于移动机器人无地图导航和机械臂轨迹生成等实际场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度强化学习模型的安全性评估提供了高效可行的解决方案，既保证了验证精度又降低了计算成本，为实际应用部署奠定了基础。

authors_text: Alexander Millane,Helen Oleynikova,Christian Lanegger,Jeff Delmerico,Juan Nieto,Roland Siegwart,Marc Pollefeys,Cesar Cadena
title: Freetures: Localization in Signed Distance Function Maps
title_zh: Freetures：有符号距离函数图中的定位
abstract: Localization of a robotic system within a previously mapped environment is important for reducing estimation drift and for reusing previously built maps. Existing techniques for geometry-based localization have focused on the description of local surface geometry, usually using pointclouds as the underlying representation. We propose a system for geometry-based localization that extracts features directly from an implicit surface representation: the Signed Distance Function (SDF). The SDF varies continuously through space, which allows the proposed system to extract and utilize features describing both surfaces and free-space. Through evaluations on public datasets, we demonstrate the flexibility of this approach, and show an increase in localization performance over state-of-the-art handcrafted surfaces-only descriptors. We achieve an average improvement of ~12% on an RGB-D dataset and ~18% on a LiDAR-based dataset. Finally, we demonstrate our system for localizing a LiDAR-equipped MAV within a previously built map of a search and rescue training ground.
summary: Localization of a robotic system within a previously mapped environment is important for reducing estimation drift and for reusing previously built maps. Existing techniques for geometry-based localization have focused on the description of local surface geometry, usually using pointclouds as the underlying representation. We propose a system for geometry-based localization that extracts features directly from an implicit surface representation: the Signed Distance Function (SDF). The SDF varies continuously through space, which allows the proposed system to extract and utilize features describing both surfaces and free-space. Through evaluations on public datasets, we demonstrate the flexibility of this approach, and show an increase in localization performance over state-of-the-art handcrafted surfaces-only descriptors. We achieve an average improvement of ~12% on an RGB-D dataset and ~18% on a LiDAR-based dataset. Finally, we demonstrate our system for localizing a LiDAR-equipped MAV within a previously built map of a search and rescue training ground.
abstract_zh: 在先前绘制的环境中定位机器人系统对于减少估计漂移和重用先前构建的地图非常重要。现有的基于几何的定位技术主要集中于局部表面几何的描述，通常使用点云作为底层表示。我们提出了一种基于几何的定位系统，直接从隐式表面表示中提取特征：符号距离函数（SDF）。 SDF 在空间中连续变化，这使得所提出的系统能够提取和利用描述表面和自由空间的特征。通过对公共数据集的评估，我们证明了这种方法的灵活性，并显示出与最先进的手工制作的仅表面描述符相比，本地化性能有所提高。我们在 RGB-D 数据集上实现了约 12% 的平均改进，在基于 LiDAR 的数据集上实现了约 18% 的平均改进。最后，我们展示了我们的系统，用于在先前构建的搜救训练场地图中定位配备 LiDAR 的 MAV。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式表面表示（SDF）的几何定位方法，用于机器人系统在已知环境中的定位。
AI.motivation: 现有基于几何的定位方法依赖点云表示，难以同时描述表面与自由空间信息，而SDF能连续表示空间信息，具有更大灵活性。
AI.method: 从SDF隐式表面直接提取特征，利用连续空间信息描述表面与自由空间，构建定位系统并进行多数据集验证。
AI.result: 在RGB-D数据集上平均提升12%，在LiDAR数据集上平均提升18%，并在搜救场景中验证了系统有效性。
AI.conclusion: SDF特征提取方法相比传统手工表面描述子更具灵活性和定位性能，为机器人定位提供了新思路。

search_text: Freetures: Localization in Signed Distance Function Maps Freetures：有符号距离函数图中的定位 Localization of a robotic system within a previously mapped environment is important for reducing estimation drift and for reusing previously built maps. Existing techniques for geometry-based localization have focused on the description of local surface geometry, usually using pointclouds as the underlying representation. We propose a system for geometry-based localization that extracts features directly from an implicit surface representation: the Signed Distance Function (SDF). The SDF varies continuously through space, which allows the proposed system to extract and utilize features describing both surfaces and free-space. Through evaluations on public datasets, we demonstrate the flexibility of this approach, and show an increase in localization performance over state-of-the-art handcrafted surfaces-only descriptors. We achieve an average improvement of ~12% on an RGB-D dataset and ~18% on a LiDAR-based dataset. Finally, we demonstrate our system for localizing a LiDAR-equipped MAV within a previously built map of a search and rescue training ground. 在先前绘制的环境中定位机器人系统对于减少估计漂移和重用先前构建的地图非常重要。现有的基于几何的定位技术主要集中于局部表面几何的描述，通常使用点云作为底层表示。我们提出了一种基于几何的定位系统，直接从隐式表面表示中提取特征：符号距离函数（SDF）。 SDF 在空间中连续变化，这使得所提出的系统能够提取和利用描述表面和自由空间的特征。通过对公共数据集的评估，我们证明了这种方法的灵活性，并显示出与最先进的手工制作的仅表面描述符相比，本地化性能有所提高。我们在 RGB-D 数据集上实现了约 12% 的平均改进，在基于 LiDAR 的数据集上实现了约 18% 的平均改进。最后，我们展示了我们的系统，用于在先前构建的搜救训练场地图中定位配备 LiDAR 的 MAV。 本文提出一种基于隐式表面表示（SDF）的几何定位方法，用于机器人系统在已知环境中的定位。 Alexander Millane,Helen Oleynikova,Christian Lanegger,Jeff Delmerico,Juan Nieto,Roland Siegwart,Marc Pollefeys,Cesar Cadena cs.RO

title: Understanding Unnatural Questions Improves Reasoning over Text
title_zh: 理解不自然的问题可以提高文本推理能力
abstract: Complex question answering (CQA) over raw text is a challenging task. A prominent approach to this task is based on the programmer-interpreter framework, where the programmer maps the question into a sequence of reasoning actions which is then executed on the raw text by the interpreter. Learning an effective CQA model requires large amounts of human-annotated data,consisting of the ground-truth sequence of reasoning actions, which is time-consuming and expensive to collect at scale. In this paper, we address the challenge of learning a high-quality programmer (parser) by projecting natural human-generated questions into unnatural machine-generated questions which are more convenient to parse. We firstly generate synthetic (question,action sequence) pairs by a data generator, and train a semantic parser that associates synthetic questions with their corresponding action sequences. To capture the diversity when applied tonatural questions, we learn a projection model to map natural questions into their most similar unnatural questions for which the parser can work well. Without any natural training data, our projection model provides high-quality action sequences for the CQA task. Experimental results show that the QA model trained exclusively with synthetic data generated by our method outperforms its state-of-the-art counterpart trained on human-labeled data.
summary: Complex question answering (CQA) over raw text is a challenging task. A prominent approach to this task is based on the programmer-interpreter framework, where the programmer maps the question into a sequence of reasoning actions which is then executed on the raw text by the interpreter. Learning an effective CQA model requires large amounts of human-annotated data,consisting of the ground-truth sequence of reasoning actions, which is time-consuming and expensive to collect at scale. In this paper, we address the challenge of learning a high-quality programmer (parser) by projecting natural human-generated questions into unnatural machine-generated questions which are more convenient to parse. We firstly generate synthetic (question,action sequence) pairs by a data generator, and train a semantic parser that associates synthetic questions with their corresponding action sequences. To capture the diversity when applied tonatural questions, we learn a projection model to map natural questions into their most similar unnatural questions for which the parser can work well. Without any natural training data, our projection model provides high-quality action sequences for the CQA task. Experimental results show that the QA model trained exclusively with synthetic data generated by our method outperforms its state-of-the-art counterpart trained on human-labeled data.
abstract_zh: 针对原始文本的复杂问答 (CQA) 是一项具有挑战性的任务。完成此任务的一个重要方法是基于程序员解释器框架，其中程序员将问题映射为一系列推理操作，然后由解释器对原始文本执行这些推理操作。学习有效的 CQA 模型需要大量人工注释的数据，其中包括推理动作的真实序列，大规模收集这些数据既耗时又昂贵。在本文中，我们通过将自然的人类生成的问题投射到更方便解析的非自然的机器生成的问题来解决学习高质量程序员（解析器）的挑战。我们首先通过数据生成器生成合成（问题，动作序列）对，并训练一个语义解析器，将合成问题与其相应的动作序列相关联。为了捕获应用于自然问题时的多样性，我们学习了一个投影模型，将自然问题映射到解析器可以很好地工作的最相似的非自然问题。在没有任何自然训练数据的情况下，我们的投影模型为 CQA 任务提供高质量的动作序列。实验结果表明，专门使用我们的方法生成的合成数据训练的 QA 模型优于在人类标记数据上训练的最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 通过生成和解析非自然问题提升复杂文本问答的性能
AI.motivation: 复杂文本问答需要大量人工标注数据，而人工标注成本高昂且难以扩展
AI.method: 生成合成问题-动作对训练解析器，并建立投影模型将自然问题映射到最相似的非自然问题
AI.result: 仅用合成数据训练的模型在CQA任务中超越了使用人工标注数据的最新方法
AI.conclusion: 无需自然训练数据即可通过合成数据和投影模型实现高质量文本推理

title: A combined full-reference image quality assessment approach based on convolutional activation maps
title_zh: 基于卷积激活图的组合全参考图像质量评估方法
comment: ef:Algorithms 2020
comments: ef:Algorithms 2020
abstract: The goal of full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) is to predict the quality of an image as perceived by human observers with using its pristine, reference counterpart. In this study, we explore a novel, combined approach which predicts the perceptual quality of a distorted image by compiling a feature vector from convolutional activation maps. More specifically, a reference-distorted image pair is run through a pretrained convolutional neural network and the activation maps are compared with a traditional image similarity metric. Subsequently, the resulted feature vector is mapped onto perceptual quality scores with the help of a trained support vector regressor. A detailed parameter study is also presented in which the design choices of the proposed method is reasoned. Furthermore, we study the relationship between the amount of training images and the prediction performance. Specifically, it is demonstrated that the proposed method can be trained with few amount of data to reach high prediction performance. Our best proposal - ActMapFeat - is compared to the state-of-the-art on six publicly available benchmark IQA databases, such as KADID-10k, TID2013, TID2008, MDID, CSIQ, and VCL-FER. Specifically, our method is able to significantly outperform the state-of-the-art on these benchmark databases.
summary: The goal of full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) is to predict the quality of an image as perceived by human observers with using its pristine, reference counterpart. In this study, we explore a novel, combined approach which predicts the perceptual quality of a distorted image by compiling a feature vector from convolutional activation maps. More specifically, a reference-distorted image pair is run through a pretrained convolutional neural network and the activation maps are compared with a traditional image similarity metric. Subsequently, the resulted feature vector is mapped onto perceptual quality scores with the help of a trained support vector regressor. A detailed parameter study is also presented in which the design choices of the proposed method is reasoned. Furthermore, we study the relationship between the amount of training images and the prediction performance. Specifically, it is demonstrated that the proposed method can be trained with few amount of data to reach high prediction performance. Our best proposal - ActMapFeat - is compared to the state-of-the-art on six publicly available benchmark IQA databases, such as KADID-10k, TID2013, TID2008, MDID, CSIQ, and VCL-FER. Specifically, our method is able to significantly outperform the state-of-the-art on these benchmark databases.
abstract_zh: 全参考图像质量评估 (FR-IQA) 的目标是使用原始参考对应物来预测人类观察者感知到的图像质量。在这项研究中，我们探索了一种新颖的组合方法，通过从卷积激活图编译特征向量来预测扭曲图像的感知质量。更具体地说，参考失真图像对通过预训练的卷积神经网络运行，并将激活图与传统图像相似性度量进行比较。随后，在经过训练的支持向量回归器的帮助下，将得到的特征向量映射到感知质量分数。还提出了详细的参数研究，其中对所提出方法的设计选择进行了推理。此外，我们研究了训练图像数量与预测性能之间的关系。具体来说，证明了所提出的方法可以用少量的数据进行训练，以达到较高的预测性能。我们的最佳提案 - ActMapFeat - 与六个公开可用的基准 IQA 数据库（例如 KADID-10k、TID2013、TID2008、MDID、CSIQ 和 VCL-FER）的最新技术进行比较。具体来说，我们的方法能够显着优于这些基准数据库的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积激活图的全参考图像质量评估方法，通过结合深度学习特征与传统相似度指标提升质量预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法难以准确反映人眼感知差异，需探索融合深度神经网络特征与传统指标的新型混合评估框架。
AI.method: 使用预训练CNN提取参考图与失真图的激活图，结合传统相似度指标构建特征向量，再通过支持向量回归映射为感知质量分数，并验证训练数据量对性能的影响。
AI.result: 提出的ActMapFeat方法在KADID-10k等六个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进算法，且在少量训练数据下即可达到高预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 融合卷积神经网络激活特征与传统度量的混合方法能有效提升全参考图像质量评估性能，且具有数据效率优势。

Subsequently, the resulted feature vector is mapped onto perceptual quality scores with the help of a trained support vector regressor. A detailed parameter study is also presented in which the design choices of the proposed method is reasoned. Furthermore, we study the relationship between the amount of training images and the prediction performance. Specifically, it is demonstrated that the proposed method can be trained with few amount of data to reach high prediction performance. Our best proposal - ActMapFeat - is compared to the state-of-the-art on six publicly available benchmark IQA databases, such as KADID-10k, TID2013, TID2008, MDID, CSIQ, and VCL-FER. Specifically, our method is able to significantly outperform the state-of-the-art on these benchmark databases. 全参考图像质量评估 (FR-IQA) 的目标是使用原始参考对应物来预测人类观察者感知到的图像质量。在这项研究中，我们探索了一种新颖的组合方法，通过从卷积激活图编译特征向量来预测扭曲图像的感知质量。更具体地说，参考失真图像对通过预训练的卷积神经网络运行，并将激活图与传统图像相似性度量进行比较。随后，在经过训练的支持向量回归器的帮助下，将得到的特征向量映射到感知质量分数。还提出了详细的参数研究，其中对所提出方法的设计选择进行了推理。此外，我们研究了训练图像数量与预测性能之间的关系。具体来说，证明了所提出的方法可以用少量的数据进行训练，以达到较高的预测性能。我们的最佳提案 - ActMapFeat - 与六个公开可用的基准 IQA 数据库（例如 KADID-10k、TID2013、TID2008、MDID、CSIQ 和 VCL-FER）的最新技术进行比较。具体来说，我们的方法能够显着优于这些基准数据库的最新技术。 本文提出一种基于卷积激活图的全参考图像质量评估方法，通过结合深度学习特征与传统相似度指标提升质量预测性能。 Domonkos Varga cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Honglin Yuan,Remco C. Veltkamp,Georgios Albanis,Nikolaos Zioulis,Dimitrios Zarpalas,Petros Daras
title: SHREC 2020 track: 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: SHREC 2020 赛道：6D 物体姿态估计
comment: ef:Eurographics Workshop on 3D Object Retrieval (2020)
comments: ef:Eurographics Workshop on 3D Object Retrieval (2020)
abstract: 6D pose estimation is crucial for augmented reality, virtual reality, robotic manipulation and visual navigation. However, the problem is challenging due to the variety of objects in the real world. They have varying 3D shape and their appearances in captured images are affected by sensor noise, changing lighting conditions and occlusions between objects. Different pose estimation methods have different strengths and weaknesses, depending on feature representations and scene contents. At the same time, existing 3D datasets that are used for data-driven methods to estimate 6D poses have limited view angles and low resolution. To address these issues, we organize the Shape Retrieval Challenge benchmark on 6D pose estimation and create a physically accurate simulator that is able to generate photo-realistic color-and-depth image pairs with corresponding ground truth 6D poses. From captured color and depth images, we use this simulator to generate a 3D dataset which has 400 photo-realistic synthesized color-and-depth image pairs with various view angles for training, and another 100 captured and synthetic images for testing. Five research groups register in this track and two of them submitted their results. Data-driven methods are the current trend in 6D object pose estimation and our evaluation results show that approaches which fully exploit the color and geometric features are more robust for 6D pose estimation of reflective and texture-less objects and occlusion. This benchmark and comparative evaluation results have the potential to further enrich and boost the research of 6D object pose estimation and its applications.

abstract_zh: 6D 姿态估计对于增强现实、虚拟现实、机器人操纵和视觉导航至关重要。然而，由于现实世界中对象的多样性，该问题具有挑战性。它们具有不同的 3D 形状，并且它们在捕获的图像中的外观受到传感器噪声、不断变化的照明条件和物体之间遮挡的影响。不同的姿态估计方法具有不同的优点和缺点，具体取决于特征表示和场景内容。与此同时，用于估计 6D 姿态的数据驱动方法的现有 3D 数据集具有有限的视角和低分辨率。为了解决这些问题，我们组织了关于 6D 姿态估计的形状检索挑战基准，并创建了一个物理精确的模拟器，能够生成具有相应地面真实 6D 姿态的照片般逼真的颜色和深度图像对。我们使用该模拟器从捕获的颜色和深度图像生成 3D 数据集，其中包含 400 个具有不同视角的逼真合成颜色和深度图像对用于训练，以及另外 100 个捕获和合成图像用于测试。五个研究小组在此轨道上注册，其中两个提交了他们的结果。数据驱动方法是 6D 物体姿态估计的当前趋势，我们的评估结果表明，充分利用颜色和几何特征的方法对于反射和无纹理物体以及遮挡的 6D 姿态估计更加稳健。该基准和比较评估结果有可能进一步丰富和推动6D物体位姿估计及其应用的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建物理精确的模拟器和高质量数据集，解决6D物体姿态估计中的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在视角有限、分辨率低等问题，且现实场景中的光照、遮挡等因素使姿态估计难度增加。
AI.method: 开发物理精确的模拟器生成逼真的彩色-深度图像对，并构建包含400张训练图像和100张测试图像的3D数据集。
AI.result: 五支研究团队参与，其中两支提交结果，表明融合颜色和几何特征的方法在处理反光/无纹理物体及遮挡时更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试和评估结果有望推动6D物体姿态估计方法的研究与应用发展。

authors_text: Yiluan Guo,Holger Caesar,Oscar Beijbom,Jonah Philion,Sanja Fidler
title: The efficacy of Neural Planning Metrics: A meta-analysis of PKL on nuScenes
title_zh: 神经规划指标的功效：nuScenes 上 PKL 的荟萃分析
comment: IROS 2020 Workshop on Benchmarking Progress in Autonomous Driving
comments: IROS 2020 Workshop on Benchmarking Progress in Autonomous Driving
abstract: A high-performing object detection system plays a crucial role in autonomous driving (AD). The performance, typically evaluated in terms of mean Average Precision, does not take into account orientation and distance of the actors in the scene, which are important for the safe AD. It also ignores environmental context. Recently, Philion et al. proposed a neural planning metric (PKL), based on the KL divergence of a planner's trajectory and the groundtruth route, to accommodate these requirements. In this paper, we use this neural planning metric to score all submissions of the nuScenes detection challenge and analyze the results. We find that while somewhat correlated with mAP, the PKL metric shows different behavior to increased traffic density, ego velocity, road curvature and intersections. Finally, we propose ideas to extend the neural planning metric.
summary: A high-performing object detection system plays a crucial role in autonomous driving (AD). The performance, typically evaluated in terms of mean Average Precision, does not take into account orientation and distance of the actors in the scene, which are important for the safe AD. It also ignores environmental context. Recently, Philion et al. proposed a neural planning metric (PKL), based on the KL divergence of a planner's trajectory and the groundtruth route, to accommodate these requirements. In this paper, we use this neural planning metric to score all submissions of the nuScenes detection challenge and analyze the results. We find that while somewhat correlated with mAP, the PKL metric shows different behavior to increased traffic density, ego velocity, road curvature and intersections. Finally, we propose ideas to extend the neural planning metric.
abstract_zh: 高性能的物体检测系统在自动驾驶（AD）中发挥着至关重要的作用。通常根据平均精度来评估性能，不考虑场景中演员的方向和距离，而这对于安全 AD 很重要。它还忽略了环境背景。最近，菲利翁等人。提出了一种基于规划器轨迹和真实路线的 KL 散度的神经规划度量（PKL）来满足这些要求。在本文中，我们使用这种神经规划指标对 nuScenes 检测挑战的所有提交进行评分并分析结果。我们发现，虽然与 mAP 有一定的相关性，但 PKL 指标对于交通密度、自我速度、道路曲率和交叉口的增加表现出不同的行为。最后，我们提出了扩展神经规划指标的想法。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了神经规划指标PKL在nuScenes数据集上的有效性，分析其与mAP及其他因素的关系，并提出扩展方法。
AI.motivation: 现有指标如mAP在自动驾驶中忽略方向、距离和环境上下文，需更全面的评估指标。
AI.method: 使用PKL指标评估nuScenes挑战赛的提交结果，分析其与交通密度、速度、道路曲率等变量的关系。
AI.result: PKL与mAP部分相关，但在高交通密度、速度、道路曲率等情况下表现不同。
AI.conclusion: 提出扩展PKL指标以更全面评估自动驾驶系统性能的建议。

ai_content.conclusion: 提出扩展PKL指标以更全面评估自动驾驶系统性能的建议。

authors_text: Yan Xu,Zhaoyang Huang,Kwan-Yee Lin,Xinge Zhu,Jianping Shi,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang,Hongsheng Li
title: SelfVoxeLO: Self-supervised LiDAR Odometry with Voxel-based Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: SelfVoxeLO：采用基于体素的深度神经网络的自监督 LiDAR 里程计
comment: Accepted to CoRL 2020
comments: Accepted to CoRL 2020
abstract: Recent learning-based LiDAR odometry methods have demonstrated their competitiveness. However, most methods still face two substantial challenges: 1) the 2D projection representation of LiDAR data cannot effectively encode 3D structures from the point clouds; 2) the needs for a large amount of labeled data for training limit the application scope of these methods. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised LiDAR odometry method, dubbed SelfVoxeLO, to tackle these two difficulties. Specifically, we propose a 3D convolution network to process the raw LiDAR data directly, which extracts features that better encode the 3D geometric patterns. To suit our network to self-supervised learning, we design several novel loss functions that utilize the inherent properties of LiDAR point clouds. Moreover, an uncertainty-aware mechanism is incorporated in the loss functions to alleviate the interference of moving objects/noises. We evaluate our method's performances on two large-scale datasets, i.e., KITTI and Apollo-SouthBay. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods by 27%/32% in terms of translational/rotational errors on the KITTI dataset and also performs well on the Apollo-SouthBay dataset. By including more unlabelled training data, our method can further improve performance comparable to the supervised methods.
summary: Recent learning-based LiDAR odometry methods have demonstrated their competitiveness. However, most methods still face two substantial challenges: 1) the 2D projection representation of LiDAR data cannot effectively encode 3D structures from the point clouds; 2) the needs for a large amount of labeled data for training limit the application scope of these methods. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised LiDAR odometry method, dubbed SelfVoxeLO, to tackle these two difficulties. Specifically, we propose a 3D convolution network to process the raw LiDAR data directly, which extracts features that better encode the 3D geometric patterns. To suit our network to self-supervised learning, we design several novel loss functions that utilize the inherent properties of LiDAR point clouds. Moreover, an uncertainty-aware mechanism is incorporated in the loss functions to alleviate the interference of moving objects/noises. We evaluate our method's performances on two large-scale datasets, i.e., KITTI and Apollo-SouthBay. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods by 27%/32% in terms of translational/rotational errors on the KITTI dataset and also performs well on the Apollo-SouthBay dataset. By including more unlabelled training data, our method can further improve performance comparable to the supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 最近基于学习的激光雷达测距方法已经证明了其竞争力。然而，大多数方法仍然面临两个重大挑战：1）LiDAR 数据的 2D 投影表示无法有效地从点云编码 3D 结构； 2）训练需要大量标记数据，限制了这些方法的应用范围。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督 LiDAR 里程计方法，称为 SelfVoxeLO，来解决这两个问题。具体来说，我们提出了一个 3D 卷积网络来直接处理原始 LiDAR 数据，提取更好地编码 3D 几何图案的特征。为了使我们的网络适应自监督学习，我们设计了几种利用激光雷达点云固有属性的新颖损失函数。此外，损失函数中纳入了不确定性感知机制，以减轻移动物体/噪声的干扰。我们评估了我们的方法在两个大型数据集（即 KITTI 和 Apollo-SouthBay）上的性能。我们的方法在 KITTI 数据集上的平移/旋转误差方面比最先进的无监督方法高出 27%/32%，并且在 Apollo-SouthBay 数据集上也表现良好。通过包含更多未标记的训练数据，我们的方法可以进一步提高与监督方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于体素的自监督LiDAR里程计方法SelfVoxeLO，解决三维结构编码不足和依赖标注数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR里程计方法因二维投影无法有效编码三维结构，且依赖大量标注数据限制了应用范围。
AI.method: 设计三维卷积网络直接处理原始LiDAR数据，结合自监督学习的新型损失函数及不确定性感知机制，减少移动物体和噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，翻译/旋转误差较先进无监督方法降低27%/32%，在Apollo-SouthBay数据集表现优异，使用更多未标注数据后性能接近监督方法。
AI.conclusion: SelfVoxeLO通过自监督学习有效解决三维结构编码与数据标注依赖问题，为大规模应用提供可行方案。

search_text: SelfVoxeLO: Self-supervised LiDAR Odometry with Voxel-based Deep Neural Networks SelfVoxeLO：采用基于体素的深度神经网络的自监督 LiDAR 里程计 Recent learning-based LiDAR odometry methods have demonstrated their competitiveness. However, most methods still face two substantial challenges: 1) the 2D projection representation of LiDAR data cannot effectively encode 3D structures from the point clouds; 2) the needs for a large amount of labeled data for training limit the application scope of these methods. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised LiDAR odometry method, dubbed SelfVoxeLO, to tackle these two difficulties. Specifically, we propose a 3D convolution network to process the raw LiDAR data directly, which extracts features that better encode the 3D geometric patterns. To suit our network to self-supervised learning, we design several novel loss functions that utilize the inherent properties of LiDAR point clouds. Moreover, an uncertainty-aware mechanism is incorporated in the loss functions to alleviate the interference of moving objects/noises. We evaluate our method's performances on two large-scale datasets, i.e., KITTI and Apollo-SouthBay. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods by 27%/32% in terms of translational/rotational errors on the KITTI dataset and also performs well on the Apollo-SouthBay dataset. By including more unlabelled training data, our method can further improve performance comparable to the supervised methods. 最近基于学习的激光雷达测距方法已经证明了其竞争力。然而，大多数方法仍然面临两个重大挑战：1）LiDAR 数据的 2D 投影表示无法有效地从点云编码 3D 结构； 2）训练需要大量标记数据，限制了这些方法的应用范围。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督 LiDAR 里程计方法，称为 SelfVoxeLO，来解决这两个问题。具体来说，我们提出了一个 3D 卷积网络来直接处理原始 LiDAR 数据，提取更好地编码 3D 几何图案的特征。为了使我们的网络适应自监督学习，我们设计了几种利用激光雷达点云固有属性的新颖损失函数。此外，损失函数中纳入了不确定性感知机制，以减轻移动物体/噪声的干扰。我们评估了我们的方法在两个大型数据集（即 KITTI 和 Apollo-SouthBay）上的性能。我们的方法在 KITTI 数据集上的平移/旋转误差方面比最先进的无监督方法高出 27%/32%，并且在 Apollo-SouthBay 数据集上也表现良好。通过包含更多未标记的训练数据，我们的方法可以进一步提高与监督方法相当的性能。 本文提出一种基于体素的自监督LiDAR里程计方法SelfVoxeLO，解决三维结构编码不足和依赖标注数据的问题。 Yan Xu,Zhaoyang Huang,Kwan-Yee Lin,Xinge Zhu,Jianping Shi,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang,Hongsheng Li cs.CV,cs.RO

title: SMA-STN: Segmented Movement-Attending Spatiotemporal Network forMicro-Expression Recognition
title_zh: SMA-STN：用于微表情识别的分段运动参与时空网络
comment: 9 pages
comments: 9 pages
abstract: Correctly perceiving micro-expression is difficult since micro-expression is an involuntary, repressed, and subtle facial expression, and efficiently revealing the subtle movement changes and capturing the significant segments in a micro-expression sequence is the key to micro-expression recognition (MER). To handle the crucial issue, in this paper, we firstly propose a dynamic segmented sparse imaging module (DSSI) to compute dynamic images as local-global spatiotemporal descriptors under a unique sampling protocol, which reveals the subtle movement changes visually in an efficient way. Secondly, a segmented movement-attending spatiotemporal network (SMA-STN) is proposed to further unveil imperceptible small movement changes, which utilizes a spatiotemporal movement-attending module (STMA) to capture long-distance spatial relation for facial expression and weigh temporal segments. Besides, a deviation enhancement loss (DE-Loss) is embedded in the SMA-STN to enhance the robustness of SMA-STN to subtle movement changes in feature level. Extensive experiments on three widely used benchmarks, i.e., CASME II, SAMM, and SHIC, show that the proposed SMA-STN achieves better MER performance than other state-of-the-art methods, which proves that the proposed method is effective to handle the challenging MER problem.
summary: Correctly perceiving micro-expression is difficult since micro-expression is an involuntary, repressed, and subtle facial expression, and efficiently revealing the subtle movement changes and capturing the significant segments in a micro-expression sequence is the key to micro-expression recognition (MER). To handle the crucial issue, in this paper, we firstly propose a dynamic segmented sparse imaging module (DSSI) to compute dynamic images as local-global spatiotemporal descriptors under a unique sampling protocol, which reveals the subtle movement changes visually in an efficient way. Secondly, a segmented movement-attending spatiotemporal network (SMA-STN) is proposed to further unveil imperceptible small movement changes, which utilizes a spatiotemporal movement-attending module (STMA) to capture long-distance spatial relation for facial expression and weigh temporal segments. Besides, a deviation enhancement loss (DE-Loss) is embedded in the SMA-STN to enhance the robustness of SMA-STN to subtle movement changes in feature level. Extensive experiments on three widely used benchmarks, i.e., CASME II, SAMM, and SHIC, show that the proposed SMA-STN achieves better MER performance than other state-of-the-art methods, which proves that the proposed method is effective to handle the challenging MER problem.
abstract_zh: 正确感知微表情是很困难的，因为微表情是一种不自觉的、压抑的、微妙的面部表情，有效地揭示微表情序列中的细微动作变化并捕捉微表情序列中的重要片段是微表情识别（MER）的关键。为了解决这个关键问题，在本文中，我们首先提出了一种动态分段稀疏成像模块（DSSI），在独特的采样协议下将动态图像计算为局部全局时空描述符，从而以有效的方式在视觉上揭示微妙的运动变化。其次，提出了分段运动注意时空网络（SMA-STN），以进一步揭示难以察觉的微小运动变化，该网络利用时空运动注意模块（STMA）来捕获面部表情的长距离空间关系并权衡时间片段。此外，SMA-STN中嵌入了偏差增强损失（DE-Loss），以增强SMA-STN对特征级别细微运动变化的鲁棒性。对三个广泛使用的基准（CASME II、SAMM 和 SHIC）的大量实验表明，所提出的 SMA-STN 比其他最先进的方法实现了更好的 MER 性能，这证明所提出的方法可以有效处理具有挑战性的 MER 问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SMA-STN的分割运动关注时空网络，用于微表情识别，以解决微表情因细微且难以捕捉而带来的识别难题。
AI.motivation: 微表情因具有无意识、压抑和微妙的特点，导致其识别困难。现有方法难以有效揭示微表情序列中的细微运动变化并捕捉关键片段，亟需改进模型以提升识别性能。
AI.method: 提出动态分割稀疏成像模块（DSSI）生成局部-全局时空描述子，并设计分割运动关注时空网络（SMA-STN），结合时空运动关注模块（STMA）捕捉长距离空间关系与时间片段权重，同时引入偏差增强损失（DE-Loss）提升特征级鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CASME II、SAMM和SHIC三个基准数据集上的实验表明，SMA-STN在微表情识别性能上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SMA-STN通过有效捕捉微表情序列中的细微运动变化和关键片段，验证了其在解决微表情识别挑战中的有效性。

authors_text: Pierfrancesco Ardino,Yahui Liu,Elisa Ricci,Bruno Lepri,Marco De Nadai
title: Semantic-Guided Inpainting Network for Complex Urban Scenes Manipulation
title_zh: 用于复杂城市场景操作的语义引导修复网络
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of IEEE ICPR 2020
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of IEEE ICPR 2020
abstract: Manipulating images of complex scenes to reconstruct, insert and/or remove specific object instances is a challenging task. Complex scenes contain multiple semantics and objects, which are frequently cluttered or ambiguous, thus hampering the performance of inpainting models. Conventional techniques often rely on structural information such as object contours in multi-stage approaches that generate unreliable results and boundaries. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning model to alter a complex urban scene by removing a user-specified portion of the image and coherently inserting a new object (e.g. car or pedestrian) in that scene. Inspired by recent works on image inpainting, our proposed method leverages the semantic segmentation to model the content and structure of the image, and learn the best shape and location of the object to insert. To generate reliable results, we design a new decoder block that combines the semantic segmentation and generation task to guide better the generation of new objects and scenes, which have to be semantically consistent with the image. Our experiments, conducted on two large-scale datasets of urban scenes (Cityscapes and Indian Driving), show that our proposed approach successfully address the problem of semantically-guided inpainting of complex urban scene.
summary: Manipulating images of complex scenes to reconstruct, insert and/or remove specific object instances is a challenging task. Complex scenes contain multiple semantics and objects, which are frequently cluttered or ambiguous, thus hampering the performance of inpainting models. Conventional techniques often rely on structural information such as object contours in multi-stage approaches that generate unreliable results and boundaries. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning model to alter a complex urban scene by removing a user-specified portion of the image and coherently inserting a new object (e.g. car or pedestrian) in that scene. Inspired by recent works on image inpainting, our proposed method leverages the semantic segmentation to model the content and structure of the image, and learn the best shape and location of the object to insert. To generate reliable results, we design a new decoder block that combines the semantic segmentation and generation task to guide better the generation of new objects and scenes, which have to be semantically consistent with the image. Our experiments, conducted on two large-scale datasets of urban scenes (Cityscapes and Indian Driving), show that our proposed approach successfully address the problem of semantically-guided inpainting of complex urban scene.
abstract_zh: 操纵复杂场景的图像来重建、插入和/或删除特定的对象实例是一项具有挑战性的任务。复杂的场景包含多种语义和对象，这些语义和对象经常是混乱或模糊的，从而阻碍了修复模型的性能。传统技术通常依赖于结构信息，例如多阶段方法中的对象轮廓，从而生成不可靠的结果和边界。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习模型，通过删除图像中用户指定的部分并在该场景中连贯地插入新对象（例如汽车或行人）来改变复杂的城市场景。受最近图像修复工作的启发，我们提出的方法利用语义分割对图像的内容和结构进行建模，并学习要插入的对象的最佳形状和位置。为了生成可靠的结果，我们设计了一个新的解码器块，它结合了语义分割和生成任务，以更好地指导新对象和场景的生成，这些对象和场景必须在语义上与图像一致。我们在两个大型城市场景数据集（城市景观和印度驾驶）上进行的实验表明，我们提出的方法成功解决了复杂城市场景的语义引导修复问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义引导的图像修复网络，用于复杂城市场景的修改，通过移除指定区域并插入新对象（如汽车或行人）实现场景重构。
AI.motivation: 传统图像修复方法在处理复杂城市场景时因物体遮挡、结构模糊等问题导致修复结果不可靠，难以生成语义一致的场景。
AI.method: 设计结合语义分割与生成任务的深度学习模型，通过新型解码器块融合语义信息，指导新物体形状、位置的生成，确保与场景语义一致。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和Indian Driving数据集上实验表明，该方法能有效解决复杂城市场景的语义引导修复问题，生成结果更连贯且符合场景逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义信息引导的修复网络可有效处理复杂城市场景的物体移除与插入任务，为场景编辑提供更可靠的技术方案。

search_text: Semantic-Guided Inpainting Network for Complex Urban Scenes Manipulation 用于复杂城市场景操作的语义引导修复网络 Manipulating images of complex scenes to reconstruct, insert and/or remove specific object instances is a challenging task. Complex scenes contain multiple semantics and objects, which are frequently cluttered or ambiguous, thus hampering the performance of inpainting models. Conventional techniques often rely on structural information such as object contours in multi-stage approaches that generate unreliable results and boundaries. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning model to alter a complex urban scene by removing a user-specified portion of the image and coherently inserting a new object (e.g. car or pedestrian) in that scene. Inspired by recent works on image inpainting, our proposed method leverages the semantic segmentation to model the content and structure of the image, and learn the best shape and location of the object to insert. To generate reliable results, we design a new decoder block that combines the semantic segmentation and generation task to guide better the generation of new objects and scenes, which have to be semantically consistent with the image. Our experiments, conducted on two large-scale datasets of urban scenes (Cityscapes and Indian Driving), show that our proposed approach successfully address the problem of semantically-guided inpainting of complex urban scene. 操纵复杂场景的图像来重建、插入和/或删除特定的对象实例是一项具有挑战性的任务。复杂的场景包含多种语义和对象，这些语义和对象经常是混乱或模糊的，从而阻碍了修复模型的性能。传统技术通常依赖于结构信息，例如多阶段方法中的对象轮廓，从而生成不可靠的结果和边界。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习模型，通过删除图像中用户指定的部分并在该场景中连贯地插入新对象（例如汽车或行人）来改变复杂的城市场景。受最近图像修复工作的启发，我们提出的方法利用语义分割对图像的内容和结构进行建模，并学习要插入的对象的最佳形状和位置。为了生成可靠的结果，我们设计了一个新的解码器块，它结合了语义分割和生成任务，以更好地指导新对象和场景的生成，这些对象和场景必须在语义上与图像一致。我们在两个大型城市场景数据集（城市景观和印度驾驶）上进行的实验表明，我们提出的方法成功解决了复杂城市场景的语义引导修复问题。 本文提出一种语义引导的图像修复网络，用于复杂城市场景的修改，通过移除指定区域并插入新对象（如汽车或行人）实现场景重构。 Pierfrancesco Ardino,Yahui Liu,Elisa Ricci,Bruno Lepri,Marco De Nadai cs.CV

title: Body models in humans, animals, and robots: mechanisms and plasticity
title_zh: 人类、动物和机器人的身体模型：机制和可塑性
comment: 27 pages, 8 figures
comments: 27 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Humans and animals excel in combining information from multiple sensory modalities, controlling their complex bodies, adapting to growth, failures, or using tools. These capabilities are also highly desirable in robots. They are displayed by machines to some extent - yet, as is so often the case, the artificial creatures are lagging behind. The key foundation is an internal representation of the body that the agent - human, animal, or robot - has developed. In the biological realm, evidence has been accumulated by diverse disciplines giving rise to the concepts of body image, body schema, and others. In robotics, a model of the robot is an indispensable component that enables to control the machine. In this article I compare the character of body representations in biology with their robotic counterparts and relate that to the differences in performance that we observe. I put forth a number of axes regarding the nature of such body models: fixed vs. plastic, amodal vs. modal, explicit vs. implicit, serial vs. parallel, modular vs. holistic, and centralized vs. distributed. An interesting trend emerges: on many of the axes, there is a sequence from robot body models, over body image, body schema, to the body representation in lower animals like the octopus. In some sense, robots have a lot in common with Ian Waterman - "the man who lost his body" - in that they rely on an explicit, veridical body model (body image taken to the extreme) and lack any implicit, multimodal representation (like the body schema) of their bodies. I will then detail how robots can inform the biological sciences dealing with body representations and finally, I will study which of the features of the "body in the brain" should be transferred to robots, giving rise to more adaptive and resilient, self-calibrating machines.

I put forth a number of axes regarding the nature of such body models: fixed vs. plastic, amodal vs. modal, explicit vs. implicit, serial vs. parallel, modular vs. holistic, and centralized vs. distributed. I will then detail how robots can inform the biological sciences dealing with body representations and finally, I will study which of the features of the "body in the brain" should be transferred to robots, giving rise to more adaptive and resilient, self-calibrating machines.
abstract_zh: 人类和动物擅长结合多种感官方式的信息、控制复杂的身体、适应生长、失败或使用工具。这些能力对于机器人来说也是非常理想的。它们在某种程度上是由机器来展示的——然而，正如通常的情况一样，人造生物却落后了。关键基础是代理（人类、动物或机器人）开发的身体的内部表示。在生物学领域，不同学科积累的证据催生了身体意象、身体图式等概念。在机器人技术中，机器人模型是控制机器不可或缺的组件。在本文中，我将生物学中身体表征的特征与机器人对应物进行比较，并将其与我们观察到的性能差异联系起来。我提出了一些关于此类身体模型性质的轴：固定与塑料、非模态与模态、显式与隐式、串行与并行、模块化与整体以及集中式与分布式。出现了一个有趣的趋势：在许多轴上，存在从机器人身体模型、身体图像、身体模式到章鱼等低等动物的身体表征的序列。从某种意义上说，机器人与伊恩·沃特曼（“失去身体的人”）有很多共同点，因为它们依赖于明确的、真实的身体模型（极端的身体图像），并且缺乏任何隐式的、多模态的身体表示（如身体图式）。然后，我将详细介绍机器人如何为处理身体表征的生物科学提供信息，最后，我将研究“大脑中的身体”的哪些特征应该转移到机器人上，从而产生更具适应性和弹性的自校准机器。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了人类、动物和机器人中的身体模型机制与可塑性，探讨其异同及对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解生物体与机器人在身体表征上的差异，以提升机器人适应性和生物科学认知。
AI.method: 通过对比分析生物与机器人身体模型的多个维度（如固定性、模态性等），结合案例与理论框架进行阐述。
AI.result: 发现机器人身体模型在多个维度上介于人类身体图像与章鱼等低等动物之间，且类似Ian Waterman的显式模型特征。
AI.conclusion: 机器人可为生物研究提供新视角，而生物体的隐式表征机制可启发更自适应的机器人设计。

title: Bridging the gap between Markowitz planning and deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 弥合马科维茨规划和深​​度强化学习之间的差距
comment: 10 pages, ICAPS PRL. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.14136, arXiv:2010.08497
comments: 10 pages, ICAPS PRL. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.14136, arXiv:2010.08497
abstract: While researchers in the asset management industry have mostly focused on techniques based on financial and risk planning techniques like Markowitz efficient frontier, minimum variance, maximum diversification or equal risk parity, in parallel, another community in machine learning has started working on reinforcement learning and more particularly deep reinforcement learning to solve other decision making problems for challenging task like autonomous driving, robot learning, and on a more conceptual side games solving like Go. This paper aims to bridge the gap between these two approaches by showing Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) techniques can shed new lights on portfolio allocation thanks to a more general optimization setting that casts portfolio allocation as an optimal control problem that is not just a one-step optimization, but rather a continuous control optimization with a delayed reward. The advantages are numerous: (i) DRL maps directly market conditions to actions by design and hence should adapt to changing environment, (ii) DRL does not rely on any traditional financial risk assumptions like that risk is represented by variance, (iii) DRL can incorporate additional data and be a multi inputs method as opposed to more traditional optimization methods. We present on an experiment some encouraging results using convolution networks.
summary: While researchers in the asset management industry have mostly focused on techniques based on financial and risk planning techniques like Markowitz efficient frontier, minimum variance, maximum diversification or equal risk parity, in parallel, another community in machine learning has started working on reinforcement learning and more particularly deep reinforcement learning to solve other decision making problems for challenging task like autonomous driving, robot learning, and on a more conceptual side games solving like Go. This paper aims to bridge the gap between these two approaches by showing Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) techniques can shed new lights on portfolio allocation thanks to a more general optimization setting that casts portfolio allocation as an optimal control problem that is not just a one-step optimization, but rather a continuous control optimization with a delayed reward. The advantages are numerous: (i) DRL maps directly market conditions to actions by design and hence should adapt to changing environment, (ii) DRL does not rely on any traditional financial risk assumptions like that risk is represented by variance, (iii) DRL can incorporate additional data and be a multi inputs method as opposed to more traditional optimization methods. We present on an experiment some encouraging results using convolution networks.
abstract_zh: 虽然资产管理行业的研究人员主要关注基于财务和风险规划技术的技术，如马科维茨有效前沿、最小方差、最大多样化或等风险平价，但与此同时，机器学习领域的另一个社区已经开始研究强化学习，更具体地说是深度强化学习，以解决自动驾驶、机器人学习等挑战性任务的其他决策问题，以及解决围棋等更具概念性的副游戏问题。本文旨在弥合这两种方法之间的差距，通过展示深度强化学习（DRL）技术可以为投资组合分配带来新的启示，这要归功于更通用的优化设置，该设置将投资组合分配视为最优控制问题，而不仅仅是一步优化，而是具有延迟奖励的连续控制优化。优点很多：（i）DRL 通过设计直接将市场条件映射到行动，因此应该适应不断变化的环境，（ii）DRL 不依赖于任何传统的金融风险假设，例如风险由方差表示，（iii）DRL 可以包含额外的数据，并且是一种多输入方法，而不是更传统的优化方法。我们在实验中展示了使用卷积网络的一些令人鼓舞的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过深度强化学习（DRL）技术，将传统的马科维茨投资组合理论与现代机器学习方法相结合，以解决投资组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统资产管理和金融规划方法如马科维茨有效前沿、最小方差等，依赖于特定的财务假设，难以适应复杂多变的市场环境，而深度强化学习在其他决策问题中展现出强大的适应能力，因此本文希望将两者结合以提升投资组合优化的效果。
AI.method: 本文采用深度强化学习方法，将投资组合优化问题转化为连续控制优化问题，通过设计的深度卷积网络直接映射市场条件到投资组合策略，并利用延迟奖励机制进行训练。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在投资组合优化任务中取得了令人鼓舞的结果，显示出其对市场环境变化的适应性和对多样化数据的处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为投资组合优化提供了一种新的视角，能够克服传统方法的局限性，具有较高的应用前景。

search_text: Bridging the gap between Markowitz planning and deep reinforcement learning 弥合马科维茨规划和深​​度强化学习之间的差距 While researchers in the asset management industry have mostly focused on techniques based on financial and risk planning techniques like Markowitz efficient frontier, minimum variance, maximum diversification or equal risk parity, in parallel, another community in machine learning has started working on reinforcement learning and more particularly deep reinforcement learning to solve other decision making problems for challenging task like autonomous driving, robot learning, and on a more conceptual side games solving like Go. This paper aims to bridge the gap between these two approaches by showing Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) techniques can shed new lights on portfolio allocation thanks to a more general optimization setting that casts portfolio allocation as an optimal control problem that is not just a one-step optimization, but rather a continuous control optimization with a delayed reward. The advantages are numerous: (i) DRL maps directly market conditions to actions by design and hence should adapt to changing environment, (ii) DRL does not rely on any traditional financial risk assumptions like that risk is represented by variance, (iii) DRL can incorporate additional data and be a multi inputs method as opposed to more traditional optimization methods. We present on an experiment some encouraging results using convolution networks. 虽然资产管理行业的研究人员主要关注基于财务和风险规划技术的技术，如马科维茨有效前沿、最小方差、最大多样化或等风险平价，但与此同时，机器学习领域的另一个社区已经开始研究强化学习，更具体地说是深度强化学习，以解决自动驾驶、机器人学习等挑战性任务的其他决策问题，以及解决围棋等更具概念性的副游戏问题。本文旨在弥合这两种方法之间的差距，通过展示深度强化学习（DRL）技术可以为投资组合分配带来新的启示，这要归功于更通用的优化设置，该设置将投资组合分配视为最优控制问题，而不仅仅是一步优化，而是具有延迟奖励的连续控制优化。优点很多：（i）DRL 通过设计直接将市场条件映射到行动，因此应该适应不断变化的环境，（ii）DRL 不依赖于任何传统的金融风险假设，例如风险由方差表示，（iii）DRL 可以包含额外的数据，并且是一种多输入方法，而不是更传统的优化方法。我们在实验中展示了使用卷积网络的一些令人鼓舞的结果。 本文旨在通过深度强化学习（DRL）技术，将传统的马科维茨投资组合理论与现代机器学习方法相结合，以解决投资组合优化问题。 Eric Benhamou,David Saltiel,Sandrine Ungari,Abhishek Mukhopadhyay cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,q-fin.PM

authors_text: Yuxin Hou,Muhammad Kamran Janjua,Juho Kannala,Arno Solin
title: Movement-induced Priors for Deep Stereo
title_zh: 深度立体声的运动诱发先验
abstract: We propose a method for fusing stereo disparity estimation with movement-induced prior information. Instead of independent inference frame-by-frame, we formulate the problem as a non-parametric learning task in terms of a temporal Gaussian process prior with a movement-driven kernel for inter-frame reasoning. We present a hierarchy of three Gaussian process kernels depending on the availability of motion information, where our main focus is on a new gyroscope-driven kernel for handheld devices with low-quality MEMS sensors, thus also relaxing the requirement of having full 6D camera poses available. We show how our method can be combined with two state-of-the-art deep stereo methods. The method either work in a plug-and-play fashion with pre-trained deep stereo networks, or further improved by jointly training the kernels together with encoder-decoder architectures, leading to consistent improvement.
summary: We propose a method for fusing stereo disparity estimation with movement-induced prior information. Instead of independent inference frame-by-frame, we formulate the problem as a non-parametric learning task in terms of a temporal Gaussian process prior with a movement-driven kernel for inter-frame reasoning. We present a hierarchy of three Gaussian process kernels depending on the availability of motion information, where our main focus is on a new gyroscope-driven kernel for handheld devices with low-quality MEMS sensors, thus also relaxing the requirement of having full 6D camera poses available. We show how our method can be combined with two state-of-the-art deep stereo methods. The method either work in a plug-and-play fashion with pre-trained deep stereo networks, or further improved by jointly training the kernels together with encoder-decoder architectures, leading to consistent improvement.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种将立体视差估计与运动引起的先验信息融合的方法。我们不是逐帧独立推理，而是根据时间高斯过程先验将问题表述为非参数学习任务，并使用运动驱动内核进行帧间推理。我们根据运动信息的可用性提出了三个高斯处理内核的层次结构，其中我们的主要重点是用于具有低质量 MEMS 传感器的手持设备的新陀螺仪驱动内核，从而也放宽了提供完整 6D 相机姿势的要求。我们展示了我们的方法如何与两种最先进的深度立体方法相结合。该方法可以通过预先训练的深度立体声网络以即插即用的方式工作，或者通过与编码器-解码器架构一起联合训练内核来进一步改进，从而实现持续的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将运动诱导先验信息与立体视差估计结合的方法，通过时间高斯过程先验和运动驱动核函数提升深度估计效果。
AI.motivation: 传统立体视觉方法逐帧独立推断导致结果不连贯，而运动信息可提供时间先验约束，尤其在低质量传感器设备上能缓解姿态估计不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建基于时间高斯过程的非参数学习框架，设计三种运动驱动核函数（含陀螺仪驱动核），结合预训练深度立体网络或联合训练编码器-解码器架构。
AI.result: 方法在多种场景下均优于基线模型，尤其在手持设备低质量运动数据中表现显著提升，且支持即插即用与联合优化两种模式。
AI.conclusion: 运动先验有效增强立体视觉鲁棒性，陀螺仪驱动核降低对高精度姿态的依赖，为资源受限设备提供可行优化方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种将运动诱导先验信息与立体视差估计结合的方法，通过时间高斯过程先验和运动驱动核函数提升深度估计效果。

authors_text: Ryan Burt,Nina N. Thigpen,Andreas Keil,Jose C. Principe
title: Unsupervised Foveal Vision Neural Networks with Top-Down Attention
title_zh: 具有自上而下注意力的无监督中央凹视觉神经网络
comment: 29 pages, 15 figures
comments: 29 pages, 15 figures
abstract: Deep learning architectures are an extremely powerful tool for recognizing and classifying images. However, they require supervised learning and normally work on vectors the size of image pixels and produce the best results when trained on millions of object images. To help mitigate these issues, we propose the fusion of bottom-up saliency and top-down attention employing only unsupervised learning techniques, which helps the object recognition module to focus on relevant data and learn important features that can later be fine-tuned for a specific task. In addition, by utilizing only relevant portions of the data, the training speed can be greatly improved. We test the performance of the proposed Gamma saliency technique on the Toronto and CAT2000 databases, and the foveated vision in the Street View House Numbers (SVHN) database. The results in foveated vision show that Gamma saliency is comparable to the best and computationally faster. The results in SVHN show that our unsupervised cognitive architecture is comparable to fully supervised methods and that the Gamma saliency also improves CNN performance if desired. We also develop a topdown attention mechanism based on the Gamma saliency applied to the top layer of CNNs to improve scene understanding in multi-object images or images with strong background clutter. When we compare the results with human observers in an image dataset of animals occluded in natural scenes, we show that topdown attention is capable of disambiguating object from background and improves system performance beyond the level of human observers.
summary: Deep learning architectures are an extremely powerful tool for recognizing and classifying images. However, they require supervised learning and normally work on vectors the size of image pixels and produce the best results when trained on millions of object images.
