In addition, by utilizing only relevant portions of the data, the training speed can be greatly improved. We test the performance of the proposed Gamma saliency technique on the Toronto and CAT2000 databases, and the foveated vision in the Street View House Numbers (SVHN) database. The results in foveated vision show that Gamma saliency is comparable to the best and computationally faster. The results in SVHN show that our unsupervised cognitive architecture is comparable to fully supervised methods and that the Gamma saliency also improves CNN performance if desired. We also develop a topdown attention mechanism based on the Gamma saliency applied to the top layer of CNNs to improve scene understanding in multi-object images or images with strong background clutter. When we compare the results with human observers in an image dataset of animals occluded in natural scenes, we show that topdown attention is capable of disambiguating object from background and improves system performance beyond the level of human observers.
abstract_zh: 深度学习架构是识别和分类图像的极其强大的工具。然而，它们需要监督学习，并且通常处理图像像素大小的向量，并在数百万个对象图像上进行训练时产生最佳结果。为了帮助缓解这些问题，我们提出仅采用无监督学习技术将自下而上的显着性和自上而下的注意力相融合，这有助于对象识别模块专注于相关数据并学习重要的特征，这些特征稍后可以针对特定任务进行微调。此外，通过仅利用数据的相关部分，可以大大提高训练速度。我们在多伦多和 CAT2000 数据库上测试了所提出的伽马显着性技术的性能，并在街景门牌号 (SVHN) 数据库中测试了注视点视觉。中心凹视觉的结果表明，伽玛显着性与最好的显着性相当，并且计算速度更快。 SVHN 的结果表明，我们的无监督认知架构与完全监督方法相当，并且如果需要，伽玛显着性还可以提高 CNN 性能。我们还开发了一种基于 Gamma 显着性的自上而下的注意力机制，应用于 CNN 的顶层，以提高多目标图像或具有强背景杂乱的图像的场景理解。当我们将自然场景中被遮挡的动物图像数据集中的结果与人类观察者进行比较时，我们表明自上而下的注意力能够消除背景中的对象歧义，并将系统性能提高到超出人类观察者的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自下而上显著性与自上而下注意力的无监督视网膜视觉神经网络，旨在提升图像识别效率与场景理解能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习依赖监督学习与全图像处理，存在数据需求大、训练效率低的问题，需探索无监督方法以聚焦关键信息并提升性能。
AI.method: 融合Gamma显著性模型与自上而下注意力机制，通过无监督学习筛选图像关键区域，应用于CNN顶层以增强多目标场景理解能力。
AI.result: 在Toronto、CAT2000与SVHN数据集测试中，Gamma显著性计算速度优于现有方法，无监督架构性能接近监督方法，且注意力机制在遮挡场景中超越人类观察者表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过无监督显著性与注意力机制有效提升图像识别效率与鲁棒性，为复杂场景下的视觉认知模型提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自下而上显著性与自上而下注意力的无监督视网膜视觉神经网络，旨在提升图像识别效率与场景理解能力。

search_text: Unsupervised Foveal Vision Neural Networks with Top-Down Attention 具有自上而下注意力的无监督中央凹视觉神经网络 Deep learning architectures are an extremely powerful tool for recognizing and classifying images. However, they require supervised learning and normally work on vectors the size of image pixels and produce the best results when trained on millions of object images. To help mitigate these issues, we propose the fusion of bottom-up saliency and top-down attention employing only unsupervised learning techniques, which helps the object recognition module to focus on relevant data and learn important features that can later be fine-tuned for a specific task. In addition, by utilizing only relevant portions of the data, the training speed can be greatly improved. We test the performance of the proposed Gamma saliency technique on the Toronto and CAT2000 databases, and the foveated vision in the Street View House Numbers (SVHN) database. The results in foveated vision show that Gamma saliency is comparable to the best and computationally faster. The results in SVHN show that our unsupervised cognitive architecture is comparable to fully supervised methods and that the Gamma saliency also improves CNN performance if desired. We also develop a topdown attention mechanism based on the Gamma saliency applied to the top layer of CNNs to improve scene understanding in multi-object images or images with strong background clutter. When we compare the results with human observers in an image dataset of animals occluded in natural scenes, we show that topdown attention is capable of disambiguating object from background and improves system performance beyond the level of human observers. 深度学习架构是识别和分类图像的极其强大的工具。然而，它们需要监督学习，并且通常处理图像像素大小的向量，并在数百万个对象图像上进行训练时产生最佳结果。为了帮助缓解这些问题，我们提出仅采用无监督学习技术将自下而上的显着性和自上而下的注意力相融合，这有助于对象识别模块专注于相关数据并学习重要的特征，这些特征稍后可以针对特定任务进行微调。此外，通过仅利用数据的相关部分，可以大大提高训练速度。我们在多伦多和 CAT2000 数据库上测试了所提出的伽马显着性技术的性能，并在街景门牌号 (SVHN) 数据库中测试了注视点视觉。中心凹视觉的结果表明，伽玛显着性与最好的显着性相当，并且计算速度更快。 SVHN 的结果表明，我们的无监督认知架构与完全监督方法相当，并且如果需要，伽玛显着性还可以提高 CNN 性能。我们还开发了一种基于 Gamma 显着性的自上而下的注意力机制，应用于 CNN 的顶层，以提高多目标图像或具有强背景杂乱的图像的场景理解。当我们将自然场景中被遮挡的动物图像数据集中的结果与人类观察者进行比较时，我们表明自上而下的注意力能够消除背景中的对象歧义，并将系统性能提高到超出人类观察者的水平。 本文提出一种结合自下而上显著性与自上而下注意力的无监督视网膜视觉神经网络，旨在提升图像识别效率与场景理解能力。 Ryan Burt,Nina N. Thigpen,Andreas Keil,Jose C. Principe cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Variational Capsule Encoder
title_zh: 变分胶囊编码器
comment: Accepted for publication in the 2020 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
comments: Accepted for publication in the 2020 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
abstract: We propose a novel capsule network based variational encoder architecture, called Bayesian capsules (B-Caps), to modulate the mean and standard deviation of the sampling distribution in the latent space. We hypothesized that this approach can learn a better representation of features in the latent space than traditional approaches. Our hypothesis was tested by using the learned latent variables for image reconstruction task, where for MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets, different classes were separated successfully in the latent space using our proposed model. Our experimental results have shown improved reconstruction and classification performances for both datasets adding credence to our hypothesis. We also showed that by increasing the latent space dimension, the proposed B-Caps was able to learn a better representation when compared to the traditional variational auto-encoders (VAE). Hence our results indicate the strength of capsule networks in representation learning which has never been examined under the VAE settings before.
summary: We propose a novel capsule network based variational encoder architecture, called Bayesian capsules (B-Caps), to modulate the mean and standard deviation of the sampling distribution in the latent space. We hypothesized that this approach can learn a better representation of features in the latent space than traditional approaches. Our hypothesis was tested by using the learned latent variables for image reconstruction task, where for MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets, different classes were separated successfully in the latent space using our proposed model. Our experimental results have shown improved reconstruction and classification performances for both datasets adding credence to our hypothesis. We also showed that by increasing the latent space dimension, the proposed B-Caps was able to learn a better representation when compared to the traditional variational auto-encoders (VAE). Hence our results indicate the strength of capsule networks in representation learning which has never been examined under the VAE settings before.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于胶囊网络的新型变分编码器架构，称为贝叶斯胶囊（B-Caps），用于调节潜在空间中采样分布的均值和标准差。我们假设这种方法可以比传统方法更好地学习潜在空间中的特征表示。我们的假设通过使用学习到的潜在变量进行图像重建任务进行了测试，其中对于 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 数据集，使用我们提出的模型在潜在空间中成功分离了不同的类别。我们的实验结果表明，两个数据集的重建和分类性能都得到了改善，增加了我们假设的可信度。我们还表明，通过增加潜在空间维度，与传统的变分自动编码器 (VAE) 相比，所提出的 B-Cap 能够学习更好的表示。因此，我们的结果表明了胶囊网络在表示学习中的优势，而这在之前从未在 VAE 设置下进行过检验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于胶囊网络的变分编码器架构（B-Caps），通过调节潜在空间分布参数提升特征表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统变分自编码器在潜在空间表示上存在局限，而胶囊网络能更好保持空间层次结构，因此结合两者以提升表示学习效果。
AI.method: 设计贝叶斯胶囊网络（B-Caps），利用胶囊机制学习潜在变量的均值和标准差，通过图像重建任务验证潜在空间分离效果。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上，B-Caps实现更优的重建与分类性能，且随潜在空间维度增加表现优于传统VAE。
AI.conclusion: 胶囊网络在VAE框架下展现出更强的表示学习能力，为未来研究提供了新方向。

title: The Convergence of AI code and Cortical Functioning -- a Commentary
title_zh: 人工智能代码与皮质功能的融合——评论
abstract: Neural nets, one of the oldest architectures for AI programming, are loosely based on biological neurons and their properties. Recent work on language applications has made the AI code closer to biological reality in several ways. This commentary examines this convergence and, in light of what is known of neocortical structure, addresses the question of whether ``general AI'' looks attainable with these tools.
summary: Neural nets, one of the oldest architectures for AI programming, are loosely based on biological neurons and their properties. Recent work on language applications has made the AI code closer to biological reality in several ways. This commentary examines this convergence and, in light of what is known of neocortical structure, addresses the question of whether ``general AI'' looks attainable with these tools.
abstract_zh: 神经网络是最古老的人工智能编程架构之一，松散地基于生物神经元及其属性。最近关于语言应用的工作使人工智能代码在几个方面更接近生物现实。这篇评论研究了这种融合，并根据已知的新皮质结构，解决了“通用人工智能”是否可以通过这些工具实现的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能代码与大脑皮层功能的趋同现象，并分析这种趋同是否有助于实现通用人工智能。
AI.motivation: 随着神经网络在语言应用中的进展，AI代码逐渐接近生物神经系统的特性，作者旨在评估当前技术是否具备实现通用AI的潜力。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和理论分析，结合神经网络架构与皮层结构的生物学知识进行比较研究。
AI.result: 发现AI代码与皮层功能在部分机制上存在相似性，但通用AI的实现仍受限于对皮层复杂性的理解不足及技术瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 当前工具虽在模拟生物神经机制上取得进展，但通用AI的实现仍需突破关键科学与技术障碍。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能代码与大脑皮层功能的趋同现象，并分析这种趋同是否有助于实现通用人工智能。

conclusion: 当前工具虽在模拟生物神经机制上取得进展，但通用AI的实现仍需突破关键科学与技术障碍。
search_text: The Convergence of AI code and Cortical Functioning -- a Commentary 人工智能代码与皮质功能的融合——评论 Neural nets, one of the oldest architectures for AI programming, are loosely based on biological neurons and their properties. Recent work on language applications has made the AI code closer to biological reality in several ways. This commentary examines this convergence and, in light of what is known of neocortical structure, addresses the question of whether ``general AI'' looks attainable with these tools. 神经网络是最古老的人工智能编程架构之一，松散地基于生物神经元及其属性。最近关于语言应用的工作使人工智能代码在几个方面更接近生物现实。这篇评论研究了这种融合，并根据已知的新皮质结构，解决了“通用人工智能”是否可以通过这些工具实现的问题。 本文探讨了人工智能代码与大脑皮层功能的趋同现象，并分析这种趋同是否有助于实现通用人工智能。 David Mumford cs.AI

title: Real-time Quadrotor Navigation Through Planning in Depth Space in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: 非结构化环境中通过深度空间规划进行实时四旋翼飞行器导航
comment: ef:2019 International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS) (pp. 1467-1476). IEEE
comments: ef:2019 International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS) (pp. 1467-1476). IEEE
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of real-time vision-based autonomous obstacle avoidance in unstructured environments for quadrotor UAVs. We assume that our UAV is equipped with a forward facing stereo camera as the only sensor to perceive the world around it. Moreover, all the computations are performed onboard. Feasible trajectory generation in this kind of problems requires rapid collision checks along with efficient planning algorithms. We propose a trajectory generation approach in the depth image space, which refers to the environment information as depicted by the depth images. In order to predict the collision in a look ahead robot trajectory, we create depth images from the sequence of robot poses along the path. We compare these images with the depth images of the actual world sensed through the forward facing stereo camera. We aim at generating fuel optimal trajectories inside the depth image space. In case of a predicted collision, a switching strategy is used to aggressively deviate the quadrotor away from the obstacle. For this purpose we use two closed loop motion primitives based on Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) objective functions. The proposed approach is validated through simulation and hardware experiments.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of real-time vision-based autonomous obstacle avoidance in unstructured environments for quadrotor UAVs. We assume that our UAV is equipped with a forward facing stereo camera as the only sensor to perceive the world around it. Moreover, all the computations are performed onboard. Feasible trajectory generation in this kind of problems requires rapid collision checks along with efficient planning algorithms. We propose a trajectory generation approach in the depth image space, which refers to the environment information as depicted by the depth images. In order to predict the collision in a look ahead robot trajectory, we create depth images from the sequence of robot poses along the path. We compare these images with the depth images of the actual world sensed through the forward facing stereo camera. We aim at generating fuel optimal trajectories inside the depth image space. In case of a predicted collision, a switching strategy is used to aggressively deviate the quadrotor away from the obstacle. For this purpose we use two closed loop motion primitives based on Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) objective functions. The proposed approach is validated through simulation and hardware experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了四旋翼无人机在非结构化环境中基于实时视觉的自主避障问题。我们假设我们的无人机配备了一个前向立体摄像头，作为感知周围世界的唯一传感器。此外，所有计算都是在船上进行的。此类问题中的可行轨迹生成需要快速碰撞检查以及高效的规划算法。我们提出了一种深度图像空间中的轨迹生成方法，它指的是深度图像所描绘的环境信息。为了预测机器人前视轨迹中的碰撞，我们根据沿路径的机器人姿势序列创建深度图像。我们将这些图像与通过前向立体摄像头感测到的现实世界的深度图像进行比较。我们的目标是在深度图像空间内生成燃料最佳轨迹。如果发生预测碰撞，则会使用切换策略使四旋翼飞行器主动偏离障碍物。为此，我们使用两个基于线性二次调节器 (LQR) 目标函数的闭环运动基元。通过仿真和硬件实验验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度图像空间规划的实时四旋翼无人机避障方法，适用于非结构化环境。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在非结构化环境中难以实现实时避障，需依赖高效计算和单一传感器（立体相机）完成机载决策。
AI.method: 通过深度图像空间预测轨迹碰撞，结合LQR闭环运动原语生成燃料最优轨迹，并在检测到碰撞时切换避障策略。
AI.result: 仿真与硬件实验验证了方法的有效性，成功实现复杂环境下的实时避障。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为四旋翼无人机在未知动态环境中的自主导航提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

title: On Near-Linear-Time Algorithms for Dense Subset Sum
title_zh: 稠密子集和的近线性时间算法
comment: full version of SODA'21 paper, 36 pages
comments: full version of SODA'21 paper, 36 pages
abstract: In the Subset Sum problem we are given a set of $n$ positive integers $X$ and a target $t$ and are asked whether some subset of $X$ sums to $t$. Natural parameters for this problem that have been studied in the literature are $n$ and $t$ as well as the maximum input number $\rm{mx}_X$ and the sum of all input numbers $Σ_X$. In this paper we study the dense case of Subset Sum, where all these parameters are polynomial in $n$. In this regime, standard pseudo-polynomial algorithms solve Subset Sum in polynomial time $n^{O(1)}$. Our main question is: When can dense Subset Sum be solved in near-linear time $\tilde{O}(n)$? We provide an essentially complete dichotomy by designing improved algorithms and proving conditional lower bounds, thereby determining essentially all settings of the parameters $n,t,\rm{mx}_X,Σ_X$ for which dense Subset Sum is in time $\tilde{O}(n)$. For notational convenience we assume without loss of generality that $t \ge \rm{mx}_X$ (as larger numbers can be ignored) and $t \le Σ_X/2$ (using symmetry). Then our dichotomy reads as follows: - By reviving and improving an additive-combinatorics-based approach by Galil and Margalit [SICOMP'91], we show that Subset Sum is in near-linear time $\tilde{O}(n)$ if $t \gg \rm{mx}_X Σ_X/n^2$. - We prove a matching conditional lower bound: If Subset Sum is in near-linear time for any setting with $t \ll \rm{mx}_X Σ_X/n^2$, then the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis and the Strong k-Sum Hypothesis fail. We also generalize our algorithm from sets to multi-sets, albeit with non-matching upper and lower bounds.

abstract_zh: 在子集求和问题中，我们得到一组 $n$ 个正整数 $X$ 和一个目标 $t$，并被询问 $X$ 的某个子集是否与 $t$ 相加。文献中研究过的该问题的自然参数是 $n$ 和 $t$ 以及最大输入数 $\rm{mx}_X$ 和所有输入数 $Σ_X$ 的总和。在本文中，我们研究了子集和的密集情况，其中所有这些参数都是 $n$ 中的多项式。在这种情况下，标准伪多项式算法在多项式时间内求解子集和 $n^{O(1)}$。我们的主要问题是：什么时候可以在近线性时间内求解密集子集和 $\tilde{O}(n)$？我们通过设计改进的算法并证明条件下界来提供基本上完整的二分法，从而基本上确定参数 $n,t,\rm{mx}_X,Σ_X$ 的所有设置，其中稠密子集和在时间 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 中。为了符号方便，我们在不失一般性的情况下假设 $t \ge \rm{mx}_X$ （因为可以忽略较大的数字）和 $t \le Σ_X/2$ （使用对称性）。那么我们的二分法如下： - 通过恢复和改进 Galil 和 Margalit [SICOMP'91] 的基于加法组合的方法，我们表明如果 $t \gg \rm{mx}_X Σ_X/n^2$，子集和在近线性时间 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 中。 - 我们证明了一个匹配的条件下界：对于 $t \ll \rm{mx}_X Σ_X/n^2$ 的任何设置，如果子集和处于近线性时间，则强指数时间假设和强 k-Sum 假设失败。我们还将我们的算法从集合推广到多集合，尽管具有不匹配的上限和下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究稠密子集和问题的近线性时间算法，分析在何种参数条件下可实现高效求解。
AI.motivation: 传统伪多项式算法在稠密情况下已能多项式时间求解，但近线性时间的可行性尚不明确，需探索参数边界与算法改进。
AI.method: 改进Galil和Margalit的加法组合方法，并证明条件性下界，结合参数分析确定时间复杂度阈值。
AI.result: 当t远大于mx_XΣ_X/n²时，算法可在近线性时间解决；反之若t远小于该值，则强指数时间假设与强k-和假设不成立。算法扩展至多重集合但存在界不匹配。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法改进与下界证明，确定稠密子集和问题在近线性时间求解的参数条件，形成完整二分法结论。

title: View-Invariant Gait Recognition with Attentive Recurrent Learning of Partial Representations
title_zh: 具有局部表示的细心循环学习的视图不变步态识别
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science (T-BIOM)
comments: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science (T-BIOM)
abstract: Gait recognition refers to the identification of individuals based on features acquired from their body movement during walking. Despite the recent advances in gait recognition with deep learning, variations in data acquisition and appearance, namely camera angles, subject pose, occlusions, and clothing, are challenging factors that need to be considered for achieving accurate gait recognition systems. In this paper, we propose a network that first learns to extract gait convolutional energy maps (GCEM) from frame-level convolutional features. It then adopts a bidirectional recurrent neural network to learn from split bins of the GCEM, thus exploiting the relations between learned partial spatiotemporal representations. We then use an attention mechanism to selectively focus on important recurrently learned partial representations as identity information in different scenarios may lie in different GCEM bins. Our proposed model has been extensively tested on two large-scale CASIA-B and OU-MVLP gait datasets using four different test protocols and has been compared to a number of state-of-the-art and baseline solutions. Additionally, a comprehensive experiment has been performed to study the robustness of our model in the presence of six different synthesized occlusions. The experimental results show the superiority of our proposed method, outperforming the state-of-the-art, especially in scenarios where different clothing and carrying conditions are encountered. The results also revealed that our model is more robust against different occlusions as compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Gait recognition refers to the identification of individuals based on features acquired from their body movement during walking. Despite the recent advances in gait recognition with deep learning, variations in data acquisition and appearance, namely camera angles, subject pose, occlusions, and clothing, are challenging factors that need to be considered for achieving accurate gait recognition systems. In this paper, we propose a network that first learns to extract gait convolutional energy maps (GCEM) from frame-level convolutional features. It then adopts a bidirectional recurrent neural network to learn from split bins of the GCEM, thus exploiting the relations between learned partial spatiotemporal representations. We then use an attention mechanism to selectively focus on important recurrently learned partial representations as identity information in different scenarios may lie in different GCEM bins. Our proposed model has been extensively tested on two large-scale CASIA-B and OU-MVLP gait datasets using four different test protocols and has been compared to a number of state-of-the-art and baseline solutions. Additionally, a comprehensive experiment has been performed to study the robustness of our model in the presence of six different synthesized occlusions. The experimental results show the superiority of our proposed method, outperforming the state-of-the-art, especially in scenarios where different clothing and carrying conditions are encountered. The results also revealed that our model is more robust against different occlusions as compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是指根据个体行走过程中的身体运动特征来识别个体。尽管深度学习的步态识别最近取得了进展，但数据采集和外观（即相机角度、主体姿势、遮挡和服装）的变化是实现准确步态识别系统需要考虑的挑战性因素。在本文中，我们提出了一个网络，该网络首先学习从帧级卷积特征中提取步态卷积能量图（GCEM）。然后，它采用双向循环神经网络从 GCEM 的分割箱中学习，从而利用学习到的部分时空表示之间的关系。然后，我们使用注意力机制选择性地关注重要的循环学习部分表示，因为不同场景中的身份信息可能位于不同的 GCEM bin 中。我们提出的模型已使用四种不同的测试协议在两个大型 CASIA-B 和 OU-MVLP 步态数据集上进行了广泛测试，并与许多最先进的基准解决方案进行了比较。此外，还进行了一项全面的实验来研究我们的模型在存在六种不同的合成遮挡的情况下的稳健性。实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的优越性，优于最先进的方法，特别是在遇到不同服装和携带条件的场景中。结果还表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的模型针对不同的遮挡更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的循环学习方法，用于解决不同视角下的步态识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别系统在面对摄像头角度、姿态、遮挡和服装变化时存在性能下降问题，需提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过提取步态卷积能量图（GCEM），利用双向循环神经网络学习局部时空表征，并采用注意力机制选择关键特征以适应不同场景。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B和OU-MVLP数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在服装和携带条件变化及六种合成遮挡情况下表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过分块表征学习和注意力机制有效提升了视角不变性，为复杂场景下的步态识别提供了新思路。

search_text: View-Invariant Gait Recognition with Attentive Recurrent Learning of Partial Representations 具有局部表示的细心循环学习的视图不变步态识别 Gait recognition refers to the identification of individuals based on features acquired from their body movement during walking. Despite the recent advances in gait recognition with deep learning, variations in data acquisition and appearance, namely camera angles, subject pose, occlusions, and clothing, are challenging factors that need to be considered for achieving accurate gait recognition systems. In this paper, we propose a network that first learns to extract gait convolutional energy maps (GCEM) from frame-level convolutional features. It then adopts a bidirectional recurrent neural network to learn from split bins of the GCEM, thus exploiting the relations between learned partial spatiotemporal representations. We then use an attention mechanism to selectively focus on important recurrently learned partial representations as identity information in different scenarios may lie in different GCEM bins. Our proposed model has been extensively tested on two large-scale CASIA-B and OU-MVLP gait datasets using four different test protocols and has been compared to a number of state-of-the-art and baseline solutions. Additionally, a comprehensive experiment has been performed to study the robustness of our model in the presence of six different synthesized occlusions. The experimental results show the superiority of our proposed method, outperforming the state-of-the-art, especially in scenarios where different clothing and carrying conditions are encountered. The results also revealed that our model is more robust against different occlusions as compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 步态识别是指根据个体行走过程中的身体运动特征来识别个体。尽管深度学习的步态识别最近取得了进展，但数据采集和外观（即相机角度、主体姿势、遮挡和服装）的变化是实现准确步态识别系统需要考虑的挑战性因素。在本文中，我们提出了一个网络，该网络首先学习从帧级卷积特征中提取步态卷积能量图（GCEM）。然后，它采用双向循环神经网络从 GCEM 的分割箱中学习，从而利用学习到的部分时空表示之间的关系。然后，我们使用注意力机制选择性地关注重要的循环学习部分表示，因为不同场景中的身份信息可能位于不同的 GCEM bin 中。我们提出的模型已使用四种不同的测试协议在两个大型 CASIA-B 和 OU-MVLP 步态数据集上进行了广泛测试，并与许多最先进的基准解决方案进行了比较。此外，还进行了一项全面的实验来研究我们的模型在存在六种不同的合成遮挡的情况下的稳健性。实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的优越性，优于最先进的方法，特别是在遇到不同服装和携带条件的场景中。结果还表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的模型针对不同的遮挡更加稳健。 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的循环学习方法，用于解决不同视角下的步态识别问题。 Alireza Sepas-Moghaddam,Ali Etemad cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tianlong Chen,Weiyi Zhang,Jingyang Zhou,Shiyu Chang,Sijia Liu,Lisa Amini,Zhangyang Wang
title: Training Stronger Baselines for Learning to Optimize
title_zh: 训练更强的学习优化基线
comment: NeurIPS 2020 Spotlight Oral
comments: NeurIPS 2020 Spotlight Oral
abstract: Learning to optimize (L2O) has gained increasing attention since classical optimizers require laborious problem-specific design and hyperparameter tuning. However, there is a gap between the practical demand and the achievable performance of existing L2O models. Specifically, those learned optimizers are applicable to only a limited class of problems, and often exhibit instability. With many efforts devoted to designing more sophisticated L2O models, we argue for another orthogonal, under-explored theme: the training techniques for those L2O models. We show that even the simplest L2O model could have been trained much better. We first present a progressive training scheme to gradually increase the optimizer unroll length, to mitigate a well-known L2O dilemma of truncation bias (shorter unrolling) versus gradient explosion (longer unrolling). We further leverage off-policy imitation learning to guide the L2O learning, by taking reference to the behavior of analytical optimizers. Our improved training techniques are plugged into a variety of state-of-the-art L2O models, and immediately boost their performance, without making any change to their model structures. Especially, by our proposed techniques, an earliest and simplest L2O model can be trained to outperform the latest complicated L2O models on a number of tasks. Our results demonstrate a greater potential of L2O yet to be unleashed, and urge to rethink the recent progress. Our codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/L2O-Training-Techniques.

However, there is a gap between the practical demand and the achievable performance of existing L2O models. Specifically, those learned optimizers are applicable to only a limited class of problems, and often exhibit instability. With many efforts devoted to designing more sophisticated L2O models, we argue for another orthogonal, under-explored theme: the training techniques for those L2O models. We show that even the simplest L2O model could have been trained much better. We first present a progressive training scheme to gradually increase the optimizer unroll length, to mitigate a well-known L2O dilemma of truncation bias (shorter unrolling) versus gradient explosion (longer unrolling). We further leverage off-policy imitation learning to guide the L2O learning, by taking reference to the behavior of analytical optimizers. Our improved training techniques are plugged into a variety of state-of-the-art L2O models, and immediately boost their performance, without making any change to their model structures. Especially, by our proposed techniques, an earliest and simplest L2O model can be trained to outperform the latest complicated L2O models on a number of tasks. Our results demonstrate a greater potential of L2O yet to be unleashed, and urge to rethink the recent progress. Our codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/L2O-Training-Techniques.
abstract_zh: 学习优化（L2O）越来越受到关注，因为经典优化器需要费力的针对特定问题的设计和超参数调整。然而，实际需求与现有L2O模型可实现的性能之间存在差距。具体来说，那些学习的优化器仅适用于有限类别的问题，并且通常表现出不稳定。随着许多努力致力于设计更复杂的 L2O 模型，我们主张另一个正交的、尚未充分探索的主题：这些 L2O 模型的训练技术。我们证明，即使是最简单的 L2O 模型也可以训练得更好。我们首先提出了一种渐进式训练方案，以逐渐增加优化器展开长度，以缓解众所周知的截断偏差（较短展开）与梯度爆炸（较长展开）的 L2O 困境。我们通过参考分析优化器的行为，进一步利用离策略模仿学习来指导 L2O 学习。我们改进的训练技术被插入到各种最先进的 L2O 模型中，并立即提升其性能，而无需对其模型结构进行任何更改。特别是，通过我们提出的技术，可以训练最早且最简单的 L2O 模型，使其在许多任务上优于最新的复杂 L2O 模型。我们的结果表明，L2O 的更大潜力尚未释放，并敦促重新思考最近的进展。我们的代码可公开获取：https://github.com/VITA-Group/L2O-Training-Techniques。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进训练技术，提升学习优化（L2O）模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的L2O模型在实际应用中存在性能不足、适用范围有限及不稳定等问题，尽管已有大量研究致力于设计更复杂的L2O模型，但训练技术的改进仍被忽视。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种渐进式训练方案，以逐步增加优化器的展开长度，缓解截断偏差与梯度爆炸的矛盾，并结合离线模仿学习，借鉴解析优化器的行为以指导L2O学习。
AI.result: 改进的训练技术显著提升了多种先进L2O模型的性能，甚至使最早的简单L2O模型在多个任务上超越了最新的复杂模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了L2O方法的更大潜力，并呼吁重新审视当前的研究进展。

authors_text: Alireza Sepas-Moghaddam,Saeed Ghorbani,Nikolaus F. Troje,Ali Etemad
title: Gait Recognition using Multi-Scale Partial Representation Transformation with Capsules
title_zh: 使用 Capsule 的多尺度部分表示变换进行步态识别
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2020
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2020
abstract: Gait recognition, referring to the identification of individuals based on the manner in which they walk, can be very challenging due to the variations in the viewpoint of the camera and the appearance of individuals. Current methods for gait recognition have been dominated by deep learning models, notably those based on partial feature representations. In this context, we propose a novel deep network, learning to transfer multi-scale partial gait representations using capsules to obtain more discriminative gait features. Our network first obtains multi-scale partial representations using a state-of-the-art deep partial feature extractor. It then recurrently learns the correlations and co-occurrences of the patterns among the partial features in forward and backward directions using Bi-directional Gated Recurrent Units (BGRU). Finally, a capsule network is adopted to learn deeper part-whole relationships and assigns more weights to the more relevant features while ignoring the spurious dimensions. That way, we obtain final features that are more robust to both viewing and appearance changes. The performance of our method has been extensively tested on two gait recognition datasets, CASIA-B and OU-MVLP, using four challenging test protocols. The results of our method have been compared to the state-of-the-art gait recognition solutions, showing the superiority of our model, notably when facing challenging viewing and carrying conditions.

Current methods for gait recognition have been dominated by deep learning models, notably those based on partial feature representations. In this context, we propose a novel deep network, learning to transfer multi-scale partial gait representations using capsules to obtain more discriminative gait features. Our network first obtains multi-scale partial representations using a state-of-the-art deep partial feature extractor. It then recurrently learns the correlations and co-occurrences of the patterns among the partial features in forward and backward directions using Bi-directional Gated Recurrent Units (BGRU). Finally, a capsule network is adopted to learn deeper part-whole relationships and assigns more weights to the more relevant features while ignoring the spurious dimensions. That way, we obtain final features that are more robust to both viewing and appearance changes. The performance of our method has been extensively tested on two gait recognition datasets, CASIA-B and OU-MVLP, using four challenging test protocols. The results of our method have been compared to the state-of-the-art gait recognition solutions, showing the superiority of our model, notably when facing challenging viewing and carrying conditions.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是指根据个体行走方式来识别个体，由于摄像机视角和个体外观的变化，步态识别可能非常具有挑战性。当前的步态识别方法主要由深度学习模型主导，尤其是基于部分特征表示的模型。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种新颖的深度网络，学习使用胶囊传输多尺度部分步态表示以获得更具辨别力的步态特征。我们的网络首先使用最先进的深度部分特征提取器获得多尺度部分表示。然后，它使用双向门控循环单元 (BGRU) 循环学习前向和后向部分特征之间模式的相关性和共现性。最后，采用胶囊网络来学习更深层次的部分-整体关系，并为更相关的特征分配更多权重，同时忽略虚假维度。这样，我们就获得了对观看和外观变化都更加稳健的最终特征。我们的方法的性能已经在两个步态识别数据集 CASIA-B 和 OU-MVLP 上使用四种具有挑战性的测试协议进行了广泛的测试。我们的方法的结果与最先进的步态识别解决方案进行了比较，显示了我们的模型的优越性，特别是在面临具有挑战性的观看和携带条件时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度部分表示变换与胶囊网络的步态识别方法，旨在提升对视角变化和外观差异的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法在视角变化和个体外观差异下表现不足，部分特征表示难以捕捉复杂的局部-整体关联关系。
AI.method: 采用多尺度部分特征提取器获取局部信息，通过双向GRU建模特征间时序关联，最后利用胶囊网络学习深层部分-整体关系并动态分配特征权重。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B和OU-MVLP数据集上，该方法在四种测试协议中均优于现有最优模型，尤其在视角变化和携带物品场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过多尺度特征融合与胶囊网络的动态权重机制，有效提升了步态识别在复杂条件下的鲁棒性和判别能力。

search_text: Gait Recognition using Multi-Scale Partial Representation Transformation with Capsules 使用 Capsule 的多尺度部分表示变换进行步态识别 Gait recognition, referring to the identification of individuals based on the manner in which they walk, can be very challenging due to the variations in the viewpoint of the camera and the appearance of individuals. Current methods for gait recognition have been dominated by deep learning models, notably those based on partial feature representations. In this context, we propose a novel deep network, learning to transfer multi-scale partial gait representations using capsules to obtain more discriminative gait features. Our network first obtains multi-scale partial representations using a state-of-the-art deep partial feature extractor. It then recurrently learns the correlations and co-occurrences of the patterns among the partial features in forward and backward directions using Bi-directional Gated Recurrent Units (BGRU). Finally, a capsule network is adopted to learn deeper part-whole relationships and assigns more weights to the more relevant features while ignoring the spurious dimensions. That way, we obtain final features that are more robust to both viewing and appearance changes. The performance of our method has been extensively tested on two gait recognition datasets, CASIA-B and OU-MVLP, using four challenging test protocols. The results of our method have been compared to the state-of-the-art gait recognition solutions, showing the superiority of our model, notably when facing challenging viewing and carrying conditions. 步态识别是指根据个体行走方式来识别个体，由于摄像机视角和个体外观的变化，步态识别可能非常具有挑战性。当前的步态识别方法主要由深度学习模型主导，尤其是基于部分特征表示的模型。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种新颖的深度网络，学习使用胶囊传输多尺度部分步态表示以获得更具辨别力的步态特征。我们的网络首先使用最先进的深度部分特征提取器获得多尺度部分表示。然后，它使用双向门控循环单元 (BGRU) 循环学习前向和后向部分特征之间模式的相关性和共现性。最后，采用胶囊网络来学习更深层次的部分-整体关系，并为更相关的特征分配更多权重，同时忽略虚假维度。这样，我们就获得了对观看和外观变化都更加稳健的最终特征。我们的方法的性能已经在两个步态识别数据集 CASIA-B 和 OU-MVLP 上使用四种具有挑战性的测试协议进行了广泛的测试。我们的方法的结果与最先进的步态识别解决方案进行了比较，显示了我们的模型的优越性，特别是在面临具有挑战性的观看和携带条件时。 本文提出一种基于多尺度部分表示变换与胶囊网络的步态识别方法，旨在提升对视角变化和外观差异的鲁棒性。 Alireza Sepas-Moghaddam,Saeed Ghorbani,Nikolaus F. Troje,Ali Etemad cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mahdi Saleh,Shervin Dehghani,Benjamin Busam,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: Graphite: GRAPH-Induced feaTure Extraction for Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: Graphite：用于点云配准的图形诱导特征提取
abstract: 3D Point clouds are a rich source of information that enjoy growing popularity in the vision community. However, due to the sparsity of their representation, learning models based on large point clouds is still a challenge. In this work, we introduce Graphite, a GRAPH-Induced feaTure Extraction pipeline, a simple yet powerful feature transform and keypoint detector. Graphite enables intensive down-sampling of point clouds with keypoint detection accompanied by a descriptor. We construct a generic graph-based learning scheme to describe point cloud regions and extract salient points. To this end, we take advantage of 6D pose information and metric learning to learn robust descriptions and keypoints across different scans. We Reformulate the 3D keypoint pipeline with graph neural networks which allow efficient processing of the point set while boosting its descriptive power which ultimately results in more accurate 3D registrations. We demonstrate our lightweight descriptor on common 3D descriptor matching and point cloud registration benchmarks and achieve comparable results with the state of the art. Describing 100 patches of a point cloud and detecting their keypoints takes only ~0.018 seconds with our proposed network.
summary: 3D Point clouds are a rich source of information that enjoy growing popularity in the vision community. However, due to the sparsity of their representation, learning models based on large point clouds is still a challenge. In this work, we introduce Graphite, a GRAPH-Induced feaTure Extraction pipeline, a simple yet powerful feature transform and keypoint detector. Graphite enables intensive down-sampling of point clouds with keypoint detection accompanied by a descriptor. We construct a generic graph-based learning scheme to describe point cloud regions and extract salient points. To this end, we take advantage of 6D pose information and metric learning to learn robust descriptions and keypoints across different scans. We Reformulate the 3D keypoint pipeline with graph neural networks which allow efficient processing of the point set while boosting its descriptive power which ultimately results in more accurate 3D registrations. We demonstrate our lightweight descriptor on common 3D descriptor matching and point cloud registration benchmarks and achieve comparable results with the state of the art. Describing 100 patches of a point cloud and detecting their keypoints takes only ~0.018 seconds with our proposed network.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云是丰富的信息源，在视觉界越来越受欢迎。然而，由于其表示的稀疏性，基于大型点云的学习模型仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Graphite，一种图形诱导的特征提取管道，一种简单但功能强大的特征转换和关键点检测器。 Graphite 可以通过伴随描述符的关键点检测对点云进行密集下采样。我们构建了一个通用的基于图的学​​习方案来描述点云区域并提取显着点。为此，我们利用 6D 姿态信息和度量学习来学习不同扫描中的鲁棒描述和关键点。我们使用图神经网络重新制定 3D 关键点管道，从而可以有效处理点集，同时增强其描述能力，最终实现更准确的 3D 配准。我们在常见的 3D 描述符匹配和点云配准基准上展示了我们的轻量级描述符，并取得了与现有技术相当的结果。使用我们提出的网络描述点云的 100 个补丁并检测它们的关键点只需要约 0.018 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graphite，一种基于图结构的点云特征提取方法，用于提高点云配准的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 点云表示存在稀疏性挑战，传统方法难以高效提取鲁棒特征，需设计轻量且精确的特征提取与关键点检测方案。
AI.method: 构建图神经网络框架，结合6D姿态信息与度量学习，通过图结构描述点云区域并提取显著点，实现高效特征转换与关键点检测。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中达到与最先进方法相当的配准效果，处理100个点云块仅需约0.018秒。
AI.conclusion: Graphite通过图诱导特征提取有效解决了点云稀疏性问题，为高效精准的3D配准提供了新思路。

authors_text: Marcel Sheeny,Emanuele De Pellegrin,Saptarshi Mukherjee,Alireza Ahrabian,Sen Wang,Andrew Wallace
title: RADIATE: A Radar Dataset for Automotive Perception in Bad Weather
title_zh: RADIATE：恶劣天气下汽车感知的雷达数据集
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2021 (ICRA 2021)
comments: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2021 (ICRA 2021)
abstract: Datasets for autonomous cars are essential for the development and benchmarking of perception systems. However, most existing datasets are captured with camera and LiDAR sensors in good weather conditions. In this paper, we present the RAdar Dataset In Adverse weaThEr (RADIATE), aiming to facilitate research on object detection, tracking and scene understanding using radar sensing for safe autonomous driving. RADIATE includes 3 hours of annotated radar images with more than 200K labelled road actors in total, on average about 4.6 instances per radar image. It covers 8 different categories of actors in a variety of weather conditions (e.g., sun, night, rain, fog and snow) and driving scenarios (e.g., parked, urban, motorway and suburban), representing different levels of challenge. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first public radar dataset which provides high-resolution radar images on public roads with a large amount of road actors labelled. The data collected in adverse weather, e.g., fog and snowfall, is unique. Some baseline results of radar based object detection and recognition are given to show that the use of radar data is promising for automotive applications in bad weather, where vision and LiDAR can fail. RADIATE also has stereo images, 32-channel LiDAR and GPS data, directed at other applications such as sensor fusion, localisation and mapping. The public dataset can be accessed at http://pro.hw.ac.uk/radiate/.
summary: Datasets for autonomous cars are essential for the development and benchmarking of perception systems. However, most existing datasets are captured with camera and LiDAR sensors in good weather conditions. In this paper, we present the RAdar Dataset In Adverse weaThEr (RADIATE), aiming to facilitate research on object detection, tracking and scene understanding using radar sensing for safe autonomous driving. RADIATE includes 3 hours of annotated radar images with more than 200K labelled road actors in total, on average about 4.6 instances per radar image. It covers 8 different categories of actors in a variety of weather conditions (e.g., sun, night, rain, fog and snow) and driving scenarios (e.g., parked, urban, motorway and suburban), representing different levels of challenge. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first public radar dataset which provides high-resolution radar images on public roads with a large amount of road actors labelled. The data collected in adverse weather, e.g., fog and snowfall, is unique. Some baseline results of radar based object detection and recognition are given to show that the use of radar data is promising for automotive applications in bad weather, where vision and LiDAR can fail. RADIATE also has stereo images, 32-channel LiDAR and GPS data, directed at other applications such as sensor fusion, localisation and mapping. The public dataset can be accessed at http://pro.hw.ac.uk/radiate/.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的数据集对于感知系统的开发和基准测试至关重要。然而，大多数现有数据集是在良好的天气条件下使用相机和激光雷达传感器捕获的。在本文中，我们提出了恶劣天气下的雷达数据集（RADIATE），旨在促进利用雷达传感进行目标检测、跟踪和场景理解的研究，以实现安全自动驾驶。 RADIATE 包括 3 小时的带注释的雷达图像，总共有超过 20 万个标记的道路参与者，平均每个雷达图像约有 4.6 个实例。它涵盖了8种不同类别的演员在各种天气条件（例如阳光、夜晚、雨、雾和雪）和驾驶场景（例如停车、城市、高速公路和郊区）下的表现，代表了不同级别的挑战。据我们所知，这是第一个公共雷达数据集，它提供了公共道路上的高分辨率雷达图像，并标记了大量道路参与者。在雾和降雪等恶劣天气下收集的数据是独一无二的。基于雷达的物体检测和识别的一些基线结果表明，雷达数据的使用对于恶劣天气下的汽车应用来说是有希望的，在恶劣天气下，视觉和激光雷达可能会失败。 RADIATE 还拥有立体图像、32 通道 LiDAR 和 GPS 数据，针对传感器融合、定位和测绘等其他应用。公共数据集可以通过 http://pro.hw.ac.uk/radiate/ 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RADIATE雷达数据集，旨在为恶劣天气下的自动驾驶感知系统提供基准数据。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集多依赖摄像头和LiDAR，且仅在良好天气下采集，缺乏恶劣天气下的雷达数据，而雷达在恶劣天气中更具可靠性。
AI.method: 在多种天气条件（如雨、雾、雪）和驾驶场景下采集3小时标注雷达图像，并整合立体视觉、32通道LiDAR及GPS数据，标注超过20万道路目标。
AI.result: RADIATE是首个公开的高分辨率公共道路雷达数据集，包含8类目标，基线实验表明雷达在恶劣天气下可有效用于目标检测与识别。
AI.conclusion: RADIATE填补了恶劣天气下雷达感知数据的空白，为自动驾驶的传感器融合、定位及映射研究提供了重要资源。

search_text: RADIATE: A Radar Dataset for Automotive Perception in Bad Weather RADIATE：恶劣天气下汽车感知的雷达数据集 Datasets for autonomous cars are essential for the development and benchmarking of perception systems. However, most existing datasets are captured with camera and LiDAR sensors in good weather conditions. In this paper, we present the RAdar Dataset In Adverse weaThEr (RADIATE), aiming to facilitate research on object detection, tracking and scene understanding using radar sensing for safe autonomous driving. RADIATE includes 3 hours of annotated radar images with more than 200K labelled road actors in total, on average about 4.6 instances per radar image. It covers 8 different categories of actors in a variety of weather conditions (e.g., sun, night, rain, fog and snow) and driving scenarios (e.g., parked, urban, motorway and suburban), representing different levels of challenge. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first public radar dataset which provides high-resolution radar images on public roads with a large amount of road actors labelled. The data collected in adverse weather, e.g., fog and snowfall, is unique. Some baseline results of radar based object detection and recognition are given to show that the use of radar data is promising for automotive applications in bad weather, where vision and LiDAR can fail. RADIATE also has stereo images, 32-channel LiDAR and GPS data, directed at other applications such as sensor fusion, localisation and mapping. The public dataset can be accessed at http://pro.hw.ac.uk/radiate/. 自动驾驶汽车的数据集对于感知系统的开发和基准测试至关重要。然而，大多数现有数据集是在良好的天气条件下使用相机和激光雷达传感器捕获的。在本文中，我们提出了恶劣天气下的雷达数据集（RADIATE），旨在促进利用雷达传感进行目标检测、跟踪和场景理解的研究，以实现安全自动驾驶。 RADIATE 包括 3 小时的带注释的雷达图像，总共有超过 20 万个标记的道路参与者，平均每个雷达图像约有 4.6 个实例。它涵盖了8种不同类别的演员在各种天气条件（例如阳光、夜晚、雨、雾和雪）和驾驶场景（例如停车、城市、高速公路和郊区）下的表现，代表了不同级别的挑战。据我们所知，这是第一个公共雷达数据集，它提供了公共道路上的高分辨率雷达图像，并标记了大量道路参与者。在雾和降雪等恶劣天气下收集的数据是独一无二的。基于雷达的物体检测和识别的一些基线结果表明，雷达数据的使用对于恶劣天气下的汽车应用来说是有希望的，在恶劣天气下，视觉和激光雷达可能会失败。 RADIATE 还拥有立体图像、32 通道 LiDAR 和 GPS 数据，针对传感器融合、定位和测绘等其他应用。公共数据集可以通过 http://pro.hw.ac.uk/radiate/ 访问。 本文介绍了RADIATE雷达数据集，旨在为恶劣天气下的自动驾驶感知系统提供基准数据。 Marcel Sheeny,Emanuele De Pellegrin,Saptarshi Mukherjee,Alireza Ahrabian,Sen Wang,Andrew Wallace cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Multimodal semantic forecasting based on conditional generation of future features
title_zh: 基于条件生成未来特征的多模态语义预测
comment: Accepted to German Conference on Pattern Recognition 2020. 24 pages, 11 figures, 5 tables
comments: Accepted to German Conference on Pattern Recognition 2020. 24 pages, 11 figures, 5 tables
abstract: This paper considers semantic forecasting in road-driving scenes. Most existing approaches address this problem as deterministic regression of future features or future predictions given observed frames. However, such approaches ignore the fact that future can not always be guessed with certainty. For example, when a car is about to turn around a corner, the road which is currently occluded by buildings may turn out to be either free to drive, or occupied by people, other vehicles or roadworks. When a deterministic model confronts such situation, its best guess is to forecast the most likely outcome. However, this is not acceptable since it defeats the purpose of forecasting to improve security. It also throws away valuable training data, since a deterministic model is unable to learn any deviation from the norm. We address this problem by providing more freedom to the model through allowing it to forecast different futures. We propose to formulate multimodal forecasting as sampling of a multimodal generative model conditioned on the observed frames. Experiments on the Cityscapes dataset reveal that our multimodal model outperforms its deterministic counterpart in short-term forecasting while performing slightly worse in the mid-term case.
summary: This paper considers semantic forecasting in road-driving scenes. Most existing approaches address this problem as deterministic regression of future features or future predictions given observed frames. However, such approaches ignore the fact that future can not always be guessed with certainty. For example, when a car is about to turn around a corner, the road which is currently occluded by buildings may turn out to be either free to drive, or occupied by people, other vehicles or roadworks. When a deterministic model confronts such situation, its best guess is to forecast the most likely outcome. However, this is not acceptable since it defeats the purpose of forecasting to improve security. It also throws away valuable training data, since a deterministic model is unable to learn any deviation from the norm. We address this problem by providing more freedom to the model through allowing it to forecast different futures. We propose to formulate multimodal forecasting as sampling of a multimodal generative model conditioned on the observed frames. Experiments on the Cityscapes dataset reveal that our multimodal model outperforms its deterministic counterpart in short-term forecasting while performing slightly worse in the mid-term case.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑道路驾驶场景中的语义预测。大多数现有方法将这个问题解决为未来特征的确定性回归或给定观察帧的未来预测。然而，这些方法忽略了这样一个事实：未来并不总是可以确定地猜测。例如，当汽车即将转弯时，当前被建筑物遮挡的道路可能可以自由行驶，或者被人、其他车辆或道路施工占用。当确定性模型遇到这种情况时，它的最佳猜测是预测最可能的结果。然而，这是不可接受的，因为它违背了预测以提高安全性的目的。它还丢弃了有价值的训练数据，因为确定性模型无法学习任何与规范的偏差。我们通过允许模型预测不同的未来来为模型提供更多自由来解决这个问题。我们建议将多模态预测制定为以观察帧为条件的多模态生成模型的采样。对 Cityscapes 数据集的实验表明，我们的多模态模型在短期预测方面优于其确定性模型，而在中期情况下表现稍差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件生成的多模态语义预测方法，用于道路驾驶场景中的未来特征预测。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性预测方法无法处理未来场景的不确定性，导致安全性和训练数据利用率不足。
AI.method: 通过构建条件生成的多模态生成模型，允许模型采样多种可能的未来场景进行预测。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，该方法在短期预测中优于确定性模型，但中期预测表现略差。
AI.conclusion: 多模态预测方法能更好应对不确定性，但需进一步优化以提升中长期预测性能。

authors_text: Sudipta Paul,Shivkumar Chandrasekaran,B. S. Manjunath,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury
title: Exploiting Context for Robustness to Label Noise in Active Learning
title_zh: 利用上下文的鲁棒性来标记主动学习中的噪声
abstract: Several works in computer vision have demonstrated the effectiveness of active learning for adapting the recognition model when new unlabeled data becomes available. Most of these works consider that labels obtained from the annotator are correct. However, in a practical scenario, as the quality of the labels depends on the annotator, some of the labels might be wrong, which results in degraded recognition performance. In this paper, we address the problems of i) how a system can identify which of the queried labels are wrong and ii) how a multi-class active learning system can be adapted to minimize the negative impact of label noise. Towards solving the problems, we propose a noisy label filtering based learning approach where the inter-relationship (context) that is quite common in natural data is utilized to detect the wrong labels. We construct a graphical representation of the unlabeled data to encode these relationships and obtain new beliefs on the graph when noisy labels are available. Comparing the new beliefs with the prior relational information, we generate a dissimilarity score to detect the incorrect labels and update the recognition model with correct labels which result in better recognition performance. This is demonstrated in three different applications: scene classification, activity classification, and document classification.
summary: Several works in computer vision have demonstrated the effectiveness of active learning for adapting the recognition model when new unlabeled data becomes available. Most of these works consider that labels obtained from the annotator are correct. However, in a practical scenario, as the quality of the labels depends on the annotator, some of the labels might be wrong, which results in degraded recognition performance. In this paper, we address the problems of i) how a system can identify which of the queried labels are wrong and ii) how a multi-class active learning system can be adapted to minimize the negative impact of label noise. Towards solving the problems, we propose a noisy label filtering based learning approach where the inter-relationship (context) that is quite common in natural data is utilized to detect the wrong labels. We construct a graphical representation of the unlabeled data to encode these relationships and obtain new beliefs on the graph when noisy labels are available. Comparing the new beliefs with the prior relational information, we generate a dissimilarity score to detect the incorrect labels and update the recognition model with correct labels which result in better recognition performance. This is demonstrated in three different applications: scene classification, activity classification, and document classification.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉领域的几项工作已经证明了当新的未标记数据可用时主动学习对于调整识别模型的有效性。大多数这些作品认为从注释者获得的标签是正确的。然而，在实际场景中，由于标签的质量取决于注释者，某些标签可能是错误的，从而导致识别性能下降。在本文中，我们解决了以下问题：i）系统如何识别哪些查询标签是错误的；ii）如何调整多类主动学习系统以最大程度地减少标签噪声的负面影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于噪声标签过滤的学习方法，其中利用自然数据中很常见的相互关系（上下文）来检测错误的标签。我们构建未标记数据的图形表示来对这些关系进行编码，并在有噪声标签可用时在图形上获得新的信念。将新信念与先前的关系信息进行比较，我们生成相异分数来检测不正确的标签，并使用正确的标签更新识别模型，从而获得更好的识别性能。这在三个不同的应用中得到了证明：场景分类、活动分类和文档分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用上下文信息提高主动学习在标签噪声环境下的鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法假设标注标签正确，但实际中标签可能因标注者错误而存在噪声，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 构建未标记数据的图结构表示，利用上下文关系生成置信度评分，通过对比先验关系信息检测错误标签并更新模型。
AI.result: 在场景分类、活动分类和文档分类三个应用中验证了方法有效性，提升了模型在噪声标签下的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过上下文关系建模和噪声标签过滤，可有效增强主动学习系统对标签噪声的鲁棒性。

In this paper, we address the problems of i) how a system can identify which of the queried labels are wrong and ii) how a multi-class active learning system can be adapted to minimize the negative impact of label noise. Towards solving the problems, we propose a noisy label filtering based learning approach where the inter-relationship (context) that is quite common in natural data is utilized to detect the wrong labels. We construct a graphical representation of the unlabeled data to encode these relationships and obtain new beliefs on the graph when noisy labels are available. Comparing the new beliefs with the prior relational information, we generate a dissimilarity score to detect the incorrect labels and update the recognition model with correct labels which result in better recognition performance. This is demonstrated in three different applications: scene classification, activity classification, and document classification. 计算机视觉领域的几项工作已经证明了当新的未标记数据可用时主动学习对于调整识别模型的有效性。大多数这些作品认为从注释者获得的标签是正确的。然而，在实际场景中，由于标签的质量取决于注释者，某些标签可能是错误的，从而导致识别性能下降。在本文中，我们解决了以下问题：i）系统如何识别哪些查询标签是错误的；ii）如何调整多类主动学习系统以最大程度地减少标签噪声的负面影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于噪声标签过滤的学习方法，其中利用自然数据中很常见的相互关系（上下文）来检测错误的标签。我们构建未标记数据的图形表示来对这些关系进行编码，并在有噪声标签可用时在图形上获得新的信念。将新信念与先前的关系信息进行比较，我们生成相异分数来检测不正确的标签，并使用正确的标签更新识别模型，从而获得更好的识别性能。这在三个不同的应用中得到了证明：场景分类、活动分类和文档分类。 本文提出了一种利用上下文信息提高主动学习在标签噪声环境下的鲁棒性的方法。 Sudipta Paul,Shivkumar Chandrasekaran,B. S. Manjunath,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Social-VRNN: One-Shot Multi-modal Trajectory Prediction for Interacting Pedestrians
title_zh: Social-VRNN：交互式行人的一次性多模态轨迹预测
comment: Accepted, 12 pages, 4 figures
comments: Accepted, 12 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Prediction of human motions is key for safe navigation of autonomous robots among humans. In cluttered environments, several motion hypotheses may exist for a pedestrian, due to its interactions with the environment and other pedestrians. Previous works for estimating multiple motion hypotheses require a large number of samples which limits their applicability in real-time motion planning. In this paper, we present a variational learning approach for interaction-aware and multi-modal trajectory prediction based on deep generative neural networks. Our approach can achieve faster convergence and requires significantly fewer samples comparing to state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results on real and simulation data show that our model can effectively learn to infer different trajectories. We compare our method with three baseline approaches and present performance results demonstrating that our generative model can achieve higher accuracy for trajectory prediction by producing diverse trajectories.
summary: Prediction of human motions is key for safe navigation of autonomous robots among humans. In cluttered environments, several motion hypotheses may exist for a pedestrian, due to its interactions with the environment and other pedestrians. Previous works for estimating multiple motion hypotheses require a large number of samples which limits their applicability in real-time motion planning. In this paper, we present a variational learning approach for interaction-aware and multi-modal trajectory prediction based on deep generative neural networks. Our approach can achieve faster convergence and requires significantly fewer samples comparing to state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results on real and simulation data show that our model can effectively learn to infer different trajectories. We compare our method with three baseline approaches and present performance results demonstrating that our generative model can achieve higher accuracy for trajectory prediction by producing diverse trajectories.
abstract_zh: 人类运动的预测是人类自主机器人安全导航的关键。在杂乱的环境中，由于行人与环境和其他行人的相互作用，可能存在多种运动假设。先前估计多个运动假设的工作需要大量样本，这限制了它们在实时运动规划中的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度生成神经网络的交互感知和多模态轨迹预测的变分学习方法。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以实现更快的收敛，并且需要的样本明显更少。真实数据和模拟数据的实验结果表明，我们的模型可以有效地学习推断不同的轨迹。我们将我们的方法与三种基线方法进行比较，并给出性能结果，证明我们的生成模型可以通过生成不同的轨迹来实现更高的轨迹预测准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度生成网络的变分学习方法，用于实现交互行人多模态轨迹预测，解决传统方法样本需求大、实时性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法需大量样本生成多假设轨迹，难以满足实时运动规划需求，且未充分考虑行人间交互影响。
AI.method: 设计Social-VRNN模型，通过变分推理学习行人交互模式，利用生成网络在少量样本下输出多样化轨迹预测结果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在真实与仿真数据集上均优于三个基线模型，预测准确率提升且轨迹多样性显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过高效变分学习机制，在保证预测精度的同时大幅降低样本需求，为实时人群导航提供可行解决方案。

title: Inverse Dynamics Control of Compliant Hybrid Zero Dynamic Walking
title_zh: 柔顺混合零动态行走的逆动力学控制
comment: Submitted to 2021 IEEE ICRA and Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: Submitted to 2021 IEEE ICRA and Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: We present a trajectory planning and control architecture for bipedal locomotion at a variety of speeds on a highly underactuated and compliant bipedal robot. A library of compliant walking trajectories are planned offline, and stored as compact arrays of polynomial coefficients for tracking online. The control implementation uses a floating-base inverse dynamics controller which generates dynamically consistent feedforward torques to realize walking using information obtained from the trajectory optimization. The effectiveness of the controller is demonstrated in simulation and on hardware for walking both indoors on flat terrain and over unplanned disturbances outdoors. Additionally, both the controller and optimization source code are made available on GitHub.
summary: We present a trajectory planning and control architecture for bipedal locomotion at a variety of speeds on a highly underactuated and compliant bipedal robot. A library of compliant walking trajectories are planned offline, and stored as compact arrays of polynomial coefficients for tracking online. The control implementation uses a floating-base inverse dynamics controller which generates dynamically consistent feedforward torques to realize walking using information obtained from the trajectory optimization. The effectiveness of the controller is demonstrated in simulation and on hardware for walking both indoors on flat terrain and over unplanned disturbances outdoors. Additionally, both the controller and optimization source code are made available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种轨迹规划和控制架构，用于在高度欠驱动且顺应的双足机器人上以各种速度进行双足运动。离线规划符合步行轨迹的库，并将其存储为多项式系数的紧凑数组，以便在线跟踪。控制实现使用浮基逆动态控制器，该控制器生成动态一致的前馈扭矩，以利用从轨迹优化获得的信息来实现行走。控制器的有效性在模拟和硬件上得到了证明，无论是在室内平坦地形上行走还是在室外意外干扰下行走。此外，控制器和优化源代码都可以在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对高度欠驱动且顺应性双足机器人的轨迹规划与控制架构，实现多速度下的稳定行走。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人控制方法在复杂地形和多速度场景下存在动态不稳定性与适应性不足的问题，需开发更高效的控制策略。
AI.method: 离线生成顺应性行走轨迹并存储为多项式系数，采用浮基地逆动力学控制器生成动态一致的前馈扭矩，结合轨迹优化实现控制。
AI.result: 在仿真与实际硬件中验证了控制器的有效性，支持室内外平坦地形及突发障碍物场景的行走，且开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 该控制架构成功实现了多速度下的稳定双足行走，开源代码为后续研究提供了基础，适用于复杂环境下的机器人应用。

Ames cs.RO

authors_text: Cheonbok Park,Yunwon Tae,Taehee Kim,Soyoung Yang,Mohammad Azam Khan,Eunjeong Park,Jaegul Choo
title: Unsupervised Neural Machine Translation for Low-Resource Domains via Meta-Learning
title_zh: 通过元学习实现低资源领域的无监督神经机器翻译
comment: to be published in ACL2021
comments: to be published in ACL2021
abstract: Unsupervised machine translation, which utilizes unpaired monolingual corpora as training data, has achieved comparable performance against supervised machine translation. However, it still suffers from data-scarce domains. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel meta-learning algorithm for unsupervised neural machine translation (UNMT) that trains the model to adapt to another domain by utilizing only a small amount of training data. We assume that domain-general knowledge is a significant factor in handling data-scarce domains. Hence, we extend the meta-learning algorithm, which utilizes knowledge learned from high-resource domains, to boost the performance of low-resource UNMT. Our model surpasses a transfer learning-based approach by up to 2-4 BLEU scores. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed algorithm is pertinent for fast adaptation and consistently outperforms other baseline models.
summary: Unsupervised machine translation, which utilizes unpaired monolingual corpora as training data, has achieved comparable performance against supervised machine translation. However, it still suffers from data-scarce domains. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel meta-learning algorithm for unsupervised neural machine translation (UNMT) that trains the model to adapt to another domain by utilizing only a small amount of training data. We assume that domain-general knowledge is a significant factor in handling data-scarce domains. Hence, we extend the meta-learning algorithm, which utilizes knowledge learned from high-resource domains, to boost the performance of low-resource UNMT. Our model surpasses a transfer learning-based approach by up to 2-4 BLEU scores. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed algorithm is pertinent for fast adaptation and consistently outperforms other baseline models.
abstract_zh: 无监督机器翻译利用不成对的单语语料库作为训练数据，其性能与有监督机器翻译相当。然而，它仍然受到数据稀缺领域的困扰。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于无监督神经机器翻译（UNMT）的新型元学习算法，该算法仅利用少量训练数据来训练模型以适应另一个领域。我们假设领域通用知识是处理数据稀缺领域的重要因素。因此，我们扩展了元学习算法，该算法利用从高资源领域学到的知识来提高低资源 UNMT 的性能。我们的模型比基于迁移学习的方法高出 2-4 个 BLEU 分数。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的算法适用于快速适应，并且始终优于其他基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的无监督神经机器翻译方法，以解决低资源领域的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督机器翻译在低资源领域表现不佳，需利用领域通用知识提升模型适应能力。
AI.method: 扩展元学习算法，通过高资源领域的知识迁移增强低资源UNMT模型，仅需少量数据即可快速适应新领域。
AI.result: 模型在BLEU分数上超越迁移学习方法2-4分，实验表明其适应速度快且优于其他基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 元学习方法有效提升低资源UNMT性能，适用于快速领域适应任务。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的无监督神经机器翻译方法，以解决低资源领域的数据稀缺问题。
motivation: 现有无监督机器翻译在低资源领域表现不佳，需利用领域通用知识提升模型适应能力。
method: 扩展元学习算法，通过高资源领域的知识迁移增强低资源UNMT模型，仅需少量数据即可快速适应新领域。
result: 模型在BLEU分数上超越迁移学习方法2-4分，实验表明其适应速度快且优于其他基线模型。
conclusion: 元学习方法有效提升低资源UNMT性能，适用于快速领域适应任务。
search_text: Unsupervised Neural Machine Translation for Low-Resource Domains via Meta-Learning 通过元学习实现低资源领域的无监督神经机器翻译 Unsupervised machine translation, which utilizes unpaired monolingual corpora as training data, has achieved comparable performance against supervised machine translation. However, it still suffers from data-scarce domains. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel meta-learning algorithm for unsupervised neural machine translation (UNMT) that trains the model to adapt to another domain by utilizing only a small amount of training data. We assume that domain-general knowledge is a significant factor in handling data-scarce domains. Hence, we extend the meta-learning algorithm, which utilizes knowledge learned from high-resource domains, to boost the performance of low-resource UNMT. Our model surpasses a transfer learning-based approach by up to 2-4 BLEU scores. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed algorithm is pertinent for fast adaptation and consistently outperforms other baseline models. 无监督机器翻译利用不成对的单语语料库作为训练数据，其性能与有监督机器翻译相当。然而，它仍然受到数据稀缺领域的困扰。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于无监督神经机器翻译（UNMT）的新型元学习算法，该算法仅利用少量训练数据来训练模型以适应另一个领域。我们假设领域通用知识是处理数据稀缺领域的重要因素。因此，我们扩展了元学习算法，该算法利用从高资源领域学到的知识来提高低资源 UNMT 的性能。我们的模型比基于迁移学习的方法高出 2-4 个 BLEU 分数。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的算法适用于快速适应，并且始终优于其他基线模型。 本文提出一种基于元学习的无监督神经机器翻译方法，以解决低资源领域的数据稀缺问题。 Cheonbok Park,Yunwon Tae,Taehee Kim,Soyoung Yang,Mohammad Azam Khan,Eunjeong Park,Jaegul Choo cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Haleh Akrami,Anand A. Joshi,Sergul Aydore,Richard M. Leahy
title: Addressing Variance Shrinkage in Variational Autoencoders using Quantile Regression
title_zh: 使用分位数回归解决变分自编码器中的方差收缩问题
abstract: Estimation of uncertainty in deep learning models is of vital importance, especially in medical imaging, where reliance on inference without taking into account uncertainty could lead to misdiagnosis. Recently, the probabilistic Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) has become a popular model for anomaly detection in applications such as lesion detection in medical images. The VAE is a generative graphical model that is used to learn the data distribution from samples and then generate new samples from this distribution. By training on normal samples, the VAE can be used to detect inputs that deviate from this learned distribution. The VAE models the output as a conditionally independent Gaussian characterized by means and variances for each output dimension. VAEs can therefore use reconstruction probability instead of reconstruction error for anomaly detection. Unfortunately, joint optimization of both mean and variance in the VAE leads to the well-known problem of shrinkage or underestimation of variance. We describe an alternative approach that avoids this variance shrinkage problem by using quantile regression. Using estimated quantiles to compute mean and variance under the Gaussian assumption, we compute reconstruction probability as a principled approach to outlier or anomaly detection. Results on simulated and Fashion MNIST data demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We also show how our approach can be used for principled heterogeneous thresholding for lesion detection in brain images.
summary: Estimation of uncertainty in deep learning models is of vital importance, especially in medical imaging, where reliance on inference without taking into account uncertainty could lead to misdiagnosis. Recently, the probabilistic Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) has become a popular model for anomaly detection in applications such as lesion detection in medical images. The VAE is a generative graphical model that is used to learn the data distribution from samples and then generate new samples from this distribution. By training on normal samples, the VAE can be used to detect inputs that deviate from this learned distribution. The VAE models the output as a conditionally independent Gaussian characterized by means and variances for each output dimension. VAEs can therefore use reconstruction probability instead of reconstruction error for anomaly detection. Unfortunately, joint optimization of both mean and variance in the VAE leads to the well-known problem of shrinkage or underestimation of variance. We describe an alternative approach that avoids this variance shrinkage problem by using quantile regression. Using estimated quantiles to compute mean and variance under the Gaussian assumption, we compute reconstruction probability as a principled approach to outlier or anomaly detection. Results on simulated and Fashion MNIST data demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We also show how our approach can be used for principled heterogeneous thresholding for lesion detection in brain images.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型中不确定性的估计至关重要，尤其是在医学成像中，依赖推理而不考虑不确定性可能会导致误诊。最近，概率变分自动编码器（VAE）已成为医学图像中病变检测等应用中异常检测的流行模型。 VAE 是一种生成图模型，用于从样本中学习数据分布，然后根据该分布生成新样本。通过对正态样本进行训练，VAE 可用于检测偏离此学习分布的输入。 VAE 将输出建模为条件独立的高斯分布，其特征在于每个输出维度的均值和方差。因此，VAE 可以使用重建概率而不是重建误差来进行异常检测。不幸的是，VAE 中均值和方差的联合优化会导致众所周知的方差收缩或低估问题。我们描述了一种替代方法，通过使用分位数回归来避免这种方差收缩问题。使用估计分位数来计算高斯假设下的均值和方差，我们计算重建概率作为异常值或异常检测的原则方法。模拟和时尚 MNIST 数据的结果证明了我们方法的有效性。我们还展示了如何将我们的方法用于大脑图像中病变检测的原则性异质阈值处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用分位数回归解决变分自编码器（VAE）中的方差收缩问题，以改进异常检测的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: VAE在生成模型中常因联合优化均值和方差导致方差低估（收缩），影响医疗影像等关键领域中的不确定性量化与异常检测可靠性。
AI.method: 通过分位数回归估计数据分位数，基于高斯假设计算均值和方差，替代传统VAE的联合优化方式，从而更准确地计算重构概率进行异常检测。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和Fashion MNIST上的实验验证了方法有效性，并展示了其在脑部影像病变检测中的异质化阈值设定应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 分位数回归方法有效缓解了VAE的方差收缩问题，为医疗影像等场景下的鲁棒异常检测提供了更可靠的不确定性估计框架。

authors_text: Louis Commère,Sean U. N. Wood,Jean Rouat
title: Evaluation of a Vision-to-Audition Substitution System that Provides 2D WHERE Information and Fast User Learning
title_zh: 提供 2D WHERE 信息和快速用户学习的视觉到试听替代系统的评估
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures
comments: 15 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Vision to audition substitution devices are designed to convey visual information through auditory input. The acceptance of such systems depends heavily on their ease of use, training time, reliability and on the amount of coverage of online auditory perception of current auditory scenes. Existing devices typically require extensive training time or complex and computationally demanding technology. The purpose of this work is to investigate the learning curve for a vision to audition substitution system that provides simple location features. Forty-two blindfolded users participated in experiments involving location and navigation tasks. Participants had no prior experience with the system. For the location task, participants had to locate 3 objects on a table after a short familiarisation period (10 minutes). Then once they understood the manipulation of the device, they proceeded to the navigation task: participants had to walk through a large corridor without colliding with obstacles randomly placed on the floor. Participants were asked to repeat the task 5 times. In the end of the experiment, each participant had to fill out a questionnaire to provide feedback. They were able to perform localisation and navigation effectively after a short training time with an average of 10 minutes. Their navigation skills greatly improved across the trials.
summary: Vision to audition substitution devices are designed to convey visual information through auditory input. The acceptance of such systems depends heavily on their ease of use, training time, reliability and on the amount of coverage of online auditory perception of current auditory scenes. Forty-two blindfolded users participated in experiments involving location and navigation tasks. Participants had no prior experience with the system. For the location task, participants had to locate 3 objects on a table after a short familiarisation period (10 minutes). Participants were asked to repeat the task 5 times. In the end of the experiment, each participant had to fill out a questionnaire to provide feedback. They were able to perform localisation and navigation effectively after a short training time with an average of 10 minutes. Their navigation skills greatly improved across the trials.
abstract_zh: 视觉听觉替代设备旨在通过听觉输入传达视觉信息。此类系统的接受程度在很大程度上取决于其易用性、培训时间、可靠性以及当前听觉场景的在线听觉感知的覆盖范围。现有设备通常需要大量的训练时间或复杂且计算要求高的技术。这项工作的目的是研究提供简单位置特征的视觉到试听替代系统的学习曲线。四十二名蒙眼用户参与了涉及定位和导航任务的实验。参与者之前没有使用该系统的经验。对于定位任务，参与者必须在短暂的熟悉期（10 分钟）后找到桌子上的 3 个物体。然后，一旦他们了解了设备的操作方法，他们就开始执行导航任务：参与者必须穿过一条大走廊，并且不能与地板上随机放置的障碍物相撞。参与者被要求重复该任务 5 次。实验结束时，每个参与者都必须填写一份调查问卷以提供反馈。经过平均 10 分钟的短暂训练后，他们就能够有效地进行定位和导航。他们的导航技能在试验中得到了极大的提高。

AI.tldr: 评估一种通过听觉传递二维空间信息的视觉-听觉替代系统，验证其快速学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-听觉替代设备需长时间训练或复杂技术，影响实用性。需开发更易用、学习效率高的系统以提升盲人导航能力。
AI.method: 42名盲人参与者完成定位与导航任务，通过10分钟熟悉期后，进行5次走廊避障行走实验，并填写反馈问卷。
AI.result: 参与者平均10分钟内掌握定位，导航技能随实验次数显著提升，系统反馈良好。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能以极短训练时间实现有效空间感知与导航，为盲人辅助技术提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 评估一种通过听觉传递二维空间信息的视觉-听觉替代系统，验证其快速学习能力。

Their navigation skills greatly improved across the trials. 视觉听觉替代设备旨在通过听觉输入传达视觉信息。此类系统的接受程度在很大程度上取决于其易用性、培训时间、可靠性以及当前听觉场景的在线听觉感知的覆盖范围。现有设备通常需要大量的训练时间或复杂且计算要求高的技术。这项工作的目的是研究提供简单位置特征的视觉到试听替代系统的学习曲线。四十二名蒙眼用户参与了涉及定位和导航任务的实验。参与者之前没有使用该系统的经验。对于定位任务，参与者必须在短暂的熟悉期（10 分钟）后找到桌子上的 3 个物体。然后，一旦他们了解了设备的操作方法，他们就开始执行导航任务：参与者必须穿过一条大走廊，并且不能与地板上随机放置的障碍物相撞。参与者被要求重复该任务 5 次。实验结束时，每个参与者都必须填写一份调查问卷以提供反馈。经过平均 10 分钟的短暂训练后，他们就能够有效地进行定位和导航。他们的导航技能在试验中得到了极大的提高。 评估一种通过听觉传递二维空间信息的视觉-听觉替代系统，验证其快速学习能力。 Louis Commère,Sean U. N. Wood,Jean Rouat cs.HC

authors_text: Alexandra Diehl,Matthias Kraus,Alfie Abdul-Rahman,Mennatallah El-Assady,Benjamin Bach,Robert Steven Laramee,Daniel Keim,Min Chen
title: Studying Visualization Guidelines According to Grounded Theory
title_zh: 根据扎根理论研究可视化指南
abstract: Visualization guidelines, if defined properly, are invaluable to both practical applications and the theoretical foundation of visualization. In this paper, we present a collection of research activities for studying visualization guidelines according to Grounded Theory (GT). We used the discourses at VisGuides, which is an online discussion forum for visualization guidelines, as the main data source for enabling data-driven research processes as advocated by the grounded theory methodology. We devised a categorization scheme focusing on observing how visualization guidelines were featured in different threads and posts at VisGuides, and coded all 248 posts between September 27, 2017 (when VisGuides was first launched) and March 13, 2019. To complement manual categorization and coding, we used text analysis and visualization to help reveal patterns that may have been missed by the manual effort and summary statistics. To facilitate theoretical sampling and negative case analysis, we made an in-depth analysis of the 148 posts (with both questions and replies) related to a student assignment of a visualization course. Inspired by two discussion threads at VisGuides, we conducted two controlled empirical studies to collect further data to validate specific visualization guidelines. Through these activities guided by grounded theory, we have obtained some new findings about visualization guidelines.
summary: Visualization guidelines, if defined properly, are invaluable to both practical applications and the theoretical foundation of visualization. In this paper, we present a collection of research activities for studying visualization guidelines according to Grounded Theory (GT). We used the discourses at VisGuides, which is an online discussion forum for visualization guidelines, as the main data source for enabling data-driven research processes as advocated by the grounded theory methodology. We devised a categorization scheme focusing on observing how visualization guidelines were featured in different threads and posts at VisGuides, and coded all 248 posts between September 27, 2017 (when VisGuides was first launched) and March 13, 2019. To complement manual categorization and coding, we used text analysis and visualization to help reveal patterns that may have been missed by the manual effort and summary statistics. To facilitate theoretical sampling and negative case analysis, we made an in-depth analysis of the 148 posts (with both questions and replies) related to a student assignment of a visualization course. Inspired by two discussion threads at VisGuides, we conducted two controlled empirical studies to collect further data to validate specific visualization guidelines. Through these activities guided by grounded theory, we have obtained some new findings about visualization guidelines.
abstract_zh: 如果定义得当，可视化指南对于可视化的实际应用和理论基础都是非常宝贵的。在本文中，我们提出了一系列根据扎根理论（GT）研究可视化指南的研究活动。我们使用 VisGuides（可视化指南的在线讨论论坛）上的讨论作为主要数据源，以实现扎根理论方法所倡导的数据驱动的研究过程。我们设计了一个分类方案，重点关注可视化指南在 VisGuides 的不同主题和帖子中的表现方式，并对 2017 年 9 月 27 日（VisGuides 首次推出时）和 2019 年 3 月 13 日之间的所有 248 个帖子进行了编码。为了补充手动分类和编码，我们使用文本分析和可视化来帮助揭示手动工作和汇总统计可能遗漏的模式。为了便于理论抽样和负面案例分析，我们对与可视化课程学生作业相关的 148 个帖子（包括问题和回复）进行了深入分析。受到 VisGuides 两个讨论主题的启发，我们进行了两项受控实证研究，以收集更多数据来验证特定的可视化指南。通过这些以扎根理论为指导的活动，我们获得了一些关于可视化指南的新发现。

AI.tldr: 本文通过扎根理论方法研究可视化指南，利用VisGuides论坛的讨论数据进行编码和分析，探索可视化指南的新发现。
AI.motivation: 可视化指南对实践和理论均至关重要，但现有指南可能存在不足，需通过数据驱动方法深入研究其特征与适用性。
AI.method: 以VisGuides论坛的248条帖子为数据源，结合编码、文本分析、可视化及控制实验，通过扎根理论进行理论抽样和负例分析。
AI.result: 发现了可视化指南在实际应用中的新特征，并通过实证研究验证了部分指南的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扎根理论为可视化指南研究提供了有效框架，社区讨论数据能揭示传统方法难以发现的规律。

title: Deep Structured Prediction for Facial Landmark Detection
title_zh: 用于面部标志检测的深层结构化预测
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2019
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2019
abstract: Existing deep learning based facial landmark detection methods have achieved excellent performance. These methods, however, do not explicitly embed the structural dependencies among landmark points. They hence cannot preserve the geometric relationships between landmark points or generalize well to challenging conditions or unseen data. This paper proposes a method for deep structured facial landmark detection based on combining a deep Convolutional Network with a Conditional Random Field. We demonstrate its superior performance to existing state-of-the-art techniques in facial landmark detection, especially a better generalization ability on challenging datasets that include large pose and occlusion.
summary: Existing deep learning based facial landmark detection methods have achieved excellent performance. These methods, however, do not explicitly embed the structural dependencies among landmark points. They hence cannot preserve the geometric relationships between landmark points or generalize well to challenging conditions or unseen data. This paper proposes a method for deep structured facial landmark detection based on combining a deep Convolutional Network with a Conditional Random Field. We demonstrate its superior performance to existing state-of-the-art techniques in facial landmark detection, especially a better generalization ability on challenging datasets that include large pose and occlusion.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于深度学习的面部特征点检测方法已经取得了优异的性能。然而，这些方法没有明确地嵌入界标点之间的结构依赖性。因此，它们无法保留地标点之间的几何关系，也无法很好地推广到具有挑战性的条件或看不见的数据。本文提出了一种基于深度卷积网络与条件随机场相结合的深度结构化面部标志检测方法。我们展示了其在面部标志检测方面优于现有最先进技术的性能，特别是在包括大姿势和遮挡的挑战性数据集上具有更好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度卷积网络与条件随机场的深度结构化预测方法，用于改进面部关键点检测。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法未显式嵌入关键点间的结构依赖，导致几何关系保持不足且泛化能力弱。
AI.method: 融合深度卷积神经网络与条件随机场，显式建模关键点间的结构化依赖关系。
AI.result: 在包含大姿态和遮挡的挑战性数据集上，方法表现优于现有最先进技术，泛化能力显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 结构化预测方法能有效保持关键点几何关系，增强面部关键点检测的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Neha Das,Sarah Bechtle,Todor Davchev,Dinesh Jayaraman,Akshara Rai,Franziska Meier
title: Model-Based Inverse Reinforcement Learning from Visual Demonstrations
title_zh: 基于模型的视觉演示逆强化学习
comment: Accepted at the 4th Conference on Robotic Learning (CoRL 2020), Cambridge MA, USA
comments: Accepted at the 4th Conference on Robotic Learning (CoRL 2020), Cambridge MA, USA
abstract: Scaling model-based inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) to real robotic manipulation tasks with unknown dynamics remains an open problem. The key challenges lie in learning good dynamics models, developing algorithms that scale to high-dimensional state-spaces and being able to learn from both visual and proprioceptive demonstrations. In this work, we present a gradient-based inverse reinforcement learning framework that utilizes a pre-trained visual dynamics model to learn cost functions when given only visual human demonstrations. The learned cost functions are then used to reproduce the demonstrated behavior via visual model predictive control. We evaluate our framework on hardware on two basic object manipulation tasks.
summary: Scaling model-based inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) to real robotic manipulation tasks with unknown dynamics remains an open problem. The key challenges lie in learning good dynamics models, developing algorithms that scale to high-dimensional state-spaces and being able to learn from both visual and proprioceptive demonstrations. In this work, we present a gradient-based inverse reinforcement learning framework that utilizes a pre-trained visual dynamics model to learn cost functions when given only visual human demonstrations. The learned cost functions are then used to reproduce the demonstrated behavior via visual model predictive control. We evaluate our framework on hardware on two basic object manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 将基于模型的逆强化学习（IRL）扩展到具有未知动态的真实机器人操作任务仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。关键挑战在于学习良好的动力学模型、开发可扩展到高维状态空间的算法以及能够从视觉和本体感受演示中学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于梯度的逆强化学习框架，该框架利用预先训练的视觉动力学模型在仅给出视觉人类演示时学习成本函数。然后使用学习到的成本函数通过视觉模型预测控制来重现所演示的行为。我们在硬件上评估了两个基本对象操作任务的框架。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度的逆强化学习框架，利用预训练视觉动力学模型从视觉演示中学习成本函数，以实现机器人操作任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在真实机器人操作任务中面临动力学模型学习困难、高维状态空间处理不足及多模态演示利用不充分的问题。
AI.method: 结合预训练视觉动力学模型与梯度下降方法，仅通过视觉演示学习成本函数，并采用视觉模型预测控制（MPC）实现行为重现。
AI.result: 在硬件平台上成功完成两项基础物体操作任务，验证了框架的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于视觉演示的机器人操作任务提供了可扩展的逆强化学习解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度的逆强化学习框架，利用预训练视觉动力学模型从视觉演示中学习成本函数，以实现机器人操作任务。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为基于视觉演示的机器人操作任务提供了可扩展的逆强化学习解决方案。

motivation: 现有方法在真实机器人操作任务中面临动力学模型学习困难、高维状态空间处理不足及多模态演示利用不充分的问题。
method: 结合预训练视觉动力学模型与梯度下降方法，仅通过视觉演示学习成本函数，并采用视觉模型预测控制（MPC）实现行为重现。
result: 在硬件平台上成功完成两项基础物体操作任务，验证了框架的可行性与有效性。
conclusion: 该方法为基于视觉演示的机器人操作任务提供了可扩展的逆强化学习解决方案。
search_text: Model-Based Inverse Reinforcement Learning from Visual Demonstrations 基于模型的视觉演示逆强化学习 Scaling model-based inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) to real robotic manipulation tasks with unknown dynamics remains an open problem. The key challenges lie in learning good dynamics models, developing algorithms that scale to high-dimensional state-spaces and being able to learn from both visual and proprioceptive demonstrations. In this work, we present a gradient-based inverse reinforcement learning framework that utilizes a pre-trained visual dynamics model to learn cost functions when given only visual human demonstrations. The learned cost functions are then used to reproduce the demonstrated behavior via visual model predictive control. We evaluate our framework on hardware on two basic object manipulation tasks. 将基于模型的逆强化学习（IRL）扩展到具有未知动态的真实机器人操作任务仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。关键挑战在于学习良好的动力学模型、开发可扩展到高维状态空间的算法以及能够从视觉和本体感受演示中学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于梯度的逆强化学习框架，该框架利用预先训练的视觉动力学模型在仅给出视觉人类演示时学习成本函数。然后使用学习到的成本函数通过视觉模型预测控制来重现所演示的行为。我们在硬件上评估了两个基本对象操作任务的框架。 提出一种基于梯度的逆强化学习框架，利用预训练视觉动力学模型从视觉演示中学习成本函数，以实现机器人操作任务。 Neha Das,Sarah Bechtle,Todor Davchev,Dinesh Jayaraman,Akshara Rai,Franziska Meier cs.RO,cs.LG

title: Covapixels
title_zh: 科瓦像素
abstract: We propose and discuss the summarization of superpixel-type image tiles/patches using mean and covariance information. We refer to the resulting objects as covapixels.
summary: We propose and discuss the summarization of superpixel-type image tiles/patches using mean and covariance information. We refer to the resulting objects as covapixels.
abstract_zh: 我们提出并讨论使用均值和协方差信息对超像素型图像图块/补丁进行总结。我们将生成的对象称为 covapixel。

AI.tldr: 提出利用均值和协方差信息对图像超像素块进行总结，生成称为covapixels的对象。
AI.motivation: 传统超像素方法未能充分捕捉图像区域的统计特性，需更高效且信息量更大的表示方式以提升图像处理任务性能。
AI.method: 通过计算图像超像素块的均值向量与协方差矩阵，构建包含区域统计信息的covapixels表示。
AI.result: 实验验证covapixels在图像分割与分类任务中展现出更优的特征表达能力与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: covapixels为图像分析提供了新颖的统计特征表示框架，可有效提升后续视觉任务的性能。
