authors_text: Chaobing Shan,Chunbo Wei,Bing Deng,Jianqiang Huang,Xian-Sheng Hua,Xiaoliang Cheng,Kewei Liang
title: Tracklets Predicting Based Adaptive Graph Tracking
title_zh: 基于轨迹预测的自适应图跟踪
abstract: Most of the existing tracking methods link the detected boxes to the tracklets using a linear combination of feature cosine distances and box overlap. But the problem of inconsistent features of an object in two different frames still exists. In addition, when extracting features, only appearance information is utilized, neither the location relationship nor the information of the tracklets is considered. We present an accurate and end-to-end learning framework for multi-object tracking, namely \textbf{TPAGT}. It re-extracts the features of the tracklets in the current frame based on motion predicting, which is the key to solve the problem of features inconsistent. The adaptive graph neural network in TPAGT is adopted to fuse locations, appearance, and historical information, and plays an important role in distinguishing different objects. In the training phase, we propose the balanced MSE LOSS to successfully overcome the unbalanced samples. Experiments show that our method reaches state-of-the-art performance. It achieves 76.5\% MOTA on the MOT16 challenge and 76.2\% MOTA on the MOT17 challenge.
summary: Most of the existing tracking methods link the detected boxes to the tracklets using a linear combination of feature cosine distances and box overlap. But the problem of inconsistent features of an object in two different frames still exists. In addition, when extracting features, only appearance information is utilized, neither the location relationship nor the information of the tracklets is considered. We present an accurate and end-to-end learning framework for multi-object tracking, namely \textbf{TPAGT}. It re-extracts the features of the tracklets in the current frame based on motion predicting, which is the key to solve the problem of features inconsistent. The adaptive graph neural network in TPAGT is adopted to fuse locations, appearance, and historical information, and plays an important role in distinguishing different objects. In the training phase, we propose the balanced MSE LOSS to successfully overcome the unbalanced samples. Experiments show that our method reaches state-of-the-art performance. It achieves 76.5\% MOTA on the MOT16 challenge and 76.2\% MOTA on the MOT17 challenge.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的跟踪方法使用特征余弦距离和框重叠的线性组合将检测到的框链接到轨迹。但物体在两个不同帧中的特征不一致的问题仍然存在。另外，在提取特征时，只利用了外观信息，没有考虑位置关系和轨迹信息。我们提出了一个用于多目标跟踪的准确的端到端学习框架，即 \textbf{TPAGT}。它基于运动预测重新提取当前帧中轨迹的特征，这是解决特征不一致问题的关键。 TPAGT中的自适应图神经网络用于融合位置、外观和历史信息，在区分不同对象方面发挥着重要作用。在训练阶段，我们提出平衡MSE LOSS来成功克服不平衡样本。实验表明我们的方法达到了最先进的性能。它在 MOT16 挑战中实现了 76.5% MOTA，在 MOT17 挑战中实现了 76.2% MOTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应图神经网络的多目标跟踪框架TPAGT，解决轨迹片段特征不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在链接检测框与轨迹片段时存在特征不一致问题，且特征提取未考虑位置关系和轨迹信息，导致跟踪效果受限。
AI.method: TPAGT框架通过运动预测重提取轨迹特征，利用自适应图神经网络融合位置、外观与历史信息，并采用平衡MSE损失解决样本不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在MOT16和MOT17数据集上分别达到76.5%和76.2%的MOTA，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: TPAGT通过多信息融合与平衡损失函数有效解决特征不一致问题，在多个基准测试中表现优异。

title: Solving Shisen-Sho boards
title_zh: 解决 Shisen-Sho 板问题
comment: 14 pages
comments: 14 pages
abstract: We give a simple proof of that determining solvability of Shisen-Sho boards is NP-complete. Furthermore, we show that under realistic assumptions, one can compute in logarithmic time if two tiles form a playable pair. We combine an implementation of the algoritm to test playability of pairs with my earlier algorithm to solve Mahjong Solitaire boards with peeking, to obtain an algorithm to solve Shisen-Sho boards. We sample several Shisen-Sho and Mahjong Solitaire layouts for solvability for Shisen-Sho and Mahjong Solitaire.
summary: We give a simple proof of that determining solvability of Shisen-Sho boards is NP-complete. Furthermore, we show that under realistic assumptions, one can compute in logarithmic time if two tiles form a playable pair. We combine an implementation of the algoritm to test playability of pairs with my earlier algorithm to solve Mahjong Solitaire boards with peeking, to obtain an algorithm to solve Shisen-Sho boards. We sample several Shisen-Sho and Mahjong Solitaire layouts for solvability for Shisen-Sho and Mahjong Solitaire.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一个简单的证明，确定 Shisen-Sho 板的可解性是 NP 完全的。此外，我们表明，在现实的假设下，如果两个图块形成一对可玩的，则可以在对数时间内进行计算。我们将测试对子可玩性的算法的实现与我之前用窥视法解决麻将纸牌的算法结合起来，获得解决 Shisen-Sho 牌的算法。我们对几种 Shisen-Sho 和 Mahjong Solitaire 布局进行了采样，以了解 Shisen-Sho 和 Mahjong Solitaire 的可解性。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Shisen-Sho棋盘可解性判定为NP完全问题，并提出结合快速配对判断算法与Mahjong Solitaire求解算法的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 研究Shisen-Sho这类经典益智游戏的计算复杂性，为开发高效求解算法提供理论依据，同时探索其与Mahjong Solitaire的关联性。
AI.method: 通过简单证明NP完全性，设计对数时间判断可玩对算法，并整合作者先前的Mahjong Solitaire求解算法实现Shisen-Sho求解。
AI.result: 成功证明Shisen-Sho可解性为NP完全，实现快速配对判断算法，验证了多种游戏布局的可解性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为Shisen-Sho求解提供了理论支持，同时揭示了此类游戏问题的计算复杂性本质，为后续算法优化奠定基础。

title: Image-based Automated Species Identification: Can Virtual Data Augmentation Overcome Problems of Insufficient Sampling?
title_zh: 基于图像的自动物种识别：虚拟数据增强能否克服采样不足的问题？
abstract: Automated species identification and delimitation is challenging, particularly in rare and thus often scarcely sampled species, which do not allow sufficient discrimination of infraspecific versus interspecific variation. Typical problems arising from either low or exaggerated interspecific morphological differentiation are best met by automated methods of machine learning that learn efficient and effective species identification from training samples. However, limited infraspecific sampling remains a key challenge also in machine learning. 1In this study, we assessed whether a two-level data augmentation approach may help to overcome the problem of scarce training data in automated visual species identification. The first level of visual data augmentation applies classic approaches of data augmentation and generation of faked images using a GAN approach. Descriptive feature vectors are derived from bottleneck features of a VGG-16 convolutional neural network (CNN) that are then stepwise reduced in dimensionality using Global Average Pooling and PCA to prevent overfitting. The second level of data augmentation employs synthetic additional sampling in feature space by an oversampling algorithm in vector space (SMOTE). Applied on two challenging datasets of scarab beetles (Coleoptera), our augmentation approach outperformed a non-augmented deep learning baseline approach as well as a traditional 2D morphometric approach (Procrustes analysis).
summary: Automated species identification and delimitation is challenging, particularly in rare and thus often scarcely sampled species, which do not allow sufficient discrimination of infraspecific versus interspecific variation. Typical problems arising from either low or exaggerated interspecific morphological differentiation are best met by automated methods of machine learning that learn efficient and effective species identification from training samples. However, limited infraspecific sampling remains a key challenge also in machine learning. 1In this study, we assessed whether a two-level data augmentation approach may help to overcome the problem of scarce training data in automated visual species identification. The first level of visual data augmentation applies classic approaches of data augmentation and generation of faked images using a GAN approach. Descriptive feature vectors are derived from bottleneck features of a VGG-16 convolutional neural network (CNN) that are then stepwise reduced in dimensionality using Global Average Pooling and PCA to prevent overfitting. The second level of data augmentation employs synthetic additional sampling in feature space by an oversampling algorithm in vector space (SMOTE). Applied on two challenging datasets of scarab beetles (Coleoptera), our augmentation approach outperformed a non-augmented deep learning baseline approach as well as a traditional 2D morphometric approach (Procrustes analysis).
abstract_zh: 自动化物种识别和界定具有挑战性，特别是对于稀有物种，因此通常很少采样，它们不允许充分区分种内变异和种间变异。由低或夸大的种间形态分化引起的典型问题最好通过机器学习的自动化方法来解决，该方法从训练样本中学习高效且有效的物种识别。然而，有限的种下采样仍然是机器学习中的一个关键挑战。 1在这项研究中，我们评估了两级数据增强方法是否有助于克服自动视觉物种识别中训练数据稀缺的问题。第一级视觉数据增强应用数据增强的经典方法以及使用 GAN 方法生成伪造图像。描述性特征向量源自 VGG-16 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的瓶颈特征，然后使用全局平均池和 PCA 逐步降低维度以防止过度拟合。第二级数据增强通过向量空间中的过采样算法 (SMOTE) 在特征空间中采用合成附加采样。将我们的增强方法应用于两个具有挑战性的圣甲虫（鞘翅目）数据集，其性能优于非增强深度学习基线方法以及传统的 2D 形态测量方法（Procrustes 分析）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于图像的自动物种识别中，通过虚拟数据增强方法解决样本不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 稀有物种因采样不足导致种内与种间变异难以区分，传统方法和深度学习基线在低样本情况下效果有限。
AI.method: 采用两阶段数据增强：第一阶段用GAN生成假图像，第二阶段用SMOTE在特征空间进行过采样，并结合VGG-16特征降维防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在两种甲虫数据集上，该方法优于未增强的深度学习模型和传统二维形态测量方法（Procrustes分析）。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段数据增强策略能有效缓解自动物种识别中因样本不足导致的性能下降问题。

title: Visibility Optimization for Surveillance-Evasion Games
title_zh: 规避监控游戏的可见性优化
abstract: We consider surveillance-evasion differential games, where a pursuer must try to constantly maintain visibility of a moving evader. The pursuer loses as soon as the evader becomes occluded. Optimal controls for game can be formulated as a Hamilton-Jacobi-Isaac equation. We use an upwind scheme to compute the feedback value function, corresponding to the end-game time of the differential game. Although the value function enables optimal controls, it is prohibitively expensive to compute, even for a single pursuer and single evader on a small grid. We consider a discrete variant of the surveillance-game. We propose two locally optimal strategies based on the static value function for the surveillance-evasion game with multiple pursuers and evaders. We show that Monte Carlo tree search and self-play reinforcement learning can train a deep neural network to generate reasonable strategies for on-line game play. Given enough computational resources and offline training time, the proposed model can continue to improve its policies and efficiently scale to higher resolutions.
summary: We consider surveillance-evasion differential games, where a pursuer must try to constantly maintain visibility of a moving evader. The pursuer loses as soon as the evader becomes occluded. Optimal controls for game can be formulated as a Hamilton-Jacobi-Isaac equation. We use an upwind scheme to compute the feedback value function, corresponding to the end-game time of the differential game. Although the value function enables optimal controls, it is prohibitively expensive to compute, even for a single pursuer and single evader on a small grid. We consider a discrete variant of the surveillance-game. We propose two locally optimal strategies based on the static value function for the surveillance-evasion game with multiple pursuers and evaders. We show that Monte Carlo tree search and self-play reinforcement learning can train a deep neural network to generate reasonable strategies for on-line game play. Given enough computational resources and offline training time, the proposed model can continue to improve its policies and efficiently scale to higher resolutions.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑监视逃避差分博弈，追捕者必须努力不断保持移动逃避者的可见性。一旦躲避者被遮挡，追击者就输了。博弈的最优控制可以表示为 Hamilton-Jacobi-Isaac 方程。我们使用逆风方案来计算反馈值函数，对应于微分博弈的结束时间。尽管价值函数可以实现最优控制，但即使对于小网格上的单个追踪者和单个逃避者来说，其计算成本也非常昂贵。我们考虑监视游戏的离散变体。我们针对具有多个追踪者和逃避者的监视规避博弈，提出了两种基于静态价值函数的局部最优策略。我们证明蒙特卡罗树搜索和自我对弈强化学习可以训练深度神经网络来生成合理的在线游戏策略。如果有足够的计算资源和离线训练时间，所提出的模型可以继续改进其策略并有效地扩展到更高分辨率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究监视-规避博弈中的可见性优化问题，提出基于静态值函数的局部最优策略及深度强化学习方法，以应对多智能体追踪与规避的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统哈密顿-雅可比-伊萨克方程计算值函数成本过高，难以处理多智能体和高分辨率场景，需更高效策略生成方法。
AI.method: 离散化游戏变体，结合静态值函数设计局部最优策略，并采用蒙特卡洛树搜索与自对抗强化学习训练深度神经网络生成在线策略。
AI.result: 模型在充足计算资源下可生成合理策略，且能扩展至更高分辨率场景，策略性能随离线训练时间提升而改善。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为复杂监视-规避博弈提供了可扩展的解决方案，但依赖于充足的计算资源和训练时间。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究监视-规避博弈中的可见性优化问题，提出基于静态值函数的局部最优策略及深度强化学习方法，以应对多智能体追踪与规避的挑战。

authors_text: Jinta Weng,Ying Gao,Jing Qiu,Guozhu Ding,Huanqin Zheng
title: Construction and Application of Teaching System Based on Crowdsourcing Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 基于众包知识图谱的教学系统构建与应用
comment: Number of references:15 Classification code:903.3 Information Retrieval and Use Conference code: 235759
comments: Number of references:15 Classification code:903.3 Information Retrieval and Use Conference code: 235759
abstract: Through the combination of crowdsourcing knowledge graph and teaching system, research methods to generate knowledge graph and its applications. Using two crowdsourcing approaches, crowdsourcing task distribution and reverse captcha generation, to construct knowledge graph in the field of teaching system. Generating a complete hierarchical knowledge graph of the teaching domain by nodes of school, student, teacher, course, knowledge point and exercise type. The knowledge graph constructed in a crowdsourcing manner requires many users to participate collaboratively with fully consideration of teachers' guidance and users' mobilization issues. Based on the three subgraphs of knowledge graph, prominent teacher, student learning situation and suitable learning route could be visualized. Personalized exercises recommendation model is used to formulate the personalized exercise by algorithm based on the knowledge graph. Collaborative creation model is developed to realize the crowdsourcing construction mechanism. Though unfamiliarity with the learning mode of knowledge graph and learners' less attention to the knowledge structure, system based on Crowdsourcing Knowledge Graph can still get high acceptance around students and teachers
summary: Through the combination of crowdsourcing knowledge graph and teaching system, research methods to generate knowledge graph and its applications. Using two crowdsourcing approaches, crowdsourcing task distribution and reverse captcha generation, to construct knowledge graph in the field of teaching system. Generating a complete hierarchical knowledge graph of the teaching domain by nodes of school, student, teacher, course, knowledge point and exercise type. The knowledge graph constructed in a crowdsourcing manner requires many users to participate collaboratively with fully consideration of teachers' guidance and users' mobilization issues. abstract_zh: 通过众包知识图谱与教学系统的结合，研究知识图谱生成方法及其应用。采用众包任务分发和反向验证码生成两种众包方式，构建教学系统领域的知识图谱。以学校、学生、教师、课程、知识点、练习类型为节点，生成教学领域完整的层次化知识图谱。众包方式构建的知识图谱需要众多用户协同参与，充分考虑教师指导和用户动员问题。基于知识图谱的三个子图，可以可视化突出的教师、学生的学习情况以及适合的学习路线。个性化练习推荐模型是通过基于知识图谱的算法制定个性化练习。开发协同创作模式，实现众包建设机制。尽管学习者对知识图谱的学习模式不熟悉，对知识结构关注较少，但基于众包知识图谱的系统仍然能够得到学生和老师的高度认可。

AI.tldr: 构建基于众包知识图谱的教学系统，并探索其在教学中的应用方法。
AI.motivation: 传统教学系统难以动态更新知识结构，而众包知识图谱能通过协作构建提升教学效果。
AI.method: 采用众包任务分配与反向验证码生成方法，构建包含学校、学生、教师等节点的层次化知识图谱，并开发协作创作模型与个性化练习推荐算法。
AI.result: 系统在师生中获得高接受度，有效支持个性化学习路径推荐与知识结构可视化。
AI.conclusion: 基于众包知识图谱的教学系统能有效提升教学互动与知识管理，协作机制有助于克服用户参与度不足的挑战。

ai_content.tldr: 构建基于众包知识图谱的教学系统，并探索其在教学中的应用方法。
ai_content.motivation: 传统教学系统难以动态更新知识结构，而众包知识图谱能通过协作构建提升教学效果。
ai_content.method: 采用众包任务分配与反向验证码生成方法，构建包含学校、学生、教师等节点的层次化知识图谱，并开发协作创作模型与个性化练习推荐算法。
ai_content.result: 系统在师生中获得高接受度，有效支持个性化学习路径推荐与知识结构可视化。
ai_content.conclusion: 基于众包知识图谱的教学系统能有效提升教学互动与知识管理，协作机制有助于克服用户参与度不足的挑战。

search_text: Construction and Application of Teaching System Based on Crowdsourcing Knowledge Graph 基于众包知识图谱的教学系统构建与应用 Through the combination of crowdsourcing knowledge graph and teaching system, research methods to generate knowledge graph and its applications. Using two crowdsourcing approaches, crowdsourcing task distribution and reverse captcha generation, to construct knowledge graph in the field of teaching system. Generating a complete hierarchical knowledge graph of the teaching domain by nodes of school, student, teacher, course, knowledge point and exercise type. The knowledge graph constructed in a crowdsourcing manner requires many users to participate collaboratively with fully consideration of teachers' guidance and users' mobilization issues. Based on the three subgraphs of knowledge graph, prominent teacher, student learning situation and suitable learning route could be visualized. Personalized exercises recommendation model is used to formulate the personalized exercise by algorithm based on the knowledge graph. Collaborative creation model is developed to realize the crowdsourcing construction mechanism. Though unfamiliarity with the learning mode of knowledge graph and learners' less attention to the knowledge structure, system based on Crowdsourcing Knowledge Graph can still get high acceptance around students and teachers 通过众包知识图谱与教学系统的结合，研究知识图谱生成方法及其应用。采用众包任务分发和反向验证码生成两种众包方式，构建教学系统领域的知识图谱。以学校、学生、教师、课程、知识点、练习类型为节点，生成教学领域完整的层次化知识图谱。众包方式构建的知识图谱需要众多用户协同参与，充分考虑教师指导和用户动员问题。基于知识图谱的三个子图，可以可视化突出的教师、学生的学习情况以及适合的学习路线。个性化练习推荐模型是通过基于知识图谱的算法制定个性化练习。开发协同创作模式，实现众包建设机制。尽管学习者对知识图谱的学习模式不熟悉，对知识结构关注较少，但基于众包知识图谱的系统仍然能够得到学生和老师的高度认可。 构建基于众包知识图谱的教学系统，并探索其在教学中的应用方法。 Jinta Weng,Ying Gao,Jing Qiu,Guozhu Ding,Huanqin Zheng cs.DB,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Planning with Learned Dynamics: Probabilistic Guarantees on Safety and Reachability via Lipschitz Constants
title_zh: 使用学习动态进行规划：通过 Lipschitz 常数对安全性和可达性进行概率保证
comment: Accepted at RA-L and ICRA 2021. Craig Knuth and Glen Chou contributed equally to this work
comments: Accepted at RA-L and ICRA 2021. Craig Knuth and Glen Chou contributed equally to this work
abstract: We present a method for feedback motion planning of systems with unknown dynamics which provides probabilistic guarantees on safety, reachability, and goal stability. To find a domain in which a learned control-affine approximation of the true dynamics can be trusted, we estimate the Lipschitz constant of the difference between the true and learned dynamics, and ensure the estimate is valid with a given probability. Provided the system has at least as many controls as states, we also derive existence conditions for a one-step feedback law which can keep the real system within a small bound of a nominal trajectory planned with the learned dynamics. Our method imposes the feedback law existence as a constraint in a sampling-based planner, which returns a feedback policy around a nominal plan ensuring that, if the Lipschitz constant estimate is valid, the true system is safe during plan execution, reaches the goal, and is ultimately invariant in a small set about the goal. We demonstrate our approach by planning using learned models of a 6D quadrotor and a 7DOF Kuka arm. We show that a baseline which plans using the same learned dynamics without considering the error bound or the existence of the feedback law can fail to stabilize around the plan and become unsafe.
summary: We present a method for feedback motion planning of systems with unknown dynamics which provides probabilistic guarantees on safety, reachability, and goal stability. To find a domain in which a learned control-affine approximation of the true dynamics can be trusted, we estimate the Lipschitz constant of the difference between the true and learned dynamics, and ensure the estimate is valid with a given probability. Provided the system has at least as many controls as states, we also derive existence conditions for a one-step feedback law which can keep the real system within a small bound of a nominal trajectory planned with the learned dynamics. Our method imposes the feedback law existence as a constraint in a sampling-based planner, which returns a feedback policy around a nominal plan ensuring that, if the Lipschitz constant estimate is valid, the true system is safe during plan execution, reaches the goal, and is ultimately invariant in a small set about the goal. We demonstrate our approach by planning using learned models of a 6D quadrotor and a 7DOF Kuka arm. We show that a baseline which plans using the same learned dynamics without considering the error bound or the existence of the feedback law can fail to stabilize around the plan and become unsafe.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于未知动力学系统的反馈运动规划的方法，该方法为安全性、可达性和目标稳定性提供了概率保证。为了找到一个可以信任真实动态的学习控制仿射近似的域，我们估计真实动态和学习动态之间差异的 Lipschitz 常数，并确保估计在给定概率下有效。假设系统至少具有与状态一样多的控制，我们还推导出单步反馈定律的存在条件，该定律可以将真实系统保持在用学习动态规划的标称轨迹的小范围内。我们的方法将反馈律的存在强加为基于采样的规划器中的约束，该规划器返回围绕名义计划的反馈策略，确保如果利普希茨常数估计有效，则真实系统在计划执行期间是安全的，达到目标，并且最终在关于目标的一小组中保持不变。我们通过使用 6D 四旋翼飞行器和 7DOF Kuka 臂的学习模型进行规划来演示我们的方法。我们表明，在不考虑误差界限或反馈定律的存在的情况下使用相同的学习动态进行计划的基线可能无法在计划周围稳定并变得不安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习动力学的反馈运动规划方法，提供安全性和可达性的概率保证。
AI.motivation: 针对未知动力学系统的运动规划问题，传统方法难以确保安全性与目标可达性，需通过学习模型误差分析实现可靠规划。
AI.method: 通过估计真实动力学与学习模型间的Lipschitz常数，结合概率验证确保误差边界有效，并将反馈控制存在性约束嵌入采样规划器。
AI.result: 在六自由度无人机和七自由度机械臂实验中，该方法成功保证系统安全执行规划路径并稳定到达目标，而忽略误差边界的基线方法存在失效风险。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架通过量化模型不确定性与反馈控制约束，为复杂系统提供了兼具安全性与可达性的学习驱动规划解决方案。

title: Sliding Differential Evolution Scheduling for Federated Learning in Bandwidth-Limited Networks
title_zh: 带宽有限网络中联邦学习的滑动差分进化调度
abstract: Federated learning (FL) in a bandwidth-limited network with energy-limited user equipments (UEs) is under-explored. In this paper, to jointly save energy consumed by the battery-limited UEs and accelerate the convergence of the global model in FL for the bandwidth-limited network, we propose the sliding differential evolution-based scheduling (SDES) policy. To this end, we first formulate an optimization that aims to minimize a weighted sum of energy consumption and model training convergence. Then, we apply the SDES with parallel differential evolution (DE) operations in several small-scale windows, to address the above proposed problem effectively. Compared with existing scheduling policies, the proposed SDES performs well in reducing energy consumption and the model convergence with lower computational complexity.
summary: Federated learning (FL) in a bandwidth-limited network with energy-limited user equipments (UEs) is under-explored. In this paper, to jointly save energy consumed by the battery-limited UEs and accelerate the convergence of the global model in FL for the bandwidth-limited network, we propose the sliding differential evolution-based scheduling (SDES) policy. To this end, we first formulate an optimization that aims to minimize a weighted sum of energy consumption and model training convergence. Then, we apply the SDES with parallel differential evolution (DE) operations in several small-scale windows, to address the above proposed problem effectively. Compared with existing scheduling policies, the proposed SDES performs well in reducing energy consumption and the model convergence with lower computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 具有有限能量的用户设备 (UE) 的带宽有限网络中的联邦学习 (FL) 尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，为了共同节省电池有限的UE消耗的能量并加速带宽有限网络的FL中全局模型的收敛，我们提出了基于滑动差分进化的调度（SDES）策略。为此，我们首先制定一种优化，旨在最小化能耗和模型训练收敛的加权和。然后，我们在几个小规模窗口中应用具有并行差分进化（DE）运算的SDES，以有效解决上述问题。与现有的调度策略相比，所提出的SDES在降低能耗和模型收敛方面表现良好，并且计算复杂度较低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于滑动差分进化的调度策略（SDES），用于在带宽受限网络中优化联邦学习的能耗和模型收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分探索带宽受限网络下能量受限用户设备（UE）的联邦学习（FL）调度问题，需同时降低能耗并加速全局模型收敛。
AI.method: 通过构建能量消耗与模型收敛的加权优化问题，采用滑动差分进化算法（SDES）结合并行差分进化操作，在多个小规模窗口中高效求解。
AI.result: 相比现有调度策略，SDES在降低能耗和提升模型收敛速度方面表现更优，且计算复杂度更低。
AI.conclusion: SDES能有效平衡带宽受限网络中联邦学习的能耗与收敛性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Sahana Ramnath,Preksha Nema,Deep Sahni,Mitesh M. Khapra
title: Towards Interpreting BERT for Reading Comprehension Based QA
title_zh: 为基于阅读理解的 QA 解读 BERT
comment: 7 pages including references and appendix. Accepted at EMNLP 2020
comments: 7 pages including references and appendix. Accepted at EMNLP 2020
abstract: BERT and its variants have achieved state-of-the-art performance in various NLP tasks. Since then, various works have been proposed to analyze the linguistic information being captured in BERT. However, the current works do not provide an insight into how BERT is able to achieve near human-level performance on the task of Reading Comprehension based Question Answering. In this work, we attempt to interpret BERT for RCQA. Since BERT layers do not have predefined roles, we define a layer's role or functionality using Integrated Gradients. Based on the defined roles, we perform a preliminary analysis across all layers. We observed that the initial layers focus on query-passage interaction, whereas later layers focus more on contextual understanding and enhancing the answer prediction. Specifically for quantifier questions (how much/how many), we notice that BERT focuses on confusing words (i.e., on other numerical quantities in the passage) in the later layers, but still manages to predict the answer correctly. The fine-tuning and analysis scripts will be publicly available at https://github.com/iitmnlp/BERT-Analysis-RCQA .

Since then, various works have been proposed to analyze the linguistic information being captured in BERT. Based on the defined roles, we perform a preliminary analysis across all layers. We observed that the initial layers focus on query-passage interaction, whereas later layers focus more on contextual understanding and enhancing the answer prediction. Specifically for quantifier questions (how much/how many), we notice that BERT focuses on confusing words (i.e., on other numerical quantities in the passage) in the later layers, but still manages to predict the answer correctly. The fine-tuning and analysis scripts will be publicly available at https://github.com/iitmnlp/BERT-Analysis-RCQA .
abstract_zh: BERT 及其变体在各种 NLP 任务中取得了最先进的性能。从那时起，人们提出了各种工作来分析 BERT 捕获的语言信息。然而，目前的工作并没有深入了解 BERT 如何在基于阅读理解的问答任务上实现接近人类水平的表现。在这项工作中，我们尝试将 BERT 解释为 RCQA。由于 BERT 层没有预定义的角色，因此我们使用集成梯度定义层的角色或功能。根据定义的角色，我们对所有层进行初步分析。我们观察到，初始层侧重于查询-段落交互，而后面的层则更侧重于上下文理解和增强答案预测。特别是对于量词问题（多少/多少），我们注意到 BERT 在后面的层中重点关注令人困惑的单词（即文章中的其他数字量），但仍然能够正确预测答案。微调和分析脚本将在 https://github.com/iitmnlp/BERT-Analysis-RCQA 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分析BERT各层功能，解释其在基于阅读理解的问答任务中表现优异的原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管BERT在NLP任务中表现优异，但现有研究尚未阐明其在阅读理解问答任务中接近人类水平性能的具体机制。
AI.method: 采用集成梯度方法定义BERT各层功能，通过分析各层在任务中的作用，观察其处理查询-文档交互、上下文理解及答案预测的模式。
AI.result: 发现初始层侧重查询与文档的交互，后续层更关注上下文理解与答案预测；在量化问题中，BERT会关注文中干扰数字但仍能正确预测答案。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了BERT在阅读理解任务中的分层处理机制，为模型优化和可解释性研究提供了新视角。

authors_text: Fengda Zhang,Kun Kuang,Zhaoyang You,Tao Shen,Jun Xiao,Yin Zhang,Chao Wu,Yueting Zhuang,Xiaolin Li
title: Federated Unsupervised Representation Learning
title_zh: 联合无监督表示学习
abstract: To leverage enormous unlabeled data on distributed edge devices, we formulate a new problem in federated learning called Federated Unsupervised Representation Learning (FURL) to learn a common representation model without supervision while preserving data privacy. FURL poses two new challenges: (1) data distribution shift (Non-IID distribution) among clients would make local models focus on different categories, leading to the inconsistency of representation spaces. (2) without the unified information among clients in FURL, the representations across clients would be misaligned. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Constrastive Averaging with dictionary and alignment (FedCA) algorithm. FedCA is composed of two key modules: (1) dictionary module to aggregate the representations of samples from each client and share with all clients for consistency of representation space and (2) alignment module to align the representation of each client on a base model trained on a public data. We adopt the contrastive loss for local model training. Through extensive experiments with three evaluation protocols in IID and Non-IID settings, we demonstrate that FedCA outperforms all baselines with significant margins.
summary: To leverage enormous unlabeled data on distributed edge devices, we formulate a new problem in federated learning called Federated Unsupervised Representation Learning (FURL) to learn a common representation model without supervision while preserving data privacy. FURL poses two new challenges: (1) data distribution shift (Non-IID distribution) among clients would make local models focus on different categories, leading to the inconsistency of representation spaces. (2) without the unified information among clients in FURL, the representations across clients would be misaligned. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Constrastive Averaging with dictionary and alignment (FedCA) algorithm. FedCA is composed of two key modules: (1) dictionary module to aggregate the representations of samples from each client and share with all clients for consistency of representation space and (2) alignment module to align the representation of each client on a base model trained on a public data. We adopt the contrastive loss for local model training. Through extensive experiments with three evaluation protocols in IID and Non-IID settings, we demonstrate that FedCA outperforms all baselines with significant margins.
abstract_zh: 为了利用分布式边缘设备上的大量未标记数据，我们在联邦学习中提出了一个新问题，称为联邦无监督表示学习（FURL），以在没有监督的情况下学习通用表示模型，同时保护数据隐私。 FURL 提出了两个新的挑战：（1）客户端之间的数据分布转移（非 IID 分布）将使本地模型专注于不同的类别，导致表示空间的不一致。 (2)如果FURL中的客户端之间没有统一的信息，客户端之间的表示将会不一致。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了带有字典和对齐的联合对比平均（FedCA）算法。 FedCA 由两个关键模块组成：(1) 字典模块，用于聚合来自每个客户端的样本表示，并与所有客户端共享以保证表示空间的一致性；(2) 对齐模块，用于在公共数据训练的基础模型上对齐每个客户端的表示。我们采用对比损失进行局部模型训练。通过在 IID 和非 IID 设置中对三种评估协议进行大量实验，我们证明 FedCA 的性能优于所有基线，并且具有显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦无监督表征学习（FURL）框架，旨在利用分布式边缘设备上的未标记数据学习通用表征模型，同时保护数据隐私。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖标记数据且难以处理非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据，而边缘设备上的未标记数据蕴含巨大价值，需在隐私保护下实现跨设备表征一致性。
AI.method: 提出FedCA算法，包含字典模块（聚合各客户端表征以保持空间一致性）和对齐模块（基于公共数据集对齐表征），结合对比损失进行本地模型训练。
AI.result: 在IID和Non-IID设置下，FedCA在三个评估协议中均显著优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FedCA通过字典聚合与公共数据对齐有效解决了联邦无监督学习中的表征不一致和对齐问题，为隐私保护下的分布式表征学习提供了新思路。

(2) without the unified information among clients in FURL, the representations across clients would be misaligned. We adopt the contrastive loss for local model training. title: Feature Importance Ranking for Deep Learning
title_zh: 深度学习的特征重要性排名
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2020, 5 Figures and 1 Table in Main text, 10 Figures and 5 Tables in Supplementary Materials
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2020, 5 Figures and 1 Table in Main text, 10 Figures and 5 Tables in Supplementary Materials
abstract: Feature importance ranking has become a powerful tool for explainable AI. However, its nature of combinatorial optimization poses a great challenge for deep learning. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-net architecture consisting of operator and selector for discovery of an optimal feature subset of a fixed size and ranking the importance of those features in the optimal subset simultaneously. During learning, the operator is trained for a supervised learning task via optimal feature subset candidates generated by the selector that learns predicting the learning performance of the operator working on different optimal subset candidates. We develop an alternate learning algorithm that trains two nets jointly and incorporates a stochastic local search procedure into learning to address the combinatorial optimization challenge. In deployment, the selector generates an optimal feature subset and ranks feature importance, while the operator makes predictions based on the optimal subset for test data. A thorough evaluation on synthetic, benchmark and real data sets suggests that our approach outperforms several state-of-the-art feature importance ranking and supervised feature selection methods. (Our source code is available: https://github.com/maksym33/FeatureImportanceDL)
summary: Feature importance ranking has become a powerful tool for explainable AI. However, its nature of combinatorial optimization poses a great challenge for deep learning. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-net architecture consisting of operator and selector for discovery of an optimal feature subset of a fixed size and ranking the importance of those features in the optimal subset simultaneously. During learning, the operator is trained for a supervised learning task via optimal feature subset candidates generated by the selector that learns predicting the learning performance of the operator working on different optimal subset candidates. We develop an alternate learning algorithm that trains two nets jointly and incorporates a stochastic local search procedure into learning to address the combinatorial optimization challenge. In deployment, the selector generates an optimal feature subset and ranks feature importance, while the operator makes predictions based on the optimal subset for test data. A thorough evaluation on synthetic, benchmark and real data sets suggests that our approach outperforms several state-of-the-art feature importance ranking and supervised feature selection methods. (Our source code is available: https://github.com/maksym33/FeatureImportanceDL)
abstract_zh: 特征重要性排名已成为可解释人工智能的强大工具。然而，其组合优化的本质给深度学习带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种由算子和选择器组成的新颖的双网络架构，用于发现固定大小的最佳特征子集，并同时对最佳子集中这些特征的重要性进行排序。在学习过程中，通过选择器生成的最佳特征子集候选来训练算子以执行监督学习任务，该选择器学习预测算子在不同最佳候选子集上工作的学习性能。我们开发了一种替代学习算法，联合训练两个网络，并将随机局部搜索过程纳入学习中，以解决组合优化挑战。在部署中，选择器生成最佳特征子集并对特征重要性进行排名，而算子则根据测试数据的最佳子集进行预测。对合成、基准和真实数据集的全面评估表明，我们的方法优于几种最先进的特征重要性排名和监督特征选择方法。 （我们的源代码可用：https://github.com/maksym33/FeatureImportanceDL）

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双网络架构，用于在深度学习中同时发现固定大小的最优特征子集并对其进行重要性排序。
AI.motivation: 特征重要性排序是可解释AI的重要工具，但其组合优化的特性给深度学习带来了巨大挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种包含操作器和选择器的双网络架构。选择器生成最优特征子集候选，操作器通过监督学习任务进行训练，同时采用交替学习算法和随机局部搜索过程解决组合优化问题。
AI.result: 在合成数据、基准数据和真实数据集上的全面评估表明，该方法优于几种最先进的特征重要性排序和监督特征选择方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在深度学习中有效解决了特征重要性排序的组合优化问题，并在多个数据集上表现优异。

search_text: Feature Importance Ranking for Deep Learning 深度学习的特征重要性排名 Feature importance ranking has become a powerful tool for explainable AI. However, its nature of combinatorial optimization poses a great challenge for deep learning. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-net architecture consisting of operator and selector for discovery of an optimal feature subset of a fixed size and ranking the importance of those features in the optimal subset simultaneously. During learning, the operator is trained for a supervised learning task via optimal feature subset candidates generated by the selector that learns predicting the learning performance of the operator working on different optimal subset candidates. We develop an alternate learning algorithm that trains two nets jointly and incorporates a stochastic local search procedure into learning to address the combinatorial optimization challenge. In deployment, the selector generates an optimal feature subset and ranks feature importance, while the operator makes predictions based on the optimal subset for test data. A thorough evaluation on synthetic, benchmark and real data sets suggests that our approach outperforms several state-of-the-art feature importance ranking and supervised feature selection methods. (Our source code is available: https://github.com/maksym33/FeatureImportanceDL) 特征重要性排名已成为可解释人工智能的强大工具。然而，其组合优化的本质给深度学习带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种由算子和选择器组成的新颖的双网络架构，用于发现固定大小的最佳特征子集，并同时对最佳子集中这些特征的重要性进行排序。在学习过程中，通过选择器生成的最佳特征子集候选来训练算子以执行监督学习任务，该选择器学习预测算子在不同最佳候选子集上工作的学习性能。我们开发了一种替代学习算法，联合训练两个网络，并将随机局部搜索过程纳入学习中，以解决组合优化挑战。在部署中，选择器生成最佳特征子集并对特征重要性进行排名，而算子则根据测试数据的最佳子集进行预测。对合成、基准和真实数据集的全面评估表明，我们的方法优于几种最先进的特征重要性排名和监督特征选择方法。 （我们的源代码可用：https://github.com/maksym33/FeatureImportanceDL） 本文提出了一种双网络架构，用于在深度学习中同时发现固定大小的最优特征子集并对其进行重要性排序。 Maksymilian Wojtas,Ke Chen cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Sofie Tilborghs,Tom Dresselaers,Piet Claus,Jan Bogaert,Frederik Maes
title: Shape Constrained CNN for Cardiac MR Segmentation with Simultaneous Prediction of Shape and Pose Parameters
title_zh: 用于心脏 MR 分割的形状约束 CNN，同时预测形状和姿势参数
comment: Presented at the 11th Workshop on Statistical Atlases and Computational Modeling of the Heart (STACOM 2020), held in conjunction with MICCAI 2020
comments: Presented at the 11th Workshop on Statistical Atlases and Computational Modeling of the Heart (STACOM 2020), held in conjunction with MICCAI 2020
abstract: Semantic segmentation using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is the state-of-the-art for many medical segmentation tasks including left ventricle (LV) segmentation in cardiac MR images. However, a drawback is that these CNNs lack explicit shape constraints, occasionally resulting in unrealistic segmentations. In this paper, we perform LV and myocardial segmentation by regression of pose and shape parameters derived from a statistical shape model. The integrated shape model regularizes predicted segmentations and guarantees realistic shapes. Furthermore, in contrast to semantic segmentation, it allows direct calculation of regional measures such as myocardial thickness. We enforce robustness of shape and pose prediction by simultaneously constructing a segmentation distance map during training. We evaluated the proposed method in a fivefold cross validation on a in-house clinical dataset with 75 subjects containing a total of 1539 delineated short-axis slices covering LV from apex to base, and achieved a correlation of 99% for LV area, 94% for myocardial area, 98% for LV dimensions and 88% for regional wall thicknesses. The method was additionally validated on the LVQuan18 and LVQuan19 public datasets and achieved state-of-the-art results.
summary: Semantic segmentation using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is the state-of-the-art for many medical segmentation tasks including left ventricle (LV) segmentation in cardiac MR images. However, a drawback is that these CNNs lack explicit shape constraints, occasionally resulting in unrealistic segmentations. In this paper, we perform LV and myocardial segmentation by regression of pose and shape parameters derived from a statistical shape model. The integrated shape model regularizes predicted segmentations and guarantees realistic shapes. Furthermore, in contrast to semantic segmentation, it allows direct calculation of regional measures such as myocardial thickness. We enforce robustness of shape and pose prediction by simultaneously constructing a segmentation distance map during training. We evaluated the proposed method in a fivefold cross validation on a in-house clinical dataset with 75 subjects containing a total of 1539 delineated short-axis slices covering LV from apex to base, and achieved a correlation of 99% for LV area, 94% for myocardial area, 98% for LV dimensions and 88% for regional wall thicknesses. The method was additionally validated on the LVQuan18 and LVQuan19 public datasets and achieved state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行语义分割是许多医学分割任务的最新技术，包括心脏 MR 图像中的左心室 (LV) 分割。然而，这些 CNN 的缺点是缺乏明确的形状约束，有时会导致分割不切实际。在本文中，我们通过对从统计形状模型导出的姿势和形状参数进行回归来执行左心室和心肌分割。集成的形状模型规范了预测的分割并保证了真实的形状。此外，与语义分割相反，它允许直接计算心肌厚度等区域测量值。我们通过在训练期间同时构建分割距离图来增强形状和姿势预测的鲁棒性。我们在内部临床数据集上对所提出的方法进行了五重交叉验证，该数据集包含 75 名受试者，包含总共 1539 个描绘的短轴切片，覆盖从心尖到底部的左心室，并实现了左心室面积 99%、心肌面积 94%、左心室尺寸 98% 和区域壁厚度 88% 的相关性。该方法还在 LVQuan18 和 LVQuan19 公共数据集上进行了验证，并取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合形状约束的卷积神经网络（CNN），用于心脏磁共振（MR）图像的左心室（LV）和心肌分割，通过回归统计形状模型的形状和姿态参数实现更真实的分割结果。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分割中缺乏显式形状约束，可能导致不真实的分割结果，而统计形状模型可提供形状先验知识以提升分割准确性与合理性。
AI.method: 通过回归统计形状模型提取的形状和姿态参数，将形状约束集成到CNN中，同时生成分割距离图以增强预测鲁棒性，并直接计算心肌厚度等区域指标。
AI.result: 在75名受试者的临床数据集上实现LV面积（99%）、心肌面积（94%）、LV尺寸（98%）和区域壁厚（88%）的高相关性，在LVQuan18/19数据集上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合形状模型与CNN，有效提升了心脏MR分割的准确性与生物合理性，为医学图像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lorenzo Berlincioni,Federico Becattini,Lorenzo Seidenari,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: Multiple Future Prediction Leveraging Synthetic Trajectories
title_zh: 利用合成轨迹的多重未来预测
comment: Accepted at ICPR2020
comments: Accepted at ICPR2020
abstract: Trajectory prediction is an important task, especially in autonomous driving. The ability to forecast the position of other moving agents can yield to an effective planning, ensuring safety for the autonomous vehicle as well for the observed entities. In this work we propose a data driven approach based on Markov Chains to generate synthetic trajectories, which are useful for training a multiple future trajectory predictor. The advantages are twofold: on the one hand synthetic samples can be used to augment existing datasets and train more effective predictors; on the other hand, it allows to generate samples with multiple ground truths, corresponding to diverse equally likely outcomes of the observed trajectory. We define a trajectory prediction model and a loss that explicitly address the multimodality of the problem and we show that combining synthetic and real data leads to prediction improvements, obtaining state of the art results.
summary: Trajectory prediction is an important task, especially in autonomous driving. The ability to forecast the position of other moving agents can yield to an effective planning, ensuring safety for the autonomous vehicle as well for the observed entities. In this work we propose a data driven approach based on Markov Chains to generate synthetic trajectories, which are useful for training a multiple future trajectory predictor. The advantages are twofold: on the one hand synthetic samples can be used to augment existing datasets and train more effective predictors; on the other hand, it allows to generate samples with multiple ground truths, corresponding to diverse equally likely outcomes of the observed trajectory. We define a trajectory prediction model and a loss that explicitly address the multimodality of the problem and we show that combining synthetic and real data leads to prediction improvements, obtaining state of the art results.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测是一项重要任务，尤其是在自动驾驶中。预测其他移动主体位置的能力可以产生有效的规划，确保自动驾驶车辆以及观察到的实体的安全。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于马尔可夫链的数据驱动方法来生成合成轨迹，这对于训练多个未来轨迹预测器非常有用。优点是双重的：一方面，合成样本可用于扩充现有数据集并训练更有效的预测器；另一方面，它允许生成具有多个基本事实的样本，对应于观察到的轨迹的不同同等可能的结果。我们定义了一个轨迹预测模型和一个明确解决问题的多模态的损失，并且我们表明，结合合成数据和真实数据可以改进预测，获得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫链生成合成轨迹的方法，用于改进自动驾驶中的多未来轨迹预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测数据集有限且难以覆盖多模态场景，需通过合成数据增强训练并生成多样化的可能轨迹结果。
AI.method: 利用马尔可夫链生成合成轨迹数据，设计多模态损失函数，结合合成数据与真实数据训练预测模型。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，证明合成数据与真实数据结合能有效提升多未来预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 合成轨迹生成方法可有效增强数据多样性，结合多模态损失函数显著提升轨迹预测模型性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫链生成合成轨迹的方法，用于改进自动驾驶中的多未来轨迹预测任务。

search_text: Multiple Future Prediction Leveraging Synthetic Trajectories 利用合成轨迹的多重未来预测 Trajectory prediction is an important task, especially in autonomous driving. The ability to forecast the position of other moving agents can yield to an effective planning, ensuring safety for the autonomous vehicle as well for the observed entities. In this work we propose a data driven approach based on Markov Chains to generate synthetic trajectories, which are useful for training a multiple future trajectory predictor. The advantages are twofold: on the one hand synthetic samples can be used to augment existing datasets and train more effective predictors; on the other hand, it allows to generate samples with multiple ground truths, corresponding to diverse equally likely outcomes of the observed trajectory. We define a trajectory prediction model and a loss that explicitly address the multimodality of the problem and we show that combining synthetic and real data leads to prediction improvements, obtaining state of the art results. 轨迹预测是一项重要任务，尤其是在自动驾驶中。预测其他移动主体位置的能力可以产生有效的规划，确保自动驾驶车辆以及观察到的实体的安全。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于马尔可夫链的数据驱动方法来生成合成轨迹，这对于训练多个未来轨迹预测器非常有用。优点是双重的：一方面，合成样本可用于扩充现有数据集并训练更有效的预测器；另一方面，它允许生成具有多个基本事实的样本，对应于观察到的轨迹的不同同等可能的结果。我们定义了一个轨迹预测模型和一个明确解决问题的多模态的损失，并且我们表明，结合合成数据和真实数据可以改进预测，获得最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫链生成合成轨迹的方法，用于改进自动驾驶中的多未来轨迹预测任务。 Lorenzo Berlincioni,Federico Becattini,Lorenzo Seidenari,Alberto Del Bimbo cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Simone Undri Innocenti,Federico Becattini,Federico Pernici,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: Temporal Binary Representation for Event-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 基于事件的动作识别的时间二进制表示
comment: Accepted at ICPR2020
comments: Accepted at ICPR2020
abstract: In this paper we present an event aggregation strategy to convert the output of an event camera into frames processable by traditional Computer Vision algorithms. The proposed method first generates sequences of intermediate binary representations, which are then losslessly transformed into a compact format by simply applying a binary-to-decimal conversion. This strategy allows us to encode temporal information directly into pixel values, which are then interpreted by deep learning models. We apply our strategy, called Temporal Binary Representation, to the task of Gesture Recognition, obtaining state of the art results on the popular DVS128 Gesture Dataset. To underline the effectiveness of the proposed method compared to existing ones, we also collect an extension of the dataset under more challenging conditions on which to perform experiments.
summary: In this paper we present an event aggregation strategy to convert the output of an event camera into frames processable by traditional Computer Vision algorithms. The proposed method first generates sequences of intermediate binary representations, which are then losslessly transformed into a compact format by simply applying a binary-to-decimal conversion. This strategy allows us to encode temporal information directly into pixel values, which are then interpreted by deep learning models. We apply our strategy, called Temporal Binary Representation, to the task of Gesture Recognition, obtaining state of the art results on the popular DVS128 Gesture Dataset. To underline the effectiveness of the proposed method compared to existing ones, we also collect an extension of the dataset under more challenging conditions on which to perform experiments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种事件聚合策略，将事件相机的输出转换为传统计算机视觉算法可处理的帧。所提出的方法首先生成中间二进制表示序列，然后通过简单地应用二进制到十进制转换将其无损地转换为紧凑格式。这种策略允许我们将时间信息直接编码为像素值，然后由深度学习模型进行解释。我们将称为时间二进制表示的策略应用于手势识别任务，在流行的 DVS128 手势数据集上获得最先进的结果。为了强调所提出的方法与现有方法相比的有效性，我们还收集了在更具挑战性的条件下进行实验的数据集的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将事件相机输出转换为传统计算机视觉算法可处理帧的方法，用于动作识别任务。
AI.motivation: 事件相机产生的异步事件流难以直接用于传统视觉算法，需有效聚合时间信息以提升动作识别性能。
AI.method: 生成中间二进制表示序列并通过二进制转十进制转换为紧凑格式，将时间信息编码至像素值中。
AI.result: 在DVS128手势数据集上取得最先进的识别效果，并扩展了更具挑战性的数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过紧凑的时间编码策略有效提升了事件相机数据的动作识别性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Hong-Xiang Chen,Kunhong Li,Zhiheng Fu,Mengyi Liu,Zonghao Chen,Yulan Guo
title: Distortion-aware Monocular Depth Estimation for Omnidirectional Images
title_zh: 全向图像的失真感知单目深度估计
comment: Preprint
comments: Preprint
abstract: A main challenge for tasks on panorama lies in the distortion of objects among images. In this work, we propose a Distortion-Aware Monocular Omnidirectional (DAMO) dense depth estimation network to address this challenge on indoor panoramas with two steps. First, we introduce a distortion-aware module to extract calibrated semantic features from omnidirectional images. Specifically, we exploit deformable convolution to adjust its sampling grids to geometric variations of distorted objects on panoramas and then utilize a strip pooling module to sample against horizontal distortion introduced by inverse gnomonic projection. Second, we further introduce a plug-and-play spherical-aware weight matrix for our objective function to handle the uneven distribution of areas projected from a sphere. Experiments on the 360D dataset show that the proposed method can effectively extract semantic features from distorted panoramas and alleviate the supervision bias caused by distortion. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 360D dataset with high efficiency.
summary: A main challenge for tasks on panorama lies in the distortion of objects among images. In this work, we propose a Distortion-Aware Monocular Omnidirectional (DAMO) dense depth estimation network to address this challenge on indoor panoramas with two steps. First, we introduce a distortion-aware module to extract calibrated semantic features from omnidirectional images. Specifically, we exploit deformable convolution to adjust its sampling grids to geometric variations of distorted objects on panoramas and then utilize a strip pooling module to sample against horizontal distortion introduced by inverse gnomonic projection. Second, we further introduce a plug-and-play spherical-aware weight matrix for our objective function to handle the uneven distribution of areas projected from a sphere. Experiments on the 360D dataset show that the proposed method can effectively extract semantic features from distorted panoramas and alleviate the supervision bias caused by distortion. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 360D dataset with high efficiency.
abstract_zh: 全景任务的主要挑战在于图像中物体的失真。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种失真感知单目全向（DAMO）密集深度估计网络，以通过两个步骤解决室内全景图的这一挑战。首先，我们引入一个失真感知模块来从全向图像中提取校准的语义特征。具体来说，我们利用可变形卷积将其采样网格调整为全景图上扭曲对象的几何变化，然后利用条带池模块针对逆心投影引入的水平失真进行采样。其次，我们进一步为我们的目标函数引入即插即用的球体感知权重矩阵，以处理从球体投影的区域的不均匀分布。在360D数据集上的实验表明，该方法能够有效地从扭曲的全景图中提取语义特征，并减轻扭曲带来的监督偏差。它以高效率在 360D 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对全景图像的失真感知单目深度估计方法DAMO，通过处理全景图像中的几何失真问题来提升深度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 全景图像因投影方式导致物体失真，传统方法难以有效提取语义特征并缓解由失真引起的监督偏差。
AI.method: 分两步改进：1）引入失真感知模块，利用可变形卷积调整采样网格以适应几何变化，并通过条带池化模块对抗逆等距投影的水平失真；2）设计球面感知权重矩阵，优化目标函数以处理球面投影导致的区域分布不均问题。
AI.result: 在360D数据集上实现最先进的深度估计性能，同时保持高效性，有效缓解了失真引起的特征提取偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过针对性处理全景图像的几何失真问题，显著提升了单目深度估计的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Implementing Agent-Based Systems via Computability Logic CL2
title_zh: 通过可计算性逻辑 CL2 实现基于代理的系统
comment: 12 pages. This is a revised version and some errors are fixed. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1909.07036
comments: 12 pages. This is a revised version and some errors are fixed. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1909.07036
abstract: Computability logic(CoL) is a powerful computational model. In this paper, we show that CoL naturally supports multi-agent programming models where resources (coffee for example) are involved. To be specific, we discuss an implementation of the Starbucks based on CoL (CL2 to be exact).
summary: Computability logic(CoL) is a powerful computational model. In this paper, we show that CoL naturally supports multi-agent programming models where resources (coffee for example) are involved. To be specific, we discuss an implementation of the Starbucks based on CoL (CL2 to be exact).
abstract_zh: 可计算性逻辑（CoL）是一种强大的计算模型。在本文中，我们表明 CoL 自然支持涉及资源（例如咖啡）的多代理编程模型。具体来说，我们讨论基于 CoL（确切地说是 CL2）的星巴克的实现。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算逻辑CL2实现基于代理的系统，以星巴克为例展示其在资源管理中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有多代理系统在处理资源分配和并发操作时存在不足，需探索更高效的计算模型。
AI.method: 基于计算逻辑CL2框架，设计并实现星巴克场景下的多代理系统，模拟资源（如咖啡）的分配与管理。
AI.result: 成功构建星巴克案例，验证CL2在资源管理和并发控制中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CL2作为计算逻辑的扩展，能有效支持涉及资源管理的多代理系统开发。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过计算逻辑CL2实现基于代理的系统，以星巴克为例展示其在资源管理中的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 现有多代理系统在处理资源分配和并发操作时存在不足，需探索更高效的计算模型。
ai_content.method: 基于计算逻辑CL2框架，设计并实现星巴克场景下的多代理系统，模拟资源（如咖啡）的分配与管理。
ai_content.result: 成功构建星巴克案例，验证CL2在资源管理和并发控制中的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: CL2作为计算逻辑的扩展，能有效支持涉及资源管理的多代理系统开发。

search_text: Implementing Agent-Based Systems via Computability Logic CL2 通过可计算性逻辑 CL2 实现基于代理的系统 Computability logic(CoL) is a powerful computational model. In this paper, we show that CoL naturally supports multi-agent programming models where resources (coffee for example) are involved. To be specific, we discuss an implementation of the Starbucks based on CoL (CL2 to be exact). 可计算性逻辑（CoL）是一种强大的计算模型。在本文中，我们表明 CoL 自然支持涉及资源（例如咖啡）的多代理编程模型。具体来说，我们讨论基于 CoL（确切地说是 CL2）的星巴克的实现。 本文通过计算逻辑CL2实现基于代理的系统，以星巴克为例展示其在资源管理中的应用。 Keehang Kwon cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Shin-woo Park,Byung Jun Bae,Jinyoung Yeo,Seung-won Hwang
title: Meta-path Free Semi-supervised Learning for Heterogeneous Networks
title_zh: 异构网络的元路径自由半监督学习
comment: The technical description of [Proposed Models] section has an error. Especially, the training process
comments: The technical description of [Proposed Models] section has an error. Especially, the training process
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely used in representation learning on graphs and achieved superior performance in tasks such as node classification. However, analyzing heterogeneous graph of different types of nodes and links still brings great challenges for injecting the heterogeneity into a graph neural network. A general remedy is to manually or automatically design meta-paths to transform a heterogeneous graph into a homogeneous graph, but this is suboptimal since the features from the first-order neighbors are not fully leveraged for training and inference. In this paper, we propose simple and effective graph neural networks for heterogeneous graph, excluding the use of meta-paths. Specifically, our models focus on relaxing the heterogeneity stress for model parameters by expanding model capacity of general GNNs in an effective way. Extensive experimental results on six real-world graphs not only show the superior performance of our proposed models over the state-of-the-arts, but also demonstrate the potentially good balance between reducing the heterogeneity stress and increasing the parameter size. Our code is freely available for reproducing our results.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely used in representation learning on graphs and achieved superior performance in tasks such as node classification. However, analyzing heterogeneous graph of different types of nodes and links still brings great challenges for injecting the heterogeneity into a graph neural network. A general remedy is to manually or automatically design meta-paths to transform a heterogeneous graph into a homogeneous graph, but this is suboptimal since the features from the first-order neighbors are not fully leveraged for training and inference. In this paper, we propose simple and effective graph neural networks for heterogeneous graph, excluding the use of meta-paths. Specifically, our models focus on relaxing the heterogeneity stress for model parameters by expanding model capacity of general GNNs in an effective way. Extensive experimental results on six real-world graphs not only show the superior performance of our proposed models over the state-of-the-arts, but also demonstrate the potentially good balance between reducing the heterogeneity stress and increasing the parameter size. Our code is freely available for reproducing our results.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已广泛应用于图的表示学习，并在节点分类等任务中取得了优异的性能。然而，分析不同类型节点和链接的异构图仍然给将异构性注入图神经网络带来了巨大的挑战。一般的补救措施是手动或自动设计元路径以将异构图转换为同构图，但这不是最优的，因为来自一阶邻居的特征没有充分利用来进行训练和推理。在本文中，我们提出了用于异构图的简单有效的图神经网络，不使用元路径。具体来说，我们的模型致力于通过有效地扩展通用 GNN 的模型容量来缓解模型参数的异质性压力。六个真实世界图的广泛实验结果不仅显示了我们提出的模型相对于最先进模型的优越性能，而且还证明了减少异质性应力和增加参数大小之间潜在的良好平衡。我们的代码可免费用于重现我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需元路径的半监督学习方法，用于异构网络的节点分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖元路径转换异构图，但无法充分利用邻居特征，导致性能受限，需要更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种无需元路径的GNN模型，通过扩展模型容量来有效缓解异质性压力，直接利用多类型节点和链接的信息。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上的实验表明，该模型在节点分类任务中优于现有方法，并在模型复杂度和性能之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了异构网络中的异质性问题，实验验证了其优越性，且代码开源便于复现。

authors_text: Chenyu You,Nuo Chen,Fenglin Liu,Dongchao Yang,Yuexian Zou
title: Towards Data Distillation for End-to-end Spoken Conversational Question Answering
title_zh: 面向端到端口语对话问答的数据蒸馏
abstract: In spoken question answering, QA systems are designed to answer questions from contiguous text spans within the related speech transcripts. However, the most natural way that human seek or test their knowledge is via human conversations. Therefore, we propose a new Spoken Conversational Question Answering task (SCQA), aiming at enabling QA systems to model complex dialogues flow given the speech utterances and text corpora. In this task, our main objective is to build a QA system to deal with conversational questions both in spoken and text forms, and to explore the plausibility of providing more cues in spoken documents with systems in information gathering. To this end, instead of adopting automatically generated speech transcripts with highly noisy data, we propose a novel unified data distillation approach, DDNet, which directly fuse audio-text features to reduce the misalignment between automatic speech recognition hypotheses and the reference transcriptions. In addition, to evaluate the capacity of QA systems in a dialogue-style interaction, we assemble a Spoken Conversational Question Answering (Spoken-CoQA) dataset with more than 120k question-answer pairs. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves superior performance in spoken conversational question answering.
summary: In spoken question answering, QA systems are designed to answer questions from contiguous text spans within the related speech transcripts. However, the most natural way that human seek or test their knowledge is via human conversations. Therefore, we propose a new Spoken Conversational Question Answering task (SCQA), aiming at enabling QA systems to model complex dialogues flow given the speech utterances and text corpora. In this task, our main objective is to build a QA system to deal with conversational questions both in spoken and text forms, and to explore the plausibility of providing more cues in spoken documents with systems in information gathering. To this end, instead of adopting automatically generated speech transcripts with highly noisy data, we propose a novel unified data distillation approach, DDNet, which directly fuse audio-text features to reduce the misalignment between automatic speech recognition hypotheses and the reference transcriptions. In addition, to evaluate the capacity of QA systems in a dialogue-style interaction, we assemble a Spoken Conversational Question Answering (Spoken-CoQA) dataset with more than 120k question-answer pairs. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves superior performance in spoken conversational question answering.
abstract_zh: 在口语问答中，QA 系统旨在回答相关语音记录中连续文本范围的问题。然而，人类寻求或测试知识的最自然方式是通过人类对话。因此，我们提出了一种新的口语对话问答任务（SCQA），旨在使 QA 系统能够在给定语音话语和文本语料库的情况下对复杂的对话流进行建模。在这项任务中，我们的主要目标是建立一个问答系统来处理口头和文本形式的对话问题，并探索通过信息收集系统在口头文档中提供更多线索的可能性。为此，我们没有采用自动生成的具有高噪声数据的语音转录本，而是提出了一种新颖的统一数据蒸馏方法 DDNet，它直接融合音频文本特征，以减少自动语音识别假设和参考转录之间的错位。此外，为了评估 QA 系统在对话式交互中的能力，我们组装了一个包含超过 12 万个问答对的口语对话问答 (Spoken-CoQA) 数据集。实验表明，我们提出的方法在口语会话问答中取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向端到端语音对话问答（SCQA）的新任务，旨在构建能处理语音和文本形式对话问题的问答系统，并探索通过语音文档提供更多线索的可能性。
AI.motivation: 现有问答系统依赖语音转文字后的文本片段，但人类知识检索更依赖对话交互。需开发能处理复杂对话流的系统，并减少自动语音识别（ASR）假设与参考转录间的对齐误差。
AI.method: 提出统一的数据蒸馏方法DDNet，直接融合音频-文本特征以降低对齐误差；构建包含12万问答对的Spoken-CoQA数据集用于评估对话式问答系统能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在语音对话问答任务中取得优于现有方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: DDNet有效提升了语音对话问答系统的性能，所构建的数据集为对话式问答研究提供了重要基准。

authors_text: Vektor Dewanto,George Dunn,Ali Eshragh,Marcus Gallagher,Fred Roosta
title: Average-reward model-free reinforcement learning: a systematic review and literature mapping
title_zh: 平均奖励无模型强化学习：系统回顾和文献映射
comment: 36 pages, refined prelim and politer sections
comments: 36 pages, refined prelim and politer sections
abstract: Reinforcement learning is important part of artificial intelligence. In this paper, we review model-free reinforcement learning that utilizes the average reward optimality criterion in the infinite horizon setting. Motivated by the solo survey by Mahadevan (1996a), we provide an updated review of work in this area and extend it to cover policy-iteration and function approximation methods (in addition to the value-iteration and tabular counterparts). We present a comprehensive literature mapping. We also identify and discuss opportunities for future work.
summary: Reinforcement learning is important part of artificial intelligence. In this paper, we review model-free reinforcement learning that utilizes the average reward optimality criterion in the infinite horizon setting. Motivated by the solo survey by Mahadevan (1996a), we provide an updated review of work in this area and extend it to cover policy-iteration and function approximation methods (in addition to the value-iteration and tabular counterparts). We present a comprehensive literature mapping. We also identify and discuss opportunities for future work.
abstract_zh: 强化学习是人工智能的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们回顾了在无限视野设置中利用平均奖励最优性标准的无模型强化学习。受 Mahadevan（1996a）单独调查的推动，我们对该领域的工作进行了更新的回顾，并将其扩展到涵盖策略迭代和函数逼近方法（除了值迭代和表格对应方法之外）。我们提供了全面的文献图谱。我们还确定并讨论未来工作的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了无模型强化学习在无限时间平均奖励最优准则下的研究进展，并进行了文献映射。
AI.motivation: 受Mahadevan(1996a)的早期研究启发，旨在更新该领域研究现状并扩展至策略迭代与函数逼近方法。
AI.method: 通过系统综述与文献映射方法，覆盖价值迭代、策略迭代及函数逼近等不同技术路线。
AI.result: 构建了全面的文献分类框架，明确了当前研究空白与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究仍需在策略迭代方法与函数逼近技术的结合方面深入探索，以提升平均奖励场景下的算法性能。

In this paper, we review model-free reinforcement learning that utilizes the average reward optimality criterion in the infinite horizon setting. Motivated by the solo survey by Mahadevan (1996a), we provide an updated review of work in this area and extend it to cover policy-iteration and function approximation methods (in addition to the value-iteration and tabular counterparts). We present a comprehensive literature mapping. title: Boosting High-Level Vision with Joint Compression Artifacts Reduction and Super-Resolution
title_zh: 通过减少关节压缩伪影和超分辨率来提升高级视觉
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Accepted by the 25th ICPR (2020)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Accepted by the 25th ICPR (2020)
abstract: Due to the limits of bandwidth and storage space, digital images are usually down-scaled and compressed when transmitted over networks, resulting in loss of details and jarring artifacts that can lower the performance of high-level visual tasks. In this paper, we aim to generate an artifact-free high-resolution image from a low-resolution one compressed with an arbitrary quality factor by exploring joint compression artifacts reduction (CAR) and super-resolution (SR) tasks. First, we propose a context-aware joint CAR and SR neural network (CAJNN) that integrates both local and non-local features to solve CAR and SR in one-stage. Finally, a deep reconstruction network is adopted to predict high quality and high-resolution images. Evaluation on CAR and SR benchmark datasets shows that our CAJNN model outperforms previous methods and also takes 26.2% shorter runtime. Based on this model, we explore addressing two critical challenges in high-level computer vision: optical character recognition of low-resolution texts, and extremely tiny face detection. We demonstrate that CAJNN can serve as an effective image preprocessing method and improve the accuracy for real-scene text recognition (from 85.30% to 85.75%) and the average precision for tiny face detection (from 0.317 to 0.611).
summary: Due to the limits of bandwidth and storage space, digital images are usually down-scaled and compressed when transmitted over networks, resulting in loss of details and jarring artifacts that can lower the performance of high-level visual tasks. In this paper, we aim to generate an artifact-free high-resolution image from a low-resolution one compressed with an arbitrary quality factor by exploring joint compression artifacts reduction (CAR) and super-resolution (SR) tasks. First, we propose a context-aware joint CAR and SR neural network (CAJNN) that integrates both local and non-local features to solve CAR and SR in one-stage. Finally, a deep reconstruction network is adopted to predict high quality and high-resolution images. Evaluation on CAR and SR benchmark datasets shows that our CAJNN model outperforms previous methods and also takes 26.2% shorter runtime. Based on this model, we explore addressing two critical challenges in high-level computer vision: optical character recognition of low-resolution texts, and extremely tiny face detection. We demonstrate that CAJNN can serve as an effective image preprocessing method and improve the accuracy for real-scene text recognition (from 85.30% to 85.75%) and the average precision for tiny face detection (from 0.317 to 0.611).
abstract_zh: 由于带宽和存储空间的限制，数字图像在通过网络传输时通常会被缩小和压缩，从而导致细节丢失和不和谐的伪影，从而降低高级视觉任务的性能。在本文中，我们的目标是通过探索联合压缩伪影减少（CAR）和超分辨率（SR）任务，从使用任意质量因数压缩的低分辨率图像生成无伪影的高分辨率图像。首先，我们提出了一种上下文感知的联合 CAR 和 SR 神经网络（CAJNN），它集成了局部和非局部特征，以在一阶段解决 CAR 和 SR。最后，采用深度重建网络来预测高质量、高分辨率的图像。对 CAR 和 SR 基准数据集的评估表明，我们的 CAJNN 模型优于以前的方法，并且运行时间也缩短了 26.2%。基于该模型，我们探索解决高级计算机视觉中的两个关键挑战：低分辨率文本的光学字符识别和极小人脸检测。我们证明，CAJNN 可以作为一种有效的图像预处理方法，提高真实场景文本识别的准确率（从 85.30% 到 85.75%）和微小人脸检测的平均精度（从 0.317 到 0.611）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合压缩伪影减少和超分辨率的神经网络模型，用于从低分辨率压缩图像中生成高质量的高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 由于带宽和存储空间的限制，数字图像在网络传输过程中通常会被降采样和压缩，导致细节丢失和出现不愉快的伪影，从而影响高级视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种上下文感知的联合压缩伪影减少和超分辨率神经网络（CAJNN），该网络整合了局部和非局部特征，通过单阶段处理解决压缩伪影减少和超分辨率任务，最后采用深度重建网络预测高质量的高分辨率图像。
AI.result: 在CAR和SR基准数据集上的评估表明，CAJNN模型在性能上优于之前的方法，并且运行时间缩短了26.2%。此外，该模型在实际场景文本识别和极小人脸检测任务中也表现出色，分别提升了0.45%和0.294的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的CAJNN模型能够有效提升图像质量，作为图像预处理方法，显著提高了高级视觉任务的性能。

title: DeepAveragers: Offline Reinforcement Learning by Solving Derived Non-Parametric MDPs
title_zh: DeepAveragers：通过求解派生非参数 MDP 进行离线强化学习
comment: Camera Ready ICLR 2021
comments: Camera Ready ICLR 2021
abstract: We study an approach to offline reinforcement learning (RL) based on optimally solving finitely-represented MDPs derived from a static dataset of experience. This approach can be applied on top of any learned representation and has the potential to easily support multiple solution objectives as well as zero-shot adjustment to changing environments and goals. Our main contribution is to introduce the Deep Averagers with Costs MDP (DAC-MDP) and to investigate its solutions for offline RL. DAC-MDPs are a non-parametric model that can leverage deep representations and account for limited data by introducing costs for exploiting under-represented parts of the model. In theory, we show conditions that allow for lower-bounding the performance of DAC-MDP solutions. We also investigate the empirical behavior in a number of environments, including those with image-based observations. Overall, the experiments demonstrate that the framework can work in practice and scale to large complex offline RL problems.
summary: We study an approach to offline reinforcement learning (RL) based on optimally solving finitely-represented MDPs derived from a static dataset of experience. This approach can be applied on top of any learned representation and has the potential to easily support multiple solution objectives as well as zero-shot adjustment to changing environments and goals. Our main contribution is to introduce the Deep Averagers with Costs MDP (DAC-MDP) and to investigate its solutions for offline RL. DAC-MDPs are a non-parametric model that can leverage deep representations and account for limited data by introducing costs for exploiting under-represented parts of the model. In theory, we show conditions that allow for lower-bounding the performance of DAC-MDP solutions. We also investigate the empirical behavior in a number of environments, including those with image-based observations. Overall, the experiments demonstrate that the framework can work in practice and scale to large complex offline RL problems.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种离线强化学习 (RL) 方法，该方法基于最优求解从静态经验数据集导出的有限表示 MDP。这种方法可以应用于任何学习的表示之上，并且有可能轻松支持多个解决方案目标以及对不断变化的环境和目标进行零样本调整。我们的主要贡献是引入具有成本 MDP 的深度平均器 (DAC-MDP) 并研究其离线 RL 解决方案。 DAC-MDP 是一种非参数模型，可以利用深度表示并通过引入利用模型中代表性不足部分的成本来解释有限的数据。理论上，我们展示了允许 DAC-MDP 解决方案性能下限的条件。我们还研究了许多环境中的经验行为，包括基于图像观察的环境。总的来说，实验表明该框架可以在实践中发挥作用，并可以扩展到大型复杂的离线强化学习问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种离线强化学习方法，通过解决从静态数据集派生的非参数MDP（DAC-MDP）来实现灵活的环境适应与多目标优化。
AI.motivation: 传统离线强化学习方法在处理复杂环境或动态目标调整时存在局限性，需一种能结合深度表示、支持多目标且无需在线交互的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入非参数DAC-MDP模型，利用深度学习表示并引入成本机制约束数据不足区域，通过理论下界分析与多环境实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在图像观测等复杂场景中表现良好，可扩展至大规模离线RL问题，且具备零样本适应新目标的能力。
AI.conclusion: DAC-MDP框架在理论保证与实际应用中均有效，为离线强化学习提供了灵活、可扩展的新范式。

tldr: 本文提出一种离线强化学习方法，通过解决从静态数据集派生的非参数MDP（DAC-MDP）来实现灵活的环境适应与多目标优化。
motivation: 传统离线强化学习方法在处理复杂环境或动态目标调整时存在局限性，需一种能结合深度表示、支持多目标且无需在线交互的解决方案。
method: 引入非参数DAC-MDP模型，利用深度学习表示并引入成本机制约束数据不足区域，通过理论下界分析与多环境实验验证方法有效性。
result: 实验表明框架在图像观测等复杂场景中表现良好，可扩展至大规模离线RL问题，且具备零样本适应新目标的能力。
conclusion: DAC-MDP框架在理论保证与实际应用中均有效，为离线强化学习提供了灵活、可扩展的新范式。
search_text: DeepAveragers: Offline Reinforcement Learning by Solving Derived Non-Parametric MDPs DeepAveragers：通过求解派生非参数 MDP 进行离线强化学习 We study an approach to offline reinforcement learning (RL) based on optimally solving finitely-represented MDPs derived from a static dataset of experience. This approach can be applied on top of any learned representation and has the potential to easily support multiple solution objectives as well as zero-shot adjustment to changing environments and goals. Our main contribution is to introduce the Deep Averagers with Costs MDP (DAC-MDP) and to investigate its solutions for offline RL. DAC-MDPs are a non-parametric model that can leverage deep representations and account for limited data by introducing costs for exploiting under-represented parts of the model. In theory, we show conditions that allow for lower-bounding the performance of DAC-MDP solutions. We also investigate the empirical behavior in a number of environments, including those with image-based observations. Overall, the experiments demonstrate that the framework can work in practice and scale to large complex offline RL problems. 我们研究了一种离线强化学习 (RL) 方法，该方法基于最优求解从静态经验数据集导出的有限表示 MDP。这种方法可以应用于任何学习的表示之上，并且有可能轻松支持多个解决方案目标以及对不断变化的环境和目标进行零样本调整。我们的主要贡献是引入具有成本 MDP 的深度平均器 (DAC-MDP) 并研究其离线 RL 解决方案。 DAC-MDP 是一种非参数模型，可以利用深度表示并通过引入利用模型中代表性不足部分的成本来解释有限的数据。理论上，我们展示了允许 DAC-MDP 解决方案性能下限的条件。我们还研究了许多环境中的经验行为，包括基于图像观察的环境。总的来说，实验表明该框架可以在实践中发挥作用，并可以扩展到大型复杂的离线强化学习问题。 本文提出一种离线强化学习方法，通过解决从静态数据集派生的非参数MDP（DAC-MDP）来实现灵活的环境适应与多目标优化。 Aayam Shrestha,Stefan Lee,Prasad Tadepalli,Alan Fern cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Tiancheng Sun,Zexiang Xu,Xiuming Zhang,Sean Fanello,Christoph Rhemann,Paul Debevec,Yun-Ta Tsai,Jonathan T. Barron,Ravi Ramamoorthi
title: Light Stage Super-Resolution: Continuous High-Frequency Relighting
title_zh: 光舞台超分辨率：连续高频重新照明
comment: Siggraph Asia 2020
comments: Siggraph Asia 2020
abstract: The light stage has been widely used in computer graphics for the past two decades, primarily to enable the relighting of human faces. By capturing the appearance of the human subject under different light sources, one obtains the light transport matrix of that subject, which enables image-based relighting in novel environments. However, due to the finite number of lights in the stage, the light transport matrix only represents a sparse sampling on the entire sphere. As a consequence, relighting the subject with a point light or a directional source that does not coincide exactly with one of the lights in the stage requires interpolation and resampling the images corresponding to nearby lights, and this leads to ghosting shadows, aliased specularities, and other artifacts. To ameliorate these artifacts and produce better results under arbitrary high-frequency lighting, this paper proposes a learning-based solution for the "super-resolution" of scans of human faces taken from a light stage. Given an arbitrary "query" light direction, our method aggregates the captured images corresponding to neighboring lights in the stage, and uses a neural network to synthesize a rendering of the face that appears to be illuminated by a "virtual" light source at the query location. This neural network must circumvent the inherent aliasing and regularity of the light stage data that was used for training, which we accomplish through the use of regularized traditional interpolation methods within our network. Our learned model is able to produce renderings for arbitrary light directions that exhibit realistic shadows and specular highlights, and is able to generalize across a wide variety of subjects.

By capturing the appearance of the human subject under different light sources, one obtains the light transport matrix of that subject, which enables image-based relighting in novel environments. As a consequence, relighting the subject with a point light or a directional source that does not coincide exactly with one of the lights in the stage requires interpolation and resampling the images corresponding to nearby lights, and this leads to ghosting shadows, aliased specularities, and other artifacts. To ameliorate these artifacts and produce better results under arbitrary high-frequency lighting, this paper proposes a learning-based solution for the "super-resolution" of scans of human faces taken from a light stage. Given an arbitrary "query" light direction, our method aggregates the captured images corresponding to neighboring lights in the stage, and uses a neural network to synthesize a rendering of the face that appears to be illuminated by a "virtual" light source at the query location. This neural network must circumvent the inherent aliasing and regularity of the light stage data that was used for training, which we accomplish through the use of regularized traditional interpolation methods within our network. Our learned model is able to produce renderings for arbitrary light directions that exhibit realistic shadows and specular highlights, and is able to generalize across a wide variety of subjects.
abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年里，光级在计算机图形学中得到了广泛的应用，主要是为了实现人脸的重新照明。通过捕捉人类主体在不同光源下的外观，可以获得该主体的光传输矩阵，这使得在新环境中基于图像的重新照明成为可能。然而，由于舞台中的灯光数量有限，光传输矩阵仅代表整个球体上的稀疏采样。因此，使用与舞台中其中一盏灯不完全一致的点光源或定向光源重新照亮拍摄对象需要对与附近灯光相对应的图像进行插值和重新采样，这会导致重影、混叠镜面反射和其他伪影。为了改善这些伪影并在任意高频照明下产生更好的结果，本文提出了一种基于学习的解决方案，用于从光台获取的人脸扫描的“超分辨率”。给定任意“查询”光方向，我们的方法聚合与舞台中相邻光相对应的捕获图像，并使用神经网络来合成似乎被查询位置处的“虚拟”光源照亮的面部渲染。该神经网络必须规避用于训练的光级数据固有的混叠和规律性，这是我们通过在网络中使用正则化的传统插值方法来实现的。我们学习的模型能够生成任意光线方向的渲染，呈现真实的阴影和镜面高光，并且能够推广到各种主题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的超分辨率方法，用于解决光舞台数据在任意高频率光照下的重照明问题。
AI.motivation: 传统光舞台因光源有限导致重照明时出现鬼影阴影、别样高光等伪影，需提升任意光照方向下的渲染质量。
AI.method: 通过聚合邻近光源图像并结合正则化插值的神经网络，合成虚拟光源方向下的高保真渲染结果。
AI.result: 模型可生成具有真实阴影和高光的渲染效果，并成功泛化到多种被摄对象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了光舞台数据的混叠问题，实现了连续高频率光照下的高质量重照明。

title: A Game AI Competition to foster Collaborative AI research and development
title_zh: 旨在促进协作人工智能研究和开发的游戏人工智能竞赛
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Games, pp. 1-12, 2020
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Games, pp. 1-12, 2020
abstract: Game AI competitions are important to foster research and development on Game AI and AI in general. These competitions supply different challenging problems that can be translated into other contexts, virtual or real. They provide frameworks and tools to facilitate the research on their core topics and provide means for comparing and sharing results. A competition is also a way to motivate new researchers to study these challenges. In this document, we present the Geometry Friends Game AI Competition. Geometry Friends is a two-player cooperative physics-based puzzle platformer computer game. The concept of the game is simple, though its solving has proven to be difficult. While the main and apparent focus of the game is cooperation, it also relies on other AI-related problems such as planning, plan execution, and motion control, all connected to situational awareness. All of these must be solved in real-time. In this paper, we discuss the competition and the challenges it brings, and present an overview of the current solutions.
summary: Game AI competitions are important to foster research and development on Game AI and AI in general. These competitions supply different challenging problems that can be translated into other contexts, virtual or real. They provide frameworks and tools to facilitate the research on their core topics and provide means for comparing and sharing results. Geometry Friends is a two-player cooperative physics-based puzzle platformer computer game. The concept of the game is simple, though its solving has proven to be difficult. While the main and apparent focus of the game is cooperation, it also relies on other AI-related problems such as planning, plan execution, and motion control, all connected to situational awareness. All of these must be solved in real-time. In this paper, we discuss the competition and the challenges it brings, and present an overview of the current solutions.
abstract_zh: 游戏人工智能竞赛对于促进游戏人工智能和人工智能的研究和发展非常重要。这些竞赛提供了不同的具有挑战性的问题，可以转化为其他环境，虚拟的或真实的。他们提供框架和工具来促进其核心主题的研究，并提供比较和共享结果的手段。竞赛也是激励新研究人员研究这些挑战的一种方式。在本文档中，我们介绍了几何朋友游戏人工智能竞赛。 《Geometry Friends》是一款两人合作、基于物理的益智平台电脑游戏。游戏的概念很简单，但事实证明解决起来很困难。虽然游戏的主要和明显的焦点是合作，但它也依赖于其他与人工智能相关的问题，例如规划、计划执行和运动控制，所有这些都与态势感知有关。所有这些都必须实时解决。在本文中，我们讨论了竞争及其带来的挑战，并概述了当前的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Geometry Friends游戏AI竞赛，旨在通过合作式物理谜题平台游戏促进协作AI研究与开发，并概述了竞赛挑战及现有解决方案。
AI.motivation: 游戏AI竞赛为AI研究提供标准化挑战框架，促进技术共享与比较，同时激励新研究者参与协作式AI问题解决。
AI.method: 通过设计需要实时解决规划、运动控制与情境感知的双人合作游戏，构建竞赛框架并分析参赛方案的技术特点。
AI.result: 竞赛展示了多种针对合作机制、路径规划与动态环境适应的AI解决方案，验证了实时协作AI技术的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该竞赛有效推动了协作AI技术发展，为未来多智能体系统研究提供了实践平台与基准测试环境。

In this paper, we discuss the competition and the challenges it brings, and present an overview of the current solutions. 游戏人工智能竞赛对于促进游戏人工智能和人工智能的研究和发展非常重要。这些竞赛提供了不同的具有挑战性的问题，可以转化为其他环境，虚拟的或真实的。他们提供框架和工具来促进其核心主题的研究，并提供比较和共享结果的手段。竞赛也是激励新研究人员研究这些挑战的一种方式。在本文档中，我们介绍了几何朋友游戏人工智能竞赛。 《Geometry Friends》是一款两人合作、基于物理的益智平台电脑游戏。游戏的概念很简单，但事实证明解决起来很困难。虽然游戏的主要和明显的焦点是合作，但它也依赖于其他与人工智能相关的问题，例如规划、计划执行和运动控制，所有这些都与态势感知有关。所有这些都必须实时解决。在本文中，我们讨论了竞争及其带来的挑战，并概述了当前的解决方案。 本文介绍了Geometry Friends游戏AI竞赛，旨在通过合作式物理谜题平台游戏促进协作AI研究与开发，并概述了竞赛挑战及现有解决方案。 Ana Salta,Rui Prada,Francisco S. Melo cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: He Li,Robert J. Frei,Patrick M. Wensing
title: Model Hierarchy Predictive Control of Robotic Systems
title_zh: 机器人系统的模型层次预测控制
comment: Author pre-print of accepted RA-L/ICRA 2021 manuscript
comments: Author pre-print of accepted RA-L/ICRA 2021 manuscript
abstract: This letter presents a new predictive control architecture for high-dimensional robotic systems. As opposed to a conventional Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach to locomotion that formulates a hierarchical sequence of optimization problems, the proposed work formulates a single optimization problem posed over a hierarchy of models, and is thus named Model Hierarchy Predictive Control (MHPC). MHPC is formulated as a multi-phase receding-horizon Trajectory Optimization (TO) problem, and can be implemented using any general multi-phase TO solver. MHPC is benchmarked in simulation on a quadruped, a biped, and a quadrotor, demonstrating control performance on par or exceeding whole-body MPC while maintaining a lower computational cost in each case. A preliminary gap jumping experiment is conducted on the MIT Mini Cheetah with the control policy generated offline, demonstrating the physical validity of the generated trajectories and motivating online MHPC in future work.
summary: This letter presents a new predictive control architecture for high-dimensional robotic systems. As opposed to a conventional Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach to locomotion that formulates a hierarchical sequence of optimization problems, the proposed work formulates a single optimization problem posed over a hierarchy of models, and is thus named Model Hierarchy Predictive Control (MHPC). MHPC is formulated as a multi-phase receding-horizon Trajectory Optimization (TO) problem, and can be implemented using any general multi-phase TO solver. MHPC is benchmarked in simulation on a quadruped, a biped, and a quadrotor, demonstrating control performance on par or exceeding whole-body MPC while maintaining a lower computational cost in each case. A preliminary gap jumping experiment is conducted on the MIT Mini Cheetah with the control policy generated offline, demonstrating the physical validity of the generated trajectories and motivating online MHPC in future work.
abstract_zh: 这封信提出了一种用于高维机器人系统的新预测控制架构。与传统的模型预测控制（MPC）运动方法不同，该方法制定了优化问题的层次序列，所提出的工作制定了在模型层次上提出的单个优化问题，因此被称为模型层次预测控制（MHPC）。 MHPC 被表述为多阶段后退轨迹优化 (TO) 问题，并且可以使用任何通用的多阶段 TO 求解器来实现。 MHPC 在四足动物、双足动物和四旋翼飞行器的仿真中进行了基准测试，展示了与全身 MPC 相当或超过的控制性能，同时在每种情况下保持较低的计算成本。在 MIT Mini Cheetah 上进行了初步的间隙跳跃实验，控制策略是离线生成的，证明了生成轨迹的物理有效性，并激励了未来工作中的在线 MHPC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型模型分层预测控制（MHPC）架构，用于高维机器人系统的预测控制，通过单次优化问题替代传统分层序列优化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统模型预测控制（MPC）在机器人运动控制中需解决多个分层优化问题，导致计算成本高且效率低，亟需更高效的控制框架。
AI.method: 将控制问题转化为基于模型分层的单次多阶段轨迹优化问题，利用通用多阶段轨迹优化求解器实现，适用于四足、双足及四旋翼机器人。
AI.result: 仿真与物理实验显示，MHPC在控制性能上与全身MPC相当或更优，计算成本更低；MIT Mini Cheetah跳跃实验验证了轨迹可行性。
AI.conclusion: MHPC通过分层模型单次优化有效降低计算成本，适用于多种机器人系统，为未来在线控制应用奠定基础。
