title_zh: DE-GAN：用于文档增强的条件生成对抗网络
comment: Accepted in IEEE TPAMI
comments: Accepted in IEEE TPAMI
abstract: Documents often exhibit various forms of degradation, which make it hard to be read and substantially deteriorate the performance of an OCR system. In this paper, we propose an effective end-to-end framework named Document Enhancement Generative Adversarial Networks (DE-GAN) that uses the conditional GANs (cGANs) to restore severely degraded document images. To the best of our knowledge, this practice has not been studied within the context of generative adversarial deep networks. We demonstrate that, in different tasks (document clean up, binarization, deblurring and watermark removal), DE-GAN can produce an enhanced version of the degraded document with a high quality. In addition, our approach provides consistent improvements compared to state-of-the-art methods over the widely used DIBCO 2013, DIBCO 2017 and H-DIBCO 2018 datasets, proving its ability to restore a degraded document image to its ideal condition. The obtained results on a wide variety of degradation reveal the flexibility of the proposed model to be exploited in other document enhancement problems.
summary: Documents often exhibit various forms of degradation, which make it hard to be read and substantially deteriorate the performance of an OCR system. In this paper, we propose an effective end-to-end framework named Document Enhancement Generative Adversarial Networks (DE-GAN) that uses the conditional GANs (cGANs) to restore severely degraded document images. To the best of our knowledge, this practice has not been studied within the context of generative adversarial deep networks. We demonstrate that, in different tasks (document clean up, binarization, deblurring and watermark removal), DE-GAN can produce an enhanced version of the degraded document with a high quality. In addition, our approach provides consistent improvements compared to state-of-the-art methods over the widely used DIBCO 2013, DIBCO 2017 and H-DIBCO 2018 datasets, proving its ability to restore a degraded document image to its ideal condition. The obtained results on a wide variety of degradation reveal the flexibility of the proposed model to be exploited in other document enhancement problems.
abstract_zh: 文档通常会出现各种形式的退化，导致难以阅读并严重降低 OCR 系统的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的端到端框架，名为文档增强生成对抗网络（DE-GAN），它使用条件 GAN（cGAN）来恢复严重退化的文档图像。据我们所知，这种做法尚未在生成对抗性深度网络的背景下进行研究。我们证明，在不同的任务（文档清理、二值化、去模糊和水印去除）中，DE-GAN 可以生成高质量的降级文档的增强版本。此外，与广泛使用的 DIBCO 2013、DIBCO 2017 和 H-DIBCO 2018 数据集上的最先进方法相比，我们的方法提供了一致的改进，证明了其将降级文档图像恢复到理想状态的能力。所获得的各种退化结果揭示了所提出的模型在其他文档增强问题中可利用的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的端到端框架DE-GAN，用于恢复严重退化的文档图像。
AI.motivation: 文档退化会严重影响OCR系统的性能，而现有研究尚未在生成对抗网络框架下系统探索文档增强问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）框架DE-GAN，通过端到端学习实现文档去噪、二值化、去模糊和水印移除等多任务增强。
AI.result: 在DIBCO 2013、DIBCO 2017和H-DIBCO 2018数据集上，DE-GAN相比现有方法在多个退化场景下均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: DE-GAN验证了生成对抗网络在文档增强任务中的有效性，其灵活框架可推广至其他文档修复问题。

To the best of our knowledge, this practice has not been studied within the context of generative adversarial deep networks. We demonstrate that, in different tasks (document clean up, binarization, deblurring and watermark removal), DE-GAN can produce an enhanced version of the degraded document with a high quality. In addition, our approach provides consistent improvements compared to state-of-the-art methods over the widely used DIBCO 2013, DIBCO 2017 and H-DIBCO 2018 datasets, proving its ability to restore a degraded document image to its ideal condition. authors_text: Fan Mo,Anastasia Borovykh,Mohammad Malekzadeh,Hamed Haddadi,Soteris Demetriou
title: Layer-wise Characterization of Latent Information Leakage in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中潜在信息泄漏的分层表征
comment: 9 pages, at ICLR workshop (Distributed and Private Machine Learning)
comments: 9 pages, at ICLR workshop (Distributed and Private Machine Learning)
abstract: Training deep neural networks via federated learning allows clients to share, instead of the original data, only the model trained on their data. Prior work has demonstrated that in practice a client's private information, unrelated to the main learning task, can be discovered from the model's gradients, which compromises the promised privacy protection. However, there is still no formal approach for quantifying the leakage of private information via the shared updated model or gradients. In this work, we analyze property inference attacks and define two metrics based on (i) an adaptation of the empirical $\mathcal{V}$-information, and (ii) a sensitivity analysis using Jacobian matrices allowing us to measure changes in the gradients with respect to latent information. We show the applicability of our proposed metrics in localizing private latent information in a layer-wise manner and in two settings where (i) we have or (ii) we do not have knowledge of the attackers' capabilities. We evaluate the proposed metrics for quantifying information leakage on three real-world datasets using three benchmark models.
summary: Training deep neural networks via federated learning allows clients to share, instead of the original data, only the model trained on their data. Prior work has demonstrated that in practice a client's private information, unrelated to the main learning task, can be discovered from the model's gradients, which compromises the promised privacy protection. However, there is still no formal approach for quantifying the leakage of private information via the shared updated model or gradients. In this work, we analyze property inference attacks and define two metrics based on (i) an adaptation of the empirical $\mathcal{V}$-information, and (ii) a sensitivity analysis using Jacobian matrices allowing us to measure changes in the gradients with respect to latent information. We show the applicability of our proposed metrics in localizing private latent information in a layer-wise manner and in two settings where (i) we have or (ii) we do not have knowledge of the attackers' capabilities. We evaluate the proposed metrics for quantifying information leakage on three real-world datasets using three benchmark models.
abstract_zh: 通过联合学习训练深度神经网络，客户可以仅共享根据其数据训练的模型，而不是原始数据。先前的工作已经证明，在实践中，可以从模型的梯度中发现与主要学习任务无关的客户的私人信息，这损害了所承诺的隐私保护。然而，仍然没有正式的方法来量化通过共享更新模型或梯度泄漏的私人信息。在这项工作中，我们分析属性推断攻击并基于（i）经验$\mathcal{V}$信息的适应和（ii）使用雅可比矩阵的敏感性分析定义两个指标，使我们能够测量相对于潜在信息的梯度变化。我们展示了我们提出的指标在以分层方式本地化私有潜在信息方面的适用性，以及在（i）我们了解或（ii）我们不了解攻击者能力的两种情况下的适用性。我们使用三个基准模型评估了三个现实世界数据集上所提出的量化信息泄漏的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出量化联邦学习中模型梯度泄露私有信息的两种指标，并通过分层分析定位敏感信息。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中模型梯度可能泄露用户隐私信息，但缺乏正式量化泄露程度的方法，亟需建立可衡量的隐私泄露评估体系。
AI.method: 基于经验V信息和雅可比矩阵敏感性分析，设计两种量化指标，通过分层分析定位模型各层的隐私泄露特征，并在两种攻击场景下验证有效性。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上验证了指标的有效性，成功定位了模型各层的隐私泄露程度，且在不同攻击者能力假设下均表现出良好适用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层量化方法可有效评估联邦学习中的隐私泄露风险，为隐私保护机制设计提供理论依据和实践指导。

title: Squashing activation functions in benchmark tests: towards eXplainable Artificial Intelligence using continuous-valued logic
title_zh: 在基准测试中压缩激活函数：使用连续值逻辑实现可解释的人工智能
abstract: Over the past few years, deep neural networks have shown excellent results in multiple tasks, however, there is still an increasing need to address the problem of interpretability to improve model transparency, performance, and safety. Achieving eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) by combining neural networks with continuous logic and multi-criteria decision-making tools is one of the most promising ways to approach this problem: by this combination, the black-box nature of neural models can be reduced. The continuous logic-based neural model uses so-called Squashing activation functions, a parametric family of functions that satisfy natural invariance requirements and contain rectified linear units as a particular case. This work demonstrates the first benchmark tests that measure the performance of Squashing functions in neural networks. Three experiments were carried out to examine their usability and a comparison with the most popular activation functions was made for five different network types. The performance was determined by measuring the accuracy, loss, and time per epoch. These experiments and the conducted benchmarks have proven that the use of Squashing functions is possible and similar in performance to conventional activation functions. Moreover, a further experiment was conducted by implementing nilpotent logical gates to demonstrate how simple classification tasks can be solved successfully and with high performance. The results indicate that due to the embedded nilpotent logical operators and the differentiability of the Squashing function, it is possible to solve classification problems, where other commonly used activation functions fail.
summary: Over the past few years, deep neural networks have shown excellent results in multiple tasks, however, there is still an increasing need to address the problem of interpretability to improve model transparency, performance, and safety. Achieving eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) by combining neural networks with continuous logic and multi-criteria decision-making tools is one of the most promising ways to approach this problem: by this combination, the black-box nature of neural models can be reduced. The continuous logic-based neural model uses so-called Squashing activation functions, a parametric family of functions that satisfy natural invariance requirements and contain rectified linear units as a particular case. This work demonstrates the first benchmark tests that measure the performance of Squashing functions in neural networks. Three experiments were carried out to examine their usability and a comparison with the most popular activation functions was made for five different network types. The performance was determined by measuring the accuracy, loss, and time per epoch. These experiments and the conducted benchmarks have proven that the use of Squashing functions is possible and similar in performance to conventional activation functions. Moreover, a further experiment was conducted by implementing nilpotent logical gates to demonstrate how simple classification tasks can be solved successfully and with high performance. The results indicate that due to the embedded nilpotent logical operators and the differentiability of the Squashing function, it is possible to solve classification problems, where other commonly used activation functions fail.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，深度神经网络在多项任务中表现出了优异的结果，然而，仍然越来越需要解决可解释性问题，以提高模型的透明度、性能和安全性。通过将神经网络与连续逻辑和多标准决策工具相结合来实现可解释人工智能（XAI）是解决该问题最有希望的方法之一：通过这种组合，可以减少神经模型的黑盒性质。基于连续逻辑的神经模型使用所谓的挤压激活函数，这是一个满足自然不变性要求并包含作为特定情况的修正线性单元的参数函数族。这项工作展示了第一个衡量神经网络中挤压函数性能的基准测试。进行了三个实验来检查它们的可用性，并针对五种不同的网络类型与最流行的激活函数进行了比较。性能是通过测量每个周期的准确性、损失和时间来确定的。这些实验和进行的基准测试证明，挤压函数的使用是可能的，并且在性能上与传统激活函数相似。此外，通过实现幂零逻辑门进行了进一步的实验，以演示如何成功且高性能地解决简单的分类任务。结果表明，由于嵌入的幂零逻辑运算符和 Squashing 函数的可微性，可以解决其他常用激活函数无法解决的分类问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过基准测试评估Squashing激活函数在神经网络中的性能，探索其在可解释人工智能（XAI）中的应用。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽性能优异，但存在可解释性不足的问题。结合连续逻辑与多准则决策工具，利用Squashing激活函数提升模型透明度与安全性是当前研究重点。
AI.method: 设计三组实验，对比Squashing函数与主流激活函数在五种网络类型中的表现，通过准确率、损失值和训练时间评估性能，并引入nilpotent逻辑门验证分类任务可行性。
AI.result: Squashing函数性能与传统激活函数相当，且在嵌入nilpotent逻辑运算符后，能有效解决其他激活函数失效的分类问题。
AI.conclusion: Squashing激活函数具备替代传统方法的潜力，其可微性和逻辑特性为实现可解释AI提供了新路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过基准测试评估Squashing激活函数在神经网络中的性能，探索其在可解释人工智能（XAI）中的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 深度神经网络虽性能优异，但存在可解释性不足的问题。结合连续逻辑与多准则决策工具，利用Squashing激活函数提升模型透明度与安全性是当前研究重点。
ai_content.method: 设计三组实验，对比Squashing函数与主流激活函数在五种网络类型中的表现，通过准确率、损失值和训练时间评估性能，并引入nilpotent逻辑门验证分类任务可行性。
ai_content.result: Squashing函数性能与传统激活函数相当，且在嵌入nilpotent逻辑运算符后，能有效解决其他激活函数失效的分类问题。
ai_content.conclusion: Squashing激活函数具备替代传统方法的潜力，其可微性和逻辑特性为实现可解释AI提供了新路径。

search_text: Squashing activation functions in benchmark tests: towards eXplainable Artificial Intelligence using continuous-valued logic 在基准测试中压缩激活函数：使用连续值逻辑实现可解释的人工智能 Over the past few years, deep neural networks have shown excellent results in multiple tasks, however, there is still an increasing need to address the problem of interpretability to improve model transparency, performance, and safety. Achieving eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) by combining neural networks with continuous logic and multi-criteria decision-making tools is one of the most promising ways to approach this problem: by this combination, the black-box nature of neural models can be reduced. The continuous logic-based neural model uses so-called Squashing activation functions, a parametric family of functions that satisfy natural invariance requirements and contain rectified linear units as a particular case. This work demonstrates the first benchmark tests that measure the performance of Squashing functions in neural networks. Three experiments were carried out to examine their usability and a comparison with the most popular activation functions was made for five different network types. The performance was determined by measuring the accuracy, loss, and time per epoch. These experiments and the conducted benchmarks have proven that the use of Squashing functions is possible and similar in performance to conventional activation functions. Moreover, a further experiment was conducted by implementing nilpotent logical gates to demonstrate how simple classification tasks can be solved successfully and with high performance. The results indicate that due to the embedded nilpotent logical operators and the differentiability of the Squashing function, it is possible to solve classification problems, where other commonly used activation functions fail. 在过去的几年里，深度神经网络在多项任务中表现出了优异的结果，然而，仍然越来越需要解决可解释性问题，以提高模型的透明度、性能和安全性。通过将神经网络与连续逻辑和多标准决策工具相结合来实现可解释人工智能（XAI）是解决该问题最有希望的方法之一：通过这种组合，可以减少神经模型的黑盒性质。基于连续逻辑的神经模型使用所谓的挤压激活函数，这是一个满足自然不变性要求并包含作为特定情况的修正线性单元的参数函数族。这项工作展示了第一个衡量神经网络中挤压函数性能的基准测试。进行了三个实验来检查它们的可用性，并针对五种不同的网络类型与最流行的激活函数进行了比较。性能是通过测量每个周期的准确性、损失和时间来确定的。这些实验和进行的基准测试证明，挤压函数的使用是可能的，并且在性能上与传统激活函数相似。此外，通过实现幂零逻辑门进行了进一步的实验，以演示如何成功且高性能地解决简单的分类任务。结果表明，由于嵌入的幂零逻辑运算符和 Squashing 函数的可微性，可以解决其他常用激活函数无法解决的分类问题。 本文通过基准测试评估Squashing激活函数在神经网络中的性能，探索其在可解释人工智能（XAI）中的应用。 Daniel Zeltner,Benedikt Schmid,Gabor Csiszar,Orsolya Csiszar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chenjia Bai,Peng Liu,Kaiyu Liu,Lingxiao Wang,Yingnan Zhao,Lei Han
title: Variational Dynamic for Self-Supervised Exploration in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中自监督探索的变分动态
comment: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS) 2021
comments: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS) 2021
abstract: Efficient exploration remains a challenging problem in reinforcement learning, especially for tasks where extrinsic rewards from environments are sparse or even totally disregarded. Significant advances based on intrinsic motivation show promising results in simple environments but often get stuck in environments with multimodal and stochastic dynamics. In this work, we propose a variational dynamic model based on the conditional variational inference to model the multimodality and stochasticity. We consider the environmental state-action transition as a conditional generative process by generating the next-state prediction under the condition of the current state, action, and latent variable, which provides a better understanding of the dynamics and leads a better performance in exploration. We derive an upper bound of the negative log-likelihood of the environmental transition and use such an upper bound as the intrinsic reward for exploration, which allows the agent to learn skills by self-supervised exploration without observing extrinsic rewards. We evaluate the proposed method on several image-based simulation tasks and a real robotic manipulating task. Our method outperforms several state-of-the-art environment model-based exploration approaches.
summary: Efficient exploration remains a challenging problem in reinforcement learning, especially for tasks where extrinsic rewards from environments are sparse or even totally disregarded. Significant advances based on intrinsic motivation show promising results in simple environments but often get stuck in environments with multimodal and stochastic dynamics. In this work, we propose a variational dynamic model based on the conditional variational inference to model the multimodality and stochasticity. We consider the environmental state-action transition as a conditional generative process by generating the next-state prediction under the condition of the current state, action, and latent variable, which provides a better understanding of the dynamics and leads a better performance in exploration. We derive an upper bound of the negative log-likelihood of the environmental transition and use such an upper bound as the intrinsic reward for exploration, which allows the agent to learn skills by self-supervised exploration without observing extrinsic rewards. We evaluate the proposed method on several image-based simulation tasks and a real robotic manipulating task. Our method outperforms several state-of-the-art environment model-based exploration approaches.
abstract_zh: 有效探索仍然是强化学习中的一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是对于来自环境的外在奖励很少甚至完全被忽视的任务。基于内在动机的重大进展在简单环境中显示出有希望的结果，但经常陷入多模态和随机动力学的环境中。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于条件变分推理的变分动态模型来模拟多模态和随机性。我们将环境状态-动作转换视为一个条件生成过程，通过在当前状态、动作和潜在变量的条件下生成下一状态预测，这提供了对动态的更好理解并导致更好的探索性能。我们推导出环境转变的负对数似然的上限，并使用这样的上限作为探索的内在奖励，这使得代理可以通过自我监督的探索来学习技能，而无需观察外在奖励。我们在几个基于图像的模拟任务和一个真实的机器人操作任务上评估了所提出的方法。我们的方法优于几种最先进的基于环境模型的探索方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分动态模型的自监督探索方法，用于解决深度强化学习中稀疏奖励环境下的高效探索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有内在动机方法在多模态和随机动态环境中探索效率不足，需通过建模环境动态特性提升探索能力。
AI.method: 构建条件变分生成模型，将状态-动作转移建模为条件生成过程，利用负对数似然上界作为内在奖励驱动自监督探索。
AI.result: 在图像模拟任务和实际机器人操作任务中优于多种先进基于环境模型的探索方法。
AI.conclusion: 变分动态模型有效捕捉环境多模态特性，通过自监督内在奖励机制显著提升复杂环境下的探索效率。

We evaluate the proposed method on several image-based simulation tasks and a real robotic manipulating task. title: End-to-End Learning for Simultaneously Generating Decision Map and Multi-Focus Image Fusion Result
title_zh: 同时生成决策图和多焦点图像融合结果的端到端学习
comment: report
comments: report
abstract: The general aim of multi-focus image fusion is to gather focused regions of different images to generate a unique all-in-focus fused image. Deep learning based methods become the mainstream of image fusion by virtue of its powerful feature representation ability. However, most of the existing deep learning structures failed to balance fusion quality and end-to-end implementation convenience. End-to-end decoder design often leads to unrealistic result because of its non-linear mapping mechanism. On the other hand, generating an intermediate decision map achieves better quality for the fused image, but relies on the rectification with empirical post-processing parameter choices. In this work, to handle the requirements of both output image quality and comprehensive simplicity of structure implementation, we propose a cascade network to simultaneously generate decision map and fused result with an end-to-end training procedure. It avoids the dependence on empirical post-processing methods in the inference stage. To improve the fusion quality, we introduce a gradient aware loss function to preserve gradient information in output fused image. In addition, we design a decision calibration strategy to decrease the time consumption in the application of multiple images fusion. Extensive experiments are conducted to compare with 19 different state-of-the-art multi-focus image fusion structures with 6 assessment metrics. The results prove that our designed structure can generally ameliorate the output fused image quality, while implementation efficiency increases over 30\% for multiple images fusion.
summary: The general aim of multi-focus image fusion is to gather focused regions of different images to generate a unique all-in-focus fused image. Deep learning based methods become the mainstream of image fusion by virtue of its powerful feature representation ability. However, most of the existing deep learning structures failed to balance fusion quality and end-to-end implementation convenience. End-to-end decoder design often leads to unrealistic result because of its non-linear mapping mechanism. On the other hand, generating an intermediate decision map achieves better quality for the fused image, but relies on the rectification with empirical post-processing parameter choices. In this work, to handle the requirements of both output image quality and comprehensive simplicity of structure implementation, we propose a cascade network to simultaneously generate decision map and fused result with an end-to-end training procedure. It avoids the dependence on empirical post-processing methods in the inference stage. To improve the fusion quality, we introduce a gradient aware loss function to preserve gradient information in output fused image. In addition, we design a decision calibration strategy to decrease the time consumption in the application of multiple images fusion. Extensive experiments are conducted to compare with 19 different state-of-the-art multi-focus image fusion structures with 6 assessment metrics. The results prove that our designed structure can generally ameliorate the output fused image quality, while implementation efficiency increases over 30\% for multiple images fusion.
abstract_zh: 多焦点图像融合的总体目标是收集不同图像的聚焦区域以生成独特的全焦点融合图像。基于深度学习的方法凭借其强大的特征表示能力成为图像融合的主流。然而，大多数现有的深度学习结构未能平衡融合质量和端到端实现便利性。由于其非线性映射机制，端到端解码器设计常常导致不切实际的结果。另一方面，生成中间决策图可以使融合图像获得更好的质量，但依赖于经验后处理参数选择的校正。在这项工作中，为了满足输出图像质量和结构实现的全面简单性的要求，我们提出了一种级联网络，通过端到端训练过程同时生成决策图和融合结果。它避免了推理阶段对经验后处理方法的依赖。为了提高融合质量，我们引入了梯度感知损失函数来保留输出融合图像中的梯度信息。此外，我们设计了决策校准策略来减少多图像融合应用中的时间消耗。进行了大量的实验，以与 19 种不同的最先进的多焦点图像融合结构和 6 种评估指标进行比较。结果证明，我们设计的结构总体上可以改善输出融合图像质量，同时多图像融合的实现效率提高了 30% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端网络结构，同时生成决策图与多焦点图像融合结果，以提升融合质量与实现效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以平衡融合质量与端到端实现的便捷性，且依赖经验参数的后处理方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计级联网络同时生成决策图与融合结果，引入梯度感知损失函数保留图像梯度信息，并提出决策校准策略提升多图像融合效率。
AI.result: 在6项评估指标下优于19种先进方法，多图像融合效率提升超30%，融合图像质量显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效兼顾融合质量与实现效率，为端到端多焦点图像融合提供了新思路。

result: 在6项评估指标下优于19种先进方法，多图像融合效率提升超30%，融合图像质量显著改善。
conclusion: 所提方法有效兼顾融合质量与实现效率，为端到端多焦点图像融合提供了新思路。
search_text: End-to-End Learning for Simultaneously Generating Decision Map and Multi-Focus Image Fusion Result 同时生成决策图和多焦点图像融合结果的端到端学习 The general aim of multi-focus image fusion is to gather focused regions of different images to generate a unique all-in-focus fused image. Deep learning based methods become the mainstream of image fusion by virtue of its powerful feature representation ability. However, most of the existing deep learning structures failed to balance fusion quality and end-to-end implementation convenience. End-to-end decoder design often leads to unrealistic result because of its non-linear mapping mechanism. On the other hand, generating an intermediate decision map achieves better quality for the fused image, but relies on the rectification with empirical post-processing parameter choices. In this work, to handle the requirements of both output image quality and comprehensive simplicity of structure implementation, we propose a cascade network to simultaneously generate decision map and fused result with an end-to-end training procedure. It avoids the dependence on empirical post-processing methods in the inference stage. To improve the fusion quality, we introduce a gradient aware loss function to preserve gradient information in output fused image. In addition, we design a decision calibration strategy to decrease the time consumption in the application of multiple images fusion. Extensive experiments are conducted to compare with 19 different state-of-the-art multi-focus image fusion structures with 6 assessment metrics. The results prove that our designed structure can generally ameliorate the output fused image quality, while implementation efficiency increases over 30\% for multiple images fusion. 多焦点图像融合的总体目标是收集不同图像的聚焦区域以生成独特的全焦点融合图像。基于深度学习的方法凭借其强大的特征表示能力成为图像融合的主流。然而，大多数现有的深度学习结构未能平衡融合质量和端到端实现便利性。由于其非线性映射机制，端到端解码器设计常常导致不切实际的结果。另一方面，生成中间决策图可以使融合图像获得更好的质量，但依赖于经验后处理参数选择的校正。在这项工作中，为了满足输出图像质量和结构实现的全面简单性的要求，我们提出了一种级联网络，通过端到端训练过程同时生成决策图和融合结果。它避免了推理阶段对经验后处理方法的依赖。为了提高融合质量，我们引入了梯度感知损失函数来保留输出融合图像中的梯度信息。此外，我们设计了决策校准策略来减少多图像融合应用中的时间消耗。进行了大量的实验，以与 19 种不同的最先进的多焦点图像融合结构和 6 种评估指标进行比较。结果证明，我们设计的结构总体上可以改善输出融合图像质量，同时多图像融合的实现效率提高了 30% 以上。 本文提出一种端到端网络结构，同时生成决策图与多焦点图像融合结果，以提升融合质量与实现效率。 Boyuan Ma,Xiang Yin,Di Wu,Xiaojuan Ban cs.CV

title: Self-Selective Context for Interaction Recognition
title_zh: 用于交互识别的自选择上下文
comment: Accepted at ICPR'20
comments: Accepted at ICPR'20
abstract: Human-object interaction recognition aims for identifying the relationship between a human subject and an object. Researchers incorporate global scene context into the early layers of deep Convolutional Neural Networks as a solution. They report a significant increase in the performance since generally interactions are correlated with the scene (\ie riding bicycle on the city street). However, this approach leads to the following problems. It increases the network size in the early layers, therefore not efficient. It leads to noisy filter responses when the scene is irrelevant, therefore not accurate. It only leverages scene context whereas human-object interactions offer a multitude of contexts, therefore incomplete. To circumvent these issues, in this work, we propose Self-Selective Context (SSC). SSC operates on the joint appearance of human-objects and context to bring the most discriminative context(s) into play for recognition. We devise novel contextual features that model the locality of human-object interactions and show that SSC can seamlessly integrate with the State-of-the-art interaction recognition models. Our experiments show that SSC leads to an important increase in interaction recognition performance, while using much fewer parameters.
summary: Human-object interaction recognition aims for identifying the relationship between a human subject and an object. Researchers incorporate global scene context into the early layers of deep Convolutional Neural Networks as a solution. They report a significant increase in the performance since generally interactions are correlated with the scene (\ie riding bicycle on the city street). However, this approach leads to the following problems. It increases the network size in the early layers, therefore not efficient. It leads to noisy filter responses when the scene is irrelevant, therefore not accurate. It only leverages scene context whereas human-object interactions offer a multitude of contexts, therefore incomplete. To circumvent these issues, in this work, we propose Self-Selective Context (SSC). SSC operates on the joint appearance of human-objects and context to bring the most discriminative context(s) into play for recognition. We devise novel contextual features that model the locality of human-object interactions and show that SSC can seamlessly integrate with the State-of-the-art interaction recognition models. Our experiments show that SSC leads to an important increase in interaction recognition performance, while using much fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 人机交互识别旨在识别人主体与客体之间的关系。研究人员将全局场景上下文纳入深度卷积神经网络的早期层作为解决方案。他们报告说，由于交互通常与场景相关（即在城市街道上骑自行车），因此性能显着提高。然而，这种方法会导致以下问题。它增加了早期层的网络规模，因此效率不高。当场景不相关时，它会导致滤波器响应嘈杂，因此不准确。它仅利用场景上下文，而人与对象交互提供多种上下文，因此是不完整的。为了规避这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了自选择上下文（SSC）。 SSC 基于人与物体和环境的联合外观进行操作，以将最具辨别力的环境发挥作用以进行识别。我们设计了新颖的上下文特征来模拟人与物体交互的局部性，并表明 SSC 可以与最先进的交互识别模型无缝集成。我们的实验表明，SSC 可以显着提高交互识别性能，同时使用更少的参数。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自选择上下文方法（SSC），以解决传统全局场景上下文在交互识别中的效率与准确性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法引入全局场景上下文虽提升性能，但导致网络效率低下、噪声干扰及上下文利用不全面，需更高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计自选择上下文（SSC）方法，结合人-物联合外观与上下文，选择最具判别性的局部特征，并与最新模型无缝集成。
AI.result: 实验表明，SSC在提升交互识别准确率的同时，显著减少模型参数量。
AI.conclusion: SSC有效克服了传统方法的不足，为交互识别提供了高效准确的新方案。

authors_text: Xingguang Zhong,Yuwei Wu,Dong Wang,Qianhao Wang,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: Generating Large Convex Polytopes Directly on Point Clouds
title_zh: 直接在点云上生成大型凸多面体
abstract: In this paper, we present a method to efficiently generate large, free, and guaranteed convex space among arbitrarily cluttered obstacles. Our method operates directly on point clouds, avoids expensive calculations, and processes thousands of points within a few milliseconds, which extremely suits embedded platforms. The base stone of our method is sphere flipping, a one-one invertible nonlinear transformation, which maps a set of unordered points to a nonlinear space. With these wrapped points, we obtain a collision-free star convex polytope. Then, utilizing the star convexity, we efficiently modify the polytope to convex and guarantee its free of obstacles. Extensive quantitative evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art works in efficiency. We also present practical applications with our method in 3D, including large-scale deformable topological mapping and quadrotor optimal trajectory planning, to validate its capability and efficiency. The source code of our method will be released for the reference of the community.
summary: In this paper, we present a method to efficiently generate large, free, and guaranteed convex space among arbitrarily cluttered obstacles. Our method operates directly on point clouds, avoids expensive calculations, and processes thousands of points within a few milliseconds, which extremely suits embedded platforms. The base stone of our method is sphere flipping, a one-one invertible nonlinear transformation, which maps a set of unordered points to a nonlinear space. With these wrapped points, we obtain a collision-free star convex polytope. Then, utilizing the star convexity, we efficiently modify the polytope to convex and guarantee its free of obstacles. Extensive quantitative evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art works in efficiency. We also present practical applications with our method in 3D, including large-scale deformable topological mapping and quadrotor optimal trajectory planning, to validate its capability and efficiency. The source code of our method will be released for the reference of the community.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种在任意杂乱的障碍物中有效生成大型、自由且有保证的凸空间的方法。我们的方法直接在点云上运行，避免了昂贵的计算，并在几毫秒内处理数千个点，这非常适合嵌入式平台。我们方法的基础是球体翻转，这是一种一对一可逆非线性变换，它将一组无序点映射到非线性空间。通过这些包裹点，我们获得了无碰撞的星形凸多面体。然后，利用星凸性，我们有效地将多胞形修改为凸形并保证其无障碍。广泛的定量评估表明，我们的方法在效率方面显着优于最先进的方法。我们还展示了我们的方法在 3D 中的实际应用，包括大规模可变形拓扑映射和四旋翼最佳轨迹规划，以验证其能力和效率。我们的方法的源代码将被发布以供社区参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种直接在点云上高效生成大尺度无碰撞凸多面体的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂障碍物环境中生成凸空间效率低下，难以满足嵌入式平台实时性需求。
AI.method: 基于球面翻转的非线性变换，将无序点云映射到非线性空间，构建星形凸多面体并优化为无碰撞凸多面体。
AI.result: 在效率上显著优于现有方法，并成功应用于三维变形拓扑映射和四旋翼最优轨迹规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过非线性变换和星形凸性优化，实现了高效可靠的凸空间生成，代码开源便于社区应用验证。

authors_text: Pavlos Avgoustinakis,Giorgos Kordopatis-Zilos,Symeon Papadopoulos,Andreas L. Symeonidis,Ioannis Kompatsiaris
title: Audio-based Near-Duplicate Video Retrieval with Audio Similarity Learning
title_zh: 具有音频相似性学习的基于音频的近似重复视频检索
abstract: In this work, we address the problem of audio-based near-duplicate video retrieval. We propose the Audio Similarity Learning (AuSiL) approach that effectively captures temporal patterns of audio similarity between video pairs. For the robust similarity calculation between two videos, we first extract representative audio-based video descriptors by leveraging transfer learning based on a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) trained on a large scale dataset of audio events, and then we calculate the similarity matrix derived from the pairwise similarity of these descriptors. The similarity matrix is subsequently fed to a CNN network that captures the temporal structures existing within its content. We train our network following a triplet generation process and optimizing the triplet loss function. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we have manually annotated two publicly available video datasets based on the audio duplicity between their videos. The proposed approach achieves very competitive results compared to three state-of-the-art methods. Also, unlike the competing methods, it is very robust to the retrieval of audio duplicates generated with speed transformations.
summary: In this work, we address the problem of audio-based near-duplicate video retrieval. We propose the Audio Similarity Learning (AuSiL) approach that effectively captures temporal patterns of audio similarity between video pairs. For the robust similarity calculation between two videos, we first extract representative audio-based video descriptors by leveraging transfer learning based on a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) trained on a large scale dataset of audio events, and then we calculate the similarity matrix derived from the pairwise similarity of these descriptors. The similarity matrix is subsequently fed to a CNN network that captures the temporal structures existing within its content. We train our network following a triplet generation process and optimizing the triplet loss function. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we have manually annotated two publicly available video datasets based on the audio duplicity between their videos. The proposed approach achieves very competitive results compared to three state-of-the-art methods. Also, unlike the competing methods, it is very robust to the retrieval of audio duplicates generated with speed transformations.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了基于音频的近重复视频检索问题。我们提出了音频相似性学习（AuSiL）方法，可以有效地捕获视频对之间音频相似性的时间模式。为了两个视频之间的鲁棒相似度计算，我们首先利用基于在大规模音频事件数据集上训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）的迁移学习来提取代表性的基于音频的视频描述符，然后我们计算从这些描述符的成对相似度导出的相似度矩阵。随后，相似性矩阵被馈送到 CNN 网络，该网络捕获其内容中存在的时间结构。我们按照三元组生成过程并优化三元组损失函数来训练我们的网络。为了评估所提出方法的有效性，我们根据视频之间的音频重复性手动注释了两个公开可用的视频数据集。与三种最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法取得了非常有竞争力的结果。此外，与竞争方法不同，它对于检索通过速度转换生成的音频副本非常稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频相似性学习（AuSiL）的方法，用于通过音频信息检索近似重复视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理音频生成的近似重复视频时存在鲁棒性不足的问题，尤其对速度变换敏感，需改进音频特征提取与相似性计算。
AI.method: 利用预训练CNN提取音频特征生成视频描述符，构建相似性矩阵并输入CNN捕捉时序结构，通过三元组损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上优于三种最先进方法，且对速度变换生成的音频副本具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AuSiL通过时序建模和三元组优化有效提升了音频驱动的近似重复视频检索性能。

search_text: Audio-based Near-Duplicate Video Retrieval with Audio Similarity Learning 具有音频相似性学习的基于音频的近似重复视频检索 In this work, we address the problem of audio-based near-duplicate video retrieval. We propose the Audio Similarity Learning (AuSiL) approach that effectively captures temporal patterns of audio similarity between video pairs. For the robust similarity calculation between two videos, we first extract representative audio-based video descriptors by leveraging transfer learning based on a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) trained on a large scale dataset of audio events, and then we calculate the similarity matrix derived from the pairwise similarity of these descriptors. The similarity matrix is subsequently fed to a CNN network that captures the temporal structures existing within its content. We train our network following a triplet generation process and optimizing the triplet loss function. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we have manually annotated two publicly available video datasets based on the audio duplicity between their videos. The proposed approach achieves very competitive results compared to three state-of-the-art methods. Also, unlike the competing methods, it is very robust to the retrieval of audio duplicates generated with speed transformations. 在这项工作中，我们解决了基于音频的近重复视频检索问题。我们提出了音频相似性学习（AuSiL）方法，可以有效地捕获视频对之间音频相似性的时间模式。为了两个视频之间的鲁棒相似度计算，我们首先利用基于在大规模音频事件数据集上训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）的迁移学习来提取代表性的基于音频的视频描述符，然后我们计算从这些描述符的成对相似度导出的相似度矩阵。随后，相似性矩阵被馈送到 CNN 网络，该网络捕获其内容中存在的时间结构。我们按照三元组生成过程并优化三元组损失函数来训练我们的网络。为了评估所提出方法的有效性，我们根据视频之间的音频重复性手动注释了两个公开可用的视频数据集。与三种最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法取得了非常有竞争力的结果。此外，与竞争方法不同，它对于检索通过速度转换生成的音频副本非常稳健。 本文提出了一种基于音频相似性学习（AuSiL）的方法，用于通过音频信息检索近似重复视频。 Pavlos Avgoustinakis,Giorgos Kordopatis-Zilos,Symeon Papadopoulos,Andreas L. Symeonidis,Ioannis Kompatsiaris cs.MM,cs.IR,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Picture-to-Amount (PITA): Predicting Relative Ingredient Amounts from Food Images
title_zh: 图片到数量 (PITA)：根据食品图像预测相对成分含量
abstract: Increased awareness of the impact of food consumption on health and lifestyle today has given rise to novel data-driven food analysis systems. Although these systems may recognize the ingredients, a detailed analysis of their amounts in the meal, which is paramount for estimating the correct nutrition, is usually ignored. In this paper, we study the novel and challenging problem of predicting the relative amount of each ingredient from a food image. We propose PITA, the Picture-to-Amount deep learning architecture to solve the problem. More specifically, we predict the ingredient amounts using a domain-driven Wasserstein loss from image-to-recipe cross-modal embeddings learned to align the two views of food data. Experiments on a dataset of recipes collected from the Internet show the model generates promising results and improves the baselines on this challenging task. A demo of our system and our data is availableat: foodai.cs.rutgers.edu.
summary: Increased awareness of the impact of food consumption on health and lifestyle today has given rise to novel data-driven food analysis systems. Although these systems may recognize the ingredients, a detailed analysis of their amounts in the meal, which is paramount for estimating the correct nutrition, is usually ignored. In this paper, we study the novel and challenging problem of predicting the relative amount of each ingredient from a food image. We propose PITA, the Picture-to-Amount deep learning architecture to solve the problem. More specifically, we predict the ingredient amounts using a domain-driven Wasserstein loss from image-to-recipe cross-modal embeddings learned to align the two views of food data. Experiments on a dataset of recipes collected from the Internet show the model generates promising results and improves the baselines on this challenging task. A demo of our system and our data is availableat: foodai.cs.rutgers.edu.
abstract_zh: 如今，人们越来越认识到食品消费对健康和生活方式的影响，从而催生了新型数据驱动的食品分析系统。尽管这些系统可以识别成分，但通常会忽略对膳食中成分含量的详细分析，这对于估计正确的营养至关重要。在本文中，我们研究了从食物图像中预测每种成分的相对含量的新颖且具有挑战性的问题。我们提出 PITA，Picture-to-Amount 深度学习架构来解决这个问题。更具体地说，我们使用领域驱动的 Wasserstein 损失来预测成分量，该损失来自图像到菜谱的跨模态嵌入，学会了对齐食品数据的两个视图。对从互联网收集的食谱数据集进行的实验表明，该模型产生了有希望的结果，并改善了这项具有挑战性的任务的基线。我们的系统和数据的演示可在以下网址获得：foodai.cs.rutgers.edu。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PITA的深度学习架构，用于从食物图像中预测每种食材的相对用量。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有系统能识别食材，但忽略对其用量的详细分析，而用量对营养估算至关重要。
AI.method: 通过域驱动的Wasserstein损失函数，利用图像与食谱的跨模态嵌入对齐食物数据的两种视角，预测食材用量。
AI.result: 在从互联网收集的食谱数据集上实验表明，该模型在挑战性任务中优于基线方法，结果令人鼓舞。
AI.conclusion: PITA有效解决了从图像预测食材用量的问题，为营养分析提供了新工具，并提供了系统演示和数据集。

title: A Corpus for English-Japanese Multimodal Neural Machine Translation with Comparable Sentences
title_zh: 具有可比句的英日多模态神经机器翻译语料库
abstract: Multimodal neural machine translation (NMT) has become an increasingly important area of research over the years because additional modalities, such as image data, can provide more context to textual data. Furthermore, the viability of training multimodal NMT models without a large parallel corpus continues to be investigated due to low availability of parallel sentences with images, particularly for English-Japanese data. However, this void can be filled with comparable sentences that contain bilingual terms and parallel phrases, which are naturally created through media such as social network posts and e-commerce product descriptions. In this paper, we propose a new multimodal English-Japanese corpus with comparable sentences that are compiled from existing image captioning datasets. In addition, we supplement our comparable sentences with a smaller parallel corpus for validation and test purposes. To test the performance of this comparable sentence translation scenario, we train several baseline NMT models with our comparable corpus and evaluate their English-Japanese translation performance. Due to low translation scores in our baseline experiments, we believe that current multimodal NMT models are not designed to effectively utilize comparable sentence data. Despite this, we hope for our corpus to be used to further research into multimodal NMT with comparable sentences.
summary: Multimodal neural machine translation (NMT) has become an increasingly important area of research over the years because additional modalities, such as image data, can provide more context to textual data. Furthermore, the viability of training multimodal NMT models without a large parallel corpus continues to be investigated due to low availability of parallel sentences with images, particularly for English-Japanese data. However, this void can be filled with comparable sentences that contain bilingual terms and parallel phrases, which are naturally created through media such as social network posts and e-commerce product descriptions. In this paper, we propose a new multimodal English-Japanese corpus with comparable sentences that are compiled from existing image captioning datasets. In addition, we supplement our comparable sentences with a smaller parallel corpus for validation and test purposes. To test the performance of this comparable sentence translation scenario, we train several baseline NMT models with our comparable corpus and evaluate their English-Japanese translation performance. Due to low translation scores in our baseline experiments, we believe that current multimodal NMT models are not designed to effectively utilize comparable sentence data. Despite this, we hope for our corpus to be used to further research into multimodal NMT with comparable sentences.
abstract_zh: 多年来，多模态神经机器翻译 (NMT) 已成为一个日益重要的研究领域，因为图像数据等附加模态可以为文本数据提供更多上下文。此外，由于带有图像的并行句子的可用性较低，特别是对于英语-日语数据，在没有大型并行语料库的情况下训练多模态 NMT 模型的可行性仍在研究中。然而，这个空白可以用包含双语术语和平行短语的类似句子来填补，这些句子是通过社交网络帖子和电子商务产品描述等媒体自然创建的。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的多模态英语-日语语料库，其中包含从现有图像字幕数据集编译而来的可比句子。此外，我们还使用较小的平行语料库来补充可比较的句子，以进行验证和测试。为了测试这种可比句子翻译场景的性能，我们使用可比语料库训练了几个基线 NMT 模型，并评估了它们的英日翻译性能。由于我们的基线实验中翻译得分较低，我们认为当前的多模态 NMT 模型并未设计为有效利用可比较的句子数据。尽管如此，我们希望我们的语料库能够用于进一步研究具有可比句子的多模态 NMT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于可比句子的英日多模态神经机器翻译语料库，并验证其在翻译任务中的效果。
AI.motivation: 由于英日平行语料稀缺且构建成本高，研究者尝试利用社交媒体和电商描述中自然生成的可比句子替代平行语料，以推动多模态神经机器翻译的发展。
AI.method: 从现有图像描述数据集中筛选可比句子构建语料库，并补充少量平行语料用于验证；训练多个基线模型评估翻译性能。
AI.result: 基线模型在翻译任务中表现不佳，表明当前多模态NMT模型未能有效利用可比句子数据。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库可为未来研究多模态NMT中可比句子的应用提供基础，但需改进模型设计以更好利用此类数据。

conclusion: 该语料库可为未来研究多模态NMT中可比句子的应用提供基础，但需改进模型设计以更好利用此类数据。
search_text: A Corpus for English-Japanese Multimodal Neural Machine Translation with Comparable Sentences 具有可比句的英日多模态神经机器翻译语料库 Multimodal neural machine translation (NMT) has become an increasingly important area of research over the years because additional modalities, such as image data, can provide more context to textual data. Furthermore, the viability of training multimodal NMT models without a large parallel corpus continues to be investigated due to low availability of parallel sentences with images, particularly for English-Japanese data. However, this void can be filled with comparable sentences that contain bilingual terms and parallel phrases, which are naturally created through media such as social network posts and e-commerce product descriptions. In this paper, we propose a new multimodal English-Japanese corpus with comparable sentences that are compiled from existing image captioning datasets. In addition, we supplement our comparable sentences with a smaller parallel corpus for validation and test purposes. To test the performance of this comparable sentence translation scenario, we train several baseline NMT models with our comparable corpus and evaluate their English-Japanese translation performance. Due to low translation scores in our baseline experiments, we believe that current multimodal NMT models are not designed to effectively utilize comparable sentence data. Despite this, we hope for our corpus to be used to further research into multimodal NMT with comparable sentences. 多年来，多模态神经机器翻译 (NMT) 已成为一个日益重要的研究领域，因为图像数据等附加模态可以为文本数据提供更多上下文。此外，由于带有图像的并行句子的可用性较低，特别是对于英语-日语数据，在没有大型并行语料库的情况下训练多模态 NMT 模型的可行性仍在研究中。然而，这个空白可以用包含双语术语和平行短语的类似句子来填补，这些句子是通过社交网络帖子和电子商务产品描述等媒体自然创建的。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的多模态英语-日语语料库，其中包含从现有图像字幕数据集编译而来的可比句子。此外，我们还使用较小的平行语料库来补充可比较的句子，以进行验证和测试。为了测试这种可比句子翻译场景的性能，我们使用可比语料库训练了几个基线 NMT 模型，并评估了它们的英日翻译性能。由于我们的基线实验中翻译得分较低，我们认为当前的多模态 NMT 模型并未设计为有效利用可比较的句子数据。尽管如此，我们希望我们的语料库能够用于进一步研究具有可比句子的多模态 NMT。 本文提出一个基于可比句子的英日多模态神经机器翻译语料库，并验证其在翻译任务中的效果。 Andrew Merritt,Chenhui Chu,Yuki Arase cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jun Wan,Zhihui Lai,Jun Liu,Jie Zhou,Can Gao
title: Robust Face Alignment by Multi-order High-precision Hourglass Network
title_zh: 通过多阶高精度沙漏网络实现鲁棒人脸对齐
comment: Accep by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2020.10.14
comments: Accep by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2020.10.14
abstract: Heatmap regression (HR) has become one of the mainstream approaches for face alignment and has obtained promising results under constrained environments. However, when a face image suffers from large pose variations, heavy occlusions and complicated illuminations, the performances of HR methods degrade greatly due to the low resolutions of the generated landmark heatmaps and the exclusion of important high-order information that can be used to learn more discriminative features. To address the alignment problem for faces with extremely large poses and heavy occlusions, this paper proposes a heatmap subpixel regression (HSR) method and a multi-order cross geometry-aware (MCG) model, which are seamlessly integrated into a novel multi-order high-precision hourglass network (MHHN). The HSR method is proposed to achieve high-precision landmark detection by a well-designed subpixel detection loss (SDL) and subpixel detection technology (SDT). At the same time, the MCG model is able to use the proposed multi-order cross information to learn more discriminative representations for enhancing facial geometric constraints and context information. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore heatmap subpixel regression for robust and high-precision face alignment. The experimental results from challenging benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in the literature.
summary: Heatmap regression (HR) has become one of the mainstream approaches for face alignment and has obtained promising results under constrained environments. However, when a face image suffers from large pose variations, heavy occlusions and complicated illuminations, the performances of HR methods degrade greatly due to the low resolutions of the generated landmark heatmaps and the exclusion of important high-order information that can be used to learn more discriminative features. To address the alignment problem for faces with extremely large poses and heavy occlusions, this paper proposes a heatmap subpixel regression (HSR) method and a multi-order cross geometry-aware (MCG) model, which are seamlessly integrated into a novel multi-order high-precision hourglass network (MHHN). The HSR method is proposed to achieve high-precision landmark detection by a well-designed subpixel detection loss (SDL) and subpixel detection technology (SDT). At the same time, the MCG model is able to use the proposed multi-order cross information to learn more discriminative representations for enhancing facial geometric constraints and context information. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore heatmap subpixel regression for robust and high-precision face alignment. The experimental results from challenging benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in the literature.
abstract_zh: 热图回归（HR）已成为人脸对齐的主流方法之一，并在受限环境下取得了可喜的结果。然而，当人脸图像存在较大的姿势变化、严重的遮挡和复杂的照明时，由于生成的地标热图的分辨率较低，并且排除了可用于学习更多判别性特征的重要高阶信息，HR方法的性能会大大降低。为了解决具有极大姿态和严重遮挡的人脸对齐问题，本文提出了热图子像素回归（HSR）方法和多阶交叉几何感知（MCG）模型，并将其无缝集成到新型多阶高精度沙漏网络（MHHN）中。提出HSR方法，通过精心设计的子像素检测损失（SDL）和子像素检测技术（SDT）来实现高精度地标检测。同时，MCG 模型能够使用所提出的多阶交叉信息来学习更具区分性的表示，以增强面部几何约束和上下文信息。据我们所知，这是第一项探索热图亚像素回归以实现稳健且高精度的人脸对齐的研究。具有挑战性的基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于文献中最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶高精度hourglass网络（MHHN），用于解决极端姿态和遮挡下的鲁棒人脸对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统热图回归方法在大姿态、强遮挡和复杂光照下表现不佳，主要受限于低分辨率热图和高阶信息缺失。
AI.method: 设计热图子像素回归（HSR）方法结合多阶跨几何感知（MCG）模型，通过子像素检测损失（SDL）和子像素检测技术（SDT）提升精度，并利用多阶跨信息增强几何约束与上下文特征。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的基准数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将热图子像素回归应用于人脸对齐，提出的MHHN在极端条件下实现了更鲁棒和高精度的对齐效果。

authors_text: Pengbo Zhao,Zhenshen Qu,Yingjia Bu,Wenming Tan,Ye Ren,Shiliang Pu
title: PolarDet: A Fast, More Precise Detector for Rotated Target in Aerial Images
title_zh: PolarDet：一种快速、更精确的航空图像旋转目标探测器
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Fast and precise object detection for high-resolution aerial images has been a challenging task over the years. Due to the sharp variations on object scale, rotation, and aspect ratio, most existing methods are inefficient and imprecise. In this paper, we represent the oriented objects by polar method in polar coordinate and propose PolarDet, a fast and accurate one-stage object detector based on that representation. Our detector introduces a sub-pixel center semantic structure to further improve classifying veracity. PolarDet achieves nearly all SOTA performance in aerial object detection tasks with faster inference speed. In detail, our approach obtains the SOTA results on DOTA, UCAS-AOD, HRSC with 76.64\% mAP, 97.01\% mAP, and 90.46\% mAP respectively. Most noticeably, our PolarDet gets the best performance and reaches the fastest speed(32fps) at the UCAS-AOD dataset.
summary: Fast and precise object detection for high-resolution aerial images has been a challenging task over the years. Due to the sharp variations on object scale, rotation, and aspect ratio, most existing methods are inefficient and imprecise. In this paper, we represent the oriented objects by polar method in polar coordinate and propose PolarDet, a fast and accurate one-stage object detector based on that representation. Our detector introduces a sub-pixel center semantic structure to further improve classifying veracity. PolarDet achieves nearly all SOTA performance in aerial object detection tasks with faster inference speed. In detail, our approach obtains the SOTA results on DOTA, UCAS-AOD, HRSC with 76.64\% mAP, 97.01\% mAP, and 90.46\% mAP respectively. Most noticeably, our PolarDet gets the best performance and reaches the fastest speed(32fps) at the UCAS-AOD dataset.
abstract_zh: 多年来，快速、精确地检测高分辨率航空图像的目标一直是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于对象尺度、旋转和纵横比的急剧变化，大多数现有方法效率低下且不精确。在本文中，我们用极坐标方法表示定向物体，并提出了 PolarDet，一种基于该表示的快速、准确的单级物体检测器。我们的检测器引入了子像素中心语义结构，以进一步提高分类准确性。 PolarDet 以更快的推理速度实现了空中物体检测任务中几乎所有的 SOTA 性能。具体来说，我们的方法在 DOTA、UCAS-AOD、HRSC 上获得了 SOTA 结果，分别为 76.64% mAP、97.01% mAP 和 90.46% mAP。最值得注意的是，我们的 PolarDet 在 UCAS-AOD 数据集上获得了最佳性能并达到最快速度（32fps）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PolarDet的快速且精确的旋转目标检测器，专门用于高分辨率航拍图像中的目标检测。
AI.motivation: 由于航拍图像中目标的尺度、旋转角度和长宽比差异显著，现有方法在效率和精度上存在不足，亟需改进。
AI.method: 通过极坐标表示旋转目标，提出PolarDet单阶段检测器，并引入亚像素中心语义结构以提升分类准确性。
AI.result: 在DOTA、UCAS-AOD和HRSC数据集上分别达到76.64%、97.01%和90.46%的mAP，且在UCAS-AOD数据集上以32fps的速度达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: PolarDet在航拍目标检测任务中实现了最先进的性能，兼顾了检测速度与精度，为相关领域提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaogang Wang,Marcelo H Ang Jr,Gim Hee Lee
title: Cascaded Refinement Network for Point Cloud Completion with Self-supervision
title_zh: 用于具有自我监督功能的点云补全的级联细化网络
comment: Accepted by PAMI. Extended version of the following paper: Cascaded Refinement Network for Point Cloud Completion. CVPR 2020. arXiv link: arXiv:2004.03327
comments: Accepted by PAMI. Extended version of the following paper: Cascaded Refinement Network for Point Cloud Completion. CVPR 2020. arXiv link: arXiv:2004.03327
abstract: Point clouds are often sparse and incomplete, which imposes difficulties for real-world applications. Existing shape completion methods tend to generate rough shapes without fine-grained details. Considering this, we introduce a two-branch network for shape completion. The first branch is a cascaded shape completion sub-network to synthesize complete objects, where we propose to use the partial input together with the coarse output to preserve the object details during the dense point reconstruction. The second branch is an auto-encoder to reconstruct the original partial input. The two branches share a same feature extractor to learn an accurate global feature for shape completion. Furthermore, we propose two strategies to enable the training of our network when ground truth data are not available. This is to mitigate the dependence of existing approaches on large amounts of ground truth training data that are often difficult to obtain in real-world applications. Additionally, our proposed strategies are also able to improve the reconstruction quality for fully supervised learning. We verify our approach in self-supervised, semi-supervised and fully supervised settings with superior performances. Quantitative and qualitative results on different datasets demonstrate that our method achieves more realistic outputs than state-of-the-art approaches on the point cloud completion task.
summary: Point clouds are often sparse and incomplete, which imposes difficulties for real-world applications. Existing shape completion methods tend to generate rough shapes without fine-grained details. Considering this, we introduce a two-branch network for shape completion. The first branch is a cascaded shape completion sub-network to synthesize complete objects, where we propose to use the partial input together with the coarse output to preserve the object details during the dense point reconstruction. The second branch is an auto-encoder to reconstruct the original partial input. The two branches share a same feature extractor to learn an accurate global feature for shape completion. Furthermore, we propose two strategies to enable the training of our network when ground truth data are not available. This is to mitigate the dependence of existing approaches on large amounts of ground truth training data that are often difficult to obtain in real-world applications. Additionally, our proposed strategies are also able to improve the reconstruction quality for fully supervised learning. We verify our approach in self-supervised, semi-supervised and fully supervised settings with superior performances. Quantitative and qualitative results on different datasets demonstrate that our method achieves more realistic outputs than state-of-the-art approaches on the point cloud completion task.
abstract_zh: 点云通常稀疏且不完整，这给实际应用带来了困难。现有的形状完成方法往往会生成没有细粒度细节的粗糙形状。考虑到这一点，我们引入了一个两分支网络来完成形状。第一个分支是用于合成完整对象的级联形状完成子网络，我们建议在密集点重建期间使用部分输入和粗略输出来保留对象细节。第二个分支是自动编码器，用于重建原始部分输入。这两个分支共享相同的特征提取器，以学习准确的全局特征以完成形状。此外，我们提出了两种策略，以便在地面实况数据不可用时能够训练我们的网络。这是为了减轻现有方法对大量地面实况训练数据的依赖，而这些数据在现实应用中通常很难获得。此外，我们提出的策略还能够提高完全监督学习的重建质量。我们在自监督、半监督和完全监督环境中验证了我们的方法，并具有卓越的性能。不同数据集的定量和定性结果表明，我们的方法在点云完成任务上比最先进的方法实现了更现实的输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督的级联 refinement 网络，用于点云补全任务，以解决现有方法在细节保留和数据依赖性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法生成的形状粗糙且缺乏细节，且依赖大量标注数据，而实际应用中此类数据难以获取。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络：第一分支为级联补全子网络，结合部分输入与粗粒度输出以保留细节；第二分支为自编码器重构输入。共享特征提取器学习全局特征，并提出两种策略实现无监督训练。
AI.result: 在自监督、半监督和全监督设置下均取得优异性能，多个数据集的定量与定性结果表明其输出比现有方法更真实。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过双分支结构与自监督策略有效提升了点云补全的细节精度，降低了对标注数据的依赖性。

title: Understanding Information Processing in Human Brain by Interpreting Machine Learning Models
title_zh: 通过解释机器学习模型来了解人脑的信息处理
comment: Defended on September 22, 2020 (video recording at https://www.uttv.ee/naita?id=30480). Supervisor: Dr. Raul Vicente Zafra (Computational Neuroscience Lab, University of Tarty, Estonia). Opponents: Dr. Fabian Sinz (IRG Neuronal Intelligence, University of Tübingen, Germany), Dr. Tim C Kietzmann (Donders Institute for Brain, Cognition and Behaviour, Radboud University, Netherlands)
comments: Defended on September 22, 2020 (video recording at https://www.uttv.ee/naita?id=30480). Supervisor: Dr. Raul Vicente Zafra (Computational Neuroscience Lab, University of Tarty, Estonia). Opponents: Dr. Fabian Sinz (IRG Neuronal Intelligence, University of Tübingen, Germany), Dr. Tim C Kietzmann (Donders Institute for Brain, Cognition and Behaviour, Radboud University, Netherlands)
abstract: The thesis explores the role machine learning methods play in creating intuitive computational models of neural processing. Combined with interpretability techniques, machine learning could replace human modeler and shift the focus of human effort to extracting the knowledge from the ready-made models and articulating that knowledge into intuitive descroptions of reality. This perspective makes the case in favor of the larger role that exploratory and data-driven approach to computational neuroscience could play while coexisting alongside the traditional hypothesis-driven approach. We exemplify the proposed approach in the context of the knowledge representation taxonomy with three research projects that employ interpretability techniques on top of machine learning methods at three different levels of neural organization. The first study (Chapter 3) explores feature importance analysis of a random forest decoder trained on intracerebral recordings from 100 human subjects to identify spectrotemporal signatures that characterize local neural activity during the task of visual categorization. The second study (Chapter 4) employs representation similarity analysis to compare the neural responses of the areas along the ventral stream with the activations of the layers of a deep convolutional neural network. The third study (Chapter 5) proposes a method that allows test subjects to visually explore the state representation of their neural signal in real time. This is achieved by using a topology-preserving dimensionality reduction technique that allows to transform the neural data from the multidimensional representation used by the computer into a two-dimensional representation a human can grasp. The approach, the taxonomy, and the examples, present a strong case for the applicability of machine learning methods to automatic knowledge discovery in neuroscience.

Combined with interpretability techniques, machine learning could replace human modeler and shift the focus of human effort to extracting the knowledge from the ready-made models and articulating that knowledge into intuitive descroptions of reality. This perspective makes the case in favor of the larger role that exploratory and data-driven approach to computational neuroscience could play while coexisting alongside the traditional hypothesis-driven approach. We exemplify the proposed approach in the context of the knowledge representation taxonomy with three research projects that employ interpretability techniques on top of machine learning methods at three different levels of neural organization. The first study (Chapter 3) explores feature importance analysis of a random forest decoder trained on intracerebral recordings from 100 human subjects to identify spectrotemporal signatures that characterize local neural activity during the task of visual categorization. The second study (Chapter 4) employs representation similarity analysis to compare the neural responses of the areas along the ventral stream with the activations of the layers of a deep convolutional neural network. The third study (Chapter 5) proposes a method that allows test subjects to visually explore the state representation of their neural signal in real time. This is achieved by using a topology-preserving dimensionality reduction technique that allows to transform the neural data from the multidimensional representation used by the computer into a two-dimensional representation a human can grasp. The approach, the taxonomy, and the examples, present a strong case for the applicability of machine learning methods to automatic knowledge discovery in neuroscience.
abstract_zh: 本论文探讨了机器学习方法在创建直观的神经处理计算模型中所发挥的作用。与可解释性技术相结合，机器学习可以取代人类建模者，并将人类工作的重点转移到从现成的模型中提取知识，并将这些知识阐明为对现实的直观描述。这种观点支持探索性和数据驱动的计算神经科学方法在与传统的假设驱动方法共存的同时可以发挥更大的作用。我们通过三个研究项目在知识表示分类学的背景下举例说明了所提出的方法，这些项目在三个不同神经组织级别的机器学习方法之上采用了可解释性技术。第一项研究（第 3 章）探索了随机森林解码器的特征重要性分析，该解码器对 100 名人类受试者的脑内记录进行训练，以识别表征视觉分类任务期间局部神经活动的光谱时间特征。第二项研究（第 4 章）采用表示相似性分析来比较沿腹侧流区域的神经响应与深度卷积神经网络各层的激活。第三项研究（第 5 章）提出了一种方法，允许测试对象实时直观地探索其神经信号的状态表示。这是通过使用拓扑保持降维技术来实现的，该技术允许将神经数据从计算机使用的多维表示转换为人类可以掌握的二维表示。该方法、分类法和示例为机器学习方法在神经科学中自动知识发现的适用性提供了强有力的案例。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过结合机器学习与可解释性技术，构建人类神经处理的计算模型，并在不同神经层级验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统假设驱动的神经科学研究存在局限，需借助数据驱动方法提升知识发现效率，机器学习可替代人工建模并辅助知识提取。
AI.method: 通过三个研究项目验证：1) 使用随机森林分析脑电特征重要性；2) 用表示相似性分析比较神经反应与CNN层激活；3) 拓扑保持降维技术实现神经信号实时可视化。
AI.result: 在视觉分类任务中识别出神经活动的时频特征，揭示了神经通路与CNN结构的相似性，并实现了神经状态的直观可视化。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法可有效辅助神经科学知识发现，数据驱动与传统方法应协同推进计算神经科学研究。

authors_text: Linchen Qian,Jiasong Chen,Timur Urakov,Weiyong Gu,Liang Liang
title: CQ-VAE: Coordinate Quantized VAE for Uncertainty Estimation with Application to Disk Shape Analysis from Lumbar Spine MRI Images
title_zh: CQ-VAE：协调量化 VAE 进行不确定性估计，并应用于腰椎 MRI 图像的椎间盘形状分析
comment: This paper is accepted by 19th IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA2020)
comments: This paper is accepted by 19th IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA2020)
abstract: Ambiguity is inevitable in medical images, which often results in different image interpretations (e.g. object boundaries or segmentation maps) from different human experts. Thus, a model that learns the ambiguity and outputs a probability distribution of the target, would be valuable for medical applications to assess the uncertainty of diagnosis. In this paper, we propose a powerful generative model to learn a representation of ambiguity and to generate probabilistic outputs. Our model, named Coordinate Quantization Variational Autoencoder (CQ-VAE) employs a discrete latent space with an internal discrete probability distribution by quantizing the coordinates of a continuous latent space. As a result, the output distribution from CQ-VAE is discrete. During training, Gumbel-Softmax sampling is used to enable backpropagation through the discrete latent space. A matching algorithm is used to establish the correspondence between model-generated samples and "ground-truth" samples, which makes a trade-off between the ability to generate new samples and the ability to represent training samples. Besides these probabilistic components to generate possible outputs, our model has a deterministic path to output the best estimation. We demonstrated our method on a lumbar disk image dataset, and the results show that our CQ-VAE can learn lumbar disk shape variation and uncertainty.
summary: Ambiguity is inevitable in medical images, which often results in different image interpretations (e.g. object boundaries or segmentation maps) from different human experts. Thus, a model that learns the ambiguity and outputs a probability distribution of the target, would be valuable for medical applications to assess the uncertainty of diagnosis. In this paper, we propose a powerful generative model to learn a representation of ambiguity and to generate probabilistic outputs. Our model, named Coordinate Quantization Variational Autoencoder (CQ-VAE) employs a discrete latent space with an internal discrete probability distribution by quantizing the coordinates of a continuous latent space. As a result, the output distribution from CQ-VAE is discrete. During training, Gumbel-Softmax sampling is used to enable backpropagation through the discrete latent space. A matching algorithm is used to establish the correspondence between model-generated samples and "ground-truth" samples, which makes a trade-off between the ability to generate new samples and the ability to represent training samples. Besides these probabilistic components to generate possible outputs, our model has a deterministic path to output the best estimation. We demonstrated our method on a lumbar disk image dataset, and the results show that our CQ-VAE can learn lumbar disk shape variation and uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 医学图像中的模糊性是不可避免的，这通常会导致不同的人类专家产生不同的图像解释（例如对象边界或分割图）。因此，学习模糊性并输出目标概率分布的模型对于医学应用评估诊断的不确定性将很有价值。在本文中，我们提出了一个强大的生成模型来学习歧义的表示并生成概率输出。我们的模型名为坐标量化变分自动编码器（CQ-VAE），通过量化连续潜在空间的坐标，采用具有内部离散概率分布的离散潜在空间。因此，CQ-V​​AE 的输出分布是离散的。在训练期间，Gumbel-Softmax 采样用于实现通过离散潜在空间的反向传播。匹配算法用于建立模型生成的样本和“ground-truth”样本之间的对应关系，这在生成新样本的能力和表示训练样本的能力之间做出了权衡。除了这些生成可能输出的概率组件之外，我们的模型还具有输出最佳估计的确定性路径。我们在腰椎间盘图像数据集上演示了我们的方法，结果表明我们的 CQ-VAE 可以学习腰椎间盘形状变化和不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CQ-VAE的生成模型，用于学习医学图像中的歧义性并输出概率分布，应用于腰椎MRI图像的盘状形状分析。
AI.motivation: 医学图像存在不可避免的歧义性，不同专家可能产生不同解读，需通过模型量化诊断不确定性以提高可靠性。
AI.method: CQ-VAE通过量化连续潜在空间坐标构建离散潜在空间，结合Gumbel-Softmax采样实现离散空间反向传播，并利用匹配算法平衡生成新样本与表征训练样本的能力，同时保留确定性路径输出最佳估计。
AI.result: 在腰椎间盘图像数据集上验证，CQ-VAE能有效学习盘状形状变化及不确定性，生成结果与真实样本具有较高匹配度。
AI.conclusion: CQ-VAE通过离散潜在空间建模成功捕捉医学图像的不确定性，为腰椎盘状分析提供了兼具生成能力与表征能力的解决方案。

search_text: CQ-VAE: Coordinate Quantized VAE for Uncertainty Estimation with Application to Disk Shape Analysis from Lumbar Spine MRI Images CQ-VAE：协调量化 VAE 进行不确定性估计，并应用于腰椎 MRI 图像的椎间盘形状分析 Ambiguity is inevitable in medical images, which often results in different image interpretations (e.g. object boundaries or segmentation maps) from different human experts. Thus, a model that learns the ambiguity and outputs a probability distribution of the target, would be valuable for medical applications to assess the uncertainty of diagnosis. In this paper, we propose a powerful generative model to learn a representation of ambiguity and to generate probabilistic outputs. Our model, named Coordinate Quantization Variational Autoencoder (CQ-VAE) employs a discrete latent space with an internal discrete probability distribution by quantizing the coordinates of a continuous latent space. As a result, the output distribution from CQ-VAE is discrete. During training, Gumbel-Softmax sampling is used to enable backpropagation through the discrete latent space. A matching algorithm is used to establish the correspondence between model-generated samples and "ground-truth" samples, which makes a trade-off between the ability to generate new samples and the ability to represent training samples. Besides these probabilistic components to generate possible outputs, our model has a deterministic path to output the best estimation. We demonstrated our method on a lumbar disk image dataset, and the results show that our CQ-VAE can learn lumbar disk shape variation and uncertainty. 医学图像中的模糊性是不可避免的，这通常会导致不同的人类专家产生不同的图像解释（例如对象边界或分割图）。因此，学习模糊性并输出目标概率分布的模型对于医学应用评估诊断的不确定性将很有价值。在本文中，我们提出了一个强大的生成模型来学习歧义的表示并生成概率输出。我们的模型名为坐标量化变分自动编码器（CQ-VAE），通过量化连续潜在空间的坐标，采用具有内部离散概率分布的离散潜在空间。因此，CQ-V​​AE 的输出分布是离散的。在训练期间，Gumbel-Softmax 采样用于实现通过离散潜在空间的反向传播。匹配算法用于建立模型生成的样本和“ground-truth”样本之间的对应关系，这在生成新样本的能力和表示训练样本的能力之间做出了权衡。除了这些生成可能输出的概率组件之外，我们的模型还具有输出最佳估计的确定性路径。我们在腰椎间盘图像数据集上演示了我们的方法，结果表明我们的 CQ-VAE 可以学习腰椎间盘形状变化和不确定性。 本文提出一种名为CQ-VAE的生成模型，用于学习医学图像中的歧义性并输出概率分布，应用于腰椎MRI图像的盘状形状分析。 Linchen Qian,Jiasong Chen,Timur Urakov,Weiyong Gu,Liang Liang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Meng Cao,Yue Dong,Jiapeng Wu,Jackie Chi Kit Cheung
title: Factual Error Correction for Abstractive Summarization Models
title_zh: 抽象概括模型的事实错误校正
abstract: Neural abstractive summarization systems have achieved promising progress, thanks to the availability of large-scale datasets and models pre-trained with self-supervised methods. However, ensuring the factual consistency of the generated summaries for abstractive summarization systems is a challenge. We propose a post-editing corrector module to address this issue by identifying and correcting factual errors in generated summaries. The neural corrector model is pre-trained on artificial examples that are created by applying a series of heuristic transformations on reference summaries. These transformations are inspired by an error analysis of state-of-the-art summarization model outputs. Experimental results show that our model is able to correct factual errors in summaries generated by other neural summarization models and outperforms previous models on factual consistency evaluation on the CNN/DailyMail dataset. We also find that transferring from artificial error correction to downstream settings is still very challenging.
summary: Neural abstractive summarization systems have achieved promising progress, thanks to the availability of large-scale datasets and models pre-trained with self-supervised methods. However, ensuring the factual consistency of the generated summaries for abstractive summarization systems is a challenge. We propose a post-editing corrector module to address this issue by identifying and correcting factual errors in generated summaries. The neural corrector model is pre-trained on artificial examples that are created by applying a series of heuristic transformations on reference summaries. These transformations are inspired by an error analysis of state-of-the-art summarization model outputs. Experimental results show that our model is able to correct factual errors in summaries generated by other neural summarization models and outperforms previous models on factual consistency evaluation on the CNN/DailyMail dataset. We also find that transferring from artificial error correction to downstream settings is still very challenging.
abstract_zh: 由于使用自监督方法预训练的大规模数据集和模型的可用性，神经抽象摘要系统取得了可喜的进展。然而，确保抽象摘要系统生成的摘要的事实一致性是一个挑战。我们提出了一个后期编辑纠正器模块，通过识别和纠正生成的摘要中的事实错误来解决这个问题。神经校正器模型是在人工示例上进行预训练的，这些示例是通过对参考摘要应用一系列启发式转换而创建的。这些转换的灵感来自于对最先进的摘要模型输出的错误分析。实验结果表明，我们的模型能够纠正其他神经摘要模型生成的摘要中的事实错误，并且在 CNN/DailyMail 数据集上的事实一致性评估方面优于先前的模型。我们还发现，从人工纠错转移到下游设置仍然非常具有挑战性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种后编辑校正模块，用于修正神经网络抽取式摘要模型生成摘要中的事实错误。
AI.motivation: 尽管抽取式摘要模型取得进展，但生成摘要的事实一致性问题仍影响其可靠性，需针对性解决。
AI.method: 设计神经校正模型，通过启发式变换参考摘要生成人工错误示例进行预训练，识别并修正生成文本中的事实错误。
AI.result: 模型在CNN/DailyMail数据集的事实一致性评估中优于现有方法，但人工错误校正向实际应用迁移仍具挑战。
AI.conclusion: 事实错误校正有效，但需进一步研究如何提升模型在真实场景下的迁移能力与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hantao Huang,Tao Han,Wei Han,Deep Yap,Cheng-Ming Chiang
title: Answer-checking in Context: A Multi-modal FullyAttention Network for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 上下文中的答案检查：用于视觉问答的多模态 FullAttention 网络
comment: Accepted in ICPR2020
comments: Accepted in ICPR2020
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is challenging due to the complex cross-modal relations. It has received extensive attention from the research community. From the human perspective, to answer a visual question, one needs to read the question and then refer to the image to generate an answer. This answer will then be checked against the question and image again for the final confirmation. In this paper, we mimic this process and propose a fully attention based VQA architecture. Moreover, an answer-checking module is proposed to perform a unified attention on the jointly answer, question and image representation to update the answer. This mimics the human answer checking process to consider the answer in the context. With answer-checking modules and transferred BERT layers, our model achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy 71.57\% using fewer parameters on VQA-v2.0 test-standard split.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is challenging due to the complex cross-modal relations. It has received extensive attention from the research community. From the human perspective, to answer a visual question, one needs to read the question and then refer to the image to generate an answer. This answer will then be checked against the question and image again for the final confirmation. In this paper, we mimic this process and propose a fully attention based VQA architecture. Moreover, an answer-checking module is proposed to perform a unified attention on the jointly answer, question and image representation to update the answer. This mimics the human answer checking process to consider the answer in the context. With answer-checking modules and transferred BERT layers, our model achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy 71.57\% using fewer parameters on VQA-v2.0 test-standard split.
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的跨模态关系，视觉问答（VQA）具有挑战性。受到了研究界的广泛关注。从人类的角度来看，要回答视觉问题，需要阅读问题，然后参考图像来生成答案。然后将再次对照问题和图像检查该答案以进行最终确认。在本文中，我们模仿这个过程并提出了一个完全基于注意力的 VQA 架构。此外，提出了一个答案检查模块来对联合答案、问题和图像表示进行统一关注以更新答案。这模仿了人类答案检查过程，以在上下文中考虑答案。通过答案检查模块和转移的 BERT 层，我们的模型在 VQA-v2.0 测试标准分割上使用更少的参数实现了最先进的准确率 71.57%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态全注意力机制的视觉问答模型，通过模仿人类答案检查过程提升VQA任务性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉问答（VQA）因跨模态关系复杂而具有挑战性。人类在回答问题后会再次核对问题与图像，受此启发需设计能自检答案的模型。
AI.method: 构建全注意力架构，引入答案检查模块对答案、问题和图像联合表示进行统一注意力计算，结合迁移BERT层优化特征交互。
AI.result: 在VQA-v2.0测试集上以更少参数达到71.57%的最先进准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过模仿人类答案检查机制，模型能更充分结合上下文信息，有效提升VQA性能且保持参数效率。

motivation: 视觉问答（VQA）因跨模态关系复杂而具有挑战性。人类在回答问题后会再次核对问题与图像，受此启发需设计能自检答案的模型。
method: 构建全注意力架构，引入答案检查模块对答案、问题和图像联合表示进行统一注意力计算，结合迁移BERT层优化特征交互。
result: 在VQA-v2.0测试集上以更少参数达到71.57%的最先进准确率。
conclusion: 通过模仿人类答案检查机制，模型能更充分结合上下文信息，有效提升VQA性能且保持参数效率。
search_text: Answer-checking in Context: A Multi-modal FullyAttention Network for Visual Question Answering 上下文中的答案检查：用于视觉问答的多模态 FullAttention 网络 Visual Question Answering (VQA) is challenging due to the complex cross-modal relations. It has received extensive attention from the research community. From the human perspective, to answer a visual question, one needs to read the question and then refer to the image to generate an answer. This answer will then be checked against the question and image again for the final confirmation. In this paper, we mimic this process and propose a fully attention based VQA architecture. Moreover, an answer-checking module is proposed to perform a unified attention on the jointly answer, question and image representation to update the answer. This mimics the human answer checking process to consider the answer in the context. With answer-checking modules and transferred BERT layers, our model achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy 71.57\% using fewer parameters on VQA-v2.0 test-standard split. 由于复杂的跨模态关系，视觉问答（VQA）具有挑战性。受到了研究界的广泛关注。从人类的角度来看，要回答视觉问题，需要阅读问题，然后参考图像来生成答案。然后将再次对照问题和图像检查该答案以进行最终确认。在本文中，我们模仿这个过程并提出了一个完全基于注意力的 VQA 架构。此外，提出了一个答案检查模块来对联合答案、问题和图像表示进行统一关注以更新答案。这模仿了人类答案检查过程，以在上下文中考虑答案。通过答案检查模块和转移的 BERT 层，我们的模型在 VQA-v2.0 测试标准分割上使用更少的参数实现了最先进的准确率 71.57%。 本文提出一种基于多模态全注意力机制的视觉问答模型，通过模仿人类答案检查过程提升VQA任务性能。 Hantao Huang,Tao Han,Wei Han,Deep Yap,Cheng-Ming Chiang cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Ahmed H. Qureshi,Jiangeng Dong,Asfiya Baig,Michael C. Yip
title: Constrained Motion Planning Networks X
title_zh: 约束运动规划网络 X
comment: This is preprint version of a paper published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics. The videos, code, dataset and trained models can be found here: https://sites.google.com/view/compnetx/home
comments: This is preprint version of a paper published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics. The videos, code, dataset and trained models can be found here: https://sites.google.com/view/compnetx/home
abstract: Constrained motion planning is a challenging field of research, aiming for computationally efficient methods that can find a collision-free path on the constraint manifolds between a given start and goal configuration. These planning problems come up surprisingly frequently, such as in robot manipulation for performing daily life assistive tasks. However, few solutions to constrained motion planning are available, and those that exist struggle with high computational time complexity in finding a path solution on the manifolds. To address this challenge, we present Constrained Motion Planning Networks X (CoMPNetX). It is a neural planning approach, comprising a conditional deep neural generator and discriminator with neural gradients-based fast projection operator. We also introduce neural task and scene representations conditioned on which the CoMPNetX generates implicit manifold configurations to turbo-charge any underlying classical planner such as Sampling-based Motion Planning methods for quickly solving complex constrained planning tasks. We show that our method finds path solutions with high success rates and lower computation times than state-of-the-art traditional path-finding tools on various challenging scenarios.
summary: Constrained motion planning is a challenging field of research, aiming for computationally efficient methods that can find a collision-free path on the constraint manifolds between a given start and goal configuration. These planning problems come up surprisingly frequently, such as in robot manipulation for performing daily life assistive tasks. However, few solutions to constrained motion planning are available, and those that exist struggle with high computational time complexity in finding a path solution on the manifolds. To address this challenge, we present Constrained Motion Planning Networks X (CoMPNetX). It is a neural planning approach, comprising a conditional deep neural generator and discriminator with neural gradients-based fast projection operator. We also introduce neural task and scene representations conditioned on which the CoMPNetX generates implicit manifold configurations to turbo-charge any underlying classical planner such as Sampling-based Motion Planning methods for quickly solving complex constrained planning tasks. We show that our method finds path solutions with high success rates and lower computation times than state-of-the-art traditional path-finding tools on various challenging scenarios.
abstract_zh: 约束运动规划是一个具有挑战性的研究领域，旨在寻找计算有效的方法，可以在给定的起始配置和目标配置之间的约束流形上找到无碰撞路径。这些规划问题经常出现，例如在执行日常生活辅助任务的机器人操作中。然而，可用的约束运动规划解决方案很少，而且现有的解决方案在寻找流形上的路径解决方案时，计算时间复杂度很高。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了约束运动规划网络 X (CoMPNetX)。它是一种神经规划方法，由条件深度神经生成器和鉴别器以及基于神经梯度的快速投影算子组成。我们还引入了神经任务和场景表示，以 CoMPNetX 生成隐式流形配置为条件，以增强任何底层经典规划器，例如基于采样的运动规划方法，以快速解决复杂的约束规划任务。我们表明，我们的方法在各种具有挑战性的场景中比最先进的传统寻路工具找到的路径解决方案具有更高的成功率和更低的计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CoMPNetX的神经网络方法，用于解决约束运动规划中的高效路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统约束运动规划方法计算复杂度高，难以满足机器人日常辅助任务中频繁出现的实时路径规划需求。
AI.method: 设计包含条件生成器和判别器的神经网络架构，结合神经梯度投影算子与任务场景条件表示，增强经典采样规划算法性能。
AI.result: 在多种复杂约束场景中，CoMPNetX相较传统方法实现更高路径成功率与显著缩短的计算时间。
AI.conclusion: CoMPNetX通过神经网络与经典规划器的协同，为复杂约束环境下的运动规划提供了高效可行的新范式。
