title: Universal guarantees for decision tree induction via a higher-order splitting criterion
title_zh: 通过高阶分裂准则对决策树归纳的通用保证
abstract: We propose a simple extension of top-down decision tree learning heuristics such as ID3, C4.5, and CART. Our algorithm achieves provable guarantees for all target functions $f: \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$ with respect to the uniform distribution, circumventing impossibility results showing that existing heuristics fare poorly even for simple target functions. The crux of our extension is a new splitting criterion that takes into account the correlations between $f$ and small subsets of its attributes. The splitting criteria of existing heuristics (e.g. Gini impurity and information gain), in contrast, are based solely on the correlations between $f$ and its individual attributes. Our algorithm satisfies the following guarantee: for all target functions $f : \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$, sizes $s\in \mathbb{N}$, and error parameters $ε$, it constructs a decision tree of size $s^{\tilde{O}((\log s)^2/ε^2)}$ that achieves error $\le O(\mathsf{opt}_s) + ε$, where $\mathsf{opt}_s$ denotes the error of the optimal size $s$ decision tree. A key technical notion that drives our analysis is the noise stability of $f$, a well-studied smoothness measure.
summary: We propose a simple extension of top-down decision tree learning heuristics such as ID3, C4.5, and CART. Our algorithm achieves provable guarantees for all target functions $f: \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$ with respect to the uniform distribution, circumventing impossibility results showing that existing heuristics fare poorly even for simple target functions. The crux of our extension is a new splitting criterion that takes into account the correlations between $f$ and small subsets of its attributes. The splitting criteria of existing heuristics (e.g. Gini impurity and information gain), in contrast, are based solely on the correlations between $f$ and its individual attributes. Our algorithm satisfies the following guarantee: for all target functions $f : \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$, sizes $s\in \mathbb{N}$, and error parameters $ε$, it constructs a decision tree of size $s^{\tilde{O}((\log s)^2/ε^2)}$ that achieves error $\le O(\mathsf{opt}_s) + ε$, where $\mathsf{opt}_s$ denotes the error of the optimal size $s$ decision tree. A key technical notion that drives our analysis is the noise stability of $f$, a well-studied smoothness measure.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了自上而下决策树学习启发式的简单扩展，例如 ID3、C4.5 和 CART。我们的算法为所有目标函数 $f: \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$ 实现了关于均匀分布的可证明保证，规避了不可能性结果，表明现有的启发式方法即使对于简单的目标函数也表现不佳。我们扩展的关键是一个新的分割标准，它考虑了 $f$ 与其属性的小子集之间的相关性。相比之下，现有启发式的分割标准（例如基尼杂质和信息增益）仅基于 $f$ 与其各个属性之间的相关性。我们的算法满足以下保证：对于所有目标函数 $f : \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$、大小 $s\in \mathbb{N}$ 和误差参数 $ε$，它构建大小为 $s^{\tilde{O}((\log s)^2/ε^2)}$ 的决策树，实现误差 $\le O(\mathsf{opt}_s) + ε$，其中$\mathsf{opt}_s$表示最优大小$s$决策树的误差。推动我们分析的一个关键技术概念是 $f$ 的噪声稳定性，这是一种经过充分研究的平滑度度量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的决策树归纳算法，通过引入高阶分裂准则，在统一分布下为所有目标函数提供了可证明的保证。
AI.motivation: 现有决策树启发式方法（如ID3、C4.5）在简单目标函数上表现不佳，且无法提供通用保证，需改进分裂准则以克服这一限制。
AI.method: 设计新的分裂准则，考虑目标函数与属性子集的关联性，而非仅依赖单个属性的关联性，并基于噪声稳定性理论进行分析。
AI.result: 算法可构建大小为$s^{\tilde{O}((\\log s)^2/\arepsilon^2)}$的决策树，误差不超过$O(\\mathsf{opt}_s) + \arepsilon$，适用于所有布尔目标函数。
AI.conclusion: 通过高阶关联性建模，该方法突破了传统启发式的局限性，为决策树归纳提供了更普适的理论保证。

Our algorithm achieves provable guarantees for all target functions $f: \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$ with respect to the uniform distribution, circumventing impossibility results showing that existing heuristics fare poorly even for simple target functions. The crux of our extension is a new splitting criterion that takes into account the correlations between $f$ and small subsets of its attributes. The splitting criteria of existing heuristics (e.g. Gini impurity and information gain), in contrast, are based solely on the correlations between $f$ and its individual attributes. Our algorithm satisfies the following guarantee: for all target functions $f : \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$, sizes $s\in \mathbb{N}$, and error parameters $ε$, it constructs a decision tree of size $s^{\tilde{O}((\log s)^2/ε^2)}$ that achieves error $\le O(\mathsf{opt}_s) + ε$, where $\mathsf{opt}_s$ denotes the error of the optimal size $s$ decision tree. A key technical notion that drives our analysis is the noise stability of $f$, a well-studied smoothness measure. 我们提出了自上而下决策树学习启发式的简单扩展，例如 ID3、C4.5 和 CART。我们的算法为所有目标函数 $f: \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$ 实现了关于均匀分布的可证明保证，规避了不可能性结果，表明现有的启发式方法即使对于简单的目标函数也表现不佳。我们扩展的关键是一个新的分割标准，它考虑了 $f$ 与其属性的小子集之间的相关性。相比之下，现有启发式的分割标准（例如基尼杂质和信息增益）仅基于 $f$ 与其各个属性之间的相关性。我们的算法满足以下保证：对于所有目标函数 $f : \{-1,1\}^n \to \{-1,1\}$、大小 $s\in \mathbb{N}$ 和误差参数 $ε$，它构建大小为 $s^{\tilde{O}((\log s)^2/ε^2)}$ 的决策树，实现误差 $\le O(\mathsf{opt}_s) + ε$，其中$\mathsf{opt}_s$表示最优大小$s$决策树的误差。推动我们分析的一个关键技术概念是 $f$ 的噪声稳定性，这是一种经过充分研究的平滑度度量。 本文提出了一种改进的决策树归纳算法，通过引入高阶分裂准则，在统一分布下为所有目标函数提供了可证明的保证。 Guy Blanc,Neha Gupta,Jane Lange,Li-Yang Tan cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

title: Decomposability and Parallel Computation of Multi-Agent LQR
title_zh: 多智能体LQR的可分解性和并行计算
comment: This paper contains proofs of all the theorems in the conference paper "Decomposability and Parallel Computation of Multi-Agent LQR"
comments: This paper contains proofs of all the theorems in the conference paper "Decomposability and Parallel Computation of Multi-Agent LQR"
abstract: Individual agents in a multi-agent system (MAS) may have decoupled open-loop dynamics, but a cooperative control objective usually results in coupled closed-loop dynamics thereby making the control design computationally expensive. The computation time becomes even higher when a learning strategy such as reinforcement learning (RL) needs to be applied to deal with the situation when the agents dynamics are not known. To resolve this problem, we propose a parallel RL scheme for a linear quadratic regulator (LQR) design in a continuous-time linear MAS. The idea is to exploit the structural properties of two graphs embedded in the $Q$ and $R$ weighting matrices in the LQR objective to define an orthogonal transformation that can convert the original LQR design to multiple decoupled smaller-sized LQR designs. We show that if the MAS is homogeneous then this decomposition retains closed-loop optimality. Conditions for decomposability, an algorithm for constructing the transformation matrix, a parallel RL algorithm, and robustness analysis when the design is applied to non-homogeneous MAS are presented. Simulations show that the proposed approach can guarantee significant speed-up in learning without any loss in the cumulative value of the LQR cost.
summary: Individual agents in a multi-agent system (MAS) may have decoupled open-loop dynamics, but a cooperative control objective usually results in coupled closed-loop dynamics thereby making the control design computationally expensive. The computation time becomes even higher when a learning strategy such as reinforcement learning (RL) needs to be applied to deal with the situation when the agents dynamics are not known. To resolve this problem, we propose a parallel RL scheme for a linear quadratic regulator (LQR) design in a continuous-time linear MAS. The idea is to exploit the structural properties of two graphs embedded in the $Q$ and $R$ weighting matrices in the LQR objective to define an orthogonal transformation that can convert the original LQR design to multiple decoupled smaller-sized LQR designs. We show that if the MAS is homogeneous then this decomposition retains closed-loop optimality. Conditions for decomposability, an algorithm for constructing the transformation matrix, a parallel RL algorithm, and robustness analysis when the design is applied to non-homogeneous MAS are presented. Simulations show that the proposed approach can guarantee significant speed-up in learning without any loss in the cumulative value of the LQR cost.
abstract_zh: 多智能体系统（MAS）中的各个智能体可能具有解耦的开环动态，但协作控制目标通常会导致耦合的闭环动态，从而使控制设计的计算成本昂贵。当需要应用强化学习（RL）等学习策略来处理代理动态未知的情况时，计算时间会变得更长。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于连续时间线性 MAS 中线性二次调节器 (LQR) 设计的并行 RL 方案。这个想法是利用嵌入在 LQR 目标中的 $Q$ 和 $R$ 权重矩阵中的两个图的结构特性来定义正交变换，该变换可以将原始 LQR 设计转换为多个解耦的较小尺寸的 LQR 设计。我们证明，如果 MAS 是齐​​次的，那么这种分解保留闭环最优性。介绍了该设计应用于非齐次 MAS 时的可分解性条件、构造变换矩阵的算法、并行 RL 算法以及鲁棒性分析。仿真表明，所提出的方法可以保证学习速度显着加快，并且不会损失 LQR 成本的累积值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于连续时间线性多智能体系统（MAS）的并行强化学习（RL）方案，通过分解LQR设计来降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中协同控制目标会导致闭环动态耦合，使得控制设计计算成本高昂，尤其在智能体动态未知需使用RL时问题更突出。
AI.method: 利用Q和R权重矩阵中的图结构特性，构造正交变换将原LQR问题分解为多个解耦的小规模LQR问题，并设计并行RL算法与鲁棒性分析方法。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法在保证LQR成本累积值不变的前提下，显著提升了学习速度。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在同质多智能体系统中保持闭环最优性，且对非同质系统具有鲁棒性，有效解决了多智能体LQR设计的计算瓶颈。

tldr: 本文提出一种用于连续时间线性多智能体系统（MAS）的并行强化学习（RL）方案，通过分解LQR设计来降低计算复杂度。
motivation: 多智能体系统中协同控制目标会导致闭环动态耦合，使得控制设计计算成本高昂，尤其在智能体动态未知需使用RL时问题更突出。
method: 利用Q和R权重矩阵中的图结构特性，构造正交变换将原LQR问题分解为多个解耦的小规模LQR问题，并设计并行RL算法与鲁棒性分析方法。
result: 仿真表明该方法在保证LQR成本累积值不变的前提下，显著提升了学习速度。
conclusion: 所提方法在同质多智能体系统中保持闭环最优性，且对非同质系统具有鲁棒性，有效解决了多智能体LQR设计的计算瓶颈。
search_text: Decomposability and Parallel Computation of Multi-Agent LQR 多智能体LQR的可分解性和并行计算 Individual agents in a multi-agent system (MAS) may have decoupled open-loop dynamics, but a cooperative control objective usually results in coupled closed-loop dynamics thereby making the control design computationally expensive. The computation time becomes even higher when a learning strategy such as reinforcement learning (RL) needs to be applied to deal with the situation when the agents dynamics are not known. To resolve this problem, we propose a parallel RL scheme for a linear quadratic regulator (LQR) design in a continuous-time linear MAS. The idea is to exploit the structural properties of two graphs embedded in the $Q$ and $R$ weighting matrices in the LQR objective to define an orthogonal transformation that can convert the original LQR design to multiple decoupled smaller-sized LQR designs. We show that if the MAS is homogeneous then this decomposition retains closed-loop optimality. Conditions for decomposability, an algorithm for constructing the transformation matrix, a parallel RL algorithm, and robustness analysis when the design is applied to non-homogeneous MAS are presented. Simulations show that the proposed approach can guarantee significant speed-up in learning without any loss in the cumulative value of the LQR cost. 多智能体系统（MAS）中的各个智能体可能具有解耦的开环动态，但协作控制目标通常会导致耦合的闭环动态，从而使控制设计的计算成本昂贵。当需要应用强化学习（RL）等学习策略来处理代理动态未知的情况时，计算时间会变得更长。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于连续时间线性 MAS 中线性二次调节器 (LQR) 设计的并行 RL 方案。这个想法是利用嵌入在 LQR 目标中的 $Q$ 和 $R$ 权重矩阵中的两个图的结构特性来定义正交变换，该变换可以将原始 LQR 设计转换为多个解耦的较小尺寸的 LQR 设计。我们证明，如果 MAS 是齐​​次的，那么这种分解保留闭环最优性。介绍了该设计应用于非齐次 MAS 时的可分解性条件、构造变换矩阵的算法、并行 RL 算法以及鲁棒性分析。仿真表明，所提出的方法可以保证学习速度显着加快，并且不会损失 LQR 成本的累积值。 本文提出一种用于连续时间线性多智能体系统（MAS）的并行强化学习（RL）方案，通过分解LQR设计来降低计算复杂度。 Gangshan Jing,He Bai,Jemin George,Aranya Chakrabortty eess.SY,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Zhilong Chen,Hancheng Cao,Fengli Xu,Mengjie Cheng,Tao Wang,Yong Li
title: Understanding the Role of Intermediaries in Online Social E-commerce: An Exploratory Study of Beidian
title_zh: 理解在线社交电子商务中中介机构的角色：北店的探索性研究
comment: In CSCW 2020
comments: In CSCW 2020
abstract: Social e-commerce, as a new form of social computing based marketing platforms, utilizes existing real-world social relationships for promotions and sales of products. It has been growing rapidly in recent years and attracted tens of millions of users in China. A key group of actors who enable market transactions on these platforms are intermediaries who connect producers with consumers by sharing information with and recommending products to their real-world social contacts. Despite their crucial role, the nature and behavior of these intermediaries on these social e-commerce platforms has not been systematically analyzed. Here we address this knowledge gap through a mixed method study. Leveraging 9 months' all-round behavior of about 40 million users on Beidian -- one of the largest social e-commerce sites in China, alongside with qualitative evidence from online forums and interviews, we examine characteristics of intermediaries, identify their behavioral patterns and uncover strategies and mechanisms that make successful intermediaries. We demonstrate that intermediaries on social e-commerce sites act as local trend detectors and "social grocers". Furthermore, successful intermediaries are highly dedicated whenever best sellers appear and broaden items for promotion. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first large-scale analysis on the emerging role of intermediaries in social e-commerce platforms, which provides potential insights for the design and management of social computing marketing platforms.
summary: Social e-commerce, as a new form of social computing based marketing platforms, utilizes existing real-world social relationships for promotions and sales of products. It has been growing rapidly in recent years and attracted tens of millions of users in China. A key group of actors who enable market transactions on these platforms are intermediaries who connect producers with consumers by sharing information with and recommending products to their real-world social contacts. Despite their crucial role, the nature and behavior of these intermediaries on these social e-commerce platforms has not been systematically analyzed. Here we address this knowledge gap through a mixed method study. Leveraging 9 months' all-round behavior of about 40 million users on Beidian -- one of the largest social e-commerce sites in China, alongside with qualitative evidence from online forums and interviews, we examine characteristics of intermediaries, identify their behavioral patterns and uncover strategies and mechanisms that make successful intermediaries. We demonstrate that intermediaries on social e-commerce sites act as local trend detectors and "social grocers". Furthermore, successful intermediaries are highly dedicated whenever best sellers appear and broaden items for promotion. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first large-scale analysis on the emerging role of intermediaries in social e-commerce platforms, which provides potential insights for the design and management of social computing marketing platforms.
abstract_zh: 社交电商作为一种基于社交计算的新型营销平台，利用现有的现实社会关系进行产品的促销和销售。近年来增长迅速，在中国吸引了数千万用户。在这些平台上实现市场交易的关键参与者群体是中介机构，他们通过与现实世界的社交联系人分享信息并向其推荐产品来将生产者与消费者联系起来。尽管发挥着至关重要的作用，但这些社交电子商务平台上的中介机构的性质和行为尚未得到系统分析。在这里，我们通过混合方法研究来解决这一知识差距。通过北店（中国最大的社交电子商务网站之一）上约 4000 万用户 9 个月的全方位行为，以及来自在线论坛和访谈的定性证据，我们研究了中介机构的特征，识别了他们的行为模式，并揭示了中介机构成功的策略和机制。我们证明社交电子商务网站上的中介充当本地趋势探测器和“社交杂货商”。此外，每当畅销书出现时，成功的中介机构都会高度投入，并扩大促销范围。据我们所知，本文首次对社交电子商务平台中中介机构的新兴角色进行了大规模分析，为社交计算营销平台的设计和管理提供了潜在的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合方法研究社交电商平台贝店中的中介角色，分析其行为模式与成功策略。
AI.motivation: 社交电商中的中介在连接生产者与消费者中起关键作用，但其行为特性尚未被系统研究，需填补这一知识空白。
AI.method: 结合4000万用户9个月的行为数据及在线论坛、访谈的定性证据，采用混合研究方法。
AI.result: 中介扮演本地趋势探测器和社会杂货商角色，成功中介在畅销品出现时高度投入并扩大推广范围。
AI.conclusion: 首次大规模分析社交电商中介角色，为社交计算营销平台的设计与管理提供理论支持。

title: DOOM: A Novel Adversarial-DRL-Based Op-Code Level Metamorphic Malware Obfuscator for the Enhancement of IDS
title_zh: DOOM：一种新颖的基于对抗性 DRL 的操作码级变形恶意软件混淆器，用于增强 IDS
abstract: We designed and developed DOOM (Adversarial-DRL based Opcode level Obfuscator to generate Metamorphic malware), a novel system that uses adversarial deep reinforcement learning to obfuscate malware at the op-code level for the enhancement of IDS. The ultimate goal of DOOM is not to give a potent weapon in the hands of cyber-attackers, but to create defensive-mechanisms against advanced zero-day attacks. Experimental results indicate that the obfuscated malware created by DOOM could effectively mimic multiple-simultaneous zero-day attacks. To the best of our knowledge, DOOM is the first system that could generate obfuscated malware detailed to individual op-code level. DOOM is also the first-ever system to use efficient continuous action control based deep reinforcement learning in the area of malware generation and defense. Experimental results indicate that over 67% of the metamorphic malware generated by DOOM could easily evade detection from even the most potent IDS. This achievement gains significance, as with this, even IDS augment with advanced routing sub-system can be easily evaded by the malware generated by DOOM.
summary: We designed and developed DOOM (Adversarial-DRL based Opcode level Obfuscator to generate Metamorphic malware), a novel system that uses adversarial deep reinforcement learning to obfuscate malware at the op-code level for the enhancement of IDS. The ultimate goal of DOOM is not to give a potent weapon in the hands of cyber-attackers, but to create defensive-mechanisms against advanced zero-day attacks. Experimental results indicate that the obfuscated malware created by DOOM could effectively mimic multiple-simultaneous zero-day attacks. To the best of our knowledge, DOOM is the first system that could generate obfuscated malware detailed to individual op-code level. DOOM is also the first-ever system to use efficient continuous action control based deep reinforcement learning in the area of malware generation and defense. Experimental results indicate that over 67% of the metamorphic malware generated by DOOM could easily evade detection from even the most potent IDS. This achievement gains significance, as with this, even IDS augment with advanced routing sub-system can be easily evaded by the malware generated by DOOM.
abstract_zh: 我们设计并开发了 DOOM（基于对抗性 DRL 的操作码级别混淆器，用于生成变形恶意软件），这是一种新颖的系统，它使用对抗性深度强化学习在操作码级别混淆恶意软件，以增强 IDS。 《DOOM》的最终目标不是为网络攻击者提供强大的武器，而是创建针对高级零日攻击的防御机制。实验结果表明，DOOM 创建的混淆恶意软件可以有效模仿多个同时发生的零日攻击。据我们所知，DOOM 是第一个可以生成详细到单个操作码级别的混淆恶意软件的系统。 DOOM 也是第一个在恶意软件生成和防御领域使用基于深度强化学习的高效连续动作控制的系统。实验结果表明，超过 67% 的 DOOM 生成的变态恶意软件甚至可以轻松逃避最强大的 IDS 的检测。这一成就具有重要意义，因为这样，即使 IDS 增强了高级路由子系统，DOOM 生成的恶意软件也可以轻松躲避。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOOM系统，利用对抗性深度强化学习在操作码层面生成变形恶意软件，以增强入侵检测系统（IDS）的防御能力。
AI.motivation: 现有IDS难以有效检测高级零日攻击，需通过生成高度隐蔽的变形恶意软件来测试和提升IDS的防御机制。
AI.method: 基于对抗性深度强化学习（Adversarial-DRL），在操作码层面实现恶意软件的变形，结合连续动作控制技术生成高效且难以检测的变种。
AI.result: 实验表明，DOOM生成的67%以上变形恶意软件可绕过最先进的IDS，且能模拟多路零日攻击，验证了其高隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: DOOM是首个操作码级对抗性变形系统，揭示了当前IDS在面对高级持续性威胁时的脆弱性，需进一步优化检测技术。

DOOM is also the first-ever system to use efficient continuous action control based deep reinforcement learning in the area of malware generation and defense. Experimental results indicate that over 67% of the metamorphic malware generated by DOOM could easily evade detection from even the most potent IDS. This achievement gains significance, as with this, even IDS augment with advanced routing sub-system can be easily evaded by the malware generated by DOOM. 我们设计并开发了 DOOM（基于对抗性 DRL 的操作码级别混淆器，用于生成变形恶意软件），这是一种新颖的系统，它使用对抗性深度强化学习在操作码级别混淆恶意软件，以增强 IDS。 《DOOM》的最终目标不是为网络攻击者提供强大的武器，而是创建针对高级零日攻击的防御机制。实验结果表明，DOOM 创建的混淆恶意软件可以有效模仿多个同时发生的零日攻击。据我们所知，DOOM 是第一个可以生成详细到单个操作码级别的混淆恶意软件的系统。 DOOM 也是第一个在恶意软件生成和防御领域使用基于深度强化学习的高效连续动作控制的系统。实验结果表明，超过 67% 的 DOOM 生成的变态恶意软件甚至可以轻松逃避最强大的 IDS 的检测。这一成就具有重要意义，因为这样，即使 IDS 增强了高级路由子系统，DOOM 生成的恶意软件也可以轻松躲避。 本文提出DOOM系统，利用对抗性深度强化学习在操作码层面生成变形恶意软件，以增强入侵检测系统（IDS）的防御能力。 Mohit Sewak,Sanjay K. Sahay,Hemant Rathore cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: DeepIntent: ImplicitIntent based Android IDS with E2E Deep Learning architecture
title_zh: DeepIntent：基于 ImplicitIntent 的 Android IDS，具有端到端深度学习架构
abstract: The Intent in Android plays an important role in inter-process and intra-process communications. The implicit Intent that an application could accept are declared in its manifest and are amongst the easiest feature to extract from an apk. Implicit Intents could even be extracted online and in real-time. So far neither the feasibility of developing an Intrusion Detection System solely on implicit Intent has been explored, nor are any benchmarks available of a malware classifier that is based on implicit Intent alone. We demonstrate that despite Intent is implicit and well declared, it can provide very intuitive insights to distinguish malicious from non-malicious applications. We conducted exhaustive experiments with over 40 different end-to-end Deep Learning configurations of Auto-Encoders and Multi-Layer-Perceptron to create a benchmark for a malware classifier that works exclusively on implicit Intent. Using the results from the experiments we create an intrusion detection system using only the implicit Intents and end-to-end Deep Learning architecture. We obtained an area-under-curve statistic of 0.81, and accuracy of 77.2% along with false-positive-rate of 0.11 on Drebin dataset.
summary: The Intent in Android plays an important role in inter-process and intra-process communications. The implicit Intent that an application could accept are declared in its manifest and are amongst the easiest feature to extract from an apk. Implicit Intents could even be extracted online and in real-time. So far neither the feasibility of developing an Intrusion Detection System solely on implicit Intent has been explored, nor are any benchmarks available of a malware classifier that is based on implicit Intent alone. We demonstrate that despite Intent is implicit and well declared, it can provide very intuitive insights to distinguish malicious from non-malicious applications. We conducted exhaustive experiments with over 40 different end-to-end Deep Learning configurations of Auto-Encoders and Multi-Layer-Perceptron to create a benchmark for a malware classifier that works exclusively on implicit Intent. Using the results from the experiments we create an intrusion detection system using only the implicit Intents and end-to-end Deep Learning architecture. We obtained an area-under-curve statistic of 0.81, and accuracy of 77.2% along with false-positive-rate of 0.11 on Drebin dataset.
abstract_zh: Android中的Intent在进程间和进程内通信中发挥着重要作用。应用程序可以接受的隐式意图在其清单中声明，并且是从 apk 中提取的最简单的功能之一。甚至可以在线实时提取隐式意图。到目前为止，既没有探索仅基于隐式意图开发入侵检测系统的可行性，也没有任何基于隐式意图的恶意软件分类器的可用基准。我们证明，尽管意图是隐式的并且声明良好，但它可以提供非常直观的见解来区分恶意应用程序和非恶意应用程序。我们对自动编码器和多层感知器的 40 多种不同的端到端深度学习配置进行了详尽的实验，为专门针对隐式意图工作的恶意软件分类器创建了基准。利用实验结果，我们仅使用隐式意图和端到端深度学习架构创建了一个入侵检测系统。我们在 Drebin 数据集上获得了 0.81 的曲线下面积统计量、77.2% 的准确率以及 0.11 的假阳性率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Android隐式Intent的端到端深度学习入侵检测系统DeepIntent，通过隐式Intent特征实现恶意软件分类。
AI.motivation: 隐式Intent作为Android应用间通信的关键机制，其声明信息易于提取但尚未被充分用于恶意软件检测，缺乏相关基准测试。
AI.method: 构建40种端到端深度学习模型（自编码器和多层感知机），仅使用隐式Intent特征在Drebin数据集上进行恶意软件分类实验。
AI.result: 在Drebin数据集上取得AUC 0.81、77.2%准确率和0.11误报率的检测效果，验证了隐式Intent特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 隐式Intent可作为独立特征用于Android恶意软件检测，所提出的方法为该领域提供了首个基准测试框架。

authors_text: Claudia Pérez-D'Arpino,Can Liu,Patrick Goebel,Roberto Martín-Martín,Silvio Savarese
title: Robot Navigation in Constrained Pedestrian Environments using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习在受限行人环境中进行机器人导航
abstract: Navigating fluently around pedestrians is a necessary capability for mobile robots deployed in human environments, such as buildings and homes. While research on social navigation has focused mainly on the scalability with the number of pedestrians in open spaces, typical indoor environments present the additional challenge of constrained spaces such as corridors and doorways that limit maneuverability and influence patterns of pedestrian interaction. We present an approach based on reinforcement learning (RL) to learn policies capable of dynamic adaptation to the presence of moving pedestrians while navigating between desired locations in constrained environments. The policy network receives guidance from a motion planner that provides waypoints to follow a globally planned trajectory, whereas RL handles the local interactions. We explore a compositional principle for multi-layout training and find that policies trained in a small set of geometrically simple layouts successfully generalize to more complex unseen layouts that exhibit composition of the structural elements available during training. Going beyond walls-world like domains, we show transfer of the learned policy to unseen 3D reconstructions of two real environments. These results support the applicability of the compositional principle to navigation in real-world buildings and indicate promising usage of multi-agent simulation within reconstructed environments for tasks that involve interaction.
summary: Navigating fluently around pedestrians is a necessary capability for mobile robots deployed in human environments, such as buildings and homes. While research on social navigation has focused mainly on the scalability with the number of pedestrians in open spaces, typical indoor environments present the additional challenge of constrained spaces such as corridors and doorways that limit maneuverability and influence patterns of pedestrian interaction. We present an approach based on reinforcement learning (RL) to learn policies capable of dynamic adaptation to the presence of moving pedestrians while navigating between desired locations in constrained environments. The policy network receives guidance from a motion planner that provides waypoints to follow a globally planned trajectory, whereas RL handles the local interactions. We explore a compositional principle for multi-layout training and find that policies trained in a small set of geometrically simple layouts successfully generalize to more complex unseen layouts that exhibit composition of the structural elements available during training. Going beyond walls-world like domains, we show transfer of the learned policy to unseen 3D reconstructions of two real environments. These results support the applicability of the compositional principle to navigation in real-world buildings and indicate promising usage of multi-agent simulation within reconstructed environments for tasks that involve interaction.
abstract_zh: 对于部署在建筑物和家庭等人类环境中的移动机器人来说，在行人周围流畅地导航是一项必要的能力。虽然社交导航的研究主要集中在开放空间中行人数量的可扩展性，但典型的室内环境提出了走廊和门口等受限空间的额外挑战，这些空间限制了可操作性并影响行人互动模式。我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的方法来学习能够动态适应移动行人的存在的策略，同时在受限环境中的所需位置之间导航。策略网络接收来自运动规划器的指导，该运动规划器提供遵循全局规划轨迹的路点，而强化学习则处理局部交互。我们探索了多布局训练的组成原则，并发现在一小组几何简单布局中训练的策略成功地推广到更复杂的看不见的布局，这些布局展示了训练期间可用的结构元素的组成。超越墙壁世界之类的领域，我们展示了将学习到的策略转移到两个真实环境的看不见的 3D 重建中。这些结果支持了组合原理在现实世界建筑物中导航的适用性，并表明在重建环境中使用多智能体模拟来完成涉及交互的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的机器人导航方法，用于在受限行人环境中（如走廊和门厅）动态适应移动行人并实现流畅导航。
AI.motivation: 现有社会导航研究主要关注开放空间中行人数量的扩展性，但实际室内环境存在空间约束，限制了机器人机动性并影响行人交互模式，需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 结合运动规划器生成全局轨迹路点与强化学习处理局部交互，通过多布局组合训练原则，使策略在简单几何布局训练后泛化至复杂未见过的布局及真实3D重建环境。
AI.result: 训练策略成功泛化至更复杂的布局和两个真实环境的3D重建，验证了组合原则在现实建筑导航中的适用性及多智能体模拟的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 组合训练原则与重建环境中的多智能体模拟为现实世界机器人导航提供了可行方案，尤其适用于需处理行人交互的复杂室内场景。

title: Efficient Robotic Object Search via HIEM: Hierarchical Policy Learning with Intrinsic-Extrinsic Modeling
title_zh: 通过 HIEM 进行高效的机器人对象搜索：通过内在-外在建模进行分层策略学习
comment: RA-L & ICRA21
comments: RA-L & ICRA21
abstract: Despite the significant success at enabling robots with autonomous behaviors makes deep reinforcement learning a promising approach for robotic object search task, the deep reinforcement learning approach severely suffers from the nature sparse reward setting of the task. To tackle this challenge, we present a novel policy learning paradigm for the object search task, based on hierarchical and interpretable modeling with an intrinsic-extrinsic reward setting. More specifically, we explore the environment efficiently through a proxy low-level policy which is driven by the intrinsic rewarding sub-goals. We further learn our hierarchical policy from the efficient exploration experience where we optimize both of our high-level and low-level policies towards the extrinsic rewarding goal to perform the object search task well. Experiments conducted on the House3D environment validate and show that the robot, trained with our model, can perform the object search task in a more optimal and interpretable way.
summary: Despite the significant success at enabling robots with autonomous behaviors makes deep reinforcement learning a promising approach for robotic object search task, the deep reinforcement learning approach severely suffers from the nature sparse reward setting of the task. To tackle this challenge, we present a novel policy learning paradigm for the object search task, based on hierarchical and interpretable modeling with an intrinsic-extrinsic reward setting. More specifically, we explore the environment efficiently through a proxy low-level policy which is driven by the intrinsic rewarding sub-goals. We further learn our hierarchical policy from the efficient exploration experience where we optimize both of our high-level and low-level policies towards the extrinsic rewarding goal to perform the object search task well. Experiments conducted on the House3D environment validate and show that the robot, trained with our model, can perform the object search task in a more optimal and interpretable way.
abstract_zh: 尽管在使机器人具有自主行为方面取得了巨大成功，使得深度强化学习成为机器人对象搜索任务的一种有前途的方法，但深度强化学习方法严重受到任务的稀疏奖励设置的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们为对象搜索任务提出了一种新颖的策略学习范式，该范式基于具有内在-外在奖励设置的分层和可解释模型。更具体地说，我们通过由内在奖励子目标驱动的代理低级政策有效地探索环境。我们进一步从有效的探索经验中学习我们的分层策略，我们优化我们的高级和低级策略以实现外在奖励目标，以更好地执行对象搜索任务。在 House3D 环境上进行的实验验证并表明，使用我们的模型训练的机器人可以以更优化和可解释的方式执行对象搜索任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层内在-外在奖励建模的高效机器人目标搜索方法HIEM，通过分层策略学习解决稀疏奖励问题。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在机器人目标搜索任务中因稀疏奖励设置而表现受限，需设计能有效探索环境并平衡内在与外在奖励的分层策略框架。
AI.method: 构建分层策略架构，低层策略通过内在奖励子目标驱动环境探索，高层策略在探索经验基础上优化外在奖励目标，实现目标搜索任务的联合优化。
AI.result: 在House3D环境中验证表明，该方法使机器人能以更优且可解释的方式完成目标搜索任务，优于传统强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: HIEM框架通过分层内在-外在奖励建模有效缓解了稀疏奖励问题，为机器人自主搜索任务提供了高效且可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Efficient Robotic Object Search via HIEM: Hierarchical Policy Learning with Intrinsic-Extrinsic Modeling 通过 HIEM 进行高效的机器人对象搜索：通过内在-外在建模进行分层策略学习 Despite the significant success at enabling robots with autonomous behaviors makes deep reinforcement learning a promising approach for robotic object search task, the deep reinforcement learning approach severely suffers from the nature sparse reward setting of the task. To tackle this challenge, we present a novel policy learning paradigm for the object search task, based on hierarchical and interpretable modeling with an intrinsic-extrinsic reward setting. More specifically, we explore the environment efficiently through a proxy low-level policy which is driven by the intrinsic rewarding sub-goals. We further learn our hierarchical policy from the efficient exploration experience where we optimize both of our high-level and low-level policies towards the extrinsic rewarding goal to perform the object search task well. Experiments conducted on the House3D environment validate and show that the robot, trained with our model, can perform the object search task in a more optimal and interpretable way. 尽管在使机器人具有自主行为方面取得了巨大成功，使得深度强化学习成为机器人对象搜索任务的一种有前途的方法，但深度强化学习方法严重受到任务的稀疏奖励设置的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们为对象搜索任务提出了一种新颖的策略学习范式，该范式基于具有内在-外在奖励设置的分层和可解释模型。更具体地说，我们通过由内在奖励子目标驱动的代理低级政策有效地探索环境。我们进一步从有效的探索经验中学习我们的分层策略，我们优化我们的高级和低级策略以实现外在奖励目标，以更好地执行对象搜索任务。在 House3D 环境上进行的实验验证并表明，使用我们的模型训练的机器人可以以更优化和可解释的方式执行对象搜索任务。 本文提出了一种基于分层内在-外在奖励建模的高效机器人目标搜索方法HIEM，通过分层策略学习解决稀疏奖励问题。 Xin Ye,Yezhou Yang cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Flow-FL: Data-Driven Federated Learning for Spatio-Temporal Predictions in Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: Flow-FL：用于多机器人系统中时空预测的数据驱动联合学习
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. For associated datasets, see http://www.nestlab.net/doku.php/papers:mrs_fl_dataset
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures. For associated datasets, see http://www.nestlab.net/doku.php/papers:mrs_fl_dataset
abstract: In this paper, we show how the Federated Learning (FL) framework enables learning collectively from distributed data in connected robot teams. This framework typically works with clients collecting data locally, updating neural network weights of their model, and sending updates to a server for aggregation into a global model. We explore the design space of FL by comparing two variants of this concept. The first variant follows the traditional FL approach in which a server aggregates the local models. In the second variant, that we call Flow-FL, the aggregation process is serverless thanks to the use of a gossip-based shared data structure. In both variants, we use a data-driven mechanism to synchronize the learning process in which robots contribute model updates when they collect sufficient data. We validate our approach with an agent trajectory forecasting problem in a multi-agent setting. Using a centralized implementation as a baseline, we study the effects of staggered online data collection, and variations in data flow, number of participating robots, and time delays introduced by the decentralization of the framework in a multi-robot setting.
summary: In this paper, we show how the Federated Learning (FL) framework enables learning collectively from distributed data in connected robot teams. This framework typically works with clients collecting data locally, updating neural network weights of their model, and sending updates to a server for aggregation into a global model. We explore the design space of FL by comparing two variants of this concept. The first variant follows the traditional FL approach in which a server aggregates the local models. In the second variant, that we call Flow-FL, the aggregation process is serverless thanks to the use of a gossip-based shared data structure. In both variants, we use a data-driven mechanism to synchronize the learning process in which robots contribute model updates when they collect sufficient data. We validate our approach with an agent trajectory forecasting problem in a multi-agent setting. Using a centralized implementation as a baseline, we study the effects of staggered online data collection, and variations in data flow, number of participating robots, and time delays introduced by the decentralization of the framework in a multi-robot setting.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了联邦学习（FL）框架如何实现从互联机器人团队的分布式数据中集体学习。该框架通常与客户端一起工作，在本地收集数据，更新其模型的神经网络权重，并将更新发送到服务器以聚合到全局模型中。我们通过比较这个概念的两个变体来探索 FL 的设计空间。第一个变体遵循传统的 FL 方法，其中服务器聚合本地模型。在第二种变体中，我们称之为 Flow-FL，由于使用了基于八卦的共享数据结构，聚合过程是无服务器的。在这两种变体中，我们使用数据驱动的机制来同步学习过程，其中机器人在收集足够的数据时贡献模型更新。我们通过多智能体设置中的智能体轨迹预测问题来验证我们的方法。使用集中式实施作为基线，我们研究了交错在线数据收集的影响，以及数据流的变化、参与机器人的数量以及多机器人设置中框架分散引入的时间延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flow-FL框架，通过去中心化的联邦学习方法解决多机器人系统中的时空预测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖中心服务器存在单点故障风险，而多机器人系统需要更灵活的分布式学习方案以适应动态环境和数据异构性。
AI.method: 设计两种联邦学习变体：传统服务器聚合模式与基于流式通信的Flow-FL。通过数据驱动机制实现机器人模型更新同步，并在多智能体轨迹预测任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明Flow-FL在非同步数据采集、机器人数量变化及去中心化延迟等场景下，相较集中式方法保持了相近的预测精度和更高的系统鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Flow-FL为多机器人系统的时空预测提供了可扩展的去中心化联邦学习解决方案，有效平衡了模型性能与系统灵活性。

title: A Conglomerate of Multiple OCR Table Detection and Extraction
title_zh: 多个 OCR 表检测和提取的组合
comment: For ICDAR proceedings, see https://panel.waset.org/abstracts/127575
comments: For ICDAR proceedings, see https://panel.waset.org/abstracts/127575
abstract: Information representation as tables are compact and concise method that eases searching, indexing, and storage requirements. Extracting and cloning tables from parsable documents is easier and widely used, however industry still faces challenge in detecting and extracting tables from OCR documents or images. This paper proposes an algorithm that detects and extracts multiple tables from OCR document. The algorithm uses a combination of image processing techniques, text recognition and procedural coding to identify distinct tables in same image and map the text to appropriate corresponding cell in dataframe which can be stored as Comma-separated values, Database, Excel and multiple other usable formats.
summary: Information representation as tables are compact and concise method that eases searching, indexing, and storage requirements. Extracting and cloning tables from parsable documents is easier and widely used, however industry still faces challenge in detecting and extracting tables from OCR documents or images. This paper proposes an algorithm that detects and extracts multiple tables from OCR document. The algorithm uses a combination of image processing techniques, text recognition and procedural coding to identify distinct tables in same image and map the text to appropriate corresponding cell in dataframe which can be stored as Comma-separated values, Database, Excel and multiple other usable formats.
abstract_zh: 以表格形式表示信息是一种紧凑而简洁的方法，可简化搜索、索引和存储要求。从可解析文档中提取和克隆表格更容易且广泛使用，但是行业在从 OCR 文档或图像中检测和提取表格方面仍然面临挑战。本文提出了一种从 OCR 文档中检测和提取多个表格的算法。该算法结合使用图像处理技术、文本识别和程序编码来识别同一图像中的不同表格，并将文本映射到数据框中适当的相应单元格，该单元格可以存储为逗号分隔值、数据库、Excel 和多种其他可用格式。

AI.tldr: 提出一种从OCR文档中检测和提取多个表格的算法
AI.motivation: 尽管从可解析文档中提取表格较为容易，但行业仍面临从OCR文档或图像中有效检测和提取表格的挑战
AI.method: 结合图像处理技术、文本识别和过程编码，识别图像中的多个表格，并将文本映射到数据框的相应单元格
AI.result: 成功实现了从OCR文档中检测和提取多个表格，并能够将结果存储为CSV、数据库、Excel等多种格式
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了OCR文档中多表格检测与提取的难题，为后续数据处理提供了可行方案

search_text: A Conglomerate of Multiple OCR Table Detection and Extraction 多个 OCR 表检测和提取的组合 Information representation as tables are compact and concise method that eases searching, indexing, and storage requirements. Extracting and cloning tables from parsable documents is easier and widely used, however industry still faces challenge in detecting and extracting tables from OCR documents or images. This paper proposes an algorithm that detects and extracts multiple tables from OCR document. The algorithm uses a combination of image processing techniques, text recognition and procedural coding to identify distinct tables in same image and map the text to appropriate corresponding cell in dataframe which can be stored as Comma-separated values, Database, Excel and multiple other usable formats. 以表格形式表示信息是一种紧凑而简洁的方法，可简化搜索、索引和存储要求。从可解析文档中提取和克隆表格更容易且广泛使用，但是行业在从 OCR 文档或图像中检测和提取表格方面仍然面临挑战。本文提出了一种从 OCR 文档中检测和提取多个表格的算法。该算法结合使用图像处理技术、文本识别和程序编码来识别同一图像中的不同表格，并将文本映射到数据框中适当的相应单元格，该单元格可以存储为逗号分隔值、数据库、Excel 和多种其他可用格式。 提出一种从OCR文档中检测和提取多个表格的算法 Smita Pallavi,Raj Ratn Pranesh,Sumit Kumar cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Rae Jeong,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Jackie Kay,Daniel Zheng,Yuxiang Zhou,Alexandre Galashov,Nicolas Heess,Francesco Nori
title: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Suboptimal Experts
title_zh: 向次优专家学习灵巧的操作
abstract: Learning dexterous manipulation in high-dimensional state-action spaces is an important open challenge with exploration presenting a major bottleneck. Although in many cases the learning process could be guided by demonstrations or other suboptimal experts, current RL algorithms for continuous action spaces often fail to effectively utilize combinations of highly off-policy expert data and on-policy exploration data. As a solution, we introduce Relative Entropy Q-Learning (REQ), a simple policy iteration algorithm that combines ideas from successful offline and conventional RL algorithms. It represents the optimal policy via importance sampling from a learned prior and is well-suited to take advantage of mixed data distributions. We demonstrate experimentally that REQ outperforms several strong baselines on robotic manipulation tasks for which suboptimal experts are available. We show how suboptimal experts can be constructed effectively by composing simple waypoint tracking controllers, and we also show how learned primitives can be combined with waypoint controllers to obtain reference behaviors to bootstrap a complex manipulation task on a simulated bimanual robot with human-like hands. Finally, we show that REQ is also effective for general off-policy RL, offline RL, and RL from demonstrations. Videos and further materials are available at sites.google.com/view/rlfse.
summary: Learning dexterous manipulation in high-dimensional state-action spaces is an important open challenge with exploration presenting a major bottleneck. Although in many cases the learning process could be guided by demonstrations or other suboptimal experts, current RL algorithms for continuous action spaces often fail to effectively utilize combinations of highly off-policy expert data and on-policy exploration data. As a solution, we introduce Relative Entropy Q-Learning (REQ), a simple policy iteration algorithm that combines ideas from successful offline and conventional RL algorithms. It represents the optimal policy via importance sampling from a learned prior and is well-suited to take advantage of mixed data distributions. We demonstrate experimentally that REQ outperforms several strong baselines on robotic manipulation tasks for which suboptimal experts are available. We show how suboptimal experts can be constructed effectively by composing simple waypoint tracking controllers, and we also show how learned primitives can be combined with waypoint controllers to obtain reference behaviors to bootstrap a complex manipulation task on a simulated bimanual robot with human-like hands. Finally, we show that REQ is also effective for general off-policy RL, offline RL, and RL from demonstrations. Videos and further materials are available at sites.google.com/view/rlfse.
abstract_zh: 在高维状态动作空间中学习灵巧的操作是一个重要的开放挑战，探索是一个主要瓶颈。尽管在许多情况下，学习过程可以由演示或其他次优专家来指导，但当前用于连续动作空间的强化学习算法通常无法有效地利用高度离策略专家数据和在策略探索数据的组合。作为解决方案，我们引入了相对熵 Q 学习 (REQ)，这是一种简单的策略迭代算法，结合了成功的离线和传统 RL 算法的思想。它通过从先验知识中进行重要性采样来表示最优策略，并且非常适合利用混合数据分布。我们通过实验证明，REQ 在机器人操作任务上的表现优于几个强大的基线，而对于这些任务，专家是次优的。我们展示了如何通过组成简单的路点跟踪控制器来有效地构建次优专家，我们还展示了如何将学习的基元与路点控制器相结合以获得参考行为，以在具有类人手的模拟双手机器人上引导复杂的操作任务。最后，我们证明 REQ 对于一般的离策略 RL、离线 RL 和演示 RL 也有效。视频和更多材料请访问sites.google.com/view/rlfse。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为相对熵Q学习（REQ）的算法，用于解决从次优专家中学习灵巧操作的问题。
AI.motivation: 在高维状态-动作空间中学习灵巧操作是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题，探索是主要瓶颈。现有强化学习算法难以有效利用混合专家数据。
AI.method: 本文引入相对熵Q学习（REQ），结合离线和传统强化学习算法的优点，通过重要性抽样从学习到的先验中表示最优策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，REQ在多个机器人操作任务中优于现有方法，并展示了如何构建次优专家和组合学习原语以引导复杂操作任务。
AI.conclusion: REQ在离线强化学习、从演示中学习和一般离线强化学习中都表现出色，为灵巧操作任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Sarah E. Gerard,Jacob Herrmann,Yi Xin,Kevin T. Martin,Emanuele Rezoagli,Davide Ippolito,Giacomo Bellani,Maurizio Cereda,Junfeng Guo,Eric A. Hoffman,David W. Kaczka,Joseph M. Reinhardt
title: CT Image Segmentation for Inflamed and Fibrotic Lungs Using a Multi-Resolution Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用多分辨率卷积神经网络对发炎和纤维化肺部进行 CT 图像分割
abstract: The purpose of this study was to develop a fully-automated segmentation algorithm, robust to various density enhancing lung abnormalities, to facilitate rapid quantitative analysis of computed tomography images. A polymorphic training approach is proposed, in which both specifically labeled left and right lungs of humans with COPD, and nonspecifically labeled lungs of animals with acute lung injury, were incorporated into training a single neural network. The resulting network is intended for predicting left and right lung regions in humans with or without diffuse opacification and consolidation. Performance of the proposed lung segmentation algorithm was extensively evaluated on CT scans of subjects with COPD, confirmed COVID-19, lung cancer, and IPF, despite no labeled training data of the latter three diseases. Lobar segmentations were obtained using the left and right lung segmentation as input to the LobeNet algorithm. Regional lobar analysis was performed using hierarchical clustering to identify radiographic subtypes of COVID-19. The proposed lung segmentation algorithm was quantitatively evaluated using semi-automated and manually-corrected segmentations in 87 COVID-19 CT images, achieving an average symmetric surface distance of $0.495 \pm 0.309$ mm and Dice coefficient of $0.985 \pm 0.011$. Hierarchical clustering identified four radiographical phenotypes of COVID-19 based on lobar fractions of consolidated and poorly aerated tissue. Lower left and lower right lobes were consistently more afflicted with poor aeration and consolidation. However, the most severe cases demonstrated involvement of all lobes. The polymorphic training approach was able to accurately segment COVID-19 cases with diffuse consolidation without requiring COVID-19 cases for training.
summary: The purpose of this study was to develop a fully-automated segmentation algorithm, robust to various density enhancing lung abnormalities, to facilitate rapid quantitative analysis of computed tomography images. A polymorphic training approach is proposed, in which both specifically labeled left and right lungs of humans with COPD, and nonspecifically labeled lungs of animals with acute lung injury, were incorporated into training a single neural network. The resulting network is intended for predicting left and right lung regions in humans with or without diffuse opacification and consolidation. Performance of the proposed lung segmentation algorithm was extensively evaluated on CT scans of subjects with COPD, confirmed COVID-19, lung cancer, and IPF, despite no labeled training data of the latter three diseases. Lobar segmentations were obtained using the left and right lung segmentation as input to the LobeNet algorithm. Regional lobar analysis was performed using hierarchical clustering to identify radiographic subtypes of COVID-19. The proposed lung segmentation algorithm was quantitatively evaluated using semi-automated and manually-corrected segmentations in 87 COVID-19 CT images, achieving an average symmetric surface distance of $0.495 \pm 0.309$ mm and Dice coefficient of $0.985 \pm 0.011$. Hierarchical clustering identified four radiographical phenotypes of COVID-19 based on lobar fractions of consolidated and poorly aerated tissue. Lower left and lower right lobes were consistently more afflicted with poor aeration and consolidation. However, the most severe cases demonstrated involvement of all lobes. The polymorphic training approach was able to accurately segment COVID-19 cases with diffuse consolidation without requiring COVID-19 cases for training.
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是开发一种全自动分割算法，该算法对各种密度增强的肺部异常具有鲁棒性，以促进计算机断层扫描图像的快速定量分析。提出了一种多态训练方法，其中将特异标记的患有慢性阻塞性肺病的人类左肺和右肺以及非特异标记的患有急性肺损伤的动物的肺纳入训练单个神经网络中。由此产生的网络旨在预测人类有或没有弥漫性混浊和实变的左肺和右肺区域。尽管没有后三种疾病的标记训练数据，但所提出的肺部分割算法的性能在患有 COPD 的受试者的 CT 扫描上进行了广泛评估，确认了 COVID-19、肺癌和 IPF。使用左肺分割和右肺分割作为 LobeNet 算法的输入来获得肺叶分割。使用层次聚类进行区域脑叶分析来识别 COVID-19 的放射学亚型。使用半自动和手动校正的分割在 87 张 COVID-19 CT 图像中对所提出的肺部分割算法进行定量评估，实现平均对称表面距离 $0.495 \pm 0.309$ mm 和 Dice 系数 $0.985 \pm 0.011$。分层聚类根据实变和通气不良组织的肺叶部分确定了 COVID-19 的四种放射照相表型。左下叶和右下叶始终更容易受到通气和巩固不良的影响。然而，最严重的病例显示所有肺叶均受累。多态训练方法能够通过弥散性整合准确地分割 COVID-19 病例，而不需要对 COVID-19 病例进行训练。

AI.tldr: 开发一种多分辨率卷积神经网络，用于自动分割CT图像中的炎症和纤维化肺部区域，适用于多种肺部疾病。
AI.motivation: 需要快速定量分析CT图像，但现有算法难以应对不同密度增强的肺部病变，且缺乏某些疾病（如COVID-19）的标注数据。
AI.method: 采用多态训练方法，结合人类COPD肺部和动物急性肺损伤的标注数据训练单一网络，并利用LobeNet进行叶段分割及层次聚类分析COVID-19亚型。
AI.result: 在87例COVID-19 CT图像中，平均对称表面距离为0.495±0.309mm，Dice系数达0.985±0.011，识别出四种基于叶段病变的COVID-19影像表型。
AI.conclusion: 多态训练方法无需特定疾病训练数据即可准确分割肺部病变，且能有效识别严重病例的全叶段受累特征。

The polymorphic training approach was able to accurately segment COVID-19 cases with diffuse consolidation without requiring COVID-19 cases for training. 本研究的目的是开发一种全自动分割算法，该算法对各种密度增强的肺部异常具有鲁棒性，以促进计算机断层扫描图像的快速定量分析。提出了一种多态训练方法，其中将特异标记的患有慢性阻塞性肺病的人类左肺和右肺以及非特异标记的患有急性肺损伤的动物的肺纳入训练单个神经网络中。由此产生的网络旨在预测人类有或没有弥漫性混浊和实变的左肺和右肺区域。尽管没有后三种疾病的标记训练数据，但所提出的肺部分割算法的性能在患有 COPD 的受试者的 CT 扫描上进行了广泛评估，确认了 COVID-19、肺癌和 IPF。使用左肺分割和右肺分割作为 LobeNet 算法的输入来获得肺叶分割。使用层次聚类进行区域脑叶分析来识别 COVID-19 的放射学亚型。使用半自动和手动校正的分割在 87 张 COVID-19 CT 图像中对所提出的肺部分割算法进行定量评估，实现平均对称表面距离 $0.495 \pm 0.309$ mm 和 Dice 系数 $0.985 \pm 0.011$。分层聚类根据实变和通气不良组织的肺叶部分确定了 COVID-19 的四种放射照相表型。左下叶和右下叶始终更容易受到通气和巩固不良的影响。然而，最严重的病例显示所有肺叶均受累。多态训练方法能够通过弥散性整合准确地分割 COVID-19 病例，而不需要对 COVID-19 病例进行训练。 开发一种多分辨率卷积神经网络，用于自动分割CT图像中的炎症和纤维化肺部区域，适用于多种肺部疾病。 Sarah E. Gerard,Jacob Herrmann,Yi Xin,Kevin T. Martin,Emanuele Rezoagli,Davide Ippolito,Giacomo Bellani,Maurizio Cereda,Junfeng Guo,Eric A. Hoffman,David W. Kaczka,Joseph M. Reinhardt eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Improving Schroeppel and Shamir's Algorithm for Subset Sum via Orthogonal Vectors
title_zh: 通过正交向量改进 Schroeppel 和 Shamir 的子集和算法
comment: STOC 2021, 38 pages, 3 figures
comments: STOC 2021, 38 pages, 3 figures
abstract: We present an $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{0.5n})$ time and $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{0.249999n})$ space randomized algorithm for solving worst-case Subset Sum instances with $n$ integers. This is the first improvement over the long-standing $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{n/2})$ time and $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{n/4})$ space algorithm due to Schroeppel and Shamir (FOCS 1979). We breach this gap in two steps: (1) We present a space efficient reduction to the Orthogonal Vectors Problem (OV), one of the most central problem in Fine-Grained Complexity. The reduction is established via an intricate combination of the method of Schroeppel and Shamir, and the representation technique introduced by Howgrave-Graham and Joux (EUROCRYPT 2010) for designing Subset Sum algorithms for the average case regime. (2) We provide an algorithm for OV that detects an orthogonal pair among $N$ given vectors in $\{0,1\}^d$ with support size $d/4$ in time $\tilde{O}(N\cdot2^d/\binom{d}{d/4})$. Our algorithm for OV is based on and refines the representative families framework developed by Fomin, Lokshtanov, Panolan and Saurabh (J. ACM 2016). Our reduction uncovers a curious tight relation between Subset Sum and OV, because any improvement of our algorithm for OV would imply an improvement over the runtime of Schroeppel and Shamir, which is also a long standing open problem.

This is the first improvement over the long-standing $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{n/2})$ time and $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{n/4})$ space algorithm due to Schroeppel and Shamir (FOCS 1979). We breach this gap in two steps: (1) We present a space efficient reduction to the Orthogonal Vectors Problem (OV), one of the most central problem in Fine-Grained Complexity. The reduction is established via an intricate combination of the method of Schroeppel and Shamir, and the representation technique introduced by Howgrave-Graham and Joux (EUROCRYPT 2010) for designing Subset Sum algorithms for the average case regime. (2) We provide an algorithm for OV that detects an orthogonal pair among $N$ given vectors in $\{0,1\}^d$ with support size $d/4$ in time $\tilde{O}(N\cdot2^d/\binom{d}{d/4})$. Our algorithm for OV is based on and refines the representative families framework developed by Fomin, Lokshtanov, Panolan and Saurabh (J. ACM 2016). Our reduction uncovers a curious tight relation between Subset Sum and OV, because any improvement of our algorithm for OV would imply an improvement over the runtime of Schroeppel and Shamir, which is also a long standing open problem.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个 $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{0.5n})$ 时间和 $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{0.249999n})$ 空间随机算法，用于求解具有 $n$ 整数的最坏情况子集和实例。这是 Schroeppel 和 Shamir (FOCS 1979) 对长期存在的 $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{n/2})$ 时间和 $\mathcal{O}^\star(2^{n/4})$ 空间算法的首次改进。我们分两步突破了这一差距：（1）我们提出了正交向量问题（OV）的空间有效简化，这是细粒度复杂性中最核心的问题之一。这种简化是通过 Schroeppel 和 Shamir 的方法与 Howgrave-Graham 和 Joux (EUROCRYPT 2010) 引入的表示技术（用于设计平均情况下的子集和算法）的复杂组合来建立的。 (2) 我们为 OV 提供了一种算法，该算法在 $\{0,1\}^d$ 中检测 $N$ 给定向量之间的正交对，支持大小为 $d/4$，及时 $\tilde{O}(N\cdot2^d/\binom{d}{d/4})$。我们的 OV 算法基于并改进了 Fomin、Lokshtanov、Panolan 和 Saurabh 开发的代表性家族框架 (J. ACM 2016)。我们的归约揭示了子集和与 OV 之间奇怪的紧密关系，因为我们对 OV 算法的任何改进都意味着 Schroeppel 和 Shamir 的运行时间的改进，这也是一个长期存在的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过将子集和问题与正交向量问题（OV）结合，提出了改进的随机化算法，将时间复杂度降至O*(2^0.5n)，空间复杂度降至O*(2^0.249999n)。
AI.motivation: Schroeppel和Shamir的子集和算法长期保持O*(2^{n/2})时间复杂度，但无法进一步优化，需突破现有方法瓶颈。
AI.method: 分两步改进：1）通过结合Schroeppel-Shamir方法与Howgrave-Graham-Joux的表示技术，将子集和问题高效归约到OV问题；2）基于Fomin等人的代表集框架，设计更高效的OV算法。
AI.result: 提出首个突破O*(2^{n/2})时间复杂度的子集和算法，同时建立子集和与OV问题的紧密联系，证明OV算法改进将直接影响子集和问题的求解效率。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了子集和问题与OV问题的深层关联，为两个领域提供了交叉研究的新方向，且算法改进具有理论与实践双重意义。

authors_text: Jingwei Ma,Jiahui Wen,Panpan Zhang,Guangda Zhang,Xue Li
title: A Unified Model for Recommendation with Selective Neighborhood Modeling
title_zh: 选择性邻域建模的统一推荐模型
abstract: Neighborhood-based recommenders are a major class of Collaborative Filtering (CF) models. The intuition is to exploit neighbors with similar preferences for bridging unseen user-item pairs and alleviating data sparseness. Many existing works propose neural attention networks to aggregate neighbors and place higher weights on specific subsets of users for recommendation. However, the neighborhood information is not necessarily always informative, and the noises in the neighborhood can negatively affect the model performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel neighborhood-based recommender, where a hybrid gated network is designed to automatically separate similar neighbors from dissimilar (noisy) ones, and aggregate those similar neighbors to comprise neighborhood representations. The confidence in the neighborhood is also addressed by putting higher weights on the neighborhood representations if we are confident with the neighborhood information, and vice versa. In addition, a user-neighbor component is proposed to explicitly regularize user-neighbor proximity in the latent space. These two components are combined into a unified model to complement each other for the recommendation task. Extensive experiments on three publicly available datasets show that the proposed model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art neighborhood-based recommenders. We also study different variants of the proposed model to justify the underlying intuition of the proposed hybrid gated network and user-neighbor modeling components.
summary: Neighborhood-based recommenders are a major class of Collaborative Filtering (CF) models. The intuition is to exploit neighbors with similar preferences for bridging unseen user-item pairs and alleviating data sparseness. Many existing works propose neural attention networks to aggregate neighbors and place higher weights on specific subsets of users for recommendation. However, the neighborhood information is not necessarily always informative, and the noises in the neighborhood can negatively affect the model performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel neighborhood-based recommender, where a hybrid gated network is designed to automatically separate similar neighbors from dissimilar (noisy) ones, and aggregate those similar neighbors to comprise neighborhood representations. The confidence in the neighborhood is also addressed by putting higher weights on the neighborhood representations if we are confident with the neighborhood information, and vice versa. In addition, a user-neighbor component is proposed to explicitly regularize user-neighbor proximity in the latent space. These two components are combined into a unified model to complement each other for the recommendation task. Extensive experiments on three publicly available datasets show that the proposed model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art neighborhood-based recommenders. We also study different variants of the proposed model to justify the underlying intuition of the proposed hybrid gated network and user-neighbor modeling components.
abstract_zh: 基于邻域的推荐器是协作过滤（CF）模型的主要类别。直觉是利用具有相似偏好的邻居来桥接看不见的用户-项目对并减轻数据稀疏性。许多现有的工作提出神经注意网络来聚合邻居并为特定的用户子集赋予更高的权重以进行推荐。然而，邻域信息不一定总是提供信息，并且邻域中的噪声会对模型性能产生负面影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于邻域的推荐器，其中混合门控网络被设计为自动将相似的邻居与不相似（嘈杂）的邻居分开，并将这些相似的邻居聚合以构成邻域表示。如果我们对邻域信息有信心，则还可以通过对邻域表示赋予更高的权重来解决对邻域的置信度，反之亦然。此外，还提出了一个用户邻居组件来显式地规范潜在空间中的用户邻居接近度。这两个组件被组合成一个统一的模型，以在推荐任务中相互补充。对三个公开可用数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的模型始终优于最先进的基于邻里的推荐器。我们还研究了所提出模型的不同变体，以证明所提出的混合门控网络和用户邻居建模组件的基本直觉。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的推荐模型，通过选择性邻域建模来提升协同过滤效果。
AI.motivation: 现有邻域推荐模型易受噪声影响，无法有效区分相似与不相似邻居，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计混合门控网络自动分离相似邻居，结合置信度调整权重，并引入用户-邻居正则化组件，整合为统一模型。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，该模型优于现有最先进方法，验证了组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: 选择性邻域建模与用户-邻居正则化协同工作，能有效提升推荐系统鲁棒性与准确性。

These two components are combined into a unified model to complement each other for the recommendation task. Extensive experiments on three publicly available datasets show that the proposed model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art neighborhood-based recommenders. We also study different variants of the proposed model to justify the underlying intuition of the proposed hybrid gated network and user-neighbor modeling components. 基于邻域的推荐器是协作过滤（CF）模型的主要类别。直觉是利用具有相似偏好的邻居来桥接看不见的用户-项目对并减轻数据稀疏性。许多现有的工作提出神经注意网络来聚合邻居并为特定的用户子集赋予更高的权重以进行推荐。然而，邻域信息不一定总是提供信息，并且邻域中的噪声会对模型性能产生负面影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于邻域的推荐器，其中混合门控网络被设计为自动将相似的邻居与不相似（嘈杂）的邻居分开，并将这些相似的邻居聚合以构成邻域表示。如果我们对邻域信息有信心，则还可以通过对邻域表示赋予更高的权重来解决对邻域的置信度，反之亦然。此外，还提出了一个用户邻居组件来显式地规范潜在空间中的用户邻居接近度。这两个组件被组合成一个统一的模型，以在推荐任务中相互补充。对三个公开可用数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的模型始终优于最先进的基于邻里的推荐器。我们还研究了所提出模型的不同变体，以证明所提出的混合门控网络和用户邻居建模组件的基本直觉。 本文提出一种统一的推荐模型，通过选择性邻域建模来提升协同过滤效果。 Jingwei Ma,Jiahui Wen,Panpan Zhang,Guangda Zhang,Xue Li cs.IR,cs.AI
